- [ ] **Action 3.6 (2–5 minutes): Create the atomic queue command**

Create `core/scripts/polylane-queue.sh` with this complete body:

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
umask 077
SELF=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd -P)
RUNTIME=$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh
[ "${1:-}" = --dir ] || exit 2
runtime=$2; shift 2
case $runtime in /*) : ;; *) exit 2 ;; esac
RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
. "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"

current_state() { printf '%s/current/state.json' "$runtime"; }
canonical_json() { jq -Sc . "$1"; }
sha() {
  if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then sha256sum | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'
  else shasum -a 256 | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'; fi
}
ownership_hash() { jq -Sc '{ownership_globs,resource_locks}' "$1" | sha; }
item_hash() { jq -Sc 'del(.item_hash)' "$1" | sha; }
array_hash() { jq -Sc 'map({id,item_hash,ownership_hash})|sort_by(.id)' "$1" | sha; }
selection_hash() { jq -Sc 'del(.selection_hash)' "$1" | sha; }
glob_prefix() {
  value=$1; best=$value
  for candidate in "${value%%\**}" "${value%%\?*}" "${value%%\[*}"; do
    if [ "${#candidate}" -lt "${#best}" ]; then best=$candidate; fi
  done
  printf '%s' "$best"
}
glob_conflict() {
  left=$(glob_prefix "$1"); right=$(glob_prefix "$2")
  [ -n "$left" ] && [ -n "$right" ] || return 0
  case $left in "$right"*) return 0;; esac
  case $right in "$left"*) return 0;; esac
  return 1
}
ownership_conflict() {
  left=$1 right=$2
  while IFS= read -r -d '' left_glob; do
    while IFS= read -r -d '' right_glob; do
      glob_conflict "$left_glob" "$right_glob" && return 0
    done < <(jq -j '.ownership_globs[] | ., "\u0000"' "$right")
  done < <(jq -j '.ownership_globs[] | ., "\u0000"' "$left")
  while IFS= read -r -d '' resource; do
    jq -e --arg resource "$resource" '.resource_locks|index($resource)!=null' "$right" >/dev/null && return 0
  done < <(jq -j '.resource_locks[] | ., "\u0000"' "$left")
  return 1
}
valid_kind() {
  case $1 in
    cycle|digest|skill_discovery|research|verification|council|certification|cycle_suggestions|final_suggestions|\
    checkpoint|retry|reflection_repair|alternate_model|recarve|alternate_approach|\
    local_test|static_analysis|diff_review|merge_prepare|prompt_prepare|documentation|\
    cleanup|provider_probe|state_reconcile|session_recover) return 0 ;;
    *) return 1 ;;
  esac
}
validate_item() {
  file=$1
  jq -e 'type=="object" and .schema_version==1 and
    (.id|type=="string" and test("^[A-Za-z0-9._:-]{1,160}$")) and
    (.kind|type=="string") and (.mode|IN("online","offline","probe")) and
    (.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and (.priority|type=="number") and
    (.goal_ref|type=="string" and length>0) and (.args|type=="object") and
    ([.args|paths(scalars)|last] | all(. as $key |
      ($key|tostring|IN("command","shell","script")|not))) and
    (.depends_on|type=="array") and (.ownership_globs|type=="array") and
    (.resource_locks|type=="array") and
    (.depends_on == (.depends_on|sort|unique)) and
    all(.depends_on[];type=="string" and test("^[A-Za-z0-9._:-]{1,160}$")) and
    (.next_action_at|type=="number") and (.deadline_at|type=="number") and
    .deadline_at>=.next_action_at and
    (.ownership_globs == (.ownership_globs|sort|unique)) and
    (.resource_locks == (.resource_locks|sort|unique)) and
    all(.ownership_globs[]; length>0 and (startswith("/")|not) and (contains("..")|not)) and
    all(.resource_locks[]; test("^[A-Za-z0-9._:-]+$"))' "$file" >/dev/null || return 5
  valid_kind "$(jq -r '.kind' "$file")" || return 5
}
emit_payload() {
  type=$1 action=$2 payload=$3
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" emit queue "$type" "$action" --payload-file "$payload"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" reduce
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" wake
}
mutation_begin() {
  runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/queue-command.lock"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" reduce
}
mutation_end() {
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/queue-command.lock"
}
dump_queue() { jq '.queue' "$(current_state)"; }

enqueue_item() {
  file=$1; validate_item "$file"
  mutation_begin
  id=$(jq -r '.id' "$file")
  jq -e --arg id "$id" 'all((.queue.items // [])[]; .id!=$id)' "$(current_state)" >/dev/null || {
    mutation_end; return 5; }
  payload=$runtime/enqueue.$$.json
  hash=$(ownership_hash "$file")
  jq --arg hash "$hash" '. + {ownership_hash:$hash}' "$file" >"$payload"
  emit_payload queue_enqueue "$id" "$payload"
  rm -f "$payload"
  mutation_end
}

ready_items() {
  mode=$1; shift
  [ "${1:-}" = --limit ] || return 2; limit=$2; shift 2
  now=$(runtime_now); [ "$#" -eq 0 ] || now=$(runtime_test_now_arg "$@") || return 2
  snapshot=$(runtime_current_dir) || return 5
  state=$snapshot/state.json
  snapshot_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$state")
  revision=$(jq -r '.queue.revision' "$state")
  provider=$(jq -r '.queue.provider_state' "$state")
  case $mode in online|offline|probe) :;; *) return 2;; esac
  work=$(mktemp -d "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/polylane-ready.XXXXXX")
  trap 'rm -rf "$work"' RETURN
  jq --arg mode "$mode" --argjson now "$now" --arg provider "$provider" '
    .queue as $q | [.queue.items[] |
      select((.status=="ready" or .status=="scheduled") and .next_action_at<=$now and
        .mode==$mode and (($mode!="online") or $provider=="available")) |
      select([.depends_on[] as $dependency |
        any($q.items[]; .id==$dependency and .status=="complete")]|all)] |
    sort_by(-.priority,.id)' "$state" >"$work/candidates.json"
  jq '[.queue.items[]|select(.status=="starting" or .status=="running")]' "$state" >"$work/active.json"
  printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$work/selected.json"
  while IFS= read -r -d '' id; do
    jq --arg id "$id" '.[]|select(.id==$id)' "$work/candidates.json" >"$work/item.json"
    computed=$(ownership_hash "$work/item.json")
    [ "$(jq -r '.ownership_hash // ""' "$work/item.json")" = "$computed" ] || {
      rm -rf "$work"; trap - RETURN; return 5; }
    conflict=0
    while IFS= read -r -d '' active_id; do
      jq --arg id "$active_id" '.[]|select(.id==$id)' "$work/active.json" >"$work/other.json"
      ownership_conflict "$work/item.json" "$work/other.json" && { conflict=1; break; }
    done < <(jq -j '.[].id | ., "\u0000"' "$work/active.json")
    if [ "$conflict" -eq 0 ]; then
      while IFS= read -r -d '' selected_id; do
        jq --arg id "$selected_id" '.[]|select(.id==$id)' "$work/selected.json" >"$work/other.json"
        ownership_conflict "$work/item.json" "$work/other.json" && { conflict=1; break; }
      done < <(jq -j '.[].id | ., "\u0000"' "$work/selected.json")
    fi
    [ "$conflict" -eq 0 ] || continue
    hash=$computed; full_hash=$(item_hash "$work/item.json")
    jq --arg hash "$hash" --arg item_hash "$full_hash" \
      '. + {ownership_hash:$hash,item_hash:$item_hash}' "$work/item.json" >"$work/hashed.json"
    jq --slurpfile item "$work/hashed.json" '. + [$item[0]]' "$work/selected.json" >"$work/selected.next"
    mv "$work/selected.next" "$work/selected.json"
    [ "$(jq 'length' "$work/selected.json")" -lt "$limit" ] || break
  done < <(jq -j '.[].id | ., "\u0000"' "$work/candidates.json")
  proof=$(array_hash "$work/selected.json")
  jq -n --arg snapshot_path "$snapshot" --arg snapshot_hash "$snapshot_hash" \
    --argjson snapshot_revision "$(jq -r .revision "$state")" --argjson queue_revision "$revision" \
    --arg mode "$mode" --argjson selected_at "$now" --arg proof "$proof" --argjson limit "$limit" \
    --slurpfile items "$work/selected.json" \
    '{schema_version:2,snapshot_path:$snapshot_path,snapshot_hash:$snapshot_hash,
      snapshot_revision:$snapshot_revision,queue_revision:$queue_revision,mode:$mode,
      selected_at:$selected_at,items:$items[0],aggregate_ownership_proof:$proof,limit:$limit}' \
    >"$work/selection.base"
  seal=$(selection_hash "$work/selection.base")
  jq --arg seal "$seal" '.+{selection_hash:$seal}' "$work/selection.base"
  rm -rf "$work"; trap - RETURN
}

reserve_selected() {
  selection=$1 guardian_pid=$2 guardian_generation=$3
  jq -e '.schema_version==2 and (.items|type=="array" and length>0) and
    (.limit|type=="number" and .>=1 and floor==.) and (.items|length)<=.limit and
    (([.items[].id]|length)==([.items[].id]|unique|length)) and
    (.snapshot_path|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
    (.snapshot_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.selected_at|type=="number") and (.aggregate_ownership_proof|startswith("sha256:")) and
    (.selection_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    all(.items[];(.item_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
      (.ownership_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")))' "$selection" >/dev/null || return 7
  [ "$(selection_hash "$selection")" = "$(jq -r .selection_hash "$selection")" ] || return 7
  mutation_begin
  selected_snapshot=$(jq -r .snapshot_path "$selection")
  case $selected_snapshot in "$runtime"/snapshots/*) :;; *) mutation_end; return 7;; esac
  [ -d "$selected_snapshot" ] && [ ! -L "$selected_snapshot" ] || {
    mutation_end; return 7; }
  selected_state=$selected_snapshot/state.json
  [ -f "$selected_state" ] && [ ! -L "$selected_state" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$selected_state")" = "$(jq -r .snapshot_hash "$selection")" ] &&
    [ "$(jq -r .revision "$selected_state")" = "$(jq -r .snapshot_revision "$selection")" ] || {
      mutation_end; return 7; }
  snapshot=$(runtime_current_dir) || { mutation_end; return 7; }
  state=$snapshot/state.json
  now=$(runtime_now); selected_at=$(jq -r .selected_at "$selection")
  [ "$selected_at" -le "$now" ] && [ $((now - selected_at)) -le 5 ] || {
    mutation_end; return 7; }
  expected=$(jq -r '.queue_revision' "$selection")
  [ "$expected" = "$(jq -r '.queue.revision' "$selected_state")" ] || {
    mutation_end; return 7; }
  [ "$expected" = "$(jq -r '.queue.revision' "$state")" ] || { mutation_end; return 7; }
  guardian_token=$(jq -r --argjson pid "$guardian_pid" --argjson generation "$guardian_generation" '
    select(.guardian.pid==$pid and .guardian.generation==$generation and .guardian.role=="guardian") |
    .guardian.start_token' "$state")
  [ -n "$guardian_token" ] && [ "$(runtime_start_token "$guardian_pid" || true)" = "$guardian_token" ] || {
    mutation_end; return 7; }
  selected_hashes=$runtime/selection-hashes.$$.json
  jq '[.items[]|{id,item_hash,ownership_hash}]' "$selection" >"$selected_hashes"
  [ "$(array_hash "$selected_hashes")" = "$(jq -r .aggregate_ownership_proof "$selection")" ] || {
    rm -f "$selected_hashes"; mutation_end; return 7; }
  reservations=$runtime/reservations.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson expected "$expected" '{expected_queue_revision:$expected,reservations:[]}' >"$reservations"
  checked=$runtime/checked.$$.json; printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$checked"
  while IFS= read -r -d '' id; do
    item=$runtime/item.$$.json
    jq --arg id "$id" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)' "$state" >"$item"
    jq -e --arg mode "$(jq -r .mode "$selection")" --argjson now "$now" '
      (.status=="ready" or .status=="scheduled") and ($mode=="mixed" or .mode==$mode) and
      .next_action_at<=$now and .deadline_at>$now' "$item" >/dev/null || {
      rm -f "$item" "$reservations" "$selected_hashes" "$checked"; mutation_end; return 7; }
    mode=$(jq -r .mode "$item"); provider=$(jq -r .queue.provider_state "$state")
    [ "$mode" != online ] || [ "$provider" = available ] || {
      rm -f "$item" "$reservations" "$selected_hashes" "$checked"; mutation_end; return 7; }
    while IFS= read -r -d '' dependency; do
      jq -e --arg dependency "$dependency" 'any(.queue.items[];.id==$dependency and .status=="complete")' "$state" >/dev/null || {
        rm -f "$item" "$reservations" "$selected_hashes" "$checked"; mutation_end; return 7; }
    done < <(jq -j '.depends_on[] | ., "\u0000"' "$item")
    selected=$(jq -r --arg id "$id" '.items[]|select(.id==$id)|.ownership_hash' "$selection")
    selected_item=$(jq -r --arg id "$id" '.items[]|select(.id==$id)|.item_hash' "$selection")
    computed=$(ownership_hash "$item")
    persisted=$(jq -r '.ownership_hash // ""' "$item")
    computed_item=$(item_hash "$item")
    [ "$selected" = "$computed" ] && [ "$persisted" = "$computed" ] &&
      [ "$selected_item" = "$computed_item" ] || {
      rm -f "$item" "$reservations" "$selected_hashes" "$checked"; mutation_end; return 7; }
    while IFS= read -r -d '' active_id; do
      case " $(jq -r '.items[].id' "$selection" | tr '\n' ' ') " in *" $active_id "*) continue;; esac
      jq --arg id "$active_id" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)' "$state" >"$runtime/other.$$.json"
      ownership_conflict "$item" "$runtime/other.$$.json" && {
        rm -f "$runtime/other.$$.json" "$item" "$reservations" "$selected_hashes" "$checked"; mutation_end; return 7; }
      rm -f "$runtime/other.$$.json"
    done < <(jq -j '.queue.items[]|select(.status=="starting" or .status=="running")|.id,"\u0000"' "$state")
    while IFS= read -r -d '' checked_id; do
      jq --arg id "$checked_id" '.[]|select(.id==$id)' "$checked" >"$runtime/other.$$.json"
      ownership_conflict "$item" "$runtime/other.$$.json" && {
        rm -f "$runtime/other.$$.json" "$item" "$reservations" "$selected_hashes" "$checked"; mutation_end; return 7; }
      rm -f "$runtime/other.$$.json"
    done < <(jq -j '.[].id | ., "\u0000"' "$checked")
    nonce=$(od -An -N16 -tx1 /dev/urandom 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' \n')
    [ -n "$nonce" ] || nonce="$$-$(runtime_wall_now)-${RANDOM:-0}"
    token=$(printf '%s:%s:%s:%s' "$id" "$guardian_pid" "$guardian_generation" "$nonce" | sha)
    jq --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" --argjson pid "$guardian_pid" \
      --arg guardian_start_token "$guardian_token" --argjson generation "$guardian_generation" \
      --argjson at "$(runtime_now)" --argjson deadline "$(jq -r .deadline_at "$item")" \
      '.reservations += [{id:$id,claim:{token:$token,guardian_pid:$pid,
        guardian_start_token:$guardian_start_token,guardian_generation:$generation,
        claimed_at:$at,expires_at:([$at+15,$deadline]|min),worker_pid:null,
        worker_start_token:null,proof_fingerprint:null}}]' "$reservations" >"$reservations.next"
    mv "$reservations.next" "$reservations"
    jq --slurpfile item "$item" '. + [$item[0]]' "$checked" >"$checked.next" && mv "$checked.next" "$checked"
    rm -f "$item"
  done < <(jq -j '.items[].id | ., "\u0000"' "$selection")
  emit_payload queue_reserve reserve "$reservations"
  failed=0
  while IFS= read -r -d '' id; do
    expected_token=$(jq -r --arg id "$id" '.reservations[]|select(.id==$id)|.claim.token' "$reservations")
    jq -e --arg id "$id" --arg token "$expected_token" '
      any(.queue.items[];.id==$id and .status=="starting" and .claim.token==$token)' "$(current_state)" >/dev/null || failed=1
  done < <(jq -j '.reservations[].id | ., "\u0000"' "$reservations")
  rm -f "$reservations" "$selected_hashes" "$checked"
  mutation_end
  [ "$failed" -eq 0 ] || return 7
}

claim_event() {
  type=$1 id=$2 token=$3; shift 3
  mutation_begin
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json; now=$(runtime_now)
  item=$(jq --arg id "$id" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)' "$state")
  [ "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r '.claim.token')" = "$token" ] || { mutation_end; return 6; }
  guardian_pid=$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .claim.guardian_pid)
  guardian_token=$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .claim.guardian_start_token)
  guardian_generation=$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .claim.guardian_generation)
  jq -e --argjson pid "$guardian_pid" --arg token "$guardian_token" \
    --argjson generation "$guardian_generation" '
    .guardian.pid==$pid and .guardian.start_token==$token and
    .guardian.generation==$generation and .guardian.role=="guardian"' "$state" >/dev/null &&
    [ "$(runtime_start_token "$guardian_pid" || true)" = "$guardian_token" ] || {
      mutation_end; return 6; }
  [ "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .claim.expires_at)" -gt "$now" ] || {
    mutation_end; return 6; }
  payload=$runtime/claim.$$.json
  case $type in
    queue_activate)
      [ "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .status)" = starting ] &&
        [ "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .deadline_at)" -gt "$now" ] &&
        [ "$(runtime_start_token "$1" || true)" = "$2" ] && [ "$3" -gt "$now" ] &&
        [ "$3" -le $((now + 90)) ] &&
        [ "$3" -le "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .deadline_at)" ] || {
        mutation_end; return 6; }
      jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" --argjson worker_pid "$1" --arg worker_start_token "$2" \
        --argjson expires_at "$3" --argjson guardian_pid "$guardian_pid" \
        --arg guardian_start_token "$guardian_token" --argjson guardian_generation "$guardian_generation" \
      '{id:$id,token:$token,worker_pid:$worker_pid,worker_start_token:$worker_start_token,
        expires_at:$expires_at,guardian_pid:$guardian_pid,
        guardian_start_token:$guardian_start_token,guardian_generation:$guardian_generation}' >"$payload" ;;
    queue_renew|queue_complete|queue_fail)
      worker_pid=$1; worker_token=$2; shift 2
      [ "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .status)" = running ] || { mutation_end; return 6; }
      bound_pid=$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r '.claim.worker_pid // 0')
      bound_token=$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r '.claim.worker_start_token // ""')
      [ "$worker_pid" = "$bound_pid" ] && [ "$worker_token" = "$bound_token" ] &&
        [ -n "$worker_token" ] && [ "$(runtime_start_token "$worker_pid" || true)" = "$worker_token" ] || {
        mutation_end; return 6; }
      case $type in
        queue_renew)
          [ "$2" -gt "$(runtime_now)" ] && [ "$2" -le $(( $(runtime_now) + 90 )) ] &&
            [ "$2" -le "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .deadline_at)" ] || {
            mutation_end; return 5; }
          jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" --argjson worker_pid "$worker_pid" \
            --arg worker_start_token "$worker_token" --arg proof_fingerprint "$1" --argjson expires_at "$2" \
            '{id:$id,token:$token,worker_pid:$worker_pid,worker_start_token:$worker_start_token,
              proof_fingerprint:$proof_fingerprint,expires_at:$expires_at}' >"$payload" ;;
        queue_complete) jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" --argjson worker_pid "$worker_pid" \
          --arg worker_start_token "$worker_token" \
          '{id:$id,token:$token,worker_pid:$worker_pid,worker_start_token:$worker_start_token}' >"$payload" ;;
        queue_fail)
          [ "$2" != "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .strategy_hash)" ] &&
            printf '%s' "$2" | grep -Eq '^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$' || { mutation_end; return 5; }
          jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" --argjson worker_pid "$worker_pid" \
          --arg worker_start_token "$worker_token" --arg reason "$1" --arg strategy_hash "$2" --argjson retry_at "$3" \
          '{id:$id,token:$token,worker_pid:$worker_pid,worker_start_token:$worker_start_token,
            reason:$reason,strategy_hash:$strategy_hash,retry_at:$retry_at}' >"$payload" ;;
      esac ;;
  esac
  if [ "$type" = queue_renew ]; then
    old=$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r '.claim.proof_fingerprint // ""')
    proof=$(jq -r .proof_fingerprint "$payload")
    [ "$old" != "$proof" ] || { rm -f "$payload"; mutation_end; return 5; }
  fi
  emit_payload "$type" "$id" "$payload"
  rm -f "$payload"
  mutation_end
}

reclaim_expired() {
  now=$(runtime_now); [ "$#" -eq 0 ] || now=$(runtime_test_now_arg "$@") || return 2
  mutation_begin
  state=$(current_state); payload=$runtime/reclaim.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson at "$now" '{requeue_at:$at,claims:[]}' >"$payload"
  while IFS= read -r -d '' id; do
    item=$runtime/reclaim-item.$$.json
    jq --arg id "$id" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)' "$state" >"$item"
    expired=$(jq -r --argjson now "$now" '.claim.expires_at<=$now' "$item")
    guardian_pid=$(jq -r .claim.guardian_pid "$item"); guardian_token=$(jq -r .claim.guardian_start_token "$item")
    guardian_generation=$(jq -r .claim.guardian_generation "$item")
    current_guardian=$(jq -r '[.guardian.pid,.guardian.generation,.guardian.start_token]|map(tostring)|join(":")' "$state")
    owner="$guardian_pid:$guardian_generation:$guardian_token"
    live=$(runtime_start_token "$guardian_pid" || true)
    [ "$expired" = true ] || { [ "$owner" = "$current_guardian" ] && [ "$live" = "$guardian_token" ]; } || expired=true
    [ "$expired" = true ] || { rm -f "$item"; continue; }
    claim=$(jq -r .claim.token "$item")
    jq --arg id "$id" --arg token "$claim" --arg reason claim_expired \
      '.claims += [{id:$id,token:$token,reason:$reason}]' "$payload" >"$payload.next" && mv "$payload.next" "$payload"
    rm -f "$item"
  done < <(jq -j '.queue.items[]|select(.status=="starting" or .status=="running")|.id,"\u0000"' "$state")
  # Fence every still-matching worker and its dynamically discovered descendants through
  # the one production STOP -> stable snapshot -> CONT -> TERM -> wait -> KILL path before
  # publishing a runnable requeue. If identity absence is not proven, leave the claim
  # non-runnable for the next guardian tick.
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r id claim pid token; do
    [ "$pid" != null ] || continue
    [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" = "$token" ] || continue
    actor=$runtime/actor-worker-$id.json
    [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] &&
      jq -e --argjson pid "$pid" --arg token "$token" --arg claim "$claim" '
        .actor=="worker" and .pid==$pid and .start_token==$token and
        .generation_token==$claim and .lease_valid==true' "$actor" >/dev/null || {
      rm -f "$payload"; mutation_end; return 75; }
    "$SELF/polylane-process.sh" adopt-or-fence "$runtime" "worker-$id" shutdown || {
      rm -f "$payload"; mutation_end; return 75; }
    [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" != "$token" ] || { rm -f "$payload"; mutation_end; return 75; }
  done < <(jq -r --slurpfile p "$payload" '.queue.items[] as $item |
    $p[0].claims[]|select(.id==$item.id and .token==$item.claim.token)|
    [$item.id,$item.claim.token,$item.claim.worker_pid,$item.claim.worker_start_token]|@tsv' "$state")
  if [ "$(jq '.claims|length' "$payload")" -gt 0 ]; then emit_payload queue_reclaim reclaim "$payload"; fi
  rm -f "$payload"; mutation_end
}

set_provider_state() {
  state=$1 action=${2:-provider-$state}
  case $state in available|rate_limited|unavailable) :;; *) return 2;; esac
  printf '%s\n' "$action" | grep -Eq '^[A-Za-z0-9._:-]{1,160}$' || return 2
  mutation_begin
  previous=$(jq -er '.queue.provider_state|select(type=="string")' "$(current_state)")
  [ "$previous" != "$state" ] || { mutation_end; return 0; }
  payload=$runtime/provider-state.$$.json
  jq -n --arg previous "$previous" --arg state "$state" \
    '{previous_state:$previous,state:$state}' >"$payload"
  emit_payload provider_state "$action" "$payload"
  rm -f "$payload"
  [ "$(jq -r .queue.provider_state "$(current_state)")" = "$state" ] || {
    mutation_end; return 5; }
  mutation_end
}

ensure_progress() {
  goal=$1; shift; now=$(runtime_now)
  [ "$#" -eq 0 ] || now=$(runtime_test_now_arg "$@") || return 2
  complete=$(jq -r '.complete' "$goal")
  [ "$complete" = false ] || return 0
  [ "$(jq -r '.phase' "$(current_state)")" != WAITING_FOR_USER ] || return 0
  active=$(jq '
    .queue as $q |
    def viable($id;$seen):
      ([ $q.items[]|select(.id==$id) ][0] // null) as $item |
      if $item==null or ($seen|index($id))!=null then false
      elif $item.status=="complete" then true
      elif ($item.status|IN("ready","scheduled","starting","running")) then
        ([ $item.depends_on[]|viable(.;$seen+[$id]) ]|all)
      else false end;
    [.queue.items[] as $candidate |
      select($candidate.status|IN("ready","scheduled","starting","running")) |
      select([$candidate.depends_on[]|viable(.;[$candidate.id])]|all)]|length' "$(current_state)")
  [ "$active" -eq 0 ] || return 0
  goal_ref=$(jq -r '.next_goal_ref' "$goal")
  generation=$(jq --arg goal "$goal_ref" '[.queue.items[]|select(.kind=="state_reconcile" and .goal_ref==$goal)|
    (.args.reconcile_generation//0)]|max//0' "$(current_state)")
  generation=$((generation + 1))
  strategy=$(jq -Sc --arg goal "$goal_ref" --argjson generation "$generation" \
    '. + {goal_ref:$goal,reconcile_generation:$generation}' "$goal" | sha)
  id="reconcile-$generation-${strategy#sha256:}"; id=$(printf '%s' "$id" | cut -c1-72)
  jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg goal "$goal_ref" --arg strategy "$strategy" --argjson generation "$generation" --argjson now "$now" \
    '{schema_version:1,id:$id,kind:"state_reconcile",mode:"offline",status:"ready",priority:100,
    goal_ref:$goal,args:{goal_ref:$goal,reconcile_generation:$generation},depends_on:[],next_action_at:$now,deadline_at:($now+300),
    attempt:1,strategy_hash:$strategy,ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:["runtime:reducer"],claim:null,last_error:null}' \
    >"$runtime/reconcile.$$.json"
  enqueue_item "$runtime/reconcile.$$.json" || {
    rc=$?; jq -e --arg id "$id" 'any(.queue.items[];.id==$id)' "$(current_state)" >/dev/null || return "$rc"; }
  rm -f "$runtime/reconcile.$$.json"
}

if [ "${POLYLANE_QUEUE_SOURCE_ONLY:-0}" = 1 ]; then
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] || return 5 2>/dev/null || exit 5
  return 0 2>/dev/null || exit 0
fi
command=${1:-}; shift || true
case $command in
  enqueue) enqueue_item "$1" ;;
  ready) ready_items "$@" ;;
  reserve-selected) reserve_selected "$@" ;;
  activate) claim_event queue_activate "$@" ;;
  renew-claim) claim_event queue_renew "$@" ;;
  complete) claim_event queue_complete "$@" ;;
  fail) claim_event queue_fail "$@" ;;
  reclaim-expired) reclaim_expired "$@" ;;
  provider-state) set_provider_state "$@" ;;
  ensure-progress) ensure_progress "$@" ;;
  dump) dump_queue ;;
  *) exit 2 ;;
esac
```

Run: `chmod +x core/scripts/polylane-queue.sh && bash -n core/scripts/polylane-queue.sh`

Expected: exit 0 with no output.

- [ ] **Action 3.7 (2–5 minutes): Create recovery routing, worker activation, and fixed dispatch**

Create `core/scripts/polylane-recovery.sh` with this complete body:

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
SELF=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd -P)
. "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
sha_stream() {
  if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then sha256sum | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'
  else shasum -a 256 | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'; fi
}
kind_is_tactic() {
  case $1 in checkpoint|retry|reflection_repair|alternate_model|recarve|alternate_approach|provider_probe) return 0;; *) return 1;; esac
}
contract_kind() {
  case $1 in
    checkpoint|retry|reflection_repair|alternate_model|recarve|alternate_approach|\
    local_test|static_analysis|diff_review|merge_prepare|prompt_prepare|documentation|\
    cleanup|state_reconcile|session_recover) return 0;; *) return 5;; esac
}
run_registered_check() {
  project=$1 goal=$2 check_id=$3 output=$4
  spec=$output.argv.json
  jq -e --arg id "$check_id" '.frozen_checks[$id].argv as $argv |
    ($argv|type=="array" and length>0) and all($argv[];type=="string" and length>0) and
    ($argv[0]|startswith("/"))' "$goal" >/dev/null || return 5
  jq --arg id "$check_id" '.frozen_checks[$id].argv' "$goal" >"$spec"
  argv=()
  while IFS= read -r -d '' value; do argv[${#argv[@]}]=$value; done \
    < <(jq -j '.[] | ., "\u0000"' "$spec")
  executable=${argv[0]}; [ ! -L "$executable" ] || return 5
  canonical=$(cd "$(dirname "$executable")" && pwd -P)/$(basename "$executable")
  [ "$canonical" = "$executable" ] && [ -x "$canonical" ] || return 5
  (cd "$project" && "${argv[@]}") >"$output" 2>&1
}
publish_action() {
  runtime=$1 item=$2 artifact=$3
  id=$(jq -r .id "$item"); kind=$(jq -r .kind "$item")
  hash=$(sha_stream <"$artifact")
  for prior in "$runtime"/events/*.json; do
    [ -f "$prior" ] || continue
    jq -e --arg id "$id" --arg hash "$hash" '
      .type=="recovery_action" and .action_id==$id and .payload.evidence_hash==$hash' "$prior" >/dev/null && return 0
  done
  payload=$runtime/recovery-action.$$.json
  jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg kind "$kind" --arg hash "$hash" --arg artifact "$artifact" \
    '{id:$id,kind:$kind,artifact:$artifact,evidence_hash:$hash}' >"$payload"
  "$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit recovery recovery_action "$id" \
    --fingerprint "$hash" --payload-file "$payload"
  "$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
  rm -f "$payload"
}
enqueue_changed_successor() {
  runtime=$1 item=$2; queue=$SELF/polylane-queue.sh
  source_id=$(jq -r .id "$item"); goal_ref=$(jq -r .goal_ref "$item")
  generation=$(( $(jq -r '.args.strategy_generation // 0' "$item") + 1 ))
  strategy=$(jq -Sc --arg source "$source_id" --argjson generation "$generation" \
    '{source_item:$source,reconcile_generation:$generation}' | sha_stream)
  successor="reconcile-$generation-${strategy#sha256:}"; successor=$(printf '%s' "$successor" | cut -c1-100)
  file=$runtime/successor.$$.json
  jq -n --arg id "$successor" --arg goal "$goal_ref" --arg strategy "$strategy" \
    --argjson generation "$generation" --argjson now "$(date +%s)" \
    '{schema_version:1,id:$id,kind:"state_reconcile",mode:"offline",status:"ready",priority:100,
      goal_ref:$goal,args:{goal_ref:$goal,reconcile_generation:$generation},depends_on:[],
      next_action_at:$now,deadline_at:($now+300),attempt:1,strategy_hash:$strategy,
      ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:["runtime:reducer"],claim:null,last_error:null}' >"$file"
  "$queue" --dir "$runtime" enqueue "$file"
  rm -f "$file"; POLYLANE_SUCCESSOR_ID=$successor; POLYLANE_SUCCESSOR_STRATEGY=$strategy
}
if [ "${POLYLANE_RECOVERY_SOURCE_ONLY:-0}" = 1 ]; then
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] || return 5 2>/dev/null || exit 5
  return 0 2>/dev/null || exit 0
fi
case ${1:-} in
  route)
    reason=$2 actor=$3 context=$4
    runtime=${POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR:?}
    queue=$SELF/polylane-queue.sh
    "$queue" --dir "$runtime" dump >"$runtime/recovery-queue.$$.json"
    initial=$(jq -r '.strategy_generation // 0' "$context")
    generation=$(jq --arg actor "$actor" --arg reason "$reason" --argjson initial "$initial" '
      [.items[]|select(.args.actor==$actor and .args.reason==$reason)|.args.strategy_generation]|
      max // $initial' "$runtime/recovery-queue.$$.json")
    used=$(jq --arg actor "$actor" --arg reason "$reason" --argjson generation "$generation" '
      [.items[]|select(.args.actor==$actor and .args.reason==$reason and
        .args.strategy_generation==$generation and
        (.kind|IN("checkpoint","retry","reflection_repair","alternate_model","recarve","alternate_approach","provider_probe")))]|length' \
      "$runtime/recovery-queue.$$.json")
    if [ "$used" -ge 7 ]; then
      generation=$((generation + 1)); tactic=state_reconcile
    else
      case $used in 0) tactic=checkpoint;; 1) tactic=retry;; 2) tactic=reflection_repair;;
        3) tactic=alternate_model;; 4) tactic=recarve;; 5) tactic=alternate_approach;; 6) tactic=provider_probe;; esac
    fi
    mode=offline; [ "$tactic" != provider_probe ] || mode=probe
    now=${POLYLANE_NOW_EPOCH:-$(date +%s)}; delay=0
    if [ "$tactic" = provider_probe ]; then
      probes=$(jq '[.items[]|select(.kind=="provider_probe")]|length' "$runtime/recovery-queue.$$.json")
      index=$((probes + 1)); [ "$index" -gt 7 ] && index=7
      case $index in 1) delay=5;; 2) delay=10;; 3) delay=20;; 4) delay=40;;
        5) delay=80;; 6) delay=160;; 7) delay=300;; esac
    fi
    base_strategy=$(jq -r .strategy_hash "$context")
    strategy=$(jq -Sc --arg base "$base_strategy" --arg tactic "$tactic" --argjson generation "$generation" \
      '. + {base_strategy:$base,tactic:$tactic,strategy_generation:$generation}' "$context" | sha_stream)
    short=$(printf '%s' "${strategy#sha256:}" | cut -c1-16)
    id="$actor-$generation-$tactic-$short"
    jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg kind "$tactic" --arg mode "$mode" --arg actor "$actor" \
      --arg reason "$reason" --argjson generation "$generation" --argjson next "$((now + delay))" \
      --arg goal "$(jq -r '.goal_ref' "$context")" --arg strategy "$strategy" --arg base "$base_strategy" \
      --argjson globs "$(jq -c '.ownership_globs' "$context")" --argjson resources "$(jq -c '.resource_locks' "$context")" \
      '{schema_version:1,id:$id,kind:$kind,mode:$mode,status:"ready",priority:100,
        goal_ref:$goal,args:{actor:$actor,reason:$reason,strategy_generation:$generation,
          base_strategy_hash:$base},depends_on:[],
        next_action_at:$next,deadline_at:($next+300),attempt:1,strategy_hash:$strategy,
        ownership_globs:$globs,resource_locks:$resources,claim:null,last_error:null}' >"$runtime/recovery.$$.json"
    "$queue" --dir "$runtime" enqueue "$runtime/recovery.$$.json"
    rm -f "$runtime/recovery.$$.json" "$runtime/recovery-queue.$$.json"
    ;;
  run-offline)
    item=$2 token=$3; runtime=${POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR:?}
    id=$(jq -er .id "$item"); kind=$(jq -er .kind "$item"); contract_kind "$kind"
    jq -e --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" '
      any(.queue.items[];.id==$id and .status=="running" and .claim.token==$token)' \
      "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || exit 6
    project=$(jq -r .project_root "$runtime/current/state.json")
    goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json
    output_dir=$runtime/recovery-artifacts; mkdir -p "$output_dir"
    artifact=$output_dir/$id.json
    [ ! -f "$artifact" ] || { publish_action "$runtime" "$item" "$artifact"; exit 0; }
    work=$output_dir/.$id.$$
    case $kind in
      local_test|static_analysis|prompt_prepare)
        check_id=$(jq -er '.args.acceptance_id // .args.check_id' "$item")
        log=$work.log; run_registered_check "$project" "$goal" "$check_id" "$log"
        jq -n --arg check "$check_id" --arg hash "$(sha_stream <"$log")" \
          '{status:"passed",check_id:$check,output_hash:$hash}' >"$work"; rm -f "$log.argv.json" "$log" ;;
      diff_review)
        git -C "$project" diff --check; git -C "$project" diff --stat >"$work.log"
        jq -n --arg hash "$(sha_stream <"$work.log")" '{status:"reviewed",diffstat_hash:$hash}' >"$work"; rm -f "$work.log" ;;
      merge_prepare)
        head=$(git -C "$project" rev-parse HEAD); status=$(git -C "$project" status --porcelain=v1 | sha_stream)
        jq -n --arg head "$head" --arg status "$status" '{status:"prepared",head:$head,worktree_status_hash:$status}' >"$work" ;;
      documentation)
        missing=''; for path in README.md docs/polylane/NORTHSTAR.md docs/polylane/STRATEGY.md; do
          [ -s "$project/$path" ] || missing="$missing${missing:+,}$path"; done
        [ -z "$missing" ] || exit 5
        jq -n '{status:"audited",required:["README.md","docs/polylane/NORTHSTAR.md","docs/polylane/STRATEGY.md"]}' >"$work" ;;
      cleanup)
        scratch=$runtime/scratch; removed=0
        if [ -d "$scratch" ]; then removed=$(find "$scratch" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 | wc -l | tr -d ' '); rm -rf "$scratch"; fi
        jq -n --argjson removed "$removed" '{status:"cleaned",owned_entries_removed:$removed}' >"$work" ;;
      checkpoint)
        git -C "$project" status --porcelain=v1 >"$work.status"
        jq -n --arg head "$(git -C "$project" rev-parse HEAD)" --arg state "$(sha_stream <"$runtime/current/state.json")" \
          --arg status "$(sha_stream <"$work.status")" '{status:"checkpointed",head:$head,state_hash:$state,status_hash:$status}' >"$work"
        rm -f "$work.status" ;;
      retry|reflection_repair|recarve|alternate_approach)
        enqueue_changed_successor "$runtime" "$item"
        jq -n --arg kind "$kind" --arg actor "$(jq -r .args.actor "$item")" --arg reason "$(jq -r .args.reason "$item")" \
          --argjson generation "$(jq -r .args.strategy_generation "$item")" \
          --arg successor "$POLYLANE_SUCCESSOR_ID" --arg successor_strategy "$POLYLANE_SUCCESSOR_STRATEGY" \
          '{status:"successor_enqueued",action:$kind,actor:$actor,reason:$reason,
            strategy_generation:$generation,successor_id:$successor,
            successor_strategy_hash:$successor_strategy}' >"$work" ;;
      alternate_model)
        [ -n "${POLYLANE_AGENT_ADAPTER:-}" ] && [ -f "$POLYLANE_AGENT_ADAPTER" ] || exit 5
        . "$POLYLANE_AGENT_ADAPTER"; type polylane_adapter_models >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 5
        tried=$(jq -c '.args.tried_models // []' "$item"); selected=''
        while IFS= read -r model; do
          if ! printf '%s\n' "$tried" | jq -e --arg model "$model" 'index($model)!=null' >/dev/null; then
            selected=$model; break
          fi
        done < <(polylane_adapter_models fallback)
        [ -n "$selected" ] || exit 75
        enqueue_changed_successor "$runtime" "$item"
        jq -n --arg selected "$selected" --arg successor "$POLYLANE_SUCCESSOR_ID" \
          --arg strategy "$POLYLANE_SUCCESSOR_STRATEGY" \
          '{status:"selected",model:$selected,successor_id:$successor,
            successor_strategy_hash:$strategy}' >"$work" ;;
      state_reconcile)
        if [ "$(jq -r '.args.mode // ""' "$item")" = council_verdict ]; then
          reference=$(jq -er '.args.council_reference|select(type=="string" and startswith("/"))' "$item")
          reference_hash=$(jq -er '.args.council_reference_hash|select(test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$item")
          goal_path=$(jq -er '.args.goal_state|select(type=="string" and startswith("/"))' "$item")
          expected_goal_hash=$(jq -er '.args.goal_state_hash|select(test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$item")
          [ -f "$reference" ] && [ ! -L "$reference" ] &&
            [ "$(sha_stream <"$reference")" = "$reference_hash" ] || exit 5
          "$SELF/polylane-council.sh" validate-routing "$reference"
          [ -f "$goal_path" ] && [ ! -L "$goal_path" ] &&
            [ "$(sha_stream <"$goal_path")" = "$expected_goal_hash" ] || exit 7
          case $goal_path in "$project"/docs/polylane/*) :;; *) exit 5;; esac
          verdict=$(jq -er '.verdict|select(.=="GO" or .=="NO_GO")' "$reference")
          routing=$(jq -er .routing.path "$reference")
          RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime; goal_lock=$runtime/goal-state.lock; runtime_lock_acquire "$goal_lock"
          trap 'runtime_lock_release "$goal_lock" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true' RETURN
          [ "$(sha_stream <"$goal_path")" = "$expected_goal_hash" ] || exit 7
          repairs=$runtime/council-repairs.$$.json; printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$repairs"
          if [ "$verdict" = NO_GO ]; then
            while IFS=$'\t' read -r lens focus why; do
              repair_hash=$(printf '%s:%s:%s' "$lens" "$focus" "$why" | sha_stream)
              repair_id="repair-${repair_hash#sha256:}"; repair_id=$(printf '%s' "$repair_id" | cut -c1-71)
              jq --arg id "$repair_id" --arg lens "$lens" --arg focus "$focus" --arg why "$why" \
                '. + [{id:$id,weight:100,status:"open",source:"council",lens:$lens,
                  title:("Repair: "+$why),recommended_focus:$focus}]' "$repairs" >"$repairs.next"
              mv "$repairs.next" "$repairs"
            done < <(jq -r '.findings[]|[.lens,.next_focus,.why]|@tsv' "$routing")
            [ "$(jq 'length' "$repairs")" -gt 0 ] || exit 5
          fi
          next=$runtime/goal-state.next.$$
          jq --arg verdict "$verdict" --arg current "$(jq -r .goal_ref "$item")" \
            --arg routed_next "$(jq -r .selected_next_goal_ref "$routing")" \
            --slurpfile routing "$routing" --slurpfile repairs "$repairs" '
            .goal_tree.items=(.goal_tree.items // []) |
            if $verdict=="GO" then
              .goal_tree.items |= map(if .id==$current then .status="complete" else . end) |
              .next_goal_ref=([ $routing[0].recommendations[].next_focus as $focus |
                .goal_tree.items[]|select(.id==$focus and .status=="open")|.id ][0] //
                ([.goal_tree.items[]|select(.status=="open")]|sort_by(-(.weight//0),.id)|.[0].id // $current))
            else
              .goal_tree.items |= map(if .id==$current then
                .status="superseded" | .superseded_by=([$repairs[0][].id]|sort) else . end) |
              reduce $repairs[0][] as $repair (.;
                if any(.goal_tree.items[];.id==$repair.id) then . else .goal_tree.items += [$repair] end) |
              .next_goal_ref=([$repairs[0][]|select(.recommended_focus==$routed_next)]|sort_by(.id)|.[0].id //
                ($repairs[0]|sort_by(.id)|.[0].id))
            end |
            .complete=false | .revision=((.revision//0)+1)' "$goal_path" >"$next"
          jq -e --arg next "$(jq -r .next_goal_ref "$next")" --arg verdict "$verdict" '
            (.goal_tree.items|type=="array") and
            (any(.goal_tree.items[];.id==$next and .status=="open") or
              ($verdict=="GO" and all(.goal_tree.items[];.status!="open")))' "$next" >/dev/null || exit 5
          chmod 600 "$next"; mv -f "$next" "$goal_path"
          new_goal_hash=$(sha_stream <"$goal_path")
          jq -n --arg verdict "$verdict" --arg goal_hash "$new_goal_hash" \
            --arg next_goal_ref "$(jq -r .next_goal_ref "$goal_path")" --slurpfile repairs "$repairs" \
            '{status:"council_applied",verdict:$verdict,goal_state_hash:$goal_hash,
              next_goal_ref:$next_goal_ref,repair_goal_ids:[$repairs[0][].id]}' >"$work"
          rm -f "$repairs"; runtime_lock_release "$goal_lock"; trap - RETURN
        else
          "$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
          "$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" replay >"$work.state"
          jq -n --arg hash "$(sha_stream <"$work.state")" '{status:"reconciled",state_hash:$hash}' >"$work"
          rm -f "$work.state"
        fi ;;
      session_recover)
        loop=$(jq -r .loop_id "$runtime/current/state.json"); spec=$runtime/sentinel-launch.json
        "$SELF/polylane-session.sh" bootstrap "$project" "$loop" "recovery-$id" \
          "$spec" "$runtime/keeper-launch.json"
        jq -n --arg session "polylane-$loop" '{status:"rearmed",session:$session}' >"$work" ;;
    esac
    jq -e . "$work" >/dev/null; chmod 600 "$work"; mv -f "$work" "$artifact"
    publish_action "$runtime" "$item" "$artifact"
    ;;
  contract) contract_kind "$2"; printf '1\n' ;;
  *) exit 2 ;;
esac
```

Create `core/scripts/polylane-worker.sh` with this complete body:

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
runtime=$1 item=$2 token=$3 expires=$4
SELF=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)
. "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
case $item in "$runtime"/worker-inputs/*.json) :;; *) exit 5;; esac
[ -f "$item" ] && [ ! -L "$item" ] || exit 5
mode=$(stat -f '%Lp' "$item" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$item")
input_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$item")
[ "$mode" = 400 ] && [ "$(basename "$item" .json)" = "${input_hash#sha256:}" ] || exit 5
pid=$$
start=$(runtime_start_token "$pid")
id=$(jq -r '.id' "$item")
"$SELF/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" activate "$id" "$token" "$pid" "$start" "$expires"
ack_deadline=$(( $(date +%s) + ${POLYLANE_ACTIVATION_ACK_TIMEOUT:-2} ))
until jq -e --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id and .status=="running" and .claim.token==$token)' \
  "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null; do
  [ "$(date +%s)" -lt "$ack_deadline" ] || exit 75
  sleep 0.05
done
export POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
kind=$(jq -er .kind "$item")
unset POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT POLYLANE_CLAIM_TOKEN POLYLANE_ATTEMPT POLYLANE_RUNNER_GENERATION
if [ "$kind" = cycle ]; then
  result_root=$runtime/cycle-results
  [ ! -L "$result_root" ] || exit 5
  mkdir -p "$result_root"; chmod 700 "$result_root"
  run_id=$(jq -er '.args.run_id|select(test("^[A-Za-z0-9._-]{1,128}$"))' "$item")
  printf '%s' "$token" | grep -Eq '^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$' || exit 5
  attempt=$(jq -er '.attempt|select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>=1)' "$item")
  runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/cycle-runner-generation.lock"
  runner_generation=$(( $(cat "$runtime/cycle-runner-generation" 2>/dev/null || printf 0) + 1 ))
  printf '%s\n' "$runner_generation" >"$runtime/cycle-runner-generation.next.$$"
  chmod 600 "$runtime/cycle-runner-generation.next.$$"
  mv "$runtime/cycle-runner-generation.next.$$" "$runtime/cycle-runner-generation"
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/cycle-runner-generation.lock"
  export POLYLANE_CLAIM_TOKEN=$token POLYLANE_ATTEMPT=$attempt POLYLANE_RUNNER_GENERATION=$runner_generation
  export POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT=$result_root/$run_id.$token.g$runner_generation.a$attempt.json
  owner=${POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT%.json}.owner.json
  owner_tmp=$result_root/.owner.$runner_generation.$attempt.$$
  jq -Scn --arg run "$run_id" --arg token "$token" \
    --argjson runner_generation "$runner_generation" --argjson attempt "$attempt" \
    '{attempt:$attempt,claim_token:$token,run_id:$run,runner_generation:$runner_generation}' >"$owner_tmp"
  chmod 400 "$owner_tmp"
  if ! ln "$owner_tmp" "$owner" 2>/dev/null; then
    [ -f "$owner" ] && [ ! -L "$owner" ] && [ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$owner" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$owner")" = 400 ] &&
      cmp -s "$owner_tmp" "$owner" || { rm -f "$owner_tmp"; exit 5; }
  fi
  rm -f "$owner_tmp"
  [ ! -e "$POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT" ] || {
    [ -f "$POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT" ] && [ ! -L "$POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT" ] || exit 5
    [ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT")" = 400 ] || exit 5
  }
fi
rc=0
"$SELF/polylane-dispatch.sh" "$item" "$token" & dispatch_pid=$!
dispatch_token=''
for ignored in 1 2 3 4 5; do
  dispatch_token=$(runtime_start_token "$dispatch_pid" || true); [ -z "$dispatch_token" ] || break; sleep 0.02
done
[ -n "$dispatch_token" ] || { wait "$dispatch_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 75; }
renew_every=${POLYLANE_WORKER_RENEW_INTERVAL:-20}; case $renew_every in ''|*[!0-9]*) exit 2;; esac
[ "$renew_every" -ge 5 ] && [ "$renew_every" -le 30 ] || exit 2
next_renew=$(( $(runtime_now) + renew_every )); renewal=0
eof_deadline=$(jq -er '.deadline_at|select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>0)' "$item")
while [ "$(runtime_start_token "$dispatch_pid" || true)" = "$dispatch_token" ]; do
  now=$(runtime_now)
  if [ "$now" -ge "$next_renew" ]; then
    if [ "$now" -ge "$eof_deadline" ]; then
      [ "$(runtime_start_token "$dispatch_pid" || true)" != "$dispatch_token" ] || kill -TERM "$dispatch_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
      sleep 0.1
      [ "$(runtime_start_token "$dispatch_pid" || true)" != "$dispatch_token" ] || kill -KILL "$dispatch_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
      wait "$dispatch_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 75
    fi
    renewal=$((renewal + 1)); observation=$runtime/worker-renewal.$$.json
    ps_row=$(ps -o stat=,time= -p "$dispatch_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)
    jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" --arg child_start "$dispatch_token" \
      --arg observation "$ps_row" --argjson child_pid "$dispatch_pid" --argjson renewal "$renewal" \
      --argjson runtime_revision "$(jq -r .revision "$runtime/current/state.json")" \
      '{id:$id,claim_token:$token,child:{pid:$child_pid,start_token:$child_start,observation:$observation},
        renewal:$renewal,runtime_revision:$runtime_revision}' >"$observation"
    proof=$(runtime_sha256 "$observation"); rm -f "$observation"
    new_expiry=$((now + 90)); [ "$new_expiry" -le "$eof_deadline" ] || new_expiry=$eof_deadline
    "$SELF/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" renew-claim "$id" "$token" "$pid" "$start" \
      "$proof" "$new_expiry"
    next_renew=$((now + renew_every))
  fi
  sleep 2
done
set +e; wait "$dispatch_pid"; rc=$?; set -e
if [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ "$kind" = cycle ]; then
  "$SELF/polylane-cycle-result.sh" publish "$runtime" "$item" "$token" "$pid" "$start" \
    "$POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT" || rc=$?
fi
if [ "$rc" -eq 0 ]; then
  "$SELF/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" complete "$id" "$token" "$pid" "$start"
else
  strategy=$(printf '%s:%s:%s:%s' "$(jq -r .strategy_hash "$item")" "$rc" \
    "$(jq -r .attempt "$item")" "$id" | runtime_sha256_stdin)
  "$SELF/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" fail "$id" "$token" "$pid" "$start" \
    "handler_exit_$rc" "$strategy" "$(( $(date +%s) + 5 ))"
  exit "$rc"
fi
"$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" wake
```

Create `core/scripts/polylane-dispatch.sh` with this complete body:

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
BIN=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)
ROOT=$(cd "$BIN/.." && pwd -P)
REGISTRY=$ROOT/config/polylane-dispatch-v1.json
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
canonical_file() {
  local directory
  [ -f "$1" ] && [ ! -L "$1" ] || return 5
  directory=$(cd "$(dirname "$1")" && pwd -P) || return 5
  printf '%s/%s' "$directory" "$(basename "$1")"
}
canonical_under() {
  root=$(cd "$1" && pwd -P) || return 5
  path=$(canonical_file "$2") || return 5
  case $path in "$root"/*) printf '%s' "$path";; *) return 5;; esac
}
canonical_destination_under() {
  root=$(cd "$1" && pwd -P) || return 5
  [ ! -L "$2" ] || return 5
  parent=$(cd "$(dirname "$2")" && pwd -P) || return 5
  path=$parent/$(basename "$2")
  case $path in "$root"/*) printf '%s' "$path";; *) return 5;; esac
}
load_adapter() {
  installed=$1
  if [ -n "${POLYLANE_AGENT_ADAPTER:-}" ]; then
    adapter=$(canonical_file "$POLYLANE_AGENT_ADAPTER") || return 5
  else
    adapter=''; count=0
    for candidate in "$installed/scripts/polylane-codex-agent.sh" "$installed/scripts/polylane-claude-agent.sh"; do
      [ -f "$candidate" ] || continue
      adapter=$(canonical_file "$candidate") || return 5; count=$((count + 1))
    done
    [ "$count" -eq 1 ] || return 5
  fi
  # Adapter selection is launcher-owned environment or the single adapter in an installed
  # package; queue data never contributes a path.
  . "$adapter"
  for hook in polylane_adapter_cycle_launcher polylane_adapter_agent_job \
    polylane_adapter_probe polylane_adapter_dispatch_contract; do
    type "$hook" >/dev/null 2>&1 || return 5
  done
}
audit() {
  installed=$(cd "$1" && pwd -P)
  jq -e '.schema_version==1' "$installed/config/polylane-dispatch-v1.json" >/dev/null
  load_adapter "$installed"
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r kind route; do
    case $route in
      adapter:*) polylane_adapter_dispatch_contract "$kind" >/dev/null || return 5 ;;
      *) [ -x "$installed/scripts/$route" ] || return 5
         "$installed/scripts/$route" contract "$kind" >/dev/null || return 5 ;;
    esac
  done < <(jq -r '.routes|to_entries[]|[.key,.value]|@tsv' "$installed/config/polylane-dispatch-v1.json")
}
[ "${1:-}" != audit ] || { audit "$2"; exit $?; }
item=$1 token=$2
jq -e '.schema_version==1 and (.kind|type=="string")' "$item" >/dev/null || exit 5
kind=$(jq -r '.kind' "$item")
route=$(jq -er --arg kind "$kind" '.routes[$kind]' "$REGISTRY") || exit 5
load_adapter "$ROOT"
runtime=${POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR:-}; [ -n "$runtime" ] || exit 5
project=$(jq -er .project_root "$runtime/current/state.json") || exit 5
case $kind in
  cycle) jq -e '(.args|keys|sort)==["manifest","manifest_hash","run_id"] and
    (.args.run_id|type=="string" and test("^[A-Za-z0-9._-]{1,128}$")) and
    (.args.manifest_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$item" >/dev/null || exit 5;;
  research) jq -e '(.args|keys|sort)==["effort","model","output","prompt"] and
    (.args.effort|IN("low","medium","high","xhigh")) and
    (.args.model|type=="string" and length>0)' "$item" >/dev/null || exit 5;;
  provider_probe) jq -e '(.args|keys|sort)==["deadline_seconds","model","output"] and
    (.args.deadline_seconds|type=="number" and .>0 and floor==.) and
    (.args.model|type=="string" and length>0)' "$item" >/dev/null || exit 5;;
esac
handler_unavailable() {
  [ -n "${POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR:-}" ] || return 75
  context=$POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR/handler-unavailable.$$.json
  jq -n --arg goal "$(jq -r .goal_ref "$item")" --arg route "$route" --arg kind "$kind" \
    '{goal_ref:$goal,strategy_hash:("handler-unavailable:"+$kind+":"+$route),
      ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:["runtime:dispatch"]}' >"$context"
  POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR=$POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR "$BIN/polylane-recovery.sh" \
    route handler_unavailable dispatch "$context" || true
  rm -f "$context"; return 75
}
case $route in
  adapter:cycle_launcher)
    [ -n "${POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT:-}" ] || handler_unavailable
    receipt_parent=$(cd "$(dirname "$POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT")" && pwd -P) || handler_unavailable
    [ "$receipt_parent" = "$runtime/cycle-results" ] &&
      [ ! -L "$POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT" ] || handler_unavailable
    manifest=$(jq -er '.args.manifest|select(type=="string" and startswith("/"))' "$item") || handler_unavailable
    manifest=$(canonical_under "$runtime" "$manifest") || handler_unavailable
    [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$manifest")" = "$(jq -r .args.manifest_hash "$item")" ] || handler_unavailable
    [ "$(jq -r .run_id "$manifest")" = "$(jq -r .args.run_id "$item")" ] || handler_unavailable
    polylane_adapter_cycle_launcher "$manifest" ;;
  adapter:agent_job)
    prompt=$(jq -er '.args.prompt|select(type=="string" and startswith("/"))' "$item") || handler_unavailable
    output=$(jq -er '.args.output|select(type=="string" and startswith("/"))' "$item") || handler_unavailable
    prompt=$(canonical_under "$project" "$prompt") || handler_unavailable
    output=$(canonical_destination_under "$runtime" "$output") || handler_unavailable
    polylane_adapter_agent_job "$prompt" "$output" "$(jq -er '.args.model' "$item")" "$(jq -er '.args.effort' "$item")" ;;
  adapter:probe)
    output=$(jq -er '.args.output|select(type=="string" and startswith("/"))' "$item") || handler_unavailable
    output=$(canonical_destination_under "$runtime" "$output") || handler_unavailable
    polylane_adapter_probe "$(jq -er '.args.model' "$item")" \
      "$(jq -er '.args.deadline_seconds' "$item")" "$output" ;;
  *) helper=$BIN/$route; [ -x "$helper" ] || handler_unavailable
     "$helper" run-offline "$item" "$token" || { rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 5 ] || handler_unavailable; exit "$rc"; } ;;
esac
```

bash -n core/scripts/polylane-worker.sh
bash -n core/scripts/polylane-dispatch.sh

Append this complete Codex-owned implementation to `codex/scripts/polylane-codex-agent.sh`.
It deliberately reuses Foundation's strict `polylane_adapter_capture_error` parser and
`polylane_codex_publish` immutable publisher; there is no second, looser JSONL parser:

```bash
polylane_codex_agent_cli() {
  local candidate target parent hops=0
  candidate=$(command -v codex) || return 5
  case $candidate in /*) :;; *) candidate=$(cd "$(dirname "$candidate")" && pwd -P)/$(basename "$candidate");; esac
  while [ -L "$candidate" ]; do
    [ "$hops" -lt 16 ] || return 5
    target=$(readlink "$candidate") || return 5
    case $target in /*) candidate=$target;; *) candidate=$(dirname "$candidate")/$target;; esac
    parent=$(cd "$(dirname "$candidate")" && pwd -P) || return 5
    candidate=$parent/$(basename "$candidate"); hops=$((hops + 1))
  done
  [ -f "$candidate" ] && [ -x "$candidate" ] || return 5
  printf '%s' "$candidate"
}
polylane_codex_agent_descendants() {
  local root=$1
  ps -Ao pid=,ppid= | awk -v root="$root" '
    { parent[$1]=$2 }
    END { for (pid in parent) {
      current=pid; depth=0; seen=" "
      while (current in parent && depth<128) {
        if (parent[current]==root) { print pid,depth+1; break }
        marker=" " current " "; if (index(seen,marker)) break
        seen=seen marker; current=parent[current]; depth++
      }
    }}' | sort -k2,2nr -k1,1nr
}
polylane_codex_agent_fence() {
  local root=$1 signal=$2 pid ignored
  while read -r pid ignored; do kill -"$signal" "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; done \
    < <(polylane_codex_agent_descendants "$root")
  kill -"$signal" "$root" 2>/dev/null || true
}
polylane_codex_agent_run() {
  local sandbox=$1 prompt=$2 output=$3 model=$4 effort=$5 deadline=$6 require_json=$7
  local runtime project cli response events stderr_file artifact pid rc now size timed_out=0
  case $model in ''|*[!A-Za-z0-9._:/-]*) return 2;; esac
  [ "${#model}" -le 160 ] || return 2
  case $effort in low|medium|high|xhigh) :;; *) return 2;; esac
  case $deadline in ''|*[!0-9]*) return 2;; esac
  [ "$deadline" -ge 1 ] && [ "$deadline" -le 86400 ] || return 2
  runtime=${POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR:-}; case $runtime in /*) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  [ -d "$runtime" ] && [ ! -L "$runtime" ] || return 5
  project=$(jq -er '.project_root|select(type=="string" and startswith("/"))' \
    "$runtime/current/state.json") || return 5
  project=$(cd "$project" && pwd -P) || return 5
  [ -f "$prompt" ] && [ ! -L "$prompt" ] && [ ! -L "$output" ] || return 5
  [ ! -e "$output" ] || return 7
  [ "$(cd "$(dirname "$output")" && pwd -P)" = "$(dirname "$output")" ] || return 5
  response=$(mktemp "$(dirname "$output")/.codex-response.XXXXXX") || return 74
  rm -f "$response"
  events=$(mktemp "$(dirname "$output")/.codex-events.XXXXXX") || return 74
  stderr_file=$(mktemp "$(dirname "$output")/.codex-stderr.XXXXXX") || return 74
  artifact=$events.result.json
  chmod 0600 "$events" "$stderr_file"
  cli=$(polylane_codex_agent_cli) || { rm -f "$response" "$events" "$stderr_file"; return 5; }
  "$cli" exec --ephemeral --sandbox "$sandbox" -C "$project" -c approval_policy=never \
    --model "$model" -c "model_reasoning_effort=$effort" -o "$response" --json - \
    <"$prompt" >"$events" 2>"$stderr_file" & pid=$!
  now=$(date +%s); deadline=$((now + deadline))
  while kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; do
    size=$(( $(wc -c <"$events") + $(wc -c <"$stderr_file") + \
      $(wc -c <"$response" 2>/dev/null || printf 0) ))
    if [ "$size" -gt "${POLYLANE_AGENT_JOB_MAX_BYTES:-25165824}" ]; then timed_out=2; break; fi
    [ "$(date +%s)" -lt "$deadline" ] || { timed_out=1; break; }
    sleep 0.1
  done
  if [ "$timed_out" -ne 0 ]; then
    polylane_codex_agent_fence "$pid" TERM; sleep 0.2
    polylane_codex_agent_fence "$pid" KILL; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true
    chmod 0400 "$events" "$stderr_file" 2>/dev/null || true
    rm -f "$response"
    [ "$timed_out" -eq 1 ] && return 124
    return 74
  fi
  set +e; wait "$pid"; rc=$?; set -e
  chmod 0400 "$events" "$stderr_file"
  if ! polylane_adapter_capture_error "$events" "$stderr_file" "$artifact" "$rc"; then
    rm -f "$response"; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && return "$rc"; return 74
  fi
  [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || { rm -f "$response"; return "$rc"; }
  [ -s "$response" ] && [ -f "$response" ] && [ ! -L "$response" ] || return 7
  [ "$require_json" -eq 0 ] || jq -e 'type=="object" or type=="array"' "$response" >/dev/null || return 7
  chmod 0400 "$response"
  polylane_codex_publish "$response" "$output"
}
polylane_codex_probe_publish() {
  local output=$1 model=$2 status=$3 response_hash=$4 tmp
  tmp=$(mktemp "$(dirname "$output")/.probe-result.XXXXXX") || return 74
  jq -n --arg model "$model" --arg status "$status" --arg response_hash "$response_hash" \
    '{schema_version:1,provider:"codex",model:$model,status:$status,
      response_hash:(if $response_hash=="" then null else $response_hash end)}' >"$tmp"
  chmod 0400 "$tmp"; polylane_codex_publish "$tmp" "$output"
}
polylane_adapter_cycle_launcher() {
  local manifest=$1 adapter_dir launcher
  shift
  [ -n "${POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT:-}" ] || return 5
  adapter_dir=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd -P) || return 5
  launcher=$adapter_dir/polylane-codex.sh
  [ -f "$launcher" ] && [ ! -L "$launcher" ] && [ -x "$launcher" ] || return 5
  exec "$launcher" "$manifest" "$@"
}
polylane_adapter_agent_job() {
  local deadline=${POLYLANE_AGENT_JOB_DEADLINE:-900}
  polylane_codex_agent_run workspace-write "$1" "$2" "$3" "$4" "$deadline" 1
}
polylane_adapter_dispatch_contract() {
  case $1 in cycle|research|provider_probe) printf '1\n';; *) return 5;; esac
}
polylane_adapter_probe() {
  local model=$1 deadline=$2 output=$3 prompt response rc hash status
  prompt=$(mktemp "$(dirname "$output")/.probe-prompt.XXXXXX") || return 74
  response=$(mktemp "$(dirname "$output")/.probe-response.XXXXXX") || { rm -f "$prompt"; return 74; }
  rm -f "$response"
  printf 'Reply with exactly POLYLANE_PROVIDER_AVAILABLE. Do not modify files.\n' >"$prompt"
  chmod 0400 "$prompt"
  if polylane_codex_agent_run read-only "$prompt" "$response" "$model" low "$deadline" 0; then
    if [ "$(tr -d '\r' <"$response")" = POLYLANE_PROVIDER_AVAILABLE ]; then status=available
    else status=transient; fi
    hash="sha256:$(polylane_codex_sha256 "$response")"
  else
    rc=$?; hash=''
    case $rc in 124|74) status=transient;; *) status=unavailable;; esac
  fi
  rm -f "$prompt" "$response"
  polylane_codex_probe_publish "$output" "$model" "$status" "$hash"
}
```

Append this bounded compatibility implementation to
`claude-code/scripts/polylane-claude-agent.sh`. It contains no Codex command and shares the
same core hook surface; all new autonomous behavior is optimized and tested through Codex:

```bash
polylane_claude_publish() {
  local source=$1 destination=$2 expected
  [ -f "$source" ] && [ ! -L "$source" ] && [ ! -e "$destination" ] && [ ! -L "$destination" ] || return 7
  if command -v shasum >/dev/null 2>&1; then expected=$(shasum -a 256 "$source" | awk '{print $1}')
  else expected=$(sha256sum "$source" | awk '{print $1}'); fi
  ln "$source" "$destination" 2>/dev/null || return 7
  rm -f "$source"; chmod 0400 "$destination"
  if command -v shasum >/dev/null 2>&1; then [ "$(shasum -a 256 "$destination" | awk '{print $1}')" = "$expected" ]
  else [ "$(sha256sum "$destination" | awk '{print $1}')" = "$expected" ]; fi
}
polylane_claude_run_job() {
  local prompt=$1 output=$2 model=$3 deadline=$4 require_json=$5 raw cooked stderr_file pid rc end size
  case $model in ''|*[!A-Za-z0-9._:/-]*) return 2;; esac
  case $deadline in ''|*[!0-9]*) return 2;; esac
  [ "$deadline" -ge 1 ] && [ "$deadline" -le 86400 ] || return 2
  [ -f "$prompt" ] && [ ! -L "$prompt" ] && [ ! -e "$output" ] && [ ! -L "$output" ] || return 5
  raw=$(mktemp "$(dirname "$output")/.claude-response.XXXXXX") || return 74
  cooked=$(mktemp "$(dirname "$output")/.claude-result.XXXXXX") || return 74
  stderr_file=$(mktemp "$(dirname "$output")/.claude-stderr.XXXXXX") || return 74
  command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1 || { rm -f "$raw" "$cooked" "$stderr_file"; return 5; }
  claude -p --permission-mode plan --model "$model" --output-format json \
    <"$prompt" >"$raw" 2>"$stderr_file" & pid=$!
  end=$(( $(date +%s) + deadline ))
  while kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; do
    size=$(( $(wc -c <"$raw") + $(wc -c <"$stderr_file") ))
    if [ "$size" -gt "${POLYLANE_AGENT_JOB_MAX_BYTES:-25165824}" ]; then
      kill -TERM "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 0.2; kill -KILL "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true
      wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f "$raw" "$cooked"; chmod 0400 "$stderr_file"; return 74
    fi
    if [ "$(date +%s)" -ge "$end" ]; then
      kill -TERM "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 0.2; kill -KILL "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true
      wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f "$raw" "$cooked"; chmod 0400 "$stderr_file"; return 124
    fi
    sleep 0.1
  done
  set +e; wait "$pid"; rc=$?; set -e; chmod 0400 "$raw" "$stderr_file"
  [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || { rm -f "$raw" "$cooked"; return "$rc"; }
  jq -er '.result|select(type=="string")' "$raw" >"$cooked" || { rm -f "$raw" "$cooked"; return 7; }
  [ "$require_json" -eq 0 ] || jq -e 'type=="object" or type=="array"' "$cooked" >/dev/null || {
    rm -f "$raw" "$cooked"; return 7; }
  rm -f "$raw"; chmod 0400 "$cooked"; polylane_claude_publish "$cooked" "$output"
}
polylane_adapter_cycle_launcher() {
  local manifest=$1 adapter_dir launcher
  shift; [ -n "${POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT:-}" ] || return 5
  adapter_dir=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd -P) || return 5
  launcher=$adapter_dir/polylane-run.sh
  [ -f "$launcher" ] && [ ! -L "$launcher" ] && [ -x "$launcher" ] || return 5
  exec "$launcher" "$manifest" "$@"
}
polylane_adapter_agent_job() {
  polylane_claude_run_job "$1" "$2" "$3" "${POLYLANE_AGENT_JOB_DEADLINE:-900}" 1
}
polylane_adapter_dispatch_contract() {
  case $1 in cycle|research|provider_probe) printf '1\n';; *) return 5;; esac
}
polylane_adapter_probe() {
  local model=$1 deadline=$2 output=$3 prompt response status hash='' tmp
  prompt=$(mktemp "$(dirname "$output")/.probe-prompt.XXXXXX") || return 74
  response=$(mktemp "$(dirname "$output")/.probe-response.XXXXXX") || return 74
  rm -f "$response"; printf 'Reply with exactly POLYLANE_PROVIDER_AVAILABLE.\n' >"$prompt"
  if polylane_claude_run_job "$prompt" "$response" "$model" "$deadline" 0 &&
    [ "$(tr -d '\r' <"$response")" = POLYLANE_PROVIDER_AVAILABLE ]; then
    status=available
  else status=unavailable; fi
  [ ! -f "$response" ] || {
    if command -v shasum >/dev/null 2>&1; then hash="sha256:$(shasum -a 256 "$response" | awk '{print $1}')"
    else hash="sha256:$(sha256sum "$response" | awk '{print $1}')"; fi
  }
  rm -f "$prompt" "$response"
  tmp=$(mktemp "$(dirname "$output")/.probe-result.XXXXXX") || return 74
  jq -n --arg model "$model" --arg status "$status" --arg hash "$hash" \
    '{schema_version:1,provider:"claude",model:$model,status:$status,
      response_hash:(if $hash=="" then null else $hash end)}' >"$tmp"
  chmod 0400 "$tmp"; polylane_claude_publish "$tmp" "$output"
}
```

### Task 4: Supervise a Persistent Codex Controller and Terminal States

**Files:**
- Create: `core/scripts/polylane-guardian.sh`
- Create: `core/scripts/polylane-sentinel.sh`
- Create: `core/scripts/polylane-keeper.sh`
- Create: `core/scripts/polylane-process.sh`
- Create: `core/scripts/polylane-finalizer.sh`
- Create: `core/scripts/polylane-terminal.sh`
- Create: `core/scripts/polylane-hmac.py`
- Create: `core/scripts/polylane-detach.py`
- Create: `core/scripts/lib/polylane-terminal-reducer.sh`
- Create: `core/scripts/lib/polylane-controller-reducer.sh`
- Create: `core/scripts/polylane-controller-turn.sh`
- Create: `core/scripts/polylane-command-policy.sh`
- Create: `core/scripts/polylane-cycle-result.sh`
- Create: `core/config/polylane-controller-proposal-v1.json`
- Create: `core/config/polylane-input-reasons-v1.json`
- Create: `core/config/polylane-input-conditions-v1.json`
- Create: `core/config/polylane-shutdown-stages-v1.json`
- Create: `codex/scripts/polylane-codex-loop.sh`
- Create: `codex/scripts/polylane-codex-controller.sh`
- Create: `codex/scripts/polylane-codex-turn-job.sh`
- Create: `codex/references/codex-controller.md`
- Create: `core/tests/test-guardian-recovery.sh`
- Create: `core/tests/test-process-fencing.sh`
- Create: `core/tests/test-shutdown-replay.sh`

- Create: `core/tests/test-cycle-transactions.sh`
- Create: `core/tests/test-needs-input.sh`
