- [ ] **Action 4.7 (2–5 minutes): Add the production guardian tick and loop**

Create `core/scripts/polylane-guardian.sh` with this complete body:

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
BIN=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd -P)
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-hooks.sh"
atomic_json() { local destination source; destination=$1 source=$2; jq -e . "$source" >/dev/null; chmod 600 "$source"; mv -f "$source" "$destination"; }
actor_live() {
  local file pid recorded
  file=$1; [ -f "$file" ] || return 1
  pid=$(jq -r .pid "$file"); recorded=$(jq -r .start_token "$file")
  [ -n "$recorded" ] && [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" = "$recorded" ] &&
    [ "$(jq -r .lease_valid "$file")" = true ]
}
start_controller() {
  local runtime state spec actor old_actor ticket old_pid generation project loop child token ignored
  local temporary started_at payload outputs old_recorded old_observed
  runtime=$1 state=$2 spec=$3
  actor=$runtime/actor-controller.json
  actor_live "$actor" && return 0
  old_actor=$runtime/controller-old.$$.json
  if [ -f "$actor" ]; then cp "$actor" "$old_actor"; else printf '%s\n' '{}' >"$old_actor"; fi
  AUDIT_HANDLER_BEFORE_ARTIFACTS=()
  ticket=$(audit_handler_begin "$runtime" guardian actor "controller-restart-$(runtime_now)" \
    '' '' guardian controller_state_restart)
  [ ! -f "$actor" ] || { old_pid=$(jq -r .pid "$actor"); wait "$old_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; }
  [ ! -f "$actor" ] || "$BIN/polylane-process.sh" adopt-or-fence "$runtime" controller stale
  runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/controller-generation.lock"
  generation=$(( $(cat "$runtime/controller-generation" 2>/dev/null || printf 0) + 1 ))
  printf '%s\n' "$generation" >"$runtime/controller-generation"
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/controller-generation.lock"
  project=$(jq -r .project_root "$runtime/current/state.json"); loop=$(jq -r .loop_id "$runtime/current/state.json")
  POLYLANE_EXPECTED_PROJECT=$project POLYLANE_EXPECTED_LOOP_ID=$loop \
    "$BIN/polylane-exec-argv.sh" --spec "$spec" >>"$runtime/controller.log" 2>&1 & child=$!
  token=''
  for ignored in 1 2 3 4 5; do token=$(runtime_start_token "$child" || true); [ -z "$token" ] || break; sleep 0.02; done
  if [ -z "$token" ]; then wait "$child" 2>/dev/null || true; return 75; fi
  temporary=$runtime/.actor-controller.$$
  started_at=$(runtime_now)
  jq -n --argjson pid "$child" --arg start_token "$token" --arg generation_token "controller-$generation" \
    --argjson generation "$generation" --argjson started_at "$started_at" \
    '{actor:"controller",pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,generation_token:$generation_token,
      generation:$generation,started_at:$started_at,lease_valid:true,descendants:[]}' >"$temporary"
  atomic_json "$actor" "$temporary"
  payload=$runtime/controller-spawned.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson child_pid "$child" --arg child_start_token "$token" \
    '{child_pid:$child_pid,child_start_token:$child_start_token}' >"$payload"
  outputs=$runtime/controller-spawned-outputs.$$.json
  printf '%s\n' '{}' >"$outputs"
  if [ -n "$ticket" ]; then
    old_recorded=$(jq -r .start_token "$old_actor" 2>/dev/null || true)
    old_pid=$(jq -r '.pid // 0' "$old_actor")
    old_observed=$(runtime_start_token "$old_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)
    [ "$old_observed" != "$old_recorded" ] || return 75
    jq -n --slurpfile old "$old_actor" --slurpfile new "$actor" --arg old_observed "$old_observed" \
      --arg new_observed "$(runtime_start_token "$child")" '
      {old_actor:{live:false,role:$old[0].actor,pid:$old[0].pid,start_token:$old[0].start_token,
         observed_start_token:$old_observed,generation:$old[0].generation,
         ownership_token:$old[0].generation_token,started_at:$old[0].started_at},
       new_actor:{live:true,role:$new[0].actor,pid:$new[0].pid,start_token:$new[0].start_token,
         observed_start_token:$new_observed,generation:$new[0].generation,
         ownership_token:$new[0].generation_token,started_at:$new[0].started_at}}' >"$outputs"
  fi
  audit_handler_publish "$runtime" "$ticket" guardian controller_spawned \
    "controller-$generation" "$payload" "$outputs" ''
  rm -f "$old_actor" "$payload" "$outputs"
}
route_dead_controller_once() {
  local runtime actor generation marker context
  runtime=$1 actor=$runtime/actor-controller.json
  generation=$(jq -r '.generation_token // "missing"' "$actor" 2>/dev/null || printf missing)
  marker=$runtime/recovery-markers/controller-$generation
  mkdir -p "$runtime/recovery-markers"
  (set -C; : >"$marker") 2>/dev/null || return 0
  context=$runtime/controller-exit.$$.json
  jq -n --arg generation "$generation" \
    '{goal_ref:"controller",strategy_hash:("controller-exit:"+$generation),
      ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:["actor:controller"]}' >"$context"
  POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime "$BIN/polylane-recovery.sh" route controller_exit controller "$context"
  rm -f "$context"
}
reconcile_exited_quiet_children() {
  local runtime now state owner pid token deadline live payload action context
  runtime=$1 now=$2; state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r owner pid token deadline; do
    [ -n "$owner" ] || continue
    live=$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)
    if [ -n "$live" ]; then
      [ "$live" = "$token" ] || return 5
      continue
    fi
    [ "$now" -le "$deadline" ] || return 5
    # Recheck immediately before publication so a reused live PID is never accepted as
    # the child whose absence was observed.
    live=$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)
    [ -z "$live" ] || { [ "$live" = "$token" ] || return 5; continue; }
    payload=$runtime/.quiet-child-decision.$$.json
    jq -n --arg owner "$owner" --argjson pid "$pid" --arg start_token "$token" \
      --argjson deadline "$deadline" \
      '{owner:$owner,decision:"recover",pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,
        deadline:$deadline,observed_live:false}' >"$payload"
    action="quiet-child-exit:$owner:$pid:${token//[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]/_}"
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit process quiet_child_decision "$action" \
      --fingerprint "$(runtime_sha256 "$payload")" --payload-file "$payload"
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
    rm -f "$payload"
    context=$runtime/.quiet-child-recovery.$$.json
    jq -n --arg owner "$owner" \
      '{goal_ref:$owner,strategy_hash:"quiet-child-reconciliation",
        ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:[("actor:"+$owner)]}' >"$context"
    POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime "$BIN/polylane-recovery.sh" route \
      quiet_child_exited "$owner" "$context"
    rm -f "$context"
  done < <(jq -r '.leases|to_entries[]|
    select(.value.quiet_child!=null)|
    [.key,.value.quiet_child.pid,.value.quiet_child.start_token,
      .value.quiet_child.deadline_at]|@tsv' "$state")
}
dispatch_ready_once() {
  local runtime state now selection rc id input_root temporary input_hash item token
  local worker worker_token ignored actor mutation_marker
  runtime=$1 state=$2 now=$3; shift 3
  selection=$runtime/scheduler-selection.$$.json
  "$BIN/polylane-scheduler.sh" next "$state" "$runtime" "$@" >"$selection" || {
    rc=$?; rm -f "$selection"; return "$rc"; }
  if [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] &&
     [ -n "${POLYLANE_TEST_DISPATCH_MUTATION_FILE:-}" ]; then
    [ -f "$POLYLANE_TEST_DISPATCH_MUTATION_FILE" ] &&
      [ ! -L "$POLYLANE_TEST_DISPATCH_MUTATION_FILE" ] || return 5
    mutation_marker=$runtime/test-dispatch-mutation.applied
    if (set -C; umask 077; : >"$mutation_marker") 2>/dev/null; then
      "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" enqueue \
        "$POLYLANE_TEST_DISPATCH_MUTATION_FILE"
    fi
  fi
  if [ "$(jq '.items|length' "$selection")" -gt 0 ]; then
    if "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" reserve-selected "$selection" $$ \
      "$(jq -r '.guardian.generation' "$runtime/current/state.json")"; then
      while IFS= read -r -d '' id; do
        input_root=$runtime/worker-inputs; [ ! -L "$input_root" ] || return 5
        mkdir -p "$input_root"; chmod 700 "$input_root"
        temporary=$input_root/.worker-$id.$$.json
        "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" dump | jq -Sc --arg id "$id" \
          '.items[]|select(.id==$id)' >"$temporary"
        input_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$temporary"); item=$input_root/${input_hash#sha256:}.json
        if [ -e "$item" ]; then
          [ -f "$item" ] && [ ! -L "$item" ] && [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$item")" = "$input_hash" ] || return 5
          rm -f "$temporary"
        else chmod 400 "$temporary"; mv "$temporary" "$item"; fi
        token=$(jq -r .claim.token "$item")
        "$BIN/polylane-worker.sh" "$runtime" "$item" "$token" "$((now + 90))" >>"$runtime/worker-$id.log" 2>&1 & worker=$!
        worker_token=''; for ignored in 1 2 3 4 5; do worker_token=$(runtime_start_token "$worker" || true); [ -z "$worker_token" ] || break; sleep 0.02; done
        if [ -n "$worker_token" ]; then
          actor=$runtime/actor-worker-$id.json; temporary=$runtime/.actor-worker-$id.$$
          jq -n --argjson pid "$worker" --arg start_token "$worker_token" --arg generation_token "$token" \
            '{actor:"worker",pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,generation_token:$generation_token,
              lease_valid:true,descendants:[]}' >"$temporary"
          atomic_json "$actor" "$temporary"
        fi
      done < <(jq -j '.items[].id | ., "\u0000"' "$selection")
    else
      rc=$?; rm -f "$selection"; return "$rc"
    fi
  fi
  rm -f "$selection"
}
dispatch_ready() {
  local runtime state now attempt deadline rc payload action
  runtime=$1 state=$2 now=$3; shift 3
  attempt=1; deadline=$(( $(runtime_wall_now) + 2 ))
  while [ "$attempt" -le 8 ] && [ "$(runtime_wall_now)" -le "$deadline" ]; do
    if dispatch_ready_once "$runtime" "$state" "$now" "$@"; then return 0
    else rc=$?; fi
    [ "$rc" -eq 7 ] || return "$rc"
    printf 'guardian dispatch conflict attempt=%s/8 action=immediate-reselect\n' \
      "$attempt" >>"$runtime/guardian.log"
    attempt=$((attempt + 1))
  done
  printf 'guardian dispatch conflict attempt=%s/8 action=wake-fallback\n' \
    "$attempt" >>"$runtime/guardian.log"
  payload=$runtime/dispatch-retry-exhausted.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson attempts "$((attempt - 1))" --argjson exhausted_at "$now" \
    --argjson queue_revision "$(jq -r '.queue.revision' "$runtime/current/state.json")" \
    '{attempts:$attempts,exhausted_at:$exhausted_at,queue_revision:$queue_revision,
      handoff:"durable_wake"}' >"$payload"
  action="dispatch-retry-exhausted-$now-$$"
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit guardian dispatch_retry_exhausted \
    "$action" --fingerprint "$(runtime_sha256 "$payload")" --payload-file "$payload"
  rm -f "$payload"
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" wake
  POLYLANE_WAKE_PENDING=1
  return 0
}
drain_due_work() {
  local runtime state now attempt
  runtime=$1 state=$2 now=$3; shift 3
  for attempt in $(seq 1 32); do
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce || return $?
    if ! jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
      def recovery_group($item):
        if (($item.args.actor//null)|type)=="string" and
           (($item.args.reason//null)|type)=="string" and
           (($item.args.strategy_generation//null)|type)=="number" then
          {actor:$item.args.actor,reason:$item.args.reason,
            strategy_generation:$item.args.strategy_generation}
        else null end;
      . as $state |
      [$state.queue.items[] as $blocked |
        ($blocked.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and
        $blocked.next_action_at<=$now and
        ((recovery_group($blocked)) as $group |
          ($group==null or
            (any($state.queue.items[];
              .id!=$blocked.id and (.status|IN("starting","running","complete")) and
              recovery_group(.)==$group)|not)))] | any' \
      "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null; then
      return 0
    fi
    dispatch_ready "$runtime" "$state" "$now" "$@" || return $?
    sleep 0.02
  done
  printf 'guardian due-work drain yielded after 32 attempts action=durable-wake\n' \
    >>"$runtime/guardian.log"
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" wake || true
  POLYLANE_WAKE_PENDING=1
  return 0
}
reap_exited_children() {
  local runtime actor pid process_state
  runtime=$1
  for actor in "$runtime/actor-controller.json" "$runtime"/actor-worker-*.json; do
    [ -f "$actor" ] || continue; pid=$(jq -r .pid "$actor")
    process_state=$(ps -o stat= -p "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true)
    if [ -z "$process_state" ] || { case $process_state in *Z*) true;; *) false;; esac; }; then
      wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true
      jq '.lease_valid=false' "$actor" >"$actor.tmp.$$" && mv -f "$actor.tmp.$$" "$actor"
    fi
  done
}
pause_for_input() {
  local runtime current request_id paused_at actors file actor payload
  runtime=$1; current=$runtime/current/state.json
  request_id=$(jq -er '.active_input.request_id' "$current")
  paused_at=$(jq -er '.active_input.created_at' "$current")
  actors=$runtime/input-pause-actors.$$.json; printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$actors"
  for file in "$runtime/actor-controller.json" "$runtime"/actor-worker-*.json; do
    [ -f "$file" ] || continue
    actor=$(basename "$file"); actor=${actor#actor-}; actor=${actor%.json}
    "$BIN/polylane-process.sh" adopt-or-fence "$runtime" "$actor" shutdown
    jq --arg actor "$actor" '.+[$actor]|sort|unique' "$actors" >"$actors.next"; mv "$actors.next" "$actors"
  done
  payload=$runtime/input-pause.$$.json
  jq -n --arg request_id "$request_id" --argjson paused_at "$paused_at" --slurpfile actors "$actors" \
    '{request_id:$request_id,paused_at:$paused_at,fenced_actor_ids:$actors[0]}' >"$payload"
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit guardian input_pause "$request_id" \
    --fingerprint "$(runtime_sha256 "$payload")" --payload-file "$payload"
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
  rm -f "$payload" "$actors"
  jq -e --arg request "$request_id" '.terminal=="WAITING_FOR_USER" and
    .input_pause.request_id==$request and .controller_paused==true and
    all(.queue.items[];(.status=="starting" or .status=="running")|not)' \
    "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null
}
guardian_publish_observation() {
  local runtime actor state pid token observation guardian_rc goal_rc
  runtime=$1 actor=$runtime/actor-guardian.json state=$runtime/current/state.json
  [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] || return 5
  pid=$(jq -er .pid "$actor"); token=$(jq -er .start_token "$actor")
  [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true)" = "$token" ] || return 5
  observation=$runtime/.guardian-observation.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson at "$(runtime_now)" --argjson pid "$pid" --arg token "$token" \
    --argjson generation "$(jq -r .guardian.generation "$state")" \
    --arg ownership "$(jq -r .generation_token "$actor")" '
    {schema_version:1,kind:"guardian",observed_at:$at,
      identity:{role:"guardian",pid:$pid,start_token:$token,generation:$generation,
        ownership_token:$ownership}}' >"$observation"
  if audit_hook_guardian_coverage "$runtime" "$observation"; then guardian_rc=0
  else guardian_rc=$?; fi
  case $guardian_rc in
    0|76) : ;;
    *) rm -f "$observation"; return "$guardian_rc" ;;
  esac
  if audit_hook_goal_work "$runtime"; then goal_rc=0; else goal_rc=$?; fi
  case $goal_rc in
    0|75|76) : ;;
    *) rm -f "$observation"; return "$goal_rc" ;;
  esac
  rm -f "$observation"
  return 0
}
guardian_process_wake() {
  local runtime emitted_at action ticket wake_payload lookup emitted_event_hash emitted_event_id
  local outputs heartbeat rc
  runtime=$1
  [ "${POLYLANE_WAKE_PENDING:-0}" = 1 ] || return 0
  POLYLANE_WAKE_PENDING=0
  emitted_at=$(runtime_now); action="usr1-$emitted_at-$$"
  AUDIT_HANDLER_BEFORE_ARTIFACTS=()
  ticket=$(audit_handler_begin "$runtime" guardian wake "wake-$action" '' '' guardian \
    usr1_wake)
  wake_payload=$runtime/wake-requested.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson emitted_at "$emitted_at" \
    '{signal:"USR1",emitted_at:$emitted_at,fallback_seconds:5}' >"$wake_payload"
  audit_hook_emit "$runtime" guardian wake_requested "$action" "$action" "$wake_payload"
  audit_hook_reduce "$runtime"
  lookup=$runtime/wake-requested-lookup.$$.json
  audit_hook_lookup_event "$runtime" guardian wake_requested "$action" "$lookup"
  emitted_event_hash=$(jq -er .event_hash "$lookup")
  emitted_event_id=$(jq -er .event_id "$lookup")
  outputs=$runtime/wake-outputs.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson emitted_at "$emitted_at" --arg emitted_event_hash "$emitted_event_hash" \
    --argjson emitted_event_id "$emitted_event_id" '
    {wake_observation:{emitted_at:$emitted_at,emitted_event_hash:$emitted_event_hash,
      emitted_event_id:$emitted_event_id,fallback_seconds:5}}' >"$outputs"
  heartbeat=$runtime/wake-heartbeat.$$.json
  jq -n --arg wake_event_hash "$emitted_event_hash" --argjson wake_event_id "$emitted_event_id" \
    '{wake_event_hash:$wake_event_hash,wake_event_id:$wake_event_id}' >"$heartbeat"
  audit_handler_publish "$runtime" "$ticket" guardian heartbeat "$action" \
    "$heartbeat" "$outputs" "$(jq -r '.guardian.generation' "$runtime/current/state.json")" || {
    rc=$?; rm -f "$wake_payload" "$lookup" "$outputs" "$heartbeat"; return "$rc"; }
  rm -f "$wake_payload" "$lookup" "$outputs" "$heartbeat"
}
check_once() {
  local runtime state now controller_spec terminal project goal context
  local -a runtime_args clock_args
  runtime='' state='' now='' controller_spec=''
  while [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; do
    case $1 in --runtime) runtime=$2; shift 2;; --state) state=$2; shift 2;;
      --controller-launch) controller_spec=$2; shift 2;;
      --now)
        [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] || return 2
        now=$(runtime_test_now_arg --now "$2") || return 2; shift 2;;
      *) return 2;; esac
  done
  [ -n "$runtime" ] && [ -n "$state" ] && [ -n "$controller_spec" ] || return 2
  RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
  runtime_args=(--dir "$runtime")
  clock_args=()
  if [ -n "$now" ]; then
    export POLYLANE_NOW_EPOCH=$now
    clock_args=(--now "$now")
  else now=$(runtime_now); fi
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" "${runtime_args[@]}" reduce
  reap_exited_children "$runtime"
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit guardian heartbeat guardian \
    --fingerprint "$(jq -r '.guardian.generation' "$runtime/current/state.json")"
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
  terminal=$(jq -r '.terminal // ""' "$runtime/current/state.json")
  if [ "$terminal" = WAITING_FOR_USER ]; then pause_for_input "$runtime"; return; fi
  [ "$terminal" != COMPLETE ] || return 0
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" reclaim-expired ${clock_args[@]+"${clock_args[@]}"}
  project=$(jq -r .project_root "$runtime/current/state.json"); goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json
  if jq -e '.convergence!=null' "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null; then
    "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" repair "$runtime" "$project"
  fi
  [ ! -f "$goal" ] || "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" ensure-progress "$goal" ${clock_args[@]+"${clock_args[@]}"}
  reconcile_exited_quiet_children "$runtime" "$now"
  if ! "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" "${runtime_args[@]}" check-leases ${clock_args[@]+"${clock_args[@]}"}; then
    context=$runtime/guardian-recovery.json
    jq -n '{goal_ref:"controller",strategy_hash:"guardian-recovery",ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:["actor:controller"]}' >"$context"
    POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime "$BIN/polylane-recovery.sh" route lease_expired controller "$context"
  fi
  actor_live "$runtime/actor-controller.json" || { route_dead_controller_once "$runtime"; start_controller "$runtime" "$state" "$controller_spec"; }
  dispatch_ready "$runtime" "$state" "$now" ${clock_args[@]+"${clock_args[@]}"}
  drain_due_work "$runtime" "$state" "$now" ${clock_args[@]+"${clock_args[@]}"}
  guardian_publish_observation "$runtime"
}
if [ "${POLYLANE_GUARDIAN_SOURCE_ONLY:-0}" = 1 ]; then
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] || return 5 2>/dev/null || exit 5
  return 0 2>/dev/null || exit 0
fi
case ${1:-} in
  check-once) shift; check_once "$@" ;;
  --runtime)
    runtime=$2; shift 2; [ "$1" = --state ] || exit 2; state=$2; shift 2
    [ "$1" = --controller-launch ] || exit 2; controller_spec=$2; shift 2; [ "$#" -eq 0 ] || exit 2
    RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
    POLYLANE_WAKE_PENDING=0
    trap 'POLYLANE_WAKE_PENDING=1' USR1
    trap 'printf "guardian interrupted\n" >>"'$runtime'/guardian.log"; exit 0' INT TERM
    wake=$runtime/wake.fifo; [ -p "$wake" ] || { rm -f "$wake"; mkfifo "$wake"; }; exec 9<>"$wake"
    generation=$(jq -r '(.guardian.generation//0)+1' "$runtime/current/state.json")
    token=$(runtime_start_token $$)
    runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/guardian-election.lock"
    existing_pid=$(jq -r '.guardian.pid // 0' "$runtime/current/state.json")
    existing_token=$(jq -r '.guardian.start_token // ""' "$runtime/current/state.json")
    existing_at=$(jq -r '.guardian.heartbeat_at // 0' "$runtime/current/state.json")
    if [ "$existing_pid" != "$$" ] && [ -n "$existing_token" ] &&
       [ "$(runtime_start_token "$existing_pid" || true)" = "$existing_token" ] &&
       [ $(( $(runtime_now) - existing_at )) -le 10 ]; then
      runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-election.lock"; exit 0
    fi
    started_at=$(runtime_now)
    jq -n --argjson pid "$$" --arg start_token "$token" --arg generation_token "guardian-$generation" \
      --argjson generation "$generation" --argjson started_at "$started_at" \
      '{actor:"guardian",pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,generation_token:$generation_token,
        generation:$generation,started_at:$started_at,lease_valid:true,descendants:[]}' \
      >"$runtime/actor-guardian.json.tmp.$$"
    atomic_json "$runtime/actor-guardian.json" "$runtime/actor-guardian.json.tmp.$$"
    # The signal trap and FIFO are ready before this identity becomes wakeable.
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit guardian register guardian \
      --guardian-pid $$ --guardian-start-token "$token" --guardian-generation "$generation" --guardian-role guardian
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
    runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-election.lock"
    while :; do
      guardian_process_wake "$runtime"
      check_once --runtime "$runtime" --state "$state" --controller-launch "$controller_spec" || true
      [ "${POLYLANE_WAKE_PENDING:-0}" = 0 ] || continue
      terminal=$(jq -r '.terminal // ""' "$runtime/current/state.json")
      [ "$terminal" != COMPLETE ] || exit 0
      if [ "$terminal" = WAITING_FOR_USER ]; then delay=5
      else
        next=$(jq '[.leases[].deadline_at,.queue.items[].next_action_at]|map(select(.!=null))|min // ('"$(date +%s)"'+5)' "$runtime/current/state.json")
        delay=$((next - $(date +%s))); [ "$delay" -lt 0 ] && delay=0; [ "$delay" -gt 5 ] && delay=5
      fi
      if [ "$delay" -gt 0 ]; then IFS= read -r -t "$delay" -u 9 _ || true; fi
    done
    ;;
  *) exit 2 ;;
esac
```

Run: `chmod +x core/scripts/polylane-guardian.sh && bash -n core/scripts/polylane-guardian.sh`

Expected: exit 0 with no output.

- [ ] **Action 4.8 (2–5 minutes): Add mutually supervising keeper and sentinel**

Create `core/scripts/polylane-keeper.sh` with this complete body:

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
BIN=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
atomic_json() { destination=$1 source=$2; jq -e . "$source" >/dev/null; chmod 600 "$source"; mv -f "$source" "$destination"; }
identity_live() {
  file=$1; [ -f "$file" ] || return 1
  pid=$(jq -r '.pid // 0' "$file"); token=$(jq -r '.start_token // ""' "$file")
  [ -n "$token" ] && [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" = "$token" ]
}
heartbeat_fresh() {
  file=$1 limit=$2; identity_live "$file" || return 1
  heartbeat=$(jq -r '.heartbeat_at // 0' "$file"); now=$(runtime_now)
  [ $((now - heartbeat)) -le "$limit" ]
}
mode=${1:-}; [ -n "$mode" ] || exit 2; shift
project='' loop='' sentinel_launch='' keeper_launch='' generation='' nonce=''
runtime='' requested_now=''
while [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; do case $1 in --project) project=$(cd "$2" && pwd -P); shift 2;;
  --loop-id) loop=$2; shift 2;; --sentinel-launch) sentinel_launch=$2; shift 2;;
  --keeper-launch) keeper_launch=$2; shift 2;; --generation) generation=$2; shift 2;;
  --nonce) nonce=$2; shift 2;; --runtime) runtime=$2; shift 2;;
  --now) requested_now=$(runtime_test_now_arg --now "$2") || exit 2; shift 2;;
  *) exit 2;; esac; done
if [ "$mode" = check-once ]; then
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] || exit 2
  runtime=$(cd "$runtime" && pwd -P) || exit 5
  owner=$runtime/keeper.lock/owner.json
  [ -f "$owner" ] && [ ! -L "$owner" ] || exit 5
  jq -e '(keys|sort)==["generation","heartbeat_at","loop_id","nonce","pid","project","start_token"] and
    (.generation|type=="number" and .>0 and floor==.) and
    (.pid|type=="number" and .>0) and (.start_token|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.nonce|type=="string" and length>0)' "$owner" >/dev/null || exit 5
  project=$(cd "$(jq -er .project "$owner")" && pwd -P) || exit 5
  [ "$runtime" = "$project/.polylane/runtime" ] || exit 5
  loop=$(jq -er .loop_id "$owner"); generation=$(jq -er .generation "$owner")
  nonce=$(jq -er .nonce "$owner")
  sentinel_launch=$runtime/sentinel-launch.json; keeper_launch=$runtime/keeper-launch.json
else
  [ -n "$project" ] && [ -n "$loop" ] || exit 2
  runtime=$project/.polylane/runtime
  [ -z "$requested_now" ] || exit 2
fi
RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
lock=$runtime/keeper.lock
write_heartbeat() {
  expected_pid=$1 expected_nonce=$2
  owner=$lock/owner.json; current_nonce=$(jq -r .nonce "$owner" 2>/dev/null || true)
  owner_pid=$(jq -r '.pid//0' "$owner" 2>/dev/null || true)
  owner_token=$(jq -r '.start_token//""' "$owner" 2>/dev/null || true)
  [ "$current_nonce" = "$expected_nonce" ] && [ "$owner_pid" = "$expected_pid" ] &&
    [ "$(jq -r .generation "$owner")" = "$generation" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_start_token "$owner_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)" = "$owner_token" ] || return 6
  temporary=$lock/.owner.$$
  jq --argjson heartbeat_at "$(runtime_now)" '.heartbeat_at=$heartbeat_at' "$owner" >"$temporary"
  atomic_json "$owner" "$temporary"
}
ensure_finalizer() {
  state=$runtime/current/state.json; token=$(jq -r '.shutdown.token // ""' "$state")
  [ -n "$token" ] || return 75
  actor=$runtime/actor-finalizer.json
  identity_live "$actor" && return 0
  [ ! -f "$actor" ] || "$BIN/polylane-process.sh" adopt-or-fence "$runtime" finalizer shutdown
  child=$("$BIN/polylane-detach.py" --log "$runtime/finalizer.log" -- \
    "$BIN/polylane-finalizer.sh" run --runtime "$runtime" --shutdown-token "$token" \
    --keeper-launch "$keeper_launch")
  child_token=''; for ignored in 1 2 3 4 5; do child_token=$(runtime_start_token "$child" || true); [ -z "$child_token" ] || break; sleep 0.02; done
  [ -n "$child_token" ] || return 75
  [ "$(ps -o ppid= -p "$child" | tr -d ' ')" != "$$" ] || return 75
  temporary=$runtime/.actor-finalizer.$$
  jq -n --argjson pid "$child" --arg start_token "$child_token" --arg generation_token "finalizer-$token" \
    '{actor:"finalizer",pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,generation_token:$generation_token,
      lease_valid:true,descendants:[]}' >"$temporary"
  atomic_json "$actor" "$temporary"
}
keeper_check_once() {
  owner_pid=$1 owner_nonce=$2
  write_heartbeat "$owner_pid" "$owner_nonce"
  stage=$(jq -r '.shutdown.stage // ""' "$runtime/current/state.json")
  terminal=$(jq -r '.terminal // ""' "$runtime/current/state.json")
  case $stage in SESSION_CLOSED|TEARDOWN_COMPLETE) :;; *)
    if [ ! -e "$runtime/disable-restart" ] &&
       jq -e '.active==true' "$runtime/session.json" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      "$BIN/polylane-session.sh" bootstrap "$project" "$loop" "keeper-$generation" \
        "$sentinel_launch" "$keeper_launch"
    fi;;
  esac
  [ "$terminal" != COMPLETE ] || ensure_finalizer
  [ "$stage" != TEARDOWN_COMPLETE ] || return 20
}
case $mode in
  start)
    runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/keeper-election.lock"
    if heartbeat_fresh "$lock/owner.json" 10; then runtime_lock_release "$runtime/keeper-election.lock"; exit 0; fi
    [ ! -d "$lock" ] || { stale=$runtime/keeper.stale.$$; mv "$lock" "$stale"; rm -rf "$stale"; }
    generation=$(( $(cat "$runtime/keeper-generation" 2>/dev/null || printf 0) + 1 ))
    printf '%s\n' "$generation" >"$runtime/keeper-generation"
    nonce="keeper-$generation-$$-$(runtime_wall_now)-${RANDOM:-0}"
    mkdir "$lock"
    nohup "$0" run --project "$project" --loop-id "$loop" --sentinel-launch "$sentinel_launch" \
      --keeper-launch "$keeper_launch" --generation "$generation" --nonce "$nonce" \
      </dev/null >>"$runtime/keeper.log" 2>&1 & child=$!
    child_token=''; for ignored in 1 2 3 4 5; do child_token=$(runtime_start_token "$child" || true); [ -z "$child_token" ] || break; sleep 0.02; done
    [ -n "$child_token" ] || { rm -rf "$lock"; runtime_lock_release "$runtime/keeper-election.lock"; exit 75; }
    temporary=$lock/.owner.$$
    jq -n --argjson pid "$child" --arg start_token "$child_token" --argjson generation "$generation" \
      --arg project "$project" --arg loop "$loop" --arg nonce "$nonce" --argjson heartbeat_at "$(runtime_now)" \
      '{pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,generation:$generation,project:$project,loop_id:$loop,
        nonce:$nonce,heartbeat_at:$heartbeat_at}' >"$temporary"
    atomic_json "$lock/owner.json" "$temporary"
    runtime_lock_release "$runtime/keeper-election.lock"
    ;;
  run)
    trap 'exit 0' INT TERM
    deadline=$(( $(runtime_wall_now) + 2 ))
    until [ -f "$lock/owner.json" ] && [ "$(jq -r .pid "$lock/owner.json")" = "$$" ] &&
      [ "$(jq -r .nonce "$lock/owner.json")" = "$nonce" ]; do
      [ "$(runtime_wall_now)" -lt "$deadline" ] || exit 75; sleep 0.02
    done
    while :; do
      rc=0; keeper_check_once "$$" "$nonce" || rc=$?
      if [ "$rc" -eq 20 ]; then
        runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/keeper-election.lock"
        [ "$(jq -r .nonce "$lock/owner.json" 2>/dev/null || true)" != "$nonce" ] || rm -rf "$lock"
        runtime_lock_release "$runtime/keeper-election.lock"
        exit 0
      fi
      [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || exit "$rc"
      sleep 5
    done
    ;;
  check-once)
    [ -z "$requested_now" ] || [ "$(runtime_now)" = "$requested_now" ] || exit 5
    owner_pid=$(jq -er .pid "$lock/owner.json")
    rc=0; keeper_check_once "$owner_pid" "$nonce" || rc=$?
    [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || [ "$rc" -eq 20 ] || exit "$rc"
    ;;
  *) exit 2 ;;
esac
```

Create `core/scripts/polylane-sentinel.sh` with this complete body:

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
BIN=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
mode=run
[ "${1:-}" != check-once ] || { mode=check-once; shift; }
runtime='' state='' project='' loop='' guardian_launch='' keeper_launch='' sentinel_launch=''
requested_now=''
while [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; do case $1 in --runtime) runtime=$2; shift 2;; --state) state=$2; shift 2;;
  --project) project=$(cd "$2" && pwd -P); shift 2;; --loop-id) loop=$2; shift 2;;
  --guardian-launch) guardian_launch=$2; shift 2;; --keeper-launch) keeper_launch=$2; shift 2;;
  --sentinel-launch) sentinel_launch=$2; shift 2;;
  --now) requested_now=$(runtime_test_now_arg --now "$2") || exit 2; shift 2;;
  *) exit 2;; esac; done
runtime=$(cd "$runtime" && pwd -P) || exit 5
RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
if [ "$mode" = check-once ]; then
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] || exit 2
  heartbeat_file=$runtime/sentinel-heartbeat.json
  [ -f "$heartbeat_file" ] && [ ! -L "$heartbeat_file" ] || exit 5
  jq -e '(keys|sort)==["generation","heartbeat_at","pid","start_token"] and
    (.generation|type=="number" and .>0 and floor==.) and
    (.pid|type=="number" and .>0) and (.start_token|type=="string" and length>0)' \
    "$heartbeat_file" >/dev/null || exit 5
  token=$(jq -er .start_token "$heartbeat_file"); sentinel_pid=$(jq -er .pid "$heartbeat_file")
  generation=$(jq -er .generation "$heartbeat_file")
  [ "$(runtime_start_token "$sentinel_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)" = "$token" ] || exit 5
  [ "$generation" = "$(jq -er .generation "$runtime/session.json")" ] || exit 5
  project=$(cd "$(jq -er .project_root "$runtime/current/state.json")" && pwd -P) || exit 5
  [ "$runtime" = "$project/.polylane/runtime" ] || exit 5
  loop=$(jq -er .loop_id "$runtime/current/state.json")
  state=$project/docs/polylane/controller-state.json
  guardian_launch=$runtime/guardian-launch.json; keeper_launch=$runtime/keeper-launch.json
  sentinel_launch=$runtime/sentinel-launch.json
else
  [ -n "$project" ] && [ -n "$loop" ] && [ -n "$state" ] || exit 2
  [ -z "$requested_now" ] || exit 2
  sentinel_pid=$$
  token=$(runtime_start_token $$); generation=$(jq -r '.generation' "$runtime/session.json")
fi
heartbeat() {
  owner_pid=$1 owner_token=$2 owner_generation=$3
  if [ "$owner_pid" != "$$" ]; then
    current=$runtime/sentinel-heartbeat.json
    [ -f "$current" ] && [ ! -L "$current" ] &&
      [ "$(jq -r .pid "$current")" = "$owner_pid" ] &&
      [ "$(jq -r .start_token "$current")" = "$owner_token" ] &&
      [ "$(jq -r .generation "$current")" = "$owner_generation" ] &&
      [ "$(runtime_start_token "$owner_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)" = "$owner_token" ] || return 6
  fi
  temporary=$runtime/.sentinel-heartbeat.$$
  jq -n --argjson pid "$owner_pid" --arg start_token "$owner_token" --argjson generation "$owner_generation" \
    --argjson heartbeat_at "$(runtime_now)" '{pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,
      generation:$generation,heartbeat_at:$heartbeat_at}' >"$temporary"
  chmod 600 "$temporary"; mv -f "$temporary" "$runtime/sentinel-heartbeat.json"
}
guardian_fresh() {
  snapshot=$runtime/current/state.json; pid=$(jq -r '.guardian.pid // 0' "$snapshot")
  recorded=$(jq -r '.guardian.start_token // ""' "$snapshot"); at=$(jq -r '.guardian.heartbeat_at // 0' "$snapshot")
  [ -n "$recorded" ] && [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" = "$recorded" ] &&
    [ $(( $(runtime_now) - at )) -le 10 ]
}
start_guardian() {
  runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/sentinel-guardian-start.lock"
  if guardian_fresh; then runtime_lock_release "$runtime/sentinel-guardian-start.lock"; return 0; fi
  [ ! -f "$runtime/actor-guardian.json" ] || "$BIN/polylane-process.sh" adopt-or-fence "$runtime" guardian shutdown
  POLYLANE_EXPECTED_PROJECT=$project POLYLANE_EXPECTED_LOOP_ID=$loop \
    "$BIN/polylane-exec-argv.sh" --spec "$guardian_launch" >>"$runtime/guardian.log" 2>&1 & child=$!
  child_token=''; for ignored in 1 2 3 4 5; do child_token=$(runtime_start_token "$child" || true); [ -z "$child_token" ] || break; sleep 0.02; done
  deadline=$(( $(runtime_wall_now) + 2 ))
  while [ "$(runtime_wall_now)" -lt "$deadline" ]; do
    guardian_fresh && break
    kill -0 "$child" 2>/dev/null || break
    sleep 0.02
  done
  if ! guardian_fresh; then
    [ -z "$child_token" ] || { [ "$(runtime_start_token "$child" || true)" != "$child_token" ] || kill -TERM "$child" 2>/dev/null || true; }
    runtime_lock_release "$runtime/sentinel-guardian-start.lock"; return 75
  fi
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/sentinel-guardian-start.lock"
}
keeper_fresh() {
  owner=$runtime/keeper.lock/owner.json; [ -f "$owner" ] || return 1
  pid=$(jq -r '.pid // 0' "$owner"); recorded=$(jq -r '.start_token // ""' "$owner"); at=$(jq -r '.heartbeat_at // 0' "$owner")
  [ -n "$recorded" ] && [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" = "$recorded" ] &&
    [ $(( $(runtime_now) - at )) -le 10 ]
}
last_status=''
sentinel_check_once() {
  owner_pid=$1 owner_token=$2 owner_generation=$3
  heartbeat "$owner_pid" "$owner_token" "$owner_generation"
  status=$(jq -cr '[.revision,(
    .controller.stage // .stage // "WORKING"),(.current_action_id // "none"),
    (.recovery.reason_code // .recovery.reason // "none")]|@tsv' "$runtime/current/state.json")
  if [ "$status" != "$last_status" ]; then
    IFS=$'\t' read -r revision stage action recovery <<EOF
$status
EOF
    printf 'polylane revision=%s stage=%s action=%s recovery=%s\n' \
      "$revision" "$stage" "$action" "$recovery"
    last_status=$status
  fi
  terminal=$(jq -r '.terminal // ""' "$runtime/current/state.json")
  if [ "$terminal" != COMPLETE ] && ! guardian_fresh; then start_guardian; fi
  if ! keeper_fresh; then
    POLYLANE_EXPECTED_PROJECT=$project POLYLANE_EXPECTED_LOOP_ID=$loop \
      "$BIN/polylane-exec-argv.sh" --spec "$keeper_launch" >>"$runtime/keeper.log" 2>&1 &
  fi
  [ ! -e "$runtime/disable-restart" ] || return 20
}
case $mode in
  run)
    trap 'exit 0' INT TERM
    while :; do
      rc=0; sentinel_check_once "$$" "$token" "$generation" || rc=$?
      [ "$rc" -ne 20 ] || exit 0
      [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || exit "$rc"
      sleep 5
    done
    ;;
  check-once)
    [ -z "$requested_now" ] || [ "$(runtime_now)" = "$requested_now" ] || exit 5
    rc=0; sentinel_check_once "$sentinel_pid" "$token" "$generation" || rc=$?
    [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || [ "$rc" -eq 20 ] || exit "$rc"
    ;;
esac
```

```bash
bash -n core/scripts/polylane-keeper.sh
bash -n core/scripts/polylane-sentinel.sh
```

- [ ] **Action 4.9 (2–5 minutes): Add idempotent detached finalization**

Create `core/scripts/polylane-finalizer.sh` with this complete body:

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
BIN=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
identity_live() {
  file=$1; [ -f "$file" ] || return 1
  pid=$(jq -r '.pid // 0' "$file"); token=$(jq -r '.start_token // ""' "$file")
  [ -n "$token" ] && [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" = "$token" ]
}
advance() {
  runtime=$1 token=$2 expected=$3 stage=$4
  payload=$runtime/shutdown.$$.json
  jq -n --arg shutdown_token "$token" --arg expected_stage "$expected" --arg stage "$stage" \
    '{shutdown_token:$shutdown_token,expected_stage:$expected_stage,stage:$stage}' >"$payload"
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit finalizer shutdown_advance "$stage" --payload-file "$payload"
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
  rm -f "$payload"
  [ "$(jq -r .shutdown.stage "$runtime/current/state.json")" = "$stage" ] || return 75
}
ensure_keeper() {
  runtime=$1 keeper_launch=$2
  owner=$runtime/keeper.lock/owner.json
  if identity_live "$owner" && [ $(( $(runtime_now) - $(jq -r '.heartbeat_at // 0' "$owner") )) -le 10 ]; then return 0; fi
  project=$(jq -r .project_root "$runtime/current/state.json"); loop=$(jq -r .loop_id "$runtime/current/state.json")
  POLYLANE_EXPECTED_PROJECT=$project POLYLANE_EXPECTED_LOOP_ID=$loop \
    "$BIN/polylane-exec-argv.sh" --spec "$keeper_launch" >>"$runtime/keeper.log" 2>&1 &
}
seal_shutdown_identity() {
  runtime=$1 role=$2 source=$3 pid=$4 token=$5
  identity_live_record=$runtime/.shutdown-identity.$$.json
  jq -Scn --arg role "$role" --arg source "$source" --argjson pid "$pid" \
    --arg start_token "$token" \
    '{role:$role,source:$source,pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token}' >"$identity_live_record"
  hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$identity_live_record")
  destination=$runtime/shutdown-identities/${hash#sha256:}.json
  if [ -e "$destination" ]; then
    [ -f "$destination" ] && [ ! -L "$destination" ] &&
      [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$destination")" = "$hash" ] || return 5
    rm -f "$identity_live_record"
  else chmod 400 "$identity_live_record"; mv -f "$identity_live_record" "$destination"; fi
  jq -n --arg role "$role" --arg source "$source" --arg path "$destination" \
    --arg hash "$hash" --argjson pid "$pid" --arg token "$token" \
    '{role:$role,source:$source,path:$path,hash:$hash,pid:$pid,start_token:$token}'
}
snapshot_shutdown_identities() {
  runtime=$1 session=$2 include_self=${3:-0}
  root=$runtime/shutdown-identities
  [ ! -L "$root" ] || return 5; mkdir -p "$root"; chmod 700 "$root"
  rows=$runtime/.shutdown-rows.$$.json; printf '[]\n' >"$rows"
  for source in "$runtime/keeper.lock/owner.json" "$runtime/sentinel-heartbeat.json" \
    "$runtime"/actor-*.json "$runtime"/lane-identities/*.json; do
    [ -f "$source" ] && [ ! -L "$source" ] || continue
    pid=$(jq -r '.pid//0' "$source"); token=$(jq -r '.start_token//""' "$source")
    [ -n "$token" ] && [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" = "$token" ] || continue
    case $source in
      */keeper.lock/owner.json) role=keeper;; */sentinel-heartbeat.json) role=sentinel;;
      */lane-identities/*) role=lane;;
      */actor-*) actor_name=$(basename "$source" .json); actor_name=${actor_name#actor-}
        case $actor_name in guardian*) role=guardian;; controller*) role=controller;;
          finalizer*) role=finalizer;; worker*|quiet*) role=worker;; *) return 5;; esac;;
    esac
    [ "$pid" != "$$" ] || { [ "$include_self" = 1 ] || continue; }
    row=$(seal_shutdown_identity "$runtime" "$role" "$source" "$pid" "$token") || return 5
    jq --argjson row "$row" '.+[$row]' "$rows" >"$rows.next"
    mv -f "$rows.next" "$rows"
  done
  if tmux has-session -t "$session" 2>/dev/null; then
    while IFS= read -r pid; do
      [ -n "$pid" ] || continue; token=$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)
      [ -n "$token" ] || continue
      row=$(seal_shutdown_identity "$runtime" pane "$runtime/session.json" "$pid" "$token") || return 5
      jq --argjson row "$row" '.+[$row]' "$rows" >"$rows.next"
      mv -f "$rows.next" "$rows"
    done < <(tmux list-panes -t "$session" -F '#{pane_pid}')
  fi
  self_token=$(runtime_start_token $$)
  jq -Sc --argjson self_pid "$$" --arg self_token "$self_token" \
    --argjson captured_at "$(runtime_now)" \
    '{schema_version:1,captured_at:$captured_at,identities:.,
      finalizer_handoff:{pid:$self_pid,start_token:$self_token,
        disposition:"publish_teardown_then_exit;foreground_verifies_absent"}}' \
    "$rows" >"$runtime/shutdown-identity-manifest.json.tmp.$$"
  chmod 400 "$runtime/shutdown-identity-manifest.json.tmp.$$"
  mv -f "$runtime/shutdown-identity-manifest.json.tmp.$$" "$runtime/shutdown-identity-manifest.json"
  rm -f "$rows"
}
fence_shutdown_identities() {
  runtime=$1 mode=${2:-all}; manifest=$runtime/shutdown-identity-manifest.json
  [ -f "$manifest" ] && [ ! -L "$manifest" ] || return 5
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r role path hash; do
    [ "$mode:$role" != preserve-keeper:keeper ] || continue
    "$BIN/polylane-process.sh" fence-sealed-identity "$runtime" "$path" "$hash" || return 75
  done < <(jq -r '.identities|sort_by(.role,.pid)|.[]|[.role,.path,.hash]|@tsv' "$manifest")
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r role pid token; do
    [ "$mode:$role" != preserve-keeper:keeper ] || continue
    [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" != "$token" ] || return 75
  done < <(jq -r '.identities[]|[.role,.pid,.start_token]|@tsv' "$manifest")
}
case ${1:-} in
  run)
    [ "$2" = --runtime ] || exit 2; runtime=$3; [ "$4" = --shutdown-token ] || exit 2; token=$5
    [ "$6" = --keeper-launch ] || exit 2; keeper_launch=$7; RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
    project=$(jq -r '.project_root' "$runtime/current/state.json"); loop=$(jq -r '.loop_id' "$runtime/current/state.json"); session=polylane-$loop
    self_token=$(runtime_start_token $$)
    while :; do
      current=$(jq -r '.shutdown.stage' "$runtime/current/state.json")
      case $current in TERMINAL_PUBLISHED|CLAIMS_DRAINED|ACTORS_FENCED|HOOK_DISARMED|FINALIZER_ARMED|SESSION_CLOSED)
        ensure_keeper "$runtime" "$keeper_launch";; esac
      case $current in
        TERMINAL_PUBLISHED)
          touch "$runtime/stop-reservations"
          "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" reclaim-expired
          jq -e '[.queue.items[]|select(.status=="starting" or .status=="running")]|length==0' \
            "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || exit 75
          advance "$runtime" "$token" TERMINAL_PUBLISHED CLAIMS_DRAINED ;;
        CLAIMS_DRAINED)
          touch "$runtime/disable-restart"
          snapshot_shutdown_identities "$runtime" "$session" 0 || exit 75
          fence_shutdown_identities "$runtime" preserve-keeper || exit 75
          advance "$runtime" "$token" CLAIMS_DRAINED ACTORS_FENCED ;;
        ACTORS_FENCED)
          fence_shutdown_identities "$runtime" preserve-keeper || exit 75
          if tmux has-session -t "$session" 2>/dev/null; then
            [ "$(tmux show-options -v -t "$session" @polylane-project 2>/dev/null)" = "$project" ] || exit 75
            tmux set-hook -u -t "$session" pane-died
          fi
          advance "$runtime" "$token" ACTORS_FENCED HOOK_DISARMED ;;
        HOOK_DISARMED)
          jq -n --arg token "$token" --argjson pid "$$" --arg start_token "$self_token" \
            '{shutdown_token:$token,finalizer_pid:$pid,finalizer_start_token:$start_token}' >"$runtime/finalizer-armed.json.tmp.$$"
          chmod 600 "$runtime/finalizer-armed.json.tmp.$$"; mv -f "$runtime/finalizer-armed.json.tmp.$$" "$runtime/finalizer-armed.json"
          advance "$runtime" "$token" HOOK_DISARMED FINALIZER_ARMED ;;
        FINALIZER_ARMED)
          fence_shutdown_identities "$runtime" preserve-keeper || exit 75
          if tmux has-session -t "$session" 2>/dev/null; then
            [ "$(tmux show-options -v -t "$session" @polylane-project 2>/dev/null)" = "$project" ] || exit 75
            tmux kill-session -t "$session"
          fi
          tmux has-session -t "$session" 2>/dev/null && exit 75
          advance "$runtime" "$token" FINALIZER_ARMED SESSION_CLOSED ;;
        SESSION_CLOSED)
          tmux has-session -t "$session" 2>/dev/null && exit 75
          fence_shutdown_identities "$runtime" || exit 75
          [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT:-}" != finalizer-before-teardown-publish ] || exit 99
          advance "$runtime" "$token" SESSION_CLOSED TEARDOWN_COMPLETE
          exit 0 ;;
        TEARDOWN_COMPLETE) exit 0 ;;
        *) exit 75 ;;
      esac
    done
    ;;
  emergency-cleanup)
    [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-}" = 1 ] || exit 5
    shift; [ "$1" = --project ] || exit 2; project=$(cd "$2" && pwd -P); shift 2
    [ "$1" = --loop-id ] || exit 2; loop=$2; shift 2; [ "$1" = --generation ] || exit 2; generation=$2
    runtime=$project/.polylane/runtime; record=$runtime/session.json
    jq -e --arg session "polylane-$loop" --argjson generation "$generation" '.session==$session and .generation==$generation' "$record" >/dev/null || exit 6
    touch "$runtime/disable-restart"
    session=polylane-$loop
    if tmux has-session -t "$session" 2>/dev/null; then
      [ "$(tmux show-options -v -t "$session" @polylane-project 2>/dev/null)" = "$project" ] || exit 6
    fi
    snapshot_shutdown_identities "$runtime" "$session" 1 || exit 75
    fence_shutdown_identities "$runtime" || exit 75
    if tmux has-session -t "$session" 2>/dev/null; then
      tmux set-hook -u -t "$session" pane-died 2>/dev/null || true
      # Every pane root and recursively discovered descendant is already absent.
      tmux kill-session -t "$session"
    fi
    tmux has-session -t "$session" 2>/dev/null && exit 75
    rm -rf "$runtime/keeper.lock"
    ;;
  *) exit 2 ;;
esac
```
