---

### Task 6: Require Transactional Perfection Convergence and Safe Suggestions

**Files:**
- Create: core/config/polylane-control-allowlist-v1.json
- Create: core/config/polylane-certification-categories-v1.json
- Create: core/scripts/lib/polylane-convergence-command.sh
- Create: core/scripts/lib/polylane-convergence-reducer.sh
- Create: core/scripts/polylane-certify.sh
- Create: core/scripts/polylane-suggestions.sh
- Create: core/tests/helpers/convergence-contract.sh
- Create: core/tests/test-perfection.sh
- Create: core/tests/test-certification.sh
- Create: core/tests/test-suggestions.sh
- Create: core/tests/test-convergence-atomicity.sh
- Create: codex/tests/test-codex-final-delivery.sh
- Modify: core/scripts/polylane-runtime.sh, core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-reducer.sh,
  core/scripts/polylane-terminal.sh, core/scripts/polylane-guardian.sh,
  core/workflow/polylane-loop.md, codex/references/codex-controller.md, and codex/SKILL.md

**Interfaces:**
- polylane-certify.sh init <runtime-dir> <loop-id>
- polylane-certify.sh prepare-from-council <runtime-dir> <goal-state> <project-root>
  <exhaustive-routing-reference> <output-config> validates the authenticated five-member
  GO nomination (including ADVERSARY), copies only the frozen compiled goal-state
  certification command specs and exact policy hash, and immutably publishes the exact
  config consumed by `run`; fast council
  evidence, NO_GO, a missing/tampered reference, or `selected_next_goal_ref` other than
  `__CERTIFY__` exits 5 without a config.
- polylane-certify.sh run <runtime-dir> <goal-state> <project-root> <cert-config.json>
  performs one idempotent attempt in a distinct fresh checkout, runs every configured argv
  array under a hard deadline, validates a real exhaustive council, freezes evidence, and
  submits one convergence transaction.
- polylane-certify.sh complete <runtime-dir> <goal-state> <project-root> re-audits the
  product, scope, council/evidence manifests, and last two distinct clean records.
- polylane-certify.sh repair <runtime-dir> <project-root> repairs docs projections only
  from the authoritative published runtime snapshot.
- polylane-suggestions.sh generate-cycle <runtime-dir> <cycle-summary> <goal-state>
  <runtime-staging-output.json> and generate-final <runtime-dir> <locked-scope> <perfection-state>
  <runtime-staging-output.json> invoke the platform-pinned suggestion model through a bounded argv path; no eval, shell
  text, or validation-only dispatch is accepted.
- polylane-suggestions.sh validate-cycle <runtime-dir> <file> <goal-state>
  <transaction.json>; commit-cycle <runtime-dir> <transaction.json> atomically publishes
  the cycle artifact and its selected queue item.
- polylane-suggestions.sh commit-final <runtime-dir> <final.json> <delivery.json>
  atomically publishes the exact-30 artifact and pending receipt state.
- render-final reads the reducer projection; record-final-attempt <runtime> <delivery-id>
  <content-hash> <attempt-id>, ack-final <runtime> <receipt>, and start-new-run <runtime>
  <final.json> <rank> submit reducer transactions for deterministic at-least-once delivery,
  idempotent attempt/receipt ids, and an atomic explicit new run.

Task 2's generic event envelope is a prerequisite, not an assumption. Its final emit
interface accepts at most one --payload-file. The file must be canonical, regular,
non-symlink JSON under the project/runtime roots. Event publication embeds canonical
payload, payload_sha256, previous_event_hash, and event_hash, then finalizes the event mode
0400. Receipt lookup uses polylane-runtime.sh --dir <runtime> lookup-event <actor> <type>
<unique-action-id> and returns event_id, event_hash, event_file_hash, and path. Before typed
dispatch, the reducer recomputes every hash. Every Task 6 event uses that exact interface;
no private alternate event writer exists.

**Contract — one reducer transaction per logical convergence effect:**

The runtime snapshot owns convergence history. docs/polylane/perfection.json,
certification-findings.json, cycle-N-suggestions.json, final-suggestions.json, and
final-delivery.json are repairable projections. A convergence transaction contains:

~~~json
{
  "schema_version":1,
  "transaction_id":"stable-attempt-id",
  "kind":"certification|cycle_suggestions|finalization",
  "expected_runtime_revision":17,
  "expected_transaction_revision":4,
  "expected_queue_revision":9,
  "scope_snapshot_hash":"sha256:...",
  "goal_state_hash":"sha256:...",
  "body_hash":"sha256:...",
  "body":{}
}
~~~

The command lock admits one convergence submission at a time. The reducer recomputes the
canonical body hash, checks expected runtime/transaction/queue revisions at the event's
exact position, and either applies the whole body or records one typed rejection while
consuming the event. Reusing a transaction id with the same hash is a no-op success;
reusing it with different content is rejected. A certification transaction appends its
record, updates the perfection counter, and inserts every in-scope finding at top weight in
the goal tree together—or changes none. A cycle transaction publishes the suggestion
artifact and fully validated selected queue item together—or neither. Projection crashes
cannot create split authority and repair never duplicates a certification, finding, or
queue id.

**Contract — actual clean product and frozen scope:**

Certification rejects every staged, unstaged, or untracked product change. It enumerates
three NUL-safe streams:

~~~text
git diff --cached --name-only -z --no-renames
git diff --name-only -z --no-renames
git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -z
~~~

Disabling rename detection deliberately exposes both source deletion and destination
addition. Only the closed, versioned control allowlist may be dirty. Every path component
is checked for symlinks before allowlist matching; absolute paths, dot segments, control
characters, symlink traversal, and paths escaping the project fail closed.

The scope hash is not read from a claimed hash field. It hashes the actual bytes, relative
paths, and file hashes of NORTHSTAR.md, STRATEGY.md, ULTIMATE_GOAL.md, and max-state.json
after rejecting missing, nonregular, or symlinked inputs. The product fingerprint hashes
HEAD commit/tree, that actual scope manifest hash, and the built-in allowlist hash. A scope
file change therefore resets perfection even though it is an allowed control write.
The certifier also holds the same promotion.lock used by every base-worktree mutation from
its first clean audit until the convergence generation is published. The reducer repeats
the byte audit inside that fence, closing the check-to-publish race.

**Contract — real exhaustive evidence, never self-attestation:**

Each certification config supplies a stable attempt_id, cycle, category/fresh-checkout argv
arrays, per-command deadline, and an absolute Task 5 council responses.json. The certifier
first calls production polylane-council.sh validate exhaustive, then independently requires
schema_version 2, exact lenses USER_VALUE, COMPLETENESS, QUALITY_RISK, EFFORT_ROI, and
ADVERSARY. It confines every packet, prompt, output, member-evidence, and start/completion
event path beneath the canonical council evidence root.

For each member it rehashes the packet, prompt, output, 0400 content-addressed member
record, and pinned 0400 start/completion event copies. It verifies actor role, PID,
start-token, generation, exact event id/hash, actor/type/action, prompt/packet/output
payload binding, and member_evidence_hash. It recomputes aggregate_hash over canonical
{council_id,mode,packet_hash,member_evidence_hashes:<sorted>}. Pinned event copies must
either match the retained raw runtime event or a verified critical-event inclusion in the
latest checkpoint, so compaction cannot erase proof. Arbitrary absolute paths outside the
evidence root, a five-member boolean, an adversary boolean, or caller-authored record JSON
can never substitute for this evidence.

Every check and install/build/boot command is an immutable compiled command spec. The
certifier revalidates logical/physical executable and interpreter identities before and
after execution, NUL-decodes the frozen physical argv, and runs it behind an identity-bound,
deny-by-default platform sandbox with no network, no host PID visibility/signalling, no
user-home reads, and writes only to the isolated checkout/home/scratch. It never calls bash -c,
sh -c, eval, or command text. Outputs, argv, exit status, sandbox identity, and scope/council hashes are
retained in a content-addressed, mode-0400 evidence directory. Certification and checkout
ids are unique; attempt_id makes crash replay idempotent.

Only two distinct clean certifications with different attempt, certification, checkout,
and council ids but the same exact current commit/scope/allowlist/product fingerprint may
complete. Any finding resets the counter and inserts a deterministic top-weight goal. A
third-party edit to evidence, current HEAD, product tree, scope input, or projection makes
complete fail.

**Contract — bounded generation and later receipt:**

Cycle/final generation creates a schema-only prompt from canonical input hashes, executes
the selected installed adapter in a subprocess through run-with-deadline, validates a
sibling temporary JSON, and renames only on success. Adapter failure, timeout, malformed
JSON, or schema failure leaves the prior destination byte-identical and routes a typed
recovery through polylane-recovery.sh. Dispatch kind final_suggestions must execute
generate-final, never validate-final alone.

Cycle validation recomputes suggestion content, actual scope, and goal-state hashes and
requires current runtime, convergence, and queue revisions. Exactly one auto_selected_id
must match the complete selected queue item and its goal reference. Final output has exactly
ranks 1–30, unique ids/titles, scope beyond_locked, execution informational, and
starts_new_run true; executable/current-goal fields are forbidden recursively.

A finalization transaction publishes the final file and pending delivery together before
COMPLETE. record-final-attempt is locked and idempotent by attempt_id: exact replay changes
nothing, conflicting replay fails. ack-final accepts only a host/user receipt with matching
delivery/content ids, a distinct later turn, and received_at strictly later than
producing_at. start-new-run is explicit, locked, atomic, idempotent for the same
delivery/rank, refuses overwrite for a different selection, and creates a fresh loop_id.

- [ ] **Action 6.2 (2–5 minutes): Add the transaction command and reducer**

Create core/scripts/lib/polylane-convergence-command.sh with this complete body:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
convergence_canonical_hash() {
  source_file=$1
  temporary=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/polylane-convergence-hash.XXXXXX")
  jq -Sc . "$source_file" >"$temporary"
  value=$(runtime_sha256 "$temporary")
  rm -f "$temporary"
  printf '%s\n' "$value"
}
convergence_current_state() {
  current=$(runtime_current_dir) || return 5
  printf '%s/state.json\n' "$current"
}
convergence_submit() {
  transaction=$1
  jq -e 'type=="object" and .schema_version==1 and
    (.transaction_id|type=="string" and test("^[A-Za-z0-9._:-]{1,160}$")) and
    (.kind|IN("convergence_init","certification","cycle_suggestions","finalization",
      "delivery_attempt","delivery_ack","new_run")) and
    (.expected_runtime_revision|type=="number" and .>=1 and floor==.) and
    (.expected_transaction_revision|type=="number" and .>=0 and floor==.) and
    (.expected_queue_revision|type=="number" and .>=0 and floor==.) and
    (.scope_snapshot_hash|startswith("sha256:")) and
    (.goal_state_hash|startswith("sha256:")) and
    (.body_hash|startswith("sha256:")) and (.body|type=="object")' "$transaction" >/dev/null || return 5
  body=$RUNTIME_DIR/.convergence-body.$$.json
  jq -Sc .body "$transaction" >"$body"
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$body")" = "$(jq -r .body_hash "$transaction")" ] || {
    rm -f "$body"; return 5; }
  rm -f "$body"
  lock=$RUNTIME_DIR/convergence-command.lock
  runtime_lock_acquire "$lock" || return $?
  trap 'runtime_lock_release "$lock" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true' RETURN

  # First replay a finalized transaction event left behind by a command/projection crash.
  "$CONVERGENCE_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$RUNTIME_DIR" reduce || {
    rc=$?; runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return "$rc"; }
  state=$(convergence_current_state) || {
    runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return 5; }
  id=$(jq -r .transaction_id "$transaction")
  hash=$(jq -r .body_hash "$transaction")
  prior=$(jq -c --arg id "$id" '.convergence.transaction_results[$id] // null' "$state")
  if [ "$prior" != null ]; then
    prior_hash=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r '.body_hash // ""')
    [ "$prior_hash" = "$hash" ] || {
      runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return 5; }
    status=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .status)
    runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN
    [ "$status" = applied ] && return 0
    return 7
  fi

  payload=$RUNTIME_DIR/.convergence-transaction.$$.json
  jq -Sc . "$transaction" >"$payload"; chmod 600 "$payload"
  "$CONVERGENCE_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$RUNTIME_DIR" emit convergence \
    convergence_transaction "$id" --fingerprint "$hash" --payload-file "$payload" || {
      rc=$?; rm -f "$payload"; runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return "$rc"; }
  rm -f "$payload"
  "$CONVERGENCE_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$RUNTIME_DIR" reduce || {
    rc=$?; runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return "$rc"; }
  state=$(convergence_current_state)
  status=$(jq -r --arg id "$id" '.convergence.transaction_results[$id].status // "missing"' "$state")
  result_hash=$(jq -r --arg id "$id" '.convergence.transaction_results[$id].body_hash // ""' "$state")
  runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN
  [ "$result_hash" = "$hash" ] || return 5
  [ "$status" = applied ] && return 0
  [ "$status" = rejected ] && return 7
  return 5
}
convergence_public_json() {
  project=$1 relative=$2 source=$3
  project=$(cd "$project" && pwd -P) || return 5
  case $relative in
    docs/polylane/perfection.json|docs/polylane/certification-findings.json|\
    docs/polylane/max-state.json|docs/polylane/final-suggestions.json|\
    docs/polylane/final-delivery.json) :;;
    docs/polylane/cycle-*-suggestions.json)
      printf '%s\n' "$relative" |
        grep -Eq '^docs/polylane/cycle-[1-9][0-9]*-suggestions\.json$' || return 5;;
    *) return 5;;
  esac
  destination=$project/$relative; parent=$(dirname "$destination")
  [ -d "$parent" ] && [ ! -L "$project" ] && [ ! -L "$project/docs" ] &&
    [ ! -L "$parent" ] || return 5
  [ -f "$source" ] && [ ! -L "$source" ] &&
    [ "$(cd "$(dirname "$source")" && pwd -P)" = "$parent" ] || return 5
  [ ! -e "$destination" ] || { [ -f "$destination" ] && [ ! -L "$destination" ]; } || return 5
  jq -e . "$source" >/dev/null; chmod 600 "$source"
  # rename(2) replaces the final directory entry and never follows it; all parent
  # components and both pre/post file types are checked explicitly.
  mv -f "$source" "$destination"
  [ -f "$destination" ] && [ ! -L "$destination" ] && jq -e . "$destination" >/dev/null
}
convergence_repair_projections() {
  project=$1
  state=$(convergence_current_state) || return 5
  root=$project/docs/polylane
  mkdir -p "$root"
  lock=$RUNTIME_DIR/convergence-projection.lock
  runtime_lock_acquire "$lock" || return $?
  trap 'runtime_lock_release "$lock" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true' RETURN
  jq '{schema_version:1,loop_id:.loop_id,
    consecutive_clean:(.convergence.consecutive_clean//0),
    certifications:(.convergence.certifications//[]),
    transaction_revision:(.convergence.transaction_revision//0)}' "$state" >"$root/.perfection.$$"
  convergence_public_json "$project" docs/polylane/perfection.json "$root/.perfection.$$"
  jq '{schema_version:1,loop_id:.loop_id,items:(.convergence.finding_goals//[])}' \
    "$state" >"$root/.findings.$$"
  convergence_public_json "$project" docs/polylane/certification-findings.json "$root/.findings.$$"
  if [ -f "$root/max-state.json" ]; then
    jq --slurpfile state "$state" '.goal_tree.items=((.goal_tree.items//[]) +
      ($state[0].convergence.finding_goals//[]) |
      unique_by(.id)|sort_by(-.weight,.id))' "$root/max-state.json" >"$root/.goal.$$"
    convergence_public_json "$project" docs/polylane/max-state.json "$root/.goal.$$"
  fi
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r cycle artifact; do
    destination=$root/cycle-$cycle-suggestions.json
    printf '%s\n' "$artifact" | jq -Sc . >"$destination.tmp.$$"
    convergence_public_json "$project" "docs/polylane/cycle-$cycle-suggestions.json" "$destination.tmp.$$"
  done < <(jq -r '.convergence.cycle_suggestions//{}|to_entries[]|
    [.key,(.value.artifact|tojson)]|@tsv' "$state")
  if jq -e '.convergence.finalization!=null' "$state" >/dev/null; then
    jq -Sc '.convergence.finalization.suggestions' "$state" >"$root/.final.$$"
    convergence_public_json "$project" docs/polylane/final-suggestions.json "$root/.final.$$"
    jq -Sc '.convergence.finalization.delivery' "$state" >"$root/.delivery.$$"
    convergence_public_json "$project" docs/polylane/final-delivery.json "$root/.delivery.$$"
  fi
  if [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT:-}" = convergence-before-projection ]; then
    runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return 99
  fi
  runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN
}
~~~

Create core/scripts/lib/polylane-convergence-reducer.sh with this complete body:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
polylane_convergence_reject() {
  state=$1 event=$2 output=$3 reason=$4
  jq --slurpfile event "$event" --arg reason "$reason" '
    ($event[0].payload) as $tx | .convergence=(.convergence//{
      transaction_revision:0,applied_transactions:{},transaction_results:{},
      consecutive_clean:0,certifications:[],finding_goals:[],cycle_suggestions:{},
      finalization:null,new_run:null}) |
    .convergence.transaction_results[$tx.transaction_id]={
      status:"rejected",kind:$tx.kind,body_hash:$tx.body_hash,reason:$reason,
      event_id:$event[0].sequence}' "$state" >"$output"
}
polylane_convergence_valid_queue_item() {
  item=$1
  jq -e 'type=="object" and .schema_version==1 and
    (.id|type=="string" and length>0) and (.kind|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.mode|IN("online","offline","probe")) and (.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and
    (.priority|type=="number") and (.goal_ref|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.args|type=="object") and
    ([.args|paths(scalars)|last]|all(
      .!="command" and .!="shell" and .!="script")) and
    (.depends_on|type=="array") and .depends_on==(.depends_on|sort|unique) and
    (.next_action_at|type=="number") and
    (.deadline_at|type=="number" and .>=.next_action_at) and
    (.ownership_globs|type=="array") and
    .ownership_globs==(.ownership_globs|sort|unique) and
    (.resource_locks|type=="array") and
    .resource_locks==(.resource_locks|sort|unique) and .claim==null' "$item" >/dev/null
}
polylane_convergence_validate_body() {
  event=$1
  tx=$RUNTIME_DIR/.validate-convergence.$$.json
  jq -Sc .payload "$event" >"$tx"
  body=$tx.body
  jq -Sc .body "$tx" >"$body"
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$body")" = "$(jq -r .body_hash "$tx")" ] || {
    rm -f "$tx" "$body"; return 5; }
  kind=$(jq -r .kind "$tx")
  case $kind in
    convergence_init)
      jq -e '.body.loop_id|type=="string" and length>0' "$tx" >/dev/null ;;
    certification)
      jq -e '.body.record as $r |
        ($r.certification_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
        ($r.attempt_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
        ($r.checkout_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
        ($r.commit|test("^[0-9a-f]{40,64}$")) and
        ($r.scope_snapshot_hash|startswith("sha256:")) and
        ($r.scope_snapshot_hash==.scope_snapshot_hash) and
        ($r.goal_state_hash==.goal_state_hash) and
        ($r.product_fingerprint|startswith("sha256:")) and
        ($r.control_allowlist_hash|startswith("sha256:")) and
        ($r.evidence_manifest_hash|startswith("sha256:")) and
        ($r.council.schema_version==2) and
        ($r.council.member_hashes|length==5) and
        ($r.council.lenses|sort==
          ["ADVERSARY","COMPLETENESS","EFFORT_ROI","QUALITY_RISK","USER_VALUE"]) and
        ($r.findings|type=="array") and (.body.finding_goals|type=="array") and
        ([$r.findings[].finding_id]|sort==
          [.body.finding_goals[].finding_id]|sort) and
        all(.body.finding_goals[];.weight==1000000 and .scope=="in_scope")' "$tx" >/dev/null || {
          rm -f "$tx" "$body"; return 5; }
      jq -Sc '.body.record' "$tx" >"$tx.record"
      convergence_bin=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd -P)
      "$convergence_bin/polylane-certify.sh" validate-record "$RUNTIME_DIR" "$tx.record" ;;
    cycle_suggestions)
      jq -e '.body.artifact as $a | .body.selected_queue_item as $q |
        ($a.suggestions|type=="array" and length>=1 and length<=30) and
        ([$a.suggestions[].rank]|sort==[range(1;($a.suggestions|length)+1)]) and
        ([$a.suggestions[].id]|unique|length)==($a.suggestions|length) and
        ([$a.suggestions[]|select(.id==$a.auto_selected_id and .rank==1)]|length)==1 and
        ($q==null or $q.goal_ref==([$a.suggestions[]|select(.id==$a.auto_selected_id)][0].goal_ref))' \
        "$tx" >/dev/null || { rm -f "$tx" "$body"; return 5; }
      if jq -e '.body.selected_queue_item!=null' "$tx" >/dev/null; then
        jq -Sc '.body.selected_queue_item' "$tx" >"$tx.item"
        polylane_convergence_valid_queue_item "$tx.item"
      fi
      jq -Sc '.body.artifact' "$tx" >"$tx.artifact"
      [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$tx.artifact")" = "$(jq -r .body.artifact_hash "$tx")" ] || {
        rm -f "$tx" "$body" "$tx.item" "$tx.artifact"; return 5; }
      platform=$RUNTIME_DIR/controller-platform.json
      [ -f "$platform" ] && [ ! -L "$platform" ] || { rm -f "$tx.artifact"; return 5; }
      mode=$(stat -f '%Lp' "$platform" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$platform")
      [ "$mode" = 400 ] && jq -e --arg hash "$(runtime_sha256 "$platform")" \
        --slurpfile platform "$platform" '
        .body.artifact.provenance.platform_hash==$hash and
        .body.artifact.provenance.model==$platform[0].council.model and
        .body.artifact.provenance.effort==$platform[0].council.effort' "$tx" >/dev/null
      rm -f "$tx.artifact" ;;
    finalization)
      jq -e '.body.suggestions as $f | .body.delivery as $d |
        ($f.suggestions|length==30) and
        ([$f.suggestions[].rank]|sort==[range(1;31)]) and
        ([$f.suggestions[].id]|unique|length==30) and
        all($f.suggestions[];.scope=="beyond_locked" and
          .execution=="informational" and .starts_new_run==true) and
        $d.status=="pending_receipt" and $d.content_hash==.body.suggestion_hash' \
        "$tx" >/dev/null || { rm -f "$tx" "$body"; return 5; }
      jq -Sc '.body.suggestions' "$tx" >"$tx.artifact"
      [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$tx.artifact")" = "$(jq -r .body.suggestion_hash "$tx")" ] || {
        rm -f "$tx" "$body" "$tx.artifact"; return 5; }
      platform=$RUNTIME_DIR/controller-platform.json
      [ -f "$platform" ] && [ ! -L "$platform" ] || { rm -f "$tx.artifact"; return 5; }
      jq -e --arg hash "$(runtime_sha256 "$platform")" --slurpfile platform "$platform" '
        .body.suggestions.provenance.platform_hash==$hash and
        .body.suggestions.provenance.model==$platform[0].council.model and
        .body.suggestions.provenance.effort==$platform[0].council.effort' "$tx" >/dev/null
      rm -f "$tx.artifact" ;;
    delivery_attempt)
      jq -e '.body as $b | (keys|sort)==["attempt_id","content_hash","delivery_id","rendered_at"] and
        ($b.attempt_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
        ($b.content_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        ($b.delivery_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
        ($b.rendered_at|type=="number" and floor==.)' "$tx" >/dev/null ;;
    delivery_ack)
      jq -e '.body|keys==["receipt"] and (.body.receipt|type=="object")' "$tx" >/dev/null ;;
    new_run)
      jq -e '.body as $b | (keys|sort)==["final_hash","new_loop_id","rank","started_at"] and
        ($b.final_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        ($b.new_loop_id|type=="string" and test("^pl-[A-Za-z0-9-]+$")) and
        ($b.rank|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=1 and .<=30) and
        ($b.started_at|type=="number" and floor==.)' "$tx" >/dev/null ;;
    *) rm -f "$tx" "$body" "$tx.item"; return 5 ;;
  esac
  rc=$?
  rm -f "$tx" "$body" "$tx.item" "$tx.record" "$tx.artifact"
  return "$rc"
}
polylane_convergence_apply_event() {
  state=$1 event=$2 output=$3
  jq -e '.type=="convergence_transaction" and
    (.payload_sha256|startswith("sha256:")) and .payload.schema_version==1' \
    "$event" >/dev/null || {
      polylane_convergence_reject "$state" "$event" "$output" invalid_envelope; return; }
  polylane_convergence_validate_body "$event" || {
    polylane_convergence_reject "$state" "$event" "$output" invalid_body; return; }
  id=$(jq -r .payload.transaction_id "$event")
  hash=$(jq -r .payload.body_hash "$event")
  prior=$(jq -r --arg id "$id" '.convergence.applied_transactions[$id].body_hash // ""' "$state")
  if [ -n "$prior" ]; then
    if [ "$prior" = "$hash" ]; then
      jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
        ($event[0].payload) as $tx |
        .convergence.transaction_results[$tx.transaction_id]={
          status:"applied",kind:$tx.kind,body_hash:$tx.body_hash,
          reason:"idempotent_replay",event_id:$event[0].sequence}' "$state" >"$output"
    else polylane_convergence_reject "$state" "$event" "$output" transaction_id_conflict
    fi
    return
  fi
  current_runtime=$(jq -r .revision "$state")
  current_transaction=$(jq -r '.convergence.transaction_revision // 0' "$state")
  current_queue=$(jq -r '.queue.revision // 0' "$state")
  expected_runtime=$(jq -r .payload.expected_runtime_revision "$event")
  expected_transaction=$(jq -r .payload.expected_transaction_revision "$event")
  expected_queue=$(jq -r .payload.expected_queue_revision "$event")
  if [ "$current_runtime" != "$expected_runtime" ] ||
     [ "$current_transaction" != "$expected_transaction" ] ||
     [ "$current_queue" != "$expected_queue" ]; then
    polylane_convergence_reject "$state" "$event" "$output" revision_conflict
    return
  fi
  kind=$(jq -r .payload.kind "$event")
  if [ "$kind" = certification ]; then
    duplicate=$(jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
      ($event[0].payload.body.record) as $record |
      any(.convergence.certifications[]?;
        .attempt_id==$record.attempt_id or
        .certification_id==$record.certification_id or
        .checkout_id==$record.checkout_id)' "$state")
    if [ "$duplicate" = true ]; then
      polylane_convergence_reject "$state" "$event" "$output" duplicate_certification
      return
    fi
  elif [ "$kind" = finalization ]; then
    if ! jq -e '.convergence.finalization==null and .convergence.consecutive_clean>=2 and
      (.convergence.certifications[-2:]|length)==2 and
      all(.convergence.certifications[-2:];(.findings|length)==0)' "$state" >/dev/null; then
      polylane_convergence_reject "$state" "$event" "$output" stale_finalization
      return
    fi
  elif [ "$kind" = cycle_suggestions ]; then
    queue_id=$(jq -r .payload.body.selected_queue_item.id "$event")
    cycle=$(jq -r .payload.body.artifact.cycle "$event")
    selected_goal=$(jq -r '.payload.body.artifact as $a |
      [$a.suggestions[]|select(.id==$a.auto_selected_id)][0].goal_ref' "$event")
    project=$(jq -er .project_root "$state"); goal_state=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json
    if jq -e --argjson cycle "$cycle" '.convergence.cycle_suggestions[($cycle|tostring)]!=null' \
      "$state" >/dev/null || [ ! -f "$goal_state" ] || [ -L "$goal_state" ] ||
       [ "$(jq -Sc . "$goal_state" | runtime_sha256_stdin)" != "$(jq -r .payload.goal_state_hash "$event")" ] ||
       ! jq -e --arg goal "$selected_goal" '
         .next_goal_ref==$goal and any(.goal_tree.items[]?;.id==$goal and (.status//"open")=="open")' \
         "$goal_state" >/dev/null ||
       ! jq -e --argjson cycle "$cycle" '.controller.cycle==$cycle' "$state" >/dev/null; then
      polylane_convergence_reject "$state" "$event" "$output" stale_cycle_suggestion
      return
    fi
    if [ "$queue_id" != null ] && jq -e --arg id "$queue_id" 'any(.queue.items[]?;.id==$id)' "$state" >/dev/null; then
      polylane_convergence_reject "$state" "$event" "$output" duplicate_queue_id
      return
    fi
    active=$(jq -r --arg goal "$selected_goal" '
      any(.queue.items[]?;.goal_ref==$goal and (.status|IN("ready","scheduled","claimed","running")))' "$state")
    if { [ "$queue_id" = null ] && [ "$active" != true ]; } ||
       { [ "$queue_id" != null ] && [ "$active" = true ]; }; then
      polylane_convergence_reject "$state" "$event" "$output" duplicate_or_missing_plan
      return
    fi
  elif [ "$kind" = delivery_attempt ]; then
    if ! jq -e --slurpfile event "$event" '
      ($event[0].payload.body) as $b | .convergence.finalization.delivery as $d |
      $d.status=="pending_receipt" and $d.delivery_id==$b.delivery_id and
      $d.content_hash==$b.content_hash and
      (any($d.attempts[]?;.attempt_id==$b.attempt_id)|not)' "$state" >/dev/null; then
      polylane_convergence_reject "$state" "$event" "$output" invalid_delivery_attempt
      return
    fi
  elif [ "$kind" = delivery_ack ]; then
    if ! jq -e --slurpfile event "$event" '
      ($event[0].payload.body.receipt) as $r | .convergence.finalization.delivery as $d |
      $d.status=="pending_receipt" and $r.delivery_id==$d.delivery_id and
      $r.content_hash==$d.content_hash and ($r.source|IN("host","user")) and
      ($r.receipt_id|type=="string" and length>0) and $r.turn_id!=$d.producing_turn_id and
      ($r.received_at|type=="number" and .>$d.producing_at)' "$state" >/dev/null; then
      polylane_convergence_reject "$state" "$event" "$output" invalid_delivery_receipt
      return
    fi
  elif [ "$kind" = new_run ]; then
    if ! jq -e --slurpfile event "$event" '
      ($event[0].payload.body) as $b | .convergence.finalization as $f |
      .convergence.new_run==null and $b.final_hash==$f.suggestion_hash and
      any($f.suggestions.suggestions[];.rank==$b.rank and .starts_new_run==true)' "$state" >/dev/null; then
      polylane_convergence_reject "$state" "$event" "$output" invalid_new_run
      return
    fi
  fi
  case $kind in
    convergence_init)
      jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
        ($event[0].payload) as $tx |
        .convergence=(.convergence//{transaction_revision:0,applied_transactions:{},
          transaction_results:{},consecutive_clean:0,certifications:[],
          finding_goals:[],cycle_suggestions:{},finalization:null,new_run:null}) |
        .convergence.last_scope_hash=$tx.scope_snapshot_hash |
        .convergence.last_goal_hash=$tx.goal_state_hash' "$state" >"$output.base" ;;
    certification)
      jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
        ($event[0].payload) as $tx | ($tx.body.record) as $record |
        (.convergence.certifications[-1] // null) as $previous |
        .convergence.certifications += [$record] |
          .convergence.finding_goals=((.convergence.finding_goals+
            $tx.body.finding_goals)|unique_by(.id)|sort_by(-.weight,.id)) |
          .goal_tree=(.goal_tree//{items:[]}) |
          .goal_tree.items=((.goal_tree.items+$tx.body.finding_goals)|
            unique_by(.id)|sort_by(-.weight,.id)) |
          .convergence.consecutive_clean=(
            if ($record.findings|length)>0 then 0
            elif $previous!=null and
              $previous.product_fingerprint==$record.product_fingerprint and
              $previous.scope_snapshot_hash==$record.scope_snapshot_hash and
              $previous.control_allowlist_hash==$record.control_allowlist_hash and
              $previous.check_config_hash==$record.check_config_hash
            then (.convergence.consecutive_clean+1) else 1 end) |
          .convergence.last_scope_hash=$tx.scope_snapshot_hash |
          .convergence.last_goal_hash=$tx.goal_state_hash' "$state" >"$output.base" ;;
    cycle_suggestions)
      jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
        ($event[0].payload) as $tx | ($tx.body.selected_queue_item) as $item |
        .convergence.cycle_suggestions[($tx.body.artifact.cycle|tostring)]={
            artifact:$tx.body.artifact,artifact_hash:$tx.body.artifact_hash,
            selected_queue_id:($item.id//null)} |
          (if $item==null then . else .queue.items += [$item] | .queue.revision += 1 end) |
          .convergence.last_scope_hash=$tx.scope_snapshot_hash |
          .convergence.last_goal_hash=$tx.goal_state_hash' "$state" >"$output.base" ;;
    finalization)
      jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
        ($event[0].payload) as $tx |
        .convergence.finalization={
          suggestions:$tx.body.suggestions,suggestion_hash:$tx.body.suggestion_hash,
          delivery:$tx.body.delivery} |
        .convergence.last_scope_hash=$tx.scope_snapshot_hash |
        .convergence.last_goal_hash=$tx.goal_state_hash' "$state" >"$output.base" ;;
    delivery_attempt)
      jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
        ($event[0].payload) as $tx | ($tx.body) as $b |
        .convergence.finalization.delivery.attempts += [{attempt_id:$b.attempt_id,rendered_at:$b.rendered_at}] |
        .convergence.finalization.delivery.attempt_count=(.convergence.finalization.delivery.attempts|length)' \
        "$state" >"$output.base" ;;
    delivery_ack)
      jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
        ($event[0].payload) as $tx | ($tx.body.receipt) as $r |
        .convergence.finalization.delivery.status="acknowledged" |
        .convergence.finalization.delivery.delivered_at=$r.received_at |
        .convergence.finalization.delivery.receipt=$r' "$state" >"$output.base" ;;
    new_run)
      jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
        ($event[0].payload) as $tx |
        .convergence.new_run={loop_id:$tx.body.new_loop_id,phase:"WORKING",terminal:null,
          started_at:$tx.body.started_at,
          started_from:{final_hash:$tx.body.final_hash,rank:$tx.body.rank}}' "$state" >"$output.base" ;;
  esac
  jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
    ($event[0].payload) as $tx |
    .convergence.transaction_revision += 1 |
    .convergence.applied_transactions[$tx.transaction_id]={
      kind:$tx.kind,body_hash:$tx.body_hash,event_id:$event[0].sequence} |
    .convergence.transaction_results[$tx.transaction_id]={
      status:"applied",kind:$tx.kind,body_hash:$tx.body_hash,
      reason:"committed",event_id:$event[0].sequence}' "$output.base" >"$output"
  rm -f "$output.base"
}
~~~

Apply this exact typed reducer dispatch before the ordinary lease/default branch:

+++ b/core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-reducer.sh
@@
 runtime_apply_event() {
   state=$1 event=$2 output=$3
+  if [ "$(jq -r .type "$event")" = convergence_transaction ]; then
+    . "$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd -P)/polylane-convergence-reducer.sh"
