- [ ] **Action 6.3 (2–5 minutes): Create the fresh-checkout certifier**

Create core/scripts/polylane-certify.sh with this complete body:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
umask 077
SELF=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)
ROOT=$(cd "$SELF/.." && pwd -P)
ALLOW=$ROOT/config/polylane-control-allowlist-v1.json
CATEGORIES=$ROOT/config/polylane-certification-categories-v1.json

cert_sha_file() {
  if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then sha256sum "$1" | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'
  else shasum -a 256 "$1" | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'; fi
}
cert_sha_text() {
  temporary=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/polylane-cert-hash.XXXXXX")
  cat >"$temporary"; value=$(cert_sha_file "$temporary"); rm -f "$temporary"; printf '%s\n' "$value"
}
cert_mode() {
  stat -f '%Lp' "$1" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$1" 2>/dev/null
}
cert_physical_executable() {
  launch=$1; [ -f "$launch" ] && [ -x "$launch" ] || return 5
  if [ -L "$launch" ]; then
    command -v realpath >/dev/null 2>&1 || return 5
    physical=$(realpath "$launch") || return 5
  else physical=$launch; fi
  parent=$(cd "$(dirname "$physical")" && pwd -P) || return 5
  physical=$parent/$(basename "$physical")
  [ -f "$physical" ] && [ ! -L "$physical" ] && [ -x "$physical" ] || return 5
  printf '%s\n' "$physical"
}
cert_executable_identity() {
  launch=$1; physical=$(cert_physical_executable "$launch") || return 5
  device=$(stat -f %d "$physical" 2>/dev/null || stat -c %d "$physical")
  inode=$(stat -f %i "$physical" 2>/dev/null || stat -c %i "$physical")
  mode=$(cert_mode "$physical")
  jq -Scn --arg launch "$launch" --arg physical "$physical" \
    --arg sha256 "$(cert_sha_file "$physical")" --arg device "$device" \
    --arg inode "$inode" --arg mode "$mode" \
    '{launch_path:$launch,physical_path:$physical,sha256:$sha256,
      device:$device,inode:$inode,mode:$mode}'
}
cert_verify_executable_identity() {
  spec=$1
  jq -e '(keys|sort)==["device","inode","launch_path","mode","physical_path","sha256"]' \
    "$spec" >/dev/null || return 5
  actual=$(cert_executable_identity "$(jq -r .launch_path "$spec")") || return 5
  jq -e --argjson actual "$actual" '.==$actual' "$spec" >/dev/null
}
cert_mount_parents() {
  path=$1 output=$2; cursor=''; old_ifs=$IFS; IFS=/
  for component in $path; do
    [ -n "$component" ] || continue
    cursor=$cursor/$component; printf '%s\n' "$cursor" >>"$output"
  done
  IFS=$old_ifs
}
cert_canonical_file() {
  [ -f "$1" ] && [ ! -L "$1" ] || return 5
  parent=$(cd "$(dirname "$1")" && pwd -P) || return 5
  printf '%s/%s\n' "$parent" "$(basename "$1")"
}
cert_file_under() {
  root=$(cd "$1" && pwd -P) || return 5
  file=$(cert_canonical_file "$2") || return 5
  case "$file" in "$root"/*) printf '%s\n' "$file";; *) return 5;; esac
}
cert_setup_runtime() {
  runtime=$1
  case $runtime in /*) :;; *) return 2;; esac
  RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
  CONVERGENCE_BIN=$SELF
  export RUNTIME_DIR CONVERGENCE_BIN
  . "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
  . "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-events.sh"
  . "$SELF/lib/polylane-convergence-command.sh"
}
cert_prepare_from_council() {
  runtime=$1 goal=$2 project=$3 reference=$4 output=$5
  cert_setup_runtime "$runtime"
  project=$(cd "$project" && pwd -P) || return 5
  goal=$(cert_canonical_file "$goal") || return 5
  [ "$goal" = "$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json" ] || return 5
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  [ "$project" = "$(cd "$(jq -er .project_root "$state")" && pwd -P)" ] || return 5
  reference=$(cert_canonical_file "$reference") || return 5
  case $reference in "$runtime"/controller-turns/council-exhaustive-*/routing-reference.json) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime "$SELF/polylane-council.sh" validate-routing "$reference" || return 5
  routing=$(cert_canonical_file "$(jq -er .routing.path "$reference")") || return 5
  responses=$(cert_canonical_file "$(jq -er .responses.path "$reference")") || return 5
  jq -e '.verdict=="GO" and .selected_next_goal_ref=="__CERTIFY__"' "$routing" >/dev/null || return 5
  jq -e '.mode=="exhaustive" and (.members|length)==5 and
    ([.members[].lens]|sort)==["ADVERSARY","COMPLETENESS","EFFORT_ROI","QUALITY_RISK","USER_VALUE"]' \
    "$responses" >/dev/null || return 5
  summary=$runtime/.prepare-council.$$.json
  cert_council_validate "$runtime" "$responses" "$summary" || { rm -f "$summary"; return 5; }
  rm -f "$summary"
  policy=$runtime/.prepare-policy.$$.json
  jq -Sc '.certification' "$goal" >"$policy"
  jq -e --slurpfile policy "$policy" '.certification_policy==$policy[0]' "$state" >/dev/null || {
    rm -f "$policy"; return 5; }
  jq -e --argjson categories "$(jq -c .categories "$CATEGORIES")" '
    (keys|sort)==["checks","deadline_seconds","fresh_checkout","policy_hash","revision","schema_version"] and
    .schema_version==1 and .revision==1 and
    (.deadline_seconds|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=1 and .<=86400) and
    (.policy_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    ((.checks|keys|sort)==$categories) and
    all(.checks[];(keys|sort)==["argv","executable","interpreter","path_entries","tool"]) and
    ((.fresh_checkout|keys|sort)==["boot","build","install"]) and
    all(.fresh_checkout[];(keys|sort)==["argv","executable","interpreter","path_entries","tool"])' \
    "$policy" >/dev/null || { rm -f "$policy"; return 5; }
  policy_base=$runtime/.prepare-policy-base.$$.json
  jq -Sc 'del(.policy_hash)' "$policy" >"$policy_base"
  [ "$(cert_sha_file "$policy_base")" = "$(jq -r .policy_hash "$policy")" ] || {
    rm -f "$policy" "$policy_base"; return 5; }
  goal_hash=$(cert_goal_hash "$goal"); policy_hash=$(jq -r .policy_hash "$policy")
  attempt_hash=$(printf '%s\n%s\n%s\n' "$(jq -r .council_id "$responses")" "$goal_hash" "$policy_hash" | cert_sha_text)
  attempt=attempt-${attempt_hash#sha256:}
  parent=$(cd "$(dirname "$output")" && pwd -P) || { rm -f "$policy" "$policy_base"; return 5; }
  [ "$parent" = "$runtime/controller-turns" ] || { rm -f "$policy" "$policy_base"; return 5; }
  output=$parent/$(basename "$output")
  [ ! -e "$output" ] && [ ! -L "$output" ] || { rm -f "$policy" "$policy_base"; return 5; }
  temporary=$parent/.certification-config.$$.json
  jq -Scn --arg attempt "$attempt" --argjson cycle "$(jq -r .cycle "$responses")" \
    --arg council "$responses" --arg reference "$reference" --arg reference_hash "$(cert_sha_file "$reference")" \
    --slurpfile policy "$policy" '
    {schema_version:1,attempt_id:$attempt,cycle:$cycle,council_evidence:$council,
      council_reference:{path:$reference,hash:$reference_hash},
      deadline_seconds:$policy[0].deadline_seconds,policy_hash:$policy[0].policy_hash,
      checks:$policy[0].checks,fresh_checkout:$policy[0].fresh_checkout}' >"$temporary"
  chmod 400 "$temporary"
  ln "$temporary" "$output" 2>/dev/null || { rm -f "$temporary" "$policy" "$policy_base"; return 5; }
  rm -f "$temporary" "$policy" "$policy_base"
}
cert_control_path() {
  case $1 in
    .polylane/runtime/*|.polylane/watch-command|\
    docs/polylane/NORTHSTAR.md|docs/polylane/STRATEGY.md|\
    docs/polylane/ULTIMATE_GOAL.md|docs/polylane/max-state.json|\
    docs/polylane/controller-state.json|docs/polylane/needs-input.json|\
    docs/polylane/perfection.json|docs/polylane/certification-findings.json|\
    docs/polylane/final-suggestions.json|docs/polylane/final-delivery.json|\
    docs/polylane/chat-delivery.json|docs/polylane/skills-ledger.jsonl|\
    docs/polylane/skills-ledger.md|docs/polylane/github-suggestions.jsonl|\
    docs/polylane/spend-ledger.jsonl|docs/polylane/outcomes.jsonl|\
    docs/polylane/hubs.txt|docs/polylane/progress.md|docs/polylane/corpus.md|\
    docs/polylane/input-history/*|docs/polylane/decisions/*|\
    docs/polylane/skill-kits/cycle-[0-9]*.json|\
    docs/polylane/cycle-[0-9]*-suggestions.json|\
    docs/polylane/cycle-[0-9]*-digest.md|\
    docs/polylane/cycle-[0-9]*-research.md|\
    docs/polylane/cycle-[0-9]*-questions.md) return 0;;
    *) return 1;;
  esac
}
cert_safe_project_path() {
  project=$1 path=$2
  case $path in ''|/*|.|..|./*|../*|*/./*|*/../*|*/.|*/..) return 5;; esac
  [ -z "$(printf '%s' "$path" | LC_ALL=C tr -d '\11\12\15\40-\176')" ] || return 5
  cursor=$project
  old_ifs=$IFS; IFS=/
  set -f
  for component in $path; do
    [ -n "$component" ] && [ "$component" != . ] && [ "$component" != .. ] || {
      set +f; IFS=$old_ifs; return 5; }
    cursor=$cursor/$component
    [ ! -L "$cursor" ] || { set +f; IFS=$old_ifs; return 5; }
  done
  set +f; IFS=$old_ifs
  return 0
}
cert_audit_stream() {
  project=$1
  while IFS= read -r -d '' path; do
    if ! cert_safe_project_path "$project" "$path" || ! cert_control_path "$path"; then
      printf 'dirty product path: %s\n' "$path" >&2
      return 5
    fi
  done
}
cert_product_clean() {
  project=$1
  cert_audit_stream "$project" < <(git -C "$project" diff --cached --name-only -z --no-renames) || return 5
  cert_audit_stream "$project" < <(git -C "$project" diff --name-only -z --no-renames) || return 5
  cert_audit_stream "$project" < <(git -C "$project" ls-files --others --exclude-standard -z) || return 5
}
cert_scope_manifest() {
  project=$1 output=$2
  printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$output"
  for relative in docs/polylane/NORTHSTAR.md docs/polylane/STRATEGY.md \
    docs/polylane/ULTIMATE_GOAL.md docs/polylane/max-state.json; do
    cert_safe_project_path "$project" "$relative" || return 5
    file=$project/$relative
    [ -f "$file" ] && [ ! -L "$file" ] || return 5
    hash=$(cert_sha_file "$file")
    jq --arg path "$relative" --arg hash "$hash" \
      '. + [{path:$path,sha256:$hash,type:"regular"}]' "$output" >"$output.next"
    mv -f "$output.next" "$output"
  done
  jq -Sc 'sort_by(.path)' "$output" >"$output.next"; mv -f "$output.next" "$output"
}
cert_scope_hash() {
  manifest=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/polylane-scope.XXXXXX")
  cert_scope_manifest "$1" "$manifest" || { rm -f "$manifest"; return 5; }
  value=$(cert_sha_file "$manifest"); rm -f "$manifest"; printf '%s\n' "$value"
}
cert_goal_hash() { jq -Sc . "$1" | cert_sha_text; }
cert_allowlist_hash() { jq -Sc . "$ALLOW" | cert_sha_text; }
cert_product_fingerprint() {
  project=$1 scope=$2 allow=$3
  printf '%s\n%s\n%s\n%s\n' "$(git -C "$project" rev-parse HEAD)" \
    "$(git -C "$project" rev-parse HEAD^{tree})" "$scope" "$allow" | cert_sha_text
}
cert_council_validate() {
  runtime=$1 responses=$2 summary=$3
  responses=$(cert_canonical_file "$responses") || return 5
  root=$(cd "$(dirname "$responses")" && pwd -P)
  case "$root" in "$runtime"/council-evidence/*|"$runtime"/council-evidence) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  "$SELF/polylane-council.sh" validate exhaustive "$responses"
  jq -e '.schema_version==2 and .mode=="exhaustive" and
    (.members|map(.lens)|sort==
      ["ADVERSARY","COMPLETENESS","EFFORT_ROI","QUALITY_RISK","USER_VALUE"])' \
    "$responses" >/dev/null || return 5
  aggregate=$runtime/.council-aggregate.$$
  jq -Sc '{council_id,mode,packet_hash:.packet.hash,
    member_evidence_hashes:([.members[].member_evidence_hash]|sort)}' \
    "$responses" >"$aggregate"
  [ "$(cert_sha_file "$aggregate")" = "$(jq -r .aggregate_hash "$responses")" ] || {
    rm -f "$aggregate"; return 5; }
  rm -f "$aggregate"
  packet=$(cert_file_under "$root" "$(jq -r .packet.path "$responses")") || return 5
  [ "$(cert_sha_file "$packet")" = "$(jq -r .packet.hash "$responses")" ] || return 5
  [ "$(cert_mode "$packet")" = 400 ] || return 5
  while IFS= read -r lens; do
    member=$runtime/.member.$$.json
    jq -Sc --arg lens "$lens" '.members[]|select(.lens==$lens)' "$responses" >"$member"
    record=$(cert_file_under "$root" "$(jq -r .member_evidence_path "$member")") || {
      rm -f "$member"; return 5; }
    [ "$(cert_mode "$record")" = 400 ] || { rm -f "$member"; return 5; }
    [ "$(cert_sha_file "$record")" = "$(jq -r .member_evidence_hash "$member")" ] || {
      rm -f "$member"; return 5; }
    base=$runtime/.member-base.$$.json
    jq -Sc 'del(.member_evidence_path,.member_evidence_hash)' "$member" >"$base"
    cmp -s "$base" "$record" || { rm -f "$member" "$base"; return 5; }
    rm -f "$base"
    for field in input.prompt_path output.path; do
      artifact=$(cert_file_under "$root" "$(jq -r ".$field" "$member")") || {
        rm -f "$member"; return 5; }
      expected_field=input.prompt_hash; [ "$field" != output.path ] || expected_field=output.hash
      [ "$(cert_sha_file "$artifact")" = "$(jq -r ".$expected_field" "$member")" ] || {
        rm -f "$member"; return 5; }
      [ "$(cert_mode "$artifact")" = 400 ] || { rm -f "$member"; return 5; }
    done
    for phase in started completed; do
      event=$(cert_file_under "$root" "$(jq -r --arg phase "$phase" '.events[$phase].path' "$member")") || {
        rm -f "$member"; return 5; }
      event_hash=$(jq -r --arg phase "$phase" '.events[$phase].event_hash' "$member")
      [ "$(cert_sha_file "$event")" = "$event_hash" ] && [ "$(cert_mode "$event")" = 400 ] || {
        rm -f "$member"; return 5; }
      sequence=$(jq -r .sequence "$event")
      previous=$(jq -r '.previous_event_hash//""' "$event")
      runtime_verify_event_file "$event" "$sequence" "$previous" || {
        rm -f "$member"; return 5; }
      internal_event_hash=$(jq -r .event_hash "$event")
      if [ "$phase" = completed ]; then
        [ "$sequence" -gt "$(jq -r '.events.started.event_id' "$member")" ] || {
          rm -f "$member"; return 5; }
      fi
      if [ "$phase" = started ]; then type=council_member_start; suffix=start
      else type=council_member_complete; suffix=complete; fi
      action="$(jq -r .council_id "$member"):$lens:$suffix"
      jq -e --slurpfile member "$member" --arg type "$type" --arg action "$action" \
        --arg lens "$lens" --argjson id "$(jq -r --arg phase "$phase" '.events[$phase].event_id' "$member")" '
        .sequence==$id and .actor=="council" and .type==$type and .action_id==$action and
        .payload.council_id==$member[0].council_id and .payload.lens==$lens and
        .payload.actor==$member[0].actor and
        (if $type=="council_member_start" then
          .payload.packet.sha256==$member[0].input.packet_hash and
          .payload.prompt.sha256==$member[0].input.prompt_hash and
          .payload.deadline==$member[0].deadline
        else .payload.output.sha256==$member[0].output.hash end)' "$event" >/dev/null || {
          rm -f "$member"; return 5; }
      raw_match=0
      for raw in "$runtime"/events/*.json; do
        [ -f "$raw" ] || continue
        if [ "$(jq -r .sequence "$raw")" = "$(jq -r .sequence "$event")" ] &&
           [ "$(jq -r .event_hash "$raw")" = "$internal_event_hash" ] &&
           [ "$(cert_sha_file "$raw")" = "$event_hash" ]; then raw_match=1; break; fi
      done
      if [ "$raw_match" -eq 0 ]; then
        checkpoint=$(find "$runtime/checkpoints" -name '*.json' -type f | LC_ALL=C sort | tail -1)
        [ -n "$checkpoint" ] && jq -e --arg hash "$internal_event_hash" \
          --arg file_hash "$event_hash" --argjson sequence "$sequence" '
          any(.critical_events[];
            .sequence==$sequence and .event_hash==$hash and
            .event_file_hash==$file_hash)' "$checkpoint" >/dev/null || {
            rm -f "$member"; return 5; }
      fi
    done
    rm -f "$member"
  done < <(printf '%s\n' USER_VALUE COMPLETENESS QUALITY_RISK EFFORT_ROI ADVERSARY)
  jq -n --arg responses "$responses" --arg id "$(jq -r .council_id "$responses")" \
    --arg aggregate "$(jq -r .aggregate_hash "$responses")" \
    --argjson cycle "$(jq -r .cycle "$responses")" \
    --argjson member_hashes "$(jq -c '[.members[].member_evidence_hash]|sort' "$responses")" \
    '{schema_version:2,responses_path:$responses,council_id:$id,cycle:$cycle,
      aggregate_hash:$aggregate,lenses:["USER_VALUE","COMPLETENESS","QUALITY_RISK","EFFORT_ROI","ADVERSARY"],
      member_hashes:$member_hashes}' >"$summary"
}
cert_evidence_validate() {
  runtime=$1 manifest=$2 expected=$3
  manifest=$(cert_file_under "$runtime/certification-evidence" "$manifest") || return 5
  [ "$(basename "$manifest")" = manifest.json ] || return 5
  [ "$(cert_mode "$manifest")" = 400 ] || return 5
  [ "$(cert_sha_file "$manifest")" = "$expected" ] || return 5
  root=$(cd "$(dirname "$manifest")" && pwd -P)
  [ ! -L "$root" ] && [ "$(cert_mode "$root")" = 500 ] || return 5
  jq -e '(keys|sort)==["artifact_count","artifacts","schema_version"] and
    .schema_version==1 and (.artifact_count|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=1) and
    (.artifacts|type=="array" and length==.artifact_count) and
    ([.artifacts[].path]|sort)==[.artifacts[].path] and
    ([.artifacts[].path]|unique|length)==.artifact_count and
    all(.artifacts[];(keys|sort)==["mode","path","sha256","size","type"] and
      .type=="regular" and .mode==400 and
      (.path|test("^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._-]*$")) and .path!="manifest.json" and
      (.size|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0) and
      (.sha256|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")))' "$manifest" >/dev/null || return 5
  actual_count=0
  while IFS= read -r entry; do
    actual_count=$((actual_count + 1))
    [ -f "$entry" ] && [ ! -L "$entry" ] || return 5
  done < <(find "$root" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -print | LC_ALL=C sort)
  [ "$actual_count" -eq "$(( $(jq -r .artifact_count "$manifest") + 1 ))" ] || return 5
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r relative type mode size hash; do
    [ "$type" = regular ] && [ "$mode" = 400 ] || return 5
    file=$(cert_file_under "$root" "$root/$relative") || return 5
    actual_size=$(stat -f '%z' "$file" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%s' "$file")
    [ "$(cert_mode "$file")" = 400 ] && [ "$actual_size" = "$size" ] &&
      [ "$(cert_sha_file "$file")" = "$hash" ] || return 5
  done < <(jq -r '.artifacts[]|[.path,.type,.mode,.size,.sha256]|@tsv' "$manifest")
}
cert_record_validate() {
  runtime=$1 record=$2
  jq -e '.schema_version==1 and (.certification_hash|startswith("sha256:")) and
    (.evidence_manifest_hash|startswith("sha256:")) and .council.schema_version==2 and
    ((.council_reference|keys|sort)==["hash","path"]) and
    (.council_reference.hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.check_config_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.goal_state_hash|startswith("sha256:")) and
    (.findings|type=="array")' "$record" >/dev/null || return 5
  base=$runtime/.record-base.$$.json
  jq -Sc 'del(.certification_hash)' "$record" >"$base"
  [ "$(cert_sha_file "$base")" = "$(jq -r .certification_hash "$record")" ] || {
    rm -f "$base"; return 5; }
  rm -f "$base"
  cert_evidence_validate "$runtime" "$(jq -r .evidence_manifest_path "$record")" \
    "$(jq -r .evidence_manifest_hash "$record")"
  council=$runtime/.council-summary.$$.json
  cert_council_validate "$runtime" "$(jq -r .council.responses_path "$record")" "$council" || {
    rm -f "$council"; return 5; }
  jq -e --slurpfile actual "$council" '.council==$actual[0]' "$record" >/dev/null
  rc=$?; rm -f "$council"; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || return "$rc"
  reference=$(cert_canonical_file "$(jq -r .council_reference.path "$record")") || return 5
  [ "$(cert_sha_file "$reference")" = "$(jq -r .council_reference.hash "$record")" ] || return 5
  POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime "$SELF/polylane-council.sh" validate-routing "$reference" || return 5
  jq -e --arg responses "$(jq -r .council.responses_path "$record")" \
    '.verdict=="GO" and .responses.path==$responses' "$reference" >/dev/null || return 5
  # This function is called again by the reducer while convergence-command.lock is
  # held. Re-audit live source bytes there so a clean checkout result cannot certify
  # a project modified after the checks but before transaction publication.
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  project=$(cd "$(jq -er .project_root "$state")" && pwd -P) || return 5
  goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json
  cert_product_clean "$project" || return 5
  current_scope=$(cert_scope_hash "$project")
  current_allow=$(cert_allowlist_hash)
  current_product=$(cert_product_fingerprint "$project" "$current_scope" "$current_allow")
  current_check_config=$(jq -Sc '.certification|{policy_hash,deadline_seconds,checks,fresh_checkout}' \
    "$goal" | cert_sha_text)
  [ "$(git -C "$project" rev-parse HEAD)" = "$(jq -r .commit "$record")" ] &&
    [ "$current_scope" = "$(jq -r .scope_snapshot_hash "$record")" ] &&
    [ "$current_allow" = "$(jq -r .control_allowlist_hash "$record")" ] &&
    [ "$current_product" = "$(jq -r .product_fingerprint "$record")" ] &&
    [ "$current_check_config" = "$(jq -r .check_config_hash "$record")" ] &&
    [ "$(cert_goal_hash "$goal")" = "$(jq -r .goal_state_hash "$record")" ]
}
cert_write_manifest() {
  evidence=$1 output=$2
  [ "$output" = "$evidence/manifest.json" ] && [ ! -e "$output" ] && [ ! -L "$output" ] || return 5
  entries=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/polylane-evidence-entries.XXXXXX")
  printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$entries"
  find "$evidence" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name manifest.json -print | LC_ALL=C sort |
    while IFS= read -r file; do
      relative=${file#"$evidence/"}
      case $relative in ''|*[!A-Za-z0-9._-]*) rm -f "$entries"; return 5;; esac
      [ -f "$file" ] && [ ! -L "$file" ] && [ "$(cert_mode "$file")" = 400 ] || {
        rm -f "$entries"; return 5; }
      hash=$(cert_sha_file "$file")
      size=$(stat -f '%z' "$file" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%s' "$file")
      jq --arg path "$relative" --arg hash "$hash" --argjson size "$size" \
        '. + [{path:$path,type:"regular",mode:400,size:$size,sha256:$hash}]' \
        "$entries" >"$entries.next"
      mv -f "$entries.next" "$entries"
    done
  jq -Sc '{schema_version:1,artifact_count:length,artifacts:(sort_by(.path))}' "$entries" >"$output"
  chmod 400 "$output"
  rm -f "$entries"
}
cert_run_argv() {
  checkout=$1 isolation_root=$2 spec=$3 label=$4 evidence=$5 deadline=$6
  command_spec=$evidence/$label.command.json; argv_file=$evidence/$label.argv.json; log=$evidence/$label.output.log
  jq -Sc . "$spec" >"$command_spec"; chmod 400 "$command_spec"
  "$SELF/polylane-command-policy.sh" verify-spec "$checkout" "$command_spec" || return 5
  jq -Sc .argv "$command_spec" >"$argv_file"
  argv=()
  while IFS= read -r -d '' value; do argv[${#argv[@]}]=$value; done \
    < <(jq -j '.[]|.,"\u0000"' "$argv_file")
  [ "${argv[0]}" = "$(jq -r .executable.physical_path "$command_spec")" ] || return 5
  path_file=$evidence/$label.path; read_roots=$evidence/$label.read-roots; : >"$path_file"; : >"$read_roots"
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r kind entry; do
    if [ "$kind" = host ]; then resolved=$entry
    else
      case $entry in ''|/*|..|../*|*/../*) return 5;; esac
      resolved=$checkout/$entry; cursor=$checkout; old_ifs=$IFS; IFS=/
      for component in $entry; do cursor=$cursor/$component; [ ! -L "$cursor" ] || { IFS=$old_ifs; return 5; }; done
      IFS=$old_ifs; [ ! -e "$resolved" ] && continue; [ -d "$resolved" ] || return 5
      resolved=$(cd "$resolved" && pwd -P); case $resolved in "$checkout"/*) :;; *) return 5;; esac
    fi
    [ -d "$resolved" ] && [ ! -L "$resolved" ] || return 5
    if [ -s "$path_file" ]; then printf ':' >>"$path_file"; fi; printf '%s' "$resolved" >>"$path_file"
    [ "$kind" != host ] || printf '%s\n' "$resolved" >>"$read_roots"
  done < <(jq -r '.path_entries[]|[.kind,.path]|@tsv' "$command_spec")
  compiled_path=$(cat "$path_file"); [ -n "$compiled_path" ] || return 5
  home=$isolation_root/home; scratch=$isolation_root/scratch
  [ -d "$home" ] && [ -d "$scratch" ] && [ ! -L "$home" ] && [ ! -L "$scratch" ] || return 5
  git_file=$checkout/.git; [ -f "$git_file" ] && [ ! -L "$git_file" ] || return 5
  git_dir=$(git -C "$checkout" rev-parse --git-dir); git_common=$(git -C "$checkout" rev-parse --git-common-dir)
  case $git_dir in /*) :;; *) git_dir=$checkout/$git_dir;; esac
  case $git_common in /*) :;; *) git_common=$checkout/$git_common;; esac
  git_dir=$(cd "$git_dir" && pwd -P); git_common=$(cd "$git_common" && pwd -P)
  printf '%s\n%s\n%s\n%s\n' "$checkout" "$home" "$scratch" "$git_dir" >>"$read_roots"
  [ "$git_common" = "$git_dir" ] || printf '%s\n' "$git_common" >>"$read_roots"
  LC_ALL=C sort -u "$read_roots" >"$read_roots.next"; mv -f "$read_roots.next" "$read_roots"
  sandbox_platform=$(uname -s); sandbox_override=''
  if [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] &&
     [ -n "${POLYLANE_TEST_SANDBOX_EXECUTABLE:-}" ]; then
    sandbox_override=$(cert_canonical_file "$POLYLANE_TEST_SANDBOX_EXECUTABLE") || return 5
    case $sandbox_override in "$RUNTIME_DIR"/test-fixtures/*) :;; *) return 5;; esac
    [ -x "$sandbox_override" ] || return 5
    # The override models sandbox-exec syntax and exists only to make the identity race
    # deterministic; production can never select it.
    sandbox_platform=Darwin
  fi
  case $sandbox_platform in
    Darwin)
      sandbox=${sandbox_override:-/usr/bin/sandbox-exec}
      sandbox_identity=$evidence/$label.sandbox-identity.json
      cert_executable_identity "$sandbox" >"$sandbox_identity" || return 13
      chmod 400 "$sandbox_identity"; cert_verify_executable_identity "$sandbox_identity" || return 13
      sandbox=$(jq -r .physical_path "$sandbox_identity")
      profile=$evidence/$label.sb
      printf '%s\n' '(version 1)' '(deny default)' '(allow process-fork)' \
        '(allow process-exec)' '(allow signal (target self))' \
        '(allow sysctl-read)' '(deny network*)' >"$profile"
      for system_root in /System/Library /Library/Apple/System/Library /usr/lib /usr/bin /bin \
        /private/var/db/dyld; do
        [ ! -e "$system_root" ] || printf '%s\n' "$system_root" >>"$read_roots"
      done
      LC_ALL=C sort -u "$read_roots" >"$read_roots.next"; mv -f "$read_roots.next" "$read_roots"
      while IFS= read -r read_root; do
        quoted=$(jq -nr --arg path "$read_root" '$path|@json')
        printf '(allow file-read* (subpath %s))\n' "$quoted" >>"$profile"
      done <"$read_roots"
      checkout_q=$(jq -nr --arg path "$checkout" '$path|@json')
      scratch_q=$(jq -nr --arg path "$scratch" '$path|@json')
      home_q=$(jq -nr --arg path "$home" '$path|@json')
      printf '(allow file-write* (subpath %s) (subpath %s) (subpath %s))\n' \
        "$checkout_q" "$scratch_q" "$home_q" >>"$profile"
      chmod 400 "$profile"
      sandbox_argv=("$sandbox" -f "$profile") ;;
    Linux)
      sandbox=$(command -v bwrap || true); [ -n "$sandbox" ] || return 13
      sandbox_identity=$evidence/$label.sandbox-identity.json
      cert_executable_identity "$sandbox" >"$sandbox_identity" || return 13
      chmod 400 "$sandbox_identity"; cert_verify_executable_identity "$sandbox_identity" || return 13
      sandbox=$(jq -r .physical_path "$sandbox_identity")
      sandbox_argv=("$sandbox" --die-with-parent --new-session --unshare-all --tmpfs /)
      mount_dirs=$evidence/$label.mount-dirs; : >"$mount_dirs"
      for mount_root in /usr /bin /lib /lib64 "$checkout" "$scratch" "$home"; do
        [ ! -e "$mount_root" ] || cert_mount_parents "$mount_root" "$mount_dirs"
      done
      while IFS= read -r read_root; do cert_mount_parents "$read_root" "$mount_dirs"; done <"$read_roots"
      LC_ALL=C sort -u "$mount_dirs" >"$mount_dirs.next"; mv -f "$mount_dirs.next" "$mount_dirs"
      while IFS= read -r mount_dir; do sandbox_argv+=(--dir "$mount_dir"); done <"$mount_dirs"
      for system_root in /usr /bin /lib /lib64; do
        [ ! -e "$system_root" ] || sandbox_argv+=(--ro-bind "$system_root" "$system_root")
      done
      while IFS= read -r read_root; do
        case $read_root in /usr|/usr/*|/bin|/bin/*|/lib|/lib/*|/lib64|/lib64/*|"$checkout"|"$home"|"$scratch") continue;; esac
        sandbox_argv+=(--ro-bind "$read_root" "$read_root")
      done <"$read_roots"
      sandbox_argv+=(--bind "$checkout" "$checkout" --bind "$scratch" "$scratch" --bind "$home" "$home" \
        --dev /dev --proc /proc --chdir "$checkout") ;;
    *) return 13 ;;
  esac
  if [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}:${POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT:-}" = \
       1:cert-sandbox-identity-before-exec ]; then
    replacement=$(cert_canonical_file "${POLYLANE_TEST_SANDBOX_REPLACEMENT:-}") || return 5
    case $replacement in "$RUNTIME_DIR"/test-fixtures/*) :;; *) return 5;; esac
    [ -x "$replacement" ] || return 5
    mv -f "$replacement" "$sandbox"
  fi
  # This second check is immediately adjacent to execution and makes a deterministic
  # identity swap fail before any untrusted bytes can run; the post-run check remains.
  cert_verify_executable_identity "$sandbox_identity" || return 5
  set +e
  (cd "$checkout" && "$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$RUNTIME_DIR" run-with-deadline "$deadline" -- \
    "${sandbox_argv[@]}" /usr/bin/env -i HOME="$home" PATH="$compiled_path" TMPDIR="$scratch" \
      LANG=C LC_ALL=C TZ=UTC CI=1 "${argv[@]}") >"$log" 2>&1
  rc=$?
  set -e
  "$SELF/polylane-command-policy.sh" verify-spec "$checkout" "$command_spec" || return 5
  cert_verify_executable_identity "$sandbox_identity" || return 5
  status=pass; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || status=fail
  jq -n --arg label "$label" --arg status "$status" --argjson rc "$rc" \
    --arg argv_hash "$(cert_sha_file "$argv_file")" --arg output_hash "$(cert_sha_file "$log")" \
    '{label:$label,status:$status,exit_code:$rc,argv_hash:$argv_hash,
      output_hash:$output_hash}' >"$evidence/$label.result.json"
}
cert_build_transaction() {
  state=$1 kind=$2 id=$3 scope=$4 goal_hash=$5 body=$6 output=$7
  body_hash=$(jq -Sc . "$body" | cert_sha_text)
  jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg kind "$kind" --arg scope "$scope" \
    --arg goal_hash "$goal_hash" --arg body_hash "$body_hash" \
    --argjson runtime_revision "$(jq -r .revision "$state")" \
    --argjson transaction_revision "$(jq -r '.convergence.transaction_revision//0' "$state")" \
    --argjson queue_revision "$(jq -r '.queue.revision//0' "$state")" --slurpfile body "$body" \
    '{schema_version:1,transaction_id:$id,kind:$kind,
      expected_runtime_revision:$runtime_revision,
      expected_transaction_revision:$transaction_revision,
      expected_queue_revision:$queue_revision,scope_snapshot_hash:$scope,
      goal_state_hash:$goal_hash,body_hash:$body_hash,body:$body[0]}' >"$output"
}
cert_init() {
  runtime=$1 loop=$2; cert_setup_runtime "$runtime"
  state=$(convergence_current_state)
  project=$(jq -r .project_root "$state"); goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json
  scope=$(cert_scope_hash "$project"); goal_hash=$(cert_goal_hash "$goal")
  if jq -e '.convergence!=null' "$state" >/dev/null; then
    [ "$(jq -r .loop_id "$state")" = "$loop" ] || return 5
    convergence_repair_projections "$project"; return
  fi
  body=$runtime/.init-body.$$.json; jq -n --arg loop "$loop" '{loop_id:$loop}' >"$body"
  tx=$runtime/.init-tx.$$.json
  cert_build_transaction "$state" convergence_init "convergence-init:$loop" \
    "$scope" "$goal_hash" "$body" "$tx"
  convergence_submit "$tx"; rm -f "$body" "$tx"
  convergence_repair_projections "$project"
}
cert_run_locked() {
  runtime=$1 goal=$2 project=$(cd "$3" && pwd -P) config=$4
  cert_setup_runtime "$runtime"
  goal=$(cert_canonical_file "$goal") || return 5
  config=$(cert_canonical_file "$config") || return 5
  [ "$(cert_mode "$config")" = 400 ] || return 5
  jq -e --argjson categories "$(jq -c .categories "$CATEGORIES")" '
    (keys|sort)==["attempt_id","checks","council_evidence","council_reference","cycle","deadline_seconds",
      "fresh_checkout","policy_hash","schema_version"] and
    .schema_version==1 and (.attempt_id|type=="string" and test("^[A-Za-z0-9._:-]{1,120}$")) and
    (.cycle|type=="number" and .>=1 and floor==.) and
    (.deadline_seconds|type=="number" and .>=1 and .<=86400 and floor==.) and
    (.policy_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.council_evidence|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
    ((.council_reference|keys|sort)==["hash","path"]) and
    (.council_reference.path|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
    (.council_reference.hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.checks|keys|sort)==$categories and
    all(.checks[];(keys|sort)==["argv","executable","interpreter","path_entries","tool"]) and
    ((.fresh_checkout|keys|sort)==["boot","build","install"]) and
    all(.fresh_checkout[];(keys|sort)==["argv","executable","interpreter","path_entries","tool"])' \
    "$config" >/dev/null || return 5
  jq -e --slurpfile goal "$goal" '
    .policy_hash==$goal[0].certification.policy_hash and
    .deadline_seconds==$goal[0].certification.deadline_seconds and
    .checks==$goal[0].certification.checks and
    .fresh_checkout==$goal[0].certification.fresh_checkout' "$config" >/dev/null || return 5
  reference=$(cert_canonical_file "$(jq -r .council_reference.path "$config")") || return 5
  [ "$(cert_sha_file "$reference")" = "$(jq -r .council_reference.hash "$config")" ] || return 5
  POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime "$SELF/polylane-council.sh" validate-routing "$reference" || return 5
  jq -e --arg responses "$(jq -r .council_evidence "$config")" '
    .verdict=="GO" and .responses.path==$responses' "$reference" >/dev/null || return 5
  lock=$runtime/certification-command.lock
  runtime_lock_acquire "$lock"
  trap 'runtime_lock_release "$lock" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true' RETURN
  "$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
  state=$(convergence_current_state)
  attempt=$(jq -r .attempt_id "$config")
  if jq -e --arg attempt "$attempt" \
    'any(.convergence.certifications[]?;.attempt_id==$attempt)' "$state" >/dev/null; then
    runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN
    convergence_repair_projections "$project"
    return
  fi
  cert_product_clean "$project" || {
    runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return 5; }
  scope_manifest=$runtime/.scope.$$.json
  cert_scope_manifest "$project" "$scope_manifest"
  scope=$(cert_sha_file "$scope_manifest"); goal_hash=$(cert_goal_hash "$goal")
  allow=$(cert_allowlist_hash); product=$(cert_product_fingerprint "$project" "$scope" "$allow")
  council_summary=$runtime/.council.$$.json
  cert_council_validate "$runtime" "$(jq -r .council_evidence "$config")" "$council_summary" || {
    rm -f "$scope_manifest" "$council_summary"
    runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return 5; }
  commit=$(git -C "$project" rev-parse HEAD)
  temp_base=$(cd "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}" && pwd -P) || return 5
  user_home=$(cd ~ && pwd -P) || return 5
  case $temp_base in "$user_home"|"$user_home"/*|"$project"|"$project"/*) return 5;; esac
  isolation_root=$(mktemp -d "$temp_base/polylane-cert-isolation.XXXXXX")
  chmod 700 "$isolation_root"
  checkout=$isolation_root/checkout; mkdir "$isolation_root/home" "$isolation_root/scratch"
  chmod 700 "$isolation_root/home" "$isolation_root/scratch"
  checkout_id=$(basename "$isolation_root")
  short=$(printf '%s\n%s\n%s\n' "$(jq -r .loop_id "$state")" "$attempt" "$product" |
    cert_sha_text | sed 's/^sha256://' | cut -c1-32)
  cert_id=cert-$short
  evidence_parent=$runtime/certification-evidence
  mkdir -p "$evidence_parent"
  building=$evidence_parent/.building-$cert_id-$checkout_id
  final=$evidence_parent/$cert_id-$checkout_id
  [ ! -e "$building" ] && [ ! -L "$building" ] && [ ! -e "$final" ] && [ ! -L "$final" ] || {
    rm -rf "$isolation_root"; runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return 5; }
  mkdir "$building"
  cleanup_checkout() {
    git -C "$project" worktree remove --force "$checkout" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    rm -rf "$isolation_root"
  }
  git -C "$project" worktree add --detach "$checkout" "$commit" >/dev/null || {
    cleanup_checkout; rm -rf "$building"; runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return 5; }
  cp "$scope_manifest" "$building/scope-manifest.json"
  cp "$council_summary" "$building/council-summary.json"
  deadline=$(jq -r .deadline_seconds "$config")
  results=$building/results.json; findings=$building/findings.json
  printf '%s\n' '{}' >"$results"; printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$findings"
  index=0
  while IFS= read -r category; do
    spec=$building/spec-$category.json
    jq --arg category "$category" '.checks[$category]' "$config" >"$spec"
    cert_run_argv "$checkout" "$isolation_root" "$spec" "category-$category" "$building" "$deadline" || {
      cleanup_checkout; rm -rf "$building"; runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return 5; }
    result=$building/category-$category.result.json
    jq --arg category "$category" --slurpfile result "$result" \
      '.[$category]=$result[0]' "$results" >"$results.next"; mv -f "$results.next" "$results"
    if [ "$(jq -r .status "$result")" != pass ]; then
      index=$((index + 1))
      jq --arg id "$cert_id:$index" --arg category "$category" \
        '. += [{finding_id:$id,category:$category,severity:"blocking",
          summary:("Certification failed: "+$category)}]' "$findings" >"$findings.next"
      mv -f "$findings.next" "$findings"
    fi
  done < <(jq -r '.categories[]' "$CATEGORIES")
  fresh=$building/fresh.json; printf '%s\n' '{}' >"$fresh"
  for phase in install build boot; do
    spec=$building/spec-fresh-$phase.json
    jq --arg phase "$phase" '.fresh_checkout[$phase]' "$config" >"$spec"
    cert_run_argv "$checkout" "$isolation_root" "$spec" "fresh-$phase" "$building" "$deadline" || {
      cleanup_checkout; rm -rf "$building"; runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return 5; }
    result=$building/fresh-$phase.result.json
    jq --arg phase "$phase" --slurpfile result "$result" \
      '.[$phase]=$result[0]' "$fresh" >"$fresh.next"; mv -f "$fresh.next" "$fresh"
    if [ "$(jq -r .status "$result")" != pass ]; then
      index=$((index + 1))
      jq --arg id "$cert_id:$index" --arg phase "$phase" \
        '. += [{finding_id:$id,category:("fresh_"+$phase),severity:"blocking",
          summary:("Fresh checkout failed: "+$phase)}]' "$findings" >"$findings.next"
      mv -f "$findings.next" "$findings"
    fi
  done
  cleanup_checkout
  stable_config_hash=$(jq -Sc '{policy_hash,deadline_seconds,checks,fresh_checkout}' "$config" | cert_sha_text)
  manifest=$building/manifest.json
  find "$building" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type f -exec chmod 400 {} +
  cert_write_manifest "$building" "$manifest"
  mv "$building" "$final"; chmod 500 "$final"
  manifest=$final/manifest.json; manifest_hash=$(cert_sha_file "$manifest")
  results=$final/results.json
  fresh=$final/fresh.json
  findings=$final/findings.json
  record_base=$runtime/.record-base.$$.json
  jq -n --arg id "$cert_id" --arg attempt "$attempt" --arg checkout "$checkout_id" \
    --arg loop "$(jq -r .loop_id "$state")" --argjson cycle "$(jq -r .cycle "$config")" \
    --arg commit "$commit" --arg scope "$scope" --arg goal_hash "$goal_hash" \
    --arg allow "$allow" --arg product "$product" \
    --arg config_hash "$stable_config_hash" --arg manifest "$manifest" \
    --arg reference "$(jq -r .council_reference.path "$config")" \
    --arg reference_hash "$(jq -r .council_reference.hash "$config")" \
    --arg manifest_hash "$manifest_hash" --slurpfile checks "$results" \
    --slurpfile fresh "$fresh" --slurpfile council "$council_summary" \
    --slurpfile findings "$findings" \
    '{schema_version:1,certification_id:$id,attempt_id:$attempt,checkout_id:$checkout,
      loop_id:$loop,cycle:$cycle,commit:$commit,scope_snapshot_hash:$scope,
      goal_state_hash:$goal_hash,
      control_allowlist_hash:$allow,product_clean:true,product_fingerprint:$product,
      check_config_hash:$config_hash,checks:$checks[0],fresh_checkout:$fresh[0],
      council:$council[0],council_reference:{path:$reference,hash:$reference_hash},evidence_manifest_path:$manifest,
      evidence_manifest_hash:$manifest_hash,findings:$findings[0]}' >"$record_base"
  jq -Sc . "$record_base" >"$record_base.next"; mv -f "$record_base.next" "$record_base"
  record=$runtime/.record.$$.json
  jq --arg hash "$(cert_sha_file "$record_base")" '.+{certification_hash:$hash}' \
    "$record_base" >"$record"
  cert_record_validate "$runtime" "$record" || {
    rm -f "$record_base" "$record" "$scope_manifest" "$council_summary"
    runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return 5; }
  goals=$runtime/.finding-goals.$$.json
  jq '[.[]|{id:("cert-finding:"+.finding_id),finding_id,weight:1000000,
    scope:"in_scope",status:"open",title:.summary,source:"certification"}]' \
    "$findings" >"$goals"
  body=$runtime/.cert-body.$$.json
  jq -n --slurpfile record "$record" --slurpfile goals "$goals" \
    '{record:$record[0],finding_goals:$goals[0]}' >"$body"
  tx=$runtime/.cert-tx.$$.json
  state=$(convergence_current_state)
  cert_build_transaction "$state" certification "certification:$attempt" \
    "$scope" "$goal_hash" "$body" "$tx"
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT:-}" != cert-mutate-before-transaction ] ||
    printf 'mutated after checks\n' >>"$project/product.txt"
  # Keep the certification lock while a subshell owns the convergence lock. Lock state
  # variables are process-local, so the two ordered locks cannot clobber one another.
  ( convergence_submit "$tx" )
  rc=$?
  rm -f "$record_base" "$record" "$scope_manifest" "$council_summary" "$goals" "$body" "$tx"
  runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN
  [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || return "$rc"
  convergence_repair_projections "$project"
}
cert_run() {
  runtime=$1
  cert_setup_runtime "$runtime"
  mutation_lock=$runtime/promotion.lock
  runtime_lock_acquire "$mutation_lock" || return $?
  rc=0
  cert_run_locked "$@" || rc=$?
  runtime_lock_release "$mutation_lock" || return 6
  return "$rc"
}
cert_complete_locked() {
  runtime=$1 goal=$2 project=$(cd "$3" && pwd -P); provided_state=${4:-}
  cert_setup_runtime "$runtime"
  cert_product_clean "$project" || return 5
  scope=$(cert_scope_hash "$project"); allow=$(cert_allowlist_hash)
  product=$(cert_product_fingerprint "$project" "$scope" "$allow")
  check_config=$(jq -Sc '.certification|{policy_hash,deadline_seconds,checks,fresh_checkout}' \
    "$goal" | cert_sha_text)
  goal_hash=$(jq -Sc . "$goal" | cert_sha_text)
  commit=$(git -C "$project" rev-parse HEAD)
  if [ -n "$provided_state" ]; then
    [ -f "$provided_state" ] && [ ! -L "$provided_state" ] || return 5
    state=$provided_state
  else state=$(convergence_current_state); fi
  jq -e --arg commit "$commit" --arg goal_hash "$goal_hash" --arg scope "$scope" --arg allow "$allow" --arg product "$product" \
    --arg check_config "$check_config" '
    .convergence.consecutive_clean>=2 and
    (.convergence.certifications[-2:]|length==2) and
    ([.convergence.certifications[-2:].attempt_id]|unique|length)==2 and
    ([.convergence.certifications[-2:].certification_id]|unique|length)==2 and
    ([.convergence.certifications[-2:].checkout_id]|unique|length)==2 and
    ([.convergence.certifications[-2:].council.council_id]|unique|length)==2 and
    ([.convergence.certifications[-2:].check_config_hash]|unique|length)==1 and
    all(.convergence.certifications[-2:];
      .commit==$commit and .scope_snapshot_hash==$scope and
      .goal_state_hash==$goal_hash and
      .control_allowlist_hash==$allow and .product_fingerprint==$product and
      .check_config_hash==$check_config and
      .product_clean==true and (.findings|length)==0 and
      .council.mode=="exhaustive")' "$state" >/dev/null || return 5
  while IFS= read -r record; do
    temporary=$runtime/.complete-record.$$.json
    printf '%s\n' "$record" | jq -Sc . >"$temporary"
    cert_record_validate "$runtime" "$temporary" || { rm -f "$temporary"; return 5; }
    rm -f "$temporary"
  done < <(jq -c '.convergence.certifications[-2:][]' "$state")
  # Completion validation is deliberately bracketed. A checkout or locked-goal mutation
  # during record/evidence validation invalidates the transaction before the reducer can
  # publish COMPLETE.
  cert_product_clean "$project" || return 5
  post_scope=$(cert_scope_hash "$project")
  post_allow=$(cert_allowlist_hash)
  post_product=$(cert_product_fingerprint "$project" "$post_scope" "$post_allow")
  post_check_config=$(jq -Sc '.certification|{policy_hash,deadline_seconds,checks,fresh_checkout}' \
    "$goal" | cert_sha_text)
  post_goal_hash=$(jq -Sc . "$goal" | cert_sha_text)
  post_commit=$(git -C "$project" rev-parse HEAD)
  [ "$post_scope" = "$scope" ] && [ "$post_allow" = "$allow" ] &&
    [ "$post_product" = "$product" ] && [ "$post_check_config" = "$check_config" ] &&
    [ "$post_goal_hash" = "$goal_hash" ] && [ "$post_commit" = "$commit" ] || return 5
  [ -n "$provided_state" ] || convergence_repair_projections "$project"
}
cert_complete() {
  runtime=$1
  cert_setup_runtime "$runtime"
  mutation_lock=$runtime/promotion.lock
  runtime_lock_acquire "$mutation_lock" || return $?
  rc=0
  cert_complete_locked "$@" || rc=$?
  runtime_lock_release "$mutation_lock" || return 6
  return "$rc"
}
cert_repair() {
  cert_setup_runtime "$1"
  project=$(cd "$2" && pwd -P)
  convergence_repair_projections "$project"
}
cert_run_offline() {
  item=$1 token=$2 runtime=${POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR:?}
  id=$(jq -er .id "$item")
  jq -e --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" '
    any(.queue.items[];.id==$id and .kind=="certification" and
      .status=="running" and .claim.token==$token)' \
    "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || return 6
  cert_run "$runtime" "$(jq -er .args.goal_state "$item")" \
    "$(jq -er .args.project_root "$item")" "$(jq -er .args.cert_config "$item")"
}
case ${1:-} in
  init) cert_init "$2" "$3";;
  run) cert_run "$2" "$3" "$4" "$5";;
  complete) cert_complete "$2" "$3" "$4";;
  validate-complete-state) cert_setup_runtime "$2"; cert_complete_locked "$2" "$4" "$5" "$3";;
  repair) cert_repair "$2" "$3";;
  validate-record) cert_setup_runtime "$2"; cert_record_validate "$2" "$3";;
  validate-evidence) cert_setup_runtime "$2"; cert_evidence_validate "$2" "$3" "$4";;
  scope-hash) cert_scope_hash "$(cd "$2" && pwd -P)";;
  goal-hash) cert_goal_hash "$2";;
  prepare-from-council) [ "$#" -eq 6 ] || exit 2; cert_prepare_from_council "$2" "$3" "$4" "$5" "$6";;
  run-offline) cert_run_offline "$2" "$3";;
  contract) [ "$2" = certification ] || exit 5; printf '1\n';;
  *) exit 2;;
esac
~~~

Run:

~~~bash
chmod +x core/scripts/polylane-certify.sh
bash -n core/scripts/polylane-certify.sh
rg -n 'bash -c|sh -c|eval ' core/scripts/polylane-certify.sh && exit 1 || true
~~~

Expected: syntax passes and the forbidden command-text scan is empty.

- [ ] **Action 6.4 (2–5 minutes): Create bounded transactional suggestions and delivery**

Create core/scripts/polylane-suggestions.sh with this complete body:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
umask 077
SELF=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)

suggest_sha_file() {
  if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then sha256sum "$1" | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'
  else shasum -a 256 "$1" | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'; fi
}
suggest_sha_text() {
  temporary=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/polylane-suggest-hash.XXXXXX")
  cat >"$temporary"; value=$(suggest_sha_file "$temporary"); rm -f "$temporary"; printf '%s\n' "$value"
}
suggest_canonical_file() {
  [ -f "$1" ] && [ ! -L "$1" ] || return 5
  parent=$(cd "$(dirname "$1")" && pwd -P) || return 5
  printf '%s/%s\n' "$parent" "$(basename "$1")"
}
suggest_setup_runtime() {
  runtime=$1
  case $runtime in /*) :;; *) return 2;; esac
  RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime; CONVERGENCE_BIN=$SELF
  export RUNTIME_DIR CONVERGENCE_BIN
  . "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
  . "$SELF/lib/polylane-convergence-command.sh"
}
suggest_adapter_file() {
  [ -n "${POLYLANE_AGENT_ADAPTER:-}" ] || return 5
  adapter=$(suggest_canonical_file "$POLYLANE_AGENT_ADAPTER") || return 5
  [ "$adapter" = "$POLYLANE_AGENT_ADAPTER" ] || return 5
  printf '%s\n' "$adapter"
}
suggest_validate_final() {
  file=$1 loop=$2
  jq -e --arg loop "$loop" '(keys|sort)==["loop_id","provenance","schema_version","suggestions"] and
    .schema_version==1 and .loop_id==$loop and
    ((.provenance|keys|sort)==["effort","model","platform_hash"]) and
    (.provenance.model|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.provenance.effort|IN("low","medium","high","xhigh")) and
    (.provenance.platform_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.suggestions|length==30) and
    ([.suggestions[].rank]|sort==[range(1;31)]) and
    ([.suggestions[].id]|unique|length==30) and
    ([.suggestions[].title]|unique|length==30) and
    all(.suggestions[];(keys|sort)==["execution","id","rank","scope","starts_new_run","title"] and
      .scope=="beyond_locked" and
      .execution=="informational" and .starts_new_run==true) and
    ([paths(scalars)|last]|all(.!="command" and .!="shell" and .!="script" and
      .!="queue_id" and .!="auto_selected_id" and .!="execute" and
      .!="current_goal" and .!="goal_mutation"))' "$file" >/dev/null || return 5
}
suggest_validate_cycle_file() {
  file=$1 loop=$2 cycle=$3 scope=$4
  jq -e --arg loop "$loop" --argjson cycle "$cycle" --arg scope "$scope" '
    (keys|sort)==["auto_selected_id","cycle","loop_id","provenance","schema_version",
      "scope_snapshot_hash","suggestions"] and
    .schema_version==1 and .loop_id==$loop and .cycle==$cycle and
    ((.provenance|keys|sort)==["effort","model","platform_hash"]) and
    (.provenance.model|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.provenance.effort|IN("low","medium","high","xhigh")) and
    (.provenance.platform_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    .scope_snapshot_hash==$scope and (.suggestions|type=="array" and length>=1 and length<=30) and
    ([.suggestions[].rank]|sort==[range(1;(.suggestions|length)+1)]) and
    ([.suggestions[].id]|unique|length)==(.suggestions|length) and
    all(.suggestions[];(keys|sort)==["goal_ref","id","rank","title"] and
      (.id|type=="string" and length>0) and
      (.title|type=="string" and length>0) and
      (.goal_ref|type=="string" and length>0)) and
    .auto_selected_id as $selected |
    ([.suggestions[]|select(.id==$selected and .rank==1)]|length)==1' "$file" >/dev/null || return 5
}
suggest_typed_recovery() {
  runtime=$1 reason=$2 actor=$3
  state=$runtime/current/state.json
  context=$runtime/.suggestion-recovery.$$.json
  jq -n --arg goal "$(jq -r '.next_goal_ref // "suggestions"' "$state")" \
    --arg strategy "suggestions:$reason:$(jq -r .revision "$state")" \
    '{goal_ref:$goal,strategy_hash:$strategy,ownership_globs:[],
      resource_locks:["runtime:suggestions"]}' >"$context"
  POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime "$SELF/polylane-recovery.sh" route "$reason" "$actor" "$context" || true
  rm -f "$context"
  "$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce || true
  "$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" wake || true
  return 75
}
suggest_adapter_job() {
  adapter=$1 prompt=$2 output=$3 kind=$4 model=$5 effort=$6
  adapter=$(suggest_canonical_file "$adapter") || return 5
  prompt=$(suggest_canonical_file "$prompt") || return 5
  . "$adapter"
  type polylane_adapter_agent_job >/dev/null 2>&1 || return 5
  type polylane_adapter_dispatch_contract >/dev/null 2>&1 || return 5
  polylane_adapter_dispatch_contract "$kind" >/dev/null || return 5
  polylane_adapter_agent_job "$prompt" "$output" "$model" "$effort"
}
suggest_generate() {
  kind=$1 runtime=$2 first=$3 second=$4 destination=$5
  suggest_setup_runtime "$runtime"
  first=$(suggest_canonical_file "$first") || return 5
  second=$(suggest_canonical_file "$second") || return 5
  staging=$runtime/suggestion-staging
  [ ! -L "$staging" ] || return 5; mkdir -p "$staging"; chmod 700 "$staging"
  destination_parent=$(cd "$(dirname "$destination")" && pwd -P) || return 5
  [ "$destination_parent" = "$staging" ] && [ ! -e "$destination" ] && [ ! -L "$destination" ] || return 5
  case $kind:$(basename "$destination") in
    cycle_suggestions:cycle-*.json|final_suggestions:final-*.json) :;; *) return 5;;
  esac
  state=$runtime/current/state.json
  loop=$(jq -r .loop_id "$state")
  project=$(jq -r .project_root "$state")
  scope=$("$SELF/polylane-certify.sh" scope-hash "$project")
  cycle=$(jq -r '.cycle // empty' "$first")
  [ -n "$cycle" ] || cycle=$(jq -r '.cycle // 0' "$state")
  prompt_dir=$runtime/suggestion-prompts; mkdir -p "$prompt_dir"
  prompt=$prompt_dir/.$kind.$$.txt
  {
    printf 'Polylane schema job: %s\n' "$kind"
    printf 'Loop: %s\nScope hash: %s\n' "$loop" "$scope"
    printf 'First input hash: %s\nSecond input hash: %s\n' \
      "$(suggest_sha_file "$first")" "$(suggest_sha_file "$second")"
    if [ "$kind" = cycle_suggestions ]; then
      printf 'Return only cycle JSON with schema_version, loop_id, cycle, scope_snapshot_hash, ranked suggestions, and exactly one auto_selected_id.\n'
    else
      printf 'Return only final JSON with exactly 30 ranked beyond_locked informational suggestions and starts_new_run true.\n'
    fi
    printf 'First canonical JSON:\n'; jq -Sc . "$first"
    printf 'Second canonical JSON:\n'; jq -Sc . "$second"
  } >"$prompt"
  chmod 600 "$prompt"
  adapter=$(suggest_adapter_file) || { rm -f "$prompt"; return 5; }
  raw=$destination_parent/.suggestions.$$.json
  deadline=${POLYLANE_SUGGESTION_DEADLINE_SECONDS:-300}
  case $deadline in ''|*[!0-9]*) rm -f "$prompt"; return 2;; esac
  platform=$(suggest_canonical_file "$runtime/controller-platform.json") || { rm -f "$prompt"; return 5; }
  [ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$platform" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$platform")" = 400 ] || {
    rm -f "$prompt"; return 5; }
  model=$(jq -er '.council.model|select(type=="string" and length>0)' "$platform")
  effort=$(jq -er '.council.effort|select(IN("low","medium","high","xhigh"))' "$platform")
  platform_hash=$(suggest_sha_file "$platform")
  set +e
  "$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" run-with-deadline "$deadline" -- \
    "$SELF/polylane-suggestions.sh" _adapter-job "$adapter" "$prompt" "$raw" \
    "$kind" "$model" "$effort"
  rc=$?
  set -e
  rm -f "$prompt"
  if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then
    rm -f "$raw"
    suggest_typed_recovery "$runtime" suggestion_generation_exit "suggestions:$kind"
  fi
  jq -e . "$raw" >/dev/null 2>&1 || {
    rm -f "$raw"; suggest_typed_recovery "$runtime" suggestion_generation_invalid "suggestions:$kind"; }
  canonical=$staging/.canonical.$$.json
  jq -Sc --arg model "$model" --arg effort "$effort" --arg platform_hash "$platform_hash" \
    '.+{provenance:{model:$model,effort:$effort,platform_hash:$platform_hash}}' "$raw" >"$canonical"
  rm -f "$raw"
  if [ "$kind" = cycle_suggestions ]; then
    suggest_validate_cycle_file "$canonical" "$loop" "$cycle" "$scope" || {
      rm -f "$canonical"; suggest_typed_recovery "$runtime" suggestion_generation_invalid "suggestions:$kind"; }
  else suggest_validate_final "$canonical" "$loop" || {
    rm -f "$canonical"; suggest_typed_recovery "$runtime" suggestion_generation_invalid "suggestions:$kind"; }; fi
  chmod 400 "$canonical"
  ln "$canonical" "$destination" 2>/dev/null || { rm -f "$canonical"; return 5; }
  rm -f "$canonical"
}
suggest_build_transaction() {
  runtime=$1 kind=$2 id=$3 scope=$4 goal_hash=$5 body=$6 output=$7
  state=$runtime/current/state.json
  body_hash=$(jq -Sc . "$body" | suggest_sha_text)
  jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg kind "$kind" --arg scope "$scope" \
    --arg goal_hash "$goal_hash" --arg body_hash "$body_hash" \
    --argjson runtime_revision "$(jq -r .revision "$state")" \
    --argjson transaction_revision "$(jq -r '.convergence.transaction_revision//0' "$state")" \
    --argjson queue_revision "$(jq -r '.queue.revision//0' "$state")" \
    --slurpfile body "$body" \
    '{schema_version:1,transaction_id:$id,kind:$kind,
      expected_runtime_revision:$runtime_revision,
      expected_transaction_revision:$transaction_revision,
      expected_queue_revision:$queue_revision,scope_snapshot_hash:$scope,
      goal_state_hash:$goal_hash,body_hash:$body_hash,body:$body[0]}' >"$output"
}
suggest_prepare_cycle() {
  runtime=$1 file=$2 goal=$3 output=$4
  suggest_setup_runtime "$runtime"
  file=$(suggest_canonical_file "$file") || return 5
  case $file in "$runtime"/suggestion-staging/*.json) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  [ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$file" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$file")" = 400 ] || return 5
  goal=$(suggest_canonical_file "$goal") || return 5
  state=$runtime/current/state.json; project=$(jq -r .project_root "$state")
  loop=$(jq -r .loop_id "$state"); cycle=$(jq -r .cycle "$file")
  [ "$cycle" = "$(jq -r .controller.cycle "$state")" ] || return 7
  scope=$("$SELF/polylane-certify.sh" scope-hash "$project")
  suggest_validate_cycle_file "$file" "$loop" "$cycle" "$scope"
  platform=$(suggest_canonical_file "$runtime/controller-platform.json") || return 5
  jq -e --arg hash "$(suggest_sha_file "$platform")" --slurpfile platform "$platform" '
    .provenance.platform_hash==$hash and .provenance.model==$platform[0].council.model and
    .provenance.effort==$platform[0].council.effort' "$file" >/dev/null || return 5
  selected=$(jq -r .auto_selected_id "$file")
  selected_goal=$(jq -r --arg id "$selected" '.suggestions[]|select(.id==$id)|.goal_ref' "$file")
  jq -e --arg goal "$selected_goal" '
    .next_goal_ref==$goal and any(.goal_tree.items[]?;.id==$goal and (.status//"open")=="open")' \
    "$goal" >/dev/null || return 7
  now=$(runtime_now)
  queue_id="suggestion-$loop-$cycle-$(printf '%s' "$(suggest_sha_file "$file")" | cut -c8-23)"
  enqueue=$(jq -r --arg goal "$selected_goal" '
    any(.queue.items[]?;.goal_ref==$goal and (.status|IN("ready","scheduled","claimed","running")))|not' "$state")
  body=$runtime/.cycle-body.$$.json
  jq -n --slurpfile artifact "$file" --arg hash "$(suggest_sha_file "$file")" \
    --arg id "$queue_id" --arg goal "$selected_goal" --argjson now "$now" --argjson enqueue "$enqueue" \
    '{artifact:$artifact[0],artifact_hash:$hash,
      selected_queue_item:(if $enqueue then {schema_version:1,id:$id,kind:"state_reconcile",mode:"offline",
        status:"ready",priority:100,goal_ref:$goal,args:{goal_ref:$goal},
        depends_on:[],next_action_at:$now,deadline_at:($now+300),attempt:1,
        strategy_hash:("suggestion:"+$hash),ownership_globs:[],
        resource_locks:["runtime:reducer"],claim:null,last_error:null} else null end)}' >"$body"
  goal_hash=$("$SELF/polylane-certify.sh" goal-hash "$goal")
  id="cycle-suggestions:$loop:$cycle:$(printf '%s' "$(suggest_sha_file "$file")" | cut -c8-23)"
  suggest_build_transaction "$runtime" cycle_suggestions "$id" "$scope" "$goal_hash" "$body" "$output"
  rm -f "$body"
}
suggest_validate_cycle_transaction() {
  runtime=$1 file=$2 goal=$3 transaction=$4
  suggest_setup_runtime "$runtime"
  state=$runtime/current/state.json; project=$(jq -r .project_root "$state")
  scope=$("$SELF/polylane-certify.sh" scope-hash "$project")
  goal_hash=$("$SELF/polylane-certify.sh" goal-hash "$goal")
  file_hash=$(suggest_sha_file "$file")
  body=$runtime/.validate-cycle-body.$$.json
  jq -Sc .body "$transaction" >"$body"
  jq -e --arg scope "$scope" --arg goal_hash "$goal_hash" --arg file_hash "$file_hash" \
    --slurpfile file "$file" '
    .kind=="cycle_suggestions" and .scope_snapshot_hash==$scope and
    .goal_state_hash==$goal_hash and .body.artifact_hash==$file_hash and
    .body.artifact==$file[0] and
    (.body.artifact as $a |
      .body.selected_queue_item==null or .body.selected_queue_item.goal_ref==
        ([$a.suggestions[]|select(.id==$a.auto_selected_id)][0].goal_ref))' \
    "$transaction" >/dev/null || { rm -f "$body"; return 5; }
  [ "$(suggest_sha_file "$body")" = "$(jq -r .body_hash "$transaction")" ] || {
    rm -f "$body"; return 5; }
  rm -f "$body"
  selected_goal=$(jq -r '.body.artifact as $a |
    [$a.suggestions[]|select(.id==$a.auto_selected_id)][0].goal_ref' "$transaction")
  cycle=$(jq -r .body.artifact.cycle "$transaction")
  [ "$cycle" = "$(jq -r .controller.cycle "$state")" ] &&
    jq -e --arg goal "$selected_goal" '
      .next_goal_ref==$goal and
      any(.goal_tree.items[]?;.id==$goal and (.status//"open")=="open")' \
      "$goal" >/dev/null || return 7
  queue_id=$(jq -r '.body.selected_queue_item.id//""' "$transaction")
  active=$(jq -r --arg goal "$selected_goal" '
    any(.queue.items[]?;.goal_ref==$goal and
      (.status|IN("ready","scheduled","claimed","running")))' "$state")
  if [ -n "$queue_id" ]; then
    [ "$active" = false ] &&
      ! jq -e --arg id "$queue_id" 'any(.queue.items[]?;.id==$id)' "$state" >/dev/null || return 7
  else [ "$active" = true ] || return 7
  fi
  [ "$(jq -r .expected_runtime_revision "$transaction")" = \
      "$(jq -r .revision "$state")" ] &&
    [ "$(jq -r .expected_transaction_revision "$transaction")" = \
      "$(jq -r '.convergence.transaction_revision//0' "$state")" ] &&
    [ "$(jq -r .expected_queue_revision "$transaction")" = \
      "$(jq -r '.queue.revision//0' "$state")" ] || return 7
}
suggest_commit_cycle() {
  runtime=$1 transaction=$2
  suggest_setup_runtime "$runtime"
  project=$(jq -r .project_root "$runtime/current/state.json")
  goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json
  artifact=$runtime/.commit-cycle-artifact.$$.json
  jq -Sc .body.artifact "$transaction" >"$artifact"
  suggest_validate_cycle_transaction "$runtime" "$artifact" "$goal" "$transaction" || {
    rc=$?; rm -f "$artifact"; return "$rc"; }
  rm -f "$artifact"
  lock=$runtime/promotion.lock; runtime_lock_acquire "$lock" || return $?
  rc=0; convergence_submit "$transaction" || rc=$?
  runtime_lock_release "$lock" || return 6
  [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || return "$rc"
  convergence_repair_projections "$project"
}
suggest_commit_final() {
  runtime=$1 final=$2 delivery=$3
  suggest_setup_runtime "$runtime"
  final=$(suggest_canonical_file "$final") || return 5
  case $final in "$runtime"/suggestion-staging/*.json) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  [ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$final" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$final")" = 400 ] || return 5
  delivery=$(suggest_canonical_file "$delivery") || return 5
  case $delivery in "$runtime"/suggestion-staging/*.json) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  [ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$delivery" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$delivery")" = 400 ] || return 5
  state=$runtime/current/state.json; project=$(jq -r .project_root "$state")
  goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json
  loop=$(jq -r .loop_id "$state")
  suggest_validate_final "$final" "$loop"
  platform=$(suggest_canonical_file "$runtime/controller-platform.json") || return 5
  jq -e --arg hash "$(suggest_sha_file "$platform")" --slurpfile platform "$platform" '
    .provenance.platform_hash==$hash and .provenance.model==$platform[0].council.model and
    .provenance.effort==$platform[0].council.effort' "$final" >/dev/null || return 5
  hash=$(suggest_sha_file "$final")
  jq -e --arg loop "$loop" --arg hash "$hash" '
    .schema_version==1 and .loop_id==$loop and .content_hash==$hash and
    .status=="pending_receipt" and (.delivery_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.producing_turn_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.producing_at|type=="number") and .attempt_count==0 and .attempts==[] and
    .delivered_at==null' "$delivery" >/dev/null || return 5
  body=$runtime/.final-body.$$.json
  jq -n --slurpfile final "$final" --arg hash "$hash" --slurpfile delivery "$delivery" \
    '{suggestions:$final[0],suggestion_hash:$hash,delivery:$delivery[0]}' >"$body"
  scope=$("$SELF/polylane-certify.sh" scope-hash "$project")
  goal_hash=$("$SELF/polylane-certify.sh" goal-hash "$goal")
  tx=$runtime/.final-tx.$$.json
  id="finalization:$loop:$(printf '%s' "$hash" | cut -c8-23)"
  suggest_build_transaction "$runtime" finalization "$id" "$scope" "$goal_hash" "$body" "$tx"
  convergence_submit "$tx"
  rm -f "$body" "$tx"
  convergence_repair_projections "$project"
}
suggest_render_final() {
  file=$1 delivery=$2
  suggest_validate_final "$file" "$(jq -r .loop_id "$delivery")"
  [ "$(suggest_sha_file "$file")" = "$(jq -r .content_hash "$delivery")" ] || return 5
  printf 'Delivery-ID: %s Content-Hash: %s\n' \
    "$(jq -r .delivery_id "$delivery")" "$(jq -r .content_hash "$delivery")"
  jq -r '.suggestions|sort_by(.rank)[]|"- \(.rank). \(.title)"' "$file"
}
suggest_record_attempt() {
  runtime=$1 id=$2 hash=$3 attempt=$4; suggest_setup_runtime "$runtime"
  state=$runtime/current/state.json; project=$(jq -r .project_root "$state")
  if jq -e --arg id "$id" --arg hash "$hash" --arg attempt "$attempt" '
    .convergence.finalization.delivery as $d |
    $d.delivery_id==$id and $d.content_hash==$hash and
    any($d.attempts[]?;.attempt_id==$attempt)' "$state" >/dev/null; then return; fi
  jq -e --arg id "$id" --arg hash "$hash" '
    .convergence.finalization.delivery as $d |
    $d.status=="pending_receipt" and $d.delivery_id==$id and $d.content_hash==$hash' \
    "$state" >/dev/null || return 5
  now=$(runtime_now); body=$runtime/.delivery-attempt-body.$$.json
  jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg hash "$hash" --arg attempt "$attempt" --argjson now "$now" \
    '{delivery_id:$id,content_hash:$hash,attempt_id:$attempt,rendered_at:$now}' >"$body"
  goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json
  tx=$runtime/.delivery-attempt-tx.$$.json
  suggest_build_transaction "$runtime" delivery_attempt "delivery-attempt:$attempt" \
    "$("$SELF/polylane-certify.sh" scope-hash "$project")" \
    "$("$SELF/polylane-certify.sh" goal-hash "$goal")" "$body" "$tx"
  convergence_submit "$tx"; rm -f "$body" "$tx"; convergence_repair_projections "$project"
}
suggest_ack_final() {
  runtime=$1 receipt=$2; suggest_setup_runtime "$runtime"
  receipt=$(suggest_canonical_file "$receipt") || return 5
  state=$runtime/current/state.json; project=$(jq -r .project_root "$state")
  if jq -e --slurpfile new "$receipt" '
    .convergence.finalization.delivery as $d |
    $d.status=="acknowledged" and $d.receipt==$new[0]' "$state" >/dev/null; then return; fi
  body=$runtime/.delivery-ack-body.$$.json; jq -Scn --slurpfile receipt "$receipt" \
    '{receipt:$receipt[0]}' >"$body"
  receipt_id=$(jq -er '.receipt_id|select(type=="string" and length>0)' "$receipt")
  goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json; tx=$runtime/.delivery-ack-tx.$$.json
  suggest_build_transaction "$runtime" delivery_ack "delivery-ack:$receipt_id" \
    "$("$SELF/polylane-certify.sh" scope-hash "$project")" \
    "$("$SELF/polylane-certify.sh" goal-hash "$goal")" "$body" "$tx"
  convergence_submit "$tx"; rm -f "$body" "$tx"; convergence_repair_projections "$project"
}
suggest_start_new_run() {
  runtime=$1 final=$2 rank=$3; suggest_setup_runtime "$runtime"
  case $rank in ''|*[!0-9]*) return 2;; esac
  loop=$(jq -r .loop_id "$final")
  suggest_validate_final "$final" "$loop"
  jq -e --argjson rank "$rank" '.suggestions[]|
    select(.rank==$rank and .starts_new_run==true)' "$final" >/dev/null || return 5
  hash=$(suggest_sha_file "$final")
  state=$runtime/current/state.json; project=$(jq -r .project_root "$state")
  if jq -e --arg hash "$hash" --argjson rank "$rank" '
    .convergence.new_run.started_from.final_hash==$hash and
    .convergence.new_run.started_from.rank==$rank' "$state" >/dev/null; then
    jq -Sc .convergence.new_run "$state"; return
  fi
  jq -e --arg hash "$hash" '.convergence.finalization.suggestion_hash==$hash' "$state" >/dev/null || return 5
  now=$(runtime_now); new_loop="pl-${hash#sha256:}-$rank"; new_loop=$(printf '%s' "$new_loop" | cut -c1-75)
  body=$runtime/.new-run-body.$$.json
  jq -n --arg loop "$new_loop" --arg hash "$hash" --argjson rank "$rank" --argjson now "$now" \
    '{new_loop_id:$loop,final_hash:$hash,rank:$rank,started_at:$now}' >"$body"
  goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json; tx=$runtime/.new-run-tx.$$.json
  suggest_build_transaction "$runtime" new_run "new-run:${hash#sha256:}:$rank" \
    "$("$SELF/polylane-certify.sh" scope-hash "$project")" \
    "$("$SELF/polylane-certify.sh" goal-hash "$goal")" "$body" "$tx"
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT:-}" != start-new-before-publish ] || { rm -f "$body" "$tx"; return 99; }
  convergence_submit "$tx"; rm -f "$body" "$tx"
  jq -Sc .convergence.new_run "$runtime/current/state.json"
}
suggest_run_offline() {
  item=$1 token=$2 runtime=${POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR:?}
  id=$(jq -er .id "$item"); kind=$(jq -er .kind "$item")
  jq -e --arg id "$id" --arg kind "$kind" --arg token "$token" '
    any(.queue.items[];.id==$id and .kind==$kind and
      .status=="running" and .claim.token==$token)' \
    "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || return 6
  case $kind in
    cycle_suggestions)
      jq -e '.args|keys==["cycle_summary","goal_state","output","run_id"] and
        all(.[];type=="string" and length>0)' "$item" >/dev/null || return 5
      run=$(jq -er .args.run_id "$item")
      [ "$run" = "$(jq -r '.controller.run_id // ""' "$runtime/current/state.json")" ] ||
        return 7
      summary=$(jq -er .args.cycle_summary "$item")
      goal=$(jq -er .args.goal_state "$item")
      output=$(jq -er .args.output "$item")
      [ "$output" = "$runtime/suggestion-staging/cycle-$run.json" ] || return 5
      suggest_generate cycle_suggestions "$runtime" "$summary" "$goal" "$output"
      transaction=$runtime/.cycle-suggestions-offline.$$.json
      suggest_prepare_cycle "$runtime" "$output" "$goal" "$transaction"
      suggest_validate_cycle_transaction "$runtime" "$output" "$goal" "$transaction"
      suggest_commit_cycle "$runtime" "$transaction"
      rm -f "$transaction"
      ;;
    final_suggestions)
      jq -e '.args|keys==["locked_scope","output","perfection_state"] and
        all(.[];type=="string" and length>0)' "$item" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq -e '.convergence.consecutive_clean>=2 and
        (.convergence.certifications[-2:]|length)==2 and
        ([.convergence.certifications[-2:].attempt_id]|unique|length)==2 and
        ([.convergence.certifications[-2:].certification_id]|unique|length)==2 and
        ([.convergence.certifications[-2:].checkout_id]|unique|length)==2 and
        all(.convergence.certifications[-2:];(.findings|length)==0) and
        .terminal==null' "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || return 7
      output=$(jq -er .args.output "$item")
      [ "$output" = "$runtime/suggestion-staging/final-$(jq -r .loop_id "$runtime/current/state.json").json" ] || return 5
      suggest_generate final_suggestions "$runtime" "$(jq -er .args.locked_scope "$item")" \
        "$(jq -er .args.perfection_state "$item")" "$output"
      ;;
    *) return 5;;
  esac
}
case ${1:-} in
  _adapter-job) shift; suggest_adapter_job "$@";;
  generate-cycle) suggest_generate cycle_suggestions "$2" "$3" "$4" "$5";;
  generate-final) suggest_generate final_suggestions "$2" "$3" "$4" "$5";;
  prepare-cycle) suggest_prepare_cycle "$2" "$3" "$4" "$5";;
  validate-cycle) suggest_validate_cycle_transaction "$2" "$3" "$4" "$5";;
  commit-cycle) suggest_commit_cycle "$2" "$3";;
  validate-final) suggest_validate_final "$2" "$3";;
  commit-final) suggest_commit_final "$2" "$3" "$4";;
  render-final) suggest_render_final "$2" "$3";;
  record-final-attempt) suggest_record_attempt "$2" "$3" "$4" "$5";;
  ack-final) suggest_ack_final "$2" "$3";;
  start-new-run) suggest_start_new_run "$2" "$3" "$4";;
  run-offline) suggest_run_offline "$2" "$3";;
  contract) case $2 in cycle_suggestions|final_suggestions) printf '1\n';; *) exit 5;; esac;;
  *) exit 2;;
esac
~~~

Run:

bash -n core/scripts/polylane-suggestions.sh
rg -n 'eval |bash -c|sh -c|generate-final.*validate-final' core/scripts/polylane-suggestions.sh \
  && exit 1 || true
