Create core/tests/helpers/convergence-contract.sh with this complete body:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
scenario=${1:?scenario required}
REPO=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/../../.." && pwd -P)
BIN=$REPO/core/scripts
AUTONOMY_TMP=$(mktemp -d "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/polylane-convergence-test.XXXXXX")
export AUTONOMY_TMP POLYLANE_TEST_MODE=1 POLYLANE_NOW_EPOCH=1000
guardian_pid=''; secret_path=/tmp/polylane-cert-secret-$$; escape_path=/tmp/polylane-cert-escape-$$
cleanup_convergence_fixture() {
  [ -z "$guardian_pid" ] || kill -TERM "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
  [ -z "$guardian_pid" ] || wait "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
  rm -f "$secret_path" "$escape_path"
  git -C "$AUTONOMY_TMP/project" worktree prune >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  rm -rf "$AUTONOMY_TMP"
}
trap cleanup_convergence_fixture EXIT
. "$REPO/core/tests/helpers/autonomy-contract.sh"
project=$AUTONOMY_TMP/project; runtime=$project/.polylane/runtime
goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json
mkdir -p "$project/docs/polylane" "$runtime/council-evidence"
git -C "$project" init -q
git -C "$project" config user.email test@example.invalid
git -C "$project" config user.name test
printf 'product\n' >"$project/product.txt"
printf 'north\n' >"$project/docs/polylane/NORTHSTAR.md"
printf 'strategy\n' >"$project/docs/polylane/STRATEGY.md"
printf 'ultimate\n' >"$project/docs/polylane/ULTIMATE_GOAL.md"
printf 'sentinel-secret-%s\n' "$$" >"$secret_path"; chmod 600 "$secret_path"
sleep 300 & guardian_pid=$!
cat >"$project/sandbox_probe.py" <<PY
import os, signal, socket, sys
failures = []
try:
    data = open("$secret_path", encoding="utf-8").read()
    print(data)
    failures.append("secret-read")
except OSError:
    pass
try:
    open("$escape_path", "w", encoding="utf-8").write("escaped")
    failures.append("outside-write")
except OSError:
    pass
try:
    socket.create_connection(("127.0.0.1", 9), timeout=0.2)
    failures.append("network")
except OSError:
    pass
try:
    os.kill(int(sys.argv[1]), signal.SIGTERM)
    failures.append("external-signal")
except OSError:
    pass
raise SystemExit(1 if failures else 0)
PY
jq -n '{loop_id:"pl1",complete:false,next_goal_ref:"m1",criteria:["all checks"],
  anti_goals:["outside"],goal_tree:{items:[{id:"m1",weight:10,status:"open"}]}}' >"$goal"
git -C "$project" add . && git -C "$project" commit -qm base
"$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" init --loop-id pl1 --agent codex --project "$project"
"$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" init "$runtime" pl1
jq -n '{schema_version:1,agent:"codex",
  builder:{model:"test-model",effort:"high"},integrator:{model:"test-model",effort:"high"},
  council:{model:"test-model",effort:"high"}}' >"$runtime/controller-platform.json"
chmod 400 "$runtime/controller-platform.json"

python_bin=$(command -v python3); python_bin=$(cd "$(dirname "$python_bin")" && pwd -P)/$(basename "$python_bin")
proposal=$AUTONOMY_TMP/certification-proposal.json
jq -n --arg python "$python_bin" --arg guardian "$guardian_pid" \
  '{builders:[{id:"builder",verification_argv:["/usr/bin/test","-f","product.txt"]}],
  integrator:{id:"integrator",verification_argv:["/usr/bin/test","-f","product.txt"]},
  certification:{deadline_seconds:10,
    checks:{accessibility:{argv:["/usr/bin/test","-f","product.txt"]},
      broken_flows:{argv:["/usr/bin/test","-f","product.txt"]},
      documentation:{argv:["/usr/bin/test","-f","product.txt"]},
      functional:{argv:["/usr/bin/test","-f","product.txt"]},
      performance:{argv:["/usr/bin/test","-f","product.txt"]},
      regression:{argv:["/usr/bin/test","-f","product.txt"]},
      security:{argv:[$python,"sandbox_probe.py",$guardian]},
      stubs:{argv:["/usr/bin/test","-f","product.txt"]}},
    fresh_checkout:{install:{argv:["/usr/bin/test","-f","product.txt"]},
      build:{argv:["/usr/bin/test","-f","product.txt"]},
      boot:{argv:["/usr/bin/test","-f","product.txt"]}}}}' >"$proposal"
compiled=$AUTONOMY_TMP/compiled-policy.json
"$BIN/polylane-command-policy.sh" compile-controller "$project" "$proposal" "$compiled"
[ -s "$compiled" ] || fail command-policy-compiled-destination-missing
policy_base=$AUTONOMY_TMP/policy-base.json; policy=$AUTONOMY_TMP/policy.json
jq -Sc '.certification+{schema_version:1,revision:1}' "$compiled" >"$policy_base"
if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  policy_hash=$(sha256sum "$policy_base" | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}')
else policy_hash=$(shasum -a 256 "$policy_base" | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'); fi
jq --arg hash "$policy_hash" '.+{policy_hash:$hash}' "$policy_base" >"$policy"
jq --slurpfile policy "$policy" '.certification=$policy[0]' "$goal" >"$goal.next"
mv -f "$goal.next" "$goal"

adapter=$AUTONOMY_TMP/fake-adapter.sh
cat >"$adapter" <<'ADAPTER'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
polylane_adapter_dispatch_contract() {
  case $1 in council|cycle_suggestions|final_suggestions) printf '1\n';; *) return 5;; esac
}
polylane_adapter_agent_job() {
  prompt=$1 output=$2
  kind=$(sed -n 's/^Polylane schema job: //p' "$prompt" | head -1)
  [ -n "$kind" ] || kind=council
  case ${POLYLANE_FAKE_ADAPTER_MODE:-valid}:$kind in
    timeout:*) sleep 30 ;;
    malformed:*) printf '{"broken":' >"$output" ;;
    valid:council)
      jq -n --arg lens "$POLYLANE_COUNCIL_LENS" \
        '{lens:$lens,complete:true,next_focus:"__CERTIFY__",why:"evidence supports it"}' >"$output" ;;
    valid:cycle_suggestions)
      scope=$(sed -n 's/^Scope hash: //p' "$prompt" | head -1)
      jq -n --arg scope "$scope" '{schema_version:1,loop_id:"pl1",cycle:1,
        scope_snapshot_hash:$scope,
        suggestions:[{rank:1,id:"next-1",title:"Continue verified work",goal_ref:"m1"}],
        auto_selected_id:"next-1"}' >"$output" ;;
    valid:final_suggestions)
      jq -n '{schema_version:1,loop_id:"pl1",
        suggestions:[range(1;31)|{rank:.,id:("idea-"+(tostring)),
          title:("Idea "+(tostring)),scope:"beyond_locked",
          execution:"informational",starts_new_run:true}]}' >"$output" ;;
    *) return 64 ;;
  esac
}
ADAPTER
chmod 700 "$adapter"
export POLYLANE_AGENT_ADAPTER=$adapter POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime

run_council() {
  id=$1 output=$runtime/council-evidence/$id
  packet=$AUTONOMY_TMP/packet-$id.json
  jq -n --arg id "$id" '{loop_id:"pl1",cycle:7,goal_ref:"m1",
    strategy_hash:("strategy-"+$id),ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:[],
    open_goals:[{id:"m1",weight:10}],
    decision:{question:"Is the frozen product exhaustive?",evidence:["all checks"]}}' >"$packet"
  "$BIN/polylane-council.sh" run exhaustive "$packet" "$output" 10
  printf '%s\n' "$output/responses.json"
}
make_config() {
  attempt=$1 council=$2 output=$3
  reference=$(dirname "$council")/routing-reference.json
  if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    reference_hash=$(sha256sum "$reference" | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}')
  else reference_hash=$(shasum -a 256 "$reference" | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'); fi
  jq -Scn --arg attempt "$attempt" --arg council "$council" \
    --arg reference "$reference" --arg reference_hash "$reference_hash" --slurpfile policy "$policy" \
    '{schema_version:1,attempt_id:$attempt,cycle:7,deadline_seconds:10,
      council_evidence:$council,council_reference:{path:$reference,hash:$reference_hash},
      policy_hash:$policy[0].policy_hash,
      checks:$policy[0].checks,fresh_checkout:$policy[0].fresh_checkout}' >"$output"
  chmod 400 "$output"
}
certify() {
  attempt=$1
  council=$(run_council "$attempt")
  config=$AUTONOMY_TMP/config-$attempt.json
  make_config "$attempt" "$council" "$config"
  "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" run "$runtime" "$goal" "$project" "$config"
}
projection=$project/docs/polylane/perfection.json

case $scenario in
  certification)
    race_dir=$AUTONOMY_TMP/identity-race; mkdir "$race_dir"
    ln -s "$python_bin" "$race_dir/python3"
    jq --arg launch "$race_dir/python3" '.certification.checks.security.argv[0]=$launch' \
      "$proposal" >"$AUTONOMY_TMP/executable-race-proposal.json"
    "$BIN/polylane-command-policy.sh" compile-controller "$project" \
      "$AUTONOMY_TMP/executable-race-proposal.json" "$AUTONOMY_TMP/executable-race-compiled.json"
    jq -Sc '.certification.checks.security' "$AUTONOMY_TMP/executable-race-compiled.json" \
      >"$AUTONOMY_TMP/executable-race-spec.json"
    rm "$race_dir/python3"; ln -s /usr/bin/test "$race_dir/python3"
    assert_rc executable-symlink-race 5 "$BIN/polylane-command-policy.sh" verify-spec \
      "$project" "$AUTONOMY_TMP/executable-race-spec.json"
    rm "$race_dir/python3"; ln -s "$python_bin" "$race_dir/python3"
    printf '%s\n' '#!/usr/bin/env python3' 'raise SystemExit(0)' >"$race_dir/pytest"; chmod 700 "$race_dir/pytest"
    jq --arg launch "$race_dir/pytest" '.builders[0].verification_argv=[$launch]' \
      "$proposal" >"$AUTONOMY_TMP/interpreter-race-proposal.json"
    "$BIN/polylane-command-policy.sh" compile-controller "$project" \
      "$AUTONOMY_TMP/interpreter-race-proposal.json" "$AUTONOMY_TMP/interpreter-race-compiled.json"
    jq -Sc '.builders[0].verification_command' "$AUTONOMY_TMP/interpreter-race-compiled.json" \
      >"$AUTONOMY_TMP/interpreter-race-spec.json"
    rm "$race_dir/python3"; ln -s /usr/bin/test "$race_dir/python3"
    assert_rc interpreter-symlink-race 5 "$BIN/polylane-command-policy.sh" verify-spec \
      "$project" "$AUTONOMY_TMP/interpreter-race-spec.json"
    sandbox_fixture=$runtime/test-fixtures/sandbox-race
    mkdir -p "$sandbox_fixture"
    sandbox_original=$sandbox_fixture/sandbox-exec
    sandbox_replacement=$sandbox_fixture/replacement
    printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\n: >"$AUTONOMY_TMP/sandbox-original-executed"\nexit 0\n' \
      >"$sandbox_original"
    printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\n: >"$AUTONOMY_TMP/sandbox-replacement-executed"\nexit 0\n' \
      >"$sandbox_replacement"
    chmod 700 "$sandbox_original" "$sandbox_replacement"
    race_council=$(run_council sandbox-identity-race)
    race_config=$AUTONOMY_TMP/sandbox-identity-race.json
    make_config sandbox-identity-race "$race_council" "$race_config"
    capture_rc "$AUTONOMY_TMP/sandbox-race.out" "$AUTONOMY_TMP/sandbox-race.err" env \
      POLYLANE_TEST_SANDBOX_EXECUTABLE="$sandbox_original" \
      POLYLANE_TEST_SANDBOX_REPLACEMENT="$sandbox_replacement" \
      POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT=cert-sandbox-identity-before-exec \
      "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" run "$runtime" "$goal" "$project" "$race_config"
    assert_eq sandbox-identity-race-rc 5 "$CAPTURED_RC"
    [ ! -e "$AUTONOMY_TMP/sandbox-original-executed" ] || autonomy_fail sandbox-original-ran
    [ ! -e "$AUTONOMY_TMP/sandbox-replacement-executed" ] || autonomy_fail sandbox-replacement-ran
    fake=$runtime/council-evidence/fake; mkdir -p "$fake"
    jq -n '{schema_version:2,mode:"exhaustive",members:[]}' >"$fake/responses.json"
    valid_for_reference=$(run_council self-attested-reference)
    make_config self-attested "$valid_for_reference" "$AUTONOMY_TMP/self.base.json"
    jq --arg fake "$fake/responses.json" '.council_evidence=$fake' \
      "$AUTONOMY_TMP/self.base.json" >"$AUTONOMY_TMP/self.json"
    chmod 400 "$AUTONOMY_TMP/self.json"
    assert_rc self-attested-council 5 "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" run \
      "$runtime" "$goal" "$project" "$AUTONOMY_TMP/self.json"
    certify a
    kill -0 "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || autonomy_fail sandbox-signalled-guardian
    [ ! -e "$escape_path" ] || autonomy_fail sandbox-outside-write
    secret_bytes=$(cat "$secret_path")
    if rg -F "$secret_bytes" "$runtime/certification-evidence" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      autonomy_fail sandbox-secret-leaked
    fi
    case $(uname -s) in
      Darwin)
        profile=$(find "$runtime/certification-evidence" -name 'category-security.sb' -type f | head -1)
        [ -n "$profile" ] || autonomy_fail sandbox-profile-missing
        assert_contains sandbox-network-deny '(deny network*)' "$(cat "$profile")"
        if grep -Fx '(allow file-read*)' "$profile" >/dev/null; then autonomy_fail sandbox-read-all; fi
        if grep -F '(allow process*)' "$profile" >/dev/null; then autonomy_fail sandbox-process-all; fi ;;
      Linux)
        command -v bwrap >/dev/null 2>&1 || autonomy_fail bwrap-required
        mount_dirs=$(find "$runtime/certification-evidence" -name 'category-security.mount-dirs' -type f | head -1)
        [ -s "$mount_dirs" ] || autonomy_fail bwrap-mount-tree-missing ;;
    esac
    evidence_source=$(find "$runtime/certification-evidence" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d ! -name '.building-*' | head -1)
    evidence_hash=$(if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      sha256sum "$evidence_source/manifest.json" | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'
    else shasum -a 256 "$evidence_source/manifest.json" | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'; fi)
    for attack_kind in extra symlink fifo directory; do
      attack=$runtime/certification-evidence/attack-$attack_kind
      cp -R "$evidence_source" "$attack"; chmod 700 "$attack"
      case $attack_kind in
        extra) printf extra >"$attack/extra"; chmod 400 "$attack/extra" ;;
        symlink) ln -s manifest.json "$attack/link" ;;
        fifo) mkfifo "$attack/fifo" ;;
        directory) mkdir "$attack/special-directory" ;;
      esac
      chmod 500 "$attack"
      assert_rc "evidence-$attack_kind" 5 "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" validate-evidence \
        "$runtime" "$attack/manifest.json" "$evidence_hash"
      chmod 700 "$attack"; rm -rf "$attack"
    done
    assert_json first '.consecutive_clean' 1 "$projection"
    assert_rc first-incomplete 5 "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" complete "$runtime" "$goal" "$project"
    certify b
    "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" complete "$runtime" "$goal" "$project"
    assert_json two-clean '.consecutive_clean' 2 "$projection"
    assert_json distinct-identities '
      ([.certifications[-2:].attempt_id]|unique|length)==2 and
      ([.certifications[-2:].certification_id]|unique|length)==2 and
      ([.certifications[-2:].checkout_id]|unique|length)==2 and
      ([.certifications[-2:].council.council_id]|unique|length)==2' true "$projection"

    cp "$projection" "$AUTONOMY_TMP/authoritative.json"
    jq '.consecutive_clean=99|.certifications += [{self_attested:true}]' \
      "$projection" >"$projection.next"; mv "$projection.next" "$projection"
    assert_rc projection-self-attestation 5 "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" complete \
      "$runtime" "$goal" "$project"
    "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" repair "$runtime" "$project"
    assert_eq repaired "$(jq -Sc . "$AUTONOMY_TMP/authoritative.json")" "$(jq -Sc . "$projection")"

    printf dirty >>"$project/product.txt"
    assert_rc unstaged 5 "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" complete "$runtime" "$goal" "$project"
    git -C "$project" checkout -q -- product.txt
    printf staged >>"$project/product.txt"; git -C "$project" add product.txt
    assert_rc staged 5 "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" complete "$runtime" "$goal" "$project"
    git -C "$project" reset -q --hard HEAD
    printf untracked >"$project/untracked.js"
    assert_rc untracked 5 "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" complete "$runtime" "$goal" "$project"
    rm -f "$project/untracked.js"
    git -C "$project" mv product.txt renamed.txt
    capture_rc "$AUTONOMY_TMP/rename.out" "$AUTONOMY_TMP/rename.err" \
      "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" complete "$runtime" "$goal" "$project"
    assert_eq rename-rc 5 "$CAPTURED_RC"
    assert_contains rename-source product.txt "$(cat "$AUTONOMY_TMP/rename.err")"
    assert_contains rename-destination renamed.txt "$(cat "$AUTONOMY_TMP/rename.err")"
    git -C "$project" reset -q --hard HEAD
    mkdir "$AUTONOMY_TMP/outside"
    ln -s "$AUTONOMY_TMP/outside" "$project/docs/polylane/decisions"
    assert_rc symlink 5 "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" complete "$runtime" "$goal" "$project"
    rm -f "$project/docs/polylane/decisions"
    printf allowed >"$project/docs/polylane/progress.md"
    "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" complete "$runtime" "$goal" "$project"
    rm -f "$project/docs/polylane/progress.md"
    council=$(run_council source-race)
    config=$AUTONOMY_TMP/source-race.json
    make_config source-race "$council" "$config"
    assert_rc source-race-rejected 7 env POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT=cert-mutate-before-transaction \
      "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" run "$runtime" "$goal" "$project" "$config"
    git -C "$project" reset -q --hard HEAD
    assert_json source-race-not-applied \
      '[.certifications[]|select(.attempt_id=="source-race")]|length' 0 "$projection"
    printf changed >>"$project/docs/polylane/NORTHSTAR.md"
    certify c
    assert_json scope-reset '.consecutive_clean' 1 "$projection"
    ;;
  atomicity)
    council=$(run_council crash)
    config=$AUTONOMY_TMP/crash.json; make_config crash "$council" "$config"
    set +e
    POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT=reduce-before-current "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" run \
      "$runtime" "$goal" "$project" "$config"
    crash_rc=$?
    set -e
    assert_eq reduce-crash 99 "$crash_rc"
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
    "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" run "$runtime" "$goal" "$project" "$config"
    assert_json one-cert '.certifications|length' 1 "$projection"
    council=$(run_council projection)
    config=$AUTONOMY_TMP/projection.json; make_config projection "$council" "$config"
    set +e
    POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT=convergence-before-projection "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" run \
      "$runtime" "$goal" "$project" "$config"
    projection_rc=$?
    set -e
    assert_eq projection-crash 99 "$projection_rc"
    "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" repair "$runtime" "$project"
    assert_json repair-no-duplicate '.certifications|length' 2 "$projection"

    state=$runtime/current/state.json
    record=$runtime/duplicate-record.json
    jq -Sc '.convergence.certifications[-1]' "$state" >"$record"
    body=$runtime/duplicate-body.json
    jq -n --slurpfile record "$record" '{record:$record[0],finding_goals:[]}' >"$body"
    body_hash=$(jq -Sc . "$body" | shasum -a 256 | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}')
    tx=$runtime/duplicate-tx.json
    jq -n --arg hash "$body_hash" --slurpfile body "$body" \
      --argjson rev "$(jq -r .revision "$state")" \
      --argjson txrev "$(jq -r .convergence.transaction_revision "$state")" \
      --argjson qrev "$(jq -r .queue.revision "$state")" \
      --arg scope "$(jq -r .convergence.last_scope_hash "$state")" \
      --arg goal_hash "$(jq -r .convergence.last_goal_hash "$state")" \
      '{schema_version:1,transaction_id:"malicious-duplicate",kind:"certification",
        expected_runtime_revision:$rev,expected_transaction_revision:$txrev,
        expected_queue_revision:$qrev,scope_snapshot_hash:$scope,
        goal_state_hash:$goal_hash,body_hash:$hash,body:$body[0]}' >"$tx"
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit convergence convergence_transaction \
      malicious-duplicate --fingerprint "$body_hash" --payload-file "$tx"
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
    assert_json duplicate-rejected \
      '.convergence.transaction_results["malicious-duplicate"].status' rejected "$state"
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" get --json >/dev/null
    ;;
  suggestions)
    summary=$AUTONOMY_TMP/summary.json
    jq -n '{loop_id:"pl1",cycle:1,completed:["m0"],open_goal_ref:"m1"}' >"$summary"
    cycle=$runtime/suggestion-staging/cycle-test.json
    "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" generate-cycle "$runtime" "$summary" "$goal" "$cycle"
    tx=$AUTONOMY_TMP/cycle-tx.json
    "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" prepare-cycle "$runtime" "$cycle" "$goal" "$tx"
    "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" validate-cycle "$runtime" "$cycle" "$goal" "$tx"
    set +e
    POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT=reduce-before-current "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" commit-cycle \
      "$runtime" "$tx"
    cycle_crash=$?
    set -e
    assert_eq cycle-crash 99 "$cycle_crash"
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
    "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" commit-cycle "$runtime" "$tx"
    selected_queue=$(jq -r '.convergence.cycle_suggestions["1"].selected_queue_id' \
      "$runtime/current/state.json")
    case $selected_queue in suggestion-pl1-1-*) :;; *) autonomy_fail selected-queue-id;; esac
    assert_eq atomic-queue 1 "$(jq --arg id "$selected_queue" \
      '[.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)]|length' "$runtime/current/state.json")"
    jq '.expected_runtime_revision-=1' "$tx" >"$tx.stale"
    assert_rc stale 7 "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" commit-cycle "$runtime" "$tx.stale"

    craft_cycle_attack() {
      filter=$1 id=$2 artifact=$3 output=$4
      jq "$filter" "$tx" >"$output.base"
      jq -Sc .body.artifact "$output.base" >"$artifact"
      artifact_hash=$(shasum -a 256 "$artifact" | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}')
      jq --arg id "$id" --arg artifact_hash "$artifact_hash" \
        --argjson rev "$(jq -r .revision "$runtime/current/state.json")" \
        --argjson txrev "$(jq -r .convergence.transaction_revision "$runtime/current/state.json")" \
        --argjson qrev "$(jq -r .queue.revision "$runtime/current/state.json")" '
        .transaction_id=$id | .body.artifact_hash=$artifact_hash |
        .expected_runtime_revision=$rev | .expected_transaction_revision=$txrev |
        .expected_queue_revision=$qrev' "$output.base" >"$output.body"
      body_hash=$(jq -Sc .body "$output.body" | shasum -a 256 | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}')
      jq --arg hash "$body_hash" '.body_hash=$hash' "$output.body" >"$output"
      rm -f "$output.base" "$output.body"
    }
    craft_cycle_attack '
      .body.artifact.suggestions[0].goal_ref="not-current" |
      .body.selected_queue_item.goal_ref="not-current"' non-current-goal \
      "$AUTONOMY_TMP/non-current-artifact.json" "$AUTONOMY_TMP/non-current-tx.json"
    assert_rc non-current-goal-rejected 7 "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" validate-cycle \
      "$runtime" "$AUTONOMY_TMP/non-current-artifact.json" "$goal" \
      "$AUTONOMY_TMP/non-current-tx.json"
    craft_cycle_attack '
      .body.selected_queue_item.id="duplicate-active-goal"' duplicate-active-goal \
      "$AUTONOMY_TMP/duplicate-active-artifact.json" "$AUTONOMY_TMP/duplicate-active-tx.json"
    assert_rc duplicate-active-goal-rejected 7 "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" validate-cycle \
      "$runtime" "$AUTONOMY_TMP/duplicate-active-artifact.json" "$goal" \
      "$AUTONOMY_TMP/duplicate-active-tx.json"

    jq '.transaction_id="nested-command"|
      .body.selected_queue_item.id="nested-command"|
      .body.artifact.auto_selected_id="nested-command"|
      .body.artifact.suggestions[0].id="nested-command"|
      .body.selected_queue_item.args={safe:{command:"touch forbidden"}}' "$tx" >"$tx.nested"
    jq -Sc '.body' "$tx.nested" | shasum -a 256 | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}' >"$AUTONOMY_TMP/hash"
    nested_hash=$(cat "$AUTONOMY_TMP/hash")
    jq --arg hash "$nested_hash" \
      --argjson rev "$(jq -r .revision "$runtime/current/state.json")" \
      --argjson txrev "$(jq -r .convergence.transaction_revision "$runtime/current/state.json")" \
      --argjson qrev "$(jq -r .queue.revision "$runtime/current/state.json")" \
      '.body_hash=$hash|.expected_runtime_revision=$rev|
       .expected_transaction_revision=$txrev|.expected_queue_revision=$qrev' \
      "$tx.nested" >"$tx.nested.final"
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit convergence convergence_transaction \
      nested-command --fingerprint "$nested_hash" --payload-file "$tx.nested.final"
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
    assert_json nested-rejected \
      '.convergence.transaction_results["nested-command"].status' rejected \
      "$runtime/current/state.json"

    final=$runtime/suggestion-staging/final-test.json
    "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" generate-final "$runtime" "$goal" "$projection" "$final"
    assert_eq thirty 30 "$(jq '.suggestions|length' "$final")"
    jq '.suggestions=.suggestions[:29]' "$final" >"$AUTONOMY_TMP/final-29.json"
    assert_rc final-29-rejected 5 "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" validate-final \
      "$AUTONOMY_TMP/final-29.json" pl1
    jq '.suggestions += [{rank:31,id:"idea-31",title:"Idea 31",scope:"beyond_locked",
      execution:"informational",starts_new_run:true}]' "$final" >"$AUTONOMY_TMP/final-31.json"
    assert_rc final-31-rejected 5 "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" validate-final \
      "$AUTONOMY_TMP/final-31.json" pl1
    jq '.suggestions[1].id=.suggestions[0].id' "$final" >"$AUTONOMY_TMP/final-duplicate.json"
    assert_rc final-duplicate-id-rejected 5 "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" validate-final \
      "$AUTONOMY_TMP/final-duplicate.json" pl1
    cp "$final" "$AUTONOMY_TMP/final.before"
    malformed_final=$runtime/suggestion-staging/final-malformed.json
    set +e
    POLYLANE_FAKE_ADAPTER_MODE=malformed "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" generate-final \
      "$runtime" "$goal" "$projection" "$malformed_final"
    malformed=$?
    set -e
    assert_eq malformed-typed 75 "$malformed"
    [ ! -e "$malformed_final" ] || autonomy_fail malformed-final-published
    assert_eq prior-untouched "$(cksum <"$AUTONOMY_TMP/final.before")" "$(cksum <"$final")"
    assert_json recovery-queued \
      '[.queue.items[]|select(.args.reason=="suggestion_generation_invalid")]|length>0' \
      true "$runtime/current/state.json"
    ;;
  delivery)
    certify delivery-a
    certify delivery-b
    final=$runtime/suggestion-staging/final-pl1.json
    "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" generate-final "$runtime" "$goal" "$projection" "$final"
    hash=$(shasum -a 256 "$final" | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}')
    delivery=$runtime/suggestion-staging/delivery-pl1.json
    jq -n --arg hash "$hash" '{schema_version:1,loop_id:"pl1",terminal_revision:9,
      content_hash:$hash,delivery_id:"delivery-pl1",status:"pending_receipt",
      producing_turn_id:"turn-a",producing_at:1000,attempt_count:0,attempts:[],
      delivered_at:null,receipt:null}' >"$delivery"
    chmod 400 "$delivery"
    "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" commit-final "$runtime" "$final" "$delivery"
    delivery=$project/docs/polylane/final-delivery.json
    "$BIN/polylane-terminal.sh" complete "$runtime/current/state.json" "$projection" \
      "$final" "$delivery"
    assert_json complete-via-transaction '.terminal' COMPLETE "$runtime/current/state.json"
    terminal_tx=$(find "$runtime/terminal-staging" -name '*.json' -type f | LC_ALL=C sort | tail -1)
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" terminal-transaction "$terminal_tx"
    assert_json complete-replay-one '[.terminal_transactions|to_entries[]]|length' 1 \
      "$runtime/current/state.json"
    stale_terminal=$runtime/terminal-staging/stale-complete.json
    jq '.transaction_id="terminal:complete:stale"' "$terminal_tx" >"$stale_terminal"
    chmod 400 "$stale_terminal"
    assert_rc stale-complete 5 "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" \
      terminal-transaction "$stale_terminal"
    assert_json stale-complete-no-second-shutdown \
      '[.terminal_transactions|to_entries[]]|length' 1 "$runtime/current/state.json"
    first=$("$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" render-final "$final" "$delivery")
    assert_eq rendered-thirty 30 "$(printf '%s\n' "$first" | grep -c '^- ')"
    assert_contains rendered-delivery-id delivery-pl1 "$first"
    assert_contains rendered-content-hash "$hash" "$first"
    "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" record-final-attempt "$runtime" delivery-pl1 "$hash" attempt-a
    "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" record-final-attempt "$runtime" delivery-pl1 "$hash" attempt-a
    assert_json one-attempt '.attempt_count' 1 "$delivery"
    assert_eq deterministic "$first" \
      "$("$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" render-final "$final" "$delivery")"
    receipt=$AUTONOMY_TMP/receipt.json
    jq -n --arg hash "$hash" '{delivery_id:"delivery-pl1",content_hash:$hash,
      receipt_id:"r1",source:"host",turn_id:"turn-b",received_at:1000}' >"$receipt"
    assert_rc not-later 7 "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" ack-final "$runtime" "$receipt"
    jq '.received_at=1001' "$receipt" >"$receipt.later"
    "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" ack-final "$runtime" "$receipt.later"
    "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" ack-final "$runtime" "$receipt.later"
    jq '.source="user"' "$receipt.later" >"$receipt.conflict"
    assert_rc receipt-conflict 7 "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" ack-final \
      "$runtime" "$receipt.conflict"
    set +e
    POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT=start-new-before-publish "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" \
      start-new-run "$runtime" "$final" 1
    new_crash=$?
    set -e
    assert_eq new-run-crash 99 "$new_crash"
    assert_json no-partial-new-run '.convergence.new_run==null' true "$runtime/current/state.json"
    new=$("$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" start-new-run "$runtime" "$final" 1)
    loop=$(printf '%s\n' "$new" | jq -r .loop_id)
    replay=$("$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" start-new-run "$runtime" "$final" 1)
    assert_eq new-run-idempotent "$loop" "$(printf '%s\n' "$replay" | jq -r .loop_id)"
    assert_rc new-run-conflict 7 "$BIN/polylane-suggestions.sh" start-new-run \
      "$runtime" "$final" 2
    ;;
  *) exit 2;;
esac
finish_autonomy_test "convergence-$scenario"
~~~

Create these complete entrypoints:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# core/tests/test-perfection.sh
exec "$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)/helpers/convergence-contract.sh" certification
~~~

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# core/tests/test-certification.sh
exec "$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)/helpers/convergence-contract.sh" certification
~~~

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# core/tests/test-suggestions.sh
exec "$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)/helpers/convergence-contract.sh" suggestions
~~~

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# core/tests/test-convergence-atomicity.sh
exec "$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)/helpers/convergence-contract.sh" atomicity
~~~

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# codex/tests/test-codex-final-delivery.sh
exec "$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/../.." && pwd -P)/core/tests/helpers/convergence-contract.sh" delivery
~~~

Run:

~~~bash
chmod +x core/tests/helpers/convergence-contract.sh \
  core/tests/test-{perfection,certification,suggestions,convergence-atomicity}.sh \
  codex/tests/test-codex-final-delivery.sh
for file in core/tests/helpers/convergence-contract.sh \
  core/tests/test-{perfection,certification,suggestions,convergence-atomicity}.sh \
  codex/tests/test-codex-final-delivery.sh; do bash -n "$file"; done
~~~

Expected: syntax passes.

- [ ] **Action 6.6 (2–5 minutes): Capture RED, then run convergence GREEN**

Before creating Actions 6.2–6.4 files, run:

~~~bash
bash core/tests/test-certification.sh
bash core/tests/test-suggestions.sh
bash core/tests/test-convergence-atomicity.sh
bash codex/tests/test-codex-final-delivery.sh
~~~

Expected RED: missing production convergence helpers. No test self-publishes an accepted
certification, suggestion transaction, recovery, or delivery receipt.

After implementing the complete bodies, run:

~~~bash
bash core/tests/test-perfection.sh
bash core/tests/test-certification.sh
bash core/tests/test-suggestions.sh
bash core/tests/test-convergence-atomicity.sh
bash core/tests/test-terminal-states.sh
bash core/tests/test-cycle-transactions.sh
bash core/tests/test-council-selection.sh
bash codex/tests/test-codex-final-delivery.sh
POLYLANE_MIN_DISK_GB=0 tests/run.sh
~~~

Expected GREEN: focused tests print PASS; only two distinct real exhaustive certifications
complete; every crash replays exactly once; malformed/self-attested evidence is rejected;
and the full suite satisfies FULL GREEN.

- [ ] **Action 6.7 (2–5 minutes): Wire projection repair, terminal evidence, and foreground delivery**

Do not apply a context-free diff in this action. The final complete bodies are already
authoritative: Action 4.5's `complete` branch calls `polylane-certify.sh repair` before
`complete`, seals and binds the exact final-suggestion artifact, and creates the
authenticated terminal transaction; Action 4.7's `check_once` repairs convergence before
`ensure-progress`. Recreate either whole file from its complete body if the working copy
differs. This action only verifies those full-body integrations, so there is no stale hunk
whose context depends on an earlier partial version.

Mechanically assert the final forms before continuing:

~~~bash
test "$(rg -c 'polylane-certify\.sh" repair "\$runtime" "\$project"' \
  core/scripts/polylane-terminal.sh)" -eq 1
test "$(rg -c 'polylane-certify\.sh" repair "\$runtime" "\$project"' \
  core/scripts/polylane-guardian.sh)" -eq 1
test "$(rg -c 'terminal-auth\.key|transaction_hash|suggestion_artifact' \
  core/scripts/polylane-terminal.sh)" -ge 3
! rg -n '^@@$|^@@ ' core/scripts/polylane-terminal.sh core/scripts/polylane-guardian.sh
~~~

Insert this foreground rule into codex/SKILL.md:

~~~markdown
For COMPLETE, do not return at TERMINAL_PUBLISHED. Follow durable state through
TEARDOWN_COMPLETE and independently verify the owned tmux session plus every recorded
keeper, sentinel, guardian, finalizer, controller, and worker PID/start-token is absent.
Then run `render-final` into a temporary file, validate that its delivery-id/content-hash
header exactly matches the sealed delivery and that its remaining lines are exactly the 30
ranked suggestions in the sealed artifact, emit those exact bytes to the user, and only
then submit `record-final-attempt` with a unique host attempt id. Never call
ack-final from the producing turn. On later entry, replay pending_receipt identically.
Only a later host receipt or explicit user acknowledgement with the same ids and a timestamp
strictly after producing_at may submit ack-final against the runtime. start-new-run is also
a reducer transaction and requires explicit selection.
~~~

Append this exact section to core/workflow/polylane-loop.md and

## Transactional perfection and delivery

The published runtime snapshot is authoritative. Certification append, perfection count,
and top-weight findings share one convergence transaction; cycle suggestions and their
selected queue item share another. Every certification uses a distinct fresh checkout,
argv-array exhaustive checks, and a real five-member evidence-hashed council. Two distinct
clean records of the same current product are required. Final generation uses the selected
adapter, publishes exactly 30 informational beyond-scope ideas with pending delivery, and
does not enqueue them. Foreground rendering waits for TEARDOWN_COMPLETE and remains
deterministic at-least-once until a later receipt; starting an idea creates a new loop only
after explicit user selection.

### Task 7: Prove Six Simulated Hours from Authenticated Event Intervals

**Files:**
- Create: core/tests/fixtures/soak/scenario.json
- Create: core/tests/helpers/mock-runtime-actors.sh
- Create: core/tests/test-autonomy-soak.sh
- Create: core/tests/test-audit-deadline-boundaries.sh
- Create: core/tests/test-audit-handler-receipts.sh
- Create: core/tests/test-task7-sequential-plan.sh
- Create: core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-audit.sh
- Create: core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-reducer.sh
- Create: core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-hooks.sh
- Modify: core/scripts/polylane-runtime.sh
- Modify: core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-reducer.sh
- Modify: core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-retention.sh
- Modify: core/scripts/polylane-guardian.sh
- Modify: core/scripts/polylane-keeper.sh
- Modify: core/scripts/polylane-sentinel.sh
- Modify: core/scripts/polylane-process.sh
- Modify: core/scripts/polylane-finalizer.sh
- Modify: core/scripts/polylane-session.sh
- Modify: core/scripts/polylane-queue.sh
- Modify: core/scripts/polylane-markers.sh
- Modify: core/scripts/polylane-recovery.sh

**Interfaces:**
- The test advances POLYLANE_NOW_EPOCH from 0 through 21,600 in five-second increments
  without sleeping to advance time.
- polylane-runtime.sh --dir <runtime> audit-interval --from <epoch> --to <epoch>
  reconstructs authenticated work intervals and mandatory deadlines from finalized events,
  then publishes its result through the reducer.
- polylane-runtime.sh --dir <runtime> record-recovery --cause-event <event-path>
  --recovery <typed-name> --evidence <sealed-manifest> publishes one reducer-CAS recovery.
- polylane-runtime.sh --dir <runtime> summarize-soak --scenario <scenario>
  --auth-file <secret> --output <audit.json> independently validates every injection,
  recovery, postcondition, interval, and hash. No count is caller supplied.

**Contract — event-derived coverage, not endpoint inference:**

Production guardian checks emit a finalized `guardian_observed` fact only after re-querying
the owned PID/start-token/generation/ownership tuple. The first observation establishes no
coverage. Each later check may emit `work_coverage` only retrospectively for the nonempty
interval from the prior authenticated guardian observation to the current observation. The
two identities must be byte-identical, or an authenticated `actor_restarted` handoff must
prove the old lease covered through the new generation's exact start timestamp with no gap.
`valid_until` equals the finalized event timestamp; no event asserts future work or backfills
an unobserved gap. Other actor/claim/schedule facts never substitute for guardian coverage.
Every observation and continuity proof is a sealed 0400 content-addressed manifest, and the
reducer pins its finalized event plus predecessor/handoff hashes across compaction.

Queue enqueue/reschedule events create a reducer-owned mandatory deadline obligation.
Activation, completion, failure/reschedule, or recovery satisfies the exact item obligation
at that event timestamp. Audit reconstructs and unions explicit coverage intervals, then
subtracts every missed obligation interval. The next mandatory deadline is the minimum due
time, never the maximum: an item due in five seconds cannot be masked by another due in
300 seconds or by a later endpoint snapshot.

audit-interval accepts only nonempty bounds inside `[0,21600]` and never appends a file.
Under audit-command.lock it recomputes the union solely from authenticated retrospective
guardian facts, subtracts missed obligations, and emits audit_interval with
the source event cursor and canonical interval proof; the reducer independently recomputes
the same proof before compare-and-swapping the
unique from:to key. Exact replay is a no-op, conflicting replay is rejected, and compaction
pins all referenced event hashes.

**Contract — authenticated recovery pairs and typed postconditions:**

Injection artifacts and recovery evidence are written temp-first, named by SHA-256, chmod
0400, and placed in sealed directories. Symlinks, writable evidence, hash/name mismatch,
and paths outside their evidence root fail. An injection auth tag is HMAC-SHA256 over the
canonical unsigned artifact (fault id, recovery, unique nonce, timestamp, prior-state hash,
detail hash, and unsigned hash) using a raw 32-byte mode-0400 key. Verification uses
`hmac.compare_digest`; ordinary SHA-256 concatenation is forbidden.

record-recovery validates the finalized causative event and a typed evidence manifest whose
postcondition event/artifact hashes bind the actual production result. It emits
recovery_proof. The reducer owns uniqueness by (cause_event_hash,recovery): concurrent exact
recorders yield one accepted pair; conflicting evidence is a durable rejection. Both cause
and recovery proofs are pinned across compaction.

summarize-soak does not trust postcondition:true or a sha256-looking string. It rehashes the
sealed manifest, resolves and rehashes every referenced event/artifact, checks the exact
actor/type/action/cause binding, and validates the recovery-specific authoritative fact:

Before `fault_injected` can enter the accepted fault map, the reducer itself checks that
HMAC, exact event time, predecessor state hash, and globally unused nonce. A modified
artifact, exact replay, or correctly signed stale artifact is appended to
`audit.injection_rejections` and cannot create or replace a fault. The soak executes all
three negative cases after the twenty positive injections.

- lease recovery binds old/new action and changed proof;
- owner restart binds dead old PID/start-token and strictly newer live generation;
- session/pane/window recovery re-queries ownership tags and same cycle nonce;
- reducer/boundary replay binds cursor, event hash, and application_count exactly one;
- marker recovery binds expected/observed nonce and accepted/rejected event;
- provider recovery binds provider state plus actual probe/offline/online queue transitions;
- queue recovery binds old/new claim tokens or unique reconcile generation;
- wake recovery binds emitted event, reduced cursor, and latency before fallback;
- quiet-child recovery binds PID/start-token/deadline and the matching preserve/expire
  decision event.

A forged manifest containing postcondition:true and sha256:x must fail.

**Contract — hermetic recovery matrix:**

The test prepends core/tests/helpers/fake-tmux.sh as tmux. It never contacts a real tmux
server, but it launches the production keeper process, executes the exact sentinel launch
envelope that fake tmux records, lets that real sentinel start the real guardian, and lets
the real guardian start the external mock Codex controller and workers through production
queue/worker paths. Only Codex and worker behavior is mocked. Generic actor loops are
forbidden for keeper, sentinel, guardian, controller ownership, and queue workers. Every
identity is taken from production owner/heartbeat/actor records and authenticated by
PID/start-token/generation. The EXIT trap fences recorded descendant trees by those exact
identities. All launch envelopes are schema-versioned, mode-0600 pointers to mode-0400
content, bind canonical argv hashes, and execute only through polylane-exec-argv.sh.

The exact twenty injected→recovery pairs are:

| At | Fault | Required recovery |
|---:|---|---|
| 300 | lane_frozen | checkpoint_retry |
| 450 | guardian_killed | guardian_generation_restart |
| 900 | controller_killed | controller_state_restart |
| 1200 | session_killed | keeper_session_recreate |
| 1500 | false_heartbeat | proof_lease_expiry |
| 1800 | reducer_pre_publish_crash | event_replay |
| 2100 | dual_resume | singleton_keeper_controller |
| 2400 | stale_markers | nonce_rejection |
| 3600 | rate_limit | offline_plus_probe |
| 5400 | provider_unavailable | offline_drain |
| 6000 | guardian_claim_death | orphan_requeue |
| 6600 | blocked_wait_event | usr1_wake |
| 7200 | empty_queue | state_reconcile |
| 9000 | result_before_enqueue_crash | boundary_reconcile |
| 10800 | quiet_child_valid | no_restart |
| 11700 | quiet_child_expired | child_recover |
| 12600 | builder_pane_deleted | same_nonce_lane_relaunch |
| 13500 | lanes_window_deleted | window_recreate_once |
| 14400 | provider_recovered | online_immediate |
| 18000 | current_marker_written | marker_wake |

Each tick calls the production keeper check-once, sentinel check-once, guardian check-once,
reducer, queue reclaim/select/reserve/activate paths, and retrospective interval audit.
The check-once entrypoints are the same functions used by their long-running loops and first
authenticate the already-running real owners. Reducer crashes use the real
reduce-before-current hook.
Owner, session, pane, window, marker, provider, claim, and wake faults manipulate only the
external condition, never runtime state. Teardown first disables restart through production
terminal/finalizer state, then uses production emergency cleanup in test mode, then fences
remaining recorded identities, and only then asserts no owned session/process remains.
