- [ ] **Action 7.2 (2–5 minutes): Add reducer-owned coverage, deadlines, and recovery CAS**

Create core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-reducer.sh:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
polylane_audit_base() {
  local state output
  state=$1; output=$2
  jq '.audit=({coverage_facts:[],deadlines:{},faults:{},postconditions:{},
    recovery_pairs:{},recovery_results:{},intervals:{},interval_conflicts:[],
    deadline_block_conflicts:[],resource_blocks:[],resource_block_conflicts:[],
    fault_nonces:[],injection_rejections:[],last_guardian_observation:null,last_goal_observation:null,
    pinned_event_hashes:[]} * (.audit//{}))' "$state" >"$output"
}
polylane_audit_validate_injection() {
  local state event root artifact parent mode hash unsigned signed audit_bin rc
  state=$1 event=$2
  root=$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/injections; artifact=$(jq -er .payload.artifact_path "$event")
  [ -f "$artifact" ] && [ ! -L "$artifact" ] || return 5
  parent=$(cd "$(dirname "$artifact")" && pwd -P) || return 5
  [ "$parent" = "$(cd "$root" && pwd -P)" ] || return 5
  mode=$(stat -f '%Lp' "$artifact" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$artifact")
  [ "$mode" = 400 ] || return 5
  hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$artifact")
  [ "$hash" = "$(jq -r .payload.artifact_hash "$event")" ] &&
    [ "$(basename "$artifact" .json)" = "${hash#sha256:}" ] || return 5
  jq -e --slurpfile event "$event" '
    (keys|sort)==["at","auth_tag","detail_hash","fault_id","nonce",
      "prior_state_hash","recovery","schema_version","unsigned_hash"] and
    .schema_version==2 and .at==$event[0].at and
    .fault_id==$event[0].payload.fault_id and
    .recovery==$event[0].payload.recovery and
    .nonce==$event[0].payload.nonce and
    .auth_tag==$event[0].payload.auth_tag and
    (.nonce|type=="string" and test("^fault-[A-Za-z0-9_-]+-[0-9]+$"))' \
    "$artifact" >/dev/null || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$state")" = "$(jq -r .prior_state_hash "$artifact")" ] || return 5
  jq -e --arg nonce "$(jq -r .nonce "$artifact")" \
    '(.audit.fault_nonces//[])|index($nonce)==null' "$state" >/dev/null || return 7
  unsigned=$RUNTIME_DIR/.injection-unsigned.$$.json
  jq -Sc 'del(.auth_tag,.unsigned_hash)' "$artifact" >"$unsigned"
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$unsigned")" = "$(jq -r .unsigned_hash "$artifact")" ] || {
    rm -f "$unsigned"; return 5; }
  signed=$RUNTIME_DIR/.injection-signed.$$.json
  jq -Sc 'del(.auth_tag)' "$artifact" >"$signed"
  audit_bin=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd -P)
  "$audit_bin/polylane-hmac.py" verify "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit-auth.key" "$signed" \
    "$(jq -r .auth_tag "$artifact")"
  rc=$?; rm -f "$unsigned" "$signed"; return "$rc"
}
polylane_audit_recompute_interval() {
  local state from to output intervals gaps id due satisfied end start proof_hash
  state=$1 from=$2 to=$3 output=$4
  intervals=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-recompute-intervals.$$.json
  gaps=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-recompute-gaps.$$.json
  jq --argjson from "$from" --argjson to "$to" '
    [.audit.coverage_facts[]|select(.kind=="guardian")|
      {from:([.valid_from,$from]|max),to:([.valid_until,$to]|min)}|select(.to>.from)] as $guardian |
    [.audit.coverage_facts[]|select(.kind=="goal_work")|
      {from:([.valid_from,$from]|max),to:([.valid_until,$to]|min)}|select(.to>.from)] as $goal |
    [$guardian[] as $g|$goal[] as $w|
      {from:([$g.from,$w.from]|max),to:([$g.to,$w.to]|min)}|select(.to>.from)] |
    sort_by(.from,.to) | reduce .[] as $x ([];
      if length==0 or .[-1].to<$x.from then .+[$x]
      else .[-1].to=([.[-1].to,$x.to]|max) end)' "$state" >"$intervals"
  jq --argjson from "$from" --argjson to "$to" '
    reduce .[] as $x ({cursor:$from,gaps:[]};
      if $x.from>.cursor then .gaps += [{from:.cursor,to:$x.from}]|.cursor=$x.to
      else .cursor=([.cursor,$x.to]|max) end) |
    if .cursor<$to then .gaps+=[{from:.cursor,to:$to}] else . end | .gaps' \
    "$intervals" >"$gaps"
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r id due satisfied; do
    [ "$due" -lt "$to" ] || continue
    end=$(polylane_audit_deadline_end "$satisfied" "$to") || {
      rm -f "$intervals" "$gaps"; return 5; }
    start=$due; [ "$start" -lt "$from" ] && start=$from
    if [ "$end" -gt "$start" ]; then
      polylane_audit_deadline_gaps "$state" "$id" "$start" "$end" "$gaps.deadline" || {
        rm -f "$intervals" "$gaps" "$gaps.deadline"; return 5; }
      jq -s '.[0]+.[1]' "$gaps" "$gaps.deadline" >"$gaps.next"
      mv -f "$gaps.next" "$gaps"; rm -f "$gaps.deadline"
    fi
  done < <(jq -r '.audit.deadlines|to_entries[]|
    [.key,.value.due_at,(.value.satisfied_at//null)]|@tsv' "$state")
  jq -Sc 'sort_by(.from,.to,(.missed_deadline//""))' "$gaps" >"$gaps.next"; mv -f "$gaps.next" "$gaps"
  proof_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$gaps")
  jq -n --argjson from "$from" --argjson to "$to" \
    --arg proof_hash "$proof_hash" --slurpfile gaps "$gaps" '
    {from:$from,to:$to,proof_hash:$proof_hash,
      unexplained_gap:([$gaps[0][]|(.to-.from)]|max//0),
      total_unexplained:([$gaps[0][]|(.to-.from)]|add//0),gaps:$gaps[0]}' >"$output"
  rm -f "$intervals" "$gaps"
}
polylane_audit_deadline_end() {
  local satisfied upper
  satisfied=${1-} upper=$2
  case $upper in ''|*[!0-9]*) return 5;; esac
  case $satisfied in
    ''|null) printf '%s\n' "$upper";;
    *[!0-9]*) return 5;;
    *) if [ "$satisfied" -le "$upper" ]; then
         printf '%s\n' "$satisfied"
       else
         printf '%s\n' "$upper"
       fi;;
  esac
}
polylane_audit_deadline_gaps() {
  local state id from to output
  state=$1 id=$2 from=$3 to=$4 output=$5
  jq --arg id "$id" --argjson from "$from" --argjson to "$to" '
    ([.audit.resource_blocks[]?|select(.item_id==$id)|
      {from:([.from,$from]|max),to:([.to,$to]|min)}|select(.to>.from)] |
    sort_by(.from,.to) | reduce .[] as $x ([];
      if length==0 or .[-1].to<$x.from then .+[$x]
      else .[-1].to=([.[-1].to,$x.to]|max) end)) as $blocks |
    reduce $blocks[] as $x ({cursor:$from,gaps:[]};
      if $x.from>.cursor then
        .gaps += [{from:.cursor,to:$x.from,missed_deadline:$id}] |
        .cursor=([.cursor,$x.to]|max)
      else .cursor=([.cursor,$x.to]|max) end) |
    if .cursor<$to then .gaps+=[{from:.cursor,to:$to,missed_deadline:$id}]
    else . end | .gaps' "$state" >"$output"
}
polylane_audit_observe_event() {
  local state event output prior_state type event_hash id due at key prior from to expected interval_valid
  local proof proof_hash proof_source actual_token
  state=$1 event=$2 output=$3 prior_state=${4:-$state}
  polylane_audit_base "$state" "$output.base"
  type=$(jq -r .type "$event")
  event_hash=$(jq -r .event_hash "$event")
  case $type in
    fault_injected)
      # Injection freshness is bound to the exact state before the event. The ordinary
      # observer input already contains the event-derived sequence/hash projection.
      if polylane_audit_validate_injection "$prior_state" "$event" &&
         jq -e '.payload.fault_id|type=="string" and length>0' "$event" >/dev/null &&
         jq -e '.payload.recovery|type=="string" and length>0' "$event" >/dev/null &&
         jq -e '.payload.artifact_hash|startswith("sha256:")' "$event" >/dev/null; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.faults[$x.payload.fault_id]={
            fault_id:$x.payload.fault_id,recovery:$x.payload.recovery,
            event_id:$x.sequence,event_hash:$x.event_hash,
            artifact_path:$x.payload.artifact_path,
            artifact_hash:$x.payload.artifact_hash,auth_tag:$x.payload.auth_tag} |
          .audit.fault_nonces=((.audit.fault_nonces+[$x.payload.nonce])|unique) |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+[$x.event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
        mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      else
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          .audit.injection_rejections += [{event_id:$event[0].sequence,
            event_hash:$event[0].event_hash,reason:"invalid_auth_replay_or_stale"}]' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
        mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      fi
      ;;
    checkpoint_recovered|lease_recovered|actor_restarted|session_recovered|reducer_replayed|marker_decided|\
    provider_progress|queue_recovered|wake_reduced|quiet_child_decided)
      if jq -e '.payload.fault_id|type=="string" and length>0' "$event" >/dev/null &&
         jq -e '.payload.cause_event_hash|startswith("sha256:")' "$event" >/dev/null; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.postconditions[$x.payload.fault_id]={
            type:$x.type,recovery:$x.payload.recovery,event_id:$x.sequence,
            event_hash:$x.event_hash,cause_event_hash:$x.payload.cause_event_hash,
            authoritative_artifacts:$x.payload.authoritative_artifacts,
            old_identity:($x.payload.old_identity//null),
            new_identity:($x.payload.new_identity//null),
            handoff_at:($x.payload.handoff_at//null)} |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+
            [$x.event_hash,$x.payload.cause_event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
        mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      fi
      ;;
    goal_work_observed)
      if jq -e '. as $event |
        (.payload|keys|sort)==
          (["evidence_hash","evidence_path","identity","kind","observed_at"]|sort) and
        .payload.kind=="goal_work" and
        (.payload.observed_at|type=="number") and .payload.observed_at==$event.at and
        (.payload.identity.goal_ref|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.payload.identity.mode|IN("goal","recovery"))' "$event" >/dev/null &&
         jq -e '.audit.last_goal_observation==null' "$output.base" >/dev/null; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.last_goal_observation={event_id:$x.sequence,event_hash:$x.event_hash,
            observed_at:$x.at,evidence_path:$x.payload.evidence_path,
            evidence_hash:$x.payload.evidence_hash,identity:$x.payload.identity} |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+[$x.event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"; mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      fi ;;
    goal_work_coverage)
      if jq -e '. as $event |
        (.payload|keys|sort)==
          (["evidence_hash","evidence_path","identity","kind","observed_at",
            "previous_event_hash","valid_from","valid_until"]|sort) and
        .payload.kind=="goal_work" and
        (.payload.valid_from|type=="number") and
        (.payload.valid_until|type=="number") and
        .payload.valid_until==$event.at and
        .payload.valid_from>=0 and .payload.valid_from<.payload.valid_until and
        (.payload.identity.goal_ref|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.payload.identity.mode|IN("goal","recovery"))' "$event" >/dev/null &&
         jq -e --slurpfile event "$event" '
           .audit.last_goal_observation.event_hash==$event[0].payload.previous_event_hash and
           .audit.last_goal_observation.observed_at==$event[0].payload.valid_from and
           .audit.last_goal_observation.identity.goal_ref==$event[0].payload.identity.goal_ref' \
           "$output.base" >/dev/null; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.coverage_facts += [{event_id:$x.sequence,event_hash:$x.event_hash,
            kind:"goal_work",valid_from:$x.payload.valid_from,valid_until:$x.payload.valid_until,
            evidence_path:$x.payload.evidence_path,evidence_hash:$x.payload.evidence_hash,
            identity:$x.payload.identity,previous_event_hash:$x.payload.previous_event_hash,
            continuity:"active_goal_or_recovery",handoff_event_hash:null}] |
          .audit.last_goal_observation={event_id:$x.sequence,event_hash:$x.event_hash,
            observed_at:$x.at,evidence_path:$x.payload.evidence_path,
            evidence_hash:$x.payload.evidence_hash,identity:$x.payload.identity} |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+
            [$x.event_hash,$x.payload.previous_event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"; mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      fi ;;
    goal_work_transition)
      if jq -e '. as $event |
        (.payload|keys|sort)==(["current_evidence_hash","current_evidence_path",
          "current_identity","kind","observed_at","previous_event_hash",
          "prior_evidence_hash","prior_evidence_path","prior_identity",
          "valid_from","valid_until"]|sort) and
        .payload.kind=="goal_work_transition" and
        (.payload.valid_from|type=="number") and (.payload.valid_until|type=="number") and
        .payload.valid_from>=0 and .payload.valid_from<.payload.valid_until and
        .payload.valid_until==$event.at and .payload.observed_at==$event.at and
        (.payload.previous_event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        (.payload.prior_evidence_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        (.payload.current_evidence_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        (.payload.prior_evidence_path|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
        (.payload.current_evidence_path|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
        (.payload.prior_identity.goal_ref|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.payload.current_identity.goal_ref|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.payload.prior_identity.mode|IN("goal","recovery")) and
        (.payload.current_identity.mode|IN("goal","recovery")) and
        .payload.prior_identity!=.payload.current_identity' "$event" >/dev/null &&
         jq -e --slurpfile event "$event" '
           .audit.last_goal_observation.event_hash==$event[0].payload.previous_event_hash and
           .audit.last_goal_observation.observed_at==$event[0].payload.valid_from and
           .audit.last_goal_observation.identity==$event[0].payload.prior_identity and
           .audit.last_goal_observation.evidence_path==$event[0].payload.prior_evidence_path and
           .audit.last_goal_observation.evidence_hash==$event[0].payload.prior_evidence_hash' \
           "$output.base" >/dev/null; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.coverage_facts += [{event_id:$x.sequence,event_hash:$x.event_hash,
            kind:"goal_work",valid_from:$x.payload.valid_from,valid_until:$x.payload.valid_until,
            evidence_path:$x.payload.current_evidence_path,
            evidence_hash:$x.payload.current_evidence_hash,
            identity:$x.payload.prior_identity,previous_event_hash:$x.payload.previous_event_hash,
            continuity:"active_goal_transition",handoff_event_hash:null}] |
          .audit.last_goal_observation={event_id:$x.sequence,event_hash:$x.event_hash,
            observed_at:$x.at,evidence_path:$x.payload.current_evidence_path,
            evidence_hash:$x.payload.current_evidence_hash,identity:$x.payload.current_identity} |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+
            [$x.event_hash,$x.payload.previous_event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"; mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      fi ;;
    guardian_observed)
      if jq -e '. as $event |
        (.payload|keys|sort)==
          (["evidence_hash","evidence_path","identity","kind","observed_at"]|sort) and
        .payload.kind=="guardian" and
        (.payload.observed_at|type=="number") and .payload.observed_at==$event.at and
        (.payload.evidence_path|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
        (.payload.evidence_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        .payload.identity.role=="guardian" and
        (.payload.identity.pid|type=="number" and .>0) and
        (.payload.identity.start_token|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.payload.identity.generation|type=="number" and .>0) and
        (.payload.identity.ownership_token|type=="string" and length>0)' "$event" >/dev/null &&
         jq -e '.audit.last_guardian_observation==null' "$output.base" >/dev/null; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.last_guardian_observation={event_id:$x.sequence,event_hash:$x.event_hash,
            observed_at:$x.at,evidence_path:$x.payload.evidence_path,
            evidence_hash:$x.payload.evidence_hash,identity:$x.payload.identity} |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+[$x.event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"; mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      fi ;;
    work_coverage)
      if jq -e '. as $event |
        (.payload|keys|sort)==
          (["continuity","evidence_hash","evidence_path","handoff_event_hash",
            "identity","kind","observed_at","previous_event_hash","valid_from",
            "valid_until"]|sort) and
        .payload.kind=="guardian" and
        (.payload.valid_from|type=="number") and
        (.payload.valid_until|type=="number") and
        .payload.valid_until==$event.at and
        .payload.valid_from>=0 and .payload.valid_from<$event.at and
        (.payload.observed_at|type=="number") and .payload.observed_at==$event.at and
        (.payload.evidence_path|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
        (.payload.evidence_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        (.payload.previous_event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        .payload.identity.role=="guardian" and
        (.payload.identity.pid|type=="number" and .>0) and
        (.payload.identity.start_token|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.payload.identity.generation|type=="number" and .>0) and
        (.payload.identity.ownership_token|type=="string" and length>0)' "$event" >/dev/null &&
         jq -e --slurpfile event "$event" '
           . as $state |
           .audit.last_guardian_observation.event_hash==$event[0].payload.previous_event_hash and
           .audit.last_guardian_observation.observed_at==$event[0].payload.valid_from and
           (if $event[0].payload.continuity=="same_identity" then
              $event[0].payload.handoff_event_hash==null and
              $event[0].payload.identity==.audit.last_guardian_observation.identity
            elif $event[0].payload.continuity=="actor_restarted" then
              ($event[0].payload.handoff_event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
              any(.audit.postconditions[];
                .type=="actor_restarted" and
                .event_hash==$event[0].payload.handoff_event_hash and
                .old_identity==$state.audit.last_guardian_observation.identity and
                .new_identity==$event[0].payload.identity and
                .handoff_at>=$event[0].payload.valid_from and
                .handoff_at<=$event[0].at)
            else false end)' \
           "$output.base" >/dev/null; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          if any(.audit.coverage_facts[];.event_hash==$x.event_hash) then .
          else .audit.coverage_facts += [{
            event_id:$x.sequence,event_hash:$x.event_hash,kind:$x.payload.kind,
            valid_from:$x.payload.valid_from,valid_until:$x.payload.valid_until,
            evidence_path:$x.payload.evidence_path,evidence_hash:$x.payload.evidence_hash,
            identity:$x.payload.identity,previous_event_hash:$x.payload.previous_event_hash,
            continuity:$x.payload.continuity,
            handoff_event_hash:$x.payload.handoff_event_hash}] |
            .audit.last_guardian_observation={event_id:$x.sequence,event_hash:$x.event_hash,
              observed_at:$x.at,evidence_path:$x.payload.evidence_path,
              evidence_hash:$x.payload.evidence_hash,identity:$x.payload.identity} |
            .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+
              [$x.event_hash,$x.payload.previous_event_hash]+
              (if $x.payload.handoff_event_hash==null then [] else [$x.payload.handoff_event_hash] end))|unique)
          end' "$output.base" >"$output.next"
        mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      fi
      ;;
    queue_enqueue|queue_reschedule)
      id=$(jq -r '.payload.id // .payload.item.id // ""' "$event")
      due=$(jq -r '.payload.next_action_at // .payload.item.next_action_at // -1' "$event")
      at=$(jq -r .at "$event")
      if [ -n "$id" ] && [ "$due" -ge 0 ]; then
        [ "$due" -ge "$at" ] || due=$at
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" --arg id "$id" --argjson due "$due" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.deadlines[$id]={item_id:$id,opened_at:$x.at,due_at:$due,
            opened_event_id:$x.sequence,opened_event_hash:$x.event_hash,
            recovery_group:(if (($x.payload.args.actor//null)|type)=="string" and
              (($x.payload.args.reason//null)|type)=="string" and
              (($x.payload.args.strategy_generation//null)|type)=="number" then
                {actor:$x.payload.args.actor,reason:$x.payload.args.reason,
                  strategy_generation:$x.payload.args.strategy_generation}
              else null end),
            satisfied_at:null,satisfied_event_id:null,satisfied_event_hash:null,
            blocked_by:null} |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+[$x.event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
        mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      fi
      ;;
    deadline_blocked)
      proof=$RUNTIME_DIR/.deadline-block-proof.$$.json
      proof_hash=$(jq -r '.payload.blocked_by.proof_event_hash//""' "$event")
      proof_source=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$proof_hash" 2>/dev/null || true)
      if [ -n "$proof_source" ] && [ -f "$proof_source" ] && [ ! -L "$proof_source" ] &&
         jq -Sc . "$proof_source" >"$proof" &&
         jq -e --slurpfile event "$event" --slurpfile proof "$proof" '
           ($event[0]) as $x | ($proof[0]) as $p |
           (.audit.deadlines[$x.payload.item_id]//null) as $deadline |
           ([.queue.items[]|select(.id==$x.payload.item_id)]|if length==1 then .[0] else null end) as $blocked |
           ([.queue.items[]|select(.id==$x.payload.blocked_by.item_id)]|if length==1 then .[0] else null end) as $holder |
           $deadline!=null and $deadline.satisfied_at==null and
           $deadline.due_at==$x.payload.due_at and
           ($x.payload.coverage_until|type)=="number" and
           $x.payload.coverage_until>=$x.payload.due_at and
           $x.at>=$x.payload.coverage_until and
           $deadline.recovery_group==$x.payload.recovery_group and
           $blocked!=null and ($blocked.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and
           {actor:$blocked.args.actor,reason:$blocked.args.reason,
             strategy_generation:$blocked.args.strategy_generation}==$x.payload.recovery_group and
           $holder!=null and $holder.id!=$blocked.id and
           {actor:$holder.args.actor,reason:$holder.args.reason,
             strategy_generation:$holder.args.strategy_generation}==$x.payload.recovery_group and
           ($x.payload.blocked_by.resource_locks|length)>0 and
           ($x.payload.blocked_by.resource_locks-$blocked.resource_locks|length)==0 and
           ($x.payload.blocked_by.resource_locks-$holder.resource_locks|length)==0 and
           $x.payload.blocked_by.claim_token==$holder.claim.token and
           $x.payload.blocked_by.worker_pid==$holder.claim.worker_pid and
           $x.payload.blocked_by.worker_start_token==$holder.claim.worker_start_token and
           $x.payload.blocked_by.status==$holder.status and
           $p.event_hash==$x.payload.blocked_by.proof_event_hash and
           $p.sequence==$x.payload.blocked_by.proof_event_id and
           $p.type==$x.payload.blocked_by.proof_event_type and
           $p.payload.id==$holder.id and $p.payload.token==$holder.claim.token and
           $p.at<=($x.payload.due_at) and
           (if $holder.status=="running" then
              $p.type=="queue_activate" and
              ($holder.claim.expires_at|type)=="number" and
              $holder.claim.expires_at>=$x.payload.coverage_until and
              $x.payload.blocked_by.observed_start_token==$holder.claim.worker_start_token
            elif $holder.status=="complete" then
              $p.type=="queue_complete" and
              $x.payload.blocked_by.observed_start_token==null
            else false end)' "$output.base" >/dev/null; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.deadlines[$x.payload.item_id].satisfied_at=$x.payload.due_at |
          .audit.deadlines[$x.payload.item_id].satisfied_event_id=$x.sequence |
          .audit.deadlines[$x.payload.item_id].satisfied_event_hash=$x.event_hash |
          .audit.deadlines[$x.payload.item_id].blocked_by=
            ($x.payload.blocked_by+{evidence_event_id:$x.sequence,evidence_event_hash:$x.event_hash}) |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+
            [$x.event_hash,$x.payload.blocked_by.proof_event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      else
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          .audit.deadline_block_conflicts += [$event[0].event_hash]' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      fi
      rm -f "$proof"
      mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      ;;
    resource_blocked)
      proof=$RUNTIME_DIR/.resource-block-proof.$$.json
      proof_hash=$(jq -r '.payload.blocked_by.activate_event_hash//""' "$event")
      proof_source=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$proof_hash" 2>/dev/null || true)
      actual_token=$(runtime_start_token \
        "$(jq -r '.payload.blocked_by.worker_pid//0' "$event")" 2>/dev/null || true)
      if [ -n "$proof_source" ] && [ -f "$proof_source" ] && [ ! -L "$proof_source" ] &&
         jq -Sc . "$proof_source" >"$proof" &&
         jq -e --arg actual_token "$actual_token" --slurpfile event "$event" \
           --slurpfile proof "$proof" '
           ($event[0]) as $x | ($proof[0]) as $p |
           (.audit.deadlines[$x.payload.item_id]//null) as $deadline |
           ([.queue.items[]|select(.id==$x.payload.item_id)]|
             if length==1 then .[0] else null end) as $blocked |
           ([.queue.items[]|select(.id==$x.payload.blocked_by.item_id)]|
             if length==1 then .[0] else null end) as $holder |
           def group($item):
             if (($item.args.actor//null)|type)=="string" and
                (($item.args.reason//null)|type)=="string" and
                (($item.args.strategy_generation//null)|type)=="number" then
               {actor:$item.args.actor,reason:$item.args.reason,
                 strategy_generation:$item.args.strategy_generation}
             else null end;
           $deadline!=null and $deadline.satisfied_at==null and
           $deadline.due_at<=$x.payload.from and
           ($x.payload.from|type)=="number" and ($x.payload.to|type)=="number" and
           $x.payload.from<$x.payload.to and $x.at>=$x.payload.to and
           ($x.payload.resource|type)=="string" and ($x.payload.resource|length)>0 and
           $blocked!=null and ($blocked.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and
           ($blocked.resource_locks|index($x.payload.resource))!=null and
           $holder!=null and $holder.id!=$blocked.id and $holder.status=="running" and
           ($holder.resource_locks|index($x.payload.resource))!=null and
           (group($blocked)==null or group($holder)==null or
             group($blocked)!=group($holder)) and
           $holder.claim.token==$x.payload.blocked_by.claim_token and
           $holder.claim.worker_pid==$x.payload.blocked_by.worker_pid and
           $holder.claim.worker_start_token==$x.payload.blocked_by.worker_start_token and
           $actual_token==$holder.claim.worker_start_token and
           ($holder.claim.expires_at|type)=="number" and
           $holder.claim.expires_at>=$x.payload.to and
           $x.payload.blocked_by.observed_start_token==$actual_token and
           $p.event_hash==$x.payload.blocked_by.activate_event_hash and
           $p.sequence==$x.payload.blocked_by.activate_event_id and
           $p.type=="queue_activate" and $p.payload.id==$holder.id and
           $p.payload.token==$holder.claim.token and $p.at<=$x.payload.from' \
           "$output.base" >/dev/null; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          if any(.audit.resource_blocks[];.event_hash==$x.event_hash) then .
          else .audit.resource_blocks += [{item_id:$x.payload.item_id,
            from:$x.payload.from,to:$x.payload.to,resource:$x.payload.resource,
            blocked_by:$x.payload.blocked_by,event_id:$x.sequence,event_hash:$x.event_hash}] end |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+
            [$x.event_hash,$x.payload.blocked_by.activate_event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      else
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          .audit.resource_block_conflicts += [$event[0].event_hash]' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      fi
      rm -f "$proof"
      mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      ;;
    queue_activate|queue_complete|queue_fail|queue_reclaim|queue_recovered)
      id=$(jq -r '.payload.id // .payload.item_id // ""' "$event")
      if [ -n "$id" ] && jq -e --arg id "$id" '.audit.deadlines[$id]!=null' "$output.base" >/dev/null; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" --arg id "$id" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          if .audit.deadlines[$id].satisfied_at==null or
             $x.at<.audit.deadlines[$id].satisfied_at then
            .audit.deadlines[$id].satisfied_at=$x.at |
            .audit.deadlines[$id].satisfied_event_id=$x.sequence |
            .audit.deadlines[$id].satisfied_event_hash=$x.event_hash
          else . end |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+[$x.event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
        mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      fi
      ;;
    recovery_proof)
      key=$(jq -r '.payload.cause_event_hash+"|"+.payload.recovery' "$event")
      prior=$(jq -c --arg key "$key" '.audit.recovery_pairs[$key]//null' "$output.base")
      if [ "$prior" = null ]; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" --arg key "$key" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.recovery_pairs[$key]={
            cause_event_id:$x.payload.cause_event_id,
            cause_event_hash:$x.payload.cause_event_hash,
            recovery:$x.payload.recovery,evidence_path:$x.payload.evidence_path,
            evidence_hash:$x.payload.evidence_hash,recovery_event_id:$x.sequence,
            recovery_event_hash:$x.event_hash} |
          .audit.recovery_results[$x.action_id]={
            status:"accepted",key:$key,evidence_hash:$x.payload.evidence_hash} |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+
            [$x.payload.cause_event_hash,$x.event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      elif [ "$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .evidence_hash)" = \
             "$(jq -r .payload.evidence_hash "$event")" ]; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" --arg key "$key" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.recovery_results[$x.action_id]={
            status:"accepted",key:$key,evidence_hash:$x.payload.evidence_hash,
            idempotent:true}' "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      else
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" --arg key "$key" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.recovery_results[$x.action_id]={
            status:"rejected",key:$key,reason:"conflicting_recovery_evidence",
            evidence_hash:$x.payload.evidence_hash}' "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      fi
      mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      ;;
    audit_interval)
      from=$(jq -r .payload.from "$event"); to=$(jq -r .payload.to "$event")
      expected=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-expected.$$.json; interval_valid=1
      case $from:$to in *[!0-9:]*) interval_valid=0;;
      *) if [ "$from" -ge 0 ] && [ "$to" -le 21600 ] && [ "$to" -gt "$from" ]; then
           polylane_audit_recompute_interval "$output.base" "$from" "$to" "$expected"
           jq -e --slurpfile expected "$expected" '
             .payload.source_event_cursor==(.sequence-1) and
             (.payload|del(.source_event_cursor))==$expected[0]' "$event" >/dev/null || {
               interval_valid=0; }
         else interval_valid=0; fi;; esac
      rm -f "$expected"
      if [ "$interval_valid" -eq 0 ]; then
        jq --arg key "invalid:$(jq -r .sequence "$event")" \
          '.audit.interval_conflicts=((.audit.interval_conflicts//[])+[$key])' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      else
        key=$(jq -r '(.payload.from|tostring)+":"+(.payload.to|tostring)' "$event")
        prior=$(jq -c --arg key "$key" '.audit.intervals[$key]//null' "$output.base")
        if [ "$prior" = null ]; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" --arg key "$key" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.intervals[$key]=($x.payload+{event_id:$x.sequence,event_hash:$x.event_hash}) |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+[$x.event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
        elif [ "$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -Sc 'del(.event_id,.event_hash)')" = \
             "$(jq -Sc .payload "$event")" ]; then
        cp "$output.base" "$output.next"
        else
        jq --arg key "$key" '.audit.interval_conflicts=((.audit.interval_conflicts//[])+[$key])' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
        fi
      fi
      mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      ;;
  esac
  mv -f "$output.base" "$output"
}
~~~

Apply the observer after every typed/ordinary event application, so early returns cannot
bypass it. Source the observer before acquiring the reducer lock: a `RETURN` trap also fires
when a sourced file returns, so sourcing it after installing the lock-release trap would
prematurely unlock the reducer.

~~~diff
--- a/core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-reducer.sh
+++ b/core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-reducer.sh
@@
+  . "$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd -P)/polylane-runtime-audit-reducer.sh"
   lock=$RUNTIME_DIR/reducer.lock
   runtime_lock_acquire "$lock"
   trap 'runtime_lock_release "$lock"' RETURN
@@
     runtime_apply_event "$work/state.json" "$event" "$work/next.json"
-    mv "$work/next.json" "$work/state.json"
+    polylane_audit_observe_event "$work/next.json" "$event" "$work/audited.json" \
+      "$work/state.json"
+    mv "$work/audited.json" "$work/state.json"
~~~

Update compaction so it never deletes an event whose event_hash is in
state.audit.pinned_event_hashes. Before pruning a pinned raw event, copy it temp-first to
<runtime>/pinned-events/<sha256hex>.json, verify the copy hash and event_hash, chmod 0400,
then atomically rename. Checkpoints include the sorted pinned hash list and its hash.
Replay verifies those copies and restores the same audit maps byte-for-byte.

Add this complete helper to core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-retention.sh and call it
under the compaction lock before the raw-event prune:

~~~bash
runtime_pin_audit_events() {
  local state root list files hash destination mode source candidate temporary sequence previous
  local file_hash manifest_hash checkpoint_pins
  state=$1
  root=$RUNTIME_DIR/pinned-events
  [ ! -L "$root" ] || return 5
  mkdir -p "$root"; chmod 700 "$root"
  list=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-pins.$$.json
  jq -Sc '.audit.pinned_event_hashes|sort|unique' "$state" >"$list"
  files=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-pin-files.$$.json; printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$files"
  while IFS= read -r hash; do
    printf '%s\n' "$hash" | grep -Eq '^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$' || {
      rm -f "$list" "$files"; return 5; }
    destination=$root/${hash#sha256:}.json
    if [ -f "$destination" ]; then
      mode=$(stat -f '%Lp' "$destination" 2>/dev/null ||
        stat -c '%a' "$destination" 2>/dev/null)
      [ ! -L "$destination" ] && [ "$mode" = 400 ] &&
        [ "$(jq -r .event_hash "$destination")" = "$hash" ] || {
          rm -f "$list" "$files"; return 5; }
    else
      source=''
      for candidate in "$RUNTIME_DIR"/events/*.json; do
        [ -f "$candidate" ] && [ ! -L "$candidate" ] || continue
        [ "$(jq -r .event_hash "$candidate")" = "$hash" ] || continue
        [ -z "$source" ] || { rm -f "$list" "$files"; return 5; }
        source=$candidate
      done
      [ -n "$source" ] || { rm -f "$list" "$files"; return 5; }
      temporary=$root/.pin.$$.${hash#sha256:}
      cp "$source" "$temporary"
      sequence=$(jq -r .sequence "$temporary")
      previous=$(jq -r '.previous_event_hash//""' "$temporary")
      runtime_verify_event_file "$temporary" "$sequence" "$previous" || {
        rm -f "$temporary" "$list" "$files"; return 5; }
      [ "$(jq -r .event_hash "$temporary")" = "$hash" ] || {
        rm -f "$temporary" "$list" "$files"; return 5; }
      chmod 400 "$temporary"; mv -f "$temporary" "$destination"
    fi
    file_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$destination")
    jq --arg event_hash "$hash" --arg basename "$(basename "$destination")" \
      --arg file_hash "$file_hash" \
      '.+[{event_hash:$event_hash,basename:$basename,file_hash:$file_hash,mode:400}]' \
      "$files" >"$files.next"; mv -f "$files.next" "$files"
  done < <(jq -r '.[]' "$list")
  manifest_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$list")
  checkpoint_pins=$RUNTIME_DIR/.checkpoint-pins.$$.json
  jq -n --arg hash "$manifest_hash" --slurpfile pins "$list" --slurpfile files "$files" \
    '{schema_version:1,pinned_event_hashes:$pins[0],
      pinned_event_hashes_hash:$hash,files:$files[0]}' >"$checkpoint_pins"
  chmod 400 "$checkpoint_pins"
  chmod 500 "$root"
  RUNTIME_AUDIT_PIN_MANIFEST=$checkpoint_pins
  rm -f "$list" "$files"
}
~~~

Apply this exact retention/checkpoint integration after appending the helper above. The
patch makes the checkpoint audit object content-addressed, verifies its one-to-one pin
manifest, replays retained events through the same audit observer, and installs the pin
manifest before any raw event can be pruned:

~~~diff
--- a/core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-retention.sh
+++ b/core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-retention.sh
@@ -13,6 +13,54 @@
   done
   [ -z "$latest" ] || printf '%s\n' "$latest"
 }
+runtime_verify_checkpoint_audit() {
+  local checkpoint canonical list expected root row event_hash basename file_hash mode
+  checkpoint=$1
+  jq -e '
+    (.audit_pins|keys|sort)==
+      ["files","pinned_event_hashes","pinned_event_hashes_hash","schema_version"] and
+    .audit_pins.schema_version==1 and
+    (.audit_pins.pinned_event_hashes|type=="array") and
+    (.audit_pins.files|type=="array") and
+    (.audit_state_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
+    .state.audit.pinned_event_hashes==.audit_pins.pinned_event_hashes' \
+    "$checkpoint" >/dev/null || return 5
+  canonical=$RUNTIME_DIR/.checkpoint-audit.$$.json
+  list=$RUNTIME_DIR/.checkpoint-audit-pins.$$.json
+  jq -Sc '.state.audit' "$checkpoint" >"$canonical"
+  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$canonical")" = "$(jq -r .audit_state_hash "$checkpoint")" ] || {
+    rm -f "$canonical" "$list"; return 5; }
+  jq -Sc '.audit_pins.pinned_event_hashes|sort|unique' "$checkpoint" >"$list"
+  expected=$(jq -r .audit_pins.pinned_event_hashes_hash "$checkpoint")
+  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$list")" = "$expected" ] || {
+    rm -f "$canonical" "$list"; return 5; }
+  jq -e '
+    (.audit_pins.pinned_event_hashes|sort|unique)==.audit_pins.pinned_event_hashes and
+    (.audit_pins.files|length)==(.audit_pins.pinned_event_hashes|length) and
+    ([.audit_pins.files[].event_hash]|sort|unique)==.audit_pins.pinned_event_hashes and
+    ([.audit_pins.files[].basename]|unique|length)==(.audit_pins.files|length)' \
+    "$checkpoint" >/dev/null || { rm -f "$canonical" "$list"; return 5; }
+  root=$RUNTIME_DIR/pinned-events
+  [ -d "$root" ] && [ ! -L "$root" ] || { rm -f "$canonical" "$list"; return 5; }
+  while IFS=$'\t' read -r event_hash basename file_hash mode; do
+    case $event_hash:$basename:$file_hash:$mode in
+      sha256:[0-9a-f][0-9a-f]*:[0-9a-f][0-9a-f]*.json:sha256:[0-9a-f][0-9a-f]*:400) :;;
+      *) rm -f "$canonical" "$list"; return 5;;
+    esac
+    [ "$basename" = "${event_hash#sha256:}.json" ] || {
+      rm -f "$canonical" "$list"; return 5; }
+    row=$root/$basename
+    [ -f "$row" ] && [ ! -L "$row" ] || { rm -f "$canonical" "$list"; return 5; }
+    [ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$row" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$row")" = 400 ] &&
+      [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$row")" = "$file_hash" ] &&
+      [ "$(jq -r .event_hash "$row")" = "$event_hash" ] || {
+        rm -f "$canonical" "$list"; return 5; }
+    runtime_verify_event_file "$row" "$(jq -r .sequence "$row")" \
+      "$(jq -r '.previous_event_hash//""' "$row")" || {
+        rm -f "$canonical" "$list"; return 5; }
+  done < <(jq -r '.audit_pins.files[]|[.event_hash,.basename,.file_hash,.mode]|@tsv' "$checkpoint")
+  rm -f "$canonical" "$list"
+}
 runtime_verify_checkpoint() {
   local checkpoint expected state_hash
   checkpoint=$1
@@ -24,6 +72,7 @@
   [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$RUNTIME_DIR/.checkpoint-state.$$")" = "$state_hash" ] || {
     rm -f "$RUNTIME_DIR/.checkpoint-state.$$"; return 5; }

 }

   done < <(find "$RUNTIME_DIR/events" -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.json' | LC_ALL=C sort)
   revision=$((cursor + 1))
@@ -100,6 +150,7 @@
~~~

once. A pinned copy is accepted only through `runtime_verify_checkpoint_audit`; a pin
without the verified checkpoint tuple is never evidence.

Create `core/tests/test-audit-deadline-boundaries.sh` with this complete body:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
BIN=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/../scripts" && pwd -P)
TMP=$(mktemp -d "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/polylane-deadlines.XXXXXX")
trap 'rm -rf "$TMP"' EXIT
export RUNTIME_DIR=$TMP/runtime
mkdir -p "$RUNTIME_DIR"
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-reducer.sh"
fail() { printf 'FAIL %s\n' "$*" >&2; exit 1; }
progress() { printf 'PROGRESS %s\n' "$*"; }
[ "$(polylane_audit_deadline_end '' 20)" = 20 ] || fail empty
[ "$(polylane_audit_deadline_end null 20)" = 20 ] || fail null
[ "$(polylane_audit_deadline_end 12 20)" = 12 ] || fail early
[ "$(polylane_audit_deadline_end 25 20)" = 20 ] || fail late
if polylane_audit_deadline_end malformed 20 >/dev/null 2>&1; then fail malformed; fi
jq -n '{audit:{coverage_facts:[
    {kind:"guardian",valid_from:0,valid_until:20},
    {kind:"goal_work",valid_from:0,valid_until:20}],
  deadlines:{empty:{due_at:10,satisfied_at:null},
    early:{due_at:10,satisfied_at:12},late:{due_at:10,satisfied_at:25}}}}' >"$TMP/state.json"
polylane_audit_recompute_interval "$TMP/state.json" 0 20 "$TMP/result.json"
jq -e '.gaps==[
    {from:10,to:12,missed_deadline:"early"},
    {from:10,to:20,missed_deadline:"empty"},
    {from:10,to:20,missed_deadline:"late"}] and
  .unexplained_gap==10 and .total_unexplained==22' "$TMP/result.json" >/dev/null ||
  fail recompute
printf 'PASS audit-deadline-boundaries\n'
~~~

~~~bash
bash core/tests/test-audit-deadline-boundaries.sh
~~~
