Create core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-audit.sh:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
AUDIT_LIB=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd -P)
AUDIT_BIN=$(cd "$AUDIT_LIB/.." && pwd -P)
. "$AUDIT_LIB/polylane-runtime-audit-reducer.sh"
runtime_audit_mode() {
  stat -f '%Lp' "$1" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$1" 2>/dev/null
}
runtime_audit_file_under() {
  local root parent file
  root=$(cd "$1" && pwd -P) || return 5
  [ -f "$2" ] && [ ! -L "$2" ] || return 5
  parent=$(cd "$(dirname "$2")" && pwd -P) || return 5
  file=$parent/$(basename "$2")
  case "$file" in "$root"/*) printf '%s\n' "$file";; *) return 5;; esac
}
runtime_audit_event_by_hash() {
  local hash candidate expected previous checkpoint
  hash=$1
  printf '%s\n' "$hash" | grep -Eq '^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$' || return 5
  for candidate in "$RUNTIME_DIR"/events/*.json; do
    [ -f "$candidate" ] && [ ! -L "$candidate" ] || continue
    [ "$(jq -r .event_hash "$candidate")" = "$hash" ] || continue
    expected=$(jq -r .sequence "$candidate")
    previous=$(jq -r '.previous_event_hash//""' "$candidate")
    runtime_verify_event_file "$candidate" "$expected" "$previous" || return 5
    printf '%s\n' "$candidate"
    return
  done
  candidate=$RUNTIME_DIR/pinned-events/${hash#sha256:}.json
  [ -f "$candidate" ] && [ ! -L "$candidate" ] || return 5
  expected=$(jq -r .sequence "$candidate")
  previous=$(jq -r '.previous_event_hash//""' "$candidate")
  runtime_verify_event_file "$candidate" "$expected" "$previous" || return 5
  [ "$(jq -r .event_hash "$candidate")" = "$hash" ] || return 5
  checkpoint=$(runtime_latest_checkpoint); [ -n "$checkpoint" ] || return 5
  if [ "${RUNTIME_AUDIT_VERIFIED_CHECKPOINT:-}" != "$checkpoint" ]; then
    runtime_verify_checkpoint "$checkpoint" || return 5
    RUNTIME_AUDIT_VERIFIED_CHECKPOINT=$checkpoint
  fi
  jq -e --arg event_hash "$hash" --arg basename "$(basename "$candidate")" \
    --arg file_hash "$(runtime_sha256 "$candidate")" '
    [.audit_pins.files[]|select(.event_hash==$event_hash and
      .basename==$basename and .file_hash==$file_hash and .mode==400)]|length==1' \
    "$checkpoint" >/dev/null || return 5
  printf '%s\n' "$candidate"
}
runtime_audit_seal() {
  local root source lock hash destination
  root=$1 source=$2
  [ ! -L "$root" ] || return 5
  lock=$root.lock
  runtime_lock_acquire "$lock" || return $?
  trap 'chmod 500 "$root" 2>/dev/null || true; runtime_lock_release "$lock" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true' RETURN
  mkdir -p "$root"; chmod 700 "$root"
  [ -f "$source" ] && [ ! -L "$source" ] || return 5
  jq -Sc . "$source" >"$root/.seal.$$.json"
  hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$root/.seal.$$.json")
  destination=$root/${hash#sha256:}.json
  if [ -f "$destination" ]; then
    [ ! -L "$destination" ] && [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$destination")" = "$hash" ] &&
      [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$destination")" = 400 ] || return 5
    rm -f "$root/.seal.$$.json"
  else
    chmod 400 "$root/.seal.$$.json"; mv -f "$root/.seal.$$.json" "$destination"
  fi
  chmod 500 "$root"
  runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN
  printf '%s\n' "$destination"
}
runtime_audit_validate_sealed() {
  local root file expected
  root=$1 file=$2 expected=$3
  file=$(runtime_audit_file_under "$root" "$file") || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$file")" = 400 ] || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$file")" = "$expected" ] || return 5
  [ "$(basename "$file" .json)" = "${expected#sha256:}" ] || return 5
  printf '%s\n' "$file"
}
runtime_goal_active_domain() {
  local state output now
  state=$1; output=$2
  [ -f "$state" ] && [ ! -L "$state" ] || return 5
  now=$(runtime_now)
  jq -Sc --argjson now "$now" '
    {goal_candidates:([.queue.items[]? |
        select(((.status=="starting" or .status=="running") and .claim!=null) or
          ((.status=="ready" or .status=="scheduled") and .claim==null and
            .next_action_at<=$now)) |
        {id,goal_ref,status,priority,next_action_at,
          claim_token:(.claim.token//null)}] | sort_by(.id)),
      recovery:(if .recovery==null then null else
        {goal_ref:(.recovery.goal_ref//"runtime-recovery"),
          event_hash:.recovery.event_hash} end)}' "$state" >"$output" || return 5
  [ -s "$output" ] && [ ! -L "$output" ] || return 5
}
runtime_goal_snapshot_validate() {
  local path expected_hash expected_sequence domain_hash snapshots parent revision actual_domain
  path=$1; expected_hash=$2; expected_sequence=$3; domain_hash=$4; actual_domain=$5
  snapshots=$(cd "$RUNTIME_DIR/snapshots" && pwd -P) || return 5
  parent=$(cd "$(dirname "$path")" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P) || return 5
  revision=$(basename "$parent")
  case $revision in ''|*[!0-9]*) return 5;; esac
  [ "$path" = "$snapshots/$revision/state.json" ] &&
    [ -f "$path" ] && [ ! -L "$path" ] || return 5
  printf '%s\n' "$expected_hash" | grep -Eq '^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$' || return 5
  printf '%s\n' "$domain_hash" | grep -Eq '^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$' || return 5
  case $expected_sequence in ''|*[!0-9]*) return 5;; esac
  [ "$revision" -eq $((expected_sequence + 1)) ] || return 5
  [ "$(jq -er '.last_event_sequence|select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0)' "$path")" = \
    "$expected_sequence" ] || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$path")" = "$expected_hash" ] || return 5
  runtime_goal_active_domain "$path" "$actual_domain" || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$actual_domain")" = "$domain_hash" ] || return 5
}
runtime_goal_observation_matches() {
  local state observation now claim proof_hash proof item_id
  state=$1 observation=$2 now=$3
  claim=$(jq -r '.active.claim_token//""' "$observation")
  if [ -n "$claim" ]; then
    jq -e --argjson now "$now" --slurpfile observation "$observation" '
      $observation[0].active.recovery_event_hash==null and
      any(.queue.items[];
        .id==$observation[0].active.item_id and
        .goal_ref==$observation[0].active.goal_ref and
        (.status|IN("starting","running")) and
        .claim.token==$observation[0].active.claim_token)' "$state" >/dev/null
    return
  fi
  jq -e --argjson now "$now" --slurpfile observation "$observation" '
    ($observation[0].active.recovery_event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    any(.queue.items[];
      .id==$observation[0].active.item_id and
      .goal_ref==$observation[0].active.goal_ref and
      (.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and .claim==null and .next_action_at<=$now)' \
    "$state" >/dev/null || return 5
  proof_hash=$(jq -r .active.recovery_event_hash "$observation")
  proof=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$proof_hash" 2>/dev/null) || return 5
  item_id=$(jq -r .active.item_id "$observation")
  jq -e --arg hash "$proof_hash" --arg id "$item_id" --argjson now "$now" '
    .event_hash==$hash and .at==$now and
    ((.actor=="queue" and .type=="queue_reserve" and
      any(.payload.reservations[]?;.id==$id)) or
     (.actor=="guardian" and
      (.type|IN("dispatch_retry_exhausted","wake_requested"))))' \
    "$proof" >/dev/null
}
runtime_publish_guardian_observation() (
  local source observation input input_hash now state prior evidence_source evidence evidence_hash payload action
  local previous_at previous_hash current_identity previous_identity continuity handoff handoffs
  source=$1; evidence_source=''; payload=''; handoffs=''
  [ -f "$source" ] && [ ! -L "$source" ] || return 5
  input=$(mktemp "$RUNTIME_DIR/.guardian-publish-input.${BASHPID:-$$}.XXXXXX") || return 5
  trap 'rm -f "${input:-}" "${evidence_source:-}" "${payload:-}" "${handoffs:-}"' EXIT INT TERM HUP
  [ -f "$input" ] && [ ! -L "$input" ] && [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$input")" = 600 ] || return 5
  jq -Sc . "$source" >"$input" || return 5
  [ -s "$input" ] || return 5
  chmod 400 "$input"; input_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$input"); observation=$input
  now=$(runtime_now)
  jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
    (keys|sort)==(["identity","kind","observed_at","schema_version"]|sort) and
    .schema_version==1 and .kind=="guardian" and .observed_at==$now and
    (.identity|keys|sort)==
      (["generation","ownership_token","pid","role","start_token"]|sort) and
    .identity.role=="guardian" and (.identity.pid|type=="number" and .>0) and
    (.identity.start_token|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.identity.generation|type=="number" and .>0) and
    (.identity.ownership_token|type=="string" and length>0)' \
    "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
  runtime_reduce || return $?
  [ -f "$observation" ] && [ ! -L "$observation" ] && [ -s "$observation" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$observation")" = 400 ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$observation")" = "$input_hash" ] || return 5
  jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
    .schema_version==1 and .kind=="guardian" and .observed_at==$now and
    .identity.role=="guardian"' "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  prior=$(jq -c '.audit.last_guardian_observation//null' "$state")
  if [ "$prior" != null ]; then
    previous_at=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .observed_at)
    # Same-tick repetition has no positive interval: do not seal or emit duplicates.
    [ "$previous_at" -ne "$now" ] || return 76
    [ "$previous_at" -lt "$now" ] || return 5
  fi
  evidence_source=$(mktemp "$RUNTIME_DIR/.guardian-evidence.${BASHPID:-$$}.XXXXXX") || return 5
  [ -f "$evidence_source" ] && [ ! -L "$evidence_source" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$evidence_source")" = 600 ] || return 5
  if [ "$prior" = null ]; then
    jq -Sc . "$observation" >"$evidence_source" || return 5
    [ -s "$evidence_source" ] || return 5
    chmod 400 "$evidence_source"
    evidence=$(runtime_audit_seal "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" "$evidence_source") || {
      rm -f "$evidence_source"; return 5; }
    [ -s "$evidence" ] && [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$evidence")" = 400 ] || return 5
    evidence_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$evidence")
    payload=$RUNTIME_DIR/.guardian-observed.$$.json
    jq -n --arg path "$evidence" --arg hash "$evidence_hash" \
      --slurpfile evidence "$evidence" '
      {kind:"guardian",observed_at:$evidence[0].observed_at,
        evidence_path:$path,evidence_hash:$hash,identity:$evidence[0].identity}' >"$payload"
    action="guardian-observed:$now:${evidence_hash#sha256:}"
    runtime_emit audit guardian_observed "$action" --fingerprint "$evidence_hash" \
      --payload-file "$payload"
  else
    previous_hash=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .event_hash)
    current_identity=$(jq -c .identity "$observation")
    previous_identity=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -c .identity)
    continuity=same_identity; handoff=null
    if [ "$current_identity" != "$previous_identity" ]; then
      handoffs=$RUNTIME_DIR/.guardian-handoffs.$$.json
      jq --argjson old "$previous_identity" --argjson new "$current_identity" \
        --argjson from "$previous_at" --argjson to "$now" '
        [.audit.postconditions[]|select(.type=="actor_restarted" and
          .old_identity==$old and .new_identity==$new and
          .handoff_at>=$from and .handoff_at<=$to)]' "$state" >"$handoffs"
      [ "$(jq 'length' "$handoffs")" -eq 1 ] || {
        rm -f "$handoffs" "$evidence_source"; return 5; }
      continuity=actor_restarted; handoff=$(jq -r '.[0].event_hash' "$handoffs")
      rm -f "$handoffs"
    fi
    jq -Sc --arg previous "$previous_hash" --arg continuity "$continuity" \
      --argjson handoff "$(if [ "$handoff" = null ]; then printf null; else jq -Rn --arg x "$handoff" '$x'; fi)" \
      --argjson from "$previous_at" --argjson until "$now" \
      '.+{previous_event_hash:$previous,continuity:$continuity,
        handoff_event_hash:$handoff,valid_from:$from,valid_until:$until}' \
      "$observation" >"$evidence_source" || return 5
    [ -s "$evidence_source" ] || return 5
    chmod 400 "$evidence_source"
    evidence=$(runtime_audit_seal "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" "$evidence_source") || {
      rm -f "$evidence_source"; return 5; }
    [ -s "$evidence" ] && [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$evidence")" = 400 ] || return 5
    evidence_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$evidence")
    payload=$RUNTIME_DIR/.guardian-coverage.$$.json
    jq -n --arg path "$evidence" --arg hash "$evidence_hash" \
      --slurpfile evidence "$evidence" '
      {kind:"guardian",observed_at:$evidence[0].observed_at,
        valid_from:$evidence[0].valid_from,valid_until:$evidence[0].valid_until,
        evidence_path:$path,evidence_hash:$hash,identity:$evidence[0].identity,
        previous_event_hash:$evidence[0].previous_event_hash,
        continuity:$evidence[0].continuity,
        handoff_event_hash:$evidence[0].handoff_event_hash}' >"$payload"
    action="guardian-coverage:$previous_at:$now:${evidence_hash#sha256:}"
    runtime_emit audit work_coverage "$action" --fingerprint "$evidence_hash" \
      --payload-file "$payload"
  fi
  rm -f "$payload" "$evidence_source"
  return 0
)
runtime_publish_goal_observation() (
  local source observation input input_hash now state evidence_source evidence evidence_hash prior payload type action
  local previous_at source_state source_hash source_sequence domain_hash source_domain current_domain
  local prior_evidence prior_evidence_path prior_evidence_hash prior_identity current_identity
  local test_marker
  source=$1; evidence_source=''; payload=''
  [ -f "$source" ] && [ ! -L "$source" ] || return 5
  input=$(mktemp "$RUNTIME_DIR/.goal-publish-input.${BASHPID:-$$}.XXXXXX") || return 5
  trap 'rm -f "${input:-}" "${evidence_source:-}" "${payload:-}"' EXIT INT TERM HUP
  [ -f "$input" ] && [ ! -L "$input" ] && [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$input")" = 600 ] || return 5
  jq -Sc . "$source" >"$input" || return 5
  [ -s "$input" ] || return 5
  chmod 400 "$input"; input_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$input"); observation=$input
  now=$(runtime_now)
  jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
    (keys|sort)==["active","active_domain_hash","kind","observed_at",
      "schema_version","source_snapshot"] and
    .schema_version==1 and .kind=="goal_work" and .observed_at==$now and
    (.active|keys|sort)==["claim_token","goal_ref","item_id","mode",
      "recovery_event_hash"] and
    (.source_snapshot|keys|sort)==["hash","path","sequence"] and
    (.source_snapshot.path|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
    (.source_snapshot.hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.source_snapshot.sequence|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0) and
    (.active_domain_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.active.mode|IN("goal","recovery")) and
    (.active.goal_ref|type=="string" and length>0)' "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
  source_state=$(jq -r .source_snapshot.path "$observation")
  source_hash=$(jq -r .source_snapshot.hash "$observation")
  source_sequence=$(jq -r .source_snapshot.sequence "$observation")
  domain_hash=$(jq -r .active_domain_hash "$observation")
  source_domain=$(mktemp "$RUNTIME_DIR/.goal-source-domain.${BASHPID:-$$}.XXXXXX") || return 5
  current_domain=$(mktemp "$RUNTIME_DIR/.goal-current-domain.${BASHPID:-$$}.XXXXXX") || return 5
  trap 'rm -f "${input:-}" "${evidence_source:-}" "${payload:-}" \
    "${source_domain:-}" "${current_domain:-}"' EXIT INT TERM HUP
  runtime_goal_snapshot_validate "$source_state" "$source_hash" "$source_sequence" \
    "$domain_hash" "$source_domain" || return 5
  if [ "$(jq -r .active.mode "$observation")" = goal ]; then
    runtime_goal_observation_matches "$source_state" "$observation" "$now" || return 5
  else
    jq -e --slurpfile observation "$observation" '
      .recovery!=null and
      .recovery.event_hash==$observation[0].active.recovery_event_hash' "$source_state" >/dev/null || return 5
  fi
  runtime_reduce || return $?
  [ -f "$observation" ] && [ ! -L "$observation" ] && [ -s "$observation" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$observation")" = 400 ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$observation")" = "$input_hash" ] || return 5
  jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
    .schema_version==1 and .kind=="goal_work" and .observed_at==$now and
    (.active_domain_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
  runtime_goal_snapshot_validate "$source_state" "$source_hash" "$source_sequence" \
    "$domain_hash" "$source_domain" || return 5
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  runtime_goal_active_domain "$state" "$current_domain" || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$current_domain")" = "$domain_hash" ] || return 77
  if [ "$(jq -r .active.mode "$observation")" = goal ]; then
    runtime_goal_observation_matches "$state" "$observation" "$now" || return 5
  else
    jq -e --slurpfile observation "$observation" '
      .recovery!=null and
      .recovery.event_hash==$observation[0].active.recovery_event_hash' "$state" >/dev/null || return 5
  fi
  if [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] &&
     [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT:-}" = goal-observation-publisher-error ]; then
    test_marker=${POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_PUBLISHER_GATE_MARKER:-}
    if [ -n "$test_marker" ]; then
      case $test_marker in "$RUNTIME_DIR"/*) :;; *) return 5;; esac
      [ ! -e "$test_marker" ] && [ ! -L "$test_marker" ] || return 5
      jq -Scn --argjson observed_at "$now" --arg active_domain_hash "$domain_hash" \
        '{schema_version:1,gate:"goal_observation_publisher_error",
          observed_at:$observed_at,active_domain_hash:$active_domain_hash}' \
        >"$test_marker.tmp.$$" || return 5
      chmod 400 "$test_marker.tmp.$$"
      mv -f "$test_marker.tmp.$$" "$test_marker" || return 5
    fi
    return 5
  fi
  prior=$(jq -c '.audit.last_goal_observation//null' "$state")
  if [ "$prior" != null ]; then
    previous_at=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .observed_at)
    prior_evidence_path=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .evidence_path)
    prior_evidence_hash=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .evidence_hash)
    prior_evidence=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" \
      "$prior_evidence_path" "$prior_evidence_hash") || return 5
    prior_identity=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -c .identity)
    jq -e --argjson previous_at "$previous_at" --argjson identity "$prior_identity" '
      .schema_version==1 and .kind=="goal_work" and .observed_at==$previous_at and
      (.active|{mode,goal_ref})==$identity' "$prior_evidence" >/dev/null || return 5
    # Same-tick repetition is an explicit no-op, never zero-width coverage.
    [ "$previous_at" -ne "$now" ] || return 76
    [ "$previous_at" -lt "$now" ] || return 5
  fi
  evidence_source=$(mktemp "$RUNTIME_DIR/.goal-evidence.${BASHPID:-$$}.XXXXXX") || return 5
  [ -f "$evidence_source" ] && [ ! -L "$evidence_source" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$evidence_source")" = 600 ] || return 5
  jq -Sc . "$observation" >"$evidence_source" || return 5
  [ -s "$evidence_source" ] || return 5
  chmod 400 "$evidence_source"
  evidence=$(runtime_audit_seal "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" "$evidence_source") || {
    rm -f "$evidence_source"; return 5; }
  [ -s "$evidence" ] && [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$evidence")" = 400 ] || return 5
  evidence_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$evidence")
  if [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] &&
     [ -n "${POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_AFTER_EVIDENCE_GATE:-}" ] &&
     mkdir "$POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_AFTER_EVIDENCE_GATE.once" 2>/dev/null; then
    : >"$POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_AFTER_EVIDENCE_GATE.ready"
    while [ ! -f "$POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_AFTER_EVIDENCE_GATE.release" ]; do sleep 0.01; done
  fi
  runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" \
    "$evidence" "$evidence_hash" >/dev/null || return 5
  payload=$RUNTIME_DIR/.goal-work.$$.json
  if [ "$prior" = null ]; then
    jq -n --arg path "$evidence" --arg hash "$evidence_hash" --slurpfile evidence "$evidence" '
      {kind:"goal_work",observed_at:$evidence[0].observed_at,
        evidence_path:$path,evidence_hash:$hash,
        identity:($evidence[0].active|{mode,goal_ref})}' >"$payload"
    type=goal_work_observed; action="goal-observed:$now:${evidence_hash#sha256:}"
  else
    current_identity=$(jq -c '.active|{mode,goal_ref}' "$evidence")
    if jq -e --argjson prior "$prior_identity" '
        (.active|{mode,goal_ref})==$prior' "$evidence" >/dev/null; then
      jq -n --arg path "$evidence" --arg hash "$evidence_hash" \
        --arg previous "$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .event_hash)" \
        --argjson from "$previous_at" --slurpfile evidence "$evidence" '
        {kind:"goal_work",observed_at:$evidence[0].observed_at,
          valid_from:$from,valid_until:$evidence[0].observed_at,
          evidence_path:$path,evidence_hash:$hash,
          identity:($evidence[0].active|{mode,goal_ref}),previous_event_hash:$previous}' >"$payload"
      type=goal_work_coverage; action="goal-coverage:$previous_at:$now:${evidence_hash#sha256:}"
    else
      jq -n --arg current_path "$evidence" --arg current_hash "$evidence_hash" \
        --arg prior_path "$prior_evidence_path" --arg prior_hash "$prior_evidence_hash" \
        --arg previous "$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .event_hash)" \
        --argjson from "$previous_at" --argjson until "$now" \
        --argjson prior_identity "$prior_identity" --argjson current_identity "$current_identity" '
        {kind:"goal_work_transition",observed_at:$until,valid_from:$from,valid_until:$until,
          previous_event_hash:$previous,prior_identity:$prior_identity,
          prior_evidence_path:$prior_path,prior_evidence_hash:$prior_hash,
          current_identity:$current_identity,current_evidence_path:$current_path,
          current_evidence_hash:$current_hash}' >"$payload"
      type=goal_work_transition
      action="goal-transition:$previous_at:$now:${prior_evidence_hash#sha256:}:${evidence_hash#sha256:}"
    fi
  fi
  runtime_emit audit "$type" "$action" --fingerprint "$evidence_hash" --payload-file "$payload"
  rm -f "$payload" "$evidence_source"
  return 0
)
runtime_audit_validate_fact() {
  local fact resolved event evidence previous previous_evidence previous_record continuity handoff
  fact=$1
  resolved=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-resolved.$$.txt
  runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$(jq -r .event_hash "$fact")" >"$resolved" || {
    rm -f "$resolved"; return 5; }
  event=$(cat "$resolved")
  if [ "$(jq -r .kind "$fact")" = goal_work ]; then
    if [ "$(jq -r .type "$event")" = goal_work_transition ]; then
      jq -e --slurpfile fact "$fact" '
        .sequence==$fact[0].event_id and .payload.kind=="goal_work_transition" and
        .payload.valid_from==$fact[0].valid_from and
        .payload.valid_until==$fact[0].valid_until and
        .payload.current_evidence_hash==$fact[0].evidence_hash and
        .payload.current_evidence_path==$fact[0].evidence_path and
        .payload.prior_identity==$fact[0].identity and
        .payload.previous_event_hash==$fact[0].previous_event_hash and
        $fact[0].continuity=="active_goal_transition"' "$event" >/dev/null || return 5
    else
      jq -e --slurpfile fact "$fact" '
        .type=="goal_work_coverage" and .sequence==$fact[0].event_id and
        .payload.kind=="goal_work" and .payload.valid_from==$fact[0].valid_from and
        .payload.valid_until==$fact[0].valid_until and
        .payload.evidence_hash==$fact[0].evidence_hash and
        .payload.evidence_path==$fact[0].evidence_path and
        .payload.identity==$fact[0].identity and
        .payload.previous_event_hash==$fact[0].previous_event_hash and
        $fact[0].continuity=="active_goal_or_recovery"' "$event" >/dev/null || return 5
    fi
    evidence=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" \
      "$(jq -r .evidence_path "$fact")" "$(jq -r .evidence_hash "$fact")") || return 5
    jq -e --slurpfile fact "$fact" --slurpfile event "$event" '
      .schema_version==1 and .kind=="goal_work" and
      .observed_at==$fact[0].valid_until and
      (.active|{mode,goal_ref})==(if $event[0].type=="goal_work_transition" then
        $event[0].payload.current_identity else $fact[0].identity end) and
      (.active.mode|IN("goal","recovery")) and
      ((.active.item_id|type=="string" and length>0) or
       (.active.recovery_event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")))' "$evidence" >/dev/null || return 5
    runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$(jq -r .previous_event_hash "$fact")" >"$resolved" || {
      rm -f "$resolved"; return 5; }
    previous=$(cat "$resolved")
    case $(jq -r .type "$previous") in
      goal_work_observed|goal_work_coverage|goal_work_transition) :;;
      *) rm -f "$resolved"; return 5;;
    esac
    previous_record=$(jq -c '
      if .type=="goal_work_transition" then
        {identity:.payload.current_identity,path:.payload.current_evidence_path,
          hash:.payload.current_evidence_hash}
      else {identity:.payload.identity,path:.payload.evidence_path,
        hash:.payload.evidence_hash} end' "$previous")
    jq -e --argjson at "$(jq -r .valid_from "$fact")" \
      --argjson identity "$(jq -c .identity "$fact")" \
      --argjson record "$previous_record" '
      .at==$at and .event_hash!=null and $record.identity==$identity' "$previous" >/dev/null || return 5
    previous_evidence=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" \
      "$(printf '%s\n' "$previous_record" | jq -r .path)" \
      "$(printf '%s\n' "$previous_record" | jq -r .hash)") || return 5
    jq -e --argjson at "$(jq -r .valid_from "$fact")" \
      --argjson identity "$(jq -c .identity "$fact")" '
      .schema_version==1 and .kind=="goal_work" and .observed_at==$at and
      (.active|{mode,goal_ref})==$identity' "$previous_evidence" >/dev/null || return 5
    if [ "$(jq -r .type "$event")" = goal_work_transition ]; then
      jq -e --argjson record "$previous_record" '
        .payload.prior_evidence_path==$record.path and
        .payload.prior_evidence_hash==$record.hash' "$event" >/dev/null || return 5
    fi
    rm -f "$resolved"
    return 0
  fi
  jq -e --slurpfile fact "$fact" '
    .type=="work_coverage" and .sequence==$fact[0].event_id and
    .payload.kind==$fact[0].kind and .payload.valid_from==$fact[0].valid_from and
    .payload.valid_until==$fact[0].valid_until and
    .payload.observed_at==.at and .payload.evidence_hash==$fact[0].evidence_hash and
    .payload.evidence_path==$fact[0].evidence_path and
    .payload.identity==$fact[0].identity and
    .payload.previous_event_hash==$fact[0].previous_event_hash and
    .payload.continuity==$fact[0].continuity and
    .payload.handoff_event_hash==$fact[0].handoff_event_hash' "$event" >/dev/null || return 5
  evidence=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" \
    "$(jq -r .evidence_path "$fact")" "$(jq -r .evidence_hash "$fact")") || return 5
  jq -e --slurpfile fact "$fact" '
    (keys|sort)==(["continuity","handoff_event_hash","identity","kind",
      "observed_at","previous_event_hash","schema_version","valid_from",
      "valid_until"]|sort) and
    .schema_version==1 and .kind=="guardian" and
    .observed_at==$fact[0].valid_until and .valid_from==$fact[0].valid_from and
    .valid_until==$fact[0].valid_until and .identity==$fact[0].identity and
    .previous_event_hash==$fact[0].previous_event_hash and
    .continuity==$fact[0].continuity and
    .handoff_event_hash==$fact[0].handoff_event_hash' "$evidence" >/dev/null || return 5
  runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$(jq -r .previous_event_hash "$fact")" >"$resolved" || {
    rm -f "$resolved"; return 5; }
  previous=$(cat "$resolved")
  case $(jq -r .type "$previous") in guardian_observed|work_coverage) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  jq -e --slurpfile fact "$fact" '
    .event_hash==$fact[0].previous_event_hash and .at==$fact[0].valid_from and
    .payload.identity!=null and .payload.evidence_path!=null and
    .payload.evidence_hash!=null' "$previous" >/dev/null || return 5
  previous_evidence=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" \
    "$(jq -r .payload.evidence_path "$previous")" \
    "$(jq -r .payload.evidence_hash "$previous")") || return 5
  jq -e --slurpfile previous "$previous" '
    .kind=="guardian" and .observed_at==$previous[0].at and
    .identity==$previous[0].payload.identity' "$previous_evidence" >/dev/null || return 5
  continuity=$(jq -r .continuity "$fact")
  if [ "$continuity" = same_identity ]; then
    jq -e --slurpfile previous "$previous" '
      .handoff_event_hash==null and .identity==$previous[0].payload.identity' \
      "$evidence" >/dev/null || return 5
  elif [ "$continuity" = actor_restarted ]; then
    runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$(jq -r .handoff_event_hash "$fact")" >"$resolved" || {
      rm -f "$resolved"; return 5; }
    handoff=$(cat "$resolved")
    jq -e --slurpfile fact "$fact" --slurpfile previous "$previous" '
      .type=="actor_restarted" and
      .event_hash==$fact[0].handoff_event_hash and
      .payload.old_identity==$previous[0].payload.identity and
      .payload.new_identity==$fact[0].identity and
      .payload.handoff_at<=.at and
      .payload.handoff_at>=$fact[0].valid_from and
      .payload.handoff_at<=$fact[0].valid_until' "$handoff" >/dev/null || return 5
  else rm -f "$resolved"; return 5
  fi
  rm -f "$resolved"
}
runtime_audit_record_resource_blocks() {
  local state from to record id due blocked blocked_group holder holder_group resource
  local holder_id claim_token worker_pid worker_token observed proof proof_hash candidate
  local proof_at start payload action emitted
  state=$1 from=$2 to=$3 emitted=0
  while IFS= read -r record; do
    id=$(printf '%s\n' "$record" | jq -r .item_id)
    due=$(printf '%s\n' "$record" | jq -r .due_at)
    blocked=$(jq -c --arg id "$id" '
      [.queue.items[]?|select(.id==$id)]|if length==1 then .[0] else null end' "$state")
    printf '%s\n' "$blocked" | jq -e '
      .!=null and (.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and .claim==null and
      (.resource_locks|type)=="array" and (.resource_locks|length)>0' >/dev/null || continue
    blocked_group=$(printf '%s\n' "$blocked" | jq -c '
      if ((.args.actor//null)|type)=="string" and
         ((.args.reason//null)|type)=="string" and
         ((.args.strategy_generation//null)|type)=="number" then
        {actor:.args.actor,reason:.args.reason,strategy_generation:.args.strategy_generation}
      else null end')
    while IFS= read -r holder; do
      [ -n "$holder" ] || continue
      holder_id=$(printf '%s\n' "$holder" | jq -r .id)
      holder_group=$(printf '%s\n' "$holder" | jq -c '
        if ((.args.actor//null)|type)=="string" and
           ((.args.reason//null)|type)=="string" and
           ((.args.strategy_generation//null)|type)=="number" then
          {actor:.args.actor,reason:.args.reason,strategy_generation:.args.strategy_generation}
        else null end')
      [ "$blocked_group" = null ] || [ "$holder_group" = null ] ||
        [ "$blocked_group" != "$holder_group" ] || continue
      resource=$(jq -rn --argjson blocked "$(printf '%s\n' "$blocked" | jq -c .resource_locks)" \
        --argjson holder "$(printf '%s\n' "$holder" | jq -c .resource_locks)" '
        [$blocked[] as $resource|select($holder|index($resource)!=null)|$resource]|
        sort|.[0]//empty')
      [ -n "$resource" ] || continue
      claim_token=$(printf '%s\n' "$holder" | jq -r '.claim.token//""')
      worker_pid=$(printf '%s\n' "$holder" | jq -r '.claim.worker_pid//0')
      worker_token=$(printf '%s\n' "$holder" | jq -r '.claim.worker_start_token//""')
      observed=$(runtime_start_token "$worker_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)
      [ -n "$claim_token" ] && [ "$worker_pid" -gt 0 ] &&
        [ -n "$worker_token" ] && [ "$observed" = "$worker_token" ] || continue
      printf '%s\n' "$holder" | jq -e --argjson to "$to" '
        .status=="running" and (.claim.expires_at|type)=="number" and
        .claim.expires_at>=$to' >/dev/null || continue
      proof=''; proof_hash=''
      for candidate in "$RUNTIME_DIR"/events/*.json "$RUNTIME_DIR"/pinned-events/*.json; do
        [ -f "$candidate" ] && [ ! -L "$candidate" ] || continue
        jq -e --arg id "$holder_id" --arg token "$claim_token" '
          .type=="queue_activate" and .payload.id==$id and .payload.token==$token' \
          "$candidate" >/dev/null || continue
        proof_hash=$(jq -r .event_hash "$candidate")
        proof=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$proof_hash" 2>/dev/null) || {
          proof=''; proof_hash=''; continue; }
        break
      done
      [ -n "$proof" ] || continue
      proof_at=$(jq -r .at "$proof")
      start=$from; [ "$due" -le "$start" ] || start=$due
      [ "$proof_at" -le "$start" ] || start=$proof_at
      [ "$start" -lt "$to" ] || continue
      payload=$RUNTIME_DIR/.resource-blocked.$$.json
      jq -n --arg item_id "$id" --argjson from "$start" --argjson to "$to" \
        --arg resource "$resource" --arg holder_id "$holder_id" \
        --arg claim_token "$claim_token" --argjson worker_pid "$worker_pid" \
        --arg worker_start_token "$worker_token" --arg observed_start_token "$observed" \
        --argjson activate_event_id "$(jq -r .sequence "$proof")" \
        --arg activate_event_hash "$proof_hash" '
        {item_id:$item_id,from:$from,to:$to,resource:$resource,
          blocked_by:{item_id:$holder_id,claim_token:$claim_token,
            worker_pid:$worker_pid,worker_start_token:$worker_start_token,
            observed_start_token:$observed_start_token,
            activate_event_id:$activate_event_id,activate_event_hash:$activate_event_hash}}' \
        >"$payload"
      action="resource-blocked:$id:$start:$to:${proof_hash#sha256:}"
      runtime_emit audit resource_blocked "$action" \
        --fingerprint "$(runtime_sha256 "$payload")" --payload-file "$payload" || {
          rm -f "$payload"; return 5; }
      rm -f "$payload"; emitted=1; break
    done < <(jq -c --arg id "$id" '
      .queue.items[]?|select(.id!=$id and .status=="running" and .claim!=null)' "$state")
  done < <(jq -c --argjson to "$to" '
    .audit.deadlines|to_entries[]|.value|
    select(.satisfied_at==null and .due_at<$to)|{item_id,due_at}' "$state")
  [ "$emitted" -eq 0 ] || runtime_reduce
}
runtime_audit_record_blocked_deadlines() {
  local state from to record id due blocked group resources holder proof_hash proof proof_type candidate
  local holder_id holder_status claim_token worker_pid worker_token observed observed_json
  local payload action emitted
  state=$1 from=$2 to=$3 emitted=0
  while IFS= read -r record; do
    id=$(printf '%s\n' "$record" | jq -r .item_id)
    due=$(printf '%s\n' "$record" | jq -r .due_at)
    blocked=$(jq -c --arg id "$id" '
      [.queue.items[]?|select(.id==$id)]|if length==1 then .[0] else null end' "$state")
    printf '%s\n' "$blocked" | jq -e '
      .!=null and (.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and
      (.resource_locks|type)=="array" and (.resource_locks|length)>0 and
      (.args.actor|type)=="string" and (.args.actor|length)>0 and
      (.args.reason|type)=="string" and (.args.reason|length)>0 and
      (.args.strategy_generation|type)=="number"' >/dev/null || continue
    group=$(printf '%s\n' "$blocked" | jq -c '
      {actor:.args.actor,reason:.args.reason,strategy_generation:.args.strategy_generation}')
    resources=$(printf '%s\n' "$blocked" | jq -c '.resource_locks|unique|sort')
    while IFS= read -r holder; do
      [ -n "$holder" ] || continue
      holder_id=$(printf '%s\n' "$holder" | jq -r .id)
      holder_status=$(printf '%s\n' "$holder" | jq -r .status)
      claim_token=$(printf '%s\n' "$holder" | jq -r '.claim.token//""')
      worker_pid=$(printf '%s\n' "$holder" | jq -r '.claim.worker_pid//0')
      worker_token=$(printf '%s\n' "$holder" | jq -r '.claim.worker_start_token//""')
      [ -n "$claim_token" ] && [ "$worker_pid" -gt 0 ] && [ -n "$worker_token" ] || continue
      if [ "$holder_status" = running ]; then proof_type=queue_activate
      else proof_type=queue_complete; fi
      proof_hash=''; proof=''
      for candidate in "$RUNTIME_DIR"/events/*.json "$RUNTIME_DIR"/pinned-events/*.json; do
        [ -f "$candidate" ] && [ ! -L "$candidate" ] || continue
        jq -e --arg type "$proof_type" --arg id "$holder_id" --arg token "$claim_token" \
          --argjson due "$due" '
          .type==$type and .payload.id==$id and .payload.token==$token and .at<=$due' \
          "$candidate" >/dev/null || continue
        proof_hash=$(jq -r .event_hash "$candidate")
        proof=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$proof_hash" 2>/dev/null) || {
          proof_hash=''; proof=''; continue; }
        break
      done
      [ -n "$proof_hash" ] && [ -n "$proof" ] || continue
      if [ "$holder_status" = running ]; then
        observed=$(runtime_start_token "$worker_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)
        [ -n "$observed" ] && [ "$observed" = "$worker_token" ] || continue
        observed_json=$(jq -cn --arg token "$observed" '$token')
        jq -e --arg id "$holder_id" --arg token "$claim_token" --argjson due "$due" '
          .type=="queue_activate" and .payload.id==$id and .payload.token==$token and .at<=$due' \
          "$proof" >/dev/null || continue
      else
        observed_json=null
        jq -e --arg id "$holder_id" --arg token "$claim_token" --argjson due "$due" '
          .type=="queue_complete" and .payload.id==$id and .payload.token==$token and .at<=$due' \
          "$proof" >/dev/null || continue
      fi
      payload=$RUNTIME_DIR/.deadline-blocked.$$.json
      jq -n --arg item_id "$id" --argjson due_at "$due" --argjson coverage_until "$to" \
        --argjson recovery_group "$group" \
        --arg holder_id "$holder_id" --arg holder_status "$holder_status" \
        --arg claim_token "$claim_token" --argjson worker_pid "$worker_pid" \
        --arg worker_start_token "$worker_token" --argjson observed_start_token "$observed_json" \
        --argjson resource_locks "$resources" --argjson proof_event_id "$(jq -r .sequence "$proof")" \
        --arg proof_event_hash "$proof_hash" --arg proof_event_type "$(jq -r .type "$proof")" '
        {item_id:$item_id,due_at:$due_at,coverage_until:$coverage_until,
          recovery_group:$recovery_group,
          blocked_by:{item_id:$holder_id,status:$holder_status,claim_token:$claim_token,
            worker_pid:$worker_pid,worker_start_token:$worker_start_token,
            observed_start_token:$observed_start_token,resource_locks:$resource_locks,
            proof_event_id:$proof_event_id,proof_event_hash:$proof_event_hash,
            proof_event_type:$proof_event_type}}' >"$payload"
      action="deadline-blocked:$id:${proof_hash#sha256:}"
      runtime_emit audit deadline_blocked "$action" \
        --fingerprint "$(runtime_sha256 "$payload")" --payload-file "$payload" || {
          rm -f "$payload"; return 5; }
      rm -f "$payload"
      emitted=1
      break
    done < <(jq -c --arg id "$id" --argjson group "$group" --argjson resources "$resources" \
      --argjson to "$to" '
      .queue.items[]?|select(.id!=$id and (.status|IN("running","complete")) and .claim!=null) |
      select(.status=="complete" or
        (((.claim.expires_at|type)=="number") and .claim.expires_at>=$to)) |
      select({actor:.args.actor,reason:.args.reason,
        strategy_generation:.args.strategy_generation}==$group) |
      select(($resources-(.resource_locks//[])|length)==0)' "$state")
  done < <(jq -c --argjson to "$to" '
    .audit.deadlines|to_entries[]|.value|
    select(.satisfied_at==null and .due_at<$to) |
    {item_id,due_at}' "$state")
  [ "$emitted" -eq 0 ] || runtime_reduce
}
runtime_audit_interval() {
  local from to lock state fact_json fact key expected stored_hash stored_event gap
  local intervals gaps id due satisfied end start proof_hash max_gap total_gap payload action
  from='' to=''
  while [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; do case $1 in
    --from) from=$2; shift 2;; --to) to=$2; shift 2;; *) return 2;; esac; done
  case $from:$to in *[!0-9:]*) return 2;; esac
  [ "$from" -ge 0 ] && [ "$to" -le 21600 ] && [ "$to" -gt "$from" ] || return 2
  lock=$RUNTIME_DIR/audit-command.lock
  runtime_lock_acquire "$lock"; trap 'runtime_lock_release "$lock" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true' RETURN
  runtime_reduce
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  while IFS= read -r fact_json; do
    fact=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-preflight-fact.$$.json
    printf '%s\n' "$fact_json" >"$fact"
    runtime_audit_validate_fact "$fact" || { rm -f "$fact"; return 5; }
    rm -f "$fact"
  done < <(jq -c '.audit.coverage_facts[]|select(.kind=="guardian" or .kind=="goal_work")' "$state")
  runtime_audit_record_resource_blocks "$state" "$from" "$to" || return 5
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  runtime_audit_record_blocked_deadlines "$state" "$from" "$to" || return 5
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  key=$from:$to
  if jq -e --arg key "$key" '.audit.intervals[$key]!=null' "$state" >/dev/null; then
    expected=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-existing-expected.$$.json
    polylane_audit_recompute_interval "$state" "$from" "$to" "$expected"
    jq -e --arg key "$key" --slurpfile expected "$expected" '
      (.audit.intervals[$key]|del(.event_id,.event_hash,.source_event_cursor))==$expected[0]' \
      "$state" >/dev/null || { rm -f "$expected"; return 5; }
    stored_hash=$(jq -r --arg key "$key" '.audit.intervals[$key].event_hash' "$state")
    stored_event=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$stored_hash") || {
      rm -f "$expected"; return 5; }
    jq -e --arg key "$key" --slurpfile state "$state" '
      .type=="audit_interval" and .event_hash==$state[0].audit.intervals[$key].event_hash and
      (.payload+{event_id:.sequence,event_hash:.event_hash})==
        $state[0].audit.intervals[$key]' "$stored_event" >/dev/null || {
          rm -f "$expected"; return 5; }
    rm -f "$expected"
    gap=$(jq -r --arg key "$key" '.audit.intervals[$key].unexplained_gap' "$state")
    runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN
    [ "$gap" -eq 0 ] || return 5
    return
  fi
  intervals=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-intervals.$$.json
  gaps=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-gaps.$$.json
  printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$gaps"
  jq --argjson from "$from" --argjson to "$to" '
    [.audit.coverage_facts[]|select(.kind=="guardian")|
      {from:([.valid_from,$from]|max),to:([.valid_until,$to]|min)}|select(.to>.from)] as $guardian |
    [.audit.coverage_facts[]|select(.kind=="goal_work")|
      {from:([.valid_from,$from]|max),to:([.valid_until,$to]|min)}|select(.to>.from)] as $goal |
    [$guardian[] as $g|$goal[] as $w|
      {from:([$g.from,$w.from]|max),to:([$g.to,$w.to]|min)}|select(.to>.from)]' \
    "$state" >"$intervals"
  # Derive uncovered intervals from the union. A fact starts only at its finalized event.
  jq --argjson from "$from" --argjson to "$to" '
    def merge:
      sort_by(.from,.to) | reduce .[] as $x ([];
        if length==0 or .[-1].to<$x.from then .+[$x]
        else .[-1].to=([.[-1].to,$x.to]|max) end);
    (merge) as $m |
    reduce $m[] as $x ({cursor:$from,gaps:[]};
      if $x.from>.cursor then
        .gaps += [{from:.cursor,to:$x.from}]|.cursor=([.cursor,$x.to]|max)
      else .cursor=([.cursor,$x.to]|max) end) |
    if .cursor<$to then .gaps+=[{from:.cursor,to:$to}] else . end | .gaps' \
    "$intervals" >"$gaps"
  # Every missed mandatory deadline is unexplained even if unrelated later work exists.
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r id due satisfied; do
    [ "$due" -lt "$to" ] || continue
    end=$(polylane_audit_deadline_end "$satisfied" "$to") || {
      rm -f "$intervals" "$gaps"; runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return 5; }
    start=$due; [ "$start" -lt "$from" ] && start=$from
    if [ "$end" -gt "$start" ]; then
      polylane_audit_deadline_gaps "$state" "$id" "$start" "$end" "$gaps.deadline" || {
        rm -f "$intervals" "$gaps" "$gaps.deadline";
        runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return 5; }
      jq -s '.[0]+.[1]' "$gaps" "$gaps.deadline" >"$gaps.next"
      mv -f "$gaps.next" "$gaps"; rm -f "$gaps.deadline"
    fi
  done < <(jq -r '.audit.deadlines|to_entries[]|
    [.key,.value.due_at,(.value.satisfied_at//null)]|@tsv' "$state")
  jq -Sc 'sort_by(.from,.to,(.missed_deadline//""))' "$gaps" >"$gaps.next"; mv -f "$gaps.next" "$gaps"
  proof_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$gaps")
  max_gap=$(jq '[.[]|(.to-.from)]|max//0' "$gaps")
  total_gap=$(jq '[.[]|(.to-.from)]|add//0' "$gaps")
  payload=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-interval.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson from "$from" --argjson to "$to" \
    --argjson cursor "$(jq -r .last_event_sequence "$state")" \
    --arg proof_hash "$proof_hash" --argjson max_gap "$max_gap" \
    --argjson total_gap "$total_gap" --slurpfile gaps "$gaps" \
    '{from:$from,to:$to,source_event_cursor:$cursor,proof_hash:$proof_hash,
      unexplained_gap:$max_gap,total_unexplained:$total_gap,gaps:$gaps[0]}' >"$payload"
  action="interval:$from:$to"
  runtime_emit audit audit_interval "$action" --fingerprint "$proof_hash" --payload-file "$payload"
  rm -f "$payload" "$intervals" "$gaps"
  runtime_reduce
  runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN
  [ "$max_gap" -eq 0 ] || return 5
}
runtime_audit_expected_post_type() {
  local recovery
  recovery=$1
  case $recovery in
    checkpoint_retry) printf checkpoint_recovered;;
    proof_lease_expiry) printf lease_recovered;;
    guardian_generation_restart|controller_state_restart) printf actor_restarted;;
    keeper_session_recreate|singleton_keeper_controller|same_nonce_lane_relaunch|window_recreate_once) printf session_recovered;;
    event_replay|boundary_reconcile) printf reducer_replayed;;
    nonce_rejection|marker_wake) printf marker_decided;;
    offline_plus_probe|offline_drain|online_immediate) printf provider_progress;;
    orphan_requeue|state_reconcile) printf queue_recovered;;
    usr1_wake) printf wake_reduced;;
    no_restart|child_recover) printf quiet_child_decided;;
    *) return 5;;
  esac
}
runtime_audit_artifact() {
  local evidence name path hash
  evidence=$1; name=$2
  [ "$(jq --arg name "$name" '[.authoritative_artifacts[]|select(.name==$name)]|length' "$evidence")" -eq 1 ] ||
    return 5
  path=$(jq -r --arg name "$name" '.authoritative_artifacts[]|select(.name==$name)|.path' "$evidence")
  hash=$(jq -r --arg name "$name" '.authoritative_artifacts[]|select(.name==$name)|.hash' "$evidence")
  runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/postcondition-artifacts" "$path" "$hash"
}
runtime_audit_resolve_event() {
  local hash expected_type event
  hash=$1; expected_type=$2
  event=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$hash") || return 5
  [ "$expected_type" = any ] ||
    [ "$(jq -r .type "$event")" = "$expected_type" ] || return 5
  printf '%s\n' "$event"
}
runtime_audit_validate_raw_native() {
  local artifact
  artifact=$1
  jq -e '.raw_native|((keys|sort)==["hash","path"]) and
    (.path|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
    (.hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$artifact" >/dev/null || return 5
  runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/handler-output-artifacts" \
    "$(jq -r .raw_native.path "$artifact")" "$(jq -r .raw_native.hash "$artifact")" >/dev/null
}
runtime_audit_validate_postcondition() {
  local recovery evidence expected_type post name path hash sealed receipt ticket result
  local checkpoint before after operation observation replayed event emitted reduced old new
  recovery=$1; evidence=$2
  expected_type=$(runtime_audit_expected_post_type "$recovery") || return 5
  jq -e --arg recovery "$recovery" '
    .schema_version==2 and .recovery==$recovery and
    (.fault_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.cause_event_hash|startswith("sha256:")) and
    (.postcondition_event.event_id|type=="number") and
    (.postcondition_event.event_hash|startswith("sha256:")) and
    (.authoritative_artifacts|type=="array" and length>0) and
    ([.authoritative_artifacts[].name]|unique|length)==
      (.authoritative_artifacts|length) and
    all(.authoritative_artifacts[];
      (.name|type=="string" and length>0) and
      (.path|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
      (.hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")))' "$evidence" >/dev/null || return 5
  post=$(runtime_audit_resolve_event     "$(jq -r .postcondition_event.event_hash "$evidence")" "$expected_type") || return 5
  jq -e --arg type "$expected_type" --arg recovery "$recovery" --slurpfile evidence "$evidence" '
    .sequence==$evidence[0].postcondition_event.event_id and .type==$type and
    .payload.recovery==$recovery and .payload.fault_id==$evidence[0].fault_id and
    .payload.cause_event_hash==$evidence[0].cause_event_hash and
    .payload.authoritative_artifacts==$evidence[0].authoritative_artifacts'     "$post" >/dev/null || return 5
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r name path hash; do
    sealed=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed       "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/postcondition-artifacts" "$path" "$hash") || return 5
    [ "$(basename "$sealed" .json)" = "${hash#sha256:}" ] || return 5
  done < <(jq -r '.authoritative_artifacts[]|[.name,.path,.hash]|@tsv' "$evidence")
  receipt=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" handler_receipt) || return 5
  jq -e --arg recovery "$recovery" --slurpfile evidence "$evidence" '
    .schema_version==1 and .recovery==$recovery and
    .fault_id==$evidence[0].fault_id and
    .cause_event_hash==$evidence[0].cause_event_hash and
    (.producer|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.expected_actor|type=="string" and length>0) and
    .result_event.actor==.expected_actor and
    (.ticket.path|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
    (.ticket.hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.result_event.path|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
    (.result_event.file_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.result_event.event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.output_artifacts|type=="array" and length>0) and
    (.auth_tag|type=="string" and length>0)' "$receipt" >/dev/null || return 5
  runtime_audit_verify_auth "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit-auth.key" "$receipt" || return 5
  ticket=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/handler-tickets" \
    "$(jq -r .ticket.path "$receipt")" "$(jq -r .ticket.hash "$receipt")") || return 5
  runtime_audit_verify_auth "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit-auth.key" "$ticket" || return 5
  jq -e --slurpfile receipt "$receipt" '
    .producer==$receipt[0].producer and .expected_actor==$receipt[0].expected_actor' \
    "$ticket" >/dev/null || return 5
  result=$(runtime_audit_resolve_event "$(jq -r .result_event.event_hash "$receipt")" any) ||
    return 5
  jq -e --slurpfile receipt "$receipt" '
    .sequence==$receipt[0].result_event.event_id and
    .actor==$receipt[0].result_event.actor and
    .type==$receipt[0].result_event.type and
    .action_id==$receipt[0].result_event.action_id' "$result" >/dev/null || return 5
  case $expected_type in
    checkpoint_recovered)
      checkpoint=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" checkpoint_recovery) || return 5
      runtime_audit_validate_raw_native "$checkpoint" || return 5
      jq -e '(keys|sort)==(["head","raw_native","recovery_event_hash","state_hash",
        "status","status_hash"]|sort) and .status=="checkpointed" and
        (.head|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.state_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        (.status_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$checkpoint" >/dev/null || return 5
      result=$(runtime_audit_resolve_event "$(jq -r .recovery_event_hash "$checkpoint")" recovery_action) ||
        return 5
      [ "$(jq -r .payload.evidence_hash "$result")" = \
        "$(jq -r .raw_native.hash "$checkpoint")" ] ;;
    lease_recovered)
      before=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" lease_before) || return 5
      after=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" lease_after) || return 5
      runtime_audit_validate_raw_native "$before" &&
        runtime_audit_validate_raw_native "$after" || return 5
      jq -e '(keys|sort)==(["action_id","proof_hash","raw_native"]|sort) and
        (.action_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.proof_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$before" >/dev/null &&
      jq -e --slurpfile before "$before" '
        (keys|sort)==(["action_id","proof_hash","raw_native"]|sort) and
        (.action_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.proof_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        .action_id!=$before[0].action_id and .proof_hash!=$before[0].proof_hash' \
        "$after" >/dev/null || return 5
      result=$(runtime_audit_resolve_event "$(jq -r .result_event.event_hash "$receipt")" \
        recovery_action) || return 5
      jq -e --slurpfile after "$after" '
        .action_id==$after[0].action_id and
        .payload.evidence_hash==$after[0].proof_hash' "$result" >/dev/null ;;
    actor_restarted)
      old=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" old_actor) || return 5
      new=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" new_actor) || return 5
      runtime_audit_validate_raw_native "$old" && runtime_audit_validate_raw_native "$new" || return 5
      jq -e '(keys|sort)==(["generation","live","observed_start_token",
        "ownership_token","pid","raw_native","role","start_token","started_at"]|sort) and
        .live==false and (.role|IN("guardian","controller")) and
        (.pid|type=="number" and .>0) and
        (.start_token|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.observed_start_token|type=="string") and
        (.generation|type=="number" and .>0) and
        (.ownership_token|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.started_at|type=="number" and .>=0)' "$old" >/dev/null &&
      jq -e --slurpfile old "$old" '
        (keys|sort)==(["generation","live","observed_start_token",
          "ownership_token","pid","raw_native","role","start_token","started_at"]|sort) and
        .live==true and .observed_start_token==.start_token and
        .role==$old[0].role and (.started_at|type=="number" and .>=0) and
        (.ownership_token|type=="string" and length>0) and
        .generation>$old[0].generation and
        (.pid!=$old[0].pid or .start_token!=$old[0].start_token)' "$new" >/dev/null ;;
    session_recovered)
      before=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" session_before) || return 5
      after=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" session_after) || return 5
      operation=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" session_operation) || return 5
      runtime_audit_validate_raw_native "$before" &&
        runtime_audit_validate_raw_native "$after" &&
        runtime_audit_validate_raw_native "$operation" || return 5
      jq -e --slurpfile post "$post" '
        (keys|sort)==(["cycle_run_id","exists","generation","loop_id","nonce",
          "project_root","raw_native","windows"]|sort) and
        .exists==true and .project_root==$post[0].payload.project_root and
        .loop_id==$post[0].payload.loop_id and
        .cycle_run_id==$post[0].payload.cycle_run_id and
        .nonce==$post[0].payload.nonce and
        .generation==$post[0].payload.after_generation and
        (.windows|type=="array" and length>0)' "$after" >/dev/null &&
      jq -e '(keys|sort)==(["changed_at","operation","raw_native","target"]|sort) and
        (.changed_at|type=="number" and .>=0) and
        (.operation|IN("bootstrap","lanes_create","lanes_replace")) and
        (.target|type=="string" and length>0)' "$operation" >/dev/null &&
      jq -e --slurpfile after "$after" --slurpfile operation "$operation" '
        .project_root==$after[0].project_root and .loop_id==$after[0].loop_id and
        .cycle_run_id==$after[0].cycle_run_id and
        if $operation[0].operation=="bootstrap" then
          $after[0].generation>.generation and $after[0].nonce!=.nonce
        else $after[0].generation==.generation and $after[0].nonce==.nonce and
          $after[0].windows!=.windows end' "$before" >/dev/null ;;
    reducer_replayed)
      observation=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" replay_observation) || return 5
      runtime_audit_validate_raw_native "$observation" || return 5
      jq -e --arg recovery "$recovery" '(keys|sort)==(["application_count","cursor_after","cursor_before",
        "raw_native","replayed_event_hash","replayed_event_id"]|sort) and
        (.application_count|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0) and
        (if $recovery=="event_replay" then .application_count>0
         elif $recovery=="boundary_reconcile" then true else false end) and
        (.cursor_before|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0) and
        (.cursor_after|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0) and
        .cursor_after==(.cursor_before+.application_count) and
        (if .application_count==0 then
          .replayed_event_id==null and .replayed_event_hash==null
         else .replayed_event_id==.cursor_after and
          (.replayed_event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) end)' \
        "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
      if [ "$(jq -r .application_count "$observation")" -gt 0 ]; then
        replayed=$(runtime_audit_resolve_event "$(jq -r .replayed_event_hash "$observation")" any) ||
          return 5
        [ "$(jq -r .sequence "$replayed")" = "$(jq -r .replayed_event_id "$observation")" ]
      fi ;;
    marker_decided)
      observation=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" marker_observation) || return 5
      runtime_audit_validate_raw_native "$observation" || return 5
      jq -e '(keys|sort)==(["accepted","decision_event_hash","expected_run_id",
        "observed_run_id","raw_native"]|sort) and
        ((.expected_run_id!=.observed_run_id) and (.accepted==false)) or
        ((.expected_run_id==.observed_run_id) and (.accepted==true))'         "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
      runtime_audit_resolve_event "$(jq -r .decision_event_hash "$observation")" marker_progress >/dev/null ;;
    provider_progress)
      observation=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" provider_observation) || return 5
      runtime_audit_validate_raw_native "$observation" || return 5
      jq -e --arg recovery "$recovery" '
        (keys|sort)==(["provider_state","queue_event_hashes","raw_native"]|sort) and
        .provider_state==(if $recovery=="offline_plus_probe" then "rate_limited"
          elif $recovery=="offline_drain" then "unavailable"
          elif $recovery=="online_immediate" then "available" else null end) and
        (.queue_event_hashes|type=="array" and length>0) and
        ([.queue_event_hashes[]]|unique|length)==(.queue_event_hashes|length)'         "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
      while IFS= read -r hash; do
        event=$(runtime_audit_resolve_event "$hash" any) || return 5
        case $(jq -r .type "$event") in
          queue_enqueue|queue_reschedule|queue_activate|queue_complete|queue_fail|provider_state) :;;
          *) return 5;;
        esac
      done < <(jq -r '.queue_event_hashes[]' "$observation") ;;
    queue_recovered)
      observation=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" queue_observation) || return 5
      runtime_audit_validate_raw_native "$observation" || return 5
      jq -e --arg recovery "$recovery" '
        (keys|sort)==(["goal_ref","new_claim_token","old_claim_token",
          "previous_generation","queue_event_hash","queue_item_id","raw_native",
          "reconcile_generation","status_after","status_before"]|sort) and
        if $recovery=="orphan_requeue" then
          (.old_claim_token|type=="string" and length>0) and
          .new_claim_token==null and (.status_before|IN("starting","running")) and
          .status_after=="scheduled" and .goal_ref==null and
          .previous_generation==null and .reconcile_generation==null
        elif $recovery=="state_reconcile" then
          .old_claim_token==null and .new_claim_token==null and
          .status_before==null and .status_after==null and
          (.goal_ref|type=="string" and length>0) and
          (.previous_generation|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0) and
          (.reconcile_generation|type=="number" and floor==.) and
          .reconcile_generation>.previous_generation
        else false end' "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
      runtime_audit_resolve_event "$(jq -r .queue_event_hash "$observation")" any >/dev/null ;;
    wake_reduced)
      observation=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" wake_observation) || return 5
      runtime_audit_validate_raw_native "$observation" || return 5
      jq -e '(keys|sort)==(["emitted_at","emitted_event_hash","emitted_event_id",
        "fallback_seconds","raw_native","reduced_at","reduced_event_hash",
        "reduced_event_id"]|sort) and .reduced_event_id>=.emitted_event_id and
        .reduced_at>=.emitted_at and
        (.reduced_at-.emitted_at)<.fallback_seconds and
        (.emitted_event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        (.reduced_event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
      emitted=$(runtime_audit_resolve_event "$(jq -r .emitted_event_hash "$observation")" any) ||
        return 5
      reduced=$(runtime_audit_resolve_event "$(jq -r .reduced_event_hash "$observation")" any) ||
        return 5
      jq -e '.actor=="guardian" and .type=="wake_requested"' "$emitted" >/dev/null &&
        jq -e '.actor=="guardian" and .type=="heartbeat"' "$reduced" >/dev/null &&
        [ "$(jq -r .sequence "$emitted")" = "$(jq -r .emitted_event_id "$observation")" ] &&
        [ "$(jq -r .sequence "$reduced")" = "$(jq -r .reduced_event_id "$observation")" ] ;;
    quiet_child_decided)
      observation=$(runtime_audit_artifact "$evidence" process_observation) || return 5
      runtime_audit_validate_raw_native "$observation" || return 5
      jq -e --arg recovery "$recovery" '
        (keys|sort)==(["deadline","decision","decision_event_hash","observed_live",
          "pid","raw_native","start_token"]|sort) and (.pid|type=="number" and .>0) and
        (.start_token|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.deadline|type=="number") and
        (if $recovery=="no_restart" then
          .decision=="preserve" and .observed_live==true
        else .decision=="recover" and .observed_live==false end)'         "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
      runtime_audit_resolve_event "$(jq -r .decision_event_hash "$observation")" quiet_child_decision >/dev/null ;;
  esac
}
runtime_record_recovery() {
  local cause recovery evidence cause_file cause_sequence cause_previous expected cause_hash
  local lock state key prior evidence_hash proof_payload action status
  cause='' recovery='' evidence=''
  while [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; do case $1 in
    --cause-event) cause=$2; shift 2;; --recovery) recovery=$2; shift 2;;
    --evidence) evidence=$2; shift 2;; *) return 2;; esac; done
  cause_file=$(runtime_audit_file_under "$RUNTIME_DIR/events" "$cause" 2>/dev/null || true)
  [ -n "$cause_file" ] ||
    cause_file=$(runtime_audit_file_under "$RUNTIME_DIR/pinned-events" "$cause" 2>/dev/null || true)
  [ -n "$cause_file" ] || return 5
  cause_sequence=$(jq -r .sequence "$cause_file")
  cause_previous=$(jq -r '.previous_event_hash//""' "$cause_file")
  runtime_verify_event_file "$cause_file" "$cause_sequence" "$cause_previous" || return 5
  jq -e '.type=="fault_injected"' "$cause_file" >/dev/null || return 5
  evidence=$(runtime_audit_file_under "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/recovery-evidence" "$evidence") ||
    return 5
  case $(basename "$evidence") in
    [0-9a-f][0-9a-f]*.json) expected=sha256:$(basename "$evidence" .json);;
    *) return 5;;
  esac
  evidence=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/recovery-evidence"     "$evidence" "$expected") || return 5
  cause_hash=$(jq -r .event_hash "$cause_file")
  jq -e --arg hash "$cause_hash" --arg recovery "$recovery"     --arg fault "$(jq -r .payload.fault_id "$cause_file")" '
    .cause_event_hash==$hash and .recovery==$recovery and .fault_id==$fault'     "$evidence" >/dev/null || return 5
  runtime_audit_validate_postcondition "$recovery" "$evidence" || return 5
  lock=$RUNTIME_DIR/audit-command.lock
  runtime_lock_acquire "$lock"; trap 'runtime_lock_release "$lock" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true' RETURN
  runtime_reduce
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  key=$cause_hash\|$recovery
  prior=$(jq -c --arg key "$key" '.audit.recovery_pairs[$key]//null' "$state")
  evidence_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$evidence")
  if [ "$prior" != null ] &&
     [ "$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .evidence_hash)" = "$evidence_hash" ]; then
    runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN; return
  fi
  proof_payload=$RUNTIME_DIR/.recovery-proof.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson cause_id "$cause_sequence" --arg cause_hash "$cause_hash"     --arg fault "$(jq -r .fault_id "$evidence")" --arg recovery "$recovery"     --arg path "$evidence" --arg evidence_hash "$evidence_hash"     '{cause_event_id:$cause_id,cause_event_hash:$cause_hash,fault_id:$fault,
      recovery:$recovery,evidence_path:$path,evidence_hash:$evidence_hash}' >"$proof_payload"
  action="recovery:$(printf '%s' "$cause_hash" | cut -c8-23):$recovery:$(printf '%s' "$evidence_hash" | cut -c8-23)"
  runtime_emit audit recovery_proof "$action" --fingerprint "$evidence_hash" \
    --payload-file "$proof_payload"
  rm -f "$proof_payload"; runtime_reduce
  status=$(jq -r --arg action "$action" '.audit.recovery_results[$action].status'     "$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json")
  runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN
  [ "$status" = accepted ] && return
  [ "$status" = rejected ] && return 7
  return 5
}
runtime_audit_auth_tag() {
  local key artifact canonical rc
  key=$1; artifact=$2; canonical=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-hmac-message.$$.json
  jq -Sc 'del(.auth_tag)' "$artifact" >"$canonical"
  "$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-hmac.py" sign "$key" "$canonical"
  rc=$?; rm -f "$canonical"; return "$rc"
}
runtime_audit_verify_auth() {
  local key artifact canonical supplied rc
  key=$1; artifact=$2; canonical=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-hmac-verify.$$.json
  [ -f "$key" ] && [ ! -L "$key" ] && [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$key")" = 400 ] || return 5
  supplied=$(jq -er '.auth_tag|select(type=="string" and
    test("^hmac-sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$artifact") || return 5
  jq -Sc 'del(.auth_tag)' "$artifact" >"$canonical"
  "$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-hmac.py" verify "$key" "$canonical" "$supplied"
  rc=$?; rm -f "$canonical"; return "$rc"
}
runtime_summarize_soak() {
  local scenario auth output lock state injected recovered failures fact_json fact fault recovery
  local fault_record injection artifact_hash artifact unsigned unsigned_hash hmac_message
  local cause_hash key pair evidence proof pin_hashes checkpoint expected interval_event event_hash
  local whole max_gap interval_conflicts
  scenario='' auth='' output=''
  while [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; do case $1 in --scenario) scenario=$2; shift 2;;
    --auth-file) auth=$2; shift 2;; --output) output=$2; shift 2;; *) return 2;; esac; done
  [ -f "$scenario" ] && [ ! -L "$scenario" ] &&
    [ -f "$auth" ] && [ ! -L "$auth" ] || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$auth")" = 400 ] || return 5
  jq -e '
    (keys|sort)==(["faults","schema_version","simulated_seconds","tick_seconds"]|sort) and
    .schema_version==2 and .simulated_seconds==21600 and .tick_seconds==5 and
    (.faults|length)==20 and ([.faults[].id]|unique|length)==20 and
    ([.faults[].at]|unique|length)==20 and
    all(.faults[];
      (keys|sort)==(["at","id","recovery"]|sort) and
      (.at|type=="number" and .>=0 and .<=21600 and (. % 5)==0) and
      (.id|type=="string" and length>0) and
      (.recovery|type=="string" and length>0))' "$scenario" >/dev/null || return 5
  lock=$RUNTIME_DIR/audit-command.lock
  runtime_lock_acquire "$lock" || return $?
  trap 'runtime_lock_release "$lock" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true' RETURN
  runtime_reduce
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  injected=0; recovered=0; failures=0
  while IFS= read -r fact_json; do
    fact=$RUNTIME_DIR/.summary-fact.$$.json; printf '%s\n' "$fact_json" >"$fact"
    runtime_audit_validate_fact "$fact" || failures=$((failures+1))
    rm -f "$fact"
  done < <(jq -c '.audit.coverage_facts[]|select(.kind=="guardian" or .kind=="goal_work")' "$state")
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r fault recovery; do
    fault_record=$(jq -c --arg fault "$fault" '.audit.faults[$fault]//null' "$state")
    [ "$fault_record" != null ] || { failures=$((failures+1)); continue; }
    injection=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash       "$(printf '%s\n' "$fault_record" | jq -r .event_hash)") || {
        failures=$((failures+1)); continue; }
    jq -e --arg fault "$fault" --arg recovery "$recovery" '
      .type=="fault_injected" and .payload.fault_id==$fault and
      .payload.recovery==$recovery' "$injection" >/dev/null || {
        failures=$((failures+1)); continue; }
    artifact_hash=$(jq -r .payload.artifact_hash "$injection")
    artifact=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/injections"       "$(jq -r .payload.artifact_path "$injection")" "$artifact_hash") || {
        failures=$((failures+1)); continue; }
    unsigned=$RUNTIME_DIR/.unsigned-verify.$$.json
    jq -Sc 'del(.auth_tag,.unsigned_hash)' "$artifact" >"$unsigned"
    unsigned_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$unsigned")
    hmac_message=$RUNTIME_DIR/.hmac-verify.$$.json
    jq -Sc 'del(.auth_tag)' "$artifact" >"$hmac_message"
    [ "$unsigned_hash" = "$(jq -r .unsigned_hash "$artifact")" ] &&
      [ "$(jq -r .auth_tag "$artifact")" = "$(jq -r .payload.auth_tag "$injection")" ] &&
      "$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-hmac.py" verify "$auth" "$hmac_message" \
        "$(jq -r .payload.auth_tag "$injection")" || {
          rm -f "$unsigned" "$hmac_message"; failures=$((failures+1)); continue; }
    rm -f "$unsigned" "$hmac_message"
    injected=$((injected+1)); cause_hash=$(jq -r .event_hash "$injection")
    key=$cause_hash\|$recovery
    pair=$(jq -c --arg key "$key" '.audit.recovery_pairs[$key]//null' "$state")
    [ "$pair" != null ] || { failures=$((failures+1)); continue; }
    evidence=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/recovery-evidence"       "$(printf '%s\n' "$pair" | jq -r .evidence_path)"       "$(printf '%s\n' "$pair" | jq -r .evidence_hash)") || {
        failures=$((failures+1)); continue; }
    runtime_audit_validate_postcondition "$recovery" "$evidence" || {
      failures=$((failures+1)); continue; }
    proof=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash       "$(printf '%s\n' "$pair" | jq -r .recovery_event_hash)") || {
        failures=$((failures+1)); continue; }
    jq -e --arg cause "$cause_hash" --arg recovery "$recovery"       --arg evidence_hash "$(printf '%s\n' "$pair" | jq -r .evidence_hash)" '
      .type=="recovery_proof" and .payload.cause_event_hash==$cause and
      .payload.recovery==$recovery and .payload.evidence_hash==$evidence_hash'       "$proof" >/dev/null || { failures=$((failures+1)); continue; }
    recovered=$((recovered+1))
  done < <(jq -r '.faults[]|[.id,.recovery]|@tsv' "$scenario")
  jq -e '.audit.faults|length==20' "$state" >/dev/null || failures=$((failures+1))
  jq -e '.audit.recovery_pairs|length==20' "$state" >/dev/null || failures=$((failures+1))
  # Recompute every stored interval from authenticated facts. Never trust its counters.
  pin_hashes=$RUNTIME_DIR/.summary-pin-hashes.$$.txt; : >"$pin_hashes"
  checkpoint=$(runtime_latest_checkpoint)
  if [ -n "$checkpoint" ]; then
    runtime_verify_checkpoint "$checkpoint" || failures=$((failures+1))
    jq -r '.audit_pins.files[].event_hash' "$checkpoint" | LC_ALL=C sort -u >"$pin_hashes"
  fi
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r key from to event_hash; do
    expected=$RUNTIME_DIR/.summary-interval.$$.json
    polylane_audit_recompute_interval "$state" "$from" "$to" "$expected"
    jq -e --arg key "$key" --slurpfile expected "$expected" '
      (.audit.intervals[$key]|del(.event_id,.event_hash,.source_event_cursor))==$expected[0]' \
      "$state" >/dev/null || failures=$((failures+1))
    interval_event=''
    if grep -Fqx "$event_hash" "$pin_hashes"; then
      interval_event=$RUNTIME_DIR/pinned-events/${event_hash#sha256:}.json
    else
      interval_event=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$event_hash" 2>/dev/null || true)
    fi
    if [ -z "$interval_event" ]; then failures=$((failures+1))
    else
      jq -e --arg key "$key" --slurpfile state "$state" '
        .type=="audit_interval" and
        (.payload+{event_id:.sequence,event_hash:.event_hash})==
          $state[0].audit.intervals[$key]' "$interval_event" >/dev/null ||
        failures=$((failures+1))
    fi
    rm -f "$expected"
  done < <(jq -r '.audit.intervals|to_entries[]|
    [.key,.value.from,.value.to,.value.event_hash]|@tsv' "$state")
  rm -f "$pin_hashes"
  whole=$RUNTIME_DIR/.summary-whole.$$.json
  polylane_audit_recompute_interval "$state" 0 21600 "$whole"
  jq -e --slurpfile expected "$whole" '
    (.audit.intervals["0:21600"]|del(.event_id,.event_hash,.source_event_cursor))==
      $expected[0]' "$state" >/dev/null || failures=$((failures+1))
  max_gap=$(jq -r .unexplained_gap "$whole"); rm -f "$whole"
  interval_conflicts=$(jq '(.audit.interval_conflicts//[])|length' "$state")
  failures=$((failures+interval_conflicts))
  jq -n --argjson injected "$injected" --argjson recovered "$recovered" \
    --argjson failures "$failures" --argjson gap "$max_gap" \
    '{simulated_seconds:21600,faults_injected:$injected,
      faults_recovered:$recovered,invariant_failures:$failures,
      max_unexplained_idle_gap:$gap}' >"$output.tmp.$$"
  runtime_atomic_file "$output" "$output.tmp.$$"
  runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN
}
~~~

Source polylane-runtime-events.sh before this library, then add dispatcher cases
audit-interval, record-recovery, and summarize-soak. There is deliberately no
force-uncovered or caller-provided count option.

~~~diff
--- a/core/scripts/polylane-runtime.sh
+++ b/core/scripts/polylane-runtime.sh
@@
 . "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-retention.sh"
+. "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-audit.sh"
@@
   run-with-deadline) runtime_run_with_deadline "$@" ;;
+  audit-interval) runtime_audit_interval "$@" ;;
+  record-recovery) runtime_record_recovery "$@" ;;
+  summarize-soak) runtime_summarize_soak "$@" ;;
~~~

~~~bash
bash -n core/scripts/polylane-runtime.sh
~~~

Expected: syntax passes.

- [ ] **Action 7.4 (2–5 minutes): Publish coverage and recovery proofs from production success paths**

Create core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-hooks.sh with this complete body:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
audit_hook_load() {
  local runtime
  runtime=$1; RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime; export RUNTIME_DIR
  AUDIT_BIN=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd -P)
  . "$AUDIT_BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
  . "$AUDIT_BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-events.sh"
  # Recovery proof publication uses the production reducer/emitter in this process.
  # Every hook producer therefore gets the same implementation, even when its command
  # script did not source the runtime dispatcher.
  . "$AUDIT_BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-reducer.sh"
  . "$AUDIT_BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-audit.sh"
}
audit_hook_reduce() {
  local runtime
  runtime=$1
  "$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
}
audit_hook_lookup_event() {
  local runtime actor type action output
  runtime=$1 actor=$2 type=$3 action=$4 output=$5
  "$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" lookup-event \
    "$actor" "$type" "$action" >"$output"
}
audit_hook_emit() {
  local runtime actor type action fingerprint payload
  runtime=$1; actor=$2; type=$3; action=$4; fingerprint=$5; payload=$6
  "$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit "$actor" "$type" "$action" \
    --fingerprint "$fingerprint" --payload-file "$payload"
}
audit_hook_commit_recovery() {
  runtime_record_recovery "$@"
}
audit_hook_pending_fault() {
  local runtime recovery state
  if [ "$#" -eq 2 ]; then runtime=$1 recovery=$2
  else runtime=${RUNTIME_DIR:-${POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR:-}} recovery=$1; fi
  [ -n "$runtime" ] || return 5
  audit_hook_load "$runtime"
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  jq -r --arg recovery "$recovery" '
    (.audit.faults // {}) as $faults | (.audit.recovery_pairs // {}) as $pairs |
    [$faults[] as $f |
      select($f.recovery==$recovery and
        $pairs[($f.event_hash+"|"+$recovery)]==null) |
      [$f.fault_id,$f.event_id,$f.event_hash]] |
    if length==1 then .[0]|@tsv else empty end' "$state"
}
audit_hook_guardian_coverage() {
  local runtime observation now rc
  runtime=$1 observation=$2
  audit_hook_load "$runtime"
  now=$(runtime_now)
  jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
    (keys|sort)==(["identity","kind","observed_at","schema_version"]|sort) and
    .schema_version==1 and .kind=="guardian" and .observed_at==$now and
    .identity.role=="guardian"' \
    "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
  if runtime_publish_guardian_observation "$observation"; then rc=0; else rc=$?; fi
  case $rc in
    0) if audit_hook_reduce "$runtime"; then return 0; else return $?; fi ;;
    76) return 76 ;;
    *) return "$rc" ;;
  esac
}
audit_hook_goal_work() {
  local runtime state now active observation rc source_dir source_hash source_sequence
  local domain domain_hash attempt payload action item_id dispatch_proof candidate
  runtime=$1; audit_hook_load "$runtime"
  active=$runtime/.goal-active.$$.json
  observation=$runtime/.goal-observation-hook.$$.json
  domain=$runtime/.goal-active-domain.$$.json
  attempt=0
  while [ "$attempt" -lt 8 ]; do
    attempt=$((attempt + 1))
    "$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce || {
      rc=$?; rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain"; return "$rc"; }
    source_dir=$(runtime_current_dir) || {
      rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain"; return 5; }
    state=$source_dir/state.json; now=$(runtime_now)
    if jq -e 'any(.queue.items[];(.status=="starting" or .status=="running") and
        .claim!=null)' "$state" >/dev/null; then
      jq -Sc '
        [.queue.items[]|select((.status=="starting" or .status=="running") and .claim!=null)]|
        sort_by(-.priority,.id)|.[0]|
        {mode:"goal",goal_ref:.goal_ref,item_id:.id,claim_token:.claim.token,
         recovery_event_hash:null}' "$state" >"$active"
    elif jq -e '.recovery!=null and
        (.recovery.event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$state" >/dev/null; then
      jq -Sc '{mode:"recovery",goal_ref:(.recovery.goal_ref//"runtime-recovery"),
        item_id:null,claim_token:null,recovery_event_hash:.recovery.event_hash}' "$state" >"$active"
    elif jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
        any(.queue.items[];(.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and .claim==null and
          .next_action_at<=$now)' "$state" >/dev/null; then
      jq -Sc --argjson now "$now" '
        [.queue.items[]|select((.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and .claim==null and
          .next_action_at<=$now)]|sort_by(-.priority,.next_action_at,.id)|.[0]|
        {mode:"goal",goal_ref:.goal_ref,item_id:.id,claim_token:null,
          recovery_event_hash:null}' "$state" >"$active"
      item_id=$(jq -r .item_id "$active"); dispatch_proof=''
      for candidate in "$runtime"/events/*.json; do
        [ -f "$candidate" ] && [ ! -L "$candidate" ] || continue
        jq -e --arg id "$item_id" --argjson now "$now" '
          .at==$now and .actor=="queue" and .type=="queue_reserve" and
          any(.payload.reservations[]?;.id==$id)' "$candidate" >/dev/null || continue
        dispatch_proof=$(jq -r .event_hash "$candidate")
      done
      if [ -z "$dispatch_proof" ]; then
        for candidate in "$runtime"/events/*.json; do
          [ -f "$candidate" ] && [ ! -L "$candidate" ] || continue
          jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
            .at==$now and .actor=="guardian" and
            (.type|IN("dispatch_retry_exhausted","wake_requested"))' \
            "$candidate" >/dev/null || continue
          dispatch_proof=$(jq -r .event_hash "$candidate")
        done
      fi
      [ -n "$dispatch_proof" ] || {
        rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain"; return 75; }
      jq --arg proof "$dispatch_proof" '.recovery_event_hash=$proof' \
        "$active" >"$active.next" && mv -f "$active.next" "$active"
    else
      rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain"
      return 75
    fi
    runtime_goal_active_domain "$state" "$domain" || {
      rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain"; return 5; }
    source_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$state")
    source_sequence=$(jq -er '.last_event_sequence|select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0)' \
      "$state") || { rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain"; return 5; }
    domain_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$domain")
~~~
