~~~bash
           $holder!=null and $holder.id!=$blocked.id and $holder.status=="running" and
           ($holder.resource_locks|index($x.payload.resource))!=null and
           (group($blocked)==null or group($holder)==null or
             group($blocked)!=group($holder)) and
           $holder.claim.token==$x.payload.blocked_by.claim_token and
           $holder.claim.worker_pid==$x.payload.blocked_by.worker_pid and
           $holder.claim.worker_start_token==$x.payload.blocked_by.worker_start_token and
           $actual_token==$holder.claim.worker_start_token and
           ($holder.claim.expires_at|type)=="number" and
           $holder.claim.expires_at>=$x.payload.to and
           $x.payload.blocked_by.observed_start_token==$actual_token and
           $p.event_hash==$x.payload.blocked_by.activate_event_hash and
           $p.sequence==$x.payload.blocked_by.activate_event_id and
           $p.type=="queue_activate" and $p.payload.id==$holder.id and
           $p.payload.token==$holder.claim.token and $p.at<=$x.payload.from' \
           "$output.base" >/dev/null; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          if any(.audit.resource_blocks[];.event_hash==$x.event_hash) then .
          else .audit.resource_blocks += [{item_id:$x.payload.item_id,
            from:$x.payload.from,to:$x.payload.to,resource:$x.payload.resource,
            blocked_by:$x.payload.blocked_by,event_id:$x.sequence,event_hash:$x.event_hash}] end |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+
            [$x.event_hash,$x.payload.blocked_by.activate_event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      else
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          .audit.resource_block_conflicts += [$event[0].event_hash]' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      fi
      rm -f "$proof"
      mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      ;;
    queue_reserve)
      if polylane_audit_validate_reserve_selection "$prior_state" "$event" &&
         jq -e '. as $x |
           (.payload.reservations|type)=="array" and
           (.payload.reservations|length)>0 and
           all(.payload.reservations[];
             (.id|type)=="string" and (.id|length)>0 and
             (.claim.token|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
             .claim.claimed_at==$x.at and .claim.expires_at>$x.at and
             (.claim.guardian_pid|type)=="number" and .claim.guardian_pid>0 and
             (.claim.guardian_start_token|type)=="string" and
             (.claim.guardian_start_token|length)>0 and
             (.claim.guardian_generation|type)=="number" and
             .claim.guardian_generation>0)' "$event" >/dev/null; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          def recovery_group($item):
            if (($item.args.actor//null)|type)=="string" and
               (($item.args.reason//null)|type)=="string" and
               (($item.args.strategy_generation//null)|type)=="number" then
              {actor:$item.args.actor,reason:$item.args.reason,
                strategy_generation:$item.args.strategy_generation}
            else null end;
          reduce ($x.payload.reservations[]?) as $reservation (.;
            if (.audit.deadlines[$reservation.id]//null)!=null and
               any(.queue.items[];
                 .id==$reservation.id and (.status|IN("starting","running","complete")) and
                 .claim.token==$reservation.claim.token and
                 .claim.guardian_pid==$reservation.claim.guardian_pid and
                 .claim.guardian_start_token==$reservation.claim.guardian_start_token and
                 .claim.guardian_generation==$reservation.claim.guardian_generation)
            then
              if .audit.deadlines[$reservation.id].satisfied_at==null or
                 $x.at<.audit.deadlines[$reservation.id].satisfied_at then
                .audit.deadlines[$reservation.id].satisfied_at=$x.at |
                .audit.deadlines[$reservation.id].satisfied_event_id=$x.sequence |
                .audit.deadlines[$reservation.id].satisfied_event_hash=$x.event_hash
              else . end
            else . end) |
          reduce ($x.payload.reservations[]?) as $reservation (.;
            ([.queue.items[]|select(.id==$reservation.id)]|
              if length==1 then .[0] else null end) as $holder |
            if $holder==null or recovery_group($holder)==null then .
            else reduce (.audit.deadlines|keys[]) as $blocked_id (.;
              (.audit.deadlines[$blocked_id]) as $deadline |
              ([.queue.items[]|select(.id==$blocked_id)]|
                if length==1 then .[0] else null end) as $blocked |
              if $blocked_id!=$holder.id and $deadline.satisfied_at==null and
                 $deadline.due_at<=$x.at and $blocked!=null and
                 ($blocked.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and
                 recovery_group($blocked)==recovery_group($holder) and
                 ($blocked.resource_locks|type)=="array" and
                 ($blocked.resource_locks|length)>0 and
                 ($blocked.resource_locks-($holder.resource_locks//[])|length)==0
              then
                .audit.deadlines[$blocked_id].satisfied_at=$x.at |
                .audit.deadlines[$blocked_id].satisfied_event_id=$x.sequence |
                .audit.deadlines[$blocked_id].satisfied_event_hash=$x.event_hash |
                .audit.deadlines[$blocked_id].blocked_by={
                  item_id:$holder.id,status:$holder.status,
                  claim_token:$reservation.claim.token,
                  worker_pid:null,worker_start_token:null,
                  observed_start_token:null,
                  resource_locks:$blocked.resource_locks,
                  proof_event_id:$x.sequence,proof_event_hash:$x.event_hash,
                  proof_event_type:"queue_reserve"}
              else . end)
            end) |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+[$x.event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      else
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" '
          .audit.reservation_conflicts += [$event[0].event_hash]' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      fi
      mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      ;;
    queue_activate|queue_complete|queue_fail|queue_reclaim|queue_recovered)
      id=$(jq -r '.payload.id // .payload.item_id // ""' "$event")
      if [ -n "$id" ] && jq -e --arg id "$id" '.audit.deadlines[$id]!=null' "$output.base" >/dev/null; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" --arg id "$id" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          if .audit.deadlines[$id].satisfied_at==null or
             $x.at<.audit.deadlines[$id].satisfied_at then
            .audit.deadlines[$id].satisfied_at=$x.at |
            .audit.deadlines[$id].satisfied_event_id=$x.sequence |
            .audit.deadlines[$id].satisfied_event_hash=$x.event_hash
          else . end |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+[$x.event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
        mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      fi
      ;;
    recovery_proof)
      key=$(jq -r '.payload.cause_event_hash+"|"+.payload.recovery' "$event")
      prior=$(jq -c --arg key "$key" '.audit.recovery_pairs[$key]//null' "$output.base")
      if [ "$prior" = null ]; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" --arg key "$key" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.recovery_pairs[$key]={
            cause_event_id:$x.payload.cause_event_id,
            cause_event_hash:$x.payload.cause_event_hash,
            recovery:$x.payload.recovery,evidence_path:$x.payload.evidence_path,
            evidence_hash:$x.payload.evidence_hash,recovery_event_id:$x.sequence,
            recovery_event_hash:$x.event_hash} |
          .audit.recovery_results[$x.action_id]={
            status:"accepted",key:$key,evidence_hash:$x.payload.evidence_hash} |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+
            [$x.payload.cause_event_hash,$x.event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      elif [ "$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .evidence_hash)" = \
             "$(jq -r .payload.evidence_hash "$event")" ]; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" --arg key "$key" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.recovery_results[$x.action_id]={
            status:"accepted",key:$key,evidence_hash:$x.payload.evidence_hash,
            idempotent:true}' "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      else
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" --arg key "$key" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.recovery_results[$x.action_id]={
            status:"rejected",key:$key,reason:"conflicting_recovery_evidence",
            evidence_hash:$x.payload.evidence_hash}' "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      fi
      mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      ;;
    audit_interval)
      from=$(jq -r .payload.from "$event"); to=$(jq -r .payload.to "$event")
      expected=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-expected.$$.json; interval_valid=1
      case $from:$to in *[!0-9:]*) interval_valid=0;;
      *) if [ "$from" -ge 0 ] && [ "$to" -le 21600 ] && [ "$to" -gt "$from" ]; then
           polylane_audit_recompute_interval "$output.base" "$from" "$to" "$expected"
           jq -e --slurpfile expected "$expected" '
             .payload.source_event_cursor==(.sequence-1) and
             (.payload|del(.source_event_cursor))==$expected[0]' "$event" >/dev/null || {
               interval_valid=0; }
         else interval_valid=0; fi;; esac
      rm -f "$expected"
      if [ "$interval_valid" -eq 0 ]; then
        jq --arg key "invalid:$(jq -r .sequence "$event")" \
          '.audit.interval_conflicts=((.audit.interval_conflicts//[])+[$key])' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
      else
        key=$(jq -r '(.payload.from|tostring)+":"+(.payload.to|tostring)' "$event")
        prior=$(jq -c --arg key "$key" '.audit.intervals[$key]//null' "$output.base")
        if [ "$prior" = null ]; then
        jq --slurpfile event "$event" --arg key "$key" '
          ($event[0]) as $x |
          .audit.intervals[$key]=($x.payload+{event_id:$x.sequence,event_hash:$x.event_hash}) |
          .audit.pinned_event_hashes=((.audit.pinned_event_hashes+[$x.event_hash])|unique)' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
        elif [ "$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -Sc 'del(.event_id,.event_hash)')" = \
             "$(jq -Sc .payload "$event")" ]; then
        cp "$output.base" "$output.next"
        else
        jq --arg key "$key" '.audit.interval_conflicts=((.audit.interval_conflicts//[])+[$key])' \
          "$output.base" >"$output.next"
        fi
      fi
      mv -f "$output.next" "$output.base"
      ;;
  esac
  mv -f "$output.base" "$output"
}
~~~

Install the bounded-handoff final body for `codex/scripts/polylane-codex-controller.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
umask 077
[ "$#" -eq 2 ] || exit 2
allow_test_overrides=0
[ "${POLYLANE_HERMETIC:-0}:${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1:1 ] && allow_test_overrides=1
unset POLYLANE_NOW_EPOCH POLYLANE_TEST_EVENT_BEFORE_RENAME_GATE POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT \
  POLYLANE_TEST_FOREGROUND POLYLANE_TEST_KEEPER_HELPER POLYLANE_TEST_LOGICAL_CPUS \
  POLYLANE_TEST_MARKER POLYLANE_TEST_PACKAGE_ROOT POLYLANE_TEST_RUNTIME_MAX_KB \
  POLYLANE_TEST_RUN_ID
if [ "$allow_test_overrides" -ne 1 ]; then
  unset POLYLANE_TEST_MODE POLYLANE_CODEX_CLI POLYLANE_CONTROLLER_ONCE
fi
project=$(cd "$1" && pwd -P); loop=$2
case $loop in ''|*[!A-Za-z0-9_-]*) exit 2;; esac
[ "${#loop}" -le 64 ] || exit 2
SCRIPT_DIR=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)
if [ -x "$SCRIPT_DIR/polylane-controller-turn.sh" ]; then BIN=$SCRIPT_DIR
else BIN=$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../../core/scripts" && pwd -P); fi
DRIVER=$BIN/polylane-controller-turn.sh
JOB=$SCRIPT_DIR/polylane-codex-turn-job.sh
STATE=$SCRIPT_DIR/polylane-state.sh
[ -x "$DRIVER" ] && [ -x "$JOB" ] || exit 5
[ -x "$STATE" ] || STATE=$BIN/polylane-state.sh
runtime=$project/.polylane/runtime
iterations=0
wait_for_runtime_event() {
  local revision wait_rc
  revision=$(jq -r .revision "$runtime/current/state.json")
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" wake || true
  "$STATE" follow --project "$project" --after-revision "$revision" --timeout 2 \
    >/dev/null 2>&1 || { wait_rc=$?; [ "$wait_rc" -eq 3 ] || return "$wait_rc"; }
}
while :; do
  iterations=$((iterations + 1))
  if "$DRIVER" step "$project" "$loop"; then rc=0; else rc=$?; fi
  case $rc in
    0) : ;;
    10)
      receipt=$runtime/controller-private/receipt.$$.json
      if "$DRIVER" prepare "$project" "$loop" "$receipt"; then turn_rc=0
      else turn_rc=$?; fi
      if [ "$turn_rc" -eq 0 ]; then
        if "$JOB" "$project" "$loop" "$receipt"; then turn_rc=0
        else turn_rc=$?; fi
      fi
      if [ "$turn_rc" -eq 0 ]; then
        proposal=$(jq -er .proposal_path "$receipt")
        if "$DRIVER" apply "$project" "$loop" "$receipt" "$proposal"; then turn_rc=0
        else turn_rc=$?; fi
      fi
      rm -f "$receipt"
      case $turn_rc in 0) :;; 7) continue;; *) exit "$turn_rc";; esac ;;
    11) wait_for_runtime_event ;;
    12)
      [ "$(jq -r '.terminal // ""' "$runtime/current/state.json")" != COMPLETE ] || exit 0
      wait_for_runtime_event ;;
    7) continue ;;
    99) exit 99 ;;
    *) exit "$rc" ;;
  esac
  [ "${POLYLANE_CONTROLLER_ONCE:-0}" != 1 ] || exit 0
done
~~~

Install the bounded-handoff final body for `core/scripts/lib/polylane-controller-reducer.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
polylane_controller_apply_event() {
  local state event output
  state=$1 event=$2 output=$3
  jq --slurpfile e "$event" '
    ($e[0]) as $x | ($x.payload) as $p |
    .controller=(.controller // {stage:"PLANNED",stage_revision:0,cycle:1,run_id:null,
      pending_turn:null,applied_transactions:[],last_conflict:null,evidence:{}}) |
    .queue=(.queue // {revision:0,provider_state:"available",items:[]}) |
    if $x.type=="controller_turn_start" then
      if .controller.pending_turn!=null and .controller.pending_turn.turn_id==$p.turn_id then .
      elif .controller.pending_turn==null and .revision==$p.expected_runtime_revision and
           .controller.stage=="PLANNED" then .controller.pending_turn=$p
      else .controller.last_conflict={type:"turn_start",turn_id:$p.turn_id,event_sequence:$x.sequence} end
    elif $x.type=="controller_transaction" then
      if (.controller.applied_transactions|index($p.transaction_id))!=null then .
      # Guardian/lease heartbeats advance the global revision while a controller compiles
      # its immutable policy. Controller CAS is therefore guarded by its own stage revision,
      # stage, pending turn, and (where mutated) queue revision—not unrelated heartbeats.
      elif .controller.stage_revision!=$p.expected_stage_revision or
           .controller.stage!=$p.expected_stage then
        .controller.last_conflict={type:"revision_or_stage",transaction_id:$p.transaction_id,
          event_sequence:$x.sequence,expected_runtime_revision:$p.expected_runtime_revision,
          actual_runtime_revision:.revision,expected_stage:$p.expected_stage,actual_stage:.controller.stage}
      elif $p.kind=="plan_cycle" and .queue.revision!=$p.expected_queue_revision then
        .controller.last_conflict={type:"queue_revision",transaction_id:$p.transaction_id,
          event_sequence:$x.sequence,expected_queue_revision:$p.expected_queue_revision,
          actual_queue_revision:.queue.revision}
      elif $p.kind=="plan_cycle" and .queue.revision==$p.expected_queue_revision and
           .controller.pending_turn.turn_id==$p.turn_id and
           (($p.retry_of//null)==null or
             (.controller.last_conflict.type=="queue_revision" and
              .controller.last_conflict.transaction_id==$p.retry_of)) and
           ((.certification_policy // null)==null or .certification_policy==$p.certification_policy) and
           (any(.queue.items[];.id==$p.queue_item.id)|not) then
        .queue.items += [$p.queue_item + {created_sequence:$x.sequence}] |
        .queue.revision += 1 | .controller.stage="LANES_RUNNING" |
        .controller.stage_revision += 1 | .controller.run_id=$p.run_id |
        .controller.manifest=$p.manifest | .controller.pending_turn=null |
        .certification_policy=(.certification_policy // $p.certification_policy) |
        .controller.recovery_item_id=null |
        .controller.evidence.plan=$p.evidence |
        .controller.applied_transactions += [$p.transaction_id]
      elif $p.kind=="reject_proposal" and .controller.pending_turn.turn_id==$p.turn_id then
        .controller.pending_turn=null |
        .controller.proposal_rejections=((.controller.proposal_rejections // []) +
          [{turn_id:$p.turn_id,reason_code:$p.reason_code,evidence:$p.evidence,event_sequence:$x.sequence}]) |
        .controller.proposal_rejections=(.controller.proposal_rejections[-8:]) |
        .controller.applied_transactions += [$p.transaction_id]
      elif $p.kind=="advance_stage" and
        (["LANES_RUNNING:INTEGRATING","INTEGRATING:PROMOTION_PREPARED",
          "PROMOTION_PREPARED:PROMOTED","PROMOTED:RESULT_RECORDED",
          "RESULT_RECORDED:CLEANUP"] | index($p.expected_stage+":"+$p.next_stage))!=null then
        .controller.stage=$p.next_stage | .controller.stage_revision += 1 |
        .controller.evidence[$p.next_stage]=$p.evidence |
        .controller.applied_transactions += [$p.transaction_id]
      elif $p.kind=="enqueue_followups" and $p.expected_stage=="CLEANUP" and
           .queue.revision==$p.expected_queue_revision and
           (([.queue.items[].id]+[$p.queue_items[].id]) as $ids |
             ($ids|length)==($ids|unique|length)) and
           (([$p.queue_items[].id]|sort)==(($p.critical_ids+$p.sidecar_ids)|sort)) and
           (($p.critical_ids+$p.sidecar_ids|length)==($p.critical_ids+$p.sidecar_ids|unique|length)) then
        .queue.items += [$p.queue_items[] + {created_sequence:$x.sequence}] |
        .queue.revision += 1 | .controller.stage="NEXT_ENQUEUED" |
        .controller.stage_revision += 1 | .controller.followup_ids=$p.critical_ids |
        .controller.sidecar_ids=((.controller.sidecar_ids // [])+$p.sidecar_ids|unique) |
        .controller.applied_transactions += [$p.transaction_id]
      elif $p.kind=="route_council" and $p.expected_stage=="NEXT_ENQUEUED" and
           ($p.council.verdict!="GO" or $p.council.mode=="exhaustive") and
           .queue.revision==$p.expected_queue_revision and
           all(.queue.items[];.id!=$p.queue_item.id) then
        .queue.items += [$p.queue_item + {created_sequence:$x.sequence}] |
        .queue.revision += 1 | .controller.stage="COUNCIL_ROUTED" |
        .controller.stage_revision += 1 | .controller.council=$p.council |
        .controller.followup_ids=[$p.queue_item.id] |
        .controller.applied_transactions += [$p.transaction_id]
      elif $p.kind=="escalate_council" and $p.expected_stage=="NEXT_ENQUEUED" and
           .queue.revision==$p.expected_queue_revision and
           all(.queue.items[];.id!=$p.queue_item.id) then
        .queue.items += [$p.queue_item + {created_sequence:$x.sequence}] |
        .queue.revision += 1 | .controller.stage="EXHAUSTIVE_COUNCIL" |
        .controller.stage_revision += 1 | .controller.followup_ids=[$p.queue_item.id] |
        .controller.fast_council=$p.fast_council |
        .controller.applied_transactions += [$p.transaction_id]
      elif $p.kind=="route_council" and $p.expected_stage=="EXHAUSTIVE_COUNCIL" and
           $p.council.mode=="exhaustive" and .queue.revision==$p.expected_queue_revision and
           all(.queue.items[];.id!=$p.queue_item.id) then
        .queue.items += [$p.queue_item + {created_sequence:$x.sequence}] |
        .queue.revision += 1 | .controller.stage="COUNCIL_ROUTED" |
        .controller.stage_revision += 1 | .controller.council=$p.council |
        .controller.followup_ids=[$p.queue_item.id] |
        .controller.applied_transactions += [$p.transaction_id]
      elif $p.kind=="enqueue_council_successor" and $p.expected_stage=="COUNCIL_ROUTED" and
           .queue.revision==$p.expected_queue_revision and
           (. as $state | all($p.queue_items[];
             . as $new | all($state.queue.items[];.id!=$new.id))) and
           (([$p.queue_items[].id]|sort)==(($p.critical_ids+$p.sidecar_ids)|sort)) then
        .queue.items += [$p.queue_items[] + {created_sequence:$x.sequence}] |
        .queue.revision += 1 |
        .controller.stage=(if ($p.critical_ids|length)==0 then "PLANNED" else "SUCCESSOR_ENQUEUED" end) |
        .controller.stage_revision += 1 | .controller.followup_ids=$p.critical_ids |
        .controller.sidecar_ids=((.controller.sidecar_ids // [])+$p.sidecar_ids|unique) |
        .controller.next_goal_ref=$p.next_goal_ref |
        .controller.cycle+=(if ($p.critical_ids|length)==0 then 1 else 0 end) |
        .controller.run_id=(if ($p.critical_ids|length)==0 then null else .controller.run_id end) |
        .controller.manifest=(if ($p.critical_ids|length)==0 then null else .controller.manifest end) |
        .controller.council=(if ($p.critical_ids|length)==0 then null else .controller.council end) |
        .controller.applied_transactions += [$p.transaction_id]
      elif $p.kind=="open_next_cycle" and $p.expected_stage=="SUCCESSOR_ENQUEUED" then
        .controller.stage="PLANNED" | .controller.stage_revision += 1 |
        .controller.cycle += 1 | .controller.run_id=null | .controller.manifest=null |
        .controller.followup_ids=[] | .controller.council=null |
        .controller.applied_transactions += [$p.transaction_id]
      elif $p.kind=="route_recovery" and .queue.revision==$p.expected_queue_revision and
           all(.queue.items[];.id!=$p.queue_item.id) then
        .queue.items += [$p.queue_item + {created_sequence:$x.sequence}] |
        .queue.revision += 1 | .controller.stage="PLANNED" |
        .controller.stage_revision += 1 | .controller.run_id=null | .controller.manifest=null |
        .controller.pending_turn=null | .controller.recovery_item_id=$p.queue_item.id |
        .controller.applied_transactions += [$p.transaction_id]
      else .controller.last_conflict={type:"invalid_effect",transaction_id:$p.transaction_id,
        event_sequence:$x.sequence} end
    else . end' "$state" >"$output"
}
~~~

Install the bounded-handoff final body for `core/scripts/polylane-controller-turn.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
umask 077
SELF=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)
ROOT=$(cd "$SELF/.." && pwd -P)
RUNTIME=$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh
SCHEMA=$ROOT/config/polylane-controller-proposal-v1.json
COMMAND_POLICY=$SELF/polylane-command-policy.sh
. "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
. "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-events.sh"
sha_file() { runtime_sha256 "$1"; }
sha_stream() { runtime_sha256_stdin; }
file_mode() { stat -f '%Lp' "$1" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$1"; }
canonical_project() { (cd "$1" && pwd -P) || return 5; }
canonical_file() {
  [ -f "$1" ] && [ ! -L "$1" ] || return 5
  directory=$(cd "$(dirname "$1")" && pwd -P) || return 5
  printf '%s/%s' "$directory" "$(basename "$1")"
}
immutable_publish() {
  source=$1 destination=$2
  jq -e . "$source" >/dev/null || return 5
  if [ -e "$destination" ]; then
    [ -f "$destination" ] && [ ! -L "$destination" ] &&
      [ "$(sha_file "$source")" = "$(sha_file "$destination")" ] || return 5
    rm -f "$source"; return 0
  fi
  chmod 400 "$source"; mv "$source" "$destination"
}
pin_state() {
  RUNTIME_DIR=$1
  PINNED_DIR=$(runtime_current_dir) || return 5
  PINNED_STATE=$PINNED_DIR/state.json
}
emit_transaction() {
  runtime=$1 payload=$2
  transaction=$(jq -er .transaction_id "$payload"); kind=$(jq -er .kind "$payload")
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT:-}" != "controller-before-$kind" ] || return 99
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" emit controller controller_transaction "$transaction" \
    --fingerprint "$(sha_file "$payload")" --payload-file "$payload"
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT:-}" != "controller-after-$kind-event" ] || return 99
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" reduce
  pin_state "$runtime"
  project=$(jq -er .project_root "$PINNED_STATE")
  project_certification_policy "$project" "$runtime"
  jq -e --arg transaction "$transaction" \
    '.controller.applied_transactions|index($transaction)!=null' "$PINNED_STATE" >/dev/null || return 7
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT:-}" != "controller-after-$kind" ] || return 99
}
ownership_hash() {
  jq -Sc '{ownership_globs,resource_locks}' "$1" | sha_stream
}
queue_item() {
  id=$1 kind=$2 mode=$3 goal=$4 priority=$5 args=$6 depends=$7 globs=$8 resources=$9 destination=${10}
  jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg kind "$kind" --arg mode "$mode" --arg goal "$goal" \
    --argjson priority "$priority" --argjson args "$args" --argjson depends "$depends" \
    --argjson globs "$globs" --argjson resources "$resources" --argjson now "$(runtime_now)" \
    '{schema_version:1,id:$id,kind:$kind,mode:$mode,status:"ready",priority:$priority,
      goal_ref:$goal,args:$args,depends_on:$depends,next_action_at:$now,deadline_at:($now+900),
      attempt:1,strategy_hash:("controller:"+$id),ownership_globs:($globs|sort|unique),
      resource_locks:($resources|sort|unique),claim:null,last_error:null}' >"$destination.base"
  hash=$(ownership_hash "$destination.base")
  jq --arg hash "$hash" '. + {ownership_hash:$hash}' "$destination.base" >"$destination"
  rm -f "$destination.base"
}
prepare_turn() {
  project=$(canonical_project "$1"); loop=$2 receipt=$3; runtime=$project/.polylane/runtime
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" reduce; pin_state "$runtime"
  project_certification_policy "$project" "$runtime"
  jq -e --arg loop "$loop" '.loop_id==$loop and .phase=="WORKING" and
    ((.controller.stage // "PLANNED")=="PLANNED")' "$PINNED_STATE" >/dev/null || return 5
  pending=$(jq -c '.controller.pending_turn // null' "$PINNED_STATE")
  if [ "$pending" != null ]; then
    printf '%s\n' "$pending" >"$receipt"; return 0
  fi
  goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json
  [ -f "$goal" ] && [ ! -L "$goal" ] || return 5
  jq -e '.skill_inventory|type=="object" and
    (keys|sort)==["inventory_hash","inventory_path"] and
    (.inventory_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.inventory_path|type=="string" and startswith("/"))' "$goal" >/dev/null || return 5
  inventory=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .skill_inventory.inventory_path "$goal")") || return 5
  case $inventory in "$runtime"/skill-inventory/*.json) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  inventory_hash=$(jq -r .skill_inventory.inventory_hash "$goal")
  [ "$(sha_file "$inventory")" = "$inventory_hash" ] || return 5
  artifacts=$runtime/controller-turns; mkdir -p "$artifacts"
  cycle=$(jq -r '.controller.cycle // 1' "$PINNED_STATE")
  input_tmp=$artifacts/input.$$.json
  jq -n --arg loop "$loop" --argjson cycle "$cycle" --arg state_hash "$(sha_file "$PINNED_STATE")" \
    --arg goal_hash "$(sha_file "$goal")" --arg inventory "$inventory" \
    --arg inventory_hash "$inventory_hash" --slurpfile runtime "$PINNED_STATE" --slurpfile goal "$goal" \
    '{schema_version:1,loop_id:$loop,cycle:$cycle,runtime_revision:$runtime[0].revision,
      state_hash:$state_hash,goal_hash:$goal_hash,controller:($runtime[0].controller // {}),
      queue:{revision:($runtime[0].queue.revision // 0),items:[$runtime[0].queue.items[]?|
        {id,kind,status,goal_ref,attempt,last_error}]},
      skill_inventory:{path:$inventory,hash:$inventory_hash},goal_state:$goal[0]}' >"$input_tmp"
  input_hash=$(sha_file "$input_tmp"); input=$artifacts/input-${input_hash#sha256:}.json
  immutable_publish "$input_tmp" "$input"
  turn_id="turn-$cycle-$(printf '%s' "${input_hash#sha256:}" | cut -c1-24)"
  prompt_tmp=$artifacts/prompt.$$.json
  jq -n --arg turn "$turn_id" --arg input_hash "$input_hash" --slurpfile input "$input" \
    '{role:"Polylane Codex controller planner",turn_id:$turn,input_hash:$input_hash,
      instructions:["Return one schema-valid START_CYCLE proposal.",
        "Do not modify files or claim that a mutation happened.",
        "Describe only activities, ownership globs, and one absolute executable argv vector for each lane.",
        "Supply the exact install, build, boot, and eight-category certification argv vectors; this policy is frozen for the loop after its first accepted proposal.",
        "Never choose, suggest, or include skill ids; the Builder scout is the sole skill chooser."],
      immutable_input:$input[0]}' >"$prompt_tmp"
  prompt_hash=$(sha_file "$prompt_tmp"); prompt=$artifacts/prompt-${prompt_hash#sha256:}.json
  immutable_publish "$prompt_tmp" "$prompt"
  private=$runtime/controller-private; mkdir -p "$private"; chmod 700 "$private"
  proposal=$private/proposal-$turn_id.json; log=$private/codex-$turn_id.jsonl
  start=$runtime/controller-turn-start.$$.json
  jq -n --arg turn "$turn_id" --arg input "$input" --arg input_hash "$input_hash" \
    --arg prompt "$prompt" --arg prompt_hash "$prompt_hash" --arg proposal "$proposal" \
    --arg log "$log" --arg schema "$SCHEMA" --argjson expected "$(jq -r .revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
    '{turn_id:$turn,input_path:$input,input_hash:$input_hash,prompt_path:$prompt,
      prompt_hash:$prompt_hash,proposal_path:$proposal,log_path:$log,schema_path:$schema,
      expected_runtime_revision:$expected}' >"$start"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" emit controller controller_turn_start "$turn_id" \
    --fingerprint "$prompt_hash" --payload-file "$start"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" reduce; rm -f "$start"; pin_state "$runtime"
  project_certification_policy "$project" "$runtime"
  jq -e --arg turn "$turn_id" '.controller.pending_turn.turn_id==$turn' "$PINNED_STATE" >/dev/null || return 7
  jq '.controller.pending_turn' "$PINNED_STATE" >"$receipt"
}
validate_proposal() {
  proposal=$1 turn=$2 input_hash=$3 input=$4
  jq -e --arg turn "$turn" --arg input_hash "$input_hash" --slurpfile input "$input" '
    def valid_argv: type=="array" and length>0 and
      (.[0]|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and all(.[];type=="string" and length>0);
    . as $proposal |
    type=="object" and (keys|sort)==["action","builders","certification","goal_ref","input_hash",
      "integrator","rationale","schema_version","turn_id"] and .schema_version==1 and .turn_id==$turn and
    .input_hash==$input_hash and .action=="START_CYCLE" and
    (.goal_ref|type=="string" and length>0 and length<=160) and
    (.rationale|type=="string" and length>0) and (.builders|length>=1 and length<=6) and
    ([$proposal.builders[].id,$proposal.integrator.id]|length)==
      ([$proposal.builders[].id,$proposal.integrator.id]|unique|length) and
    all(.builders[];
      (keys|sort)==["activities","brief","id","ownership_globs","verification_argv"] and
      (.id|test("^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{1,64}$")) and (.brief|type=="string" and length>0) and
      (.activities|type=="array" and length>0) and
      (.activities == (.activities|sort|unique)) and
      all(.activities[];type=="string" and length>0) and
      (.ownership_globs|type=="array" and length>0) and
      (.ownership_globs == (.ownership_globs|sort|unique)) and
      all(.ownership_globs[];length>0 and (startswith("/")|not) and (contains("..")|not)) and
      (.verification_argv|valid_argv)) and
    (.integrator|type=="object" and
      (keys|sort)==["activities","brief","id","ownership_globs","verification_argv"] and
      (.id|test("^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{1,64}$")) and (.brief|type=="string" and length>0) and
      (.activities|type=="array" and length>0) and
      (.activities == (.activities|sort|unique)) and
      all(.activities[];type=="string" and length>0) and
      (.ownership_globs|type=="array" and length>0) and
      (.ownership_globs == (.ownership_globs|sort|unique)) and
      all(.ownership_globs[];length>0 and (startswith("/")|not) and (contains("..")|not)) and
      (.verification_argv|valid_argv)) and
    (.certification|type=="object" and
      (keys|sort)==["checks","deadline_seconds","fresh_checkout"] and
      (.deadline_seconds|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=1 and .<=86400) and
      (.checks|type=="object" and
        (keys|sort)==["accessibility","broken_flows","documentation","functional",
          "performance","regression","security","stubs"] and
        all(.[];(keys|sort)==["argv"] and (.argv|valid_argv))) and
      (.fresh_checkout|type=="object" and (keys|sort)==["boot","build","install"] and
        all(.[];(keys|sort)==["argv"] and (.argv|valid_argv))))' "$proposal" >/dev/null
}
project_certification_policy() {
  project=$(canonical_project "$1"); runtime=$2
  pin_state "$runtime"
  policy=$(jq -c '.certification_policy // null' "$PINNED_STATE")
  [ "$policy" != null ] || return 0
  jq -e '.certification_policy|type=="object" and
    (keys|sort)==["checks","deadline_seconds","fresh_checkout","policy_hash","revision","schema_version"] and
    .schema_version==1 and .revision==1 and (.policy_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' \
    "$PINNED_STATE" >/dev/null || return 5
  expected=$(printf '%s\n' "$policy" | jq -Sc 'del(.policy_hash)' | sha_stream)
  [ "$expected" = "$(printf '%s\n' "$policy" | jq -r .policy_hash)" ] || return 5
  goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json
  [ -f "$goal" ] && [ ! -L "$goal" ] || return 5
  if jq -e --argjson policy "$policy" '.certification==$policy' "$goal" >/dev/null; then return 0; fi
  jq -e --argjson policy "$policy" '(.certification // null)==null' "$goal" >/dev/null || return 5
  projection=$goal.tmp.$$
  jq --argjson policy "$policy" '.certification=$policy' "$goal" >"$projection"
  chmod 600 "$projection"; mv "$projection" "$goal"
}
apply_turn() {
  project=$(canonical_project "$1"); loop=$2 receipt=$3 proposal=$4; runtime=$project/.polylane/runtime
  proposal=$(canonical_file "$proposal") || return 5
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" reduce; pin_state "$runtime"
  project_certification_policy "$project" "$runtime"
  turn=$(jq -er .controller.pending_turn.turn_id "$PINNED_STATE")
  [ "$(jq -r .turn_id "$receipt")" = "$turn" ] || return 5
  input_hash=$(jq -r .controller.pending_turn.input_hash "$PINNED_STATE")
  input=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .controller.pending_turn.input_path "$PINNED_STATE")") || return 5
  [ "$(sha_file "$input")" = "$input_hash" ] || return 5
  [ "$proposal" = "$(jq -r .controller.pending_turn.proposal_path "$PINNED_STATE")" ] || return 5
  validate_proposal "$proposal" "$turn" "$input_hash" "$input" || return 5
  compiled_tmp=$runtime/controller-turns/compiled-controller.$$.json
  "$COMMAND_POLICY" compile-controller "$project" "$proposal" "$compiled_tmp" || {
    output_hash=$(sha_file "$proposal"); reject=$runtime/controller-reject.$$.json
    jq -n --arg transaction "reject-$turn-${output_hash#sha256:}" --arg turn "$turn" \
      --arg output_hash "$output_hash" --argjson expected "$(jq -r .revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
      --argjson stage_revision "$(jq -r '.controller.stage_revision // 0' "$PINNED_STATE")" \
      '{transaction_id:($transaction[0:150]),kind:"reject_proposal",turn_id:$turn,
        expected_runtime_revision:$expected,expected_stage:"PLANNED",expected_stage_revision:$stage_revision,
        reason_code:"unsafe_command_policy",evidence:{proposal_hash:$output_hash}}' >"$reject"
    emit_transaction "$runtime" "$reject"; rm -f "$reject" "$compiled_tmp"; return 13; }
  goal_ref=$(jq -r .goal_ref "$proposal")
  goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json
  jq -e --arg goal "$goal_ref" 'any(.goal_tree.items[]?;.id==$goal and (.status//"open")!="complete") or
    any(.milestones[]?;.id==$goal and (.status//"open")!="complete") or
    .next_goal_ref==$goal' "$goal" >/dev/null || return 5
  policy_tmp=$runtime/controller-turns/certification-policy.$$.json
  jq -Sc '.certification + {schema_version:1,revision:1}' "$compiled_tmp" >"$policy_tmp.base"
  policy_hash=$(sha_file "$policy_tmp.base")
  jq --arg hash "$policy_hash" '. + {policy_hash:$hash}' "$policy_tmp.base" >"$policy_tmp"
  rm -f "$policy_tmp.base"
  jq -e --slurpfile policy "$policy_tmp" '
    (.certification_policy // null)==null or .certification_policy==$policy[0]' \
    "$PINNED_STATE" >/dev/null || { rm -f "$policy_tmp"; return 5; }
  output_hash=$(sha_file "$proposal"); cycle=$(jq -r '.controller.cycle // 1' "$PINNED_STATE")
  run_id=$(printf '%s:%s:%s:%s' "$loop" "$cycle" "$turn" "$output_hash" | sha_stream | sed 's/^sha256://;s/^/run-/')
  run_id=$(printf '%s' "$run_id" | cut -c1-68)
  platform=$(canonical_file "$runtime/controller-platform.json") || return 5
  jq -e 'type=="object" and (keys|sort)==["agent","builder","council","integrator","schema_version"] and
    .schema_version==1 and .agent=="codex" and
    all([.builder,.integrator,.council][];
      type=="object" and (keys|sort)==["effort","model"] and
      (.model|type=="string" and length>0) and (.effort|IN("low","medium","high","xhigh")))' \
    "$platform" >/dev/null || return 5
  platform_hash=$(sha_file "$platform")
  base_ref=$(git -C "$project" symbolic-ref -q HEAD) || return 5
  case $base_ref in refs/heads/*) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  expected_base=$(git -C "$project" rev-parse "$base_ref^{commit}") || return 5
  inventory=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .skill_inventory.path "$input")") || return 5
  inventory_hash=$(jq -er .skill_inventory.hash "$input")
  [ "$(sha_file "$inventory")" = "$inventory_hash" ] || return 5
  lanes=$runtime/controller-turns/lanes.$$.json
  jq --slurpfile compiled "$compiled_tmp" '[.builders[]|. as $raw |
    ($compiled[0].builders[]|select(.id==$raw.id)) as $safe |
    {name:.id,role:"builder",activities:([.brief]+.activities|unique),ownership_globs,
      verification_argv:$safe.verification_argv,verification_command:$safe.verification_command}]' \
    "$proposal" >"$lanes"
  integrator=$runtime/controller-turns/integrator.$$.json
  jq --slurpfile compiled "$compiled_tmp" '.integrator|{name:.id,role:"integrator",
    activities:([.brief]+.activities|unique),ownership_globs,
    verification_argv:$compiled[0].integrator.verification_argv,
    verification_command:$compiled[0].integrator.verification_command}' "$proposal" >"$integrator"
  manifest_tmp=$runtime/controller-turns/manifest.$$.json
  jq -n --arg loop "$loop" --argjson cycle "$cycle" --arg run "$run_id" --arg goal "$goal_ref" \
    --arg turn "$turn" --arg input_hash "$input_hash" --arg output_hash "$output_hash" \
    --arg base "${base_ref#refs/heads/}" --arg base_ref "$base_ref" --arg expected_base "$expected_base" \
    --arg platform "$platform" --arg platform_hash "$platform_hash" \
    --arg inventory "$inventory" --arg inventory_hash "$inventory_hash" \
    --slurpfile lanes "$lanes" --slurpfile integrator "$integrator" --slurpfile platform_config "$platform" \
    '{schema_version:2,agent:"codex",loop_id:$loop,cycle:$cycle,run_id:$run,goal_ref:$goal,
      base:$base,base_ref:$base_ref,expected_base:$expected_base,intensity:"custom",
      available_models:([$platform_config[0].builder.model,$platform_config[0].integrator.model]|unique),
      lanes:$lanes[0],integrator:$integrator[0],
      platform_config:{path:$platform,hash:$platform_hash},
      skill_inventory:{inventory_path:$inventory,inventory_hash:$inventory_hash},
      controller_evidence:{turn_id:$turn,input_hash:$input_hash,output_hash:$output_hash},
      result_contract:{schema_version:2,event_actor:"cycle-runner",event_type:"cycle_result"}}' >"$manifest_tmp"
  rm -f "$lanes" "$integrator"
  manifest_hash=$(sha_file "$manifest_tmp"); manifest=$runtime/controller-turns/manifest-${manifest_hash#sha256:}.json
  immutable_publish "$manifest_tmp" "$manifest"
  globs=$(jq -c '[.lanes[].ownership_globs[],.integrator.ownership_globs[]]|sort|unique' "$manifest")
  resources='[]'
  args=$(jq -cn --arg run "$run_id" --arg manifest "$manifest" --arg hash "$manifest_hash" \
    '{run_id:$run,manifest:$manifest,manifest_hash:$hash}')
  item=$runtime/controller-cycle-item.$$.json
  queue_item "cycle-$run_id" cycle online "$goal_ref" 100 "$args" '[]' "$globs" "$resources" "$item"
  tx=$runtime/controller-plan.$$.json
  stage_revision=$(jq -r '.controller.stage_revision // 0' "$PINNED_STATE")
  queue_revision=$(jq -r '.queue.revision // 0' "$PINNED_STATE")
  transaction_base="plan-$run_id-$(printf '%s' "${output_hash#sha256:}" | cut -c1-24)"
  transaction="$transaction_base-s$stage_revision-q$queue_revision"
  transaction=$(printf '%s' "$transaction" | cut -c1-150)
  retry_of=$(jq -r --arg base "$transaction_base" '
    .controller.last_conflict |
    if (.type=="queue_revision" and (.transaction_id|startswith($base)))
    then .transaction_id else "" end' "$PINNED_STATE")
  jq -n --arg transaction "$transaction" --arg turn "$turn" --arg run "$run_id" \
    --arg manifest "$manifest" --arg manifest_hash "$manifest_hash" --arg input_hash "$input_hash" \
    --arg output_hash "$output_hash" --argjson expected "$(jq -r .revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
    --argjson stage_revision "$stage_revision" --argjson queue_revision "$queue_revision" \
    --arg retry_of "$retry_of" --slurpfile item "$item" \
    --slurpfile certification_policy "$policy_tmp" \
    '{transaction_id:$transaction,kind:"plan_cycle",turn_id:$turn,run_id:$run,
      expected_runtime_revision:$expected,expected_stage:"PLANNED",expected_stage_revision:$stage_revision,
      expected_queue_revision:$queue_revision,manifest:{path:$manifest,hash:$manifest_hash},
      retry_of:(if $retry_of=="" then null else $retry_of end),
      queue_item:$item[0],certification_policy:$certification_policy[0],
      evidence:{input_hash:$input_hash,output_hash:$output_hash}}' >"$tx"
  emit_transaction "$runtime" "$tx"; rm -f "$tx" "$item" "$policy_tmp" "$compiled_tmp"
}
advance_stage() {
  runtime=$1 expected=$2 next=$3 evidence=$4
  pin_state "$runtime"; evidence_hash=$(sha_file "$evidence")
  transaction="stage-$(jq -r .loop_id "$PINNED_STATE")-$(jq -r .controller.cycle "$PINNED_STATE")-$next-${evidence_hash#sha256:}"
  transaction=$(printf '%s' "$transaction" | cut -c1-150); tx=$runtime/controller-stage.$$.json
  jq -n --arg transaction "$transaction" --arg expected_stage "$expected" --arg next "$next" \
    --arg path "$evidence" --arg hash "$evidence_hash" --argjson expected_revision "$(jq -r .revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
    --argjson stage_revision "$(jq -r .controller.stage_revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
    '{transaction_id:$transaction,kind:"advance_stage",expected_runtime_revision:$expected_revision,
      expected_stage:$expected_stage,expected_stage_revision:$stage_revision,next_stage:$next,
      evidence:{path:$path,hash:$hash}}' >"$tx"
  emit_transaction "$runtime" "$tx"; rm -f "$tx"
}
snapshot_cycle_result() {
  runtime=$1 run=$2 manifest=$3 manifest_hash=$4
  pin_state "$runtime"
  item_id=cycle-$run
  jq -e --arg id "$item_id" 'any(.queue.items[];
    .id==$id and .kind=="cycle" and .status=="complete" and
    (.claim.token|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.claim.worker_pid|type=="number") and (.claim.worker_start_token|type=="string" and length>0))' \
    "$PINNED_STATE" >/dev/null || return 11
  receipt=$runtime/controller-turns/result-receipt-$run.json.tmp.$$
  "$SELF/polylane-cycle-result.sh" locate "$runtime" "$item_id" "$run" \
    "$manifest" "$manifest_hash" "$receipt" || return $?
  event=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .path "$receipt")") || return 5
  case $event in "$runtime"/cycle-result-event-proofs/*.json) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  [ "$(file_mode "$event")" = 400 ] || return 5
  [ "$(sha_file "$event")" = "$(jq -r .event_file_hash "$receipt")" ] || return 5
  [ "$(jq -r .event_hash "$event")" = "$(jq -r .event_hash "$receipt")" ] || return 5
  runtime_verify_event_file "$event" "$(jq -r .event_id "$receipt")" \
    "$(jq -r '.previous_event_hash // ""' "$event")" || return 5
  jq -e --arg run "$run" --arg item "$item_id" --arg manifest "$manifest" \
    --arg manifest_hash "$manifest_hash" --slurpfile state "$PINNED_STATE" '
      .actor=="cycle-runner" and .type=="cycle_result" and
      (.payload|keys|sort)==["claim_token","item_id","manifest_hash","manifest_path",
        "result_hash","result_path","run_id","runner","schema_version"] and
      .payload.schema_version==2 and .payload.run_id==$run and .payload.item_id==$item and
      .payload.manifest_path==$manifest and .payload.manifest_hash==$manifest_hash and
      (.payload.result_path|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
      (.payload.result_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
      (.payload.runner|keys|sort)==["attempt","generation","pid","start_token"] and
      (.payload.runner.pid|type=="number") and (.payload.runner.start_token|type=="string") and
      (.payload.runner.generation|type=="number" and .>=1 and floor==.) and
      (.payload.runner.attempt|type=="number" and .>=1 and floor==.) and
      ($state[0].queue.items[]|select(.id==$item)) as $item_state |
      .payload.claim_token==$item_state.claim.token and
      .payload.runner.pid==$item_state.claim.worker_pid and
      .payload.runner.start_token==$item_state.claim.worker_start_token and
      .payload.runner.attempt==$item_state.attempt' "$event" >/dev/null || return 5
  result=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .payload.result_path "$event")") || return 5
  case $result in "$runtime"/cycle-results/*) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  [ "$(file_mode "$result")" = 400 ] || return 5
  result_hash=$(sha_file "$result")
  [ "$result_hash" = "$(jq -r .payload.result_hash "$event")" ] || return 5
  jq -e --arg run "$run" --arg manifest_hash "$manifest_hash" --slurpfile manifest "$manifest" '
    type=="object" and
    (keys|sort)==["base_ref","expected_base","integration_commit","lane_commits",
      "manifest_hash","outcome","run_id","schema_version","verdict"] and
    .schema_version==2 and .run_id==$run and .manifest_hash==$manifest_hash and
    .base_ref==$manifest[0].base_ref and .expected_base==$manifest[0].expected_base and
    (.outcome|IN("GO","NO_GO","RECOVERY_REQUIRED")) and
    ((.outcome=="GO" and .verdict=="GO" and (.integration_commit|test("^[0-9a-f]{40,64}$")) and
      (.expected_base|test("^[0-9a-f]{40,64}$")) and (.base_ref|startswith("refs/heads/")) and
      (.lane_commits|type=="array" and length==($manifest[0].lanes|length) and length>0 and
        ([.[].name]|length)==([.[].name]|unique|length) and
        ([.[].name]|sort)==([$manifest[0].lanes[].name]|sort) and all(.[];
          (keys|sort)==["commit","name"] and (.name|type=="string" and length>0) and
          (.commit|test("^[0-9a-f]{40,64}$"))))) or
     (.outcome=="NO_GO" and .verdict=="NO_GO" and .integration_commit==null and .lane_commits==[]) or
     (.outcome=="RECOVERY_REQUIRED" and .verdict==null and
       .integration_commit==null and .lane_commits==[]))' \
    "$result" >/dev/null || return 5
  snapshot=$runtime/controller-turns/result-${result_hash#sha256:}.json
  if [ ! -e "$snapshot" ]; then cp "$result" "$snapshot.tmp.$$"; immutable_publish "$snapshot.tmp.$$" "$snapshot"
  else [ -f "$snapshot" ] && [ ! -L "$snapshot" ] && [ "$(sha_file "$snapshot")" = "$result_hash" ] || return 5; fi
  rm -f "$receipt"
  printf '%s\n' "$snapshot"
}
glob_matches() {
  value=$1 pattern=$2
  case $value in $pattern) return 0;; *) return 1;; esac
}
verify_changed_paths() {
  project=$1 base=$2 commit=$3; shift 3
  while IFS= read -r -d '' changed; do
    matched=0
    for pattern in "$@"; do glob_matches "$changed" "$pattern" && { matched=1; break; }; done
    [ "$matched" -eq 1 ] || return 5
  done < <(git -C "$project" diff --name-only -z --no-renames "$base" "$commit")
}
verify_go_result() {
  project=$1 result=$2 manifest=$3
  expected=$(jq -r .expected_base "$manifest"); ref=$(jq -r .base_ref "$manifest")
  integration=$(jq -r .integration_commit "$result")
  [ "$(jq -r .expected_base "$result")" = "$expected" ] &&
    [ "$(jq -r .base_ref "$result")" = "$ref" ] || return 5
  git -C "$project" cat-file -e "$expected^{commit}" &&
    git -C "$project" cat-file -e "$integration^{commit}" &&
    git -C "$project" merge-base --is-ancestor "$expected" "$integration" || return 5
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r name commit; do
    declared=$(jq -r --arg name "$name" '[.lanes[]|select(.name==$name)]|length' "$manifest")
    [ "$declared" -eq 1 ] || return 5
    git -C "$project" cat-file -e "$commit^{commit}" &&
      git -C "$project" merge-base --is-ancestor "$expected" "$commit" &&
      git -C "$project" merge-base --is-ancestor "$commit" "$integration" || return 5
    globs=(); while IFS= read -r -d '' glob; do globs+=("$glob"); done \
      < <(jq -j --arg name "$name" '.lanes[]|select(.name==$name)|.ownership_globs[] | ., "\u0000"' "$manifest")
    verify_changed_paths "$project" "$expected" "$commit" "${globs[@]}" || return 5
  done < <(jq -r '.lane_commits[]|[.name,.commit]|@tsv' "$result")
  all_globs=(); while IFS= read -r -d '' glob; do all_globs+=("$glob"); done \
    < <(jq -j '[.lanes[].ownership_globs[],.integrator.ownership_globs[]]|unique[] | ., "\u0000"' "$manifest")
  verify_changed_paths "$project" "$expected" "$integration" "${all_globs[@]}"
}
promote_ref_cas() (
  project=$1 runtime=$2 ref=$3 expected=$4 promoted=$5
  lock=$runtime/promotion.lock
  runtime_lock_acquire "$lock"
  trap 'runtime_lock_release "$lock" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true' EXIT INT TERM HUP
  actual=$(git -C "$project" rev-parse "$ref") || exit 5
  if [ "$actual" = "$expected" ]; then git -C "$project" update-ref "$ref" "$promoted" "$expected" || exit 5
  elif [ "$actual" != "$promoted" ]; then exit 42
  fi
)
route_cycle_recovery() {
  runtime=$1 result=$2 reason=$3; pin_state "$runtime"
  manifest=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r '.controller.manifest.path' "$PINNED_STATE")") || return 5
  [ "$(sha_file "$manifest")" = "$(jq -r '.controller.manifest.hash' "$PINNED_STATE")" ] || return 5
  goal=$(jq -er .goal_ref "$manifest") || return 5
  generation=$(jq --arg goal "$goal" '[.queue.items[]|select(.kind=="state_reconcile" and .goal_ref==$goal)|
    (.args.reconcile_generation//0)]|max//0' "$PINNED_STATE")
  generation=$((generation + 1))
  id="reconcile-$(jq -r .controller.run_id "$PINNED_STATE")-$reason-$generation"
  args=$(jq -cn --arg goal "$goal" --arg reason "$reason" --arg result "$result" \
    --argjson generation "$generation" \
    '{goal_ref:$goal,reason:$reason,result:$result,reconcile_generation:$generation}')
  item=$runtime/controller-recovery-item.$$.json
  queue_item "$id" state_reconcile offline "$goal" 100 "$args" '[]' '[]' '["runtime:reducer"]' "$item"
  tx=$runtime/controller-recovery.$$.json; transaction="recovery-$id"
  jq -n --arg transaction "$transaction" --argjson expected "$(jq -r .revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
    --arg stage "$(jq -r .controller.stage "$PINNED_STATE")" \
    --argjson stage_revision "$(jq -r .controller.stage_revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
    --argjson queue_revision "$(jq -r '.queue.revision // 0' "$PINNED_STATE")" --slurpfile item "$item" \
    '{transaction_id:$transaction,kind:"route_recovery",expected_runtime_revision:$expected,
      expected_stage:$stage,expected_stage_revision:$stage_revision,expected_queue_revision:$queue_revision,
      queue_item:$item[0]}' >"$tx"
  emit_transaction "$runtime" "$tx"; rm -f "$tx" "$item"
}
apply_council_route() {
  runtime=$1 expected_stage=$2 reference=$3
  reference=$(canonical_file "$reference") || {
    route_cycle_recovery "$runtime" "" council_reference_missing; return; }
  "$BIN/polylane-council.sh" validate-routing "$reference" || {
    route_cycle_recovery "$runtime" "$reference" council_reference_invalid; return; }
  reference_hash=$(sha_file "$reference")
  verdict=$(jq -er '.verdict|select(.=="GO" or .=="NO_GO")' "$reference") || {
    route_cycle_recovery "$runtime" "$reference" council_verdict_invalid; return; }
  responses=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .responses.path "$reference")") || return 5
  mode=$(jq -er '.mode|select(.=="fast" or .=="exhaustive")' "$responses") || return 5
  [ "$verdict" != GO ] || [ "$mode" = exhaustive ] || return 8
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT:-}" != controller-after-council-complete ] || return 99
  goal_state=$(canonical_file "$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json") || return 5
  goal_hash=$(sha_file "$goal_state"); run=$(jq -r .controller.run_id "$PINNED_STATE")
  id="reconcile-council-$run"
  args=$(jq -cn --arg run "$run" --arg reference "$reference" --arg reference_hash "$reference_hash" \
    --arg goal_state "$goal_state" --arg goal_hash "$goal_hash" \
    '{mode:"council_verdict",run_id:$run,council_reference:$reference,
      council_reference_hash:$reference_hash,goal_state:$goal_state,goal_state_hash:$goal_hash}')
  item=$runtime/council-reconcile-item.$$.json
  queue_item "$id" state_reconcile offline "$(jq -r .next_goal_ref "$goal_state")" 100 "$args" \
    '[]' '[]' '["runtime:goal-state"]' "$item"
  tx=$runtime/controller-council-route.$$.json; transaction="route-council-$run-$mode"
  jq -n --arg transaction "$transaction" --argjson expected "$(jq -r .revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
    --arg expected_stage "$expected_stage" \
    --argjson stage_revision "$(jq -r .controller.stage_revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
    --argjson queue_revision "$(jq -r '.queue.revision // 0' "$PINNED_STATE")" \
    --arg reference "$reference" --arg reference_hash "$reference_hash" --arg verdict "$verdict" \
    --arg mode "$mode" --slurpfile item "$item" \
    '{transaction_id:$transaction,kind:"route_council",expected_runtime_revision:$expected,
      expected_stage:$expected_stage,expected_stage_revision:$stage_revision,
      expected_queue_revision:$queue_revision,queue_item:$item[0],
      council:{reference:$reference,hash:$reference_hash,verdict:$verdict,mode:$mode}}' >"$tx"
  emit_transaction "$runtime" "$tx"; rm -f "$tx" "$item"
}
step_controller() {
  project=$(canonical_project "$1"); loop=$2; runtime=$project/.polylane/runtime
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" reduce; pin_state "$runtime"
  project_certification_policy "$project" "$runtime"
  phase=$(jq -r .phase "$PINNED_STATE"); [ "$phase" = WORKING ] || return 12
  stage=$(jq -r '.controller.stage // "PLANNED"' "$PINNED_STATE")
  case $stage in
    PLANNED)
      recovery=$(jq -r '.controller.recovery_item_id // ""' "$PINNED_STATE")
      if [ -n "$recovery" ]; then
        recovery_status=$(jq -r --arg id "$recovery" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)|.status' "$PINNED_STATE")
        [ "$recovery_status" = complete ] || return 11
      fi
      return 10 ;;
    LANES_RUNNING)
      run=$(jq -r .controller.run_id "$PINNED_STATE")
      status=$(jq -r --arg id "cycle-$run" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)|.status' "$PINNED_STATE")
      [ "$status" = complete ] || return 11
      manifest=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .controller.manifest.path "$PINNED_STATE")") || return 5
      manifest_hash=$(jq -r .controller.manifest.hash "$PINNED_STATE")
      [ "$(sha_file "$manifest")" = "$manifest_hash" ] || return 5
      result=$(snapshot_cycle_result "$runtime" "$run" "$manifest" "$manifest_hash") || return $?
      outcome=$(jq -r .outcome "$result")
      if [ "$outcome" = GO ]; then advance_stage "$runtime" LANES_RUNNING INTEGRATING "$result"
      else route_cycle_recovery "$runtime" "$result" "$outcome"; fi ;;
    INTEGRATING)
      result=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .controller.evidence.INTEGRATING.path "$PINNED_STATE")") || return 5
      [ "$(sha_file "$result")" = "$(jq -r .controller.evidence.INTEGRATING.hash "$PINNED_STATE")" ] || return 5
      manifest=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .controller.manifest.path "$PINNED_STATE")") || return 5
      [ "$(sha_file "$manifest")" = "$(jq -r .controller.manifest.hash "$PINNED_STATE")" ] || return 5
      verify_go_result "$project" "$result" "$manifest" || {
        route_cycle_recovery "$runtime" "$result" invalid_go_evidence; return; }
      advance_stage "$runtime" INTEGRATING PROMOTION_PREPARED "$result" ;;
    PROMOTION_PREPARED)
      result=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .controller.evidence.PROMOTION_PREPARED.path "$PINNED_STATE")") || return 5
      [ "$(sha_file "$result")" = "$(jq -r .controller.evidence.PROMOTION_PREPARED.hash "$PINNED_STATE")" ] || return 5
      manifest=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .controller.manifest.path "$PINNED_STATE")") || return 5
      [ "$(sha_file "$manifest")" = "$(jq -r .controller.manifest.hash "$PINNED_STATE")" ] || return 5
      ref=$(jq -r .base_ref "$manifest")
      expected=$(jq -r .expected_base "$manifest"); promoted=$(jq -r .integration_commit "$result")
      case $ref in refs/heads/*) :;; *) return 5;; esac
      if promote_ref_cas "$project" "$runtime" "$ref" "$expected" "$promoted"; then :
      else rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 42 ] || return "$rc"
        route_cycle_recovery "$runtime" "$result" base_ref_conflict; return
      fi
      [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT:-}" != controller-after-promotion-ref ] || return 99
      evidence=$runtime/controller-turns/promotion-$(jq -r .controller.run_id "$PINNED_STATE").json
      jq -n --arg ref "$ref" --arg expected "$expected" --arg promoted "$promoted" \
        --arg result "$result" --arg result_hash "$(sha_file "$result")" \
        '{base_ref:$ref,expected_base:$expected,promoted_commit:$promoted,
          result:{path:$result,hash:$result_hash}}' >"$evidence.tmp.$$"
      immutable_publish "$evidence.tmp.$$" "$evidence"
      advance_stage "$runtime" PROMOTION_PREPARED PROMOTED "$evidence" ;;
    PROMOTED)
      run=$(jq -r .controller.run_id "$PINNED_STATE")
      promotion=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .controller.evidence.PROMOTED.path "$PINNED_STATE")") || return 5
      [ "$(sha_file "$promotion")" = "$(jq -r .controller.evidence.PROMOTED.hash "$PINNED_STATE")" ] || return 5
      source=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .result.path "$promotion")") || return 5
      [ "$(sha_file "$source")" = "$(jq -r .result.hash "$promotion")" ] || return 5
      projection=$runtime/controller-turns/cycle-result-projection.$$.json
      jq --arg loop "$loop" --argjson cycle "$(jq -r .controller.cycle "$PINNED_STATE")" \
        '. + {loop_id:$loop,cycle:$cycle}' "$source" >"$projection"
      projection_hash=$(sha_file "$projection")
      record=$project/docs/polylane/cycle-$(jq -r .controller.cycle "$PINNED_STATE")-result-${projection_hash#sha256:}.json
      immutable_publish "$projection" "$record"
      advance_stage "$runtime" PROMOTED RESULT_RECORDED "$record" ;;
    RESULT_RECORDED)
      run=$(jq -r .controller.run_id "$PINNED_STATE"); owned=$project/.polylane/worktrees/$run
      removed=$runtime/controller-turns/cleanup-$run.json.tmp.$$
      count=0
      if [ -d "$owned" ] && [ ! -L "$owned" ]; then
        for path in "$owned"/*; do [ -e "$path" ] || continue
          case $path in "$owned"/*) git -C "$project" worktree remove --force "$path" 2>/dev/null || rm -rf "$path";; esac
          count=$((count + 1))
        done
        rmdir "$owned" 2>/dev/null || true
      fi
      jq -n --arg run "$run" --argjson count "$count" '{run_id:$run,owned_worktrees_removed:$count}' >"$removed"
      cleanup=${removed%.tmp.$$}; immutable_publish "$removed" "$cleanup"
      advance_stage "$runtime" RESULT_RECORDED CLEANUP "$cleanup" ;;
    CLEANUP)
      run=$(jq -r .controller.run_id "$PINNED_STATE"); cycle=$(jq -r .controller.cycle "$PINNED_STATE")
      manifest=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .controller.manifest.path "$PINNED_STATE")") || return 5
      [ "$(sha_file "$manifest")" = "$(jq -r .controller.manifest.hash "$PINNED_STATE")" ] || return 5
      goal=$(jq -er .goal_ref "$manifest") || return 5
      cycle_result=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .controller.evidence.RESULT_RECORDED.path "$PINNED_STATE")") || return 5
      [ "$(sha_file "$cycle_result")" = "$(jq -r .controller.evidence.RESULT_RECORDED.hash "$PINNED_STATE")" ] || return 5
      if jq -e '(.convergence.consecutive_clean // 0)>=1 or
        (.controller.risk|IN("high","regressed","potentially_final"))' "$PINNED_STATE" >/dev/null; then
        council_mode=exhaustive; council_deadline=600
      else council_mode=fast; council_deadline=300; fi
      packet=$runtime/controller-turns/council-packet-$run.json
      goal_state=$(canonical_file "$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json") || return 5
      jq -n --arg loop "$loop" --argjson cycle "$cycle" --arg goal "$goal" --arg run "$run" \
        --arg result "$cycle_result" --arg result_hash "$(sha_file "$cycle_result")" \
        --slurpfile goal_state "$goal_state" \
        '{loop_id:$loop,cycle:$cycle,goal_ref:$goal,strategy_hash:("council:"+$run),
          ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:[],decision:{question:"What remains after this cycle?",run_id:$run},
          cycle_result:{path:$result,hash:$result_hash},
          open_goals:[$goal_state[0].goal_tree.items[]|select(.status=="open")|{id,weight:(.weight//0)}]}' \
        >"$packet.tmp.$$"; immutable_publish "$packet.tmp.$$" "$packet"
      items=$runtime/controller-followups.$$.json; printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$items"
      for spec in "digest:offline:90:[]" "skill_discovery:online:85:[]" \
        "council:online:80:[\"digest-$run\"]"; do
        kind=${spec%%:*}; rest=${spec#*:}; mode=${rest%%:*}; rest=${rest#*:}; priority=${rest%%:*}; depends=${rest#*:}
        id="$kind-$run"
        case $kind in
          digest) args=$(jq -cn --arg run "$run" --arg result "$cycle_result" \
            '{run_id:$run,cycle_result:$result}') ;;
          skill_discovery) args=$(jq -cn --arg run "$run" --arg manifest "$manifest" \
            '{run_id:$run,manifest:$manifest}') ;;
          council) args=$(jq -cn --arg packet "$packet" --arg mode "$council_mode" \
            --argjson deadline "$council_deadline" \
            --arg output "$runtime/controller-turns/council-$run" \
            '{mode:$mode,packet:$packet,output_dir:$output,deadline_seconds:$deadline}') ;;
          *) return 5 ;;
        esac
        item=$runtime/followup-item.$$.json; queue_item "$id" "$kind" "$mode" "$goal" "$priority" "$args" "$depends" '[]' '[]' "$item"
        jq --slurpfile item "$item" '. + [$item[0]]' "$items" >"$items.next"; mv "$items.next" "$items"; rm -f "$item"
      done
      tx=$runtime/controller-followup-tx.$$.json; transaction="followups-$run"
      jq -n --arg transaction "$transaction" --argjson expected "$(jq -r .revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
        --argjson stage_revision "$(jq -r .controller.stage_revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
        --argjson queue_revision "$(jq -r '.queue.revision // 0' "$PINNED_STATE")" --slurpfile items "$items" \
        '{transaction_id:$transaction,kind:"enqueue_followups",expected_runtime_revision:$expected,
          expected_stage:"CLEANUP",expected_stage_revision:$stage_revision,
          expected_queue_revision:$queue_revision,queue_items:$items[0],
          critical_ids:[("digest-"+$items[0][0].args.run_id),("council-"+$items[0][0].args.run_id)],
          sidecar_ids:[("skill_discovery-"+$items[0][0].args.run_id)]}' >"$tx"
      emit_transaction "$runtime" "$tx"; rm -f "$tx" "$items" ;;
    NEXT_ENQUEUED)
      active=$(jq '[.controller.followup_ids[] as $id | .queue.items[]|select(.id==$id and .status!="complete")]|length' "$PINNED_STATE")
      [ "$active" -eq 0 ] || return 11
      run=$(jq -r .controller.run_id "$PINNED_STATE")
      reference=$runtime/controller-turns/council-$run/routing-reference.json
      reference=$(canonical_file "$reference") || { route_cycle_recovery "$runtime" "" council_reference_missing; return; }
      "$BIN/polylane-council.sh" validate-routing "$reference" || {
        route_cycle_recovery "$runtime" "$reference" council_reference_invalid; return; }
      responses=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .responses.path "$reference")") || return 5
      mode=$(jq -r .mode "$responses"); verdict=$(jq -r .verdict "$reference")
      if [ "$mode:$verdict" = fast:GO ]; then
        routing=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .routing.path "$reference")") || return 5
        packet=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .packet.path "$routing")") || return 5
        output=$runtime/controller-turns/council-exhaustive-$run
        args=$(jq -cn --arg packet "$packet" --arg output "$output" \
          '{mode:"exhaustive",packet:$packet,output_dir:$output,deadline_seconds:600}')
        item=$runtime/exhaustive-council-item.$$.json
        queue_item "council-exhaustive-$run" council online "$(jq -r .goal_ref "$packet")" 100 "$args" \
          '[]' '[]' '["runtime:council"]' "$item"
        tx=$runtime/exhaustive-council-tx.$$.json; transaction="escalate-council-$run"
        jq -n --arg transaction "$transaction" --argjson expected "$(jq -r .revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
          --argjson stage_revision "$(jq -r .controller.stage_revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
          --argjson queue_revision "$(jq -r '.queue.revision // 0' "$PINNED_STATE")" \
          --arg reference "$reference" --arg reference_hash "$(sha_file "$reference")" --slurpfile item "$item" \
          '{transaction_id:$transaction,kind:"escalate_council",expected_runtime_revision:$expected,
            expected_stage:"NEXT_ENQUEUED",expected_stage_revision:$stage_revision,
            expected_queue_revision:$queue_revision,queue_item:$item[0],
            fast_council:{reference:$reference,hash:$reference_hash}}' >"$tx"
        emit_transaction "$runtime" "$tx"; rm -f "$tx" "$item"
      else
        apply_council_route "$runtime" NEXT_ENQUEUED "$reference"
      fi ;;
    EXHAUSTIVE_COUNCIL)
      run=$(jq -r .controller.run_id "$PINNED_STATE")
      id="council-exhaustive-$run"
      status=$(jq -r --arg id "$id" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)|.status' "$PINNED_STATE")
      [ "$status" = complete ] || return 11
      reference=$runtime/controller-turns/council-exhaustive-$run/routing-reference.json
      apply_council_route "$runtime" EXHAUSTIVE_COUNCIL "$reference" ;;
    COUNCIL_ROUTED)
      run=$(jq -r .controller.run_id "$PINNED_STATE")
      reconcile="reconcile-council-$run"
      status=$(jq -r --arg id "$reconcile" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)|.status' "$PINNED_STATE")
      [ "$status" = complete ] || return 11
      reference=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .controller.council.reference "$PINNED_STATE")") || return 5
      [ "$(sha_file "$reference")" = "$(jq -r .controller.council.hash "$PINNED_STATE")" ] || return 5
      "$BIN/polylane-council.sh" validate-routing "$reference" || return 5
      artifact=$(canonical_file "$runtime/recovery-artifacts/$reconcile.json") || return 5
      jq -e --arg verdict "$(jq -r .controller.council.verdict "$PINNED_STATE")" '
        .status=="council_applied" and .verdict==$verdict and
        (.goal_state_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        (.next_goal_ref|type=="string" and length>0)' "$artifact" >/dev/null || return 5
      goal_state=$(canonical_file "$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json") || return 5
      [ "$(sha_file "$goal_state")" = "$(jq -r .goal_state_hash "$artifact")" ] || return 5
      next_goal=$(jq -r .next_goal_ref "$artifact"); verdict=$(jq -r .verdict "$artifact")
      cycle_result=$(canonical_file "$(jq -r .controller.evidence.RESULT_RECORDED.path "$PINNED_STATE")") || return 5
      items=$runtime/council-successor-items.$$.json; printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$items"
      suggestion_id="cycle_suggestions-$run"
      suggestion_args=$(jq -cn --arg run "$run" --arg summary "$cycle_result" \
        --arg summary_hash "$(sha_file "$cycle_result")" --arg goal_state "$goal_state" \
        --arg goal_hash "$(sha_file "$goal_state")" --arg reference "$reference" \
        --arg reference_hash "$(sha_file "$reference")" \
        --arg output "$runtime/suggestion-staging/cycle-$run.json" \
        '{run_id:$run,cycle_summary:$summary,cycle_summary_hash:$summary_hash,
          goal_state:$goal_state,goal_state_hash:$goal_hash,
          council_reference:$reference,council_reference_hash:$reference_hash,output:$output}')
      suggestion_item=$runtime/council-suggestion-item.$$.json
      queue_item "$suggestion_id" cycle_suggestions online "$next_goal" 60 "$suggestion_args" \
        '[]' '[]' '[]' "$suggestion_item"
      jq --slurpfile item "$suggestion_item" '.+[$item[0]]' "$items" >"$items.next"; mv "$items.next" "$items"
      critical='[]'
      if [ "$verdict" = GO ]; then
        kind=certification; id="certification-$run"
        cert_config=$runtime/controller-turns/certification-$run.json
        "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" prepare-from-council "$runtime" "$goal_state" "$project" \
          "$reference" "$cert_config"
        args=$(jq -cn --arg goal_state "$goal_state" --arg project "$project" \
          --arg config "$cert_config" --arg config_hash "$(sha_file "$cert_config")" \
          --arg reference "$reference" --arg reference_hash "$(sha_file "$reference")" \
          '{goal_state:$goal_state,project_root:$project,cert_config:$config,cert_config_hash:$config_hash,
            council_reference:$reference,council_reference_hash:$reference_hash}')
        locks='["runtime:certification"]'
        item=$runtime/council-certification-item.$$.json
        queue_item "$id" "$kind" offline "$next_goal" 100 "$args" '[]' '[]' "$locks" "$item"
        jq --slurpfile item "$item" '.+[$item[0]]' "$items" >"$items.next"; mv "$items.next" "$items"
        critical=$(jq -cn --arg id "$id" '[$id]')
      fi
      tx=$runtime/controller-council-successor.$$.json; transaction="successor-$run-$verdict"
      jq -n --arg transaction "$transaction" --argjson expected "$(jq -r .revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
        --argjson stage_revision "$(jq -r .controller.stage_revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
        --argjson queue_revision "$(jq -r '.queue.revision // 0' "$PINNED_STATE")" \
        --arg next "$next_goal" --arg suggestion "$suggestion_id" --argjson critical "$critical" \
        --slurpfile items "$items" \
        '{transaction_id:$transaction,kind:"enqueue_council_successor",expected_runtime_revision:$expected,
          expected_stage:"COUNCIL_ROUTED",expected_stage_revision:$stage_revision,
          expected_queue_revision:$queue_revision,queue_items:$items[0],next_goal_ref:$next,
          critical_ids:$critical,sidecar_ids:[$suggestion]}' >"$tx"
      emit_transaction "$runtime" "$tx"
      [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT:-}" != controller-after-successor-enqueue ] || return 99
      rm -f "$tx" "$items" "${item:-}" "$suggestion_item" ;;
    SUCCESSOR_ENQUEUED)
      active=$(jq '[.controller.followup_ids[] as $id | .queue.items[]|select(.id==$id and .status!="complete")]|length' "$PINNED_STATE")
      [ "$active" -eq 0 ] || return 11
      [ "$(jq -r '.terminal // ""' "$PINNED_STATE")" != COMPLETE ] || return 12
      tx=$runtime/controller-next.$$.json; transaction="next-$(jq -r .controller.run_id "$PINNED_STATE")"
      jq -n --arg transaction "$transaction" --argjson expected "$(jq -r .revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
        --argjson stage_revision "$(jq -r .controller.stage_revision "$PINNED_STATE")" \
        '{transaction_id:$transaction,kind:"open_next_cycle",expected_runtime_revision:$expected,
          expected_stage:"SUCCESSOR_ENQUEUED",expected_stage_revision:$stage_revision}' >"$tx"
      emit_transaction "$runtime" "$tx"
      [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT:-}" != controller-after-open-next-cycle ] || return 99
      rm -f "$tx" ;;
    *) return 5 ;;
  esac
}
case ${1:-} in
  prepare) prepare_turn "$2" "$3" "$4" ;;
  apply) apply_turn "$2" "$3" "$4" "$5" ;;
  step) step_controller "$2" "$3" ;;
  contract) printf '1\n' ;;
  *) exit 2 ;;
esac
~~~

Install the bounded-handoff final body for `core/scripts/polylane-state.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
canonical_project() { (cd "$1" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P); }
owned_watch() {
  local project record session generation loop
  project=$(canonical_project "$1") || return 4
  record=$project/.polylane/runtime/session.json
  [ -f "$record" ] && [ ! -L "$record" ] || return 4
  session=$(jq -er .session "$record") || return 4
  generation=$(jq -er .generation "$record") || return 4
  loop=${session#polylane-}
  if ! tmux has-session -t "$session" 2>/dev/null ||
     [ "$(tmux show-options -v -t "$session" @polylane-loop-id 2>/dev/null || true)" != "$loop" ] ||
     [ "$(tmux show-options -v -t "$session" @polylane-project 2>/dev/null || true)" != "$project" ] ||
     [ "$(tmux show-options -v -t "$session" @polylane-generation 2>/dev/null || true)" != "$generation" ]; then
    printf '{"reason_code":"external_resource_conflict","session":"%s"}\n' "$session" >&2
    return 4
  fi
  printf 'tmux attach -t %s\n' "$session"
}
watch_all() {
  local under temporary session project loop generation
  under=${1:-}; temporary=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/polylane-watch-all.XXXXXX")
  trap 'rm -f "$temporary"' RETURN
  tmux list-sessions -F '#{session_name}' 2>/dev/null | LC_ALL=C sort |
    while IFS= read -r session; do
      case $session in polylane-*) :;; *) continue;; esac
      project=$(tmux show-options -v -t "$session" @polylane-project 2>/dev/null || true)
      loop=$(tmux show-options -v -t "$session" @polylane-loop-id 2>/dev/null || true)
      generation=$(tmux show-options -v -t "$session" @polylane-generation 2>/dev/null || true)
      [ "$session" = "polylane-$loop" ] && [ -n "$project" ] && [ -n "$generation" ] || continue
      if [ -n "$under" ]; then case $project/ in "$under"/*) :;; *) continue;; esac; fi
      owned_watch "$project" >>"$temporary" 2>/dev/null || true
    done
  LC_ALL=C sort -u "$temporary"
  rm -f "$temporary"; trap - RETURN
}
follow_project() {
  local project after timeout started current revision
  project=$(canonical_project "$1") || return 4
  after=$2 timeout=$3
  case $after:$timeout in *[!0-9:]*) return 2;; esac
  [ "$timeout" -ge 1 ] && [ "$timeout" -le 30 ] || return 2
  started=$(date +%s)
  while :; do
    current=$project/.polylane/runtime/current/state.json
    if [ -f "$current" ]; then
      revision=$(jq -er '.revision|select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0)' "$current") || return 5
      [ "$revision" -le "$after" ] || { cat "$current"; return 0; }
    fi
    [ $(( $(date +%s) - started )) -lt "$timeout" ] || return 3
    sleep 0.02
  done
}
case ${1:-} in
  --watch)
    case ${2:-} in
      --project) [ "$#" -eq 3 ] || exit 2; owned_watch "$3";;
      --all)
        if [ "$#" -eq 2 ]; then watch_all ''
        else [ "$#" -eq 4 ] && [ "$3" = --under ] || exit 2
          parent=$(canonical_project "$4") || exit 4; watch_all "$parent"
        fi;;
      *) exit 2;;
    esac;;
  follow)
    [ "$#" -eq 7 ] && [ "$2" = --project ] && [ "$4" = --after-revision ] &&
      [ "$6" = --timeout ] || exit 2
    follow_project "$3" "$5" "$7";;
  *) exit 2;;
esac
~~~

Install the bounded-handoff final body for `core/tests/helpers/fake-tmux.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
state=${POLYLANE_FAKE_TMUX_STATE:?}
log=${POLYLANE_FAKE_TMUX_LOG:?}
[ -f "$state" ] || printf '%s\n' '{"sessions":{}}' >"$state"
printf '%s\n' "$*" >>"$log"

write_state() {
  next=$1
  jq -e . "$next" >/dev/null
  mv "$next" "$state"
}

target=''
name=''
window=''
format=''
environment_entries=()
args=("$@")
for ((i=0; i<${#args[@]}; i++)); do
  case ${args[$i]} in
    -t) i=$((i + 1)); target=${args[$i]} ;;
    -s) i=$((i + 1)); name=${args[$i]} ;;
    -n) i=$((i + 1)); window=${args[$i]} ;;
    -F) i=$((i + 1)); format=${args[$i]} ;;
    -e) i=$((i + 1)); environment_entries[${#environment_entries[@]}]=${args[$i]} ;;
  esac
done

session=${target%%:*}
window_target=${target#*:}
[ "$window_target" != "$target" ] || window_target=''

case ${1:-} in
  has-session)
    jq -e --arg s "$session" '.sessions[$s] != null' "$state" >/dev/null
    ;;
  new-session)
    tmp=$state.tmp.$$
    start_command=${args[$((${#args[@]} - 1))]}
    jq --arg s "$name" --arg w "${window:-controller}" --arg command "$start_command" \
      '.sessions[$s]={options:{},hooks:{},environment:{},windows:{($w):{options:{},
        panes:[{"index":"0","path":"","dead":false,"start_command":$command}]}}}' \
      "$state" >"$tmp"
    write_state "$tmp"
    if [ "${#environment_entries[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then
      for entry in "${environment_entries[@]}"; do
        key=${entry%%=*}; value=${entry#*=}; tmp=$state.tmp.$$
        jq --arg s "$name" --arg key "$key" --arg value "$value" \
          '.sessions[$s].environment[$key]=$value' "$state" >"$tmp"; write_state "$tmp"
      done
    fi
    ;;
  new-window)
    tmp=$state.tmp.$$
    jq --arg s "$session" --arg w "$window" \
      '.sessions[$s].windows[$w]={options:{},panes:[{"index":"0","path":"","dead":false}]}' \
      "$state" >"$tmp"
    write_state "$tmp"
    ;;
  kill-session)
    tmp=$state.tmp.$$
    jq --arg s "$session" 'del(.sessions[$s])' "$state" >"$tmp"
    write_state "$tmp"
    ;;
  kill-window)
    tmp=$state.tmp.$$
    jq --arg s "$session" --arg w "$window_target" 'del(.sessions[$s].windows[$w])' "$state" >"$tmp"
    write_state "$tmp"
    ;;
  set-option)
    key=${args[$((${#args[@]} - 2))]}
    value=${args[$((${#args[@]} - 1))]}
    tmp=$state.tmp.$$
    if [ -n "$window_target" ]; then
      jq --arg s "$session" --arg w "$window_target" --arg k "$key" --arg v "$value" \
        '.sessions[$s].windows[$w].options[$k]=$v' "$state" >"$tmp"
    else
      jq --arg s "$session" --arg k "$key" --arg v "$value" \
        '.sessions[$s].options[$k]=$v' "$state" >"$tmp"
    fi
    write_state "$tmp"
    ;;
  set-environment)
    key=${args[$((${#args[@]} - 2))]}; value=${args[$((${#args[@]} - 1))]}; tmp=$state.tmp.$$
    jq --arg s "$session" --arg key "$key" --arg value "$value" \
      '.sessions[$s].environment[$key]=$value' "$state" >"$tmp"; write_state "$tmp"
    ;;
  show-environment)
    key=${args[$((${#args[@]} - 1))]}
    jq -er --arg s "$session" --arg key "$key" '$key+"="+.sessions[$s].environment[$key]' "$state"
    ;;
  show-options)
    key=${args[$((${#args[@]} - 1))]}
    if [ -n "$window_target" ]; then
      jq -er --arg s "$session" --arg w "$window_target" --arg k "$key" \
        '.sessions[$s].windows[$w].options[$k]' "$state"
    else
      jq -er --arg s "$session" --arg k "$key" '.sessions[$s].options[$k]' "$state"
    fi
    ;;
  list-sessions)
    jq -r '.sessions | keys[]' "$state"
    ;;
  list-windows)
    jq -r --arg s "$session" '.sessions[$s].windows | keys[]' "$state"
    ;;
  split-window)
    count=$(jq -r --arg s "$session" --arg w "$window_target" '.sessions[$s].windows[$w].panes|length' "$state")
    printf '%s\n' "$count"
    tmp=$state.tmp.$$
    jq --arg s "$session" --arg w "$window_target" --arg i "$count" \
      '.sessions[$s].windows[$w].panes += [{"index":$i,"path":"","dead":false}]' "$state" >"$tmp"
    write_state "$tmp"
    ;;
  set-hook)
    hook=${args[$((${#args[@]} - 2))]}
    command=${args[$((${#args[@]} - 1))]}
    tmp=$state.tmp.$$
    jq --arg s "$session" --arg h "$hook" --arg c "$command" '.sessions[$s].hooks[$h]=$c' "$state" >"$tmp"
    write_state "$tmp"
    ;;
  display-message)
    case "$format" in
      '#{pane_index}') printf '0\n' ;;
      '#{pane_dead}') jq -r --arg s "$session" --arg w "$window_target" \
        'if .sessions[$s].windows[$w].panes[0].dead then 1 else 0 end' "$state" ;;
      '#{pane_start_command}') jq -r --arg s "$session" --arg w "$window_target" \
        '.sessions[$s].windows[$w].panes[0].start_command' "$state" ;;
      *) printf '%s\n' "$format" ;;
    esac
    ;;
  respawn-pane)
    command=${args[$((${#args[@]} - 1))]}
    tmp=$state.tmp.$$
    jq --arg s "$session" --arg w "$window_target" --arg command "$command" \
      '.sessions[$s].windows[$w].panes[0].dead=false |
       .sessions[$s].windows[$w].panes[0].start_command=$command' "$state" >"$tmp"
    write_state "$tmp"
    ;;
  list-panes)
    jq -r --arg s "$session" --arg w "$window_target" \
      '.sessions[$s].windows[$w].panes[]|"%"+.index' "$state"
    ;;
  send-keys|select-window|select-pane)
    :
    ;;
  *)
    printf 'unsupported fake tmux command: %s\n' "$*" >&2
    exit 64
    ;;
esac
~~~

Install the bounded-handoff final body for `core/scripts/polylane-guardian.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
~~~
