~~~bash
BIN=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd -P)
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-hooks.sh"
atomic_json() { local destination source; destination=$1 source=$2; jq -e . "$source" >/dev/null; chmod 600 "$source"; mv -f "$source" "$destination"; }
guardian_trace() {
  local runtime phase
  runtime=$1 phase=$2
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] || return 0
  printf 'guardian-phase wall=%s logical=%s phase=%s event=%s queue=%s\n' \
    "$(runtime_wall_now)" "$(runtime_now)" "$phase" \
    "$(jq -r '.last_event_sequence//-1' "$runtime/current/state.json" 2>/dev/null || printf -1)" \
    "$(jq -r '.queue.revision//-1' "$runtime/current/state.json" 2>/dev/null || printf -1)" \
    >>"$runtime/guardian.log"
}
actor_live() {
  local file pid recorded
  file=$1; [ -f "$file" ] || return 1
  pid=$(jq -r .pid "$file"); recorded=$(jq -r .start_token "$file")
  [ -n "$recorded" ] && [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" = "$recorded" ] &&
    [ "$(jq -r .lease_valid "$file")" = true ]
}
guardian_identity_current() {
  local runtime pid token generation actor
  runtime=$1 pid=$2 token=$3 generation=$4 actor=$runtime/actor-guardian.json
  [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true)" = "$token" ] &&
    jq -e --argjson pid "$pid" --arg token "$token" --argjson generation "$generation" '
      .actor=="guardian" and .pid==$pid and .start_token==$token and
      .generation==$generation and
      .generation_token==("guardian-"+($generation|tostring)) and
      .lease_valid==true' "$actor" >/dev/null
}
guardian_check_status() {
  local runtime status logical actor temporary
  runtime=$1 status=$2 logical=$3 actor=$runtime/actor-guardian.json
  [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] || return 5
  temporary=$runtime/.actor-guardian-status.$$
  jq --arg status "$status" --argjson logical "$logical" \
    --argjson wall_at "$(runtime_wall_now)" '
      (.check.sequence//0) as $prior |
      .check={status:$status,logical_at:$logical,wall_at:$wall_at,
        sequence:(if $status=="running" then $prior+1 else $prior end),
        checkpoint:null}' \
    "$actor" >"$temporary"
  atomic_json "$actor" "$temporary"
}
guardian_check_resume_status() {
  local runtime logical actor temporary
  runtime=$1 logical=$2 actor=$runtime/actor-guardian.json
  [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] || return 5
  temporary=$runtime/.actor-guardian-resume.$$
  jq --argjson logical "$logical" --argjson wall_at "$(runtime_wall_now)" '
    .check.status="running" | .check.logical_at=$logical |
    .check.wall_at=$wall_at' "$actor" >"$temporary"
  atomic_json "$actor" "$temporary"
}
guardian_check_checkpoint() {
  local runtime logical phase actor temporary
  runtime=$1 logical=$2 phase=$3 actor=$runtime/actor-guardian.json
  case $phase in
    reclaim|dispatch-first|controller-ready|dispatch|drain|publish|dispatch-final) : ;;
    *) return 2 ;;
  esac
  [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] || return 5
  temporary=$runtime/.actor-guardian-checkpoint.$$
  jq --arg phase "$phase" --argjson logical "$logical" \
    --argjson wall_at "$(runtime_wall_now)" '
      .check.status="idle" | .check.logical_at=$logical |
      .check.wall_at=$wall_at |
      .check.checkpoint={phase:$phase,logical_at:$logical,sequence:.check.sequence}' \
    "$actor" >"$temporary"
  atomic_json "$actor" "$temporary"
}
guardian_barrier_intent_accept() {
  local runtime intent actor state key canonical auth owner_pid owner_token observed
  local runtime_path request_id consumed active mode rc expected_status current_phase
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] &&
    [ "${POLYLANE_HERMETIC:-0}" = 1 ] || return 1
  runtime=$1 expected_status=$2 current_phase=${3:-}
  case $expected_status in idle|running) : ;; *) return 1 ;; esac
  intent=$runtime/guardian-check-barrier-intent.json
  actor=$runtime/actor-guardian.json state=$runtime/current/state.json
  key=$runtime/hermetic-barrier-control.key
  [ -f "$intent" ] && [ ! -L "$intent" ] &&
    [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] &&
    [ -f "$key" ] && [ ! -L "$key" ] || return 1
  mode=$(stat -f '%Lp' "$intent" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$intent" 2>/dev/null)
  [ "$mode" = 400 ] || return 1
  mode=$(stat -f '%Lp' "$key" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$key" 2>/dev/null)
  [ "$mode" = 400 ] || return 1
  runtime_path=$(cd "$runtime" && pwd -P) || return 1
  request_id=$(jq -er '.request_id|select(type=="string" and
    test("^[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$intent" 2>/dev/null) || return 1
  auth=$(jq -er '.auth|select(type=="string" and
    test("^hmac-sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$intent" 2>/dev/null) || return 1
  canonical=$runtime/.guardian-barrier-canonical.$$
  jq -Sc 'del(.auth)' "$intent" >"$canonical" 2>/dev/null || {
    rm -f "$canonical"; return 1; }
  chmod 600 "$canonical"
  if "$BIN/polylane-hmac.py" verify "$key" "$canonical" "$auth"; then rc=0
  else rc=$?; fi
  rm -f "$canonical"
  [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || return 1
  owner_pid=$(jq -er '.owner_pid|select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>0)' \
    "$intent" 2>/dev/null) || return 1
  owner_token=$(jq -er '.owner_start_token|select(type=="string" and length>0)' \
    "$intent" 2>/dev/null) || return 1
  observed=$(runtime_start_token "$owner_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)
  [ "$observed" = "$owner_token" ] || return 1
  jq -e --arg runtime_path "$runtime_path" --arg expected_status "$expected_status" \
    --arg current_phase "$current_phase" \
    --argjson wall_now "$(runtime_wall_now)" \
    --slurpfile actor "$actor" --slurpfile state "$state" '
      def phase_rank($phase):
        {"reclaim":1,"dispatch-first":2,"controller-ready":3,"dispatch":4,
          "drain":5,"publish":6,"dispatch-final":7}[$phase]//0;
      .schema_version==1 and .runtime_path==$runtime_path and
      .created_wall_at<=$wall_now and .expires_wall_at>=$wall_now and
      .logical_at==($actor[0].check.logical_at//-1) and
      .guardian_pid==$actor[0].pid and
      .guardian_start_token==$actor[0].start_token and
      .guardian_generation==$actor[0].generation and
      .guardian_pid==$state[0].guardian.pid and
      .guardian_start_token==$state[0].guardian.start_token and
      .guardian_generation==$state[0].guardian.generation and
      ($state[0].project_root+"/.polylane/runtime")==$runtime_path and
      .observed_check_sequence>=0 and
      (.observed_check_status|IN("idle","running")) and
      (.observed_check_logical_at|type)=="number" and
      .yield_after_sequence==(if .observed_check_status=="running" and
        .observed_check_logical_at==.logical_at then .observed_check_sequence
        else .observed_check_sequence+1 end) and
      .yield_after_sequence==($actor[0].check.sequence//-1) and
      phase_rank(.requested_checkpoint)>0 and
      $actor[0].check.status==$expected_status and
      (if $expected_status=="running" then
        phase_rank($current_phase)>=phase_rank(.requested_checkpoint)
       elif $actor[0].check.checkpoint==null then true
       else phase_rank($actor[0].check.checkpoint.phase)>=phase_rank(.requested_checkpoint)
       end)' "$intent" >/dev/null || return 1
  consumed=$runtime/hermetic-barrier-consumed/$request_id
  active=$runtime/hermetic-barrier-active/$request_id
  [ -d "$runtime/hermetic-barrier-consumed" ] &&
    [ ! -L "$runtime/hermetic-barrier-consumed" ] &&
    [ -d "$runtime/hermetic-barrier-active" ] &&
    [ ! -L "$runtime/hermetic-barrier-active" ] || return 1
  if [ -d "$active" ] && [ ! -L "$active" ] &&
     [ -d "$consumed" ] && [ ! -L "$consumed" ]; then
    return 0
  fi
  [ ! -e "$consumed" ] && [ ! -e "$active" ] || return 1
  mkdir -m 700 "$consumed" 2>/dev/null || return 1
  if mkdir -m 700 "$active" 2>/dev/null; then return 0; fi
  rmdir "$consumed" 2>/dev/null || true
  return 1
}
guardian_barrier_intent_yield() {
  guardian_barrier_intent_accept "$1" idle
}
guardian_barrier_phase_requested() {
  guardian_barrier_intent_accept "$1" running "$2"
}
guardian_phase_boundary_yield() {
  local runtime logical phase rc
  runtime=$1 logical=$2 phase=$3
  guardian_barrier_phase_requested "$runtime" "$phase" || return 1
  if guardian_check_checkpoint "$runtime" "$logical" "$phase"; then rc=0
  else rc=$?; fi
  if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then
    guardian_check_status "$runtime" idle "$logical" || true
    runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check.lock"
    runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
    return "$rc"
  fi
  guardian_trace "$runtime" "phase-yield-$phase"
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check.lock"
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
  return 0
}
start_controller() {
  local runtime state spec actor old_actor ticket old_pid generation project loop child token ignored
  local temporary started_at payload outputs old_recorded old_observed
  runtime=$1 state=$2 spec=$3
  actor=$runtime/actor-controller.json
  actor_live "$actor" && return 0
  old_actor=$runtime/controller-old.$$.json
  if [ -f "$actor" ]; then cp "$actor" "$old_actor"; else printf '%s\n' '{}' >"$old_actor"; fi
  AUDIT_HANDLER_BEFORE_ARTIFACTS=()
  ticket=$(audit_handler_begin "$runtime" guardian actor "controller-restart-$(runtime_now)" \
    '' '' guardian controller_state_restart)
  [ ! -f "$actor" ] || { old_pid=$(jq -r .pid "$actor"); wait "$old_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; }
  [ ! -f "$actor" ] || "$BIN/polylane-process.sh" adopt-or-fence "$runtime" controller stale
  runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/controller-generation.lock"
  generation=$(( $(cat "$runtime/controller-generation" 2>/dev/null || printf 0) + 1 ))
  printf '%s\n' "$generation" >"$runtime/controller-generation"
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/controller-generation.lock"
  project=$(jq -r .project_root "$runtime/current/state.json"); loop=$(jq -r .loop_id "$runtime/current/state.json")
  POLYLANE_EXPECTED_PROJECT=$project POLYLANE_EXPECTED_LOOP_ID=$loop \
    "$BIN/polylane-exec-argv.sh" --spec "$spec" >>"$runtime/controller.log" 2>&1 & child=$!
  token=''
  for ignored in 1 2 3 4 5; do token=$(runtime_start_token "$child" || true); [ -z "$token" ] || break; sleep 0.02; done
  if [ -z "$token" ]; then wait "$child" 2>/dev/null || true; return 75; fi
  temporary=$runtime/.actor-controller.$$
  started_at=$(runtime_now)
  jq -n --argjson pid "$child" --arg start_token "$token" --arg generation_token "controller-$generation" \
    --argjson generation "$generation" --argjson started_at "$started_at" \
    '{actor:"controller",pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,generation_token:$generation_token,
      generation:$generation,started_at:$started_at,lease_valid:true,descendants:[]}' >"$temporary"
  atomic_json "$actor" "$temporary"
  payload=$runtime/controller-spawned.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson child_pid "$child" --arg child_start_token "$token" \
    '{child_pid:$child_pid,child_start_token:$child_start_token}' >"$payload"
  outputs=$runtime/controller-spawned-outputs.$$.json
  printf '%s\n' '{}' >"$outputs"
  if [ -n "$ticket" ]; then
    old_recorded=$(jq -r .start_token "$old_actor" 2>/dev/null || true)
    old_pid=$(jq -r '.pid // 0' "$old_actor")
    old_observed=$(runtime_start_token "$old_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)
    [ "$old_observed" != "$old_recorded" ] || return 75
    jq -n --slurpfile old "$old_actor" --slurpfile new "$actor" --arg old_observed "$old_observed" \
      --arg new_observed "$(runtime_start_token "$child")" '
      {old_actor:{live:false,role:$old[0].actor,pid:$old[0].pid,start_token:$old[0].start_token,
         observed_start_token:$old_observed,generation:$old[0].generation,
         ownership_token:$old[0].generation_token,started_at:$old[0].started_at},
       new_actor:{live:true,role:$new[0].actor,pid:$new[0].pid,start_token:$new[0].start_token,
         observed_start_token:$new_observed,generation:$new[0].generation,
         ownership_token:$new[0].generation_token,started_at:$new[0].started_at}}' >"$outputs"
  fi
  audit_handler_publish "$runtime" "$ticket" guardian controller_spawned \
    "controller-$generation" "$payload" "$outputs" ''
  rm -f "$old_actor" "$payload" "$outputs"
}
route_dead_controller_once() {
  local runtime actor generation marker context
  runtime=$1 actor=$runtime/actor-controller.json
  generation=$(jq -r '.generation_token // "missing"' "$actor" 2>/dev/null || printf missing)
  marker=$runtime/recovery-markers/controller-$generation
  mkdir -p "$runtime/recovery-markers"
  (set -C; : >"$marker") 2>/dev/null || return 0
  context=$runtime/controller-exit.$$.json
  jq -n --arg generation "$generation" \
    '{goal_ref:"controller",strategy_hash:("controller-exit:"+$generation),
      ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:["actor:controller"]}' >"$context"
  POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime "$BIN/polylane-recovery.sh" route controller_exit controller "$context"
  rm -f "$context"
}
reconcile_exited_quiet_children() {
  local runtime now state owner pid token deadline live payload action context
  runtime=$1 now=$2; state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r owner pid token deadline; do
    [ -n "$owner" ] || continue
    live=$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)
    if [ -n "$live" ]; then
      [ "$live" = "$token" ] || return 5
      continue
    fi
    [ "$now" -le "$deadline" ] || return 5
    # Recheck immediately before publication so a reused live PID is never accepted as
    # the child whose absence was observed.
    live=$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)
    [ -z "$live" ] || { [ "$live" = "$token" ] || return 5; continue; }
    payload=$runtime/.quiet-child-decision.$$.json
    jq -n --arg owner "$owner" --argjson pid "$pid" --arg start_token "$token" \
      --argjson deadline "$deadline" \
      '{owner:$owner,decision:"recover",pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,
        deadline:$deadline,observed_live:false}' >"$payload"
    action="quiet-child-exit:$owner:$pid:${token//[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]/_}"
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit process quiet_child_decision "$action" \
      --fingerprint "$(runtime_sha256 "$payload")" --payload-file "$payload"
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
    rm -f "$payload"
    context=$runtime/.quiet-child-recovery.$$.json
    jq -n --arg owner "$owner" \
      '{goal_ref:$owner,strategy_hash:"quiet-child-reconciliation",
        ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:[("actor:"+$owner)]}' >"$context"
    POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime "$BIN/polylane-recovery.sh" route \
      quiet_child_exited "$owner" "$context"
    rm -f "$context"
  done < <(jq -r '.leases|to_entries[]|
    select(.value.quiet_child!=null)|
    [.key,.value.quiet_child.pid,.value.quiet_child.start_token,
      .value.quiet_child.deadline_at]|@tsv' "$state")
}
dispatch_ready_once() {
  local runtime state now selection rc id input_root temporary input_hash item token
  local worker worker_token ignored actor mutation_marker
  runtime=$1 state=$2 now=$3; shift 3
  selection=$runtime/scheduler-selection.$$.json
  "$BIN/polylane-scheduler.sh" next "$state" "$runtime" "$@" >"$selection" || {
    rc=$?; rm -f "$selection"; return "$rc"; }
  if [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] &&
     [ -n "${POLYLANE_TEST_DISPATCH_MUTATION_FILE:-}" ]; then
    [ -f "$POLYLANE_TEST_DISPATCH_MUTATION_FILE" ] &&
      [ ! -L "$POLYLANE_TEST_DISPATCH_MUTATION_FILE" ] || return 5
    mutation_marker=$runtime/test-dispatch-mutation.applied
    if (set -C; umask 077; : >"$mutation_marker") 2>/dev/null; then
      "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" enqueue \
        "$POLYLANE_TEST_DISPATCH_MUTATION_FILE"
    fi
  fi
  if [ "$(jq '.items|length' "$selection")" -gt 0 ]; then
    if "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" reserve-selected "$selection" $$ \
      "$(jq -r '.guardian.generation' "$runtime/current/state.json")"; then
      while IFS= read -r -d '' id; do
        input_root=$runtime/worker-inputs; [ ! -L "$input_root" ] || return 5
        mkdir -p "$input_root"; chmod 700 "$input_root"
        temporary=$input_root/.worker-$id.$$.json
        "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" dump | jq -Sc --arg id "$id" \
          '.items[]|select(.id==$id)' >"$temporary"
        input_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$temporary"); item=$input_root/${input_hash#sha256:}.json
        if [ -e "$item" ]; then
          [ -f "$item" ] && [ ! -L "$item" ] && [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$item")" = "$input_hash" ] || return 5
          rm -f "$temporary"
        else chmod 400 "$temporary"; mv "$temporary" "$item"; fi
        token=$(jq -r .claim.token "$item")
        "$BIN/polylane-worker.sh" "$runtime" "$item" "$token" "$((now + 90))" >>"$runtime/worker-$id.log" 2>&1 & worker=$!
        worker_token=''; for ignored in 1 2 3 4 5; do worker_token=$(runtime_start_token "$worker" || true); [ -z "$worker_token" ] || break; sleep 0.02; done
        if [ -n "$worker_token" ]; then
          actor=$runtime/actor-worker-$id.json; temporary=$runtime/.actor-worker-$id.$$
          jq -n --argjson pid "$worker" --arg start_token "$worker_token" --arg generation_token "$token" \
            '{actor:"worker",pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,generation_token:$generation_token,
              lease_valid:true,descendants:[]}' >"$temporary"
          atomic_json "$actor" "$temporary"
        fi
      done < <(jq -j '.items[].id | ., "\u0000"' "$selection")
    else
      rc=$?; rm -f "$selection"; return "$rc"
    fi
  fi
  rm -f "$selection"
}
dispatch_ready() {
  local runtime state now attempt deadline rc payload action
  runtime=$1 state=$2 now=$3; shift 3
  attempt=1; deadline=$(( $(runtime_wall_now) + 2 ))
  while [ "$attempt" -le 8 ] && [ "$(runtime_wall_now)" -le "$deadline" ]; do
    if dispatch_ready_once "$runtime" "$state" "$now" "$@"; then return 0
    else rc=$?; fi
    [ "$rc" -eq 7 ] || return "$rc"
    printf 'guardian dispatch conflict attempt=%s/8 action=immediate-reselect\n' \
      "$attempt" >>"$runtime/guardian.log"
    attempt=$((attempt + 1))
  done
  printf 'guardian dispatch conflict attempt=%s/8 action=wake-fallback\n' \
    "$attempt" >>"$runtime/guardian.log"
  payload=$runtime/dispatch-retry-exhausted.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson attempts "$((attempt - 1))" --argjson exhausted_at "$now" \
    --argjson queue_revision "$(jq -r '.queue.revision' "$runtime/current/state.json")" \
    '{attempts:$attempts,exhausted_at:$exhausted_at,queue_revision:$queue_revision,
      handoff:"durable_wake"}' >"$payload"
  action="dispatch-retry-exhausted-$now-$$"
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit guardian dispatch_retry_exhausted \
    "$action" --fingerprint "$(runtime_sha256 "$payload")" --payload-file "$payload"
  rm -f "$payload"
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" wake
  POLYLANE_WAKE_PENDING=1
  return 0
}
drain_due_work() {
  local runtime state now attempt
  runtime=$1 state=$2 now=$3; shift 3
  for attempt in $(seq 1 8); do
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce || return $?
    if ! jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
      def recovery_group($item):
        if (($item.args.actor//null)|type)=="string" and
           (($item.args.reason//null)|type)=="string" and
           (($item.args.strategy_generation//null)|type)=="number" then
          {actor:$item.args.actor,reason:$item.args.reason,
            strategy_generation:$item.args.strategy_generation}
        else null end;
      . as $state |
      [$state.queue.items[] as $blocked |
        ($blocked.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and
        $blocked.next_action_at<=$now and
        ((recovery_group($blocked)) as $group |
          ($group==null or
            (any($state.queue.items[];
              .id!=$blocked.id and (.status|IN("starting","running","complete")) and
              recovery_group(.)==$group)|not)))] | any' \
      "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null; then
      return 0
    fi
    dispatch_ready "$runtime" "$state" "$now" "$@" || return $?
  done
  printf 'guardian due-work drain yielded after 8 attempts action=durable-wake\n' \
    >>"$runtime/guardian.log"
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" wake || true
  POLYLANE_WAKE_PENDING=1
  return 0
}
reap_exited_children() {
  local runtime actor pid process_state
  runtime=$1
  for actor in "$runtime/actor-controller.json" "$runtime"/actor-worker-*.json; do
    [ -f "$actor" ] || continue; pid=$(jq -r .pid "$actor")
    process_state=$(ps -o stat= -p "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true)
    if [ -z "$process_state" ] || { case $process_state in *Z*) true;; *) false;; esac; }; then
      wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true
      jq '.lease_valid=false' "$actor" >"$actor.tmp.$$" && mv -f "$actor.tmp.$$" "$actor"
    fi
  done
}
pause_for_input() {
  local runtime current request_id paused_at actors file actor payload
  runtime=$1; current=$runtime/current/state.json
  request_id=$(jq -er '.active_input.request_id' "$current")
  paused_at=$(jq -er '.active_input.created_at' "$current")
  actors=$runtime/input-pause-actors.$$.json; printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$actors"
  for file in "$runtime/actor-controller.json" "$runtime"/actor-worker-*.json; do
    [ -f "$file" ] || continue
    actor=$(basename "$file"); actor=${actor#actor-}; actor=${actor%.json}
    "$BIN/polylane-process.sh" adopt-or-fence "$runtime" "$actor" shutdown
    jq --arg actor "$actor" '.+[$actor]|sort|unique' "$actors" >"$actors.next"; mv "$actors.next" "$actors"
  done
  payload=$runtime/input-pause.$$.json
  jq -n --arg request_id "$request_id" --argjson paused_at "$paused_at" --slurpfile actors "$actors" \
    '{request_id:$request_id,paused_at:$paused_at,fenced_actor_ids:$actors[0]}' >"$payload"
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit guardian input_pause "$request_id" \
    --fingerprint "$(runtime_sha256 "$payload")" --payload-file "$payload"
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
  rm -f "$payload" "$actors"
  jq -e --arg request "$request_id" '.terminal=="WAITING_FOR_USER" and
    .input_pause.request_id==$request and .controller_paused==true and
    all(.queue.items[];(.status=="starting" or .status=="running")|not)' \
    "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null
}
guardian_publish_observation() {
  local runtime actor state pid token observation guardian_rc goal_rc observed_at
  runtime=$1 actor=$runtime/actor-guardian.json state=$runtime/current/state.json
  observed_at=$(runtime_now)
  if jq -e --argjson at "$observed_at" '
    .audit.last_guardian_observation.observed_at==$at and
    .audit.last_goal_observation.observed_at==$at' "$state" >/dev/null; then
    return 0
  fi
  [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] || return 5
  pid=$(jq -er .pid "$actor"); token=$(jq -er .start_token "$actor")
  [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true)" = "$token" ] || return 5
  observation=$runtime/.guardian-observation.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson at "$(runtime_now)" --argjson pid "$pid" --arg token "$token" \
    --argjson generation "$(jq -r .guardian.generation "$state")" \
    --arg ownership "$(jq -r .generation_token "$actor")" '
    {schema_version:1,kind:"guardian",observed_at:$at,
      identity:{role:"guardian",pid:$pid,start_token:$token,generation:$generation,
        ownership_token:$ownership}}' >"$observation"
  if audit_hook_guardian_coverage "$runtime" "$observation"; then guardian_rc=0
  else guardian_rc=$?; fi
  case $guardian_rc in
    0|76) : ;;
    *) rm -f "$observation"; return "$guardian_rc" ;;
  esac
  if audit_hook_goal_work "$runtime"; then goal_rc=0; else goal_rc=$?; fi
  case $goal_rc in
    0|75|76) : ;;
    *) rm -f "$observation"; return "$goal_rc" ;;
  esac
  rm -f "$observation"
  return 0
}
guardian_process_wake() {
  local runtime emitted_at action ticket wake_payload lookup emitted_event_hash emitted_event_id
  local outputs heartbeat rc
  runtime=$1
  [ "${POLYLANE_WAKE_PENDING:-0}" = 1 ] || return 0
  POLYLANE_WAKE_PENDING=0
  emitted_at=$(runtime_now); action="usr1-$emitted_at-$$"
  AUDIT_HANDLER_BEFORE_ARTIFACTS=()
  ticket=$(audit_handler_begin "$runtime" guardian wake "wake-$action" '' '' guardian \
    usr1_wake)
  wake_payload=$runtime/wake-requested.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson emitted_at "$emitted_at" \
    '{signal:"USR1",emitted_at:$emitted_at,fallback_seconds:5}' >"$wake_payload"
  audit_hook_emit "$runtime" guardian wake_requested "$action" "$action" "$wake_payload"
  audit_hook_reduce "$runtime"
  lookup=$runtime/wake-requested-lookup.$$.json
  audit_hook_lookup_event "$runtime" guardian wake_requested "$action" "$lookup"
  emitted_event_hash=$(jq -er .event_hash "$lookup")
  emitted_event_id=$(jq -er .event_id "$lookup")
  outputs=$runtime/wake-outputs.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson emitted_at "$emitted_at" --arg emitted_event_hash "$emitted_event_hash" \
    --argjson emitted_event_id "$emitted_event_id" '
    {wake_observation:{emitted_at:$emitted_at,emitted_event_hash:$emitted_event_hash,
      emitted_event_id:$emitted_event_id,fallback_seconds:5}}' >"$outputs"
  heartbeat=$runtime/wake-heartbeat.$$.json
  jq -n --arg wake_event_hash "$emitted_event_hash" --argjson wake_event_id "$emitted_event_id" \
    '{wake_event_hash:$wake_event_hash,wake_event_id:$wake_event_id}' >"$heartbeat"
  audit_handler_publish "$runtime" "$ticket" guardian heartbeat "$action" \
    "$heartbeat" "$outputs" "$(jq -r '.guardian.generation' "$runtime/current/state.json")" || {
    rc=$?; rm -f "$wake_payload" "$lookup" "$outputs" "$heartbeat"; return "$rc"; }
  rm -f "$wake_payload" "$lookup" "$outputs" "$heartbeat"
}
check_once() {
  local runtime state now controller_spec terminal project goal context
  local elected_pid elected_token elected_generation caller_pid reclaim_due
  local prior_check_sequence prior_check_status ignored wait_attempts started
  local resume_phase resume_rank phase_rc
  local -a runtime_args clock_args
  runtime='' state='' now='' controller_spec=''
  while [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; do
    case $1 in --runtime) runtime=$2; shift 2;; --state) state=$2; shift 2;;
      --controller-launch) controller_spec=$2; shift 2;;
      --now)
        [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] || return 2
        now=$(runtime_test_now_arg --now "$2") || return 2; shift 2;;
      *) return 2;; esac
  done
  [ -n "$runtime" ] && [ -n "$state" ] && [ -n "$controller_spec" ] || return 2
  RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
  runtime_args=(--dir "$runtime")
  clock_args=()
  if [ -n "$now" ]; then
    export POLYLANE_NOW_EPOCH=$now
    clock_args=(--now "$now")
  else now=$(runtime_now); fi
  caller_pid=${BASHPID:-$$}
  elected_pid=$(jq -r '.guardian.pid//0' "$runtime/current/state.json")
  elected_token=$(jq -r '.guardian.start_token//""' "$runtime/current/state.json")
  elected_generation=$(jq -r '.guardian.generation//0' "$runtime/current/state.json")
  [ "$elected_pid" -gt 0 ] && [ -n "$elected_token" ] &&
    [ "$elected_generation" -gt 0 ] &&
    guardian_identity_current "$runtime" "$elected_pid" "$elected_token" \
      "$elected_generation" || return 75
  if [ "$elected_pid" -ne "$caller_pid" ]; then
    prior_check_sequence=$(jq -r '.check.sequence//-1' "$runtime/actor-guardian.json")
    prior_check_status=$(jq -r '.check.status//""' "$runtime/actor-guardian.json")
    guardian_trace "$runtime" delegated-to-elected
    if [ "$prior_check_status" != running ] ||
       ! jq -e --argjson now "$now" '.check.logical_at==$now' \
         "$runtime/actor-guardian.json" >/dev/null; then
      "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" wake
    fi
    if jq -e '.check.status|IN("idle","running")' "$runtime/actor-guardian.json" >/dev/null; then
      wait_attempts=300
      if [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] &&
         [ -n "${POLYLANE_TEST_DELEGATION_ATTEMPTS:-}" ]; then
        wait_attempts=$POLYLANE_TEST_DELEGATION_ATTEMPTS
      fi
      case $wait_attempts in ''|*[!0-9]*) return 2;; esac
      [ "$wait_attempts" -ge 1 ] && [ "$wait_attempts" -le 300 ] || return 2
      started=0
      for ignored in $(seq 1 "$wait_attempts"); do
        guardian_identity_current "$runtime" "$elected_pid" "$elected_token" \
          "$elected_generation" || return 75
        if [ "$prior_check_status" = running ] ||
           jq -e --argjson prior "$prior_check_sequence" '.check.sequence>$prior' \
          "$runtime/actor-guardian.json" >/dev/null; then
          started=1
          runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
          runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/guardian-check.lock"
          runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check.lock"
          runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
          break
        fi
        sleep 0.01
      done
      [ "$started" -eq 1 ] || return 75
    fi
    return 0
  fi
  guardian_trace "$runtime" check-start
  runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
  runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/guardian-check.lock"
  resume_phase=$(jq -r '
    if .check.status=="idle" and .check.checkpoint!=null and
       .check.checkpoint.sequence==.check.sequence
    then .check.checkpoint.phase else "" end' "$runtime/actor-guardian.json")
  case $resume_phase in
    '') resume_rank=0; guardian_check_status "$runtime" running "$now" ;;
    reclaim) resume_rank=1; guardian_check_resume_status "$runtime" "$now" ;;
    dispatch-first) resume_rank=2; guardian_check_resume_status "$runtime" "$now" ;;
    controller-ready) resume_rank=3; guardian_check_resume_status "$runtime" "$now" ;;
    dispatch) resume_rank=4; guardian_check_resume_status "$runtime" "$now" ;;
    drain) resume_rank=5; guardian_check_resume_status "$runtime" "$now" ;;
    publish) resume_rank=6; guardian_check_resume_status "$runtime" "$now" ;;
    dispatch-final) resume_rank=7; guardian_check_resume_status "$runtime" "$now" ;;
    *) resume_rank=0; guardian_check_status "$runtime" running "$now" ;;
  esac
  "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" "${runtime_args[@]}" reduce
  if [ "$resume_rank" -eq 0 ]; then
    reap_exited_children "$runtime"
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit guardian heartbeat guardian \
      --fingerprint "$(jq -r '.guardian.generation' "$runtime/current/state.json")"
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
  fi
  terminal=$(jq -r '.terminal // ""' "$runtime/current/state.json")
  if [ "$terminal" = WAITING_FOR_USER ]; then
    pause_for_input "$runtime"
    guardian_check_status "$runtime" idle "$now"
    runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check.lock"
    runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
    return
  fi
  if [ "$terminal" = COMPLETE ]; then
    guardian_check_status "$runtime" idle "$now"
    runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check.lock"
    runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
    return 0
  fi
  if [ "$resume_rank" -lt 1 ]; then
    # reclaim-expired also detects a dead/stale guardian identity before the
    # logical lease deadline.  Always run it so a crash after reservation is
    # immediately requeued and can resume in this same check.
    "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" reclaim-expired \
      ${clock_args[@]+"${clock_args[@]}"}
    guardian_trace "$runtime" reclaim-done
    if guardian_phase_boundary_yield "$runtime" "$now" reclaim; then return 0
    else phase_rc=$?; [ "$phase_rc" -eq 1 ] || return "$phase_rc"; fi
  fi
  if [ "$resume_rank" -lt 2 ]; then
    dispatch_ready "$runtime" "$state" "$now" ${clock_args[@]+"${clock_args[@]}"}
    guardian_trace "$runtime" dispatch-first-done
    if guardian_phase_boundary_yield "$runtime" "$now" dispatch-first; then return 0
    else phase_rc=$?; [ "$phase_rc" -eq 1 ] || return "$phase_rc"; fi
  fi
  if [ "$resume_rank" -lt 3 ]; then
    project=$(jq -r .project_root "$runtime/current/state.json"); goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json
    if jq -e '.convergence!=null' "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null; then
      "$BIN/polylane-certify.sh" repair "$runtime" "$project"
    fi
    [ ! -f "$goal" ] || "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" ensure-progress "$goal" ${clock_args[@]+"${clock_args[@]}"}
    reconcile_exited_quiet_children "$runtime" "$now"
    if ! "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" "${runtime_args[@]}" check-leases ${clock_args[@]+"${clock_args[@]}"}; then
      context=$runtime/guardian-recovery.json
      jq -n '{goal_ref:"controller",strategy_hash:"guardian-recovery",ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:["actor:controller"]}' >"$context"
      POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime "$BIN/polylane-recovery.sh" route lease_expired controller "$context"
    fi
    actor_live "$runtime/actor-controller.json" || { route_dead_controller_once "$runtime"; start_controller "$runtime" "$state" "$controller_spec"; }
    guardian_trace "$runtime" controller-ready
    if guardian_phase_boundary_yield "$runtime" "$now" controller-ready; then return 0
    else phase_rc=$?; [ "$phase_rc" -eq 1 ] || return "$phase_rc"; fi
  fi
  if [ "$resume_rank" -lt 4 ]; then
    dispatch_ready "$runtime" "$state" "$now" ${clock_args[@]+"${clock_args[@]}"}
    guardian_trace "$runtime" dispatch-done
    if guardian_phase_boundary_yield "$runtime" "$now" dispatch; then return 0
    else phase_rc=$?; [ "$phase_rc" -eq 1 ] || return "$phase_rc"; fi
  fi
  if [ "$resume_rank" -lt 5 ]; then
    drain_due_work "$runtime" "$state" "$now" ${clock_args[@]+"${clock_args[@]}"}
    guardian_trace "$runtime" drain-done
    if guardian_phase_boundary_yield "$runtime" "$now" drain; then return 0
    else phase_rc=$?; [ "$phase_rc" -eq 1 ] || return "$phase_rc"; fi
  fi
  if [ "$resume_rank" -lt 6 ]; then
    guardian_publish_observation "$runtime"
    guardian_trace "$runtime" publish-done
    if guardian_phase_boundary_yield "$runtime" "$now" publish; then return 0
    else phase_rc=$?; [ "$phase_rc" -eq 1 ] || return "$phase_rc"; fi
  fi
  if [ "$resume_rank" -lt 7 ]; then
    dispatch_ready "$runtime" "$state" "$now" ${clock_args[@]+"${clock_args[@]}"}
    drain_due_work "$runtime" "$state" "$now" ${clock_args[@]+"${clock_args[@]}"}
    guardian_trace "$runtime" dispatch-final-done
    if guardian_phase_boundary_yield "$runtime" "$now" dispatch-final; then return 0
    else phase_rc=$?; [ "$phase_rc" -eq 1 ] || return "$phase_rc"; fi
  fi
  guardian_check_status "$runtime" idle "$now"
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check.lock"
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
}
if [ "${POLYLANE_GUARDIAN_SOURCE_ONLY:-0}" = 1 ]; then
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] || return 5 2>/dev/null || exit 5
  return 0 2>/dev/null || exit 0
fi
case ${1:-} in
  check-once) shift; check_once "$@" ;;
  --runtime)
    runtime=$2; shift 2; [ "$1" = --state ] || exit 2; state=$2; shift 2
    [ "$1" = --controller-launch ] || exit 2; controller_spec=$2; shift 2; [ "$#" -eq 0 ] || exit 2
    RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
    POLYLANE_WAKE_PENDING=0
    trap 'POLYLANE_WAKE_PENDING=1' USR1
    trap 'printf "guardian interrupted\n" >>"'$runtime'/guardian.log"; exit 0' INT TERM
    wake=$runtime/wake.fifo; [ -p "$wake" ] || { rm -f "$wake"; mkfifo "$wake"; }; exec 9<>"$wake"
    generation=$(jq -r '(.guardian.generation//0)+1' "$runtime/current/state.json")
    token=$(runtime_start_token $$)
    runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/guardian-election.lock"
    existing_pid=$(jq -r '.guardian.pid // 0' "$runtime/current/state.json")
    existing_token=$(jq -r '.guardian.start_token // ""' "$runtime/current/state.json")
    existing_at=$(jq -r '.guardian.heartbeat_at // 0' "$runtime/current/state.json")
    if [ "$existing_pid" != "$$" ] && [ -n "$existing_token" ] &&
       [ "$(runtime_start_token "$existing_pid" || true)" = "$existing_token" ] &&
       [ $(( $(runtime_now) - existing_at )) -le 10 ]; then
      runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-election.lock"; exit 0
    fi
    started_at=$(runtime_now)
    jq -n --argjson pid "$$" --arg start_token "$token" --arg generation_token "guardian-$generation" \
      --argjson generation "$generation" --argjson started_at "$started_at" \
      '{actor:"guardian",pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,generation_token:$generation_token,
        generation:$generation,started_at:$started_at,lease_valid:true,descendants:[],
        check:{status:"idle",logical_at:$started_at,wall_at:$started_at,sequence:0}}' \
      >"$runtime/actor-guardian.json.tmp.$$"
    atomic_json "$runtime/actor-guardian.json" "$runtime/actor-guardian.json.tmp.$$"
    # The signal trap and FIFO are ready before this identity becomes wakeable.
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit guardian register guardian \
      --guardian-pid $$ --guardian-start-token "$token" --guardian-generation "$generation" --guardian-role guardian
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
    runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-election.lock"
    while :; do
      if guardian_barrier_intent_yield "$runtime"; then
        # The owner is alive and has observed its requested check sequence.
        # Leave any USR1/FIFO wake pending; the short bounded poll only hands
        # guardian-check-gate admission to that exact barrier owner.
        sleep 0.05
        continue
      fi
      guardian_process_wake "$runtime"
      check_once --runtime "$runtime" --state "$state" --controller-launch "$controller_spec" || true
      [ "${POLYLANE_WAKE_PENDING:-0}" = 0 ] || continue
      terminal=$(jq -r '.terminal // ""' "$runtime/current/state.json")
      [ "$terminal" != COMPLETE ] || exit 0
      if [ "$terminal" = WAITING_FOR_USER ]; then delay=5
      else
        idle_now=$(runtime_now)
        next=$(jq --argjson now "$idle_now" '
          ([.leases[].deadline_at,
            (.queue.items[]|select((.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and
              .next_action_at>$now)|.next_action_at),
            (.queue.items[]|select(.status|IN("starting","running"))|.claim.expires_at)] |
            map(select(.!=null)) | min) // ($now+5)' "$runtime/current/state.json")
        delay=$((next - idle_now)); [ "$delay" -lt 0 ] && delay=0; [ "$delay" -gt 5 ] && delay=5
      fi
      if [ "$delay" -gt 0 ]; then IFS= read -r -t "$delay" -u 9 _ || true; fi
    done
    ;;
  *) exit 2 ;;
esac
~~~

Install the bounded-handoff final body for `core/scripts/polylane-queue.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
umask 077
SELF=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd -P)
. "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-hooks.sh"
RUNTIME=$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh
[ "${1:-}" = --dir ] || exit 2
runtime=$2; shift 2
case $runtime in /*) : ;; *) exit 2 ;; esac
RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
. "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"

current_state() { printf '%s/current/state.json' "$runtime"; }
canonical_json() { jq -Sc . "$1"; }
sha() {
  if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then sha256sum | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'
  else shasum -a 256 | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'; fi
}
ownership_hash() { jq -Sc '{ownership_globs,resource_locks}' "$1" | sha; }
item_hash() { jq -Sc 'del(.item_hash)' "$1" | sha; }
array_hash() { jq -Sc 'map({id,item_hash,ownership_hash})|sort_by(.id)' "$1" | sha; }
selection_hash() { jq -Sc 'del(.selection_hash)' "$1" | sha; }
glob_prefix() {
  value=$1; best=$value
  for candidate in "${value%%\**}" "${value%%\?*}" "${value%%\[*}"; do
    if [ "${#candidate}" -lt "${#best}" ]; then best=$candidate; fi
  done
  printf '%s' "$best"
}
glob_conflict() {
  left=$(glob_prefix "$1"); right=$(glob_prefix "$2")
  [ -n "$left" ] && [ -n "$right" ] || return 0
  case $left in "$right"*) return 0;; esac
  case $right in "$left"*) return 0;; esac
  return 1
}
ownership_conflict() {
  left=$1 right=$2
  while IFS= read -r -d '' left_glob; do
    while IFS= read -r -d '' right_glob; do
      glob_conflict "$left_glob" "$right_glob" && return 0
    done < <(jq -j '.ownership_globs[] | ., "\u0000"' "$right")
  done < <(jq -j '.ownership_globs[] | ., "\u0000"' "$left")
  while IFS= read -r -d '' resource; do
    jq -e --arg resource "$resource" '.resource_locks|index($resource)!=null' "$right" >/dev/null && return 0
  done < <(jq -j '.resource_locks[] | ., "\u0000"' "$left")
  return 1
}
valid_kind() {
  case $1 in
    cycle|digest|skill_discovery|research|verification|council|certification|cycle_suggestions|final_suggestions|\
    checkpoint|retry|reflection_repair|alternate_model|recarve|alternate_approach|\
    local_test|static_analysis|diff_review|merge_prepare|prompt_prepare|documentation|\
    cleanup|provider_probe|state_reconcile|session_recover) return 0 ;;
    *) return 1 ;;
  esac
}
validate_item() {
  file=$1
  jq -e 'type=="object" and .schema_version==1 and
    (.id|type=="string" and test("^[A-Za-z0-9._:-]{1,160}$")) and
    (.kind|type=="string") and (.mode|IN("online","offline","probe")) and
    (.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and (.priority|type=="number") and
    (.goal_ref|type=="string" and length>0) and (.args|type=="object") and
    ([.args|paths(scalars)|last] | all(. as $key |
      ($key|tostring|IN("command","shell","script")|not))) and
    (.depends_on|type=="array") and (.ownership_globs|type=="array") and
    (.resource_locks|type=="array") and
    (.depends_on == (.depends_on|sort|unique)) and
    all(.depends_on[];type=="string" and test("^[A-Za-z0-9._:-]{1,160}$")) and
    (.next_action_at|type=="number") and (.deadline_at|type=="number") and
    .deadline_at>=.next_action_at and
    (.ownership_globs == (.ownership_globs|sort|unique)) and
    (.resource_locks == (.resource_locks|sort|unique)) and
    all(.ownership_globs[]; length>0 and (startswith("/")|not) and (contains("..")|not)) and
    all(.resource_locks[]; test("^[A-Za-z0-9._:-]+$"))' "$file" >/dev/null || return 5
  valid_kind "$(jq -r '.kind' "$file")" || return 5
}
emit_payload() {
  type=$1 action=$2 payload=$3 ticket=${4:-} outputs=${5:-} owned_outputs=0
  claim=$(jq -r '.token // .claim_token // empty' "$payload")
  item=$(jq -r '.id // empty' "$payload")
  [ -n "$item" ] && [ -n "$claim" ] || { item=''; claim=''; }
  if [ -z "$ticket" ] && [ "$type" != provider_state ]; then
    AUDIT_HANDLER_BEFORE_ARTIFACTS=()
    ticket=$(audit_handler_begin "$runtime" queue queue "queue-$type-$action" "$item" "$claim" \
      queue orphan_requeue state_reconcile)
  fi
  if [ -z "$outputs" ]; then
    outputs=$runtime/queue-audit-outputs.$$.json; owned_outputs=1
    printf '%s\n' '{}' >"$outputs"
  fi
  if [ -n "$ticket" ]; then
    case $(jq -r .recovery "$ticket") in
      offline_plus_probe|offline_drain|online_immediate)
        [ "$type" = provider_state ] || return 5
        jq -n --arg state "$(jq -er .state "$payload")" \
          '{provider_observation:{provider_state:$state}}' >"$outputs";;
      orphan_requeue)
        [ "$type" = queue_reclaim ] &&
          jq -e '.claims|type=="array" and length==1 and
            (.[0].id|type=="string" and length>0) and
            (.[0].token|type=="string" and length>0)' "$payload" >/dev/null || return 5
        queue_item=$(jq -r '.claims[0].id' "$payload")
        old_claim=$(jq -r '.claims[0].token' "$payload")
        status_before=$(jq -er --arg id "$queue_item" --arg token "$old_claim" '
          .queue.items[]|select(.id==$id and .claim.token==$token)|
          .status|select(.=="starting" or .=="running")' "$(current_state)") || return 5
        jq -n --arg queue_item_id "$queue_item" --arg old_claim_token "$old_claim" \
          --arg status_before "$status_before" '
          {queue_observation:{queue_item_id:$queue_item_id,
            old_claim_token:$old_claim_token,new_claim_token:null,
            status_before:$status_before,status_after:"scheduled",
            goal_ref:null,previous_generation:null,reconcile_generation:null}}' >"$outputs";;
      state_reconcile)
        [ "$type" = queue_enqueue ] || return 5
        queue_item=$(jq -er '.id|select(type=="string" and length>0)' "$payload") || return 5
        goal_ref=$(jq -er '.goal_ref|select(type=="string" and length>0)' "$payload") || return 5
        reconcile_generation=$(jq -er '.args.reconcile_generation|
          select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>0)' "$payload") || return 5
        previous_generation=$(jq -r --arg goal "$goal_ref" '
          [.queue.items[]|select(.kind=="state_reconcile" and .goal_ref==$goal)|
            (.args.reconcile_generation//0)]|max//0' "$(current_state)")
        [ "$reconcile_generation" -gt "$previous_generation" ] || return 5
        jq -n --arg queue_item_id "$queue_item" --arg goal_ref "$goal_ref" \
          --argjson previous_generation "$previous_generation" \
          --argjson reconcile_generation "$reconcile_generation" '
          {queue_observation:{queue_item_id:$queue_item_id,
            old_claim_token:null,new_claim_token:null,status_before:null,status_after:null,
            goal_ref:$goal_ref,previous_generation:$previous_generation,
            reconcile_generation:$reconcile_generation}}' >"$outputs";;
      *) return 5;;
    esac
  fi
  audit_handler_publish "$runtime" "$ticket" queue "$type" "$action" "$payload" "$outputs" '' || {
    rc=$?; [ "$owned_outputs" -eq 0 ] || rm -f "$outputs"; return "$rc"; }
  [ "$owned_outputs" -eq 0 ] || rm -f "$outputs"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" wake
}
mutation_begin() {
  runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/queue-command.lock"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" reduce
}
mutation_end() {
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/queue-command.lock"
}
dump_queue() { jq '.queue' "$(current_state)"; }

enqueue_item() {
  file=$1; validate_item "$file"
  mutation_begin
  id=$(jq -r '.id' "$file")
  jq -e --arg id "$id" 'all((.queue.items // [])[]; .id!=$id)' "$(current_state)" >/dev/null || {
    mutation_end; return 5; }
  payload=$runtime/enqueue.$$.json
  hash=$(ownership_hash "$file")
  jq --arg hash "$hash" '. + {ownership_hash:$hash}' "$file" >"$payload"
  emit_payload queue_enqueue "$id" "$payload" || {
    rc=$?; rm -f "$payload"; mutation_end; return "$rc"; }
  rm -f "$payload"
  mutation_end
}

ready_items() {
  mode=$1; shift
  [ "${1:-}" = --limit ] || return 2; limit=$2; shift 2
  now=$(runtime_now); [ "$#" -eq 0 ] || now=$(runtime_test_now_arg "$@") || return 2
  snapshot=$(runtime_current_dir) || return 5
  state=$snapshot/state.json
  snapshot_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$state")
  revision=$(jq -r '.queue.revision' "$state")
  provider=$(jq -r '.queue.provider_state' "$state")
  case $mode in online|offline|probe) :;; *) return 2;; esac
  work=$(mktemp -d "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/polylane-ready.XXXXXX")
  trap 'rm -rf "$work"' RETURN
  jq --arg mode "$mode" --argjson now "$now" --arg provider "$provider" '
    .queue as $q | [.queue.items[] |
      select((.status=="ready" or .status=="scheduled") and .next_action_at<=$now and
        .mode==$mode and (($mode!="online") or $provider=="available")) |
      select([.depends_on[] as $dependency |
        any($q.items[]; .id==$dependency and .status=="complete")]|all)] |
    sort_by(-.priority,.id)' "$state" >"$work/candidates.json"
  jq '[.queue.items[]|select(.status=="starting" or .status=="running")]' "$state" >"$work/active.json"
  printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$work/selected.json"
  while IFS= read -r -d '' id; do
    jq --arg id "$id" '.[]|select(.id==$id)' "$work/candidates.json" >"$work/item.json"
    computed=$(ownership_hash "$work/item.json")
    [ "$(jq -r '.ownership_hash // ""' "$work/item.json")" = "$computed" ] || {
      rm -rf "$work"; trap - RETURN; return 5; }
    conflict=0
    while IFS= read -r -d '' active_id; do
      jq --arg id "$active_id" '.[]|select(.id==$id)' "$work/active.json" >"$work/other.json"
      ownership_conflict "$work/item.json" "$work/other.json" && { conflict=1; break; }
    done < <(jq -j '.[].id | ., "\u0000"' "$work/active.json")
    if [ "$conflict" -eq 0 ]; then
      while IFS= read -r -d '' selected_id; do
        jq --arg id "$selected_id" '.[]|select(.id==$id)' "$work/selected.json" >"$work/other.json"
        ownership_conflict "$work/item.json" "$work/other.json" && { conflict=1; break; }
      done < <(jq -j '.[].id | ., "\u0000"' "$work/selected.json")
    fi
    [ "$conflict" -eq 0 ] || continue
    hash=$computed; full_hash=$(item_hash "$work/item.json")
    jq --arg hash "$hash" --arg item_hash "$full_hash" \
      '. + {ownership_hash:$hash,item_hash:$item_hash}' "$work/item.json" >"$work/hashed.json"
    jq --slurpfile item "$work/hashed.json" '. + [$item[0]]' "$work/selected.json" >"$work/selected.next"
    mv "$work/selected.next" "$work/selected.json"
    [ "$(jq 'length' "$work/selected.json")" -lt "$limit" ] || break
  done < <(jq -j '.[].id | ., "\u0000"' "$work/candidates.json")
  proof=$(array_hash "$work/selected.json")
  jq -n --arg snapshot_path "$snapshot" --arg snapshot_hash "$snapshot_hash" \
    --argjson snapshot_revision "$(jq -r .revision "$state")" --argjson queue_revision "$revision" \
    --arg mode "$mode" --argjson selected_at "$now" --arg proof "$proof" --argjson limit "$limit" \
    --slurpfile items "$work/selected.json" \
    '{schema_version:2,snapshot_path:$snapshot_path,snapshot_hash:$snapshot_hash,
      snapshot_revision:$snapshot_revision,queue_revision:$queue_revision,mode:$mode,
      selected_at:$selected_at,items:$items[0],aggregate_ownership_proof:$proof,limit:$limit}' \
    >"$work/selection.base"
  seal=$(selection_hash "$work/selection.base")
  jq --arg seal "$seal" '.+{selection_hash:$seal}' "$work/selection.base"
  rm -rf "$work"; trap - RETURN
}

reserve_selected() {
  selection=$1 guardian_pid=$2 guardian_generation=$3
  jq -e '.schema_version==2 and (.items|type=="array" and length>0) and
    (.limit|type=="number" and .>=1 and floor==.) and (.items|length)<=.limit and
    (([.items[].id]|length)==([.items[].id]|unique|length)) and
    (.snapshot_path|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
    (.snapshot_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.selected_at|type=="number") and (.aggregate_ownership_proof|startswith("sha256:")) and
    (.selection_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    all(.items[];(.item_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
      (.ownership_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")))' "$selection" >/dev/null || return 7
  [ "$(selection_hash "$selection")" = "$(jq -r .selection_hash "$selection")" ] || return 7
  mutation_begin
  selected_snapshot=$(jq -r .snapshot_path "$selection")
  case $selected_snapshot in "$runtime"/snapshots/*) :;; *) mutation_end; return 7;; esac
  [ -d "$selected_snapshot" ] && [ ! -L "$selected_snapshot" ] || {
    mutation_end; return 7; }
  selected_state=$selected_snapshot/state.json
  [ -f "$selected_state" ] && [ ! -L "$selected_state" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$selected_state")" = "$(jq -r .snapshot_hash "$selection")" ] &&
    [ "$(jq -r .revision "$selected_state")" = "$(jq -r .snapshot_revision "$selection")" ] || {
      mutation_end; return 7; }
  snapshot=$(runtime_current_dir) || { mutation_end; return 7; }
  state=$snapshot/state.json
  now=$(runtime_now); selected_at=$(jq -r .selected_at "$selection")
  [ "$selected_at" -le "$now" ] && [ $((now - selected_at)) -le 5 ] || {
    mutation_end; return 7; }
  expected=$(jq -r '.queue_revision' "$selection")
  [ "$expected" = "$(jq -r '.queue.revision' "$selected_state")" ] || {
    mutation_end; return 7; }
  [ "$expected" = "$(jq -r '.queue.revision' "$state")" ] || { mutation_end; return 7; }
  guardian_token=$(jq -r --argjson pid "$guardian_pid" --argjson generation "$guardian_generation" '
    select(.guardian.pid==$pid and .guardian.generation==$generation and .guardian.role=="guardian") |
    .guardian.start_token' "$state")
  [ -n "$guardian_token" ] && [ "$(runtime_start_token "$guardian_pid" || true)" = "$guardian_token" ] || {
    mutation_end; return 7; }
  selected_hashes=$runtime/selection-hashes.$$.json
  jq '[.items[]|{id,item_hash,ownership_hash}]' "$selection" >"$selected_hashes"
  [ "$(array_hash "$selected_hashes")" = "$(jq -r .aggregate_ownership_proof "$selection")" ] || {
    rm -f "$selected_hashes"; mutation_end; return 7; }
  reservations=$runtime/reservations.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson expected "$expected" '{expected_queue_revision:$expected,reservations:[]}' >"$reservations"
  checked=$runtime/checked.$$.json; printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$checked"
  while IFS= read -r -d '' id; do
    item=$runtime/item.$$.json
    jq --arg id "$id" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)' "$state" >"$item"
    jq -e --arg mode "$(jq -r .mode "$selection")" --argjson now "$now" '
      (.status=="ready" or .status=="scheduled") and ($mode=="mixed" or .mode==$mode) and
      .next_action_at<=$now and .deadline_at>$now' "$item" >/dev/null || {
      rm -f "$item" "$reservations" "$selected_hashes" "$checked"; mutation_end; return 7; }
    mode=$(jq -r .mode "$item"); provider=$(jq -r .queue.provider_state "$state")
    [ "$mode" != online ] || [ "$provider" = available ] || {
      rm -f "$item" "$reservations" "$selected_hashes" "$checked"; mutation_end; return 7; }
    while IFS= read -r -d '' dependency; do
      jq -e --arg dependency "$dependency" 'any(.queue.items[];.id==$dependency and .status=="complete")' "$state" >/dev/null || {
        rm -f "$item" "$reservations" "$selected_hashes" "$checked"; mutation_end; return 7; }
    done < <(jq -j '.depends_on[] | ., "\u0000"' "$item")
    selected=$(jq -r --arg id "$id" '.items[]|select(.id==$id)|.ownership_hash' "$selection")
    selected_item=$(jq -r --arg id "$id" '.items[]|select(.id==$id)|.item_hash' "$selection")
    computed=$(ownership_hash "$item")
    persisted=$(jq -r '.ownership_hash // ""' "$item")
    computed_item=$(item_hash "$item")
    [ "$selected" = "$computed" ] && [ "$persisted" = "$computed" ] &&
      [ "$selected_item" = "$computed_item" ] || {
      rm -f "$item" "$reservations" "$selected_hashes" "$checked"; mutation_end; return 7; }
    while IFS= read -r -d '' active_id; do
      case " $(jq -r '.items[].id' "$selection" | tr '\n' ' ') " in *" $active_id "*) continue;; esac
      jq --arg id "$active_id" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)' "$state" >"$runtime/other.$$.json"
      ownership_conflict "$item" "$runtime/other.$$.json" && {
        rm -f "$runtime/other.$$.json" "$item" "$reservations" "$selected_hashes" "$checked"; mutation_end; return 7; }
      rm -f "$runtime/other.$$.json"
    done < <(jq -j '.queue.items[]|select(.status=="starting" or .status=="running")|.id,"\u0000"' "$state")
    while IFS= read -r -d '' checked_id; do
      jq --arg id "$checked_id" '.[]|select(.id==$id)' "$checked" >"$runtime/other.$$.json"
      ownership_conflict "$item" "$runtime/other.$$.json" && {
        rm -f "$runtime/other.$$.json" "$item" "$reservations" "$selected_hashes" "$checked"; mutation_end; return 7; }
      rm -f "$runtime/other.$$.json"
    done < <(jq -j '.[].id | ., "\u0000"' "$checked")
    nonce=$(od -An -N16 -tx1 /dev/urandom 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' \n')
    [ -n "$nonce" ] || nonce="$$-$(runtime_wall_now)-${RANDOM:-0}"
    token=$(printf '%s:%s:%s:%s' "$id" "$guardian_pid" "$guardian_generation" "$nonce" | sha)
    jq --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" --argjson pid "$guardian_pid" \
      --arg guardian_start_token "$guardian_token" --argjson generation "$guardian_generation" \
      --argjson at "$(runtime_now)" --argjson deadline "$(jq -r .deadline_at "$item")" \
      '.reservations += [{id:$id,claim:{token:$token,guardian_pid:$pid,
        guardian_start_token:$guardian_start_token,guardian_generation:$generation,
        claimed_at:$at,expires_at:([$at+15,$deadline]|min),worker_pid:null,
        worker_start_token:null,proof_fingerprint:null}}]' "$reservations" >"$reservations.next"
    mv "$reservations.next" "$reservations"
    jq --slurpfile item "$item" '. + [$item[0]]' "$checked" >"$checked.next" && mv "$checked.next" "$checked"
    rm -f "$item"
  done < <(jq -j '.items[].id | ., "\u0000"' "$selection")
  jq --slurpfile selection "$selection" '.selection=$selection[0]' \
    "$reservations" >"$reservations.next"
  mv "$reservations.next" "$reservations"
  emit_payload queue_reserve reserve "$reservations"
  failed=0
  while IFS= read -r -d '' id; do
    expected_token=$(jq -r --arg id "$id" '.reservations[]|select(.id==$id)|.claim.token' "$reservations")
    jq -e --arg id "$id" --arg token "$expected_token" '
      any(.queue.items[];.id==$id and .status=="starting" and .claim.token==$token)' "$(current_state)" >/dev/null || failed=1
  done < <(jq -j '.reservations[].id | ., "\u0000"' "$reservations")
  rm -f "$reservations" "$selected_hashes" "$checked"
  mutation_end
  [ "$failed" -eq 0 ] || return 7
}

claim_event() {
  type=$1 id=$2 token=$3; shift 3
  mutation_begin
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json; now=$(runtime_now)
  item=$(jq --arg id "$id" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)' "$state")
  [ "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r '.claim.token')" = "$token" ] || { mutation_end; return 6; }
  guardian_pid=$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .claim.guardian_pid)
  guardian_token=$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .claim.guardian_start_token)
  guardian_generation=$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .claim.guardian_generation)
  jq -e --argjson pid "$guardian_pid" --arg token "$guardian_token" \
    --argjson generation "$guardian_generation" '
    .guardian.pid==$pid and .guardian.start_token==$token and
    .guardian.generation==$generation and .guardian.role=="guardian"' "$state" >/dev/null &&
    [ "$(runtime_start_token "$guardian_pid" || true)" = "$guardian_token" ] || {
      mutation_end; return 6; }
  [ "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .claim.expires_at)" -gt "$now" ] || {
    mutation_end; return 6; }
  payload=$runtime/claim.$$.json
  case $type in
    queue_activate)
      [ "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .status)" = starting ] &&
        [ "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .deadline_at)" -gt "$now" ] &&
        [ "$(runtime_start_token "$1" || true)" = "$2" ] && [ "$3" -gt "$now" ] &&
        [ "$3" -le $((now + 90)) ] &&
        [ "$3" -le "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .deadline_at)" ] || {
        mutation_end; return 6; }
      jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" --argjson worker_pid "$1" --arg worker_start_token "$2" \
        --argjson expires_at "$3" --argjson guardian_pid "$guardian_pid" \
        --arg guardian_start_token "$guardian_token" --argjson guardian_generation "$guardian_generation" \
      '{id:$id,token:$token,worker_pid:$worker_pid,worker_start_token:$worker_start_token,
        expires_at:$expires_at,guardian_pid:$guardian_pid,
        guardian_start_token:$guardian_start_token,guardian_generation:$guardian_generation}' >"$payload" ;;
    queue_renew|queue_complete|queue_fail)
      worker_pid=$1; worker_token=$2; shift 2
      [ "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .status)" = running ] || { mutation_end; return 6; }
      bound_pid=$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r '.claim.worker_pid // 0')
      bound_token=$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r '.claim.worker_start_token // ""')
      [ "$worker_pid" = "$bound_pid" ] && [ "$worker_token" = "$bound_token" ] &&
        [ -n "$worker_token" ] && [ "$(runtime_start_token "$worker_pid" || true)" = "$worker_token" ] || {
        mutation_end; return 6; }
      case $type in
        queue_renew)
          [ "$2" -gt "$(runtime_now)" ] && [ "$2" -le $(( $(runtime_now) + 90 )) ] &&
            [ "$2" -le "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .deadline_at)" ] || {
            mutation_end; return 5; }
          jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" --argjson worker_pid "$worker_pid" \
            --arg worker_start_token "$worker_token" --arg proof_fingerprint "$1" --argjson expires_at "$2" \
            '{id:$id,token:$token,worker_pid:$worker_pid,worker_start_token:$worker_start_token,
              proof_fingerprint:$proof_fingerprint,expires_at:$expires_at}' >"$payload" ;;
        queue_complete) jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" --argjson worker_pid "$worker_pid" \
          --arg worker_start_token "$worker_token" \
          '{id:$id,token:$token,worker_pid:$worker_pid,worker_start_token:$worker_start_token}' >"$payload" ;;
        queue_fail)
          [ "$2" != "$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r .strategy_hash)" ] &&
            printf '%s' "$2" | grep -Eq '^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$' || { mutation_end; return 5; }
          jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" --argjson worker_pid "$worker_pid" \
          --arg worker_start_token "$worker_token" --arg reason "$1" --arg strategy_hash "$2" --argjson retry_at "$3" \
          '{id:$id,token:$token,worker_pid:$worker_pid,worker_start_token:$worker_start_token,
            reason:$reason,strategy_hash:$strategy_hash,retry_at:$retry_at}' >"$payload" ;;
      esac ;;
  esac
  if [ "$type" = queue_renew ]; then
    old=$(printf '%s' "$item" | jq -r '.claim.proof_fingerprint // ""')
    proof=$(jq -r .proof_fingerprint "$payload")
    [ "$old" != "$proof" ] || { rm -f "$payload"; mutation_end; return 5; }
  fi
  emit_payload "$type" "$id" "$payload"
  rm -f "$payload"
  mutation_end
}

reclaim_expired() {
  now=$(runtime_now); [ "$#" -eq 0 ] || now=$(runtime_test_now_arg "$@") || return 2
  mutation_begin
  state=$(current_state); payload=$runtime/reclaim.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson at "$now" '{requeue_at:$at,claims:[]}' >"$payload"
  while IFS= read -r -d '' id; do
    item=$runtime/reclaim-item.$$.json
    jq --arg id "$id" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)' "$state" >"$item"
    expired=$(jq -r --argjson now "$now" '.claim.expires_at<=$now' "$item")
    guardian_pid=$(jq -r .claim.guardian_pid "$item"); guardian_token=$(jq -r .claim.guardian_start_token "$item")
    guardian_generation=$(jq -r .claim.guardian_generation "$item")
    current_guardian=$(jq -r '[.guardian.pid,.guardian.generation,.guardian.start_token]|map(tostring)|join(":")' "$state")
    owner="$guardian_pid:$guardian_generation:$guardian_token"
    live=$(runtime_start_token "$guardian_pid" || true)
    [ "$expired" = true ] || { [ "$owner" = "$current_guardian" ] && [ "$live" = "$guardian_token" ]; } || expired=true
    [ "$expired" = true ] || { rm -f "$item"; continue; }
    claim=$(jq -r .claim.token "$item")
    jq --arg id "$id" --arg token "$claim" --arg reason claim_expired \
      '.claims += [{id:$id,token:$token,reason:$reason}]' "$payload" >"$payload.next" && mv "$payload.next" "$payload"
    rm -f "$item"
  done < <(jq -j '.queue.items[]|select(.status=="starting" or .status=="running")|.id,"\u0000"' "$state")
  # Fence every still-matching worker and its dynamically discovered descendants through
  # the one production STOP -> stable snapshot -> CONT -> TERM -> wait -> KILL path before
  # publishing a runnable requeue. If identity absence is not proven, leave the claim
  # non-runnable for the next guardian tick.
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r id claim pid token; do
    [ -n "$pid" ] && [ "$pid" != null ] || continue
    [ -n "$token" ] && [ "$token" != null ] || continue
    [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" = "$token" ] || continue
    actor=$runtime/actor-worker-$id.json
    [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] &&
      jq -e --argjson pid "$pid" --arg token "$token" --arg claim "$claim" '
        .actor=="worker" and .pid==$pid and .start_token==$token and
        .generation_token==$claim and .lease_valid==true' "$actor" >/dev/null || {
      rm -f "$payload"; mutation_end; return 75; }
    "$SELF/polylane-process.sh" adopt-or-fence "$runtime" "worker-$id" shutdown || {
      rm -f "$payload"; mutation_end; return 75; }
    [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" != "$token" ] || { rm -f "$payload"; mutation_end; return 75; }
  done < <(jq -r --slurpfile p "$payload" '.queue.items[] as $item |
    $p[0].claims[]|select(.id==$item.id and .token==$item.claim.token)|
    [$item.id,$item.claim.token,$item.claim.worker_pid,$item.claim.worker_start_token]|@tsv' "$state")
  if [ "$(jq '.claims|length' "$payload")" -gt 0 ]; then
    emit_payload queue_reclaim reclaim "$payload" || {
      rc=$?; rm -f "$payload"; mutation_end; return "$rc"; }
  fi
  rm -f "$payload"; mutation_end
}

set_provider_state() {
  state=$1 action=${2:-provider-$state}
  case $state in available|rate_limited|unavailable) :;; *) return 2;; esac
  printf '%s\n' "$action" | grep -Eq '^[A-Za-z0-9._:-]{1,160}$' || return 2
  mutation_begin
  previous=$(jq -er '.queue.provider_state|select(type=="string")' "$(current_state)")
  [ "$previous" != "$state" ] || { mutation_end; return 0; }
  AUDIT_HANDLER_BEFORE_ARTIFACTS=()
  ticket=$(audit_handler_begin "$runtime" queue queue "provider-$action" '' '' queue \
    offline_plus_probe offline_drain online_immediate)
  payload=$runtime/provider-state.$$.json
  jq -n --arg previous "$previous" --arg state "$state" \
    '{previous_state:$previous,state:$state}' >"$payload"
  outputs=$runtime/provider-state-outputs.$$.json; printf '%s\n' '{}' >"$outputs"
  emit_payload provider_state "$action" "$payload" "$ticket" "$outputs" || {
    rc=$?; rm -f "$payload" "$outputs"; mutation_end; return "$rc"; }
  rm -f "$payload" "$outputs"
  [ "$(jq -r .queue.provider_state "$(current_state)")" = "$state" ] || {
    mutation_end; return 5; }
  mutation_end
}

ensure_progress() {
  goal=$1; shift; now=$(runtime_now)
  [ "$#" -eq 0 ] || now=$(runtime_test_now_arg "$@") || return 2
  complete=$(jq -r '.complete' "$goal")
  [ "$complete" = false ] || return 0
  [ "$(jq -r '.phase' "$(current_state)")" != WAITING_FOR_USER ] || return 0
  active=$(jq '
    .queue as $q |
    def viable($id;$seen):
      ([ $q.items[]|select(.id==$id) ][0] // null) as $item |
      if $item==null or ($seen|index($id))!=null then false
      elif $item.status=="complete" then true
      elif ($item.status|IN("ready","scheduled","starting","running")) then
        ([ $item.depends_on[]|viable(.;$seen+[$id]) ]|all)
      else false end;
    [.queue.items[] as $candidate |
      select($candidate.status|IN("ready","scheduled","starting","running")) |
      select([$candidate.depends_on[]|viable(.;[$candidate.id])]|all)]|length' "$(current_state)")
  [ "$active" -eq 0 ] || return 0
  goal_ref=$(jq -r '.next_goal_ref' "$goal")
  generation=$(jq --arg goal "$goal_ref" '[.queue.items[]|select(.kind=="state_reconcile" and .goal_ref==$goal)|
    (.args.reconcile_generation//0)]|max//0' "$(current_state)")
  generation=$((generation + 1))
  strategy=$(jq -Sc --arg goal "$goal_ref" --argjson generation "$generation" \
    '. + {goal_ref:$goal,reconcile_generation:$generation}' "$goal" | sha)
  id="reconcile-$generation-${strategy#sha256:}"; id=$(printf '%s' "$id" | cut -c1-72)
  jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg goal "$goal_ref" --arg strategy "$strategy" --argjson generation "$generation" --argjson now "$now" \
    '{schema_version:1,id:$id,kind:"state_reconcile",mode:"offline",status:"ready",priority:100,
    goal_ref:$goal,args:{goal_ref:$goal,reconcile_generation:$generation},depends_on:[],next_action_at:$now,deadline_at:($now+300),
    attempt:1,strategy_hash:$strategy,ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:["runtime:reducer"],claim:null,last_error:null}' \
    >"$runtime/reconcile.$$.json"
  enqueue_item "$runtime/reconcile.$$.json" || {
    rc=$?; jq -e --arg id "$id" 'any(.queue.items[];.id==$id)' "$(current_state)" >/dev/null || return "$rc"; }
  rm -f "$runtime/reconcile.$$.json"
}

if [ "${POLYLANE_QUEUE_SOURCE_ONLY:-0}" = 1 ]; then
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] || return 5 2>/dev/null || exit 5
  return 0 2>/dev/null || exit 0
fi
command=${1:-}; shift || true
case $command in
  enqueue) enqueue_item "$1" ;;
  ready) ready_items "$@" ;;
  reserve-selected) reserve_selected "$@" ;;
  activate) claim_event queue_activate "$@" ;;
  renew-claim) claim_event queue_renew "$@" ;;
  complete) claim_event queue_complete "$@" ;;
  fail) claim_event queue_fail "$@" ;;
  reclaim-expired) reclaim_expired "$@" ;;
  provider-state) set_provider_state "$@" ;;
  ensure-progress) ensure_progress "$@" ;;
  dump) dump_queue ;;
  *) exit 2 ;;
esac
~~~

Install the bounded-handoff final body for `core/tests/test-autonomy-soak.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
if [ "${POLYLANE_SOAK_WATCHDOG_CHILD:-0}" != 1 ]; then
  exec python3 - "$0" "$@" <<'PY'
import os, signal, subprocess, sys
env = os.environ.copy()
env["POLYLANE_SOAK_WATCHDOG_CHILD"] = "1"
process = subprocess.Popen(["bash", sys.argv[1], *sys.argv[2:]],
                           start_new_session=True, env=env)
try:
    code = process.wait(timeout=180)
except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
    print("FAIL overall-soak-timeout-180s", file=sys.stderr, flush=True)
    os.killpg(process.pid, signal.SIGTERM)
    try:
        process.wait(timeout=1)
    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        os.killpg(process.pid, signal.SIGKILL)
        process.wait()
    code = 124
raise SystemExit(code if code >= 0 else 128 - code)
PY
fi
REPO=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/../.." && pwd -P)
BIN=$REPO/core/scripts
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
RUNTIME=$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh
FIXTURE=$REPO/core/tests/fixtures/soak/scenario.json
ACTORS=$REPO/core/tests/helpers/mock-runtime-actors.sh
TMP=$(mktemp -d "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/polylane-soak.XXXXXX")
TMP=$(cd "$TMP" && pwd -P)
project=$TMP/project; runtime=$project/.polylane/runtime
fakebin=$TMP/fakebin; mkdir -p "$project/docs/polylane" "$project/.polylane" "$fakebin"
ln -s "$REPO/core/tests/helpers/fake-tmux.sh" "$fakebin/tmux"
export PATH=$fakebin:$PATH POLYLANE_TEST_MODE=1 POLYLANE_HERMETIC=1
export POLYLANE_FAKE_TMUX_STATE=$TMP/fake-tmux.json
export POLYLANE_FAKE_TMUX_LOG=$TMP/fake-tmux.log POLYLANE_NOW_EPOCH=0
printf '%s\n' '{"sessions":{}}' >"$POLYLANE_FAKE_TMUX_STATE"
: >"$POLYLANE_FAKE_TMUX_LOG"
started=0
cleanup_inventory() {
  [ -d "$runtime" ] || return 0
  printf 'SOAK_CLEANUP_INVENTORY %s\n' "$TMP" >&2
  for inventory in "$runtime/shutdown-identity-manifest.json" \
    "$runtime"/actor-*.json "$runtime/keeper.lock/owner.json" \
    "$runtime/sentinel-heartbeat.json"; do
    [ -f "$inventory" ] && [ ! -L "$inventory" ] || continue
    printf 'SOAK_CLEANUP_RECORD %s\n' "$inventory" >&2
    jq -c '{pid:(.pid//.finalizer_handoff.pid//null),
      start_token:(.start_token//.finalizer_handoff.start_token//null),
      identities:(.identities//null),descendants:(.descendants//null)}' \
      "$inventory" >&2 || true
  done
  find "$TMP" -maxdepth 5 -print >&2 || true
}
remove_owned_tree_converged() {
  local root=$1 attempt
  for attempt in $(seq 1 50); do
    chmod -R u+w "$root" 2>/dev/null || true
    rm -rf "$root" 2>/dev/null || true
    [ ! -e "$root" ] && return 0
    sleep 0.02
  done
  return 75
}
wait_runtime_absent() {
  local attempt session loop
  loop=$(jq -r '.loop_id//empty' "$runtime/current/state.json" 2>/dev/null || true)
  session=
  [ -z "$loop" ] || session=polylane-$loop
  for attempt in $(seq 1 100); do
    if "$BIN/polylane-process.sh" verify-absent "$runtime" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
       { [ -z "$session" ] || ! tmux has-session -t "$session" 2>/dev/null; }; then
      return 0
    fi
    sleep 0.02
  done
  return 75
}
cleanup() {
  local status=$? cleanup_rc=0
  if [ "${POLYLANE_KEEP_TMP:-0}" = 1 ]; then
    printf 'SOAK_TMP %s\n' "$TMP" >&2
    return "$status"
  fi
  if [ "$started" -eq 1 ] && [ -f "$runtime/session.json" ]; then
    run_wall_bounded 10 "$ACTORS" teardown "$runtime" "$project" >/dev/null 2>&1 || cleanup_rc=$?
    if [ "$cleanup_rc" -eq 0 ]; then
      wait_runtime_absent || cleanup_rc=$?
    fi
  fi
  if [ "$cleanup_rc" -eq 0 ] && [ "${POLYLANE_KEEP_SOAK_TMP:-0}" != 1 ]; then
    remove_owned_tree_converged "$TMP" || cleanup_rc=$?
  fi
  if [ "$cleanup_rc" -eq 0 ] && [ "${POLYLANE_KEEP_SOAK_TMP:-0}" = 1 ]; then
    printf 'SOAK_TMP %s\n' "$TMP" >&2
  fi
  if [ "$cleanup_rc" -ne 0 ]; then
    cleanup_inventory
    printf 'FAIL cleanup-convergence-rc-%s\n' "$cleanup_rc" >&2
  fi
  [ "$status" -ne 0 ] && return "$status"
  return "$cleanup_rc"
}
trap cleanup EXIT
fail() { printf 'FAIL %s\n' "$*" >&2; exit 1; }
progress() { printf 'PROGRESS %s\n' "$*"; }
expect_rc() {
  expected=$1; shift
  set +e; "$@" >/dev/null 2>&1; actual=$?; set -e
  [ "$actual" -eq "$expected" ] || fail "expected rc=$expected got=$actual: $*"
}
run_wall_bounded() {
  local seconds
  seconds=$1; shift
  python3 - "$seconds" "$@" <<'PY'
import os, signal, subprocess, sys
process = subprocess.Popen(sys.argv[2:], start_new_session=True)
try:
    code = process.wait(timeout=float(sys.argv[1]))
except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
    os.killpg(process.pid, signal.SIGTERM)
    try:
        process.wait(timeout=0.5)
    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        os.killpg(process.pid, signal.SIGKILL)
        process.wait()
    raise SystemExit(124)
raise SystemExit(code if code >= 0 else 128 - code)
PY
}
cleanup_convergence_regression() {
  local index root case_runtime writer_pid writer_token actor
  for index in $(seq 1 10); do
    root=$TMP/cleanup-regression-$index
    case_runtime=$root/project/.polylane/runtime
    mkdir -p "$case_runtime/events" "$case_runtime/reducer.lock" "$case_runtime/sealed"
    printf sealed >"$case_runtime/sealed/evidence"
    chmod 400 "$case_runtime/sealed/evidence"
    chmod 500 "$case_runtime/sealed" "$case_runtime/reducer.lock"
    (
      trap 'mkdir -p "$case_runtime/events"; printf late >"$case_runtime/events/late"; exit 0' TERM INT
      while :; do sleep 0.02; done
    ) &
    writer_pid=$!; writer_token=$(runtime_start_token "$writer_pid")
    actor=$case_runtime/actor-cleanup-late-writer-$index.json
    jq -n --arg role "cleanup-late-writer-$index" --argjson pid "$writer_pid" \
      --arg token "$writer_token" --argjson generation "$index" \
      '{role:$role,pid:$pid,start_token:$token,generation_token:("cleanup-"+($generation|tostring)),
        generation:$generation,lease_valid:true,descendants:[]}' >"$actor"
    chmod 400 "$actor"
    run_wall_bounded 3 "$ACTORS" fence-recorded-fixture "$case_runtime" \
      "cleanup-late-writer-$index" || fail "cleanup-regression-fence-$index"
    [ "$(runtime_start_token "$writer_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)" != "$writer_token" ] ||
      fail "cleanup-regression-live-$index"
    remove_owned_tree_converged "$root" || fail "cleanup-regression-remove-$index"
    [ ! -e "$root" ] || fail "cleanup-regression-tree-$index"
  done
  printf 'PASS cleanup-convergence-10x exact-identities=absent trees=absent\n'
}
if [ "${POLYLANE_CLEANUP_REGRESSION_ONLY:-0}" = 1 ]; then
  cleanup_convergence_regression
  exit 0
fi
guardian_delegation_regression() (
  local case_runtime guardian_pid guardian_token marker actor
  case_runtime=$TMP/guardian-delegation
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" init --loop-id guardian-delegation \
    --agent codex --project "$project"
  marker=$case_runtime/signal.log
  MARKER=$marker bash -c '
    trap '\''printf "signal\n" >>"$MARKER"'\'' USR1
    while :; do sleep 0.02; done
  ' & guardian_pid=$!
  guardian_token=$(runtime_start_token "$guardian_pid")
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit guardian register delegation-guardian \
    --guardian-pid "$guardian_pid" --guardian-start-token "$guardian_token" \
    --guardian-generation 1 --guardian-role guardian
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce --now 0
  actor=$case_runtime/actor-guardian.json
  jq -n --argjson pid "$guardian_pid" --arg token "$guardian_token" '
    {actor:"guardian",pid:$pid,start_token:$token,generation_token:"guardian-1",
      generation:1,started_at:0,lease_valid:true,descendants:[]}' >"$actor"
  "$BIN/polylane-guardian.sh" check-once --runtime "$case_runtime" \
    --state "$case_runtime/unused-state.json" \
    --controller-launch "$case_runtime/unused-launch.json" --now 0
  for ignored in $(seq 1 100); do [ -s "$marker" ] && break; sleep 0.01; done
  [ "$(wc -l <"$marker" | tr -d ' ')" -eq 1 ] || fail guardian-delegation-no-signal
  jq '.check={status:"idle",logical_at:0,wall_at:0,sequence:0}' "$actor" >"$actor.next"
  mv -f "$actor.next" "$actor"
  POLYLANE_TEST_DELEGATION_ATTEMPTS=3 expect_rc 75 \
    "$BIN/polylane-guardian.sh" check-once --runtime "$case_runtime" \
      --state "$case_runtime/unused-state.json" \
      --controller-launch "$case_runtime/unused-launch.json" --now 0
  [ "$(wc -l <"$marker" | tr -d ' ')" -eq 2 ] || fail guardian-delegation-timeout-signal
  jq '.start_token="stale-token"' "$actor" >"$actor.next"; mv -f "$actor.next" "$actor"
  expect_rc 75 "$BIN/polylane-guardian.sh" check-once --runtime "$case_runtime" \
    --state "$case_runtime/unused-state.json" \
    --controller-launch "$case_runtime/unused-launch.json" --now 0
  sleep 0.03
  [ "$(wc -l <"$marker" | tr -d ' ')" -eq 2 ] || fail guardian-delegation-stale-signalled
  kill -TERM "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
  printf 'PASS guardian-delegation elected-signal sequence-timeout stale-identity-negative\n'
)
guardian_delegation_regression
progress preflight-guardian-delegation
guardian_barrier_intent_security_regression() (
  local case_project case_runtime actor pid token key base canonical intent auth rc
  local request_id wall runtime_path active consumed
  case_project=$TMP/guardian-barrier-security/project
  case_runtime=$case_project/.polylane/runtime
  mkdir -p "$case_project/.polylane"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" init --loop-id guardian-barrier-security \
    --agent codex --project "$case_project"
  key=$case_runtime/hermetic-barrier-control.key
  "$BIN/polylane-hmac.py" keygen "$key"
  mkdir -m 700 "$case_runtime/hermetic-barrier-consumed" \
    "$case_runtime/hermetic-barrier-active"
  [ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$key" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$key")" = 400 ] ||
    fail guardian-barrier-control-key-mode
  pid=${BASHPID:-$$}; token=$(runtime_start_token "$pid")
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit guardian register barrier-guardian \
    --guardian-pid "$pid" --guardian-start-token "$token" \
    --guardian-generation 1 --guardian-role guardian
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce --now 0
  actor=$case_runtime/actor-guardian.json
  jq -Scn --argjson pid "$pid" --arg token "$token" '
    {actor:"guardian",pid:$pid,start_token:$token,generation_token:"guardian-1",
      generation:1,started_at:0,lease_valid:true,descendants:[],
      check:{status:"idle",logical_at:0,wall_at:0,sequence:4}}' >"$actor"
  runtime_path=$(cd "$case_runtime" && pwd -P)
  wall=$(runtime_wall_now); request_id=$(printf 'a%.0s' $(seq 1 64))
  base=$case_runtime/barrier-base.json
  jq -Scn --arg request_id "$request_id" --arg runtime_path "$runtime_path" \
    --argjson pid "$pid" --arg token "$token" --argjson wall "$wall" '
    {schema_version:1,request_id:$request_id,runtime_path:$runtime_path,
      owner_pid:$pid,owner_start_token:$token,guardian_pid:$pid,
      guardian_start_token:$token,guardian_generation:1,
      requested_checkpoint:"reclaim",
      observed_check_status:"idle",observed_check_sequence:3,
      observed_check_logical_at:0,yield_after_sequence:4,logical_at:0,
      created_wall_at:$wall,expires_wall_at:($wall+60)}' >"$base"
  barrier_security_sign() {
    local filter signing_key
    filter=$1 signing_key=${2:-$key}
    canonical=$case_runtime/barrier-canonical.json
    jq -Sc "$filter" "$base" >"$canonical"; chmod 600 "$canonical"
    auth=$("$BIN/polylane-hmac.py" sign "$signing_key" "$canonical")
    rm -f "$intent"
    jq -Sc --arg auth "$auth" '.+{auth:$auth}' "$canonical" >"$intent"
    chmod 400 "$intent"
  }
  barrier_security_reject() {
    if guardian_barrier_intent_yield "$case_runtime"; then return 1
    else rc=$?; fi
    [ "$rc" -eq 1 ]
  }
  intent=$case_runtime/guardian-check-barrier-intent.json
  export POLYLANE_GUARDIAN_SOURCE_ONLY=1 POLYLANE_TEST_MODE=1 POLYLANE_HERMETIC=1
  . "$BIN/polylane-guardian.sh"
  barrier_security_sign '.'
  POLYLANE_TEST_MODE=0; barrier_security_reject || fail guardian-barrier-production-mode
  POLYLANE_TEST_MODE=1 POLYLANE_HERMETIC=0
  barrier_security_reject || fail guardian-barrier-nonhermetic-mode
  POLYLANE_HERMETIC=1
  barrier_security_sign '.runtime_path="/cross-run/runtime"'
  barrier_security_reject || fail guardian-barrier-cross-runtime
  "$BIN/polylane-hmac.py" keygen "$case_runtime/foreign-control.key"
  barrier_security_sign '.' "$case_runtime/foreign-control.key"
  barrier_security_reject || fail guardian-barrier-cross-key
  barrier_security_sign '.guardian_generation=2'
  barrier_security_reject || fail guardian-barrier-stale-identity
~~~
