  barrier_security_sign '.logical_at=5'
  barrier_security_reject || fail guardian-barrier-stale-logical
  barrier_security_sign '.yield_after_sequence=3'
  barrier_security_reject || fail guardian-barrier-stale-sequence
  barrier_security_sign '.'
  chmod 600 "$intent"
  barrier_security_reject || fail guardian-barrier-intent-mode
  chmod 400 "$intent"
  guardian_barrier_intent_yield "$case_runtime" || fail guardian-barrier-positive
  active=$case_runtime/hermetic-barrier-active/$request_id
  consumed=$case_runtime/hermetic-barrier-consumed/$request_id
  [ -d "$active" ] && [ -d "$consumed" ] || fail guardian-barrier-ack-missing
  guardian_barrier_intent_yield "$case_runtime" || fail guardian-barrier-active-repeat
  rmdir "$active"
  barrier_security_reject || fail guardian-barrier-replay
  rm -f "$intent" "$base" "$canonical"
  printf 'PASS guardian-barrier-intent hermetic-only authenticated stale-replay-cross-run-negative\n'
)
guardian_barrier_intent_security_regression
progress preflight-guardian-barrier-intent
guardian_crash_after_reserve_regression() (
  local case_project case_runtime item selection first_pid first_token second_pid second_token
  case_project=$TMP/guardian-crash-after-reserve/project
  case_runtime=$case_project/.polylane/runtime
  mkdir -p "$case_project/.polylane"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" init --loop-id guardian-crash-after-reserve \
    --agent codex --project "$case_project"
  printf '0\n' >"$case_runtime/test-clock"; chmod 600 "$case_runtime/test-clock"
  READY="$case_runtime/guardian-1-ready" bash -c '
    trap "" USR1; : >"$READY"; while :; do sleep 1; done' & first_pid=$!
  while [ ! -f "$case_runtime/guardian-1-ready" ]; do sleep 0.01; done
  first_token=$(runtime_start_token "$first_pid")
  trap 'kill -TERM "$first_pid" "${second_pid:-}" 2>/dev/null || true; wait 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit guardian register reserve-guardian-1 \
    --guardian-pid "$first_pid" --guardian-start-token "$first_token" \
    --guardian-generation 1 --guardian-role guardian
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce --now 0
  item=$case_runtime/crash-after-reserve-item.json
  jq -Scn '{schema_version:1,id:"crash-after-reserve",kind:"cycle",mode:"offline",
    status:"ready",priority:100,goal_ref:"crash-reserve",args:{},depends_on:[],
    next_action_at:0,deadline_at:60,attempt:1,strategy_hash:"crash-reserve",
    ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:[],claim:null,last_error:null}' >"$item"
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" enqueue "$item"
  selection=$case_runtime/crash-after-reserve-selection.json
  "$BIN/polylane-scheduler.sh" next "$case_runtime/current/state.json" \
    "$case_runtime" --now 0 >"$selection"
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" reserve-selected "$selection" \
    "$first_pid" 1
  jq -e --argjson pid "$first_pid" '.queue.items[]|
    select(.id=="crash-after-reserve")|.status=="starting" and
    .claim.guardian_pid==$pid and .claim.guardian_generation==1' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail crash-reserve-first-claim
  kill -TERM "$first_pid"; wait "$first_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
  READY="$case_runtime/guardian-2-ready" bash -c '
    trap "" USR1; : >"$READY"; while :; do sleep 1; done' & second_pid=$!
  while [ ! -f "$case_runtime/guardian-2-ready" ]; do sleep 0.01; done
  second_token=$(runtime_start_token "$second_pid")
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit guardian register reserve-guardian-2 \
    --guardian-pid "$second_pid" --guardian-start-token "$second_token" \
    --guardian-generation 2 --guardian-role guardian
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce --now 0
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" reclaim-expired --now 0
  jq -e '.queue.items[]|select(.id=="crash-after-reserve")|
    (.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and .claim==null and .next_action_at==0' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail crash-reserve-not-requeued
  "$BIN/polylane-scheduler.sh" next "$case_runtime/current/state.json" \
    "$case_runtime" --now 0 >"$selection"
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" reserve-selected "$selection" \
    "$second_pid" 2
  jq -e --argjson pid "$second_pid" --arg token "$second_token" '
    .queue.items[]|select(.id=="crash-after-reserve")|
    .status=="starting" and .claim.guardian_pid==$pid and
    .claim.guardian_start_token==$token and .claim.guardian_generation==2' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail crash-reserve-not-resumed
  kill -TERM "$second_pid"; wait "$second_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
  trap - EXIT
  printf 'PASS guardian-crash-after-reserve stale-owner-reclaimed same-tick-reserved\n'
)
guardian_crash_after_reserve_regression
progress preflight-guardian-crash-after-reserve
guardian_phase_resume_regression() (
  local case_project case_runtime pid token actor phase_log
  case_project=$TMP/guardian-phase-resume/project
  case_runtime=$case_project/.polylane/runtime
  mkdir -p "$case_project/.polylane" "$case_project/docs/polylane"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" init --loop-id guardian-phase-resume \
    --agent codex --project "$case_project"
  printf '5\n' >"$case_runtime/test-clock"; chmod 600 "$case_runtime/test-clock"
  pid=${BASHPID:-$$}; token=$(runtime_start_token "$pid")
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit guardian register phase-resume-guardian \
    --guardian-pid "$pid" --guardian-start-token "$token" \
    --guardian-generation 1 --guardian-role guardian
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce --now 5
  actor=$case_runtime/actor-guardian.json
  jq -Scn --argjson pid "$pid" --arg token "$token" '
    {actor:"guardian",pid:$pid,start_token:$token,generation_token:"guardian-1",
      generation:1,started_at:0,lease_valid:true,descendants:[],
      check:{status:"idle",logical_at:0,wall_at:0,sequence:4,
        checkpoint:{phase:"dispatch-first",logical_at:0,sequence:4}}}' >"$actor"
  phase_log=$case_runtime/phase-resume.log; : >"$phase_log"
  export POLYLANE_GUARDIAN_SOURCE_ONLY=1 POLYLANE_TEST_MODE=1 POLYLANE_HERMETIC=1
  . "$BIN/polylane-guardian.sh"
  guardian_trace() { :; }
  actor_live() { printf 'actor-live\n' >>"$phase_log"; return 0; }
  reconcile_exited_quiet_children() { :; }
  dispatch_ready() { printf 'dispatch\n' >>"$phase_log"; }
  drain_due_work() { printf 'drain\n' >>"$phase_log"; }
  guardian_publish_observation() { printf 'publish\n' >>"$phase_log"; }
  check_once --runtime "$case_runtime" \
    --state "$case_project/docs/polylane/controller-state.json" \
    --controller-launch "$case_runtime/unused-controller-launch.json" --now 5
  [ "$(grep -c '^dispatch$' "$phase_log")" -eq 2 ] &&
    [ "$(grep -c '^drain$' "$phase_log")" -eq 2 ] &&
    [ "$(grep -c '^publish$' "$phase_log")" -eq 1 ] &&
    [ "$(grep -c '^actor-live$' "$phase_log")" -eq 1 ] ||
    fail guardian-phase-resume-wrong-tail
  jq -e '.check.status=="idle" and .check.logical_at==5 and
    .check.sequence==4 and .check.checkpoint==null' "$actor" >/dev/null ||
    fail guardian-phase-resume-checkpoint-not-cleared
  printf 'PASS guardian-phase-resume skips-completed-phase preserves-sequence clears-checkpoint\n'
)
guardian_phase_resume_regression
progress preflight-guardian-phase-resume
if [ "${POLYLANE_BARRIER_INTENT_ONLY:-0}" = 1 ]; then exit 0; fi
guardian_event_lock_order_regression() (
  local case_runtime holder emitter barrier follower ignored
  case_runtime=$TMP/guardian-event-lock-order
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" init --loop-id guardian-event-lock-order \
    --agent codex --project "$project"
  if rg -U 'runtime_lock_acquire[^\n]*events\.lock(\n|.){0,400}runtime_lock_acquire[^\n]*guardian-check(-gate)?\.lock' \
      "$BIN" "$REPO/codex/scripts" >/dev/null; then
    fail guardian-event-inverse-lock-order
  fi
  (
    . "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
    RUNTIME_DIR=$case_runtime
    runtime_lock_acquire "$case_runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
    runtime_lock_acquire "$case_runtime/guardian-check.lock"
    runtime_lock_acquire "$case_runtime/events.lock"
    : >"$case_runtime/lock-order-held"
    while [ ! -f "$case_runtime/lock-order-release" ]; do sleep 0.01; done
    runtime_lock_release "$case_runtime/events.lock"
    runtime_lock_release "$case_runtime/guardian-check.lock"
    runtime_lock_release "$case_runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
  ) & holder=$!
  for ignored in $(seq 1 200); do
    [ -f "$case_runtime/lock-order-held" ] && break
    sleep 0.01
  done
  [ -f "$case_runtime/lock-order-held" ] || fail guardian-event-holder-not-ready
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit controller progress lock-order-emitter \
    --fingerprint lock-order-emitter --deadline 30 & emitter=$!
  (
    . "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
    RUNTIME_DIR=$case_runtime
    : >"$case_runtime/lock-order-barrier-intent"
    runtime_lock_acquire "$case_runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
    : >"$case_runtime/lock-order-barrier-gate"
    runtime_lock_acquire "$case_runtime/guardian-check.lock"
    runtime_lock_acquire "$case_runtime/events.lock"
    : >"$case_runtime/lock-order-barrier"
    runtime_lock_release "$case_runtime/events.lock"
    runtime_lock_release "$case_runtime/guardian-check.lock"
    runtime_lock_release "$case_runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
  ) & barrier=$!
  for ignored in $(seq 1 200); do
    [ -f "$case_runtime/lock-order-barrier-intent" ] && break
    sleep 0.01
  done
  [ -f "$case_runtime/lock-order-barrier-intent" ] || fail guardian-event-barrier-intent-not-ready
  : >"$case_runtime/lock-order-release"
  for ignored in $(seq 1 200); do
    [ -f "$case_runtime/lock-order-barrier-gate" ] && break
    sleep 0.01
  done
  [ -f "$case_runtime/lock-order-barrier-gate" ] || fail guardian-event-barrier-gate-not-ready
  (
    . "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
    RUNTIME_DIR=$case_runtime
    runtime_lock_acquire "$case_runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
    runtime_lock_acquire "$case_runtime/guardian-check.lock"
    [ -f "$case_runtime/lock-order-barrier" ] || exit 5
    : >"$case_runtime/lock-order-durable-wake"
    runtime_lock_release "$case_runtime/guardian-check.lock"
    runtime_lock_release "$case_runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
  ) & follower=$!
  wait "$holder"; wait "$emitter"; wait "$barrier"; wait "$follower"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce --now 0
  [ -f "$case_runtime/lock-order-barrier" ] &&
    [ -f "$case_runtime/lock-order-durable-wake" ] &&
    jq -s -e 'any(.[];.actor=="controller" and .type=="progress" and
      .action_id=="lock-order-emitter")' "$case_runtime"/events/*.json >/dev/null ||
    fail guardian-event-contention-not-drained
  printf 'PASS guardian-event-lock-order guardian-before-events active-emitter-contention\n'
)
guardian_event_lock_order_regression
progress preflight-guardian-event-lock-order
controller_domain_cas_regression() (
  local state conflict unrelated first retry output
  . "$BIN/lib/polylane-controller-reducer.sh"
  state=$TMP/controller-domain-state.json
  conflict=$TMP/controller-domain-conflict.json
  unrelated=$TMP/controller-domain-unrelated.json
  first=$TMP/controller-domain-first.json
  retry=$TMP/controller-domain-retry.json
  output=$TMP/controller-domain-output.json
  jq -n '{revision:11,controller:{stage:"PLANNED",stage_revision:0,cycle:1,
      run_id:null,pending_turn:{turn_id:"turn-domain"},applied_transactions:[],
      last_conflict:null,evidence:{}},
    queue:{revision:2,provider_state:"available",items:[]}}' >"$unrelated"
  jq -n '{revision:11,controller:{stage:"PLANNED",stage_revision:0,cycle:1,
      run_id:null,pending_turn:{turn_id:"turn-domain"},applied_transactions:[],
      last_conflict:null,evidence:{}},
    queue:{revision:3,provider_state:"available",items:[]}}' >"$state"
  jq -n --arg transaction plan-domain-s0-q2 --arg retry '' '
    {sequence:1,type:"controller_transaction",payload:{transaction_id:$transaction,
      kind:"plan_cycle",turn_id:"turn-domain",run_id:"run-domain",
      expected_runtime_revision:10,expected_stage:"PLANNED",expected_stage_revision:0,
      expected_queue_revision:2,retry_of:(if $retry=="" then null else $retry end),
      queue_item:{id:"cycle-domain"},manifest:{path:"domain",hash:"sha256:domain"},
      certification_policy:{policy:"domain"},evidence:{proof:"domain"}}}' >"$first"
  polylane_controller_apply_event "$unrelated" "$first" "$output"
  jq -e '.controller.stage=="LANES_RUNNING" and .queue.revision==3 and
    (.controller.applied_transactions|index("plan-domain-s0-q2")!=null)' \
    "$output" >/dev/null || fail controller-domain-unrelated-revision
  polylane_controller_apply_event "$state" "$first" "$conflict"
  jq -e '.controller.stage=="PLANNED" and .queue.revision==3 and
    .controller.last_conflict=={type:"queue_revision",
      transaction_id:"plan-domain-s0-q2",event_sequence:1,
      expected_queue_revision:2,actual_queue_revision:3}' "$conflict" >/dev/null ||
    fail controller-domain-conflict-not-recorded
  jq '.sequence=2|.payload.transaction_id="plan-domain-s0-q3"|
    .payload.expected_runtime_revision=11|.payload.expected_queue_revision=3|
    .payload.retry_of="plan-domain-s0-q2"' "$first" >"$retry"
  polylane_controller_apply_event "$conflict" "$retry" "$output"
  jq -e '.controller.stage=="LANES_RUNNING" and .queue.revision==4 and
    (.controller.applied_transactions|index("plan-domain-s0-q3")!=null)' \
    "$output" >/dev/null || fail controller-domain-linked-retry
  printf 'PASS controller-domain-cas unrelated-revision linked-queue-retry\n'
)
controller_domain_cas_regression
progress preflight-controller-domain-cas
reserve_deadline_regression() (
  local label case_runtime guardian_pid guardian_token item selection payload token
  reserve_case() {
    label=$1; case_runtime=$TMP/reserve-deadline-$label
    mkdir -p "$case_runtime"
    "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" init --loop-id "reserve-$label" \
      --agent codex --project "$project"
    bash -c 'trap : USR1; while :; do sleep 0.02; done' & guardian_pid=$!
    guardian_token=$(runtime_start_token "$guardian_pid")
    "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit guardian register "guardian-$label" \
      --guardian-pid "$guardian_pid" --guardian-start-token "$guardian_token" \
      --guardian-generation 1 --guardian-role guardian
    "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce --now 0
    item=$case_runtime/item-$label.json
    jq -n --arg id "reserve-$label" '
      {schema_version:1,id:$id,kind:"retry",mode:"offline",status:"ready",
        priority:100,goal_ref:"reserve-regression",
        args:{run_id:$id,actor:"dispatch",reason:"reserve-regression",
          strategy_generation:0},depends_on:[],
        next_action_at:0,deadline_at:60,attempt:1,strategy_hash:("strategy-"+$id),
        ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:["reserve-lock"],claim:null,last_error:null}' >"$item"
    "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" enqueue "$item"
    if [ "$label" = positive ]; then
      jq '.id="reserve-positive-sibling"|.args.run_id=.id|
        .strategy_hash=("strategy-"+.id)' "$item" >"$item.sibling"
      "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" enqueue "$item.sibling"
      jq '.id="reserve-positive-ordinary"|.args={run_id:.id}|
        .strategy_hash=("strategy-"+.id)' "$item" >"$item.ordinary"
      "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" enqueue "$item.ordinary"
    fi
    selection=$case_runtime/selection-$label.json
    "$BIN/polylane-scheduler.sh" next "$case_runtime/current/state.json" \
      "$case_runtime" --now 0 >"$selection"
  }
  reserve_case positive
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" reserve-selected "$selection" \
    "$guardian_pid" 1
  jq '.id="reserve-positive-late-sibling"|.args.run_id=.id|
    .strategy_hash=("strategy-"+.id)' "$item" >"$item.late-sibling"
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" enqueue "$item.late-sibling"
  jq '.id="reserve-positive-late-ordinary"|.args={run_id:.id}|
    .strategy_hash=("strategy-"+.id)' "$item" >"$item.late-ordinary"
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" enqueue "$item.late-ordinary"
  jq -e '.audit.deadlines["reserve-positive"].satisfied_at==0 and
    .audit.deadlines["reserve-positive-sibling"].satisfied_at==0 and
    .audit.deadlines["reserve-positive-late-sibling"].satisfied_at==0 and
    .audit.deadlines["reserve-positive-ordinary"].satisfied_at==null and
    .audit.deadlines["reserve-positive-late-ordinary"].satisfied_at==null and
    (.audit.reservation_conflicts|length)==0 and
    any(.queue.items[];.id=="reserve-positive" and .status=="starting")' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail reserve-deadline-positive
  kill -TERM "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true

  reserve_case tampered
  token=sha256:aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
  payload=$case_runtime/reserve-tampered.json
  jq -n --arg id reserve-tampered --arg token "$token" \
    --argjson pid "$guardian_pid" --arg guardian_token "$guardian_token" \
    --slurpfile selection "$selection" '
    {expected_queue_revision:$selection[0].queue_revision,
      reservations:[{id:$id,claim:{token:$token,guardian_pid:$pid,
        guardian_start_token:$guardian_token,guardian_generation:1,
        claimed_at:0,expires_at:15,worker_pid:null,worker_start_token:null,
        proof_fingerprint:null}}],
      selection:($selection[0]|.items[0].priority=999999)}' >"$payload"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit queue queue_reserve tampered-selection \
    --fingerprint "$(runtime_sha256 "$payload")" --payload-file "$payload"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce --now 0
  jq '.id="reserve-tampered-sibling"|.args.run_id=.id|
    .strategy_hash=("strategy-"+.id)' "$item" >"$item.sibling"
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" enqueue "$item.sibling"
  jq -e '.audit.deadlines["reserve-tampered"].satisfied_at==null and
    .audit.deadlines["reserve-tampered-sibling"].satisfied_at==null and
    (.audit.reservation_conflicts|length)==1' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail reserve-deadline-tampered
  kill -TERM "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true

  reserve_case stale
  jq '.id="reserve-stale-bump"|.args.run_id="reserve-stale-bump"|
    .strategy_hash="strategy-reserve-stale-bump"' "$item" >"$item.bump"
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" enqueue "$item.bump"
  token=sha256:bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb
  payload=$case_runtime/reserve-stale.json
  jq -n --arg id reserve-stale --arg token "$token" --argjson pid "$guardian_pid" \
    --arg guardian_token "$guardian_token" --slurpfile selection "$selection" '
    {expected_queue_revision:$selection[0].queue_revision,
      reservations:[{id:$id,claim:{token:$token,guardian_pid:$pid,
        guardian_start_token:$guardian_token,guardian_generation:1,
        claimed_at:0,expires_at:15,worker_pid:null,worker_start_token:null,
        proof_fingerprint:null}}],selection:$selection[0]}' >"$payload"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit queue queue_reserve stale-selection \
    --fingerprint "$(runtime_sha256 "$payload")" --payload-file "$payload"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce --now 0
  jq -e '.audit.deadlines["reserve-stale"].satisfied_at==null and
    (.audit.reservation_conflicts|length)==1 and
    any(.queue.items[];.id=="reserve-stale" and .status=="ready")' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail reserve-deadline-stale
  kill -TERM "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
  printf 'PASS reserve-deadline exact-selection enqueue-sibling ordinary-negative tampered-negative stale-negative\n'
)
reserve_deadline_regression
progress preflight-reserve-deadline
recovery_exclusivity_deadline_regression() (
  local case_runtime self_pid parent_token guardian_pid guardian_token sleeper sleeper_token
  local payload claim selection priority
  case_runtime=$TMP/deadline-block-runtime
  export RUNTIME_DIR=$case_runtime POLYLANE_NOW_EPOCH=0
  . "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-events.sh"
  . "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-reducer.sh"
  . "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-audit.sh"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" init --loop-id deadline-block --agent codex --project "$project"
  self_pid=${BASHPID:-$$}
  parent_token=$(runtime_start_token "$self_pid")
  bash -c '
    pending=0
    trap "pending=1" USR1
    while :; do
      sleep 0.02
      if [ "$pending" -eq 1 ]; then pending=0; fi
    done
  ' & guardian_pid=$!
  guardian_token=$(runtime_start_token "$guardian_pid")
  deadline_guardian_cleanup() {
    if [ "$(runtime_start_token "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)" = "$guardian_token" ]; then
      kill -TERM "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
      wait "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
    fi
  }
  trap deadline_guardian_cleanup EXIT
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit guardian register deadline-block-guardian \
    --guardian-pid "$guardian_pid" --guardian-start-token "$guardian_token" \
    --guardian-generation 1 --guardian-role guardian
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce --now 0
  deadline_item() {
    local id=$1 actor=$2 reason=$3 generation=$4 resource=$5
    priority=1; case $id in holder-*) priority=1000;; esac
    payload=$case_runtime/item-$id.json
    if [ "$actor" = ordinary ]; then
      jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg resource "$resource" --argjson priority "$priority" '
        {schema_version:1,id:$id,kind:"retry",mode:"offline",status:"scheduled",
          priority:$priority,goal_ref:"deadline-regression",args:{run_id:$id},depends_on:[],
          next_action_at:0,deadline_at:60,attempt:1,strategy_hash:("strategy-"+$id),
          ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:[$resource],claim:null,last_error:null}' >"$payload"
    else
      jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg actor "$actor" --arg reason "$reason" \
        --argjson generation "$generation" --arg resource "$resource" \
        --argjson priority "$priority" '
        {schema_version:1,id:$id,kind:"retry",mode:"offline",status:"scheduled",
          priority:$priority,goal_ref:"deadline-regression",
          args:{run_id:$id,actor:$actor,reason:$reason,strategy_generation:$generation},
          depends_on:[],next_action_at:0,deadline_at:60,attempt:1,
          strategy_hash:("strategy-"+$id),ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:[$resource],
          claim:null,last_error:null}' >"$payload"
    fi
    "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" enqueue "$payload"
    rm -f "$payload"
  }
  deadline_activate() {
    local id=$1 worker_pid=$2 worker_token=$3 complete=${4:-0}
    selection=$case_runtime/selection-$id.json
    "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" ready offline --limit 1 --now 0 >"$selection"
    jq -e --arg id "$id" '.items|length==1 and .[0].id==$id' "$selection" >/dev/null ||
      fail "deadline-holder-selection-$id"
    "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" reserve-selected "$selection" \
      "$guardian_pid" 1
    rm -f "$selection"
    claim=$(jq -r --arg id "$id" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)|.claim.token' \
      "$case_runtime/current/state.json")
    "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" activate "$id" "$claim" \
      "$worker_pid" "$worker_token" 15
    if [ "$complete" -eq 1 ]; then
      "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" complete "$id" "$claim" \
        "$worker_pid" "$worker_token"
    fi
  }

  deadline_item holder-active actor-active restart 1 lock-active
  deadline_activate holder-active "$self_pid" "$parent_token"
  deadline_item blocked-active actor-active restart 1 lock-active

  deadline_item holder-complete actor-complete retry 1 lock-complete
  deadline_activate holder-complete "$self_pid" "$parent_token" 1
  deadline_item blocked-complete actor-complete retry 1 lock-complete

  sleep 60 & sleeper=$!
  sleeper_token=$(runtime_start_token "$sleeper")
  deadline_item holder-stale actor-stale restart 1 lock-stale
  deadline_activate holder-stale "$sleeper" "$sleeper_token"
  deadline_item blocked-stale actor-stale restart 1 lock-stale
  kill -TERM "$sleeper"; wait "$sleeper" 2>/dev/null || true
  [ "$(runtime_start_token "$sleeper" 2>/dev/null || true)" != "$sleeper_token" ] ||
    fail deadline-stale-worker-survived

  deadline_item holder-different actor-different restart 1 lock-different
  deadline_activate holder-different "$self_pid" "$parent_token"
  deadline_item blocked-reason actor-different retry 1 lock-different
  deadline_item blocked-generation actor-different restart 2 lock-different

  deadline_item holder-ordinary ordinary none 0 lock-ordinary
  deadline_activate holder-ordinary "$self_pid" "$parent_token"
  deadline_item blocked-ordinary ordinary none 0 lock-ordinary
  deadline_item blocked-unrelated-resource actor-unrelated retry 1 lock-no-holder

  export POLYLANE_NOW_EPOCH=5
  runtime_audit_record_resource_blocks "$case_runtime/current/state.json" 0 5
  runtime_reduce
  jq -e '
    any(.audit.resource_blocks[];.item_id=="blocked-ordinary" and
      .from==0 and .to==5 and .resource=="lock-ordinary" and
      .blocked_by.item_id=="holder-ordinary") and
    (any(.audit.resource_blocks[];.item_id=="blocked-stale")|not) and
    (any(.audit.resource_blocks[];.item_id=="blocked-unrelated-resource")|not) and
    (any(.audit.resource_blocks[];.item_id=="blocked-active")|not) and
    (.audit.resource_block_conflicts|length)==0' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail resource-block-positive-negative
  gap_check=$case_runtime/resource-gap-check.json
  polylane_audit_deadline_gaps "$case_runtime/current/state.json" blocked-ordinary 0 5 \
    "$gap_check"
  jq -e 'length==0' "$gap_check" >/dev/null || fail resource-block-gap-not-explained
  polylane_audit_deadline_gaps "$case_runtime/current/state.json" blocked-stale 0 5 \
    "$gap_check"
  jq -e 'length==1 and .[0]=={from:0,to:5,missed_deadline:"blocked-stale"}' \
    "$gap_check" >/dev/null || fail resource-block-stale-gap-masked
  rm -f "$gap_check"
  runtime_audit_record_blocked_deadlines "$case_runtime/current/state.json" 0 5
  runtime_reduce
  jq -e '
    .audit.deadlines["blocked-active"] |
      .satisfied_at==0 and .blocked_by.status=="running" and
      .blocked_by.proof_event_type=="queue_activate"' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail deadline-active-not-satisfied
  jq -e '
    .audit.deadlines["blocked-complete"] |
      .satisfied_at==0 and .blocked_by.status=="complete" and
      .blocked_by.proof_event_type=="queue_complete"' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail deadline-complete-not-satisfied
  jq -e '
    .audit.deadlines["blocked-stale"].satisfied_at==null and
    .audit.deadlines["blocked-reason"].satisfied_at==null and
    .audit.deadlines["blocked-generation"].satisfied_at==null and
    .audit.deadlines["blocked-ordinary"].satisfied_at==null and
    .audit.deadlines["blocked-unrelated-resource"].satisfied_at==null and
    (.audit.deadline_block_conflicts|length)==0' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail deadline-negative-masked
  proof_hash=$(jq -r '.audit.deadlines["holder-ordinary"].satisfied_event_hash' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json")
  proof=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$proof_hash")
  payload=$case_runtime/resource-token-mismatch.json
  jq -n --arg item_id blocked-ordinary --arg holder_id holder-ordinary \
    --arg claim_token "$(jq -r '.queue.items[]|select(.id=="holder-ordinary")|.claim.token' \
      "$case_runtime/current/state.json")" --argjson worker_pid "$self_pid" \
    --arg worker_start_token "$parent_token" --arg observed_start_token mismatch \
    --argjson activate_event_id "$(jq -r .sequence "$proof")" \
    --arg activate_event_hash "$proof_hash" '
    {item_id:$item_id,from:0,to:5,resource:"lock-ordinary",
      blocked_by:{item_id:$holder_id,claim_token:$claim_token,worker_pid:$worker_pid,
        worker_start_token:$worker_start_token,observed_start_token:$observed_start_token,
        activate_event_id:$activate_event_id,activate_event_hash:$activate_event_hash}}' >"$payload"
  runtime_emit audit resource_blocked resource-token-mismatch \
    --fingerprint "$(runtime_sha256 "$payload")" --payload-file "$payload"
  runtime_reduce
  jq -e '(.audit.resource_block_conflicts|length)==1' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail resource-block-token-mismatch
  rm -f "$payload"
  claim=$(jq -r '.queue.items[]|select(.id=="holder-active")|.claim.token' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json")
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" complete holder-active "$claim" \
    "$self_pid" "$parent_token"
  jq -e '.audit.deadlines["holder-active"].satisfied_at==0' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail deadline-satisfaction-not-monotonic
  printf 'PASS recovery-exclusivity-deadlines active complete stale-negative reason-generation-negative ordinary-negative\n'
  printf 'PASS resource-blocked active dead-stale token-mismatch unrelated-resource negatives\n'
)
if [ "${POLYLANE_DEADLINE_BLOCK_ONLY:-0}" = 1 ]; then
  recovery_exclusivity_deadline_regression
  exit 0
fi
queue_complete_lost_wake_regression() (
  local case_project case_runtime gate guardian_pid guardian_token self_pid self_token
  local item selection claim
  case_project=$TMP/queue-complete-lost-wake
  case_runtime=$case_project/.polylane/runtime
  gate=$case_project/gate
  mkdir -p "$case_runtime" "$gate"
  export POLYLANE_NOW_EPOCH=0
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" init --loop-id queue-complete-wake \
    --agent codex --project "$case_project"
  GATE=$gate bash -c '
    pending=0
    trap "pending=1" USR1
    : >"$GATE/ready"
    while [ ! -f "$GATE/start-clear" ]; do sleep 0.01; done
    pending=0
    : >"$GATE/cleared"
    while [ ! -f "$GATE/finish-dispatch" ]; do sleep 0.01; done
    [ "$pending" -eq 1 ] && : >"$GATE/immediate-next-check"
    while [ ! -f "$GATE/stop" ]; do sleep 0.01; done
  ' & guardian_pid=$!
  guardian_token=$(runtime_start_token "$guardian_pid")
  lost_wake_cleanup() {
    : >"$gate/stop" 2>/dev/null || true
    if [ "$(runtime_start_token "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)" = "$guardian_token" ]; then
      kill -TERM "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
    fi
    wait "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
  }
  trap lost_wake_cleanup EXIT
  for ignored in $(seq 1 100); do [ -f "$gate/ready" ] && break; sleep 0.01; done
  [ -f "$gate/ready" ] || fail lost-wake-guardian-ready
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit guardian register lost-wake-guardian \
    --guardian-pid "$guardian_pid" --guardian-start-token "$guardian_token" \
    --guardian-generation 1 --guardian-role guardian
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce --now 0
  item=$case_runtime/item.json
  jq -n '{schema_version:1,id:"wake-holder",kind:"retry",mode:"offline",
    status:"ready",priority:10,goal_ref:"wake",args:{run_id:"wake-holder"},
    depends_on:[],next_action_at:0,deadline_at:60,attempt:1,
    strategy_hash:"wake-holder",ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:["wake-lock"],
    claim:null,last_error:null}' >"$item"
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" enqueue "$item"
  selection=$case_runtime/selection.json
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" ready offline --limit 1 --now 0 >"$selection"
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" reserve-selected "$selection" \
    "$guardian_pid" 1
  claim=$(jq -r '.queue.items[]|select(.id=="wake-holder")|.claim.token' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json")
  self_pid=${BASHPID:-$$}; self_token=$(runtime_start_token "$self_pid")
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" activate wake-holder "$claim" \
    "$self_pid" "$self_token" 15
  : >"$gate/start-clear"
  for ignored in $(seq 1 100); do [ -f "$gate/cleared" ] && break; sleep 0.01; done
  [ -f "$gate/cleared" ] || fail lost-wake-pending-not-cleared
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$case_runtime" complete wake-holder "$claim" \
    "$self_pid" "$self_token"
  : >"$gate/finish-dispatch"
  for ignored in $(seq 1 100); do
    [ -f "$gate/immediate-next-check" ] && break
    sleep 0.01
  done
  [ -f "$gate/immediate-next-check" ] || fail queue-complete-wake-lost
  jq -s -e 'any(.[];.type=="queue_complete" and .payload.id=="wake-holder" and .at==0)' \
    "$case_runtime"/events/*.json >/dev/null || fail queue-complete-event-missing
  printf 'PASS queue-complete-lost-wake pending-cleared signal-retained immediate-next-check\n'
)
if [ "${POLYLANE_WAKE_REGRESSION_ONLY:-0}" = 1 ]; then
  queue_complete_lost_wake_regression
  exit 0
fi
initialize_soak_runtime() {
  jq -n '{loop_id:"soak",complete:false,next_goal_ref:"soak",
    goal_tree:{items:[{id:"soak",status:"open",weight:1}]}}' \
    >"$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json"
  jq -n --arg project "$project" '{schema_version:1,revision:1,agent:"codex",
    project_root:$project,loop_id:"soak",phase:"WORKING",terminal:null,
    cycle:1,run_id:"soak-c0001-a01"}' \
    >"$project/docs/polylane/controller-state.json"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" init --loop-id soak --agent codex --project "$project"
  auth=$runtime/audit-auth.key
  "$BIN/polylane-hmac.py" keygen "$runtime/hermetic-barrier-control.key"
  mkdir -m 700 "$runtime/hermetic-barrier-consumed" \
    "$runtime/hermetic-barrier-active"
  printf '0\n' >"$runtime/test-clock"; chmod 600 "$runtime/test-clock"
}
publisher_input_regression() (
  local case_name source rc before after evidence
  case_name=$1
  . "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-events.sh"
  . "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-reducer.sh"
  . "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-audit.sh"
  RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
  before=$(find "$runtime/events" -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.json' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
  case $case_name in
    empty)
      source=$(mktemp "$runtime/.empty-guardian.${BASHPID:-$$}.XXXXXX")
      chmod 600 "$source"
      if runtime_publish_guardian_observation "$source"; then rc=0; else rc=$?; fi
      [ "$rc" -eq 5 ] || return 1
      after=$(find "$runtime/events" -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.json' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
      [ "$after" -eq "$before" ] || return 1
      [ "$(find "$runtime" -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name '.guardian-publish-input.*' -o \
          -name '.guardian-evidence.*' \) | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" -eq 0 ] || return 1
      rm -f "$source"
      printf 'PASS publisher-empty-rejected\n' ;;
    self-alias)
      source=$runtime/.guardian-observation.$$
      jq -Scn --argjson pid "$$" --arg token "$(runtime_start_token $$)" \
        '{schema_version:1,kind:"guardian",observed_at:0,
          identity:{role:"guardian",pid:$pid,start_token:$token,generation:1,
            ownership_token:"guardian-self-alias"}}' >"$source"
      chmod 600 "$source"
      runtime_publish_guardian_observation "$source"
      runtime_reduce
      evidence=$(jq -r .audit.last_guardian_observation.evidence_path \
        "$runtime/current/state.json")
      jq -e '.audit.last_guardian_observation.observed_at==0 and
        .audit.last_guardian_observation.identity.ownership_token=="guardian-self-alias"' \
        "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null &&
        [ -s "$evidence" ] && [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$evidence")" = 400 ] &&
        [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$evidence")" != \
          sha256:e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855 ] || return 1
      rm -f "$source"
      printf 'PASS publisher-self-alias-safe\n' ;;
    *) return 2 ;;
  esac
)
if [ -n "${POLYLANE_PUBLISHER_INPUT_CASE:-}" ]; then
  initialize_soak_runtime
  publisher_input_regression "$POLYLANE_PUBLISHER_INPUT_CASE"
  exit 0
fi
audit_event_time_regression() (
  local root state next event guardian_identity goal_identity guardian_zero goal_zero
  root=$TMP/audit-event-time; mkdir -p "$root"
  RUNTIME_DIR=$root
  . "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-reducer.sh"
  state=$root/state.json; next=$root/next.json; event=$root/event.json
  jq -n '{}' >"$state"
  guardian_identity=$(jq -cn '{role:"guardian",pid:101,start_token:"guardian-token",
    generation:1,ownership_token:"guardian-owner"}')
  goal_identity=$(jq -cn '{mode:"goal",goal_ref:"goal-1"}')
  guardian_zero=sha256:$(printf 'a%.0s' $(seq 1 64))
  goal_zero=sha256:$(printf 'b%.0s' $(seq 1 64))
  jq -n --arg hash "$guardian_zero" --argjson identity "$guardian_identity" \
    --arg path "$root/guardian-zero.json" '
    {type:"guardian_observed",sequence:1,event_hash:$hash,at:0,
      payload:{kind:"guardian",observed_at:0,evidence_path:$path,evidence_hash:$hash,
        identity:$identity}}' >"$event"
  polylane_audit_observe_event "$state" "$event" "$next"; mv -f "$next" "$state"
  jq -n --arg hash "$goal_zero" --argjson identity "$goal_identity" \
    --arg path "$root/goal-zero.json" '
    {type:"goal_work_observed",sequence:2,event_hash:$hash,at:0,
      payload:{kind:"goal_work",observed_at:0,evidence_path:$path,evidence_hash:$hash,
        identity:$identity}}' >"$event"
  polylane_audit_observe_event "$state" "$event" "$next"; mv -f "$next" "$state"
  jq -n --arg prior "$guardian_zero" --argjson identity "$guardian_identity" \
    --arg hash "sha256:$(printf 'c%.0s' $(seq 1 64))" \
    --arg path "$root/guardian-five.json" '
    {type:"work_coverage",sequence:3,event_hash:$hash,at:5,
      payload:{kind:"guardian",observed_at:5,valid_from:0,valid_until:5,
        evidence_path:$path,evidence_hash:$hash,identity:$identity,
        previous_event_hash:$prior,continuity:"same_identity",handoff_event_hash:null}}' >"$event"
  polylane_audit_observe_event "$state" "$event" "$next"; mv -f "$next" "$state"
  jq -n --arg prior "$goal_zero" --argjson identity "$goal_identity" \
    --arg hash "sha256:$(printf 'd%.0s' $(seq 1 64))" \
    --arg path "$root/goal-five.json" '
    {type:"goal_work_coverage",sequence:4,event_hash:$hash,at:5,
      payload:{kind:"goal_work",observed_at:5,valid_from:0,valid_until:5,
        evidence_path:$path,evidence_hash:$hash,identity:$identity,
        previous_event_hash:$prior}}' >"$event"
  polylane_audit_observe_event "$state" "$event" "$next"; mv -f "$next" "$state"
  jq -e '(.audit.coverage_facts|length)==2 and
    any(.audit.coverage_facts[];.kind=="guardian" and .valid_from==0 and .valid_until==5) and
    any(.audit.coverage_facts[];.kind=="goal_work" and .valid_from==0 and .valid_until==5) and
    .audit.last_guardian_observation.observed_at==5 and
    .audit.last_goal_observation.observed_at==5' "$state" >/dev/null ||
    fail audit-event-time-zero-to-five
  rm -rf "$root"
)
audit_event_time_regression
progress preflight-audit-event-time-zero-to-five
goal_domain_regression() (
  local domain_tmp hook_pid
  domain_tmp=$TMP/goal-domain; mkdir -p "$domain_tmp"
  wait_goal_gate() {
    local gate=$1 pid=$2 ignored
    for ignored in $(seq 1 500); do
      [ -f "$gate.ready" ] && return 0
      kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null || return 1
      sleep 0.01
    done
    return 1
  }
  init_goal_case() {
    local name=$1 status=$2 case_project case_runtime state
    case_project=$domain_tmp/$name
    case_runtime=$case_project/.polylane/runtime
    mkdir -p "$case_runtime"
    "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" init --loop-id "$name" --agent codex \
      --project "$case_project" || return
    state=$case_runtime/snapshots/1/state.json
    jq --arg status "$status" '
      .queue.items=[{id:"work-1",kind:"implementation",goal_ref:"goal-1",
        status:$status,priority:10,claim:{token:"claim-1",guardian_pid:101,
          guardian_start_token:"guardian-token",guardian_generation:1,
          worker_pid:null,worker_start_token:null,expires_at:100},created_sequence:0}]' \
      "$state" >"$state.next" && mv -f "$state.next" "$state"
    printf '%s\n' "$case_runtime"
  }
  run_goal_hook() {
    local case_runtime=$1 gate=$2 rc_file=$3
    (
      . "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-hooks.sh"
      set +e
      POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_AFTER_SNAPSHOT_GATE=$gate audit_hook_goal_work "$case_runtime"
      printf '%s\n' "$?" >"$rc_file"
    ) &
    hook_pid=$!
  }

  case_runtime=$(init_goal_case unrelated running) || fail goal-domain-unrelated-init
  gate=$domain_tmp/unrelated-gate; rc_file=$domain_tmp/unrelated.rc
  run_goal_hook "$case_runtime" "$gate" "$rc_file"
  wait_goal_gate "$gate" "$hook_pid" || fail goal-domain-unrelated-gate
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit noise proof unrelated-revision \
    --fingerprint noise || fail goal-domain-unrelated-emit
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce || fail goal-domain-unrelated-reduce
  : >"$gate.release"; wait "$hook_pid" || fail goal-domain-unrelated-hook
  [ "$(cat "$rc_file")" = 0 ] &&
    jq -e '.audit.last_goal_observation!=null' "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null ||
    fail goal-domain-unrelated-revision
  printf 'PASS unrelated-revision-domain-stable\n'

  case_runtime=$(init_goal_case active-change starting) || fail goal-domain-change-init
  gate=$domain_tmp/active-change-gate; rc_file=$domain_tmp/active-change.rc
  run_goal_hook "$case_runtime" "$gate" "$rc_file"
  wait_goal_gate "$gate" "$hook_pid" || fail goal-domain-change-gate
  payload=$case_runtime/activate.json
  jq -n '{id:"work-1",token:"claim-1",guardian_pid:101,
    guardian_start_token:"guardian-token",guardian_generation:1,
    worker_pid:202,worker_start_token:"worker-token",expires_at:100}' >"$payload"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit queue queue_activate active-change \
    --payload-file "$payload" || fail goal-domain-change-emit
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce || fail goal-domain-change-reduce
  : >"$gate.release"; wait "$hook_pid" || fail goal-domain-change-hook
  [ "$(cat "$rc_file")" = 0 ] || fail goal-domain-change-rc
  evidence=$(jq -r .audit.last_goal_observation.evidence_path \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json")
  jq -e '.source_snapshot.sequence==1 and .active.mode=="goal"' "$evidence" >/dev/null ||
    fail goal-domain-change-not-rebuilt
  printf 'PASS active-domain-change-retried\n'

  case_runtime=$(init_goal_case tamper running) || fail goal-domain-tamper-init
  gate=$domain_tmp/tamper-gate; rc_file=$domain_tmp/tamper.rc
  run_goal_hook "$case_runtime" "$gate" "$rc_file"
  wait_goal_gate "$gate" "$hook_pid" || fail goal-domain-tamper-gate
  state=$case_runtime/snapshots/1/state.json
  jq '.queue.provider_state="tampered"' "$state" >"$state.next" &&
    mv -f "$state.next" "$state"
  : >"$gate.release"; wait "$hook_pid" || fail goal-domain-tamper-hook
  [ "$(cat "$rc_file")" = 5 ] &&
    [ "$(find "$case_runtime/events" -type f -name '*.json' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" = 0 ] ||
    fail goal-domain-tamper-not-rc5
  printf 'PASS snapshot-tamper-rc5\n'

  init_due_goal_case() {
    local name=$1 next_action=$2 case_project case_runtime state
    case_project=$domain_tmp/$name
    case_runtime=$case_project/.polylane/runtime
    mkdir -p "$case_runtime"
    "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" init --loop-id "$name" --agent codex \
      --project "$case_project" || return
    state=$case_runtime/snapshots/1/state.json
    jq --argjson next_action "$next_action" '
      .queue.items=[{schema_version:1,id:"due-1",kind:"retry",mode:"offline",
        status:"ready",priority:10,goal_ref:"goal-due",args:{run_id:"due-1"},
        depends_on:[],next_action_at:$next_action,deadline_at:60,attempt:1,
        strategy_hash:"due-strategy",ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:["due-lock"],
        claim:null,last_error:null,created_sequence:0}]' \
      "$state" >"$state.next" && mv -f "$state.next" "$state"
    printf '%s\n' "$case_runtime"
  }
  emit_due_dispatch_attempt() {
    local case_runtime=$1 payload attempt_now
    attempt_now=$(runtime_now)
    payload=$case_runtime/due-reserve.json
    jq -n --argjson now "$attempt_now" '{expected_queue_revision:999,
      reservations:[{id:"due-1",claim:{
      token:"due-claim",guardian_pid:101,guardian_start_token:"guardian-token",
      guardian_generation:1,claimed_at:$now,expires_at:($now+15),worker_pid:null,
      worker_start_token:null,proof_fingerprint:null}}]}' >"$payload"
    "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit queue queue_reserve "due-cas-contention-$attempt_now" \
      --payload-file "$payload"
    "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce --now "$attempt_now"
    rm -f "$payload"
  }

  case_runtime=$(init_due_goal_case due-positive 0) || fail due-goal-positive-init
  emit_due_dispatch_attempt "$case_runtime" || fail due-goal-positive-attempt
  . "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-hooks.sh"
  audit_hook_goal_work "$case_runtime" || fail due-goal-positive-hook
  jq -e '.audit.last_goal_observation.identity=={mode:"goal",goal_ref:"goal-due"}' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail due-goal-positive-observation
  evidence=$(jq -r .audit.last_goal_observation.evidence_path \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json")
  jq -e '.active.item_id=="due-1" and .active.claim_token==null and
    (.active.recovery_event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$evidence" >/dev/null ||
    fail due-goal-positive-proof
  export POLYLANE_NOW_EPOCH=5
  emit_due_dispatch_attempt "$case_runtime" || fail due-goal-positive-second-attempt
  audit_hook_goal_work "$case_runtime" || fail due-goal-positive-second-hook
  jq -e 'any(.audit.coverage_facts[];.kind=="goal_work" and
    .valid_from==0 and .valid_until==5 and
    .identity=={mode:"goal",goal_ref:"goal-due"})' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail due-goal-positive-coverage
  export POLYLANE_NOW_EPOCH=0
  printf 'PASS due-queued-dispatch-proof\n'

  case_runtime=$(init_due_goal_case due-no-attempt 0) || fail due-goal-no-attempt-init
  set +e; audit_hook_goal_work "$case_runtime"; rc=$?; set -e
  [ "$rc" -eq 75 ] &&
    jq -e '.audit.last_goal_observation==null' "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null ||
    fail due-goal-no-attempt-masked
  printf 'PASS due-queued-no-attempt-rc75\n'

  case_runtime=$(init_due_goal_case due-tamper 0) || fail due-goal-tamper-init
  emit_due_dispatch_attempt "$case_runtime" || fail due-goal-tamper-attempt
  gate=$domain_tmp/due-tamper-gate; rc_file=$domain_tmp/due-tamper.rc
  run_goal_hook "$case_runtime" "$gate" "$rc_file"
  wait_goal_gate "$gate" "$hook_pid" || fail due-goal-tamper-gate
  state=$(cd "$case_runtime/current" && pwd -P)/state.json
  jq '.queue.provider_state="tampered"' "$state" >"$state.next" && mv -f "$state.next" "$state"
  : >"$gate.release"; wait "$hook_pid" || fail due-goal-tamper-hook
  [ "$(cat "$rc_file")" = 5 ] || fail due-goal-tamper-not-rc5
  printf 'PASS due-queued-snapshot-tamper-rc5\n'

  case_runtime=$(init_due_goal_case due-future 10) || fail due-goal-future-init
  emit_due_dispatch_attempt "$case_runtime" || fail due-goal-future-attempt
  set +e; audit_hook_goal_work "$case_runtime"; rc=$?; set -e
  [ "$rc" -eq 75 ] &&
    jq -e '.audit.last_goal_observation==null' "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null ||
    fail due-goal-future-masked
  printf 'PASS future-queued-not-active-rc75\n'

  case_runtime=$(init_goal_case transition running) || fail goal-transition-init
  state=$case_runtime/snapshots/1/state.json
  jq '.queue.items += [{id:"work-2",kind:"implementation",goal_ref:"goal-2",
    status:"scheduled",priority:10,claim:null,created_sequence:0}]' \
    "$state" >"$state.next" && mv -f "$state.next" "$state"
  . "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-hooks.sh"
  audit_hook_goal_work "$case_runtime" || fail goal-transition-baseline
  printf '5\n' >"$case_runtime/test-clock"; chmod 600 "$case_runtime/test-clock"
  complete=$case_runtime/complete.json; reserve=$case_runtime/reserve.json
  jq -n '{id:"work-1",token:"claim-1",worker_pid:null,worker_start_token:null}' >"$complete"
  jq -n '{expected_queue_revision:1,reservations:[{id:"work-2",
    claim:{token:"claim-2",guardian_pid:101,guardian_start_token:"guardian-token",
      guardian_generation:1,worker_pid:null,worker_start_token:null,expires_at:100}}]}' >"$reserve"
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit queue queue_complete transition-complete \
    --payload-file "$complete" || fail goal-transition-complete
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" emit queue queue_reserve transition-reserve \
    --payload-file "$reserve" || fail goal-transition-reserve
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$case_runtime" reduce || fail goal-transition-reduce
  audit_hook_goal_work "$case_runtime" || fail goal-transition-publish
  jq -e '.audit.last_goal_observation.observed_at==5 and
    .audit.last_goal_observation.identity.goal_ref=="goal-2" and
    ([.audit.coverage_facts[]|select(.kind=="goal_work" and .valid_from==0 and
      .valid_until==5 and .identity.goal_ref=="goal-1" and
      .continuity=="active_goal_transition")]|length)==1' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail goal-transition-state
  transition_before=$(jq -s '[.[]|select(.type=="goal_work_transition")]|length' \
    "$case_runtime"/events/*.json)
  set +e; audit_hook_goal_work "$case_runtime"; duplicate_rc=$?; set -e
  transition_after=$(jq -s '[.[]|select(.type=="goal_work_transition")]|length' \
    "$case_runtime"/events/*.json)
  [ "$duplicate_rc" -eq 76 ] && [ "$transition_before" -eq 1 ] &&
    [ "$transition_after" -eq 1 ] || fail goal-transition-duplicate
  fact=$case_runtime/transition-fact.json
  jq '.audit.coverage_facts[]|select(.continuity=="active_goal_transition")' \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json" >"$fact"
  runtime_audit_validate_fact "$fact" || fail goal-transition-fact
  printf 'PASS goal-transition-no-duplicate\n'

  printf '10\n' >"$case_runtime/test-clock"; chmod 600 "$case_runtime/test-clock"
  evidence_root=$case_runtime/audit/coverage-evidence
  before=$case_runtime/evidence-before.txt
  find "$evidence_root" -type f -name '*.json' | LC_ALL=C sort >"$before"
  gate=$case_runtime/current-evidence-gate; rc_file=$case_runtime/current-evidence.rc
  (
    set +e
    POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_AFTER_EVIDENCE_GATE=$gate audit_hook_goal_work "$case_runtime"
    printf '%s\n' "$?" >"$rc_file"
  ) & hook_pid=$!
  wait_goal_gate "$gate" "$hook_pid" || fail goal-transition-current-evidence-gate
  current_evidence=$(comm -13 "$before" \
    <(find "$evidence_root" -type f -name '*.json' | LC_ALL=C sort))
  [ "$(printf '%s\n' "$current_evidence" | sed '/^$/d' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" -eq 1 ] ||
    fail goal-transition-current-evidence-count
  chmod 700 "$evidence_root"; chmod 600 "$current_evidence"
  jq '.observed_at=11' "$current_evidence" >"$case_runtime/evidence-tampered.json"
  chmod 400 "$case_runtime/evidence-tampered.json"
  mv -f "$case_runtime/evidence-tampered.json" "$current_evidence"; chmod 500 "$evidence_root"
  : >"$gate.release"; wait "$hook_pid"
  [ "$(cat "$rc_file")" -eq 5 ] || fail goal-transition-current-evidence-rc
  prior_evidence=$(jq -r .audit.last_goal_observation.evidence_path \
    "$case_runtime/current/state.json")
  chmod 700 "$evidence_root"; chmod 600 "$prior_evidence"
  jq '.observed_at=6' "$prior_evidence" >"$case_runtime/prior-tampered.json"
  chmod 400 "$case_runtime/prior-tampered.json"
  mv -f "$case_runtime/prior-tampered.json" "$prior_evidence"; chmod 500 "$evidence_root"
  set +e; audit_hook_goal_work "$case_runtime"; prior_rc=$?; set -e
  [ "$prior_rc" -eq 5 ] &&
    [ "$(jq -s '[.[]|select(.type=="goal_work_transition" or
      .type=="goal_work_coverage")]|length' "$case_runtime"/events/*.json)" -eq 1 ] ||
    fail goal-transition-prior-evidence-rc
  printf 'PASS goal-transition-evidence-tamper-rc5\n'
  chmod -R u+w "$domain_tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
  rm -rf "$domain_tmp"
)
if [ "${POLYLANE_SAME_TICK_ONLY:-0}" != 1 ]; then
  goal_domain_regression
fi
if [ "${POLYLANE_GOAL_DOMAIN_ONLY:-0}" = 1 ]; then exit 0; fi
reducer_argument_locality() {
  local root state event result output
  root=$TMP/reducer-locality; mkdir -p "$root"
  state=$root/state.json; event=$root/event.json; result=$root/result.json
  jq -n '{revision:1,queue:{revision:0,provider_state:"available",items:[]}}' >"$state"
  jq -n '{type:"locality_probe",payload:{}}' >"$event"
  (
    . "$BIN/lib/polylane-controller-reducer.sh"
    output=caller-output-sentinel
    polylane_controller_apply_event "$state" "$event" "$result"
    [ "$output" = caller-output-sentinel ]
  ) || fail controller-reducer-caller-output-clobbered
  (
    . "$BIN/lib/polylane-terminal-reducer.sh"
    output=caller-output-sentinel
    polylane_terminal_apply_event "$state" "$event" "$result"
    [ "$output" = caller-output-sentinel ]
    polylane_terminal_apply_control_event "$state" "$event" "$result"
    [ "$output" = caller-output-sentinel ]
  ) || fail terminal-reducer-caller-output-clobbered
  rm -rf "$root"
}
reducer_argument_locality
progress preflight-reducer-argument-locality
guardian_argument_locality() {
  local root
  root=$TMP/guardian-locality; mkdir -p "$root/current"
  jq -n --argjson pid "$$" '{pid:$pid}' >"$root/actor-controller.json"
  (
    export POLYLANE_GUARDIAN_SOURCE_ONLY=1 POLYLANE_TEST_MODE=1
    . "$BIN/polylane-guardian.sh"
    state=caller-state-sentinel
    reap_exited_children "$root"
    [ "$state" = caller-state-sentinel ]
    runtime_start_token() { printf 'test-token\n'; }
    runtime_now() { printf '0\n'; }
    audit_hook_guardian_coverage() { :; }
    audit_hook_goal_work() { return 75; }
    jq -n --argjson pid "$$" '{pid:$pid,start_token:"test-token",generation_token:"guardian-1"}' \
      >"$root/actor-guardian.json"
    jq -n '{guardian:{generation:1}}' >"$root/current/state.json"
    guardian_publish_observation "$root"
    [ "$state" = caller-state-sentinel ]
  ) || fail guardian-helper-caller-state-clobbered
  rm -rf "$root"
}
guardian_argument_locality
progress preflight-guardian-argument-locality
jq -e '.schema_version==2 and .simulated_seconds==21600 and .tick_seconds==5 and
  (.faults|length==20) and ([.faults[].id]|unique|length)==20 and
  ([.faults[].at] as $ats | $ats==($ats|sort))' "$FIXTURE" >/dev/null
recovery_exclusivity_deadline_regression
progress preflight-recovery-exclusivity-deadlines
queue_complete_lost_wake_regression
progress preflight-queue-complete-lost-wake
initialize_soak_runtime
bootstrap_item=$runtime/bootstrap-no-fault.json
jq -n '{schema_version:1,id:"bootstrap-no-fault",kind:"cycle",mode:"offline",
  status:"scheduled",priority:1,goal_ref:"soak",args:{run_id:"bootstrap-no-fault"},
  depends_on:[],next_action_at:999999,deadline_at:1000299,attempt:1,
  strategy_hash:"bootstrap-no-fault",ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:[],
  claim:null,last_error:null}' >"$bootstrap_item"
run_wall_bounded 5 "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" enqueue "$bootstrap_item" ||
  fail pre-fault-queue-enqueue-timeout
progress preflight-bootstrap
jq -e 'any(.queue.items[]?;.id=="bootstrap-no-fault") and
  ((.audit.faults // {})|length)==0' "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null ||
  fail pre-fault-queue-enqueue
[ ! -d "$runtime/audit/handler-tickets" ] ||
  [ "$(find "$runtime/audit/handler-tickets" -type f -name '*.json' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" -eq 0 ] ||
  fail pre-fault-ticket-opened
rm -f "$bootstrap_item"

production_provider_tick() {
  local now provider_gate provider_state provider_recovery expected_provider
  now=$1; provider_gate=$runtime/soak-external/provider-state
  if [ -f "$provider_gate" ]; then
    [ ! -L "$provider_gate" ] || return 5
    provider_state=$(sed -n '1p' "$provider_gate")
    provider_recovery=$(jq -er '
      [.audit.faults[] as $f |
        select(($f.recovery|IN("offline_plus_probe","offline_drain","online_immediate")) and
          .audit.recovery_pairs[($f.event_hash+"|"+$f.recovery)]==null)|$f.recovery] |
      select(length==1)|.[0]' "$runtime/current/state.json") || return 5
    case "$provider_recovery" in
      offline_plus_probe) expected_provider=rate_limited ;;
      offline_drain) expected_provider=unavailable ;;
      online_immediate) expected_provider=available ;;
      *) return 5 ;;
    esac
    [ "$provider_state" = "$expected_provider" ] || return 5
    run_wall_bounded 10 "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" \
      provider-state "$provider_state" "soak-$provider_recovery-$now" || return $?
    rm -f "$provider_gate"
  fi
}
event_horizon_inventory() {
  local now attempts output state_file
  now=$1 attempts=$2
  output=$runtime/event-horizon-failure-$now.json
  state_file=$runtime/current/state.json
  jq -Scn --argjson now "$now" --argjson attempts "$attempts" \
    --argjson wall_at "$(runtime_wall_now)" --slurpfile state "$state_file" '
    {schema_version:1,now:$now,attempts:$attempts,wall_at:$wall_at,
      last_event_sequence:$state[0].last_event_sequence,
      queue_revision:$state[0].queue.revision,
      provider_state:$state[0].queue.provider_state,
      due_unclaimed:[$state[0].queue.items[]|
        select((.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and .claim==null and
          .next_action_at<=$now)|
        {id,status,mode,priority,next_action_at,deadline_at,depends_on,
          resource_locks,goal_ref}],
      active:[$state[0].queue.items[]|
        select(.status|IN("starting","running"))|
        {id,status,goal_ref,claim}],
      last_guardian_observation:$state[0].audit.last_guardian_observation,
      last_goal_observation:$state[0].audit.last_goal_observation}' >"$output"
  chmod 600 "$output"
  printf 'EVENT_HORIZON_FAILURE %s\n' "$output" >&2
  jq -c . "$output" >&2
}
event_horizon_claims_valid() {
  local now id status guardian_pid guardian_token pid token actor observed
  now=$1
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r id status guardian_pid guardian_token pid token; do
    [ -n "$id" ] || continue
    if [ "$status" = starting ] && [ "$pid" = 0 ] && [ -z "$token" ]; then
      actor=$runtime/actor-guardian.json
      [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] &&
        [ "$(runtime_start_token "$guardian_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)" = "$guardian_token" ] &&
        jq -e --argjson pid "$guardian_pid" --arg token "$guardian_token" '
          .pid==$pid and .start_token==$token and .lease_valid==true' \
          "$actor" >/dev/null || return 1
      continue
    fi
    actor=$runtime/actor-worker-$id.json
    [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] || return 1
    observed=$(runtime_start_token "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true)
    [ -n "$token" ] && [ "$observed" = "$token" ] &&
      jq -e --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" --argjson now "$now" \
        --slurpfile state "$runtime/current/state.json" '
        .generation_token==$token and .lease_valid==true and
        any($state[0].queue.items[];.id==$id and
          (.status|IN("starting","running")) and
          .claim.worker_start_token==$token and .claim.expires_at>=$now)' \
        "$actor" >/dev/null || return 1
  done < <(jq -r '.queue.items[]|
    select(.status|IN("starting","running"))|
    [.id,.status,(.claim.guardian_pid//0),(.claim.guardian_start_token//""),
      (.claim.worker_pid//0),(.claim.worker_start_token//"")]|@tsv' \
    "$runtime/current/state.json")
}
event_horizon_coverage_current() {
  local now
  now=$1
  jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
    .audit.last_guardian_observation!=null and
    .audit.last_goal_observation!=null and
    .audit.last_guardian_observation.observed_at==$now and
    .audit.last_goal_observation.observed_at==$now' \
    "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null
}
event_horizon_guardian_idle_current() {
  local now actor
  now=$1 actor=$runtime/actor-guardian.json
  [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] &&
    jq -e --argjson now "$now" --slurpfile state "$runtime/current/state.json" '
      .actor=="guardian" and .lease_valid==true and
      .pid==$state[0].guardian.pid and
      .start_token==$state[0].guardian.start_token and
      .generation==$state[0].guardian.generation and
      .check.status=="idle" and .check.logical_at==$now' "$actor" >/dev/null
}
event_horizon_barrier_unlock() {
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/events.lock"
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check.lock"
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
  event_horizon_gate_held=0
}
event_horizon_barrier_retain_gate() {
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/events.lock"
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check.lock"
  event_horizon_gate_held=1
}
event_horizon_gate_held=0
event_horizon_phase_breakdown() {
  local started ended logical output
  started=$1 ended=$2 logical=$3 output=$4
  if [ ! -f "$runtime/guardian.log" ]; then printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$output"; return; fi
  jq -Rn --argjson started "$started" --argjson ended "$ended" \
    --argjson logical "$logical" '
      [inputs |
        (try capture("guardian-phase wall=(?<wall>[0-9]+) logical=(?<logical>[0-9]+) phase=(?<phase>[^ ]+)")
          catch empty) |
        .wall=(.wall|tonumber) | .logical=(.logical|tonumber) |
        select(.wall>=$started and .wall<=$ended and .logical==$logical)] |
      sort_by(.wall) |
      reduce .[] as $row
        ({previous:$started,phases:[]};
          .phases += [{phase:$row.phase,wall_at:$row.wall,
            duration_seconds:($row.wall-.previous)}] |
          .previous=$row.wall) |
      .phases' "$runtime/guardian.log" >"$output"
}
event_horizon_guardian_check_reserve() {
  local now actor intent temporary owner_pid owner_token status sequence target
  local wall_deadline runtime_path request_id auth active created_wall observed_logical
  local acknowledged_wall breakdown handoff
  local requested_checkpoint
  now=$1 requested_checkpoint=${2:-dispatch-final} actor=$runtime/actor-guardian.json
  case $requested_checkpoint in
    reclaim|dispatch-first|controller-ready|dispatch|drain|publish|dispatch-final) : ;;
    *) return 2 ;;
  esac
  intent=$runtime/guardian-check-barrier-intent.json
  [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] || return 5
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] && [ "${POLYLANE_HERMETIC:-0}" = 1 ] || return 5
  [ -f "$runtime/hermetic-barrier-control.key" ] &&
    [ ! -L "$runtime/hermetic-barrier-control.key" ] &&
    [ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$runtime/hermetic-barrier-control.key" 2>/dev/null ||
      stat -c '%a' "$runtime/hermetic-barrier-control.key")" = 400 ] || return 5
  owner_pid=${BASHPID:-$$}
  owner_token=$(runtime_start_token "$owner_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)
  [ -n "$owner_token" ] || return 75
  status=$(jq -er '.check.status|select(IN("idle","running"))' "$actor") || return 5
  sequence=$(jq -er '.check.sequence|select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0)' \
    "$actor") || return 5
  observed_logical=$(jq -er '.check.logical_at|select(type=="number" and floor==.)' \
    "$actor") || return 5
  target=$((sequence + 1))
  if [ "$status" = running ] && [ "$observed_logical" -eq "$now" ]; then
    target=$sequence
  fi
  runtime_path=$(cd "$runtime" && pwd -P) || return 5
  created_wall=$(runtime_wall_now)
  request_id=$(printf '%s\n' \
    "$runtime_path:$owner_pid:$owner_token:$sequence:$target:$now:$created_wall:${RANDOM:-0}" |
    runtime_sha256_stdin)
  request_id=${request_id#sha256:}
  temporary=$runtime/.guardian-check-barrier-intent.$$
  jq -Scn --arg request_id "$request_id" --arg runtime_path "$runtime_path" \
    --argjson owner_pid "$owner_pid" --arg owner_start_token "$owner_token" \
    --argjson guardian_pid "$(jq -er .pid "$actor")" \
    --arg guardian_start_token "$(jq -er .start_token "$actor")" \
    --argjson guardian_generation "$(jq -er .generation "$actor")" \
    --arg observed_check_status "$status" \
    --arg requested_checkpoint "$requested_checkpoint" \
    --argjson observed_check_sequence "$sequence" \
    --argjson observed_check_logical_at "$observed_logical" \
    --argjson yield_after_sequence "$target" --argjson logical_at "$now" \
    --argjson created_wall_at "$created_wall" \
    --argjson expires_wall_at "$((created_wall + 60))" '
      {schema_version:1,request_id:$request_id,runtime_path:$runtime_path,
        owner_pid:$owner_pid,owner_start_token:$owner_start_token,
        guardian_pid:$guardian_pid,guardian_start_token:$guardian_start_token,
        guardian_generation:$guardian_generation,
        requested_checkpoint:$requested_checkpoint,
        observed_check_status:$observed_check_status,
        observed_check_sequence:$observed_check_sequence,
        observed_check_logical_at:$observed_check_logical_at,
        yield_after_sequence:$yield_after_sequence,logical_at:$logical_at,
        created_wall_at:$created_wall_at,expires_wall_at:$expires_wall_at}' >"$temporary"
  chmod 600 "$temporary"
  auth=$("$BIN/polylane-hmac.py" sign \
    "$runtime/hermetic-barrier-control.key" "$temporary") || { rm -f "$temporary"; return 5; }
  jq -Sc --arg auth "$auth" '.+{auth:$auth}' "$temporary" >"$temporary.signed"
  rm -f "$temporary"
  chmod 400 "$temporary.signed"
  mv -f "$temporary.signed" "$intent"
  active=$runtime/hermetic-barrier-active/$request_id
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" wake || { rm -f "$intent"; return 5; }
  wall_deadline=$(( $(runtime_wall_now) + 30 ))
  while [ "$(runtime_wall_now)" -le "$wall_deadline" ]; do
    if [ -d "$active" ] && [ ! -L "$active" ] &&
       jq -e --argjson target "$target" --argjson now "$now" \
      --slurpfile state "$runtime/current/state.json" '
        .actor=="guardian" and .lease_valid==true and
        .pid==$state[0].guardian.pid and
        .start_token==$state[0].guardian.start_token and
        .generation==$state[0].guardian.generation and
        .check.status=="idle" and .check.sequence==$target and
        .check.logical_at==$now' "$actor" >/dev/null; then
      runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
      acknowledged_wall=$(runtime_wall_now)
      breakdown=$runtime/.guardian-phase-breakdown.$$
      event_horizon_phase_breakdown "$created_wall" "$acknowledged_wall" "$now" \
        "$breakdown"
      handoff=$runtime/.guardian-phase-handoff.$$
      jq -Scn --arg request_id "$request_id" \
        --arg requested_checkpoint "$requested_checkpoint" \
        --arg observed_status "$status" --argjson observed_sequence "$sequence" \
        --argjson target_sequence "$target" --argjson logical_at "$now" \
        --argjson started_wall_at "$created_wall" \
        --argjson acknowledged_wall_at "$acknowledged_wall" \
        --slurpfile phases "$breakdown" --slurpfile actor "$actor" '
          {schema_version:1,request_id:$request_id,
            requested_checkpoint:$requested_checkpoint,
            observed_check:{status:$observed_status,sequence:$observed_sequence},
            target_sequence:$target_sequence,logical_at:$logical_at,
            started_wall_at:$started_wall_at,
            acknowledged_wall_at:$acknowledged_wall_at,
            elapsed_seconds:($acknowledged_wall_at-$started_wall_at),
            phases:$phases[0],acknowledged_check:$actor[0].check}' >"$handoff"
      chmod 600 "$handoff"
      runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/guardian-phase-handoff-record.lock"
      jq -c . "$handoff" >>"$runtime/guardian-phase-handoffs.jsonl"
      chmod 600 "$runtime/guardian-phase-handoffs.jsonl"
      runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-phase-handoff-record.lock"
      rm -f "$handoff" "$breakdown"
      rm -f "$intent"
      rmdir "$active" 2>/dev/null || {
        runtime_lock_release "$runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
        event_horizon_gate_held=0
        return 5
      }
      event_horizon_gate_held=1
      return 0
    fi
    sleep 0.01
  done
  rm -f "$intent"
  rmdir "$active" 2>/dev/null || true
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" wake || true
  return 75
}
production_event_horizon_barrier() {
  local now attempt wall_started wall_budget wall_deadline elapsed horizon event_tip
  local queue_revision prior_horizon stable selection runnable record advance_to
  local locked_horizon retain_gate
  now=$1; shift; advance_to=''; retain_gate=0
  while [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; do
    case $1 in
      --advance-to)
        [ "$#" -ge 2 ] || return 2
        advance_to=$2; shift 2 ;;
      --retain-gate) retain_gate=1; shift ;;
      *) return 2 ;;
    esac
  done
  [ -z "$advance_to" ] || [ "$advance_to" -eq $((now + 5)) ] || return 2
  attempt=0; wall_started=$(runtime_wall_now)
  if [ "$now" -eq 0 ]; then wall_budget=30; else wall_budget=15; fi
  wall_deadline=$((wall_started + wall_budget))
  prior_horizon=''; stable=0
  selection=$runtime/event-horizon-selection.$$.json
  while [ "$attempt" -lt 128 ] && {
    [ "$(runtime_wall_now)" -le "$wall_deadline" ] ||
      [ "$event_horizon_gate_held" -eq 1 ];
  }; do
    attempt=$((attempt + 1))
    # Claim barrier admission before doing any snapshot work.  Otherwise the
    # reduce/scheduler probe itself is a large enough window for a newly-woken
    # guardian check to take the gate first and delay a quiescent barrier by a
    # complete check cycle.
    if [ "$event_horizon_gate_held" -eq 1 ]; then
      event_horizon_gate_held=0
    else
      runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/guardian-check-gate.lock"
    fi
    runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/guardian-check.lock"
    runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/events.lock"
    "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" reduce --now "$now" || {
      event_horizon_barrier_unlock
      rm -f "$selection"; event_horizon_inventory "$now" "$attempt"; return 5; }
    event_tip=$(jq -er '.last_event_sequence|select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0)' \
      "$runtime/current/state.json") || {
        event_horizon_barrier_unlock
        rm -f "$selection"; event_horizon_inventory "$now" "$attempt"; return 5; }
    queue_revision=$(jq -er '.queue.revision|select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0)' \
      "$runtime/current/state.json") || {
        event_horizon_barrier_unlock
        rm -f "$selection"; event_horizon_inventory "$now" "$attempt"; return 5; }
    "$BIN/polylane-scheduler.sh" next "$runtime/current/state.json" "$runtime" \
      --now "$now" >"$selection" || {
        event_horizon_barrier_unlock
        rm -f "$selection"; event_horizon_inventory "$now" "$attempt"; return 5; }
    runnable=$(jq -er '.items|length' "$selection") || {
      event_horizon_barrier_unlock
      rm -f "$selection"; event_horizon_inventory "$now" "$attempt"; return 5; }
    horizon=$(jq -Sc '[.items[].id]|sort' "$selection" | runtime_sha256_stdin)
    if [ "$runnable" -gt 0 ]; then
      stable=0; prior_horizon=''
      event_horizon_barrier_unlock
      event_horizon_guardian_check_reserve "$now" dispatch-final || {
          rm -f "$selection"; event_horizon_inventory "$now" "$attempt"; return 5; }
      continue
    fi
    if ! event_horizon_claims_valid "$now"; then
      stable=0; prior_horizon=''
      event_horizon_barrier_unlock
      event_horizon_guardian_check_reserve "$now" dispatch-final || {
          rm -f "$selection"; event_horizon_inventory "$now" "$attempt"; return 5; }
      continue
    fi
    if ! event_horizon_coverage_current "$now"; then
      stable=0; prior_horizon=''
      event_horizon_barrier_unlock
      event_horizon_guardian_check_reserve "$now" dispatch-final || {
          rm -f "$selection"; event_horizon_inventory "$now" "$attempt"; return 5; }
      continue
    fi
    if [ "$horizon" = "$prior_horizon" ]; then stable=$((stable + 1))
    else prior_horizon=$horizon; stable=1; fi
    # The two required scheduling horizons are recomputed while gate -> check
    # -> events are all held, so both observe the same immutable event tip and
    # queue domain.
    if [ "$stable" -ge 1 ]; then
      locked_horizon=$(jq -Sc '[.items[].id]|sort' "$selection" | runtime_sha256_stdin)
      if [ "$runnable" -eq 0 ]; then
        "$BIN/polylane-scheduler.sh" next "$runtime/current/state.json" "$runtime" \
          --now "$now" >"$selection" || {
            event_horizon_barrier_unlock
            rm -f "$selection"; event_horizon_inventory "$now" "$attempt"; return 5; }
        runnable=$(jq -er '.items|length' "$selection") || {
          event_horizon_barrier_unlock
          rm -f "$selection"; event_horizon_inventory "$now" "$attempt"; return 5; }
      fi
      if [ "$runnable" -gt 0 ] ||
         [ "$locked_horizon" != "$(jq -Sc '[.items[].id]|sort' "$selection" | runtime_sha256_stdin)" ] ||
         ! event_horizon_claims_valid "$now" ||
         ! event_horizon_coverage_current "$now"; then
        event_horizon_barrier_unlock
        stable=0; prior_horizon=''
        event_horizon_guardian_check_reserve "$now" dispatch-final || {
          rm -f "$selection"; event_horizon_inventory "$now" "$attempt"; return 5; }
        continue
      fi
      event_tip=$(jq -r .last_event_sequence "$runtime/current/state.json")
      queue_revision=$(jq -r .queue.revision "$runtime/current/state.json")
      if [ -n "$advance_to" ]; then
        printf '%s\n' "$advance_to" >"$runtime/test-clock.next"
        chmod 600 "$runtime/test-clock.next"
        mv -f "$runtime/test-clock.next" "$runtime/test-clock"
      fi
      if [ "$retain_gate" -eq 1 ]; then
        event_horizon_barrier_retain_gate
      else
        event_horizon_barrier_unlock
      fi
      elapsed=$(( $(runtime_wall_now) - wall_started ))
      record=$runtime/.event-horizon-record.$$.json
      jq -Scn --argjson now "$now" --argjson attempts "$attempt" \
        --argjson elapsed_seconds "$elapsed" --argjson event_tip "$event_tip" \
        --argjson queue_revision "$queue_revision" --argjson wall_budget "$wall_budget" '
        {schema_version:1,now:$now,attempts:$attempts,
          elapsed_seconds:$elapsed_seconds,event_tip:$event_tip,
          queue_revision:$queue_revision,wall_budget:$wall_budget}' >"$record"
      chmod 600 "$record"
      runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/event-horizon-record.lock"
      jq -c . "$record" >>"$runtime/event-horizon-barriers.jsonl"
      chmod 600 "$runtime/event-horizon-barriers.jsonl"
      runtime_lock_release "$runtime/event-horizon-record.lock"
      rm -f "$record" "$selection"
      return 0
    fi
  done
  rm -f "$selection"
  event_horizon_inventory "$now" "$attempt"
  return 75
}
production_tick() {
  local now
  now=$1
  run_wall_bounded 10 "$BIN/polylane-keeper.sh" check-once --runtime "$runtime" --now "$now" ||
    fail "production-tick-$now-keeper"
  run_wall_bounded 10 "$BIN/polylane-sentinel.sh" check-once --runtime "$runtime" --now "$now" ||
    fail "production-tick-$now-sentinel"
  production_provider_tick "$now" || fail provider-production-tick
  run_wall_bounded 10 "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" reduce --now "$now" ||
    fail "production-tick-$now-reduce"
  run_wall_bounded 10 "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" reclaim-expired --now "$now" ||
    fail "production-tick-$now-reclaim"
  run_wall_bounded 10 "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" \
    ready offline --limit 100 --now "$now" >/dev/null || fail "production-tick-$now-ready-offline"
  run_wall_bounded 10 "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" \
    ready probe --limit 100 --now "$now" >/dev/null || fail "production-tick-$now-ready-probe"
  run_wall_bounded 10 "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" \
    ready online --limit 100 --now "$now" >/dev/null || fail "production-tick-$now-ready-online"
  event_horizon_guardian_check_reserve "$now" dispatch-final ||
    fail "production-tick-$now-guardian"
  production_event_horizon_barrier "$now" --retain-gate ||
    fail "production-tick-$now-event-horizon"
  if [ "$now" -gt 0 ]; then
    run_wall_bounded 10 "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" \
      audit-interval --from "$((now-5))" --to "$now" ||
      fail "production-tick-$now-audit-interval"
  fi
}
# Exercise the exact provider branch used by every six-hour production tick before the
# matrix. Each negative must preserve the gate and emit no provider event; the positive
# invokes the production queue handler exactly once, records its pair, and consumes the gate.
main_runtime=$runtime
provider_probe_init() {
  local label probe_project
  label=$1; probe_project=$TMP/provider-$label
  mkdir -p "$probe_project/docs/polylane" "$probe_project/.polylane"
  runtime=$probe_project/.polylane/runtime
  "$RUNTIME" --dir "$runtime" init --loop-id "provider-$label" --agent codex \
    --project "$probe_project"
  [ -f "$runtime/audit-auth.key" ] && [ ! -L "$runtime/audit-auth.key" ] &&
    [ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$runtime/audit-auth.key" 2>/dev/null ||
      stat -c '%a' "$runtime/audit-auth.key")" = 400 ] || fail provider-audit-key
  for audit_dir in injections coverage-evidence handler-attempts \
    handler-output-artifacts handler-receipts handler-tickets \
    postcondition-artifacts recovery-evidence; do
    [ -d "$runtime/audit/$audit_dir" ] && [ ! -L "$runtime/audit/$audit_dir" ] &&
      [ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$runtime/audit/$audit_dir" 2>/dev/null ||
        stat -c '%a' "$runtime/audit/$audit_dir")" = 500 ] ||
      fail "provider-audit-root-$audit_dir"
  done
  [ "$(find "$runtime/events" -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.json' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" -eq 0 ] ||
    fail provider-probe-not-fresh
  printf '0\n' >"$runtime/test-clock"; chmod 600 "$runtime/test-clock"
}
provider_event_count() {
  local count
  count=$(jq -s '[.[]|select(.actor=="queue" and .type=="provider_state")]|length' \
    "$runtime"/events/*.json 2>/dev/null) || count=0
  printf '%s\n' "$count"
}

if [ "${POLYLANE_SAME_TICK_ONLY:-0}" != 1 ]; then
provider_probe_init no-pending
progress provider-no-pending-start
mkdir -p "$runtime/soak-external"
printf 'rate_limited\n' >"$runtime/soak-external/provider-state"
expect_rc 5 production_provider_tick 5
[ -f "$runtime/soak-external/provider-state" ] && [ "$(provider_event_count)" -eq 0 ] ||
  fail provider-no-pending-mutated
progress provider-no-pending-pass

provider_probe_init wrong
progress provider-wrong-start
run_wall_bounded 10 "$ACTORS" inject "$runtime" "$(dirname "$(dirname "$runtime")")" \
  "$FIXTURE" rate_limit "$runtime/audit-auth.key" || fail provider-wrong-inject-timeout
jq -e '(.audit.faults|length)==1 and
  any(.audit.faults[];.fault_id=="rate_limit" and .recovery=="offline_plus_probe")' \
  "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null &&
  [ "$(find "$runtime/audit/injections" -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.json' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" -eq 1 ] ||
  fail provider-first-operation-injection
printf 'unavailable\n' >"$runtime/soak-external/provider-state"
expect_rc 5 production_provider_tick 5
[ -f "$runtime/soak-external/provider-state" ] && [ "$(provider_event_count)" -eq 0 ] ||
  fail provider-wrong-state-mutated
progress provider-wrong-pass

provider_probe_init tamper
progress provider-tamper-start
mkdir -p "$runtime/soak-external"
printf 'rate_limited\n' >"$runtime/provider-tamper-target"
ln -s "$runtime/provider-tamper-target" "$runtime/soak-external/provider-state"
expect_rc 5 production_provider_tick 5
[ -L "$runtime/soak-external/provider-state" ] && [ "$(provider_event_count)" -eq 0 ] ||
  fail provider-tamper-mutated
progress provider-tamper-pass

provider_probe_init positive
progress provider-positive-start
provider_project=$(dirname "$(dirname "$runtime")")
run_wall_bounded 10 "$ACTORS" inject "$runtime" "$provider_project" "$FIXTURE" \
  rate_limit "$runtime/audit-auth.key" || fail provider-positive-inject-timeout
production_provider_tick 5
[ ! -e "$runtime/soak-external/provider-state" ] &&
  [ "$(provider_event_count)" -eq 1 ] &&
  jq -e '.queue.provider_state=="rate_limited" and
    ([.audit.recovery_pairs[]|select(.recovery=="offline_plus_probe")]|length)==1' \
    "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || fail provider-positive-not-recorded
printf 'rate_limited\n' >"$runtime/soak-external/provider-state"
expect_rc 5 production_provider_tick 10
[ -f "$runtime/soak-external/provider-state" ] && [ "$(provider_event_count)" -eq 1 ] ||
  fail provider-replay-invoked
progress provider-positive-pass
fi
runtime=$main_runtime
if [ "${POLYLANE_PROVIDER_TICK_ONLY:-0}" = 1 ]; then
  printf 'PASS provider-production-tick\n'
  exit 0
fi
progress actors-start
set +e
run_wall_bounded 10 "$ACTORS" start "$runtime" "$project"
actors_start_rc=$?
set -e
[ "$actors_start_rc" -eq 0 ] || fail "actors-start-rc-$actors_start_rc"
started=1
progress actors-start-pass
jq -e '.schema_version==1 and .real_supervision==true and
  (.hashes|keys|sort)==["controller","guardian","keeper","sentinel"]' \
  "$runtime/soak-supervision-topology.json" >/dev/null
jq -s -e '([.[].pid]|unique|length)==4 and all(.[].start_token;length>0)' \
