~~~bash
    git -C "$project" init -q
    git -C "$project" config user.name polylane-soak
    git -C "$project" config user.email polylane-soak@invalid
    printf '%s\n' '.polylane/' >"$project/.gitignore"
    git -C "$project" add .gitignore docs
    git -C "$project" commit -qm 'polylane soak fixture'
  fi

  # Seed one bounded external builder operation. Subsequent items come only from the real
  # production controller and ensure-progress paths.
  mkdir -p "$runtime/soak-external"
  manifest=$runtime/soak-worker-manifest.json
  base_ref=$(git -C "$project" symbolic-ref -q HEAD)
  expected_base=$(git -C "$project" rev-parse "$base_ref^{commit}")
  jq -Scn --arg base_ref "$base_ref" --arg expected_base "$expected_base" \
    '{schema_version:2,run_id:"soak-worker",loop_id:"soak",cycle:1,
      base_ref:$base_ref,expected_base:$expected_base,lanes:[],
      integrator:{ownership_globs:[]},external_fixture:true}' >"$manifest"
  chmod 400 "$manifest"; manifest_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$manifest")
  item=$runtime/soak-worker-item.json
  jq -n --arg manifest "$manifest" --arg manifest_hash "$manifest_hash" '
    {schema_version:1,id:"cycle-soak-worker",kind:"cycle",mode:"online",status:"ready",
      priority:1000,goal_ref:"soak",
      args:{manifest:$manifest,manifest_hash:$manifest_hash,run_id:"soak-worker"},
      depends_on:[],next_action_at:0,deadline_at:21900,attempt:1,
      strategy_hash:"soak-production-worker",ownership_globs:[],
      resource_locks:["soak:external-builder"],claim:null,last_error:null}' >"$item"
  "$BIN/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" enqueue "$item"
  rm -f "$item"
  controller_argv=$runtime/soak-controller.argv.json
  loop=$(jq -r .loop_id "$runtime/current/state.json")
  jq -n --arg controller "$REPO/codex/scripts/polylane-codex-controller.sh" \
    --arg project "$project" --arg loop "$loop" '[$controller,$project,$loop]' \
    >"$controller_argv"; chmod 600 "$controller_argv"
  export POLYLANE_CODEX_CLI=$0 POLYLANE_CONTROLLER_ONCE=0
  POLYLANE_CONTROLLER_ARGV_FILE=$controller_argv POLYLANE_TEST_FOREGROUND=1 \
    "$REPO/codex/scripts/polylane-codex-loop.sh" "$project" --resume --foreground-once \
    >"$runtime/soak-launch.out" 2>"$runtime/soak-launch.err" & launch_pid=$!
  # fake-tmux records the controller pane but deliberately does not execute it. The loop is
  # concurrently blocked in session announce, so start its exact sealed sentinel envelope
  # once the owned session record exists, then join the loop.
  deadline=$(( $(runtime_wall_now) + 5 ))
  until [ -f "$runtime/session.json" ] && [ -f "$runtime/sentinel-launch.json" ]; do
    kill -0 "$launch_pid" 2>/dev/null || { wait "$launch_pid"; return $?; }
    [ "$(runtime_wall_now)" -lt "$deadline" ] || { kill -TERM "$launch_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; return 75; }
    sleep 0.02
  done
  POLYLANE_EXPECTED_PROJECT=$project \
    POLYLANE_EXPECTED_LOOP_ID="$(jq -r .loop_id "$runtime/current/state.json")" \
    "$BIN/polylane-exec-argv.sh" --spec "$runtime/sentinel-launch.json" \
    >>"$runtime/sentinel.log" 2>&1 &
  set +e; wait "$launch_pid"; launch_rc=$?; set -e
  [ "$launch_rc" -eq 0 ] || [ "$launch_rc" -eq 3 ] || return "$launch_rc"
  deadline=$(( $(runtime_wall_now) + 10 ))
  while :; do
    topology_live=1
    for file in "$runtime/keeper.lock/owner.json" "$runtime/sentinel-heartbeat.json" \
      "$runtime/actor-guardian.json" "$runtime/actor-controller.json"; do
      if [ ! -f "$file" ] || [ -L "$file" ]; then topology_live=0; continue; fi
      pid=$(jq -er .pid "$file" 2>/dev/null || true)
      token=$(jq -er .start_token "$file" 2>/dev/null || true)
      identity_live "$pid" "$token" || topology_live=0
    done
    [ "$topology_live" -eq 0 ] || break
    [ "$(runtime_wall_now)" -lt "$deadline" ] || return 75
    sleep 0.02
  done
  # Only the external quiet-child stand-in is mocked here. Workers are launched through the
  # real queue reserve/activate/worker path during the first guardian tick.
  for role in quiet-child; do
    "$0" mock-external-actor & pid=$!
    record_actor "$runtime" "$role" "$pid" 1
  done
  topology=$runtime/.soak-supervision-topology.$$.json
  topology_actors=$runtime/.soak-supervision-topology-actors.$$.json
  printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$topology_actors"
  for row in \
    "keeper:$runtime/keeper.lock/owner.json" \
    "sentinel:$runtime/sentinel-heartbeat.json" \
    "guardian:$runtime/actor-guardian.json" \
    "controller:$runtime/actor-controller.json"; do
    role=${row%%:*}; file=${row#*:}; identity=$runtime/.topology-identity-$role.$$.json
    snapshot_live_identity "$file" "$role" "$identity" || return $?
    jq --slurpfile identity "$identity" '.+[$identity[0]]' "$topology_actors" \
      >"$topology_actors.next"
    mv -f "$topology_actors.next" "$topology_actors"
    rm -f "$identity"
  done
  jq -Scn --slurpfile actors "$topology_actors" \
    '{schema_version:2,real_supervision:true,actors:$actors[0]}' >"$topology"
  auth_tag=$(runtime_audit_auth_tag "$runtime/audit-auth.key" "$topology") || return 5
  jq -Sc --arg auth_tag "$auth_tag" '.+{auth_tag:$auth_tag}' "$topology" \
    >"$runtime/soak-supervision-topology.json"
  chmod 400 "$runtime/soak-supervision-topology.json"
  rm -f "$topology" "$topology_actors"
}
inject_fault() {
  runtime=$1 project=$2 scenario=$3 fault=$4 auth_file=$5
  RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
  recovery=$(jq -er --arg fault "$fault" '.faults[]|select(.id==$fault)|.recovery' "$scenario")
  at=$(runtime_now); admission_attempt=0; admission_accepted=0
  while [ "$admission_attempt" -lt 8 ]; do
    admission_attempt=$((admission_attempt + 1))
    nonce="fault-$fault-$at-$admission_attempt"
    prior=$(runtime_sha256 "$runtime/current/state.json")
    detail=$runtime/.fault-detail.$$.json
    jq -n --arg fault "$fault" --arg recovery "$recovery" --argjson at "$at" \
      '{fault_id:$fault,recovery:$recovery,at:$at,external_only:true}' >"$detail"
    detail_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$detail")
    unsigned=$runtime/.fault-unsigned.$$.json
    jq -n --arg fault "$fault" --arg recovery "$recovery" --arg nonce "$nonce" \
      --argjson at "$at" --arg prior "$prior" --arg detail_hash "$detail_hash" \
      '{schema_version:2,fault_id:$fault,recovery:$recovery,nonce:$nonce,at:$at,
        prior_state_hash:$prior,detail_hash:$detail_hash}' >"$unsigned"
    unsigned_hash=$(jq -Sc . "$unsigned" | runtime_sha256_stdin)
    artifact_source=$runtime/.fault-artifact.$$.json
    jq --arg hash "$unsigned_hash" '.+{unsigned_hash:$hash}' "$unsigned" >"$artifact_source"
    auth_tag=$(runtime_audit_auth_tag "$auth_file" "$artifact_source")
    jq --arg auth "$auth_tag" '.+{auth_tag:$auth}' "$artifact_source" >"$artifact_source.next"
    mv -f "$artifact_source.next" "$artifact_source"
    artifact=$(runtime_audit_seal "$runtime/audit/injections" "$artifact_source")
    artifact_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$artifact")
    payload=$runtime/.fault-payload.$$.json
    jq -n --arg fault "$fault" --arg recovery "$recovery" --arg nonce "$nonce" \
      --arg path "$artifact" --arg hash "$artifact_hash" --arg auth "$auth_tag" \
      '{fault_id:$fault,recovery:$recovery,nonce:$nonce,artifact_path:$path,
        artifact_hash:$hash,auth_tag:$auth}' >"$payload"
    if [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_INJECTION_FORCE_STALE_ONCE:-0}" = 1 ] &&
       [ "$admission_attempt" -eq 1 ]; then
      "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit soak injection_admission_probe \
        "injection-admission-probe:$fault:$at" --fingerprint "$prior"
      "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
    fi
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit soak fault_injected "fault:$fault" \
      --fingerprint "$artifact_hash" --payload-file "$payload"
    "$BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
    admission_event=$(find "$runtime/events" -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.json' -print |
      LC_ALL=C sort | while IFS= read -r candidate; do
        jq -e --arg nonce "$nonce" --arg hash "$artifact_hash" '
          .type=="fault_injected" and .payload.nonce==$nonce and
          .payload.artifact_hash==$hash' "$candidate" >/dev/null && {
            printf '%s\n' "$candidate"; break;
          }
      done)
    [ -n "$admission_event" ] || return 5
    admission_event_id=$(jq -er .sequence "$admission_event")
    admission_event_hash=$(jq -er .event_hash "$admission_event")
    if jq -e --arg fault "$fault" --arg event_hash "$admission_event_hash" \
      '.audit.faults[$fault].event_hash==$event_hash' \
      "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null; then
      admission_accepted=1
      rm -f "$detail" "$unsigned" "$artifact_source" "$payload"
      break
    fi
    jq -e --argjson event_id "$admission_event_id" --arg event_hash "$admission_event_hash" '
      any(.audit.injection_rejections[];
        .event_id==$event_id and .event_hash==$event_hash and
        .reason=="invalid_auth_replay_or_stale")' "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null ||
      return 5
    rm -f "$detail" "$unsigned" "$artifact_source" "$payload"
  done
  [ "$admission_accepted" -eq 1 ] || return 75
  # The authenticated pending fault must exist before the external mutation. This is
  # essential for signal wakes: the guardian opens its ticket before emitting wake_requested.
  external_operation "$runtime" "$project" "$fault" "$admission_event"
}
teardown_fixture() {
  runtime=$1 project=$2
  loop=$(jq -r .loop_id "$runtime/current/state.json")
  generation=$(jq -r .generation "$runtime/session.json")
  RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
  snapshots=$runtime/.teardown-actors.$$
  mkdir -p "$snapshots"
  FENCE_LOG=$runtime/.teardown-identities.$$.json; export FENCE_LOG
  printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$FENCE_LOG"
  topology=$runtime/soak-supervision-topology.json
  if [ -f "$topology" ] && [ ! -L "$topology" ] &&
     jq -e '.schema_version==2 and (.auth_tag|type=="string")' "$topology" >/dev/null; then
    runtime_audit_verify_auth "$runtime/audit-auth.key" "$topology" || return 5
    jq '[.actors[]|{pid,start_token}]' "$topology" >"$FENCE_LOG.topology"
    jq -s 'add|unique_by([.pid,.start_token])' "$FENCE_LOG" \
      "$FENCE_LOG.topology" >"$FENCE_LOG.next"
    mv -f "$FENCE_LOG.next" "$FENCE_LOG"; rm -f "$FENCE_LOG.topology"
    while IFS= read -r role; do
      jq -Sc --arg role "$role" '.actors[]|select(.role==$role)|
        .+{descendants:[]}' "$topology" >"$snapshots/actor-topology-$role.json"
    done < <(jq -r '.actors[].role' "$topology")
  fi
  for actor in "$runtime"/actor-*.json; do
    [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] || continue
    cp "$actor" "$snapshots/$(basename "$actor")"
    jq '[{pid:.pid,start_token:.start_token}]+(.descendants//[])' "$actor" >"$FENCE_LOG.actor"
    jq -s 'add|unique_by([.pid,.start_token])' "$FENCE_LOG" "$FENCE_LOG.actor" >"$FENCE_LOG.next"
    mv -f "$FENCE_LOG.next" "$FENCE_LOG"; rm -f "$FENCE_LOG.actor"
  done
  for owner in "$runtime/keeper.lock/owner.json" "$runtime/sentinel-heartbeat.json"; do
    [ -f "$owner" ] && [ ! -L "$owner" ] || continue
    jq '[{pid:.pid,start_token:.start_token}]' "$owner" >"$FENCE_LOG.owner"
    jq -s 'add|unique_by([.pid,.start_token])' "$FENCE_LOG" "$FENCE_LOG.owner" >"$FENCE_LOG.next"
    mv -f "$FENCE_LOG.next" "$FENCE_LOG"; rm -f "$FENCE_LOG.owner"
  done
  POLYLANE_TEST_MODE=1 "$BIN/polylane-finalizer.sh" emergency-cleanup \
    --project "$project" --loop-id "$loop" --generation "$generation"
  jq '.identities|map({pid,start_token})' \
    "$runtime/shutdown-identity-manifest.json" >"$FENCE_LOG.manifest"
  jq -s 'add|unique_by([.pid,.start_token])' "$FENCE_LOG" \
    "$FENCE_LOG.manifest" >"$FENCE_LOG.next"
  mv -f "$FENCE_LOG.next" "$FENCE_LOG"; rm -f "$FENCE_LOG.manifest"
  # Include an independently spawned finalizer (and any replacement generation) in the
  # exact identity set before claiming teardown absence.
  for actor in "$runtime"/actor-*.json; do
    [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] || continue
    jq '[{pid:.pid,start_token:.start_token}]+(.descendants//[])' "$actor" >"$FENCE_LOG.actor"
    jq -s 'add|unique_by([.pid,.start_token])' "$FENCE_LOG" "$FENCE_LOG.actor" >"$FENCE_LOG.next"
    mv -f "$FENCE_LOG.next" "$FENCE_LOG"; rm -f "$FENCE_LOG.actor"
  done
  for owner in "$runtime/keeper.lock/owner.json" "$runtime/sentinel-heartbeat.json"; do
    [ -f "$owner" ] && [ ! -L "$owner" ] || continue
    jq '[{pid:.pid,start_token:.start_token}]' "$owner" >"$FENCE_LOG.owner"
    jq -s 'add|unique_by([.pid,.start_token])' "$FENCE_LOG" "$FENCE_LOG.owner" >"$FENCE_LOG.next"
    mv -f "$FENCE_LOG.next" "$FENCE_LOG"; rm -f "$FENCE_LOG.owner"
  done
  jq '[.finalizer_handoff|{pid,start_token}]' \
    "$runtime/shutdown-identity-manifest.json" >"$FENCE_LOG.finalizer"
  jq -s 'add|unique_by([.pid,.start_token])' "$FENCE_LOG" \
    "$FENCE_LOG.finalizer" >"$FENCE_LOG.next"
  mv -f "$FENCE_LOG.next" "$FENCE_LOG"; rm -f "$FENCE_LOG.finalizer"
  union_index=0
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r union_pid union_token; do
    union_index=$((union_index + 1))
    jq -Scn --argjson pid "$union_pid" --arg start_token "$union_token" \
      --arg role "union-$union_index" \
      '{role:$role,pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,descendants:[]}' \
      >"$snapshots/actor-union-$union_index.json"
  done < <(jq -r '.[]|[.pid,.start_token]|@tsv' "$FENCE_LOG")
  for actor in "$snapshots"/actor-*.json; do
    [ -f "$actor" ] || continue
    fence_actor_file "$actor"
  done
  rm -rf "$snapshots"
  "$BIN/polylane-process.sh" verify-absent "$runtime"
  ! tmux has-session -t "polylane-$loop" 2>/dev/null || return 5
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r pid token; do
    ! identity_live "$pid" "$token" || return 75
  done < <(jq -r '.[]|[.pid,.start_token]|@tsv' "$FENCE_LOG")
  jq -n --slurpfile identities "$FENCE_LOG" \
    --slurpfile manifest "$runtime/shutdown-identity-manifest.json" \
    '{schema_version:1,
      fence_order:["STOP","SNAPSHOT_UNTIL_STABLE","CONT","TERM","WAIT","KILL","WAIT","VERIFY_ABSENT"],
      identities:$identities[0],finalizer_handoff:$manifest[0].finalizer_handoff,
      all_identities_absent:true,session_absent:true}' \
    >"$runtime/teardown-proof.json.tmp.$$"
  chmod 400 "$runtime/teardown-proof.json.tmp.$$"
  mv -f "$runtime/teardown-proof.json.tmp.$$" "$runtime/teardown-proof.json"
  rm -f "$FENCE_LOG"; unset FENCE_LOG
}
case ${1:-} in
  exec) mock_codex_cli "$@";;
  mock-external-actor) mock_external_actor;;
  fence-recorded-fixture) fence_recorded_fixture "$2" "$3";;
  start) start_fixture "$2" "$3";;
  worker-path) current_worker_actor "$2";;
  inject) inject_fault "$2" "$3" "$4" "$5" "$6";;
  teardown) teardown_fixture "$2" "$3";;
  *) exit 2;;
esac
~~~

Install the receipt-convergent final body for `core/scripts/lib/polylane-queue-reducer.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
polylane_queue_apply_event() {
  local state event output
  state=$1 event=$2 output=$3
  jq --slurpfile e "$event" '
    ($e[0]) as $x | ($x.payload) as $p |
    .queue=(.queue // {revision:0,provider_state:"available",items:[]}) |
    if $x.type=="queue_enqueue" then
      if any(.queue.items[]; .id==$p.id) then .
      else .queue.items += [$p + {created_sequence:$x.sequence}] | .queue.revision += 1 end
    elif $x.type=="queue_reserve" then
      if .queue.revision!=$p.expected_queue_revision then
        .queue.last_reservation_conflict={expected:$p.expected_queue_revision,actual:.queue.revision,
          event_sequence:$x.sequence}
      else reduce $p.reservations[] as $r (.;
        .queue.items |= map(if .id==$r.id then
          .status="starting" | .claim=$r.claim
        else . end)) | .queue.revision += 1 end
    elif $x.type=="queue_activate" then
      .queue.items |= map(if .id==$p.id and .status=="starting" and .claim.token==$p.token and
        .claim.guardian_pid==$p.guardian_pid and
        .claim.guardian_start_token==$p.guardian_start_token and
        .claim.guardian_generation==$p.guardian_generation then
        .status="running" | .claim.worker_pid=$p.worker_pid |
        .claim.worker_start_token=$p.worker_start_token | .claim.expires_at=$p.expires_at
      else . end) | .queue.revision += 1
    elif $x.type=="queue_renew" then
      .queue.items |= map(if .id==$p.id and .status=="running" and .claim.token==$p.token and
        .claim.worker_pid==$p.worker_pid and .claim.worker_start_token==$p.worker_start_token then
        .claim.proof_fingerprint=$p.proof_fingerprint | .claim.expires_at=$p.expires_at
      else . end) | .queue.revision += 1
    elif $x.type=="queue_complete" then
      .queue.items |= map(if .id==$p.id and .status=="running" and .claim.token==$p.token and
        .claim.worker_pid==$p.worker_pid and .claim.worker_start_token==$p.worker_start_token
        then .status="complete" else . end) |
      .queue.revision += 1
    elif $x.type=="queue_fail" then
      .queue.items |= map(if .id==$p.id and .status=="running" and .claim.token==$p.token and
        .claim.worker_pid==$p.worker_pid and .claim.worker_start_token==$p.worker_start_token and
        $p.strategy_hash!=.strategy_hash then
        .status="scheduled" | .claim=null | .last_error=$p.reason |
        .strategy_hash=$p.strategy_hash | .next_action_at=$p.retry_at | .attempt += 1
      else . end) | .queue.revision += 1
    elif $x.type=="queue_reclaim" then
      reduce $p.claims[] as $r (.;
        .queue.items |= map(if .id==$r.id and .claim.token==$r.token then
          .status="scheduled" | .claim=null | .last_error=$r.reason |
          .next_action_at=$p.requeue_at | .attempt += 1
        else . end)) | .queue.revision += 1
    elif $x.type=="queue_deadline_expired" then
      reduce $p.items[] as $r (.;
        .queue.items |= map(if .id==$r.id and (.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and
          .claim==null and .deadline_at==$r.previous_deadline_at and
          .deadline_at<$p.requeue_at then
          .status="scheduled" | .next_action_at=$p.requeue_at |
          .deadline_at=$p.next_deadline_at |
          .last_error={reason:$r.reason,expired_at:$r.previous_deadline_at,
            recovered_at:$p.requeue_at} | .attempt += 1
        else . end)) | .queue.revision += 1
    elif $x.type=="provider_state" then .queue.provider_state=$p.state | .queue.revision += 1
    else . end' "$state" >"$output"
}
~~~

Install the receipt-convergent final body for `core/scripts/polylane-worker.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
runtime=$1 item=$2 token=$3 expires=$4
SELF=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)
. "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
case $item in "$runtime"/worker-inputs/*.json) :;; *) exit 5;; esac
[ -f "$item" ] && [ ! -L "$item" ] || exit 5
mode=$(stat -f '%Lp' "$item" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$item")
input_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$item")
[ "$mode" = 400 ] && [ "$(basename "$item" .json)" = "${input_hash#sha256:}" ] || exit 5
pid=$$
start=$(runtime_start_token "$pid")
id=$(jq -r '.id' "$item")
"$SELF/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" activate "$id" "$token" "$pid" "$start" "$expires"
ack_deadline=$(( $(date +%s) + ${POLYLANE_ACTIVATION_ACK_TIMEOUT:-2} ))
until jq -e --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id and .status=="running" and .claim.token==$token)' \
  "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null; do
  [ "$(date +%s)" -lt "$ack_deadline" ] || exit 75
  sleep 0.05
done
export POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
kind=$(jq -er .kind "$item")
unset POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT POLYLANE_CLAIM_TOKEN POLYLANE_ATTEMPT POLYLANE_RUNNER_GENERATION
if [ "$kind" = cycle ]; then
  result_root=$runtime/cycle-results
  [ ! -L "$result_root" ] || exit 5
  mkdir -p "$result_root"; chmod 700 "$result_root"
  run_id=$(jq -er '.args.run_id|select(test("^[A-Za-z0-9._-]{1,128}$"))' "$item")
  printf '%s' "$token" | grep -Eq '^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$' || exit 5
  attempt=$(jq -er '.attempt|select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>=1)' "$item")
  runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/cycle-runner-generation.lock"
  runner_generation=$(( $(cat "$runtime/cycle-runner-generation" 2>/dev/null || printf 0) + 1 ))
  printf '%s\n' "$runner_generation" >"$runtime/cycle-runner-generation.next.$$"
  chmod 600 "$runtime/cycle-runner-generation.next.$$"
  mv "$runtime/cycle-runner-generation.next.$$" "$runtime/cycle-runner-generation"
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/cycle-runner-generation.lock"
  export POLYLANE_CLAIM_TOKEN=$token POLYLANE_ATTEMPT=$attempt POLYLANE_RUNNER_GENERATION=$runner_generation
  export POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT=$result_root/$run_id.$token.g$runner_generation.a$attempt.json
  owner=${POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT%.json}.owner.json
  owner_tmp=$result_root/.owner.$runner_generation.$attempt.$$
  jq -Scn --arg run "$run_id" --arg token "$token" \
    --argjson runner_generation "$runner_generation" --argjson attempt "$attempt" \
    '{attempt:$attempt,claim_token:$token,run_id:$run,runner_generation:$runner_generation}' >"$owner_tmp"
  chmod 400 "$owner_tmp"
  if ! ln "$owner_tmp" "$owner" 2>/dev/null; then
    [ -f "$owner" ] && [ ! -L "$owner" ] && [ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$owner" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$owner")" = 400 ] &&
      cmp -s "$owner_tmp" "$owner" || { rm -f "$owner_tmp"; exit 5; }
  fi
  rm -f "$owner_tmp"
  [ ! -e "$POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT" ] || {
    [ -f "$POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT" ] && [ ! -L "$POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT" ] || exit 5
    [ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT")" = 400 ] || exit 5
  }
fi
rc=0
"$SELF/polylane-dispatch.sh" "$item" "$token" & dispatch_pid=$!
dispatch_token=''
for ignored in 1 2 3 4 5; do
  dispatch_token=$(runtime_start_token "$dispatch_pid" || true); [ -z "$dispatch_token" ] || break; sleep 0.02
done
[ -n "$dispatch_token" ] || { wait "$dispatch_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 75; }
renew_every=${POLYLANE_WORKER_RENEW_INTERVAL:-20}; case $renew_every in ''|*[!0-9]*) exit 2;; esac
[ "$renew_every" -ge 5 ] && [ "$renew_every" -le 30 ] || exit 2
next_renew=$(( $(runtime_now) + renew_every )); renewal=0
eof_deadline=$(jq -er '.deadline_at|select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>0)' "$item")
while [ "$(runtime_start_token "$dispatch_pid" || true)" = "$dispatch_token" ]; do
  now=$(runtime_now)
  if [ "$now" -ge "$next_renew" ]; then
    if [ "$now" -ge "$eof_deadline" ]; then
      [ "$(runtime_start_token "$dispatch_pid" || true)" != "$dispatch_token" ] || kill -TERM "$dispatch_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
      sleep 0.1
      [ "$(runtime_start_token "$dispatch_pid" || true)" != "$dispatch_token" ] || kill -KILL "$dispatch_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
      wait "$dispatch_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 75
    fi
    renewal=$((renewal + 1)); observation=$runtime/worker-renewal.$$.json
    ps_row=$(ps -o stat=,time= -p "$dispatch_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)
    jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" --arg child_start "$dispatch_token" \
      --arg observation "$ps_row" --argjson child_pid "$dispatch_pid" --argjson renewal "$renewal" \
      --argjson runtime_revision "$(jq -r .revision "$runtime/current/state.json")" \
      '{id:$id,claim_token:$token,child:{pid:$child_pid,start_token:$child_start,observation:$observation},
        renewal:$renewal,runtime_revision:$runtime_revision}' >"$observation"
    proof=$(runtime_sha256 "$observation"); rm -f "$observation"
    new_expiry=$((now + 90)); [ "$new_expiry" -le "$eof_deadline" ] || new_expiry=$eof_deadline
    "$SELF/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" renew-claim "$id" "$token" "$pid" "$start" \
      "$proof" "$new_expiry"
    next_renew=$((now + renew_every))
  fi
  sleep 2
done
set +e; wait "$dispatch_pid"; rc=$?; set -e
if [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ "$kind" = cycle ]; then
  "$SELF/polylane-cycle-result.sh" publish "$runtime" "$item" "$token" "$pid" "$start" \
    "$POLYLANE_CYCLE_RESULT_RECEIPT" || rc=$?
fi
if [ "$rc" -eq 0 ]; then
  "$SELF/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" complete "$id" "$token" "$pid" "$start"
else
  strategy=$(printf '%s:%s:%s:%s' "$(jq -r .strategy_hash "$item")" "$rc" \
    "$(jq -r .attempt "$item")" "$id" | runtime_sha256_stdin)
  retry_at=$(( $(runtime_now) + 5 ))
  [ "$retry_at" -le "$eof_deadline" ] || retry_at=$eof_deadline
  "$SELF/polylane-queue.sh" --dir "$runtime" fail "$id" "$token" "$pid" "$start" \
    "handler_exit_$rc" "$strategy" "$retry_at"
  exit "$rc"
fi
"$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" wake
~~~

Install the receipt-convergent final body for `core/scripts/polylane-keeper.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
BIN=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-hooks.sh"
atomic_json() { destination=$1 source=$2; jq -e . "$source" >/dev/null; chmod 600 "$source"; mv -f "$source" "$destination"; }
identity_live() {
  file=$1; [ -f "$file" ] || return 1
  pid=$(jq -r '.pid // 0' "$file"); token=$(jq -r '.start_token // ""' "$file")
  [ -n "$token" ] && [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" = "$token" ]
}
heartbeat_fresh() {
  file=$1 limit=$2; identity_live "$file" || return 1
  heartbeat=$(jq -r '.heartbeat_at // 0' "$file"); now=$(runtime_now)
  [ $((now - heartbeat)) -le "$limit" ]
}
mode=${1:-}; [ -n "$mode" ] || exit 2; shift
project='' loop='' sentinel_launch='' keeper_launch='' generation='' nonce=''
runtime='' requested_now=''
while [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; do case $1 in --project) project=$(cd "$2" && pwd -P); shift 2;;
  --loop-id) loop=$2; shift 2;; --sentinel-launch) sentinel_launch=$2; shift 2;;
  --keeper-launch) keeper_launch=$2; shift 2;; --generation) generation=$2; shift 2;;
  --nonce) nonce=$2; shift 2;; --runtime) runtime=$2; shift 2;;
  --now) requested_now=$(runtime_test_now_arg --now "$2") || exit 2; shift 2;;
  *) exit 2;; esac; done
if [ "$mode" = check-once ]; then
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] || exit 2
  runtime=$(cd "$runtime" && pwd -P) || exit 5
  owner=$runtime/keeper.lock/owner.json
  [ -f "$owner" ] && [ ! -L "$owner" ] || exit 5
  jq -e '(keys|sort)==["generation","heartbeat_at","loop_id","nonce","pid","project","start_token"] and
    (.generation|type=="number" and .>0 and floor==.) and
    (.pid|type=="number" and .>0) and (.start_token|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.nonce|type=="string" and length>0)' "$owner" >/dev/null || exit 5
  project=$(cd "$(jq -er .project "$owner")" && pwd -P) || exit 5
  [ "$runtime" = "$project/.polylane/runtime" ] || exit 5
  loop=$(jq -er .loop_id "$owner"); generation=$(jq -er .generation "$owner")
  nonce=$(jq -er .nonce "$owner")
  sentinel_launch=$runtime/sentinel-launch.json; keeper_launch=$runtime/keeper-launch.json
else
  [ -n "$project" ] && [ -n "$loop" ] || exit 2
  runtime=$project/.polylane/runtime
  [ -z "$requested_now" ] || exit 2
fi
RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
lock=$runtime/keeper.lock
write_heartbeat() {
  expected_pid=$1 expected_nonce=$2
  owner=$lock/owner.json; current_nonce=$(jq -r .nonce "$owner" 2>/dev/null || true)
  owner_pid=$(jq -r '.pid//0' "$owner" 2>/dev/null || true)
  owner_token=$(jq -r '.start_token//""' "$owner" 2>/dev/null || true)
  [ "$current_nonce" = "$expected_nonce" ] && [ "$owner_pid" = "$expected_pid" ] &&
    [ "$(jq -r .generation "$owner")" = "$generation" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_start_token "$owner_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)" = "$owner_token" ] || return 6
  temporary=$lock/.owner.$$
  jq --argjson heartbeat_at "$(runtime_now)" '.heartbeat_at=$heartbeat_at' "$owner" >"$temporary"
  atomic_json "$owner" "$temporary"
}
ensure_finalizer() {
  state=$runtime/current/state.json; token=$(jq -r '.shutdown.token // ""' "$state")
  [ -n "$token" ] || return 75
  actor=$runtime/actor-finalizer.json
  identity_live "$actor" && return 0
  [ ! -f "$actor" ] || "$BIN/polylane-process.sh" adopt-or-fence "$runtime" finalizer shutdown
  child=$("$BIN/polylane-detach.py" --log "$runtime/finalizer.log" -- \
    "$BIN/polylane-finalizer.sh" run --runtime "$runtime" --shutdown-token "$token" \
    --keeper-launch "$keeper_launch")
  child_token=''; for ignored in 1 2 3 4 5; do child_token=$(runtime_start_token "$child" || true); [ -z "$child_token" ] || break; sleep 0.02; done
  [ -n "$child_token" ] || return 75
  [ "$(ps -o ppid= -p "$child" | tr -d ' ')" != "$$" ] || return 75
  temporary=$runtime/.actor-finalizer.$$
  jq -n --argjson pid "$child" --arg start_token "$child_token" --arg generation_token "finalizer-$token" \
    '{actor:"finalizer",pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,generation_token:$generation_token,
      lease_valid:true,descendants:[]}' >"$temporary"
  atomic_json "$actor" "$temporary"
}
keeper_check_once() {
  owner_pid=$1 owner_nonce=$2
  write_heartbeat "$owner_pid" "$owner_nonce"
  stage=$(jq -r '.shutdown.stage // ""' "$runtime/current/state.json")
  terminal=$(jq -r '.terminal // ""' "$runtime/current/state.json")
  case $stage in SESSION_CLOSED|TEARDOWN_COMPLETE) :;; *)
    if [ ! -e "$runtime/disable-restart" ] &&
       jq -e '.active==true' "$runtime/session.json" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      "$BIN/polylane-session.sh" bootstrap "$project" "$loop" "keeper-$generation" \
        "$sentinel_launch" "$keeper_launch"
    fi;;
  esac
  [ "$terminal" != COMPLETE ] || ensure_finalizer
  [ "$stage" != TEARDOWN_COMPLETE ] || return 20
}
case $mode in
  start)
    runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/keeper-election.lock"
    # Logical event-horizon jumps can make a healthy heartbeat look old in one
    # instant. Exact live ownership is authoritative for singleton election;
    # check-once can still drive the owned keeper without spawning an overlap.
    if identity_live "$lock/owner.json"; then
      runtime_lock_release "$runtime/keeper-election.lock"; exit 0
    fi
    [ ! -d "$lock" ] || { stale=$runtime/keeper.stale.$$; mv "$lock" "$stale"; rm -rf "$stale"; }
    generation=$(( $(cat "$runtime/keeper-generation" 2>/dev/null || printf 0) + 1 ))
    printf '%s\n' "$generation" >"$runtime/keeper-generation"
    nonce="keeper-$generation-$$-$(runtime_wall_now)-${RANDOM:-0}"
    mkdir "$lock"
    nohup "$0" run --project "$project" --loop-id "$loop" --sentinel-launch "$sentinel_launch" \
      --keeper-launch "$keeper_launch" --generation "$generation" --nonce "$nonce" \
      </dev/null >>"$runtime/keeper.log" 2>&1 & child=$!
    child_token=''; for ignored in 1 2 3 4 5; do child_token=$(runtime_start_token "$child" || true); [ -z "$child_token" ] || break; sleep 0.02; done
    [ -n "$child_token" ] || { rm -rf "$lock"; runtime_lock_release "$runtime/keeper-election.lock"; exit 75; }
    temporary=$lock/.owner.$$
    jq -n --argjson pid "$child" --arg start_token "$child_token" --argjson generation "$generation" \
      --arg project "$project" --arg loop "$loop" --arg nonce "$nonce" --argjson heartbeat_at "$(runtime_now)" \
      '{pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,generation:$generation,project:$project,loop_id:$loop,
        nonce:$nonce,heartbeat_at:$heartbeat_at}' >"$temporary"
    atomic_json "$lock/owner.json" "$temporary"
    runtime_lock_release "$runtime/keeper-election.lock"
    ;;
  run)
    trap 'exit 0' INT TERM
    deadline=$(( $(runtime_wall_now) + 2 ))
    until [ -f "$lock/owner.json" ] && [ "$(jq -r .pid "$lock/owner.json")" = "$$" ] &&
      [ "$(jq -r .nonce "$lock/owner.json")" = "$nonce" ]; do
      [ "$(runtime_wall_now)" -lt "$deadline" ] || exit 75; sleep 0.02
    done
    while :; do
      rc=0; keeper_check_once "$$" "$nonce" || rc=$?
      if [ "$rc" -eq 20 ]; then
        runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/keeper-election.lock"
        [ "$(jq -r .nonce "$lock/owner.json" 2>/dev/null || true)" != "$nonce" ] || rm -rf "$lock"
        runtime_lock_release "$runtime/keeper-election.lock"
        exit 0
      fi
      [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || exit "$rc"
      sleep 5
    done
    ;;
  check-once)
    [ -z "$requested_now" ] || [ "$(runtime_now)" = "$requested_now" ] || exit 5
    owner_pid=$(jq -er .pid "$lock/owner.json")
    rc=0; keeper_check_once "$owner_pid" "$nonce" || rc=$?
    [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || [ "$rc" -eq 20 ] || exit "$rc"
    ;;
  *) exit 2 ;;
esac
~~~

Install the receipt-convergent final body for `core/scripts/polylane-recovery.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
SELF=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd -P)
. "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
. "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-hooks.sh"
. "$SELF/lib/polylane-runtime-retention.sh"
sha_stream() {
  if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then sha256sum | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'
  else shasum -a 256 | awk '{print "sha256:"$1}'; fi
}
kind_is_tactic() {
  case $1 in checkpoint|retry|reflection_repair|alternate_model|recarve|alternate_approach|provider_probe) return 0;; *) return 1;; esac
}
contract_kind() {
  case $1 in
    checkpoint|retry|reflection_repair|alternate_model|recarve|alternate_approach|\
    local_test|static_analysis|diff_review|merge_prepare|prompt_prepare|documentation|\
    cleanup|state_reconcile|session_recover) return 0;; *) return 5;; esac
}
run_registered_check() {
  project=$1 goal=$2 check_id=$3 output=$4
  spec=$output.argv.json
  jq -e --arg id "$check_id" '.frozen_checks[$id].argv as $argv |
    ($argv|type=="array" and length>0) and all($argv[];type=="string" and length>0) and
    ($argv[0]|startswith("/"))' "$goal" >/dev/null || return 5
  jq --arg id "$check_id" '.frozen_checks[$id].argv' "$goal" >"$spec"
  argv=()
  while IFS= read -r -d '' value; do argv[${#argv[@]}]=$value; done \
    < <(jq -j '.[] | ., "\u0000"' "$spec")
  executable=${argv[0]}; [ ! -L "$executable" ] || return 5
  canonical=$(cd "$(dirname "$executable")" && pwd -P)/$(basename "$executable")
  [ "$canonical" = "$executable" ] && [ -x "$canonical" ] || return 5
  (cd "$project" && "${argv[@]}") >"$output" 2>&1
}
capture_replay_observation() {
  local runtime replay_state output checkpoint cursor_before base cursor_after
  local application_count replayed_event_id replayed_event_hash replayed candidate
  runtime=$1 replay_state=$2 output=$3
  RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
  checkpoint=$(runtime_latest_checkpoint)
  if [ -n "$checkpoint" ]; then
    cursor_before=$(jq -er '.state.last_event_sequence|
      select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0)' "$checkpoint") || return 5
  else
    base=$runtime/snapshots/1/state.json
    [ -f "$base" ] && [ ! -L "$base" ] || return 5
    cursor_before=$(jq -er '.last_event_sequence|
      select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0)' "$base") || return 5
  fi
  cursor_after=$(jq -er '.last_event_sequence|
    select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0)' "$replay_state") || return 5
  [ "$cursor_after" -ge "$cursor_before" ] || return 5
  application_count=$((cursor_after - cursor_before))
  replayed_event_id=null; replayed_event_hash=null
  if [ "$application_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    replayed_event_id=$cursor_after; replayed=''
    for candidate in "$runtime"/events/*.json; do
      [ -f "$candidate" ] || continue
      [ "$(jq -r .sequence "$candidate")" = "$replayed_event_id" ] || continue
      [ -z "$replayed" ] || return 5; replayed=$candidate
    done
    [ -n "$replayed" ] || return 5
    replayed_event_hash=$(jq -er '.event_hash|
      select(test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$replayed") || return 5
  fi
  jq -n --argjson application_count "$application_count" \
    --argjson cursor_before "$cursor_before" --argjson cursor_after "$cursor_after" \
    --argjson replayed_event_id "$replayed_event_id" \
    --argjson replayed_event_hash \
      "$(printf '%s\n' "$replayed_event_hash" | jq -R 'if .=="null" then null else . end')" \
    '{application_count:$application_count,cursor_before:$cursor_before,
      cursor_after:$cursor_after,replayed_event_id:$replayed_event_id,
      replayed_event_hash:$replayed_event_hash}' >"$output"
}
publish_action() {
  runtime=$1 item=$2 artifact=$3 ticket=${4:-}
  id=$(jq -r .id "$item"); kind=$(jq -r .kind "$item")
  hash=$(sha_stream <"$artifact")
  for prior in "$runtime"/events/*.json; do
    [ -f "$prior" ] || continue
    jq -e --arg id "$id" --arg hash "$hash" '
      .type=="recovery_action" and .action_id==$id and .payload.evidence_hash==$hash' "$prior" >/dev/null && return 0
  done
  payload=$runtime/recovery-action.$$.json
  jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg kind "$kind" --arg hash "$hash" --arg artifact "$artifact" \
    '{id:$id,kind:$kind,artifact:$artifact,evidence_hash:$hash}' >"$payload"
  outputs=$runtime/recovery-outputs.$$.json
  printf '%s\n' '{}' >"$outputs"
  if [ -n "$ticket" ]; then
    claim_token=$(jq -er '.claim_token|select(type=="string" and length>0)' "$ticket") ||
      return 5
    jq --arg token "$claim_token" '.+{token:$token}' "$payload" >"$payload.next"
    mv -f "$payload.next" "$payload"
    case $(jq -r .recovery "$ticket") in
      checkpoint_retry)
        jq -n --slurpfile artifact "$artifact" '{checkpoint_recovery:$artifact[0]}' >"$outputs";;
      proof_lease_expiry)
        jq -n --arg action_id "$id" --arg proof_hash "$hash" \
          '{lease_after:{action_id:$action_id,proof_hash:$proof_hash}}' >"$outputs";;
      event_replay|boundary_reconcile)
        jq -e '.replay_observation|type=="object"' "$artifact" >/dev/null || return 5
        jq -n --slurpfile artifact "$artifact" \
          '{replay_observation:$artifact[0].replay_observation}' >"$outputs";;
      *) return 5;;
    esac
  fi
  audit_handler_publish "$runtime" "$ticket" recovery recovery_action "$id" \
    "$payload" "$outputs" "$hash" || {
    rc=$?; rm -f "$payload" "$outputs"; return "$rc"; }
  rm -f "$payload" "$outputs"
}
enqueue_changed_successor() {
  runtime=$1 item=$2; queue=$SELF/polylane-queue.sh
  source_id=$(jq -r .id "$item"); goal_ref=$(jq -r .goal_ref "$item")
  generation=$(( $(jq -r '.args.strategy_generation // 0' "$item") + 1 ))
  strategy=$(jq -Sc --arg source "$source_id" --argjson generation "$generation" \
    '{source_item:$source,reconcile_generation:$generation}' | sha_stream)
  successor="reconcile-$generation-${strategy#sha256:}"; successor=$(printf '%s' "$successor" | cut -c1-100)
  file=$runtime/successor.$$.json
  jq -n --arg id "$successor" --arg goal "$goal_ref" --arg strategy "$strategy" \
    --argjson generation "$generation" --argjson now "$(runtime_now)" \
    '{schema_version:1,id:$id,kind:"state_reconcile",mode:"offline",status:"ready",priority:100,
      goal_ref:$goal,args:{goal_ref:$goal,reconcile_generation:$generation},depends_on:[],
      next_action_at:$now,deadline_at:($now+300),attempt:1,strategy_hash:$strategy,
      ownership_globs:[],resource_locks:["runtime:reducer"],claim:null,last_error:null}' >"$file"
  "$queue" --dir "$runtime" enqueue "$file"
  rm -f "$file"; POLYLANE_SUCCESSOR_ID=$successor; POLYLANE_SUCCESSOR_STRATEGY=$strategy
}
validate_lane_frozen_binding() {
  local runtime binding state item_id proof reclaim completion result result_event result_owner
  runtime=$1 binding=$2; state=$runtime/current/state.json
  jq -e '
    (keys|sort)==(["head","lane_frozen","state_hash","status","status_hash"]|sort) and
    .status=="checkpointed" and
    (.lane_frozen|keys|sort)==(["completion_event","item_id","old_worker",
      "replacement","result","stop_proof"]|sort) and
    .lane_frozen.old_worker.attempt>=1 and
    .lane_frozen.replacement.attempt==(.lane_frozen.old_worker.attempt+1) and
    .lane_frozen.replacement.status=="complete" and
    .lane_frozen.old_worker.claim_token!=.lane_frozen.replacement.claim_token and
    ((.lane_frozen.old_worker.pid!=.lane_frozen.replacement.pid) or
      (.lane_frozen.old_worker.start_token!=.lane_frozen.replacement.start_token))' \
    "$binding" >/dev/null || return 5
  item_id=$(jq -er .lane_frozen.item_id "$binding")
  proof=$(jq -er .lane_frozen.stop_proof.path "$binding")
  case $proof in "$runtime"/soak-external/lane-frozen-worker-frozen.json) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  [ -f "$proof" ] && [ ! -L "$proof" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$proof")" = "$(jq -r .lane_frozen.stop_proof.hash "$binding")" ] || return 5
  jq -e --arg id "$item_id" --slurpfile binding "$binding" '
    .item_id==$id and .pid==$binding[0].lane_frozen.old_worker.pid and
    .start_token==$binding[0].lane_frozen.old_worker.start_token and
    .claim_token==$binding[0].lane_frozen.old_worker.claim_token and
    .attempt==$binding[0].lane_frozen.old_worker.attempt' "$proof" >/dev/null || return 5
  reclaim=$(jq -er .lane_frozen.old_worker.reclaim_event.path "$binding")
  case $reclaim in "$runtime"/events/*.json) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  [ -f "$reclaim" ] && [ ! -L "$reclaim" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$reclaim")" = "$(jq -r .lane_frozen.old_worker.reclaim_event.file_hash "$binding")" ] || return 5
  jq -e --arg id "$item_id" --slurpfile binding "$binding" '
    .type=="queue_reclaim" and
    .event_hash==$binding[0].lane_frozen.old_worker.reclaim_event.event_hash and
    .sequence==$binding[0].lane_frozen.old_worker.reclaim_event.event_id and
    any(.payload.claims[];.id==$id and .reason=="claim_stopped" and
      .token==$binding[0].lane_frozen.old_worker.claim_token)' "$reclaim" >/dev/null || return 5
  completion=$(jq -er .lane_frozen.completion_event.path "$binding")
  case $completion in "$runtime"/events/*.json) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  [ -f "$completion" ] && [ ! -L "$completion" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$completion")" = "$(jq -r .lane_frozen.completion_event.file_hash "$binding")" ] || return 5
  jq -e --arg id "$item_id" --slurpfile binding "$binding" '
    .type=="queue_complete" and .payload.id==$id and
    .event_hash==$binding[0].lane_frozen.completion_event.event_hash and
    .sequence==$binding[0].lane_frozen.completion_event.event_id and
    .payload.token==$binding[0].lane_frozen.replacement.claim_token and
    .payload.worker_pid==$binding[0].lane_frozen.replacement.pid and
    .payload.worker_start_token==$binding[0].lane_frozen.replacement.start_token' \
    "$completion" >/dev/null || return 5
  jq -e --arg id "$item_id" --slurpfile binding "$binding" '
    .queue.items[]|select(.id==$id) |
    .status==$binding[0].lane_frozen.replacement.status and
    .attempt==$binding[0].lane_frozen.replacement.attempt and
    .last_error=="claim_stopped" and
    .claim.token==$binding[0].lane_frozen.replacement.claim_token and
    .claim.worker_pid==$binding[0].lane_frozen.replacement.pid and
    .claim.worker_start_token==$binding[0].lane_frozen.replacement.start_token' \
    "$state" >/dev/null || return 5
  result=$(jq -er .lane_frozen.result.path "$binding")
  case $result in "$runtime"/cycle-results/*.json) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  [ -f "$result" ] && [ ! -L "$result" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$result")" = "$(jq -r .lane_frozen.result.hash "$binding")" ] || return 5
  jq -e --arg id "$item_id" '.schema_version==2 and .run_id==$id and
    .outcome=="RECOVERY_REQUIRED"' "$result" >/dev/null || return 5
  result_event=$(jq -er .lane_frozen.result.event.path "$binding")
  case $result_event in "$runtime"/events/*.json) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  [ -f "$result_event" ] && [ ! -L "$result_event" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$result_event")" = \
      "$(jq -r .lane_frozen.result.event.file_hash "$binding")" ] || return 5
  jq -e --arg id "$item_id" --slurpfile binding "$binding" '
    .type=="cycle_result" and .payload.item_id==$id and
    .payload.claim_token==$binding[0].lane_frozen.replacement.claim_token and
    .payload.result_path==$binding[0].lane_frozen.result.path and
    .payload.result_hash==$binding[0].lane_frozen.result.hash and
    .payload.runner.generation==$binding[0].lane_frozen.result.runner_generation and
    .payload.runner.attempt==$binding[0].lane_frozen.replacement.attempt and
    .payload.runner.pid==$binding[0].lane_frozen.replacement.pid and
    .payload.runner.start_token==$binding[0].lane_frozen.replacement.start_token and
    .sequence==$binding[0].lane_frozen.result.event.event_id and
    .event_hash==$binding[0].lane_frozen.result.event.event_hash' \
    "$result_event" >/dev/null || return 5
  result_owner=$(jq -er .lane_frozen.result.owner_path "$binding")
  case $result_owner in "$runtime"/cycle-results/*.owner.json) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  [ -f "$result_owner" ] && [ ! -L "$result_owner" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$result_owner")" = \
      "$(jq -r .lane_frozen.result.owner_hash "$binding")" ] || return 5
  jq -e --arg run "$item_id" --slurpfile binding "$binding" '
    (keys|sort)==["attempt","claim_token","run_id","runner_generation"] and
    .run_id==$run and
    .claim_token==$binding[0].lane_frozen.replacement.claim_token and
    .attempt==$binding[0].lane_frozen.replacement.attempt and
    .runner_generation==$binding[0].lane_frozen.result.runner_generation' \
    "$result_owner" >/dev/null || return 5
}
lane_frozen_checkpoint_artifact() {
  local runtime item output item_id proof proof_hash old_token old_attempt
  local reclaim completion state replacement_token replacement_pid replacement_start
  local replacement_attempt result result_event owner_result runner_generation
  local head state_hash status_hash matches candidate
  runtime=$1 item=$2 output=$3; state=$runtime/current/state.json
  item_id=$(jq -er '.args.actor|select(test("^lane-frozen-gated-[0-9]+$"))' "$item")
  proof=$(jq -er '.args.frozen_proof|select(type=="string" and startswith("/"))' "$item")
  proof_hash=$(jq -er '.args.frozen_proof_hash|select(test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$item")
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$proof")" = "$proof_hash" ] || return 5
  old_token=$(jq -er .claim_token "$proof"); old_attempt=$(jq -er .attempt "$proof")
  replacement_token=$(jq -er --arg id "$item_id" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id and
    .status=="complete" and .last_error=="claim_stopped")|.claim.token' "$state")
  replacement_pid=$(jq -er --arg id "$item_id" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)|.claim.worker_pid' "$state")
  replacement_start=$(jq -er --arg id "$item_id" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)|.claim.worker_start_token' "$state")
  replacement_attempt=$(jq -er --arg id "$item_id" '.queue.items[]|select(.id==$id)|.attempt' "$state")
  reclaim=''; completion=''; result_event=''
  for candidate in "$runtime"/events/*.json; do
    [ -f "$candidate" ] || continue
    if jq -e --arg id "$item_id" --arg token "$old_token" '
      .type=="queue_reclaim" and any(.payload.claims[];
        .id==$id and .token==$token and .reason=="claim_stopped")' "$candidate" >/dev/null; then
      [ -z "$reclaim" ] || return 5; reclaim=$candidate
    fi
    if jq -e --arg id "$item_id" --arg token "$replacement_token" '
      .type=="queue_complete" and .payload.id==$id and .payload.token==$token' \
      "$candidate" >/dev/null; then
      [ -z "$completion" ] || return 5; completion=$candidate
    fi
    if jq -e --arg id "$item_id" --arg token "$replacement_token" '
      .type=="cycle_result" and .payload.item_id==$id and
      .payload.claim_token==$token' "$candidate" >/dev/null; then
      [ -z "$result_event" ] || return 5; result_event=$candidate
    fi
  done
  [ -n "$reclaim" ] && [ -n "$completion" ] && [ -n "$result_event" ] || return 5
  result=$(jq -er .payload.result_path "$result_event")
  [ -f "$result" ] && [ ! -L "$result" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$result")" = "$(jq -r .payload.result_hash "$result_event")" ] &&
    jq -e --arg run "$item_id" '.schema_version==2 and .run_id==$run and
      .outcome=="RECOVERY_REQUIRED"' "$result" >/dev/null || return 5
  runner_generation=$(jq -er .payload.runner.generation "$result_event")
  jq -e --argjson attempt "$replacement_attempt" --argjson pid "$replacement_pid" \
    --arg start "$replacement_start" '.payload.runner.attempt==$attempt and
      .payload.runner.pid==$pid and .payload.runner.start_token==$start' \
    "$result_event" >/dev/null || return 5
  owner_result=$runtime/cycle-results/$item_id.$replacement_token.g$runner_generation.a$replacement_attempt.owner.json
  [ -f "$owner_result" ] && [ ! -L "$owner_result" ] &&
    jq -e --arg run "$item_id" --arg token "$replacement_token" \
      --argjson attempt "$replacement_attempt" --argjson generation "$runner_generation" '
      (keys|sort)==["attempt","claim_token","run_id","runner_generation"] and
      .run_id==$run and .claim_token==$token and .attempt==$attempt and
      .runner_generation==$generation' "$owner_result" >/dev/null || return 5
  head=$(git -C "$(jq -r .project_root "$state")" rev-parse HEAD)
  state_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$state")
  status_hash=$(git -C "$(jq -r .project_root "$state")" status --porcelain=v1 | sha_stream)
  jq -Scn --arg head "$head" --arg state_hash "$state_hash" --arg status_hash "$status_hash" \
    --arg item_id "$item_id" --arg proof "$proof" --arg proof_hash "$proof_hash" \
    --argjson old_pid "$(jq -r .pid "$proof")" --arg old_start "$(jq -r .start_token "$proof")" \
    --arg old_token "$old_token" --argjson old_attempt "$old_attempt" \
    --arg reclaim "$reclaim" --arg reclaim_file_hash "$(runtime_sha256 "$reclaim")" \
    --arg reclaim_event_hash "$(jq -r .event_hash "$reclaim")" \
    --argjson reclaim_event_id "$(jq -r .sequence "$reclaim")" \
    --arg replacement_token "$replacement_token" --argjson replacement_pid "$replacement_pid" \
    --arg replacement_start "$replacement_start" --argjson replacement_attempt "$replacement_attempt" \
    --arg completion "$completion" --arg completion_file_hash "$(runtime_sha256 "$completion")" \
    --arg completion_event_hash "$(jq -r .event_hash "$completion")" \
    --argjson completion_event_id "$(jq -r .sequence "$completion")" \
    --arg result "$result" --arg result_hash "$(runtime_sha256 "$result")" \
    --arg result_event "$result_event" --arg result_event_file_hash "$(runtime_sha256 "$result_event")" \
    --arg result_event_hash "$(jq -r .event_hash "$result_event")" \
    --argjson result_event_id "$(jq -r .sequence "$result_event")" \
    --arg owner_result "$owner_result" --arg owner_result_hash "$(runtime_sha256 "$owner_result")" \
    --argjson runner_generation "$runner_generation" '
      {status:"checkpointed",head:$head,state_hash:$state_hash,status_hash:$status_hash,
       lane_frozen:{item_id:$item_id,
        stop_proof:{path:$proof,hash:$proof_hash},
        old_worker:{pid:$old_pid,start_token:$old_start,claim_token:$old_token,
          attempt:$old_attempt,reclaim_event:{path:$reclaim,file_hash:$reclaim_file_hash,
            event_id:$reclaim_event_id,event_hash:$reclaim_event_hash}},
        replacement:{pid:$replacement_pid,start_token:$replacement_start,
          claim_token:$replacement_token,attempt:$replacement_attempt,status:"complete"},
        completion_event:{path:$completion,file_hash:$completion_file_hash,
          event_id:$completion_event_id,event_hash:$completion_event_hash},
        result:{path:$result,hash:$result_hash,owner_path:$owner_result,
          owner_hash:$owner_result_hash,runner_generation:$runner_generation,
          event:{path:$result_event,file_hash:$result_event_file_hash,
            event_id:$result_event_id,event_hash:$result_event_hash}}}}' >"$output"
  validate_lane_frozen_binding "$runtime" "$output"
}
if [ "${POLYLANE_RECOVERY_SOURCE_ONLY:-0}" = 1 ]; then
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] || return 5 2>/dev/null || exit 5
  return 0 2>/dev/null || exit 0
fi
case ${1:-} in
  validate-lane-frozen)
    [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] || exit 2
    runtime=$2; binding=$3; RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime; export RUNTIME_DIR
    validate_lane_frozen_binding "$runtime" "$binding" ;;
  route)
    reason=$2 actor=$3 context=$4
    runtime=${POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR:?}
    RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime; export RUNTIME_DIR
    queue=$SELF/polylane-queue.sh
    "$queue" --dir "$runtime" dump >"$runtime/recovery-queue.$$.json"
    initial=$(jq -r '.strategy_generation // 0' "$context")
    generation=$(jq --arg actor "$actor" --arg reason "$reason" --argjson initial "$initial" '
      [.items[]|select(.args.actor==$actor and .args.reason==$reason)|.args.strategy_generation]|
      max // $initial' "$runtime/recovery-queue.$$.json")
    used=$(jq --arg actor "$actor" --arg reason "$reason" --argjson generation "$generation" '
      [.items[]|select(.args.actor==$actor and .args.reason==$reason and
        .args.strategy_generation==$generation and
        (.kind|IN("checkpoint","retry","reflection_repair","alternate_model","recarve","alternate_approach","provider_probe")))]|length' \
      "$runtime/recovery-queue.$$.json")
    if [ "$used" -ge 7 ]; then
      generation=$((generation + 1)); tactic=state_reconcile
    else
      case $used in 0) tactic=checkpoint;; 1) tactic=retry;; 2) tactic=reflection_repair;;
        3) tactic=alternate_model;; 4) tactic=recarve;; 5) tactic=alternate_approach;; 6) tactic=provider_probe;; esac
    fi
    mode=offline; [ "$tactic" != provider_probe ] || mode=probe
    now=$(runtime_now); delay=0
    if [ "$tactic" = provider_probe ]; then
      probes=$(jq '[.items[]|select(.kind=="provider_probe")]|length' "$runtime/recovery-queue.$$.json")
      index=$((probes + 1)); [ "$index" -gt 7 ] && index=7
      case $index in 1) delay=5;; 2) delay=10;; 3) delay=20;; 4) delay=40;;
        5) delay=80;; 6) delay=160;; 7) delay=300;; esac
    fi
    base_strategy=$(jq -r .strategy_hash "$context")
    strategy=$(jq -Sc --arg base "$base_strategy" --arg tactic "$tactic" --argjson generation "$generation" \
      '. + {base_strategy:$base,tactic:$tactic,strategy_generation:$generation}' "$context" | sha_stream)
    short=$(printf '%s' "${strategy#sha256:}" | cut -c1-16)
    id="$actor-$generation-$tactic-$short"
    jq -n --arg id "$id" --arg kind "$tactic" --arg mode "$mode" --arg actor "$actor" \
      --arg reason "$reason" --argjson generation "$generation" --argjson next "$((now + delay))" \
      --arg goal "$(jq -r '.goal_ref' "$context")" --arg strategy "$strategy" --arg base "$base_strategy" \
      --argjson globs "$(jq -c '.ownership_globs' "$context")" --argjson resources "$(jq -c '.resource_locks' "$context")" \
      '{schema_version:1,id:$id,kind:$kind,mode:$mode,status:"ready",priority:100,
        goal_ref:$goal,args:{actor:$actor,reason:$reason,strategy_generation:$generation,
          base_strategy_hash:$base},depends_on:[],
        next_action_at:$next,deadline_at:($next+300),attempt:1,strategy_hash:$strategy,
        ownership_globs:$globs,resource_locks:$resources,claim:null,last_error:null}' >"$runtime/recovery.$$.json"
    "$queue" --dir "$runtime" enqueue "$runtime/recovery.$$.json"
    rm -f "$runtime/recovery.$$.json" "$runtime/recovery-queue.$$.json"
    ;;
  run-offline)
    item=$2 token=$3; runtime=${POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR:?}
    RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime; export RUNTIME_DIR
    id=$(jq -er .id "$item"); kind=$(jq -er .kind "$item"); contract_kind "$kind"
    jq -e --arg id "$id" --arg token "$token" '
      any(.queue.items[];.id==$id and .status=="running" and .claim.token==$token)' \
      "$runtime/current/state.json" >/dev/null || exit 6
    AUDIT_HANDLER_BEFORE_ARTIFACTS=(); lease_before=''
    if [ -n "$(audit_hook_pending_fault proof_lease_expiry)" ]; then
      lease_actor=$(jq -er '.args.actor|select(type=="string" and length>0)' "$item")
      lease_before=$runtime/lease-before.$$.json
      jq -e --arg actor "$lease_actor" '
        .leases[$actor] |
        select((.action_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
          (.proof.fingerprint|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))) |
        {action_id,proof_hash:.proof.fingerprint}' \
        "$runtime/current/state.json" >"$lease_before" || exit 5
      AUDIT_HANDLER_BEFORE_ARTIFACTS=("lease_before=$lease_before")
    fi
    ticket=$(audit_handler_begin "$runtime" recovery recovery "recovery-$id" "$id" "$token" \
      recovery checkpoint_retry proof_lease_expiry event_replay boundary_reconcile)
    [ -z "$lease_before" ] || rm -f "$lease_before"
    project=$(jq -r .project_root "$runtime/current/state.json")
    goal=$project/docs/polylane/max-state.json
    output_dir=$runtime/recovery-artifacts; mkdir -p "$output_dir"
    artifact=$output_dir/$id.json
    [ ! -f "$artifact" ] || { publish_action "$runtime" "$item" "$artifact" "$ticket"; exit 0; }
    work=$output_dir/.$id.$$
    case $kind in
      local_test|static_analysis|prompt_prepare)
        check_id=$(jq -er '.args.acceptance_id // .args.check_id' "$item")
        log=$work.log; run_registered_check "$project" "$goal" "$check_id" "$log"
        jq -n --arg check "$check_id" --arg hash "$(sha_stream <"$log")" \
          '{status:"passed",check_id:$check,output_hash:$hash}' >"$work"; rm -f "$log.argv.json" "$log" ;;
      diff_review)
        git -C "$project" diff --check; git -C "$project" diff --stat >"$work.log"
        jq -n --arg hash "$(sha_stream <"$work.log")" '{status:"reviewed",diffstat_hash:$hash}' >"$work"; rm -f "$work.log" ;;
      merge_prepare)
        head=$(git -C "$project" rev-parse HEAD); status=$(git -C "$project" status --porcelain=v1 | sha_stream)
        jq -n --arg head "$head" --arg status "$status" '{status:"prepared",head:$head,worktree_status_hash:$status}' >"$work" ;;
      documentation)
        missing=''; for path in README.md docs/polylane/NORTHSTAR.md docs/polylane/STRATEGY.md; do
          [ -s "$project/$path" ] || missing="$missing${missing:+,}$path"; done
        [ -z "$missing" ] || exit 5
        jq -n '{status:"audited",required:["README.md","docs/polylane/NORTHSTAR.md","docs/polylane/STRATEGY.md"]}' >"$work" ;;
      cleanup)
        scratch=$runtime/scratch; removed=0
        if [ -d "$scratch" ]; then removed=$(find "$scratch" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 | wc -l | tr -d ' '); rm -rf "$scratch"; fi
        jq -n --argjson removed "$removed" '{status:"cleaned",owned_entries_removed:$removed}' >"$work" ;;
      checkpoint)
        if [ "$(jq -r '.args.reason//""' "$item")" = lane_frozen ]; then
          lane_frozen_checkpoint_artifact "$runtime" "$item" "$work"
        else
          git -C "$project" status --porcelain=v1 >"$work.status"
          jq -n --arg head "$(git -C "$project" rev-parse HEAD)" --arg state "$(sha_stream <"$runtime/current/state.json")" \
            --arg status "$(sha_stream <"$work.status")" '{status:"checkpointed",head:$head,state_hash:$state,status_hash:$status}' >"$work"
          rm -f "$work.status"
        fi ;;
      retry|reflection_repair|recarve|alternate_approach)
        enqueue_changed_successor "$runtime" "$item"
        jq -n --arg kind "$kind" --arg actor "$(jq -r .args.actor "$item")" --arg reason "$(jq -r .args.reason "$item")" \
          --argjson generation "$(jq -r .args.strategy_generation "$item")" \
          --arg successor "$POLYLANE_SUCCESSOR_ID" --arg successor_strategy "$POLYLANE_SUCCESSOR_STRATEGY" \
          '{status:"successor_enqueued",action:$kind,actor:$actor,reason:$reason,
            strategy_generation:$generation,successor_id:$successor,
            successor_strategy_hash:$successor_strategy}' >"$work" ;;
      alternate_model)
        [ -n "${POLYLANE_AGENT_ADAPTER:-}" ] && [ -f "$POLYLANE_AGENT_ADAPTER" ] || exit 5
        . "$POLYLANE_AGENT_ADAPTER"; type polylane_adapter_models >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 5
        tried=$(jq -c '.args.tried_models // []' "$item"); selected=''
        while IFS= read -r model; do
          if ! printf '%s\n' "$tried" | jq -e --arg model "$model" 'index($model)!=null' >/dev/null; then
            selected=$model; break
          fi
        done < <(polylane_adapter_models fallback)
        [ -n "$selected" ] || exit 75
        enqueue_changed_successor "$runtime" "$item"
        jq -n --arg selected "$selected" --arg successor "$POLYLANE_SUCCESSOR_ID" \
          --arg strategy "$POLYLANE_SUCCESSOR_STRATEGY" \
          '{status:"selected",model:$selected,successor_id:$successor,
            successor_strategy_hash:$strategy}' >"$work" ;;
      state_reconcile)
        if [ "$(jq -r '.args.mode // ""' "$item")" = council_verdict ]; then
          reference=$(jq -er '.args.council_reference|select(type=="string" and startswith("/"))' "$item")
          reference_hash=$(jq -er '.args.council_reference_hash|select(test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$item")
          goal_path=$(jq -er '.args.goal_state|select(type=="string" and startswith("/"))' "$item")
          expected_goal_hash=$(jq -er '.args.goal_state_hash|select(test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$item")
          [ -f "$reference" ] && [ ! -L "$reference" ] &&
            [ "$(sha_stream <"$reference")" = "$reference_hash" ] || exit 5
          "$SELF/polylane-council.sh" validate-routing "$reference"
          [ -f "$goal_path" ] && [ ! -L "$goal_path" ] &&
            [ "$(sha_stream <"$goal_path")" = "$expected_goal_hash" ] || exit 7
          case $goal_path in "$project"/docs/polylane/*) :;; *) exit 5;; esac
          verdict=$(jq -er '.verdict|select(.=="GO" or .=="NO_GO")' "$reference")
          routing=$(jq -er .routing.path "$reference")
          RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime; goal_lock=$runtime/goal-state.lock; runtime_lock_acquire "$goal_lock"
          trap 'runtime_lock_release "$goal_lock" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true' RETURN
          [ "$(sha_stream <"$goal_path")" = "$expected_goal_hash" ] || exit 7
          repairs=$runtime/council-repairs.$$.json; printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$repairs"
          if [ "$verdict" = NO_GO ]; then
            while IFS=$'\t' read -r lens focus why; do
              repair_hash=$(printf '%s:%s:%s' "$lens" "$focus" "$why" | sha_stream)
              repair_id="repair-${repair_hash#sha256:}"; repair_id=$(printf '%s' "$repair_id" | cut -c1-71)
              jq --arg id "$repair_id" --arg lens "$lens" --arg focus "$focus" --arg why "$why" \
                '. + [{id:$id,weight:100,status:"open",source:"council",lens:$lens,
                  title:("Repair: "+$why),recommended_focus:$focus}]' "$repairs" >"$repairs.next"
              mv "$repairs.next" "$repairs"
            done < <(jq -r '.findings[]|[.lens,.next_focus,.why]|@tsv' "$routing")
            [ "$(jq 'length' "$repairs")" -gt 0 ] || exit 5
          fi
          next=$runtime/goal-state.next.$$
          jq --arg verdict "$verdict" --arg current "$(jq -r .goal_ref "$item")" \
            --arg routed_next "$(jq -r .selected_next_goal_ref "$routing")" \
            --slurpfile routing "$routing" --slurpfile repairs "$repairs" '
            .goal_tree.items=(.goal_tree.items // []) |
            if $verdict=="GO" then
              .goal_tree.items |= map(if .id==$current then .status="complete" else . end) |
              .next_goal_ref=([ $routing[0].recommendations[].next_focus as $focus |
                .goal_tree.items[]|select(.id==$focus and .status=="open")|.id ][0] //
                ([.goal_tree.items[]|select(.status=="open")]|sort_by(-(.weight//0),.id)|.[0].id // $current))
            else
              .goal_tree.items |= map(if .id==$current then
                .status="superseded" | .superseded_by=([$repairs[0][].id]|sort) else . end) |
              reduce $repairs[0][] as $repair (.;
                if any(.goal_tree.items[];.id==$repair.id) then . else .goal_tree.items += [$repair] end) |
              .next_goal_ref=([$repairs[0][]|select(.recommended_focus==$routed_next)]|sort_by(.id)|.[0].id //
                ($repairs[0]|sort_by(.id)|.[0].id))
            end |
            .complete=false | .revision=((.revision//0)+1)' "$goal_path" >"$next"
          jq -e --arg next "$(jq -r .next_goal_ref "$next")" --arg verdict "$verdict" '
            (.goal_tree.items|type=="array") and
            (any(.goal_tree.items[];.id==$next and .status=="open") or
              ($verdict=="GO" and all(.goal_tree.items[];.status!="open")))' "$next" >/dev/null || exit 5
          chmod 600 "$next"; mv -f "$next" "$goal_path"
          new_goal_hash=$(sha_stream <"$goal_path")
          jq -n --arg verdict "$verdict" --arg goal_hash "$new_goal_hash" \
            --arg next_goal_ref "$(jq -r .next_goal_ref "$goal_path")" --slurpfile repairs "$repairs" \
            '{status:"council_applied",verdict:$verdict,goal_state_hash:$goal_hash,
              next_goal_ref:$next_goal_ref,repair_goal_ids:[$repairs[0][].id]}' >"$work"
          rm -f "$repairs"; runtime_lock_release "$goal_lock"; trap - RETURN
        else
          "$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
          "$SELF/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" replay >"$work.state"
          capture_replay_observation "$runtime" "$work.state" "$work.replay"
          jq -n --arg hash "$(sha_stream <"$work.state")" --slurpfile replay "$work.replay" \
            '{status:"reconciled",state_hash:$hash,replay_observation:$replay[0]}' >"$work"
          rm -f "$work.state" "$work.replay"
        fi ;;
      session_recover)
        loop=$(jq -r .loop_id "$runtime/current/state.json"); spec=$runtime/sentinel-launch.json
        "$SELF/polylane-session.sh" bootstrap "$project" "$loop" "recovery-$id" \
          "$spec" "$runtime/keeper-launch.json"
        jq -n --arg session "polylane-$loop" '{status:"rearmed",session:$session}' >"$work" ;;
    esac
    jq -e . "$work" >/dev/null; chmod 600 "$work"; mv -f "$work" "$artifact"
    publish_action "$runtime" "$item" "$artifact" "$ticket"
    ;;
  contract) contract_kind "$2"; printf '1\n' ;;
  *) exit 2 ;;
esac
~~~

Install the receipt-convergent final body for `core/scripts/polylane-sentinel.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
BIN=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd -P)
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
. "$BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-hooks.sh"
mode=run
[ "${1:-}" != check-once ] || { mode=check-once; shift; }
runtime='' state='' project='' loop='' guardian_launch='' keeper_launch='' sentinel_launch=''
requested_now=''
while [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; do case $1 in --runtime) runtime=$2; shift 2;; --state) state=$2; shift 2;;
  --project) project=$(cd "$2" && pwd -P); shift 2;; --loop-id) loop=$2; shift 2;;
  --guardian-launch) guardian_launch=$2; shift 2;; --keeper-launch) keeper_launch=$2; shift 2;;
  --sentinel-launch) sentinel_launch=$2; shift 2;;
  --now) requested_now=$(runtime_test_now_arg --now "$2") || exit 2; shift 2;;
  *) exit 2;; esac; done
runtime=$(cd "$runtime" && pwd -P) || exit 5
RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime
if [ "$mode" = check-once ]; then
  [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] || exit 2
  heartbeat_file=$runtime/sentinel-heartbeat.json
  [ -f "$heartbeat_file" ] && [ ! -L "$heartbeat_file" ] || exit 5
  jq -e '(keys|sort)==["generation","heartbeat_at","pid","start_token"] and
    (.generation|type=="number" and .>0 and floor==.) and
    (.pid|type=="number" and .>0) and (.start_token|type=="string" and length>0)' \
    "$heartbeat_file" >/dev/null || exit 5
  token=$(jq -er .start_token "$heartbeat_file"); sentinel_pid=$(jq -er .pid "$heartbeat_file")
  generation=$(jq -er .generation "$heartbeat_file")
  [ "$(runtime_start_token "$sentinel_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)" = "$token" ] || exit 5
  [ "$generation" = "$(jq -er .generation "$runtime/session.json")" ] || exit 5
  project=$(cd "$(jq -er .project_root "$runtime/current/state.json")" && pwd -P) || exit 5
  [ "$runtime" = "$project/.polylane/runtime" ] || exit 5
  loop=$(jq -er .loop_id "$runtime/current/state.json")
  state=$project/docs/polylane/controller-state.json
  guardian_launch=$runtime/guardian-launch.json; keeper_launch=$runtime/keeper-launch.json
  sentinel_launch=$runtime/sentinel-launch.json
else
  [ -n "$project" ] && [ -n "$loop" ] && [ -n "$state" ] || exit 2
  [ -z "$requested_now" ] || exit 2
  sentinel_pid=$$
  token=$(runtime_start_token $$); generation=$(jq -r '.generation' "$runtime/session.json")
fi
heartbeat() {
  owner_pid=$1 owner_token=$2 owner_generation=$3
  if [ "$owner_pid" != "$$" ]; then
    current=$runtime/sentinel-heartbeat.json
    [ -f "$current" ] && [ ! -L "$current" ] &&
      [ "$(jq -r .pid "$current")" = "$owner_pid" ] &&
      [ "$(jq -r .start_token "$current")" = "$owner_token" ] &&
      [ "$(jq -r .generation "$current")" = "$owner_generation" ] &&
      [ "$(runtime_start_token "$owner_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)" = "$owner_token" ] || return 6
  fi
  temporary=$runtime/.sentinel-heartbeat.$$
  jq -n --argjson pid "$owner_pid" --arg start_token "$owner_token" --argjson generation "$owner_generation" \
    --argjson heartbeat_at "$(runtime_now)" '{pid:$pid,start_token:$start_token,
      generation:$generation,heartbeat_at:$heartbeat_at}' >"$temporary"
  chmod 600 "$temporary"; mv -f "$temporary" "$runtime/sentinel-heartbeat.json"
}
guardian_fresh() {
  snapshot=$runtime/current/state.json; actor=$runtime/actor-guardian.json
  [ -f "$snapshot" ] && [ ! -L "$snapshot" ] &&
    [ -f "$actor" ] && [ ! -L "$actor" ] || return 1
  pid=$(jq -r '.guardian.pid // 0' "$snapshot")
  recorded=$(jq -r '.guardian.start_token // ""' "$snapshot")
  guardian_generation=$(jq -r '.guardian.generation // 0' "$snapshot")
  wall_now=$(runtime_wall_now)
  [ -n "$recorded" ] && [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" = "$recorded" ] &&
    jq -e --argjson pid "$pid" --arg token "$recorded" \
      --argjson generation "$guardian_generation" --argjson wall_now "$wall_now" \
      --slurpfile state "$snapshot" '
      .actor=="guardian" and .pid==$pid and .start_token==$token and
      .generation==$generation and .generation_token==("guardian-"+($generation|tostring)) and
      .lease_valid==true and $state[0].guardian.pid==$pid and
      $state[0].guardian.start_token==$token and
      $state[0].guardian.generation==$generation and
      (.check.wall_at|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0) and
      .check.wall_at<=$wall_now and ($wall_now-.check.wall_at)<=10' "$actor" >/dev/null
}
start_guardian() {
  runtime_lock_acquire "$runtime/sentinel-guardian-start.lock"
  if guardian_fresh; then runtime_lock_release "$runtime/sentinel-guardian-start.lock"; return 0; fi
  old_actor=$runtime/guardian-old.$$.json
  if [ -f "$runtime/actor-guardian.json" ]; then
    cp "$runtime/actor-guardian.json" "$old_actor"
  else printf '%s\n' '{}' >"$old_actor"; fi
  AUDIT_HANDLER_BEFORE_ARTIFACTS=()
  ticket=$(audit_handler_begin "$runtime" sentinel actor "guardian-restart-$(runtime_now)" \
    '' '' sentinel guardian_generation_restart)
  [ ! -f "$runtime/actor-guardian.json" ] || "$BIN/polylane-process.sh" adopt-or-fence "$runtime" guardian shutdown
  POLYLANE_EXPECTED_PROJECT=$project POLYLANE_EXPECTED_LOOP_ID=$loop \
    "$BIN/polylane-exec-argv.sh" --spec "$guardian_launch" >>"$runtime/guardian.log" 2>&1 & child=$!
  child_token=''; for ignored in 1 2 3 4 5; do child_token=$(runtime_start_token "$child" || true); [ -z "$child_token" ] || break; sleep 0.02; done
  deadline=$(( $(runtime_wall_now) + 2 ))
  while [ "$(runtime_wall_now)" -lt "$deadline" ]; do
    guardian_fresh && break
    kill -0 "$child" 2>/dev/null || break
    sleep 0.02
  done
  if ! guardian_fresh; then
    [ -z "$child_token" ] || { [ "$(runtime_start_token "$child" || true)" != "$child_token" ] || kill -TERM "$child" 2>/dev/null || true; }
    runtime_lock_release "$runtime/sentinel-guardian-start.lock"; return 75
  fi
  payload=$runtime/guardian-register.$$.json
  jq -n --argjson registered_at "$(runtime_now)" '{registered_at:$registered_at}' >"$payload"
  outputs=$runtime/guardian-register-outputs.$$.json
  printf '%s\n' '{}' >"$outputs"
  if [ -n "$ticket" ]; then
    old_pid=$(jq -r '.pid // 0' "$old_actor")
    old_recorded=$(jq -r '.start_token // ""' "$old_actor")
    old_observed=$(runtime_start_token "$old_pid" 2>/dev/null || true)
    [ "$old_observed" != "$old_recorded" ] || return 75
    jq -n --slurpfile old "$old_actor" --slurpfile new "$runtime/actor-guardian.json" \
      --arg old_observed "$old_observed" --arg new_observed "$(runtime_start_token "$child")" '
      {old_actor:{live:false,role:$old[0].actor,pid:$old[0].pid,start_token:$old[0].start_token,
         observed_start_token:$old_observed,generation:$old[0].generation,
         ownership_token:$old[0].generation_token,started_at:$old[0].started_at},
       new_actor:{live:true,role:$new[0].actor,pid:$new[0].pid,start_token:$new[0].start_token,
         observed_start_token:$new_observed,generation:$new[0].generation,
         ownership_token:$new[0].generation_token,started_at:$new[0].started_at}}' >"$outputs"
  fi
  audit_handler_publish "$runtime" "$ticket" sentinel register "guardian-$child" \
    "$payload" "$outputs" ''
  rm -f "$old_actor" "$payload" "$outputs"
  runtime_lock_release "$runtime/sentinel-guardian-start.lock"
}
keeper_fresh() {
  owner=$runtime/keeper.lock/owner.json
  [ -f "$owner" ] && [ ! -L "$owner" ] || return 1
  pid=$(jq -r '.pid // 0' "$owner"); recorded=$(jq -r '.start_token // ""' "$owner")
  owner_generation=$(jq -r '.generation // 0' "$owner")
  session_generation=$(jq -r '.generation // -1' "$runtime/session.json")
  modified=$(stat -f '%m' "$owner" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%Y' "$owner" 2>/dev/null) ||
    return 1
  wall_now=$(runtime_wall_now)
  [ -n "$recorded" ] && [ "$owner_generation" = "$session_generation" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_start_token "$pid" || true)" = "$recorded" ] &&
    [ "$modified" -le "$wall_now" ] && [ $((wall_now - modified)) -le 10 ]
}
last_status=''
sentinel_check_once() {
  owner_pid=$1 owner_token=$2 owner_generation=$3
  heartbeat "$owner_pid" "$owner_token" "$owner_generation"
  status=$(jq -cr '[.revision,(
    .controller.stage // .stage // "WORKING"),(.current_action_id // "none"),
    (.recovery.reason_code // .recovery.reason // "none")]|@tsv' "$runtime/current/state.json")
  if [ "$status" != "$last_status" ]; then
    IFS=$'\t' read -r revision stage action recovery <<EOF
$status
EOF
    printf 'polylane revision=%s stage=%s action=%s recovery=%s\n' \
      "$revision" "$stage" "$action" "$recovery"
    last_status=$status
  fi
  terminal=$(jq -r '.terminal // ""' "$runtime/current/state.json")
  if [ "$terminal" != COMPLETE ] && ! guardian_fresh; then start_guardian; fi
  if ! keeper_fresh; then
    POLYLANE_EXPECTED_PROJECT=$project POLYLANE_EXPECTED_LOOP_ID=$loop \
      "$BIN/polylane-exec-argv.sh" --spec "$keeper_launch" >>"$runtime/keeper.log" 2>&1 &
  fi
  [ ! -e "$runtime/disable-restart" ] || return 20
}
case $mode in
  run)
    trap 'exit 0' INT TERM
    while :; do
      rc=0; sentinel_check_once "$$" "$token" "$generation" || rc=$?
      [ "$rc" -ne 20 ] || exit 0
      [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || exit "$rc"
      sleep 5
    done
    ;;
  check-once)
    [ -z "$requested_now" ] || [ "$(runtime_now)" = "$requested_now" ] || exit 5
    rc=0; sentinel_check_once "$sentinel_pid" "$token" "$generation" || rc=$?
    [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] || [ "$rc" -eq 20 ] || exit "$rc"
    ;;
esac
~~~

Install the receipt-convergent final body for `core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-audit-hooks.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
audit_hook_load() {
  local runtime
  runtime=$1; RUNTIME_DIR=$runtime; export RUNTIME_DIR
  AUDIT_BIN=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd -P)
  . "$AUDIT_BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-common.sh"
  . "$AUDIT_BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-events.sh"
  # Recovery proof publication uses the production reducer/emitter in this process.
  # Every hook producer therefore gets the same implementation, even when its command
  # script did not source the runtime dispatcher.
  . "$AUDIT_BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-reducer.sh"
  . "$AUDIT_BIN/lib/polylane-runtime-audit.sh"
}
audit_hook_reduce() {
  local runtime
  runtime=$1
  "$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce
}
audit_hook_lookup_event() {
  local runtime actor type action output
  runtime=$1 actor=$2 type=$3 action=$4 output=$5
  "$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" lookup-event \
    "$actor" "$type" "$action" >"$output"
}
audit_hook_emit() {
  local runtime actor type action fingerprint payload
  runtime=$1; actor=$2; type=$3; action=$4; fingerprint=$5; payload=$6
  "$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit "$actor" "$type" "$action" \
    --fingerprint "$fingerprint" --payload-file "$payload"
}
audit_hook_commit_recovery() {
  runtime_record_recovery "$@"
}
audit_hook_pending_fault() {
  local runtime recovery state
  if [ "$#" -eq 2 ]; then runtime=$1 recovery=$2
  else runtime=${RUNTIME_DIR:-${POLYLANE_RUNTIME_DIR:-}} recovery=$1; fi
  [ -n "$runtime" ] || return 5
  audit_hook_load "$runtime"
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  jq -r --arg recovery "$recovery" '
    (.audit.faults // {}) as $faults | (.audit.recovery_pairs // {}) as $pairs |
    [$faults[] as $f |
      select($f.recovery==$recovery and
        $pairs[($f.event_hash+"|"+$recovery)]==null) |
      [$f.fault_id,$f.event_id,$f.event_hash]] |
    if length==1 then .[0]|@tsv else empty end' "$state"
}
audit_hook_guardian_coverage() {
  local runtime observation now rc
  runtime=$1 observation=$2
  audit_hook_load "$runtime"
  now=$(runtime_now)
  jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
    (keys|sort)==(["identity","kind","observed_at","schema_version"]|sort) and
    .schema_version==1 and .kind=="guardian" and .observed_at==$now and
    .identity.role=="guardian"' \
    "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
  if runtime_publish_guardian_observation "$observation"; then rc=0; else rc=$?; fi
  case $rc in
    0) if audit_hook_reduce "$runtime"; then return 0; else return $?; fi ;;
    76) return 76 ;;
    *) return "$rc" ;;
  esac
}
audit_hook_goal_work() {
  local runtime state now active observation rc source_dir source_hash source_sequence
  local domain domain_hash attempt payload action item_id dispatch_proof candidate
  runtime=$1; audit_hook_load "$runtime"
  active=$runtime/.goal-active.$$.json
  observation=$runtime/.goal-observation-hook.$$.json
  domain=$runtime/.goal-active-domain.$$.json
  attempt=0
  while [ "$attempt" -lt 8 ]; do
    attempt=$((attempt + 1))
    "$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce || {
      rc=$?; rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain"; return "$rc"; }
    source_dir=$(runtime_current_dir) || {
      rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain"; return 5; }
    state=$source_dir/state.json; now=$(runtime_now)
    if jq -e 'any(.queue.items[];(.status=="starting" or .status=="running") and
        .claim!=null)' "$state" >/dev/null; then
      jq -Sc '
        [.queue.items[]|select((.status=="starting" or .status=="running") and .claim!=null)]|
        sort_by(-.priority,.id)|.[0]|
        {mode:"goal",goal_ref:.goal_ref,item_id:.id,claim_token:.claim.token,
         recovery_event_hash:null}' "$state" >"$active"
    elif jq -e '.recovery!=null and
        (.recovery.event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$state" >/dev/null; then
      jq -Sc '{mode:"recovery",goal_ref:(.recovery.goal_ref//"runtime-recovery"),
        item_id:null,claim_token:null,recovery_event_hash:.recovery.event_hash}' "$state" >"$active"
    elif jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
        any(.queue.items[];(.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and .claim==null and
          .next_action_at<=$now)' "$state" >/dev/null; then
      jq -Sc --argjson now "$now" '
        [.queue.items[]|select((.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and .claim==null and
          .next_action_at<=$now)]|sort_by(-.priority,.next_action_at,.id)|.[0]|
        {mode:"goal",goal_ref:.goal_ref,item_id:.id,claim_token:null,
          recovery_event_hash:null}' "$state" >"$active"
      item_id=$(jq -r .item_id "$active"); dispatch_proof=''
      for candidate in "$runtime"/events/*.json; do
        [ -f "$candidate" ] && [ ! -L "$candidate" ] || continue
        jq -e --arg id "$item_id" --argjson now "$now" '
          .at==$now and .actor=="queue" and .type=="queue_reserve" and
          any(.payload.reservations[]?;.id==$id)' "$candidate" >/dev/null || continue
        dispatch_proof=$(jq -r .event_hash "$candidate")
      done
      if [ -z "$dispatch_proof" ]; then
        for candidate in "$runtime"/events/*.json; do
          [ -f "$candidate" ] && [ ! -L "$candidate" ] || continue
          jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
            .at==$now and .actor=="guardian" and
            (.type|IN("dispatch_retry_exhausted","wake_requested"))' \
            "$candidate" >/dev/null || continue
          dispatch_proof=$(jq -r .event_hash "$candidate")
        done
      fi
      [ -n "$dispatch_proof" ] || {
        rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain"; return 75; }
      jq --arg proof "$dispatch_proof" '.recovery_event_hash=$proof' \
~~~
