~~~bash
        "$active" >"$active.next" && mv -f "$active.next" "$active"
    else
      rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain"
      return 75
    fi
    runtime_goal_active_domain "$state" "$domain" || {
      rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain"; return 5; }
    source_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$state")
    source_sequence=$(jq -er '.last_event_sequence|select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0)' \
      "$state") || { rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain"; return 5; }
    domain_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$domain")
    jq -Scn --argjson now "$now" --arg source_path "$state" \
      --arg source_hash "$source_hash" --argjson source_sequence "$source_sequence" \
      --arg domain_hash "$domain_hash" --slurpfile active "$active" '
      {schema_version:1,kind:"goal_work",observed_at:$now,
        source_snapshot:{path:$source_path,hash:$source_hash,sequence:$source_sequence},
        active_domain_hash:$domain_hash,active:$active[0]}' >"$observation"
    if [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] &&
       [ -n "${POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_AFTER_SNAPSHOT_GATE:-}" ] &&
       mkdir "$POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_AFTER_SNAPSHOT_GATE.once" 2>/dev/null; then
      : >"$POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_AFTER_SNAPSHOT_GATE.ready"
      while [ ! -f "$POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_AFTER_SNAPSHOT_GATE.release" ]; do sleep 0.01; done
    fi
    if runtime_publish_goal_observation "$observation"; then rc=0; else rc=$?; fi
    case $rc in
      0)
        if "$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" reduce; then rc=0; else rc=$?; fi
        rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain"
        return "$rc";;
      77) continue;;
      *) rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain"; return "$rc";;
    esac
  done
  payload=$runtime/.goal-observation-retry.$$.json
  jq -n --arg reason active_domain_contention --arg domain_hash "$domain_hash" \
    --argjson attempts "$attempt" --argjson observed_at "$now" \
    '{reason:$reason,active_domain_hash:$domain_hash,attempts:$attempts,
      observed_at:$observed_at}' >"$payload"
  action="goal-observation-retry:$source_sequence:${domain_hash#sha256:}"
  if runtime_emit audit goal_observation_retry "$action" --fingerprint "$domain_hash" \
      --payload-file "$payload"; then rc=75; else rc=$?; fi
  "$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" wake || true
  rm -f "$active" "$observation" "$domain" "$payload"
  return "$rc"
}
audit_hook_normalize_output() {
  local runtime recovery name raw receipt output event emitted raw_hash reference
  runtime=$1 recovery=$2 name=$3 raw=$4 receipt=$5 output=$6
  raw=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$runtime/audit/handler-output-artifacts" \
    "$raw" "$(runtime_sha256 "$raw")") || return 5
  event=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$(jq -er .result_event.event_hash "$receipt")") || return 5
  [ "$(jq -r .sequence "$event")" = "$(jq -r .result_event.event_id "$receipt")" ] || return 5
  raw_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$raw")
  reference=$(jq -n --arg path "$raw" --arg hash "$raw_hash" '{path:$path,hash:$hash}')
  case $name in
    checkpoint_recovery)
      jq -e '((keys|sort)==(["head","state_hash","status","status_hash"]|sort) or
        (keys|sort)==(["head","lane_frozen","state_hash","status","status_hash"]|sort)) and
        .status=="checkpointed" and (.head|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.state_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        (.status_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        (if has("lane_frozen") then
          (.lane_frozen.item_id|test("^lane-frozen-gated-[0-9]+$")) and
          .lane_frozen.old_worker.attempt>=1 and
          .lane_frozen.replacement.attempt==(.lane_frozen.old_worker.attempt+1) and
          .lane_frozen.replacement.status=="complete" and
          .lane_frozen.old_worker.claim_token!=.lane_frozen.replacement.claim_token
         else true end)' "$raw" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq --arg event_hash "$(jq -r .event_hash "$event")" --argjson raw_native "$reference" \
        '.+{recovery_event_hash:$event_hash,raw_native:$raw_native}' "$raw" >"$output";;
    lease_before|lease_after)
      jq -e '(keys|sort)==(["action_id","proof_hash"]|sort) and
        (.action_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.proof_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$raw" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq --argjson raw_native "$reference" '.+{raw_native:$raw_native}' "$raw" >"$output";;
    old_actor|new_actor)
      jq -e '(keys|sort)==(["generation","live","observed_start_token",
        "ownership_token","pid","role","start_token","started_at"]|sort) and
        (.role|IN("guardian","controller")) and (.pid|type=="number" and .>0) and
        (.start_token|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.observed_start_token|type=="string") and
        (.generation|type=="number" and floor==. and .>0) and
        (.ownership_token|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.started_at|type=="number" and .>=0) and (.live|type=="boolean")' \
        "$raw" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq --argjson raw_native "$reference" '.+{raw_native:$raw_native}' "$raw" >"$output";;
    session_before|session_after)
      jq -e '(keys|sort)==(["cycle_run_id","exists","generation","loop_id","nonce",
        "project_root","windows"]|sort) and (.exists|type=="boolean") and
        (.project_root|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
        (.loop_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.cycle_run_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.generation|type=="number" and floor==. and .>0) and
        (.nonce|type=="string" and length>0) and
        (.windows|type=="array" and all(.[];type=="string")) and
        (if .exists then (.windows|length)>0 else true end)' \
        "$raw" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq --argjson raw_native "$reference" '.+{raw_native:$raw_native}' "$raw" >"$output";;
    session_operation)
      jq -e '(keys|sort)==(["changed_at","operation","target"]|sort) and
        (.changed_at|type=="number" and .>=0) and
        (.operation|IN("bootstrap","lanes_create","lanes_replace")) and
        (.target|type=="string" and length>0)' "$raw" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq --argjson raw_native "$reference" '.+{raw_native:$raw_native}' "$raw" >"$output";;
    replay_observation)
      jq -e --arg recovery "$recovery" '(keys|sort)==(["application_count","cursor_after","cursor_before",
        "replayed_event_hash","replayed_event_id"]|sort) and
        (.application_count|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0) and
        (if $recovery=="event_replay" then .application_count>0
         elif $recovery=="boundary_reconcile" then true else false end) and
        (.cursor_before|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0) and
        (.cursor_after|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0) and
        .cursor_after>=.cursor_before and
        .cursor_after==(.cursor_before+.application_count) and
        (if .application_count==0 then
          .replayed_event_id==null and .replayed_event_hash==null
         else (.replayed_event_id|type=="number" and floor==.) and
          .replayed_event_id==.cursor_after and
          (.replayed_event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) end)' \
        "$raw" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq --argjson raw_native "$reference" '.+{raw_native:$raw_native}' "$raw" >"$output";;
    marker_observation)
      jq -e '(keys|sort)==(["accepted","expected_run_id","observed_run_id"]|sort) and
        (.accepted|type=="boolean") and (.expected_run_id|type=="string") and
        (.observed_run_id|type=="string")' "$raw" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq --arg event_hash "$(jq -r .event_hash "$event")" --argjson raw_native "$reference" \
        '.+{decision_event_hash:$event_hash,raw_native:$raw_native}' "$raw" >"$output";;
    provider_observation)
      jq -e --arg recovery "$recovery" '(keys|sort)==["provider_state"] and
        .provider_state==(if $recovery=="offline_plus_probe" then "rate_limited"
          elif $recovery=="offline_drain" then "unavailable"
          elif $recovery=="online_immediate" then "available" else null end)' \
        "$raw" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq -e --slurpfile raw "$raw" '
        .actor=="queue" and .type=="provider_state" and
        .payload.state==$raw[0].provider_state' "$event" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq --arg event_hash "$(jq -r .event_hash "$event")" --argjson raw_native "$reference" \
        '.+{queue_event_hashes:[$event_hash],raw_native:$raw_native}' "$raw" >"$output";;
    queue_observation)
      jq -e --arg recovery "$recovery" '(keys|sort)==(["goal_ref","new_claim_token",
        "old_claim_token","previous_generation","queue_item_id","reconcile_generation",
        "status_after","status_before"]|sort) and
        (.queue_item_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
        if $recovery=="orphan_requeue" then
          (.old_claim_token|type=="string" and length>0) and
          .new_claim_token==null and (.status_before|IN("starting","running")) and
          .status_after=="scheduled" and .goal_ref==null and
          .previous_generation==null and .reconcile_generation==null
        elif $recovery=="state_reconcile" then
          .old_claim_token==null and .new_claim_token==null and
          .status_before==null and .status_after==null and
          (.goal_ref|type=="string" and length>0) and
          (.previous_generation|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0) and
          (.reconcile_generation|type=="number" and floor==.) and
          .reconcile_generation>.previous_generation
        else false end' "$raw" >/dev/null || return 5
      if [ "$recovery" = orphan_requeue ]; then
        jq -e --slurpfile raw "$raw" '
          .actor=="queue" and .type=="queue_reclaim" and
          any(.payload.claims[];
            .id==$raw[0].queue_item_id and .token==$raw[0].old_claim_token)' \
          "$event" >/dev/null &&
        jq -e --slurpfile raw "$raw" '
          any(.queue.items[];.id==$raw[0].queue_item_id and
            .status==$raw[0].status_after and .claim==null)' \
          "$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json" >/dev/null || return 5
      else
        jq -e --slurpfile raw "$raw" '
          .actor=="queue" and .type=="queue_enqueue" and
          .payload.id==$raw[0].queue_item_id and .payload.goal_ref==$raw[0].goal_ref and
          .payload.args.reconcile_generation==$raw[0].reconcile_generation' \
          "$event" >/dev/null &&
        jq -e --slurpfile raw "$raw" '
          any(.queue.items[];.id==$raw[0].queue_item_id and
            .goal_ref==$raw[0].goal_ref and
            .args.reconcile_generation==$raw[0].reconcile_generation)' \
          "$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json" >/dev/null || return 5
      fi
      jq --arg event_hash "$(jq -r .event_hash "$event")" --argjson raw_native "$reference" \
        '.+{queue_event_hash:$event_hash,raw_native:$raw_native}' "$raw" >"$output";;
    wake_observation)
      jq -e '(keys|sort)==(["emitted_at","emitted_event_hash","emitted_event_id",
        "fallback_seconds"]|sort) and
        (.emitted_at|type=="number" and .>=0) and
        (.emitted_event_id|type=="number" and floor==. and .>0) and
        (.emitted_event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
        (.fallback_seconds|type=="number" and .>0)' "$raw" >/dev/null || return 5
      emitted=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$(jq -r .emitted_event_hash "$raw")") || return 5
      jq -e --slurpfile raw "$raw" '
        .actor=="guardian" and .type=="wake_requested" and
        .sequence==$raw[0].emitted_event_id and
        .event_hash==$raw[0].emitted_event_hash and .at==$raw[0].emitted_at' \
        "$emitted" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq -e '.actor=="guardian" and .type=="heartbeat"' "$event" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq --arg reduced_hash "$(jq -r .event_hash "$event")" \
        --argjson reduced_id "$(jq -r .sequence "$event")" \
        --argjson reduced_at "$(runtime_now)" --argjson raw_native "$reference" \
        '.+{reduced_event_hash:$reduced_hash,reduced_event_id:$reduced_id,
          reduced_at:$reduced_at,raw_native:$raw_native}' "$raw" >"$output";;
    process_observation)
      jq -e '(keys|sort)==(["deadline","decision","observed_live","pid",
        "start_token"]|sort) and (.pid|type=="number" and .>0) and
        (.start_token|type=="string" and length>0) and (.deadline|type=="number") and
        (.observed_live|type=="boolean") and (.decision|IN("preserve","recover"))' \
        "$raw" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq --arg event_hash "$(jq -r .event_hash "$event")" --argjson raw_native "$reference" \
        '.+{decision_event_hash:$event_hash,raw_native:$raw_native}' "$raw" >"$output";;
    *) return 5;;
  esac
  chmod 600 "$output"
}
audit_hook_record_recovery() {
  local record_runtime record_recovery record_post_type record_expected record_row
  local record_fault record_cause_id record_cause_hash record_handler_receipt
  local record_specification record_artifacts record_name record_source record_normalized
  local record_sealed record_hash record_payload record_session_before record_session_after
  local record_old_actor record_new_actor record_action record_post_lookup
  local record_evidence_source record_evidence record_cause record_rc
  record_runtime=$1 record_recovery=$2 record_post_type=$3; shift 3
  audit_hook_load "$record_runtime"
  record_expected=$(runtime_audit_expected_post_type "$record_recovery") || return 5
  [ "$record_expected" = "$record_post_type" ] || return 5
  audit_hook_reduce "$record_runtime"
  record_row=$(audit_hook_pending_fault "$record_recovery")
  [ -n "$record_row" ] || return 5
  IFS=$'\t' read -r record_fault record_cause_id record_cause_hash <<EOF
$record_row
EOF
  record_handler_receipt=''
  for record_specification in "$@"; do
    [ "${record_specification%%=*}" != handler_receipt ] || \
      record_handler_receipt=${record_specification#*=}
  done
  [ -f "$record_handler_receipt" ] && [ ! -L "$record_handler_receipt" ] || return 5
  record_artifacts=$record_runtime/.post-artifacts.$$.json
  printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$record_artifacts"
  for record_specification in "$@"; do
    record_name=${record_specification%%=*}; record_source=${record_specification#*=}
    [ -n "$record_name" ] && [ "$record_source" != "$record_specification" ] || return 2
    [ -f "$record_source" ] && [ ! -L "$record_source" ] || return 5
    record_normalized=$record_source
    if [ "$record_name" != handler_receipt ]; then
      record_normalized=$record_runtime/.normalized-$record_name.$$.json
      audit_hook_normalize_output "$record_runtime" "$record_recovery" "$record_name" \
        "$record_source" "$record_handler_receipt" "$record_normalized" || return 5
    fi
    record_sealed=$(runtime_audit_seal "$record_runtime/audit/postcondition-artifacts" \
      "$record_normalized") || return 5
    [ "$record_normalized" = "$record_source" ] || rm -f "$record_normalized"
    record_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$record_sealed")
    jq --arg name "$record_name" --arg path "$record_sealed" --arg hash "$record_hash" \
      '.+[{name:$name,path:$path,hash:$hash}]' "$record_artifacts" >"$record_artifacts.next"
    mv -f "$record_artifacts.next" "$record_artifacts"
  done
  jq -e 'length>0 and ([.[].name]|unique|length)==length' "$record_artifacts" >/dev/null ||
    return 5
  record_payload=$record_runtime/.postcondition.$$.json
  jq -n --arg fault "$record_fault" --arg recovery "$record_recovery" \
    --arg cause "$record_cause_hash" --slurpfile artifacts "$record_artifacts" \
    '{fault_id:$fault,recovery:$recovery,cause_event_hash:$cause,
      authoritative_artifacts:$artifacts[0]}' >"$record_payload"
  if [ "$record_post_type" = session_recovered ]; then
    record_session_before=$(jq -r '.[]|select(.name=="session_before")|.path' \
      "$record_artifacts")
    record_session_after=$(jq -r '.[]|select(.name=="session_after")|.path' \
      "$record_artifacts")
    jq --slurpfile before "$record_session_before" --slurpfile after "$record_session_after" \
      '.+($after[0]|{project_root,loop_id,cycle_run_id,nonce})+
        {before_generation:$before[0].generation,before_nonce:$before[0].nonce,
         after_generation:$after[0].generation,after_nonce:$after[0].nonce}' \
      "$record_payload" >"$record_payload.next"
    mv -f "$record_payload.next" "$record_payload"
  fi
  if [ "$record_post_type" = actor_restarted ]; then
    record_old_actor=$(jq -r '.[]|select(.name=="old_actor")|.path' "$record_artifacts")
    record_new_actor=$(jq -r '.[]|select(.name=="new_actor")|.path' "$record_artifacts")
    [ -n "$record_old_actor" ] && [ -n "$record_new_actor" ] || return 5
    jq --slurpfile old "$record_old_actor" --slurpfile new "$record_new_actor" '
      .+{old_identity:($old[0]|{role,pid,start_token,generation,ownership_token}),
        new_identity:($new[0]|{role,pid,start_token,generation,ownership_token}),
        handoff_at:$new[0].started_at}' "$record_payload" >"$record_payload.next"
    mv -f "$record_payload.next" "$record_payload"
  fi
  record_action="post:$record_fault:$record_recovery"
  audit_hook_emit "$record_runtime" recovery "$record_post_type" "$record_action" \
    "$(runtime_sha256 "$record_artifacts")" "$record_payload"
  audit_hook_reduce "$record_runtime"
  record_post_lookup=$record_runtime/.post-receipt.$$.json
  audit_hook_lookup_event "$record_runtime" recovery "$record_post_type" "$record_action" \
    "$record_post_lookup"
  record_evidence_source=$record_runtime/.recovery-evidence.$$.json
  jq -n --arg fault "$record_fault" --arg recovery "$record_recovery" \
    --arg cause "$record_cause_hash" --argjson post_id "$(jq -r .event_id "$record_post_lookup")" \
    --arg post_hash "$(jq -r .event_hash "$record_post_lookup")" \
    --slurpfile artifacts "$record_artifacts" \
    '{schema_version:2,fault_id:$fault,recovery:$recovery,cause_event_hash:$cause,
      postcondition_event:{event_id:$post_id,event_hash:$post_hash},
      authoritative_artifacts:$artifacts[0]}' >"$record_evidence_source"
  record_evidence=$(runtime_audit_seal "$record_runtime/audit/recovery-evidence" \
    "$record_evidence_source")
  record_cause=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$record_cause_hash")
  record_rc=0
  audit_hook_commit_recovery --cause-event "$record_cause" --recovery "$record_recovery" \
    --evidence "$record_evidence" || record_rc=$?
  rm -f "$record_artifacts" "$record_payload" "$record_post_lookup" \
    "$record_evidence_source"
  return "$record_rc"
}
audit_hook_producer_allows() {
  local producer recovery
  producer=$1; recovery=$2
  case $producer:$recovery in
    recovery:checkpoint_retry|recovery:proof_lease_expiry|\
    sentinel:guardian_generation_restart|guardian:controller_state_restart|\
    session:keeper_session_recreate|session:singleton_keeper_controller|\
    session:same_nonce_lane_relaunch|session:window_recreate_once|\
    recovery:event_replay|recovery:boundary_reconcile|\
    markers:nonce_rejection|markers:marker_wake|\
    queue:offline_plus_probe|queue:offline_drain|queue:online_immediate|\
    queue:orphan_requeue|queue:state_reconcile|guardian:usr1_wake|\
    process:no_restart|process:child_recover) return 0;;
    *) return 5;;
  esac
}
audit_hook_expected_actor() {
  local producer requested expected
  producer=$1; requested=${2:-}
  case $producer in
    recovery|sentinel|guardian|session|queue|process) expected=$producer;;
    markers)
      expected=$requested
      [ -n "$expected" ] && [ "${#expected}" -le 160 ] &&
        printf '%s\n' "$expected" | grep -Eq '^[A-Za-z0-9._:-]+$' || return 5;;
    *) return 5;;
  esac
  [ -z "$requested" ] || [ "$requested" = "$expected" ] || return 5
  printf '%s\n' "$expected"
}
audit_hook_required_names() {
  local recovery
  recovery=$1
  case $recovery in
    checkpoint_retry) printf 'checkpoint_recovery\n';;
    proof_lease_expiry) printf 'lease_before\nlease_after\n';;
    guardian_generation_restart|controller_state_restart) printf 'old_actor\nnew_actor\n';;
    keeper_session_recreate|singleton_keeper_controller|same_nonce_lane_relaunch|window_recreate_once)
      printf 'session_before\nsession_after\nsession_operation\n';;
    event_replay|boundary_reconcile) printf 'replay_observation\n';;
    nonce_rejection|marker_wake) printf 'marker_observation\n';;
    offline_plus_probe|offline_drain|online_immediate) printf 'provider_observation\n';;
    orphan_requeue|state_reconcile) printf 'queue_observation\n';;
    usr1_wake) printf 'wake_observation\n';;
    no_restart|child_recover) printf 'process_observation\n';;
    *) return 5;;
  esac
}
audit_hook_verify_internal() {
  local root path hash
  root=$1 path=$2
  case $(basename "$path") in
    [0-9a-f][0-9a-f]*.json) hash=sha256:$(basename "$path" .json);;
    *) return 5;;
  esac
  runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$root" "$path" "$hash"
}
audit_hook_verify_auth() {
  local artifact key
  artifact=$1; key=$RUNTIME_DIR/audit-auth.key
  runtime_audit_verify_auth "$key" "$artifact"
}
audit_hook_validate_attempt() {
  local attempt event state item token generation record nonce name path hash validated
  local before after operation
  attempt=$1 event=$2 state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  jq -e '
    (keys|sort)==(["attempt_id","attempt_kind","claim_token","cycle","loop_id",
      "queue_item_id","run_id","schema_version","session_generation","session_nonce"]|sort) and
    .schema_version==1 and
    (.attempt_kind|IN("actor","queue","recovery","session","marker","wake","process")) and
    (.attempt_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.loop_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.run_id==null or (.run_id|type=="string" and length>0)) and
    (.cycle==null or (.cycle|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0)) and
    ((.queue_item_id==null and .claim_token==null) or
      ((.queue_item_id|type=="string" and length>0) and
       (.claim_token|type=="string" and length>0))) and
    ((.session_generation==null and .session_nonce==null) or
      ((.session_generation|type=="number" and floor==. and .>0) and
       (.session_nonce|type=="string" and length>0)))' "$attempt" >/dev/null || return 5
  jq -e --slurpfile attempt "$attempt" '
    .loop_id==$attempt[0].loop_id and
    ($attempt[0].run_id==null or .controller.run_id==$attempt[0].run_id) and
    ($attempt[0].cycle==null or .controller.cycle==$attempt[0].cycle)' "$state" >/dev/null ||
    return 5
  item=$(jq -r .queue_item_id "$attempt")
  if [ "$item" != null ]; then
    token=$(jq -r .claim_token "$attempt")
    jq -e --arg id "$item" --arg token "$token" --slurpfile event "$event" '
      any(.queue.items[]?;.id==$id and .claim.token==$token) and
      (($event[0]|length)==0 or
       ($event[0].payload.id==$id and
        ($event[0].payload.token==$token or $event[0].payload.claim_token==$token)))' \
      "$state" >/dev/null || return 5
  fi
  generation=$(jq -r .session_generation "$attempt")
  if [ "$generation" != null ]; then
    record=$RUNTIME_DIR/session.json
    [ -f "$record" ] && [ ! -L "$record" ] || return 5
    nonce=$(jq -r .session_nonce "$attempt")
    if [ "$(jq 'length' "$event")" -eq 0 ]; then
      jq -e --argjson generation "$generation" --arg nonce "$nonce" '
        .active==true and .generation==$generation and .launch_id==$nonce' "$record" >/dev/null ||
        return 5
    else
      [ "$(jq -r .type "$event")" = session_recovery ] || return 5
      for name in session_before session_after session_operation; do
        [ "$(jq --arg name "$name" '[.payload.audit_handler.outputs[]|
          select(.name==$name)]|length' "$event")" -eq 1 ] || return 5
        path=$(jq -r --arg name "$name" '.payload.audit_handler.outputs[]|
          select(.name==$name)|.path' "$event")
        hash=$(jq -r --arg name "$name" '.payload.audit_handler.outputs[]|
          select(.name==$name)|.hash' "$event")
        validated=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/handler-output-artifacts" \
          "$path" "$hash") || return 5
        case $name in session_before) before=$validated;; session_after) after=$validated;;
          session_operation) operation=$validated;; esac
      done
      jq -e --argjson generation "$generation" --arg nonce "$nonce" '
        .generation==$generation and .nonce==$nonce' "$before" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq -e --slurpfile after "$after" --slurpfile operation "$operation" '
        if $operation[0].operation=="bootstrap" then
          $after[0].generation>.generation and $after[0].nonce!=.nonce
        else $after[0].generation==.generation and $after[0].nonce==.nonce and
          $after[0].windows!=.windows end' "$before" >/dev/null || return 5
      jq -e --slurpfile after "$after" '
        .active==true and .generation==$after[0].generation and
        .launch_id==$after[0].nonce' "$record" >/dev/null || return 5
    fi
  fi
}
audit_handler_begin() {
  local runtime producer kind attempt_id queue_item claim_token state loop run cycle
  local expected_actor session_generation session_nonce record attempt ticket rc
  runtime=$1; producer=$2; kind=$3; attempt_id=$4; queue_item=$5; claim_token=$6
  expected_actor=$7; shift 7
  audit_hook_load "$runtime"
  expected_actor=$(audit_hook_expected_actor "$producer" "$expected_actor") || return 5
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  loop=$(jq -er .loop_id "$state")
  run=$(jq -r '.controller.run_id // null' "$state")
  cycle=$(jq -r '.controller.cycle // null' "$state")
  session_generation=null; session_nonce=null
  case $producer in
    keeper|session)
      record=$runtime/session.json
      [ -f "$record" ] && [ ! -L "$record" ] || return 5
      session_generation=$(jq -er .generation "$record")
      session_nonce=$(jq -er .launch_id "$record");;
  esac
  [ -n "$queue_item" ] || queue_item=null
  [ -n "$claim_token" ] || claim_token=null
  attempt=$runtime/.audit-handler-attempt.$$.json
  jq -n --arg kind "$kind" --arg id "$attempt_id" --arg loop "$loop" \
    --argjson run "$(printf '%s\n' "$run" | jq -R 'if .=="null" then null else . end')" \
    --argjson cycle "$cycle" \
    --argjson queue_item "$(printf '%s\n' "$queue_item" | jq -R 'if .=="null" then null else . end')" \
    --argjson claim "$(printf '%s\n' "$claim_token" | jq -R 'if .=="null" then null else . end')" \
    --argjson generation "$session_generation" \
    --argjson nonce "$(printf '%s\n' "$session_nonce" | jq -R 'if .=="null" then null else . end')" '
    {schema_version:1,attempt_kind:$kind,attempt_id:$id,loop_id:$loop,run_id:$run,
      cycle:$cycle,queue_item_id:$queue_item,claim_token:$claim,
      session_generation:$generation,session_nonce:$nonce}' >"$attempt"
  chmod 600 "$attempt"
  ticket=$(audit_handler_open "$runtime" "$producer" "$expected_actor" "$attempt" "$@") || {
    rc=$?; rm -f "$attempt"; return "$rc"; }
  rm -f "$attempt"; printf '%s\n' "$ticket"
}
audit_handler_begin_native() {
  local runtime producer kind attempt_id queue_item claim_token requested_actor expected_actor
  local -a recoveries
  runtime=$1; producer=$2; kind=$3; attempt_id=$4; queue_item=$5; claim_token=$6
  requested_actor=${7:-}
  expected_actor=$(audit_hook_expected_actor "$producer" "$requested_actor") || return 5
  case $producer in
    recovery) recoveries=(checkpoint_retry proof_lease_expiry event_replay boundary_reconcile);;
    sentinel) recoveries=(guardian_generation_restart);;
    guardian) recoveries=(controller_state_restart usr1_wake);;
    session) recoveries=(keeper_session_recreate singleton_keeper_controller
      same_nonce_lane_relaunch window_recreate_once);;
    markers) recoveries=(nonce_rejection marker_wake);;
    queue) recoveries=(offline_plus_probe offline_drain online_immediate orphan_requeue
      state_reconcile);;
    process) recoveries=(no_restart child_recover);;
    *) return 5;;
  esac
  audit_handler_begin "$runtime" "$producer" "$kind" "$attempt_id" \
    "$queue_item" "$claim_token" "$expected_actor" "${recoveries[@]}"
}
audit_handler_open() {
  local runtime producer expected_actor attempt_source matches recovery row fault cause_id cause_hash count
  local null attempt before specification name source sealed hash ticket_source auth ticket
  runtime=$1; producer=$2; expected_actor=$3; attempt_source=$4; shift 4
  audit_hook_load "$runtime"
  [ "$(audit_hook_expected_actor "$producer" "$expected_actor")" = "$expected_actor" ] || return 5
  [ -f "$attempt_source" ] && [ ! -L "$attempt_source" ] || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$attempt_source")" = 600 ] || return 5
  audit_hook_reduce "$runtime"
  matches=$runtime/.audit-handler-matches.$$.json
  printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$matches"
  for recovery in "$@"; do
    audit_hook_producer_allows "$producer" "$recovery" || return 5
    row=$(audit_hook_pending_fault "$recovery")
    [ -z "$row" ] || {
      IFS=$'\t' read -r fault cause_id cause_hash <<EOF
$row
EOF
      jq --arg fault "$fault" --arg recovery "$recovery" --argjson cause_id "$cause_id" \
        --arg cause_hash "$cause_hash" \
        '.+[{fault_id:$fault,recovery:$recovery,cause_event_id:$cause_id,
          cause_event_hash:$cause_hash}]' "$matches" >"$matches.next"
      mv -f "$matches.next" "$matches"
    }
  done
  count=$(jq length "$matches")
  [ "$count" -le 1 ] || { rm -f "$matches"; return 5; }
  [ "$count" -eq 1 ] || { rm -f "$matches"; return 0; }
  null=$runtime/.audit-null-event.$$.json
  printf '%s\n' '{}' >"$null"
  audit_hook_validate_attempt "$attempt_source" "$null" || { rm -f "$matches" "$null"; return 5; }
  rm -f "$null"
  attempt=$(runtime_audit_seal "$runtime/audit/handler-attempts" "$attempt_source") || return 5
  before=$runtime/.audit-before-artifacts.$$.json
  printf '%s\n' '[]' >"$before"
  for specification in "${AUDIT_HANDLER_BEFORE_ARTIFACTS[@]:-}"; do
    [ -n "$specification" ] || continue
    name=${specification%%=*}; source=${specification#*=}
    [ -n "$name" ] && [ "$source" != "$specification" ] &&
      [ -f "$source" ] && [ ! -L "$source" ] || return 5
    sealed=$(runtime_audit_seal "$runtime/audit/handler-output-artifacts" "$source") || return 5
    hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$sealed")
    jq --arg name "$name" --arg path "$sealed" --arg hash "$hash" \
      '.+[{name:$name,path:$path,hash:$hash}]' "$before" >"$before.next"
    mv -f "$before.next" "$before"
  done
  ticket_source=$runtime/.audit-handler-ticket.$$.json
  jq -n --arg producer "$producer" --arg expected_actor "$expected_actor" --arg attempt "$attempt" \
    --arg attempt_hash "$(runtime_sha256 "$attempt")" \
    --argjson cursor "$(jq -r .last_event_sequence "$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json")" \
    --argjson opened_at "$(runtime_now)" --slurpfile match "$matches" --slurpfile before "$before" '
    {schema_version:1,producer:$producer,expected_actor:$expected_actor,
      recovery:$match[0][0].recovery,
      fault_id:$match[0][0].fault_id,cause_event_id:$match[0][0].cause_event_id,
      cause_event_hash:$match[0][0].cause_event_hash,opened_event_cursor:$cursor,
      opened_at:$opened_at,attempt:{path:$attempt,hash:$attempt_hash},
      before_artifacts:$before[0]}' >"$ticket_source"
  auth=$(runtime_audit_auth_tag "$runtime/audit-auth.key" "$ticket_source") || return 5
  jq --arg auth "$auth" '.+{auth_tag:$auth}' "$ticket_source" >"$ticket_source.next"
  mv -f "$ticket_source.next" "$ticket_source"
  ticket=$(runtime_audit_seal "$runtime/audit/handler-tickets" "$ticket_source")
  rm -f "$matches" "$before" "$ticket_source"
  printf '%s\n' "$ticket"
}
audit_handler_attach() {
  local runtime ticket payload artifacts specification name source sealed hash recovery required
  local envelope_source auth
  runtime=$1 ticket=$2 payload=$3; shift 3
  audit_hook_load "$runtime"
  [ -n "$ticket" ] || return 0
  ticket=$(audit_hook_verify_internal "$runtime/audit/handler-tickets" "$ticket") || return 5
  audit_hook_verify_auth "$ticket" || return 5
  [ -f "$payload" ] && [ ! -L "$payload" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$payload")" = 600 ] || return 5
  artifacts=$runtime/.audit-handler-artifacts.$$.json
  jq '.before_artifacts' "$ticket" >"$artifacts"
  for specification in "$@"; do
    name=${specification%%=*}; source=${specification#*=}
    [ -n "$name" ] && [ "$source" != "$specification" ] &&
      [ -f "$source" ] && [ ! -L "$source" ] || return 5
    sealed=$(runtime_audit_seal "$runtime/audit/handler-output-artifacts" "$source") || return 5
    hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$sealed")
    jq --arg name "$name" --arg path "$sealed" --arg hash "$hash" \
      '.+[{name:$name,path:$path,hash:$hash}]' "$artifacts" >"$artifacts.next"
    mv -f "$artifacts.next" "$artifacts"
  done
  jq -e 'length>0 and ([.[].name]|unique|length)==length' "$artifacts" >/dev/null || return 5
  recovery=$(jq -r .recovery "$ticket")
  while IFS= read -r required; do
    [ "$(jq --arg name "$required" '[.[]|select(.name==$name)]|length' "$artifacts")" -eq 1 ] ||
      return 5
  done < <(audit_hook_required_names "$recovery")
  envelope_source=$runtime/.audit-handler-envelope.$$.json
  jq -n --arg ticket "$ticket" --arg ticket_hash "$(runtime_sha256 "$ticket")" \
    --argjson attached_at "$(runtime_now)" --slurpfile ticket_data "$ticket" \
    --slurpfile artifacts "$artifacts" '
    {schema_version:1,producer:$ticket_data[0].producer,
      expected_actor:$ticket_data[0].expected_actor,recovery:$ticket_data[0].recovery,
      fault_id:$ticket_data[0].fault_id,cause_event_id:$ticket_data[0].cause_event_id,
      cause_event_hash:$ticket_data[0].cause_event_hash,
      opened_event_cursor:$ticket_data[0].opened_event_cursor,
      ticket:{path:$ticket,hash:$ticket_hash},attempt:$ticket_data[0].attempt,
      outputs:$artifacts[0],attached_at:$attached_at}' >"$envelope_source"
  auth=$(runtime_audit_auth_tag "$runtime/audit-auth.key" "$envelope_source") || return 5
  jq --arg auth "$auth" '.+{auth_tag:$auth}' "$envelope_source" >"$envelope_source.next"
  mv -f "$envelope_source.next" "$envelope_source"
  jq --slurpfile envelope "$envelope_source" '.+{audit_handler:$envelope[0]}' \
    "$payload" >"$payload.next"
  chmod 600 "$payload.next"; mv -f "$payload.next" "$payload"
  rm -f "$artifacts" "$envelope_source"
}
audit_handler_attach_outputs() {
  local runtime ticket payload outputs recovery name output specification
  local -a specifications
  runtime=$1 ticket=$2 payload=$3 outputs=$4
  [ -n "$ticket" ] || return 0
  [ -f "$outputs" ] && [ ! -L "$outputs" ] || return 5
  recovery=$(jq -r .recovery "$ticket")
  specifications=()
  while IFS= read -r name; do
    if [ "$(jq --arg name "$name" '[.before_artifacts[]|select(.name==$name)]|length' \
      "$ticket")" -eq 1 ]; then continue; fi
    output=$runtime/.audit-native-output.$$.${#specifications[@]}.json
    jq --arg name "$name" '.[$name]' "$outputs" >"$output"
    jq -e 'type=="object"' "$output" >/dev/null || return 5
    specifications[${#specifications[@]}]="$name=$output"
  done < <(audit_hook_required_names "$recovery")
  audit_handler_attach "$runtime" "$ticket" "$payload" "${specifications[@]}"
  for specification in "${specifications[@]}"; do rm -f "${specification#*=}"; done
}
audit_handler_event_exact() {
  local runtime ticket actor type action payload fingerprint candidate found count
  local sequence previous expected_payload_hash ticket_hash found_hash candidate_hash
  runtime=$1 ticket=$2 actor=$3 type=$4 action=$5 payload=$6 fingerprint=$7
  found=''; count=0
  for candidate in "$runtime"/events/*.json "$runtime"/pinned-events/*.json; do
    [ -f "$candidate" ] && [ ! -L "$candidate" ] || continue
    if jq -e --arg actor "$actor" --arg type "$type" --arg action "$action" '
      .actor==$actor and .type==$type and .action_id==$action' "$candidate" >/dev/null; then
      sequence=$(jq -er .sequence "$candidate") || return 5
      previous=$(jq -r '.previous_event_hash//""' "$candidate") || return 5
      runtime_verify_event_file "$candidate" "$sequence" "$previous" || return 5
      candidate_hash=$(jq -er .event_hash "$candidate") || return 5
      if [ "$count" -eq 0 ]; then
        found=$candidate; found_hash=$candidate_hash; count=1
      elif [ "$candidate_hash" = "$found_hash" ] && cmp -s "$found" "$candidate"; then
        : # Raw and pinned byte-identical copies are one cryptographic event identity.
      else
        return 5
      fi
    fi
  done
  [ "$count" -ne 0 ] || return 1
  sequence=$(jq -er .sequence "$found"); previous=$(jq -r '.previous_event_hash//""' "$found")
  expected_payload_hash=$(jq -Sc . "$payload" | runtime_sha256_stdin)
  [ "$(jq -r .payload_sha256 "$found")" = "$expected_payload_hash" ] || return 5
  if [ -n "$fingerprint" ]; then
    [ "$(jq -r .fingerprint "$found")" = "$fingerprint" ] || return 5
  else
    [ "$(jq -r '.fingerprint==null' "$found")" = true ] || return 5
  fi
  if [ -n "$ticket" ]; then
    ticket_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$ticket")
    jq -e --arg ticket "$ticket" --arg ticket_hash "$ticket_hash" \
      --slurpfile ticket_data "$ticket" '
        .payload.audit_handler.ticket.path==$ticket and
        .payload.audit_handler.ticket.hash==$ticket_hash and
        .payload.audit_handler.cause_event_hash==$ticket_data[0].cause_event_hash and
        .payload.audit_handler.recovery==$ticket_data[0].recovery' "$found" >/dev/null ||
      return 5
  fi
}
audit_handler_pair_accepted() {
  local runtime ticket actor type action ticket_hash lookup event receipt receipt_count
  local cause recovery key state pair evidence evidence_hash receipt_hash artifact candidate
  runtime=$1 ticket=$2 actor=$3 type=$4 action=$5
  audit_hook_load "$runtime"
  ticket=$(audit_hook_verify_internal "$runtime/audit/handler-tickets" "$ticket") || return 1
  audit_hook_verify_auth "$ticket" || return 1
  ticket_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$ticket")
  lookup=$runtime/.audit-pair-event.$$.json
  audit_hook_lookup_event "$runtime" "$actor" "$type" "$action" "$lookup" || {
    rm -f "$lookup"; return 1; }
  event=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$(jq -er .event_hash "$lookup")") || {
    rm -f "$lookup"; return 1; }
  jq -e --arg ticket "$ticket" --arg ticket_hash "$ticket_hash" \
    --slurpfile ticket_data "$ticket" '
      .payload.audit_handler.ticket.path==$ticket and
      .payload.audit_handler.ticket.hash==$ticket_hash and
      .payload.audit_handler.cause_event_hash==$ticket_data[0].cause_event_hash and
      .payload.audit_handler.recovery==$ticket_data[0].recovery' \
    "$event" >/dev/null || { rm -f "$lookup"; return 1; }
  receipt=''; receipt_count=0
  for candidate in "$runtime"/audit/handler-receipts/*.json; do
    [ -f "$candidate" ] && [ ! -L "$candidate" ] || continue
    if jq -e --arg ticket "$ticket" --arg ticket_hash "$ticket_hash" \
      --arg event_hash "$(jq -r .event_hash "$event")" '
        .ticket.path==$ticket and .ticket.hash==$ticket_hash and
        .result_event.event_hash==$event_hash' "$candidate" >/dev/null; then
      receipt=$candidate; receipt_count=$((receipt_count + 1))
    fi
  done
  [ "$receipt_count" -eq 1 ] || { rm -f "$lookup"; return 1; }
  receipt=$(audit_hook_verify_internal "$runtime/audit/handler-receipts" "$receipt") || {
    rm -f "$lookup"; return 1; }
  audit_hook_verify_auth "$receipt" || { rm -f "$lookup"; return 1; }
  cause=$(jq -r .cause_event_hash "$ticket"); recovery=$(jq -r .recovery "$ticket")
  key=$cause\|$recovery; state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  pair=$(jq -c --arg key "$key" '.audit.recovery_pairs[$key]//null' "$state")
  [ "$pair" != null ] &&
    [ "$(printf '%s\n' "$pair" | jq -r .cause_event_hash)" = "$cause" ] &&
    [ "$(printf '%s\n' "$pair" | jq -r .recovery)" = "$recovery" ] || {
      rm -f "$lookup"; return 1; }
  evidence=$(printf '%s\n' "$pair" | jq -r .evidence_path)
  evidence_hash=$(printf '%s\n' "$pair" | jq -r .evidence_hash)
  evidence=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$runtime/audit/recovery-evidence" \
    "$evidence" "$evidence_hash") || { rm -f "$lookup"; return 1; }
  receipt_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$receipt")
  artifact=$(jq -er --arg hash "$receipt_hash" '
    [.authoritative_artifacts[]|select(.name=="handler_receipt" and .hash==$hash)]|
    select(length==1)|.[0].path' "$evidence") || { rm -f "$lookup"; return 1; }
  [ -f "$artifact" ] && [ ! -L "$artifact" ] && cmp -s "$artifact" "$receipt" || {
    rm -f "$lookup"; return 1; }
  rm -f "$lookup"
}
audit_handler_publish() {
  local runtime ticket actor type action payload outputs fingerprint attempt rc forced
  local emit_attempt emit_rc emit_forced event_rc
  local -a command
  runtime=$1 ticket=$2 actor=$3 type=$4 action=$5 payload=$6 outputs=$7 fingerprint=$8
  audit_hook_load "$runtime"
  [ -f "$payload" ] && [ ! -L "$payload" ] || return 5
  chmod 600 "$payload"
  audit_handler_attach_outputs "$runtime" "$ticket" "$payload" "$outputs" || return 5
  command=("$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" emit "$actor" "$type" "$action"
    --payload-file "$payload")
  [ -z "$fingerprint" ] || command+=(--fingerprint "$fingerprint")
  event_rc=0
  audit_handler_event_exact "$runtime" "$ticket" "$actor" "$type" "$action" \
    "$payload" "$fingerprint" || event_rc=$?
  [ "$event_rc" -eq 0 ] || [ "$event_rc" -eq 1 ] || return "$event_rc"
  emit_attempt=0; emit_forced=0
  while [ "$event_rc" -ne 0 ] && [ "$emit_attempt" -lt 8 ]; do
    emit_attempt=$((emit_attempt + 1)); emit_rc=0
    if [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_AUDIT_PRE_EMIT_RC75_ONCE:-0}" = 1 ] &&
       [ "$emit_forced" -eq 0 ]; then
      emit_forced=1; emit_rc=75
    else
      "${command[@]}" || emit_rc=$?
    fi
    event_rc=0
    audit_handler_event_exact "$runtime" "$ticket" "$actor" "$type" "$action" \
      "$payload" "$fingerprint" || event_rc=$?
    [ "$event_rc" -eq 0 ] && break
    [ "$event_rc" -eq 1 ] || return "$event_rc"
    if [ "$emit_rc" -ne 0 ] && [ "$emit_rc" -ne 75 ] && [ "$emit_rc" -ne 99 ]; then
      return "$emit_rc"
    fi
    sleep 0.02
  done
  [ "$event_rc" -eq 0 ] || return 75
  attempt=0; forced=0
  while [ "$attempt" -lt 8 ]; do
    attempt=$((attempt + 1)); rc=0
    if [ -n "$ticket" ] && [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_AUDIT_POST_EMIT_RC75_ONCE:-0}" = 1 ] &&
       [ "$forced" -eq 0 ]; then
      forced=1; rc=75
    else
      audit_hook_reduce "$runtime" || rc=$?
      if [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -n "$ticket" ]; then
        audit_handler_close "$runtime" "$ticket" "$actor" "$type" "$action" || rc=$?
      fi
    fi
    [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && return 0
    if [ -n "$ticket" ] &&
       audit_handler_pair_accepted "$runtime" "$ticket" "$actor" "$type" "$action"; then
      return 0
    fi
    [ "$rc" -eq 75 ] || return "$rc"
    "$AUDIT_BIN/polylane-runtime.sh" --dir "$runtime" wake >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    sleep 0.02
  done
  return 75
}
audit_handler_close() {
  local runtime ticket actor type action lookup event ticket_hash envelope attempt name path hash
  local receipt_source auth receipt
  runtime=$1 ticket=$2 actor=$3 type=$4 action=$5
  audit_hook_load "$runtime"
  [ -n "$ticket" ] || return 75
  ticket=$(audit_hook_verify_internal "$runtime/audit/handler-tickets" "$ticket") || return 5
  audit_hook_verify_auth "$ticket" || return 5
  [ "$(jq -r .expected_actor "$ticket")" = "$actor" ] || return 5
  [ "$(audit_hook_expected_actor "$(jq -r .producer "$ticket")" "$actor")" = "$actor" ] ||
    return 5
  lookup=$runtime/.audit-handler-result.$$.json
  audit_hook_lookup_event "$runtime" "$actor" "$type" "$action" "$lookup" ||
    { rm -f "$lookup"; return 75; }
  event=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$(jq -er .event_hash "$lookup")") || return 5
  ticket_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$ticket")
  jq -e --arg actor "$actor" --arg type "$type" --arg action "$action" \
    --argjson opened "$(jq -r .opened_event_cursor "$ticket")" \
    --arg ticket_path "$ticket" --arg ticket_hash "$ticket_hash" \
    --slurpfile ticket_data "$ticket" '
    .actor==$actor and .actor==$ticket_data[0].expected_actor and
    .type==$type and .action_id==$action and .sequence>$opened and
    .payload.audit_handler.schema_version==1 and
    .payload.audit_handler.producer==$ticket_data[0].producer and
    .payload.audit_handler.expected_actor==$ticket_data[0].expected_actor and
    .payload.audit_handler.recovery==$ticket_data[0].recovery and
    .payload.audit_handler.fault_id==$ticket_data[0].fault_id and
    .payload.audit_handler.cause_event_hash==$ticket_data[0].cause_event_hash and
    .payload.audit_handler.opened_event_cursor==$ticket_data[0].opened_event_cursor and
    .payload.audit_handler.ticket.path==$ticket_path and
    .payload.audit_handler.ticket.hash==$ticket_hash' "$event" >/dev/null || return 5
  envelope=$runtime/.audit-handler-envelope-copy.$$.json
  jq '.payload.audit_handler' "$event" >"$envelope"
  audit_hook_verify_auth "$envelope" || return 5
  attempt=$(audit_hook_verify_internal "$runtime/audit/handler-attempts" \
    "$(jq -r .attempt.path "$ticket")") || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$attempt")" = "$(jq -r .attempt.hash "$ticket")" ] || return 5
  audit_hook_validate_attempt "$attempt" "$event" || return 5
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r name path hash; do
    runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$runtime/audit/handler-output-artifacts" \
      "$path" "$hash" >/dev/null || return 5
  done < <(jq -r '.outputs[]|[.name,.path,.hash]|@tsv' "$envelope")
  receipt_source=$runtime/.audit-handler-receipt.$$.json
  jq -n --arg ticket "$ticket" --arg ticket_hash "$ticket_hash" \
    --arg event_path "$event" --arg event_hash "$(jq -r .event_hash "$event")" \
    --arg event_file_hash "$(runtime_sha256 "$event")" \
    --argjson event_id "$(jq -r .sequence "$event")" \
    --arg actor "$actor" --arg type "$type" --arg action "$action" \
    --argjson closed_at "$(runtime_now)" --slurpfile ticket_data "$ticket" \
    --slurpfile envelope "$envelope" '
    {schema_version:1,producer:$ticket_data[0].producer,
      expected_actor:$ticket_data[0].expected_actor,recovery:$ticket_data[0].recovery,
      fault_id:$ticket_data[0].fault_id,cause_event_id:$ticket_data[0].cause_event_id,
      cause_event_hash:$ticket_data[0].cause_event_hash,
      ticket:{path:$ticket,hash:$ticket_hash},
      result_event:{path:$event_path,file_hash:$event_file_hash,event_id:$event_id,
        event_hash:$event_hash,actor:$actor,type:$type,action_id:$action},
      output_artifacts:$envelope[0].outputs,closed_at:$closed_at}' >"$receipt_source"
  auth=$(runtime_audit_auth_tag "$runtime/audit-auth.key" "$receipt_source") || return 5
  jq --arg auth "$auth" '.+{auth_tag:$auth}' "$receipt_source" >"$receipt_source.next"
  mv -f "$receipt_source.next" "$receipt_source"
  receipt=$(runtime_audit_seal "$runtime/audit/handler-receipts" "$receipt_source")
  rm -f "$lookup" "$envelope" "$receipt_source"
  audit_hook_forward_receipt "$runtime" "$receipt"
}
audit_hook_forward_receipt() {
  local runtime receipt ticket producer recovery row fault cause_id cause_hash event_path event_hash
  local envelope attempt required name path hash sealed post_type
  local -a arguments
  runtime=$1 receipt=$2
  audit_hook_load "$runtime"
  receipt=$(audit_hook_verify_internal "$runtime/audit/handler-receipts" "$receipt") || return 5
  audit_hook_verify_auth "$receipt" || return 5
  ticket=$(audit_hook_verify_internal "$runtime/audit/handler-tickets" \
    "$(jq -r .ticket.path "$receipt")") || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$ticket")" = "$(jq -r .ticket.hash "$receipt")" ] || return 5
  audit_hook_verify_auth "$ticket" || return 5
  jq -e --slurpfile ticket "$ticket" '
    .producer==$ticket[0].producer and .expected_actor==$ticket[0].expected_actor and
    .result_event.actor==$ticket[0].expected_actor and .recovery==$ticket[0].recovery and
    .fault_id==$ticket[0].fault_id and .cause_event_id==$ticket[0].cause_event_id and
    .cause_event_hash==$ticket[0].cause_event_hash' "$receipt" >/dev/null || return 5
  producer=$(jq -r .producer "$receipt"); recovery=$(jq -r .recovery "$receipt")
  audit_hook_producer_allows "$producer" "$recovery" || return 5
  [ "$(audit_hook_expected_actor "$producer" "$(jq -r .expected_actor "$receipt")")" = \
    "$(jq -r .result_event.actor "$receipt")" ] || return 5
  row=$(audit_hook_pending_fault "$recovery"); [ -n "$row" ] || return 5
  IFS=$'\t' read -r fault cause_id cause_hash <<EOF
$row
EOF
  jq -e --arg fault "$fault" --argjson cause_id "$cause_id" --arg cause_hash "$cause_hash" '
    .fault_id==$fault and .cause_event_id==$cause_id and .cause_event_hash==$cause_hash' \
    "$receipt" >/dev/null || return 5
  event_path=$(runtime_audit_file_under "$runtime/events" "$(jq -r .result_event.path "$receipt")" \
    2>/dev/null || true)
  [ -n "$event_path" ] || event_path=$(runtime_audit_file_under "$runtime/pinned-events" \
    "$(jq -r .result_event.path "$receipt")" 2>/dev/null || true)
  [ -n "$event_path" ] && [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$event_path")" = \
    "$(jq -r .result_event.file_hash "$receipt")" ] || return 5
  event_hash=$(jq -r .result_event.event_hash "$receipt")
  [ "$(jq -r .event_hash "$event_path")" = "$event_hash" ] || return 5
  jq -e --slurpfile receipt "$receipt" '
    .sequence==$receipt[0].result_event.event_id and
    .actor==$receipt[0].result_event.actor and .type==$receipt[0].result_event.type and
    .action_id==$receipt[0].result_event.action_id' "$event_path" >/dev/null || return 5
  envelope=$runtime/.audit-forward-envelope.$$.json
  jq '.payload.audit_handler' "$event_path" >"$envelope"
  audit_hook_verify_auth "$envelope" || return 5
  jq -e --arg ticket "$ticket" --arg ticket_hash "$(runtime_sha256 "$ticket")" \
    --slurpfile receipt "$receipt" --slurpfile ticket_data "$ticket" '
    .ticket.path==$ticket and .ticket.hash==$ticket_hash and
    .producer==$receipt[0].producer and
    .expected_actor==$receipt[0].expected_actor and
    .expected_actor==$receipt[0].result_event.actor and
    .recovery==$receipt[0].recovery and
    .cause_event_hash==$receipt[0].cause_event_hash and
    .opened_event_cursor==$ticket_data[0].opened_event_cursor and
    .outputs==$receipt[0].output_artifacts' "$envelope" >/dev/null || return 5
  rm -f "$envelope"
  attempt=$(audit_hook_verify_internal "$runtime/audit/handler-attempts" \
    "$(jq -r .attempt.path "$ticket")") || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$attempt")" = "$(jq -r .attempt.hash "$ticket")" ] || return 5
  audit_hook_validate_attempt "$attempt" "$event_path" || return 5
  case $recovery:$(jq -r .result_event.type "$receipt") in
    checkpoint_retry:recovery_action|proof_lease_expiry:recovery_action|\
    guardian_generation_restart:register|controller_state_restart:controller_spawned|\
    keeper_session_recreate:session_recovery|singleton_keeper_controller:session_recovery|\
    same_nonce_lane_relaunch:session_recovery|window_recreate_once:session_recovery|\
    event_replay:recovery_action|boundary_reconcile:recovery_action|\
    nonce_rejection:marker_progress|marker_wake:marker_progress|\
    offline_plus_probe:provider_state|offline_drain:provider_state|online_immediate:provider_state|\
    orphan_requeue:queue_reclaim|state_reconcile:queue_enqueue|\
    usr1_wake:heartbeat|no_restart:quiet_child_decision|child_recover:quiet_child_decision) :;;
    *) return 5;;
  esac
  arguments=()
  while IFS= read -r required; do
    [ "$(jq --arg name "$required" \
      '[.output_artifacts[]|select(.name==$name)]|length' "$receipt")" -eq 1 ] || return 5
  done < <(audit_hook_required_names "$recovery")
  while IFS=$'\t' read -r name path hash; do
    sealed=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$runtime/audit/handler-output-artifacts" \
      "$path" "$hash") || return 5
    arguments[${#arguments[@]}]="$name=$sealed"
  done < <(jq -r '.output_artifacts[]|[.name,.path,.hash]|@tsv' "$receipt")
  arguments[${#arguments[@]}]="handler_receipt=$receipt"
  post_type=$(runtime_audit_expected_post_type "$recovery") || return 5
  audit_hook_record_recovery "$runtime" "$recovery" "$post_type" "${arguments[@]}"
}
~~~

Install the receipt-convergent final body for `core/scripts/lib/polylane-runtime-audit.sh`:

~~~bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
AUDIT_LIB=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd -P)
AUDIT_BIN=$(cd "$AUDIT_LIB/.." && pwd -P)
. "$AUDIT_LIB/polylane-runtime-audit-reducer.sh"
runtime_audit_mode() {
  stat -f '%Lp' "$1" 2>/dev/null || stat -c '%a' "$1" 2>/dev/null
}
runtime_audit_file_under() {
  local root parent file
  root=$(cd "$1" && pwd -P) || return 5
  [ -f "$2" ] && [ ! -L "$2" ] || return 5
  parent=$(cd "$(dirname "$2")" && pwd -P) || return 5
  file=$parent/$(basename "$2")
  case "$file" in "$root"/*) printf '%s\n' "$file";; *) return 5;; esac
}
runtime_audit_event_by_hash() {
  local hash candidate expected previous checkpoint
  hash=$1
  printf '%s\n' "$hash" | grep -Eq '^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$' || return 5
  for candidate in "$RUNTIME_DIR"/events/*.json; do
    [ -f "$candidate" ] && [ ! -L "$candidate" ] || continue
    [ "$(jq -r .event_hash "$candidate")" = "$hash" ] || continue
    expected=$(jq -r .sequence "$candidate")
    previous=$(jq -r '.previous_event_hash//""' "$candidate")
    runtime_verify_event_file "$candidate" "$expected" "$previous" || return 5
    printf '%s\n' "$candidate"
    return
  done
  candidate=$RUNTIME_DIR/pinned-events/${hash#sha256:}.json
  [ -f "$candidate" ] && [ ! -L "$candidate" ] || return 5
  expected=$(jq -r .sequence "$candidate")
  previous=$(jq -r '.previous_event_hash//""' "$candidate")
  runtime_verify_event_file "$candidate" "$expected" "$previous" || return 5
  [ "$(jq -r .event_hash "$candidate")" = "$hash" ] || return 5
  checkpoint=$(runtime_latest_checkpoint); [ -n "$checkpoint" ] || return 5
  if [ "${RUNTIME_AUDIT_VERIFIED_CHECKPOINT:-}" != "$checkpoint" ]; then
    runtime_verify_checkpoint "$checkpoint" || return 5
    RUNTIME_AUDIT_VERIFIED_CHECKPOINT=$checkpoint
  fi
  jq -e --arg event_hash "$hash" --arg basename "$(basename "$candidate")" \
    --arg file_hash "$(runtime_sha256 "$candidate")" '
    [.audit_pins.files[]|select(.event_hash==$event_hash and
      .basename==$basename and .file_hash==$file_hash and .mode==400)]|length==1' \
    "$checkpoint" >/dev/null || return 5
  printf '%s\n' "$candidate"
}
runtime_audit_seal() {
  local root source lock hash destination
  root=$1 source=$2
  [ ! -L "$root" ] || return 5
  lock=$root.lock
  runtime_lock_acquire "$lock" || return $?
  trap 'chmod 500 "$root" 2>/dev/null || true; runtime_lock_release "$lock" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true' RETURN
  mkdir -p "$root"; chmod 700 "$root"
  [ -f "$source" ] && [ ! -L "$source" ] || return 5
  jq -Sc . "$source" >"$root/.seal.$$.json"
  hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$root/.seal.$$.json")
  destination=$root/${hash#sha256:}.json
  if [ -f "$destination" ]; then
    [ ! -L "$destination" ] && [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$destination")" = "$hash" ] &&
      [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$destination")" = 400 ] || return 5
    rm -f "$root/.seal.$$.json"
  else
    chmod 400 "$root/.seal.$$.json"; mv -f "$root/.seal.$$.json" "$destination"
  fi
  chmod 500 "$root"
  runtime_lock_release "$lock"; trap - RETURN
  printf '%s\n' "$destination"
}
runtime_audit_validate_sealed() {
  local root file expected
  root=$1 file=$2 expected=$3
  file=$(runtime_audit_file_under "$root" "$file") || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$file")" = 400 ] || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$file")" = "$expected" ] || return 5
  [ "$(basename "$file" .json)" = "${expected#sha256:}" ] || return 5
  printf '%s\n' "$file"
}
runtime_goal_active_domain() {
  local state output now
  state=$1; output=$2
  [ -f "$state" ] && [ ! -L "$state" ] || return 5
  now=$(runtime_now)
  jq -Sc --argjson now "$now" '
    {goal_candidates:([.queue.items[]? |
        select(((.status=="starting" or .status=="running") and .claim!=null) or
          ((.status=="ready" or .status=="scheduled") and .claim==null and
            .next_action_at<=$now)) |
        {id,goal_ref,status,priority,next_action_at,
          claim_token:(.claim.token//null)}] | sort_by(.id)),
      recovery:(if .recovery==null then null else
        {goal_ref:(.recovery.goal_ref//"runtime-recovery"),
          event_hash:.recovery.event_hash} end)}' "$state" >"$output" || return 5
  [ -s "$output" ] && [ ! -L "$output" ] || return 5
}
runtime_goal_snapshot_validate() {
  local path expected_hash expected_sequence domain_hash snapshots parent revision actual_domain
  path=$1; expected_hash=$2; expected_sequence=$3; domain_hash=$4; actual_domain=$5
  snapshots=$(cd "$RUNTIME_DIR/snapshots" && pwd -P) || return 5
  parent=$(cd "$(dirname "$path")" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P) || return 5
  revision=$(basename "$parent")
  case $revision in ''|*[!0-9]*) return 5;; esac
  [ "$path" = "$snapshots/$revision/state.json" ] &&
    [ -f "$path" ] && [ ! -L "$path" ] || return 5
  printf '%s\n' "$expected_hash" | grep -Eq '^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$' || return 5
  printf '%s\n' "$domain_hash" | grep -Eq '^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$' || return 5
  case $expected_sequence in ''|*[!0-9]*) return 5;; esac
  [ "$revision" -eq $((expected_sequence + 1)) ] || return 5
  [ "$(jq -er '.last_event_sequence|select(type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0)' "$path")" = \
    "$expected_sequence" ] || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$path")" = "$expected_hash" ] || return 5
  runtime_goal_active_domain "$path" "$actual_domain" || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$actual_domain")" = "$domain_hash" ] || return 5
}
runtime_goal_observation_matches() {
  local state observation now claim proof_hash proof item_id
  state=$1 observation=$2 now=$3
  claim=$(jq -r '.active.claim_token//""' "$observation")
  if [ -n "$claim" ]; then
    jq -e --argjson now "$now" --slurpfile observation "$observation" '
      $observation[0].active.recovery_event_hash==null and
      any(.queue.items[];
        .id==$observation[0].active.item_id and
        .goal_ref==$observation[0].active.goal_ref and
        (.status|IN("starting","running")) and
        .claim.token==$observation[0].active.claim_token)' "$state" >/dev/null
    return
  fi
  jq -e --argjson now "$now" --slurpfile observation "$observation" '
    ($observation[0].active.recovery_event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    any(.queue.items[];
      .id==$observation[0].active.item_id and
      .goal_ref==$observation[0].active.goal_ref and
      (.status|IN("ready","scheduled")) and .claim==null and .next_action_at<=$now)' \
    "$state" >/dev/null || return 5
  proof_hash=$(jq -r .active.recovery_event_hash "$observation")
  proof=$(runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$proof_hash" 2>/dev/null) || return 5
  item_id=$(jq -r .active.item_id "$observation")
  jq -e --arg hash "$proof_hash" --arg id "$item_id" --argjson now "$now" '
    .event_hash==$hash and .at==$now and
    ((.actor=="queue" and .type=="queue_reserve" and
      any(.payload.reservations[]?;.id==$id)) or
     (.actor=="guardian" and
      (.type|IN("dispatch_retry_exhausted","wake_requested"))))' \
    "$proof" >/dev/null
}
runtime_publish_guardian_observation() (
  local source observation input input_hash now state prior evidence_source evidence evidence_hash payload action
  local previous_at previous_hash current_identity previous_identity continuity handoff handoffs
  source=$1; evidence_source=''; payload=''; handoffs=''
  [ -f "$source" ] && [ ! -L "$source" ] || return 5
  input=$(mktemp "$RUNTIME_DIR/.guardian-publish-input.${BASHPID:-$$}.XXXXXX") || return 5
  trap 'rm -f "${input:-}" "${evidence_source:-}" "${payload:-}" "${handoffs:-}"' EXIT INT TERM HUP
  [ -f "$input" ] && [ ! -L "$input" ] && [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$input")" = 600 ] || return 5
  jq -Sc . "$source" >"$input" || return 5
  [ -s "$input" ] || return 5
  chmod 400 "$input"; input_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$input"); observation=$input
  now=$(runtime_now)
  jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
    (keys|sort)==(["identity","kind","observed_at","schema_version"]|sort) and
    .schema_version==1 and .kind=="guardian" and .observed_at==$now and
    (.identity|keys|sort)==
      (["generation","ownership_token","pid","role","start_token"]|sort) and
    .identity.role=="guardian" and (.identity.pid|type=="number" and .>0) and
    (.identity.start_token|type=="string" and length>0) and
    (.identity.generation|type=="number" and .>0) and
    (.identity.ownership_token|type=="string" and length>0)' \
    "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
  runtime_reduce || return $?
  [ -f "$observation" ] && [ ! -L "$observation" ] && [ -s "$observation" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$observation")" = 400 ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$observation")" = "$input_hash" ] || return 5
  jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
    .schema_version==1 and .kind=="guardian" and .observed_at==$now and
    .identity.role=="guardian"' "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  prior=$(jq -c '.audit.last_guardian_observation//null' "$state")
  if [ "$prior" != null ]; then
    previous_at=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .observed_at)
    # Same-tick repetition has no positive interval: do not seal or emit duplicates.
    [ "$previous_at" -ne "$now" ] || return 76
    [ "$previous_at" -lt "$now" ] || return 5
  fi
  evidence_source=$(mktemp "$RUNTIME_DIR/.guardian-evidence.${BASHPID:-$$}.XXXXXX") || return 5
  [ -f "$evidence_source" ] && [ ! -L "$evidence_source" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$evidence_source")" = 600 ] || return 5
  if [ "$prior" = null ]; then
    jq -Sc . "$observation" >"$evidence_source" || return 5
    [ -s "$evidence_source" ] || return 5
    chmod 400 "$evidence_source"
    evidence=$(runtime_audit_seal "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" "$evidence_source") || {
      rm -f "$evidence_source"; return 5; }
    [ -s "$evidence" ] && [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$evidence")" = 400 ] || return 5
    evidence_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$evidence")
    payload=$RUNTIME_DIR/.guardian-observed.$$.json
    jq -n --arg path "$evidence" --arg hash "$evidence_hash" \
      --slurpfile evidence "$evidence" '
      {kind:"guardian",observed_at:$evidence[0].observed_at,
        evidence_path:$path,evidence_hash:$hash,identity:$evidence[0].identity}' >"$payload"
    action="guardian-observed:$now:${evidence_hash#sha256:}"
    runtime_emit audit guardian_observed "$action" --fingerprint "$evidence_hash" \
      --payload-file "$payload"
  else
    previous_hash=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .event_hash)
    current_identity=$(jq -c .identity "$observation")
    previous_identity=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -c .identity)
    continuity=same_identity; handoff=null
    if [ "$current_identity" != "$previous_identity" ]; then
      handoffs=$RUNTIME_DIR/.guardian-handoffs.$$.json
      jq --argjson old "$previous_identity" --argjson new "$current_identity" \
        --argjson from "$previous_at" --argjson to "$now" '
        [.audit.postconditions[]|select(.type=="actor_restarted" and
          .old_identity==$old and .new_identity==$new and
          .handoff_at>=$from and .handoff_at<=$to)]' "$state" >"$handoffs"
      [ "$(jq 'length' "$handoffs")" -eq 1 ] || {
        rm -f "$handoffs" "$evidence_source"; return 5; }
      continuity=actor_restarted; handoff=$(jq -r '.[0].event_hash' "$handoffs")
      rm -f "$handoffs"
    fi
    jq -Sc --arg previous "$previous_hash" --arg continuity "$continuity" \
      --argjson handoff "$(if [ "$handoff" = null ]; then printf null; else jq -Rn --arg x "$handoff" '$x'; fi)" \
      --argjson from "$previous_at" --argjson until "$now" \
      '.+{previous_event_hash:$previous,continuity:$continuity,
        handoff_event_hash:$handoff,valid_from:$from,valid_until:$until}' \
      "$observation" >"$evidence_source" || return 5
    [ -s "$evidence_source" ] || return 5
    chmod 400 "$evidence_source"
    evidence=$(runtime_audit_seal "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" "$evidence_source") || {
      rm -f "$evidence_source"; return 5; }
    [ -s "$evidence" ] && [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$evidence")" = 400 ] || return 5
    evidence_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$evidence")
    payload=$RUNTIME_DIR/.guardian-coverage.$$.json
    jq -n --arg path "$evidence" --arg hash "$evidence_hash" \
      --slurpfile evidence "$evidence" '
      {kind:"guardian",observed_at:$evidence[0].observed_at,
        valid_from:$evidence[0].valid_from,valid_until:$evidence[0].valid_until,
        evidence_path:$path,evidence_hash:$hash,identity:$evidence[0].identity,
        previous_event_hash:$evidence[0].previous_event_hash,
        continuity:$evidence[0].continuity,
        handoff_event_hash:$evidence[0].handoff_event_hash}' >"$payload"
    action="guardian-coverage:$previous_at:$now:${evidence_hash#sha256:}"
    runtime_emit audit work_coverage "$action" --fingerprint "$evidence_hash" \
      --payload-file "$payload"
  fi
  rm -f "$payload" "$evidence_source"
  return 0
)
runtime_publish_goal_observation() (
  local source observation input input_hash now state evidence_source evidence evidence_hash prior payload type action
  local previous_at source_state source_hash source_sequence domain_hash source_domain current_domain
  local prior_evidence prior_evidence_path prior_evidence_hash prior_identity current_identity
  local test_marker
  source=$1; evidence_source=''; payload=''
  [ -f "$source" ] && [ ! -L "$source" ] || return 5
  input=$(mktemp "$RUNTIME_DIR/.goal-publish-input.${BASHPID:-$$}.XXXXXX") || return 5
  trap 'rm -f "${input:-}" "${evidence_source:-}" "${payload:-}"' EXIT INT TERM HUP
  [ -f "$input" ] && [ ! -L "$input" ] && [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$input")" = 600 ] || return 5
  jq -Sc . "$source" >"$input" || return 5
  [ -s "$input" ] || return 5
  chmod 400 "$input"; input_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$input"); observation=$input
  now=$(runtime_now)
  jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
    (keys|sort)==["active","active_domain_hash","kind","observed_at",
      "schema_version","source_snapshot"] and
    .schema_version==1 and .kind=="goal_work" and .observed_at==$now and
    (.active|keys|sort)==["claim_token","goal_ref","item_id","mode",
      "recovery_event_hash"] and
    (.source_snapshot|keys|sort)==["hash","path","sequence"] and
    (.source_snapshot.path|type=="string" and startswith("/")) and
    (.source_snapshot.hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.source_snapshot.sequence|type=="number" and floor==. and .>=0) and
    (.active_domain_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")) and
    (.active.mode|IN("goal","recovery")) and
    (.active.goal_ref|type=="string" and length>0)' "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
  source_state=$(jq -r .source_snapshot.path "$observation")
  source_hash=$(jq -r .source_snapshot.hash "$observation")
  source_sequence=$(jq -r .source_snapshot.sequence "$observation")
  domain_hash=$(jq -r .active_domain_hash "$observation")
  source_domain=$(mktemp "$RUNTIME_DIR/.goal-source-domain.${BASHPID:-$$}.XXXXXX") || return 5
  current_domain=$(mktemp "$RUNTIME_DIR/.goal-current-domain.${BASHPID:-$$}.XXXXXX") || return 5
  trap 'rm -f "${input:-}" "${evidence_source:-}" "${payload:-}" \
    "${source_domain:-}" "${current_domain:-}"' EXIT INT TERM HUP
  runtime_goal_snapshot_validate "$source_state" "$source_hash" "$source_sequence" \
    "$domain_hash" "$source_domain" || return 5
  if [ "$(jq -r .active.mode "$observation")" = goal ]; then
    runtime_goal_observation_matches "$source_state" "$observation" "$now" || return 5
  else
    jq -e --slurpfile observation "$observation" '
      .recovery!=null and
      .recovery.event_hash==$observation[0].active.recovery_event_hash' "$source_state" >/dev/null || return 5
  fi
  runtime_reduce || return $?
  [ -f "$observation" ] && [ ! -L "$observation" ] && [ -s "$observation" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$observation")" = 400 ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$observation")" = "$input_hash" ] || return 5
  jq -e --argjson now "$now" '
    .schema_version==1 and .kind=="goal_work" and .observed_at==$now and
    (.active_domain_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"))' "$observation" >/dev/null || return 5
  runtime_goal_snapshot_validate "$source_state" "$source_hash" "$source_sequence" \
    "$domain_hash" "$source_domain" || return 5
  state=$(runtime_current_dir)/state.json
  runtime_goal_active_domain "$state" "$current_domain" || return 5
  [ "$(runtime_sha256 "$current_domain")" = "$domain_hash" ] || return 77
  if [ "$(jq -r .active.mode "$observation")" = goal ]; then
    runtime_goal_observation_matches "$state" "$observation" "$now" || return 5
  else
    jq -e --slurpfile observation "$observation" '
      .recovery!=null and
      .recovery.event_hash==$observation[0].active.recovery_event_hash' "$state" >/dev/null || return 5
  fi
  if [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] &&
     [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_FAULT:-}" = goal-observation-publisher-error ]; then
    test_marker=${POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_PUBLISHER_GATE_MARKER:-}
    if [ -n "$test_marker" ]; then
      case $test_marker in "$RUNTIME_DIR"/*) :;; *) return 5;; esac
      [ ! -e "$test_marker" ] && [ ! -L "$test_marker" ] || return 5
      jq -Scn --argjson observed_at "$now" --arg active_domain_hash "$domain_hash" \
        '{schema_version:1,gate:"goal_observation_publisher_error",
          observed_at:$observed_at,active_domain_hash:$active_domain_hash}' \
        >"$test_marker.tmp.$$" || return 5
      chmod 400 "$test_marker.tmp.$$"
      mv -f "$test_marker.tmp.$$" "$test_marker" || return 5
    fi
    return 5
  fi
  prior=$(jq -c '.audit.last_goal_observation//null' "$state")
  if [ "$prior" != null ]; then
    previous_at=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .observed_at)
    prior_evidence_path=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .evidence_path)
    prior_evidence_hash=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .evidence_hash)
    prior_evidence=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" \
      "$prior_evidence_path" "$prior_evidence_hash") || return 5
    prior_identity=$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -c .identity)
    jq -e --argjson previous_at "$previous_at" --argjson identity "$prior_identity" '
      .schema_version==1 and .kind=="goal_work" and .observed_at==$previous_at and
      (.active|{mode,goal_ref})==$identity' "$prior_evidence" >/dev/null || return 5
    # Same-tick repetition is an explicit no-op, never zero-width coverage.
    [ "$previous_at" -ne "$now" ] || return 76
    [ "$previous_at" -lt "$now" ] || return 5
  fi
  evidence_source=$(mktemp "$RUNTIME_DIR/.goal-evidence.${BASHPID:-$$}.XXXXXX") || return 5
  [ -f "$evidence_source" ] && [ ! -L "$evidence_source" ] &&
    [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$evidence_source")" = 600 ] || return 5
  jq -Sc . "$observation" >"$evidence_source" || return 5
  [ -s "$evidence_source" ] || return 5
  chmod 400 "$evidence_source"
  evidence=$(runtime_audit_seal "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" "$evidence_source") || {
    rm -f "$evidence_source"; return 5; }
  [ -s "$evidence" ] && [ "$(runtime_audit_mode "$evidence")" = 400 ] || return 5
  evidence_hash=$(runtime_sha256 "$evidence")
  if [ "${POLYLANE_TEST_MODE:-0}" = 1 ] &&
     [ -n "${POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_AFTER_EVIDENCE_GATE:-}" ] &&
     mkdir "$POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_AFTER_EVIDENCE_GATE.once" 2>/dev/null; then
    : >"$POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_AFTER_EVIDENCE_GATE.ready"
    while [ ! -f "$POLYLANE_TEST_GOAL_AFTER_EVIDENCE_GATE.release" ]; do sleep 0.01; done
  fi
  runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" \
    "$evidence" "$evidence_hash" >/dev/null || return 5
  payload=$RUNTIME_DIR/.goal-work.$$.json
  if [ "$prior" = null ]; then
    jq -n --arg path "$evidence" --arg hash "$evidence_hash" --slurpfile evidence "$evidence" '
      {kind:"goal_work",observed_at:$evidence[0].observed_at,
        evidence_path:$path,evidence_hash:$hash,
        identity:($evidence[0].active|{mode,goal_ref})}' >"$payload"
    type=goal_work_observed; action="goal-observed:$now:${evidence_hash#sha256:}"
  else
    current_identity=$(jq -c '.active|{mode,goal_ref}' "$evidence")
    if jq -e --argjson prior "$prior_identity" '
        (.active|{mode,goal_ref})==$prior' "$evidence" >/dev/null; then
      jq -n --arg path "$evidence" --arg hash "$evidence_hash" \
        --arg previous "$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .event_hash)" \
        --argjson from "$previous_at" --slurpfile evidence "$evidence" '
        {kind:"goal_work",observed_at:$evidence[0].observed_at,
          valid_from:$from,valid_until:$evidence[0].observed_at,
          evidence_path:$path,evidence_hash:$hash,
          identity:($evidence[0].active|{mode,goal_ref}),previous_event_hash:$previous}' >"$payload"
      type=goal_work_coverage; action="goal-coverage:$previous_at:$now:${evidence_hash#sha256:}"
    else
      jq -n --arg current_path "$evidence" --arg current_hash "$evidence_hash" \
        --arg prior_path "$prior_evidence_path" --arg prior_hash "$prior_evidence_hash" \
        --arg previous "$(printf '%s\n' "$prior" | jq -r .event_hash)" \
        --argjson from "$previous_at" --argjson until "$now" \
        --argjson prior_identity "$prior_identity" --argjson current_identity "$current_identity" '
        {kind:"goal_work_transition",observed_at:$until,valid_from:$from,valid_until:$until,
          previous_event_hash:$previous,prior_identity:$prior_identity,
          prior_evidence_path:$prior_path,prior_evidence_hash:$prior_hash,
          current_identity:$current_identity,current_evidence_path:$current_path,
          current_evidence_hash:$current_hash}' >"$payload"
      type=goal_work_transition
      action="goal-transition:$previous_at:$now:${prior_evidence_hash#sha256:}:${evidence_hash#sha256:}"
    fi
  fi
  runtime_emit audit "$type" "$action" --fingerprint "$evidence_hash" --payload-file "$payload"
  rm -f "$payload" "$evidence_source"
  return 0
)
runtime_audit_validate_fact() {
  local fact resolved event evidence previous previous_evidence previous_record continuity handoff
  fact=$1
  resolved=$RUNTIME_DIR/.audit-resolved.$$.txt
  runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$(jq -r .event_hash "$fact")" >"$resolved" || {
    rm -f "$resolved"; return 5; }
  event=$(cat "$resolved")
  if [ "$(jq -r .kind "$fact")" = goal_work ]; then
    if [ "$(jq -r .type "$event")" = goal_work_transition ]; then
      jq -e --slurpfile fact "$fact" '
        .sequence==$fact[0].event_id and .payload.kind=="goal_work_transition" and
        .payload.valid_from==$fact[0].valid_from and
        .payload.valid_until==$fact[0].valid_until and
        .payload.current_evidence_hash==$fact[0].evidence_hash and
        .payload.current_evidence_path==$fact[0].evidence_path and
        .payload.prior_identity==$fact[0].identity and
        .payload.previous_event_hash==$fact[0].previous_event_hash and
        $fact[0].continuity=="active_goal_transition"' "$event" >/dev/null || return 5
    else
      jq -e --slurpfile fact "$fact" '
        .type=="goal_work_coverage" and .sequence==$fact[0].event_id and
        .payload.kind=="goal_work" and .payload.valid_from==$fact[0].valid_from and
        .payload.valid_until==$fact[0].valid_until and
        .payload.evidence_hash==$fact[0].evidence_hash and
        .payload.evidence_path==$fact[0].evidence_path and
        .payload.identity==$fact[0].identity and
        .payload.previous_event_hash==$fact[0].previous_event_hash and
        $fact[0].continuity=="active_goal_or_recovery"' "$event" >/dev/null || return 5
    fi
    evidence=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" \
      "$(jq -r .evidence_path "$fact")" "$(jq -r .evidence_hash "$fact")") || return 5
    jq -e --slurpfile fact "$fact" --slurpfile event "$event" '
      .schema_version==1 and .kind=="goal_work" and
      .observed_at==$fact[0].valid_until and
      (.active|{mode,goal_ref})==(if $event[0].type=="goal_work_transition" then
        $event[0].payload.current_identity else $fact[0].identity end) and
      (.active.mode|IN("goal","recovery")) and
      ((.active.item_id|type=="string" and length>0) or
       (.active.recovery_event_hash|test("^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$")))' "$evidence" >/dev/null || return 5
    runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$(jq -r .previous_event_hash "$fact")" >"$resolved" || {
      rm -f "$resolved"; return 5; }
    previous=$(cat "$resolved")
    case $(jq -r .type "$previous") in
      goal_work_observed|goal_work_coverage|goal_work_transition) :;;
      *) rm -f "$resolved"; return 5;;
    esac
    previous_record=$(jq -c '
      if .type=="goal_work_transition" then
        {identity:.payload.current_identity,path:.payload.current_evidence_path,
          hash:.payload.current_evidence_hash}
      else {identity:.payload.identity,path:.payload.evidence_path,
        hash:.payload.evidence_hash} end' "$previous")
    jq -e --argjson at "$(jq -r .valid_from "$fact")" \
      --argjson identity "$(jq -c .identity "$fact")" \
      --argjson record "$previous_record" '
      .at==$at and .event_hash!=null and $record.identity==$identity' "$previous" >/dev/null || return 5
    previous_evidence=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" \
      "$(printf '%s\n' "$previous_record" | jq -r .path)" \
      "$(printf '%s\n' "$previous_record" | jq -r .hash)") || return 5
    jq -e --argjson at "$(jq -r .valid_from "$fact")" \
      --argjson identity "$(jq -c .identity "$fact")" '
      .schema_version==1 and .kind=="goal_work" and .observed_at==$at and
      (.active|{mode,goal_ref})==$identity' "$previous_evidence" >/dev/null || return 5
    if [ "$(jq -r .type "$event")" = goal_work_transition ]; then
      jq -e --argjson record "$previous_record" '
        .payload.prior_evidence_path==$record.path and
        .payload.prior_evidence_hash==$record.hash' "$event" >/dev/null || return 5
    fi
    rm -f "$resolved"
    return 0
  fi
  jq -e --slurpfile fact "$fact" '
    .type=="work_coverage" and .sequence==$fact[0].event_id and
    .payload.kind==$fact[0].kind and .payload.valid_from==$fact[0].valid_from and
    .payload.valid_until==$fact[0].valid_until and
    .payload.observed_at==.at and .payload.evidence_hash==$fact[0].evidence_hash and
    .payload.evidence_path==$fact[0].evidence_path and
    .payload.identity==$fact[0].identity and
    .payload.previous_event_hash==$fact[0].previous_event_hash and
    .payload.continuity==$fact[0].continuity and
    .payload.handoff_event_hash==$fact[0].handoff_event_hash' "$event" >/dev/null || return 5
  evidence=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" \
    "$(jq -r .evidence_path "$fact")" "$(jq -r .evidence_hash "$fact")") || return 5
  jq -e --slurpfile fact "$fact" '
    (keys|sort)==(["continuity","handoff_event_hash","identity","kind",
      "observed_at","previous_event_hash","schema_version","valid_from",
      "valid_until"]|sort) and
    .schema_version==1 and .kind=="guardian" and
    .observed_at==$fact[0].valid_until and .valid_from==$fact[0].valid_from and
    .valid_until==$fact[0].valid_until and .identity==$fact[0].identity and
    .previous_event_hash==$fact[0].previous_event_hash and
    .continuity==$fact[0].continuity and
    .handoff_event_hash==$fact[0].handoff_event_hash' "$evidence" >/dev/null || return 5
  runtime_audit_event_by_hash "$(jq -r .previous_event_hash "$fact")" >"$resolved" || {
    rm -f "$resolved"; return 5; }
  previous=$(cat "$resolved")
  case $(jq -r .type "$previous") in guardian_observed|work_coverage) :;; *) return 5;; esac
  jq -e --slurpfile fact "$fact" '
    .event_hash==$fact[0].previous_event_hash and .at==$fact[0].valid_from and
    .payload.identity!=null and .payload.evidence_path!=null and
    .payload.evidence_hash!=null' "$previous" >/dev/null || return 5
  previous_evidence=$(runtime_audit_validate_sealed "$RUNTIME_DIR/audit/coverage-evidence" \
    "$(jq -r .payload.evidence_path "$previous")" \
    "$(jq -r .payload.evidence_hash "$previous")") || return 5
  jq -e --slurpfile previous "$previous" '
    .kind=="guardian" and .observed_at==$previous[0].at and
    .identity==$previous[0].payload.identity' "$previous_evidence" >/dev/null || return 5
  continuity=$(jq -r .continuity "$fact")
  if [ "$continuity" = same_identity ]; then
    jq -e --slurpfile previous "$previous" '
      .handoff_event_hash==null and .identity==$previous[0].payload.identity' \
~~~
